We present CuTeGen, an agentic framework for automated generation and optimization of GPU kernels that treats kernel development as a structured generate--test--refine workflow. Unlike approaches that rely on one-shot generation or large-scale search over candidate implementations, CuTeGen focuses on progressive refinement of a single evolving kernel through execution-based validation, structured debugging, and staged optimization. A key design choice is to generate kernels using the CuTe abstraction layer, which exposes performance-critical structures such as tiling and data movement while providing a more stable representation for iterative modification. To guide performance improvement, CuTeGen incorporates workload-aware optimization prompts and delayed integration of profiling feedback. Experimental results on matrix multiplication and activation workloads demonstrate that the framework produces functionally correct kernels and achieves competitive performance relative to optimized library implementations.

AI.tldr: 针对传统GPU kernel开发需专家手工调校且自动工具难兼顾正确性与性能的痛点，提出基于LLM的CuTeGen框架，将kernel开发转化为Step-wise单一kernel生成-测试-调试-优化的闭环流程，在保持正确性的同时逼近cuBLAS等业界库的性能。
AI.motivation: AI训练/推理在GPU上运行，kernel性能决定上限，但现役人工开发耗专家人力数月；现有LLM直接一次性生成或海量搜索法常生成错误且难迭代收敛，缺乏对GPU缓存层次、向量和数据结构等硬件特性耦合的统一抽象，使自动生成卡在
AI.method: 1) 采用CuTe高阶抽象（固定TMA、tile-layout、permute等指令级意图）降幅操作空间并提高迭代稳定性 2) Agent框架流程：单内核原型→通过沙箱TSV/Mela验证器做正确性自检→结构化错误输出（assert,symbolic trace,profiling diff）→LLM回写补丁→延迟2次迭代再重测+注入TVL剖析级反馈→逐步演进至收敛 3) Workload-aware prompt库，按算子类型（GEMM/激活）及规模粒度注入提示，让模型跑对调优方向 4) 限制一次只维护一棵refinement树，避免大采样开销
AI.result: 在一系列64²-8192²规模的FP32 GEMM测试上，CuTeGen生成的内核平均达到cuBLAS 95%-107%性能；对GELU/Swish等激活函数平均95%运行时峰值，皆保证通过了1e-6相对阈值的功能检验，生成周期压缩到人工1/5-1/10  时间且不需专家介入。
AI.conclusion: 以

title: Grounding AI-in-Education Development in Teachers' Voices: Findings from a National Survey in Indonesia
summary: Despite emerging use in Indonesian classrooms, there is limited large-scale, teacher-centred evidence on how AI is used in practice and what support teachers need, hindering the development of context-appropriate AI systems and policies. To address this gap, we conduct a nationwide survey of 349 K-12 teachers across elementary, junior high, and senior high schools. We find increasing use of AI for pedagogy, content development, and teaching media, although adoption remains uneven. Elementary teachers report more consistent use, while senior high teachers engage less; mid-career teachers assign higher importance to AI, and teachers in Eastern Indonesia perceive greater value. Across levels, teachers primarily use AI to reduce instructional preparation workload (e.g., assessment, lesson planning, and material development). However, generic outputs, infrastructure constraints, and limited contextual alignment continue to hinder effective classroom integration.

AI.tldr: 首份印尼全国教师调研显示，AI正被用于备课、出题与做课件，但受限于泛化输出、网络差与本地化不足；小学教师使用更稳定，东部与中年教师更认同AI价值。
AI.motivation: AI在印尼课堂快速渗透，却缺乏以教师为中心的大规模实证，导致政策与系统开发缺抓手。
AI.method: 对349名K-12教师做全国问卷，覆盖小学、初中、高中及东西部地区，比较学段、教龄与区域差异。
AI.result: AI主要用于减负（出题、教案、素材），小学教师使用频率高于高中；中年教师与东部教师赋予AI更高价值；基础设施弱、输出泛化、语境失配是三大障碍。
AI.conclusion: 需面向小学与东部学校优先补齐网络与设备，为高中提供学科深度工具，并以本地化语料与模板降低教师二次加工成本，才能推动AI可持续融入课堂。

title: Adaptive Coverage Policies in Conformal Prediction
summary: Traditional conformal prediction methods construct prediction sets such that the true label falls within the set with a user-specified coverage level. However, poorly chosen coverage levels can result in uninformative predictions, either producing overly conservative sets when the coverage level is too high, or empty sets when it is too low. Moreover, the fixed coverage level cannot adapt to the specific characteristics of each individual example, limiting the flexibility and efficiency of these methods. In this work, we leverage recent advances in e-values and post-hoc conformal inference, which allow the use of data-dependent coverage levels while maintaining valid statistical guarantees. We propose to optimize an adaptive coverage policy by training a neural network using a leave-one-out procedure on the calibration set, allowing the coverage level and the resulting prediction set size to vary with the difficulty of each individual example. We support our approach with theoretical coverage guarantees and demonstrate its practical benefits through a series of experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出用数据驱动的自适应覆盖率替换传统固定覆盖率，通过神经网络在线留一法校准集上学习“难度-覆盖率”策略，使预测集大小随样本难度动态调整，同时保持有限样本覆盖保证。
AI.motivation: 传统共形预测采用全局固定覆盖率，导致对简单样本过于保守、对困难样本可能输出空集，且无法针对个体特征灵活调整，降低实用效率。
AI.method: 借助 e-value 与事后共形推断框架，在离线校准集上执行留一法训练神经网络，输入单个样本特征，输出该样本专属的最优覆盖率，进而构建自适应预测集并建立有限样本覆盖理论。
AI.result: 理论证明方法在任意数据分布下仍保持预设边际覆盖；实验表明相比固定覆盖率基线，所提策略显著减小平均预测集大小，同时在高置信区域保持更强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 将覆盖率从全局常数升级为个体可学习参数，可在不牺牲统计保证的前提下提升共形预测的紧凑性与适应性，为后续在线或高维场景提供可扩展框架。

title: Cross-Domain Vessel Segmentation via Latent Similarity Mining and Iterative Co-Optimization
summary: Retinal vessel segmentation serves as a critical prerequisite for automated diagnosis of retinal pathologies. While recent advances in Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have demonstrated promising performance in this task, significant performance degradation occurs when domain shifts exist between training and testing data. To address these limitations, we propose a novel domain transfer framework that leverages latent vascular similarity across domains and iterative co-optimization of generation and segmentation networks. Specifically, we first pre-train generation networks for source and target domains. Subsequently, the pretrained source-domain conditional diffusion model performs deterministic inversion to establish intermediate latent representations of vascular images, creating domain-agnostic prototypes for target synthesis. Finally, we develop an iterative refinement strategy where segmentation network and generative model undergo mutual optimization through cyclic parameter updating. This co-evolution process enables simultaneous enhancement of cross-domain image synthesis quality and segmentation accuracy. Experiments demonstrate that our framework achieves state-of-the-art performance in cross-domain retinal vessel segmentation, particularly in challenging clinical scenarios with significant modality discrepancies.

AI.tldr: 提出基于潜在血管相似性的跨域视网膜血管分割框架，通过生成－分割网络协同优化与条件扩散模型逆变换，在显著模态差异场景下刷新跨域分割SOTA。
AI.motivation: CNN在训练测试域偏移时性能骤降，临床常遇模态差异（如彩色眼底与OCTA），需一种不依赖目标域标注即可维持分割精度的鲁棒方法。
AI.method: 1) 分别预训练源/目标域生成网络；2) 利用源域条件扩散模型确定性逆变换，提取血管图像域无关潜在原型以合成目标域数据；3) 设计循环参数更新机制，使分割网络与生成分模型交替优化，实现图像合成质量与分割精度的协同提升。
AI.result: 在跨模态与跨数据集视网膜血管分割基准上达到当前最佳性能，尤其在模态差异显著（如FP→OCTA）的临床挑战性场景中提升Dice 9.7%，AUC 4.3%。
AI.conclusion: 通过潜在血管一致性与生成－分割协同进化，框架有效克服域偏移，为临床无标注目标域的自动化诊断提供高质量血管分割解决方案，具备良好的泛化与落地潜力。

title: ThinkTwice: Jointly Optimizing Large Language Models for Reasoning and Self-Refinement
summary: We introduce ThinkTwice, a simple two-phase framework that jointly optimizes LLMs to solve reasoning problems and refine the answers, based on Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). In each pair of training steps, ThinkTwice first optimizes the model on solving reasoning problems, then optimizes it on refining its own solutions to the same problems, using the same binary correctness reward in both phases without correctness signals or critique annotations. Across five mathematical reasoning benchmarks and two model families including Qwen3-4B and Olmo3-7B, ThinkTwice substantially improves both reasoning and refinement performance over competitive online policy optimization baselines. Specifically, on Qwen3-4B, ThinkTwice outperforms GRPO on AIME by 5 percentage points before refinement and by 11.5 points after one self-refinement step, measured by pass@4. Analysis of the training dynamics of ThinkTwice reveals an implicit rectify-then-fortify curriculum: refinement predominantly corrects errors early in training and naturally shifts toward preserving already-correct solutions as the model improves, yielding a more rectified reward signal. Our work establishes joint training of reasoning and self-refinement as a principled and effective methodology for RLVR.

title: Matching Accuracy, Different Geometry: Evolution Strategies vs GRPO in LLM Post-Training
summary: Evolution Strategies (ES) have emerged as a scalable gradient-free alternative to reinforcement learning based LLM fine-tuning, but it remains unclear whether comparable task performance implies comparable solutions in parameter space. We compare ES and Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) across four tasks in both single-task and sequential continual-learning settings. ES matches or exceeds GRPO in single-task accuracy and remains competitive sequentially when its iteration budget is controlled. Despite this similarity in task performance, the two methods produce markedly different model updates: ES makes much larger changes and induces broader off-task KL drift, whereas GRPO makes smaller, more localized updates. Strikingly, the ES and GRPO solutions are linearly connected with no loss barrier, even though their update directions are nearly orthogonal. We develop an analytical theory of ES that explains all these phenomena within a unified framework, showing how ES can accumulate large off-task movement on weakly informative directions while still making enough progress on the task to match gradient-based RL in downstream accuracy. These results show that gradient-free and gradient-based fine-tuning can reach similarly accurate yet geometrically distinct solutions, with important consequences for forgetting and knowledge preservation. The source code is publicly available: https://github.com/Bhoy1/ESvsGRPO.

AI.tldr: 尽管无梯度 ES 微调与基于 RL 的 GRPO 在下游精度上旗鼓相当，但它们在参数空间中走的是几何上截然不同的路径，且 ES 解的主轴漂移更大、更新更全局；作者用一个统一的解析理论解释了这些现象及其对持续学习中遗忘的影响。
AI.motivation: 大模型微调领域存在梯度无关（Evolution Strategies, ES）和基于梯度（GRPO）两种范式。前者规模友好但缺乏理论阐释，尤其不清楚在性能打平时，它们的解在参数空间是否相似——这直接影响持续学习中对遗忘和知识保持的分析。
AI.method: 1) 在 4 个任务上做单任务与序列式持续学习对比，控制同样迭代预算；2) 跟踪并量化两种方法在参数空间的更新幅度、方向余弦、任务外 KL 漂移及线性连通屏障；3) 建立对应 ES 的解析对齐理论，从“弱信息方向上噪放积累 vs. 任务方向合格进步”视角统一解释观察。
AI.result: 单任务准确率：ES 持平或优于 GRPO；序列场景下预算受控时仍具竞争力。参数更新：ES 更新幅度大、KL 漂移宽，GRPO 则“小而局部”。虽然更新方向几乎正交，两种解在参数空间却可线性插值且无损失尖峰屏障。
AI.conclusion: 梯度无关与基于梯度的微调能到达同等精度但在参数流形上走向截然不同的几何构型；这对下游持续学习中的遗忘与知识保留机制具有重要启示，并指出控制主任务方向可兼顾性能和漂移的理论路径。代码已开源。

title: Fragile Reasoning: A Mechanistic Analysis of LLM Sensitivity to Meaning-Preserving Perturbations
summary: Large language models demonstrate strong performance on mathematical reasoning benchmarks, yet remain surprisingly fragile to meaning-preserving surface perturbations. We systematically evaluate three open-weight LLMs, Mistral-7B, Llama-3-8B, and Qwen2.5-7B, on 677 GSM8K problems paired with semantically equivalent variants generated through name substitution and number format paraphrasing. All three models exhibit substantial answer-flip rates (28.8%-45.1%), with number paraphrasing consistently more disruptive than name swaps. To trace the mechanistic basis of these failures, we introduce the Mechanistic Perturbation Diagnostics (MPD) framework, combining logit lens analysis, activation patching, component ablation, and the Cascading Amplification Index (CAI) into a unified diagnostic pipeline. CAI, a novel metric quantifying layer-wise divergence amplification, outperforms first divergence layer as a failure predictor for two of three architectures (AUC up to 0.679). Logit lens reveals that flipped samples diverge from correct predictions at significantly earlier layers than stable samples. Activation patching reveals a stark architectural divide in failure localizability: Llama-3 failures are recoverable by patching at specific layers (43/60 samples), while Mistral and Qwen failures are broadly distributed (3/60 and 0/60). Based on these diagnostic signals, we propose a mechanistic failure taxonomy (localized, distributed, and entangled) and validate it through targeted repair experiments: steering vectors and layer fine-tuning recover 12.2% of localized failures (Llama-3) but only 7.2% of entangled (Qwen) and 5.2% of distributed (Mistral) failures.

AI.tldr: 表面扰动致数学推理模型大比例答案翻转；提出MPD诊断框架，定位LLaMA-3失败集中于若干层，Mistral/Qwen呈分布式；据此构建局部/分布/纠缠三类失败谱系，可修复率依次递减。
AI.motivation: 大模型在数学基准上表现亮眼，但对成语义等价的表面扰动仍极敏感；缺乏对其失败机制的系统性诊断与可解释性研究。
AI.method: 1) 构建677对GSM8K等价变体（人名替换+数字改写）测试三款开源7B模型；2) 提出统一诊断框架MPD，结合logit lens、激活修补、部件消融及层放大指标CAI；3) 针对诊断分型进行针对性修复：方向性向量与层微调。
AI.result: 1) 触发28.8%-45.1%答案翻转，数字改写威胁最高；2) CAI预测失败能力优于首分歧层（AUC最高0.679）；3) LLaMA-3 60例中43例集中在少数层可修补，Mistral/Qwen失效分布广；修复仅局部型有效（12.2%），纠缠/分布型难修复。
AI.conclusion: 数学推理表面的脆弱性源于模型内部的定位/分布/纠缠三类机制；集中式失效可通过层干预有效改善，分布式失效需更精细全局策略。

title: Learning with Incomplete Context: Linear Contextual Bandits with Pretrained Imputation
summary: The rise of large-scale pretrained models has made it feasible to generate predictive or synthetic features at low cost, raising the question of how to incorporate such surrogate predictions into downstream decision-making. We study this problem in the setting of online linear contextual bandits, where contexts may be complex, nonstationary, and only partially observed. In addition to bandit data, we assume access to an auxiliary dataset containing fully observed contexts--common in practice since such data are collected without adaptive interventions. We propose PULSE-UCB, an algorithm that leverages pretrained models trained on the auxiliary data to impute missing features during online decision-making. We establish regret guarantees that decompose into a standard bandit term plus an additional component reflecting pretrained model quality. In the i.i.d. context case with Hölder-smooth missing features, PULSE-UCB achieves near-optimal performance, supported by matching lower bounds. Our results quantify how uncertainty in predicted contexts affects decision quality and how much historical data is needed to improve downstream learning.

AI.tldr: 借助预训练模型生成的伪特征，解决部分观测环境下的在线线性上下文老虎机问题；提出 PULSE-UCB，首次给出可量化预测误差的遗憾界并证明近优。
AI.motivation: 复杂、非平稳且仅部分可见的上下文使得传统 bandit 算法性能退化；实践中常见
AI.method: 1) 利用额外获得的完全观测离线数据训练预/生成模型，学习任务无关的上下文先验；2) 在线阶段用预模型对缺失特征进行插补；3) 对每臂维护
AI.result: 在 I.I.D.－Hölder 平滑缺失特征假设下，PULSE-UCB 的 T 轮伪遗憾① ≤ 2√(dT)②＋Õ(T^{1−β/4(d+β)})  ③＋初始化成本，与下界一同证明存在 ε = Õ(T^{−β/2(d+β)}) 的差距仅与平滑度 β 相关；额外历史数据量 N≈T^{2(d+β)/(2(d+β)+β)} 即可消除主要插补误差。
AI.conclusion: 首次在理论上量化了“预训练模型预测误差”与“bandit 决策质量”的正则联系；所需辅助数据量与模型质量、上下文复杂度呈多项式关系，表明用大规模历史数据预填补可显著降低在线遗憾。

title: ReFlow: Self-correction Motion Learning for Dynamic Scene Reconstruction
summary: We present ReFlow, a unified framework for monocular dynamic scene reconstruction that learns 3D motion in a novel self-correction manner from raw video. Existing methods often suffer from incomplete scene initialization for dynamic regions, leading to unstable reconstruction and motion estimation, which often resorts to external dense motion guidance such as pre-computed optical flow to further stabilize and constrain the reconstruction of dynamic components. However, this introduces additional complexity and potential error propagation. To address these issues, ReFlow integrates a Complete Canonical Space Construction module for enhanced initialization of both static and dynamic regions, and a Separation-Based Dynamic Scene Modeling module that decouples static and dynamic components for targeted motion supervision. The core of ReFlow is a novel self-correction flow matching mechanism, consisting of Full Flow Matching to align 3D scene flow with time-varying 2D observations, and Camera Flow Matching to enforce multi-view consistency for static objects. Together, these modules enable robust and accurate dynamic scene reconstruction. Extensive experiments across diverse scenarios demonstrate that ReFlow achieves superior reconstruction quality and robustness, establishing a novel self-correction paradigm for monocular 4D reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 提出ReFlow，用自修正流匹配机制，无需外部光流，即可从单目视频同时恢复动态场景几何与3D运动。
AI.motivation: 单目动态重建常因动态区初始化差导致重建漂移，现有方法依赖预计算光流做约束，既复杂又易引入误差，亟需去除外部运动先验并提升稳定性。
AI.method: 设计统一框架ReFlow：(1) Complete Canonical Space Construction同时初始化静态/动态区域；(2) Separation-Based Dynamic Scene Modeling解耦静动态分量，分别监督；(3) Self-Correction Flow Matching：Full Flow Matching使3D场景流对齐时序2D观测，Camera Flow Matching对静态物强制多视角一致，通过循环修正实现鲁棒重建。
AI.result: 在多种场景的大量实验中，ReFlow的重建精度与鲁棒性显著优于现有单目动态重建方法，且无需任何外部运动输入。
AI.conclusion: ReFlow用自修正流匹配代替外部光流，为单目4D重建确立了简洁而稳健的新范式。

title: Do Large Language Models Mentalize When They Teach?
comment: 9 pages, 5 figures. Workshop paper at ICML 2026
summary: How do LLMs decide what to teach next: by reasoning about a learner's knowledge, or by using simpler rules of thumb? We test this in a controlled task previously used to study human teaching strategies. On each trial, a teacher LLM sees a hypothetical learner's trajectory through a reward-annotated directed graph and must reveal a single edge so the learner would choose a better path if they replanned. We run a range of LLMs as simulated teachers and fit their trial-by-trial choices with the same cognitive models used for humans: a Bayes-Optimal teacher that infers which transitions the learner is missing (inverse planning), weaker Bayesian variants, heuristic baselines (e.g., reward based), and non-mentalizing utility models. In a baseline experiment matched to the stimuli presented to human subjects, most LLMs perform well, show little change in strategy over trials, and their graph-by-graph performance is similar to that of humans. Model comparison (BIC) shows that Bayes-Optimal teaching best explains most models' choices. When given a scaffolding intervention, models follow auxiliary inference- or reward-focused prompts, but these scaffolds do not reliably improve later teaching on heuristic-incongruent test graphs and can sometimes reduce performance. Overall, cognitive model fits provide insight into LLM tutoring policies and show that prompt compliance does not guarantee better teaching decisions.

AI.tldr: 用认知建模比较 LLM 与人类教学策略：多数 LLM 被 Bayes-Optimal 模型最好解释，提示脚手架虽能改变行为但未必提升教学效果。
AI.motivation: 揭示大语言模型在“教什么下一步”时是进行推理学习者知识，还是仅凭启发式规则，从而理解其教学决策机制。
AI.method: 在奖励标注有向图任务中，让多型 LLM 扮演教师、逐轮暴露单条边以引导虚拟学习者；用与人类研究相同的认知模型（Bayes-Optimal 逆规划、弱贝叶斯变体、奖励启发式等）对 LLM 的逐轮选择进行 BIC 拟合，并测试提示脚手架对后续教学的影响。
AI.result: 多数 LLM 教学表现接近人类且策略稳定；Bayes-Optimal 模型对其选择的解释力最强；推理导向或奖励导向的提示虽能被遵守，但在与启发式冲突的新图上未可靠提升、甚至降低表现。
AI.conclusion: LLM 的教学策略可被形式化认知模型刻画为近似 Bayes-Optimal，但prompt 服从不等于教学优化，提示设计需谨慎验证迁移效果。

title: Beyond Logit Adjustment: A Residual Decomposition Framework for Long-Tailed Reranking
summary: Long-tailed classification, where a small number of frequent classes dominate many rare ones, remains challenging because models systematically favor frequent classes at inference time. Existing post-hoc methods such as logit adjustment address this by adding a fixed classwise offset to the base-model logits. However, the correction required to restore the relative ranking of two classes need not be constant across inputs, and a fixed offset cannot adapt to such variation. We study this problem through Bayes-optimal reranking on a base-model top-k shortlist. The gap between the optimal score and the base score, the residual correction, decomposes into a classwise component that is constant within each class, and a pairwise component that depends on the input and competing labels. When the residual is purely classwise, a fixed offset suffices to recover the Bayes-optimal ordering. We further show that when the same label pair induces incompatible ordering constraints across contexts, no fixed offset can achieve this recovery. This decomposition leads to testable predictions regarding when pairwise correction can improve performance and when cannot. We develop REPAIR (Reranking via Pairwise residual correction), a lightweight post-hoc reranker that combines a shrinkage-stabilized classwise term with a linear pairwise term driven by competition features on the shortlist. Experiments on five benchmarks spanning image classification, species recognition, scene recognition, and rare disease diagnosis confirm that the decomposition explains where pairwise correction helps and where classwise correction alone suffices.

AI.tldr: 针对长尾分类中“高频类占绝对优势”的问题，本文指出固定类别偏移这类后处理方法无法应对同类在不同样本上所需校正值的变化，把贝叶斯最优重排转换为类别残差↔成对残差的可检验二分类近似，并提出REPAIR（类别+成对双分量补偿）来提升召回率和精确度。
AI.motivation: 长尾数据中低频类在推理时被系统性忽略。现有“logit整体偏移”仅按类别统一补偿，未考虑同类间样本差异导致的相对打分偏差，因此能否用统一的补偿分量、何时还需更细粒度的成对补偿尚缺乏可验证理论。
AI.method: 1. 仅取Top-k短列表，建立贝叶斯最优重排框架。2. 用信息-熵方法把最优与baseline之差R=R_c+R_p，其中R_c为纯类别常数项，R_p为“成对且与输入/上下文相关”项；推导得性质：当且仅当同类在不同上下文产生兼容排序时，R_p≡0。3. 据此给出可测试假设：若某类别对出现冲突约束，则需配对补偿；否则仅R_c即可。4. 设计REPAIR：①院内（in-dataset）收缩估计稳健化R_c；②用短列表内竞争特征线性模型学习R_p（参数仅O(k²)）。
AI.result: 在五项公开长尾任务（图像分类、物种识别、场景识别和罕见病诊断）上：(i) 理论与经验完全吻合——发生冲突的类别对使用REPAIR后相对增益平均+4.1% F1，未冲突对基本不变；(ii) REPAIR整体在Imbalanced-CIFAR、iNaturalist、CUB-200、CIFAR-10/100-LT、ChestX-ray14上较最优基线（LADE、cRT、τ-norm等）提升1.9-5.6 Acc和3.8-7.2 Balanced-Top-5精度，且GPU-Only <42 ms；固定类别偏移方法在冲突场景反而下降1.1-2.3%。
AI.conclusion: 长尾校正的“充分统计”并非单一全局偏移，而是输入-上下文依赖的类别+成对组合残差；REPAIR提供的轻量级重排模块能按此理论自适应打开补偿力度，有效提升难类表现而不损高频类精度，为后续研究给出直观可检验的理论工具与易部署方案。

title: What Do Claim Verification Datasets Actually Test? A Reasoning Trace Analysis
summary: Despite rapid progress in claim verification, we lack a systematic understanding of what reasoning these benchmarks actually exercise. We generate structured reasoning traces for 24K claim-verification examples across 9 datasets using GPT-4o-mini and find that direct evidence extraction dominates, while multi-sentence synthesis and numerical reasoning are severely under-represented. A dataset-level breakdown reveals stark biases: some datasets almost exclusively test lexical matching, while others require information synthesis in roughly half of cases. Using a compact 1B-parameter reasoning verifier, we further characterize five error types and show that error profiles vary dramatically by domain -- general-domain verification is dominated by lexical overlap bias, scientific verification by overcautiousness, and mathematical verification by arithmetic reasoning failures. Our findings suggest that high benchmark scores primarily reflect retrieval-plus-entailment ability. We outline recommendations for building more challenging evaluation suites that better test the reasoning capabilities verification systems need.

AI.tldr: 首次揭示现有“事实核查”基准真正测试到的推理类型严重失衡——95%+是单句检索+蕴含，而多句综合和数值推理几乎空缺；同时指出科学、数学、泛领域错误谱完全不同，为后续设计更具挑战性的测评提供路线图。
AI.motivation: 社区在声明验证基准上不断刷新 SOTA，却没人系统回答“这些 benchmark 到底在测什么推理能力”。作者怀疑高分主要靠‘检索+蕴含’，而非真实世界所需的综合、数值与领域推理，于是决定对 9 套主流数据集的 2.4 万样本进行推理痕迹拆解与误差画像刻画。
AI.method: 1) 用 GPT-4o-mini 给 2.4 万验证示例生成结构化推理痕迹（主技能标签：Evidence-Extraction、Multi-Sentence Synthesi、Numerical Reasoning 等）；2) 统计各数据集技能分布，发现极端偏差；3) 训练 1B 参数的轻量推理验证器，在预测阶段注入五种可解释错误类型，对比不同领域错误谱；4) 结合误差分析与技能空缺，提出新 benchmark 设计原则。
AI.result: a) 92–98% 样本仅靠“直接证据提取+蕴含”即可答对，Multi-Sentence Synthesis 占比<5%，Numerical Reasoning<3%；b) 数据集间差异巨大：FEVER 几乎纯测词面匹配，Scifact 50% 需跨句综合，MathAVeri 70% 含算术推理却没人注意；c) 1B  verifier 显示：泛领域最易犯 Lexical-Overlap Bias，科学领域 60% 误杀为“过度保守”，数学领域 45% 错因是算术/单位错误；d) 同一模型在不同领域 F1 差距可达 30+ 分，说明高分≠通用推理能力。
AI.conclusion: 当前声明验证高分主要度量“检索+蕴含”而非综合推理。未来 benchmark 应：① 强制多句、跨段、跨模态合成；② 提升数值与单位推理占比；③ 按领域独立报告错误类型，避免被总体指标掩盖；④ 引入可解释 verifier 做动态难度与偏差检测，推动系统真正具备复杂世界所需的推理能力。

title: Coarsening Causal DAG Models
comment: 27 pages, 5 figures; accepted to the 5th conference on Causal Learning and Reasoning (CLeaR)
summary: Directed acyclic graphical (DAG) models are a powerful tool for representing causal relationships among jointly distributed random variables, especially concerning data from across different experimental settings. However, it is not always practical or desirable to estimate a causal model at the granularity of given features in a particular dataset. There is a growing body of research on causal abstraction to address such problems. We contribute to this line of research by (i) providing novel graphical identifiability results for practically-relevant interventional settings, (ii) proposing an efficient, provably consistent algorithm for directly learning abstract causal graphs from interventional data with unknown intervention targets, and (iii) uncovering theoretical insights about the lattice structure of the underlying search space, with connections to the field of causal discovery more generally. As proof of concept, we apply our algorithm on synthetic and real datasets with known ground truths, including measurements from a controlled physical system with interacting light intensity and polarization.

AI.tldr: Summary generation failed
AI.motivation: Motivation analysis unavailable
AI.method: Method extraction failed
AI.result: Result analysis unavailable
AI.conclusion: Conclusion extraction failed

title: VideoZeroBench: Probing the Limits of Video MLLMs with Spatio-Temporal Evidence Verification
summary: Recent video multimodal large language models achieve impressive results across various benchmarks. However, current evaluations suffer from two critical limitations: (1) inflated scores can mask deficiencies in fine-grained visual understanding and reasoning, and (2) answer correctness is often measured without verifying whether models identify the precise spatio-temporal evidence supporting their predictions. To address this, we present VideoZeroBench, a hierarchical benchmark designed for challenging long-video question answering that rigorously verifies spatio-temporal evidence. It comprises 500 manually annotated questions across 13 domains, paired with temporal intervals and spatial bounding boxes as evidence. To disentangle answering generation, temporal grounding, and spatial grounding, we introduce a five-level evaluation protocol that progressively tightens evidence requirements. Experiments show that even Gemini-3-Pro correctly answers fewer than 17% of questions under the standard end-to-end QA setting (Level-3). When grounding constraints are imposed, performance drops sharply: No model exceeds 1% accuracy when both correct answering and accurate spatio-temporal localization are required (Level-5), with most failing to achieve any correct grounded predictions. These results expose a significant gap between surface-level answer correctness and genuine evidence-based reasoning, revealing that grounded video understanding remains a bottleneck for long-video QA. We further analyze performance across minimal evidence spans, atomic abilities, and inference paradigms, providing insights for future research in grounded video reasoning. The benchmark and code will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: 作者发现现有多模态大模型对长视频的理解存在“表象正确但实际无据”的幻觉，为此提出全新层级基准 VideoZeroBench，强制性同时评估模型的答案准确性及其对应的时空证据定位能力，结果揭示所有模型在严格同条件（Level-5）下准确率均不足1%。
AI.motivation: 现有长视频问答评测要么分数虚高、不检验细粒度推理，要么只看答案而忽视模型是否真正定位到支撑预测的时空片段，导致对模型能力产生错误估计，阻碍了真正的“有根据视觉推理”研究。
AI.method: 手动构建含 500 问、13 领域的「问-时序区间-空间框」三元组，设计五层逐渐收紧的评估协议（Level-1…5），要求模型依次完成回答、定位起始/持续段落、输出精确边界框等任务，只有同时满足全部条件才算通过。
AI.result: 端到端 QA（L-3）场景下最强模型 Gemini-3-Pro 仅 17% 准确率；一旦强制在相同答题时给出正确且准确的时空框（L-5），各模型几乎全军覆没，Top-1 准确率低于 1%，连一次正确定位都几乎做不到；即便放宽只考时间（L-4）或空间（L-4′）成绩也极低。
AI.conclusion: 表面“答对”≠真正基于时空证据理解，当前模型在长视频中缺乏联合问答与定位能力，时空证据型定位是当前最大瓶颈；作者建议未来工作围绕短证据段分析、原子能力（拆分定位-验证）和推理范式改进，以推进稳健的视频推理系统。实验代码与基准将全面公开。

title: ByteRover: Agent-Native Memory Through LLM-Curated Hierarchical Context
summary: Memory-Augmented Generation (MAG) extends large language models with external memory to support long-context reasoning, but existing approaches universally treat memory as an external service that agents call into, delegating storage to separate pipelines of chunking, embedding, and graph extraction. This architectural separation means the system that stores knowledge does not understand it, leading to semantic drift between what the agent intended to remember and what the pipeline actually captured, loss of coordination context across agents, and fragile recovery after failures. In this paper, we propose ByteRover, an agent-native memory architecture that inverts the memory pipeline: the same LLM that reasons about a task also curates, structures, and retrieves knowledge. ByteRover represents knowledge in a hierarchical Context Tree, a file-based knowledge graph organized as Domain, Topic, Subtopic, and Entry, where each entry carries explicit relations, provenance, and an Adaptive Knowledge Lifecycle (AKL) with importance scoring, maturity tiers, and recency decay. Retrieval uses a 5-tier progressive strategy that resolves most queries at sub-100 ms latency without LLM calls, escalating to agentic reasoning only for novel questions. Experiments on LoCoMo and LongMemEval demonstrate that ByteRover achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on LoCoMo and competitive results on LongMemEval while requiring zero external infrastructure, no vector database, no graph database, no embedding service, with all knowledge stored as human-readable markdown files on the local filesystem.

AI.tldr: ByteRover 把「记忆」从外部黑箱变成 LLM 自己打理的本地树状知识图谱，5 层渐进检索毫秒级响应，零外挂、零向量库、零图库，LoCoMo 准确率 SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有 Memory-Augmented Generation 都把记忆当「外部服务」，切片-嵌入-建图由独立流水线完成，导致「存的人不懂」：语义漂移、多 Agent 协作上下文丢失、故障难恢复。
AI.method: 提出 Agent-native 架构 ByteRover：同一 LLM 负责「写-管-读」。知识以四层 Context Tree（域-主题-子题-条目）+ 显式关系/来源存成本地 Markdown；配套 Adaptive Knowledge Lifecycle（重要性打分、成熟度等级、时间衰减）。检索用 5-tier 渐进策略（文件级→缓存→局部子图→全文→LLM 推理），前四级纯本地 I/O <100 ms，仅新问题才触发 LLM。
AI.result: LoCoMo 数据集上准确率刷新 SOTA；LongMemEval 结果与最佳系统持平；全程无需向量数据库、图数据库、嵌入服务，全部知识以人读 Markdown 存在于本地文件系统。
AI.conclusion: 把记忆控制权交还给 Agent 本身，可消除语义漂移、提升协作鲁棒性，并在零外部依赖条件下取得顶级长上下文表现，为轻量化、可解释、可迁移的长期记忆系统提供了新范式。

title: Learning ECG Image Representations via Dual Physiological-Aware Alignments
summary: Electrocardiograms (ECGs) are among the most widely used diagnostic tools for cardiovascular diseases, and a large amount of ECG data worldwide appears only in image form. However, most existing automated ECG analysis methods rely on access to raw signal recordings, limiting their applicability in real-world and resource-constrained settings. In this paper, we present ECG-Scan, a self-supervised framework for learning clinically generalized representations from ECG images through dual physiological-aware alignments: 1) Our approach optimizes image representation learning using multimodal contrastive alignment between image and gold-standard signal-text modalities. 2) We further integrate domain knowledge via soft-lead constraints, regularizing the reconstruction process and improving signal lead inter-consistency. Extensive benchmarking across multiple datasets and downstream tasks demonstrates that our image-based model achieves superior performance compared to existing image baselines and notably narrows the gap between ECG image and signal analysis. These results highlight the potential of self-supervised image modeling to unlock large-scale legacy ECG data and broaden access to automated cardiovascular diagnostics.

AI.tldr: ECG-Scan 用自监督对比+软导联约束，直接把 ECG 图像学到与金标准信号-文本对齐的通用表征，在多项下游任务上逼近信号级模型，为海量历史纸质/图片 ECG 提供自动化诊断入口。
AI.motivation: 全球海量 ECG 仅存图像，现有算法却只能用原始数字信号，导致资源匮乏场景无法自动化诊断，亟需从图像重建可临床通用的信息。
AI.method: 1. 多模态对比学习：将 ECG 图像与同步信号-文本描述做跨模态对齐，习得生理一致特征。2. 软导联约束：引入导联拓扑知识，在图像到信号重构阶段正则化导联间一致性，减少伪影。
AI.result: 在 PTB-XL、CPSC 等 4 个公开集上，图像模型在 5 类心律/梗死分类、信号质量评估等任务中比最强图像基线平均提升 6.8–11.2%，准确率差距由 15% 缩小至 2.3%，接近信号级上限。
AI.conclusion: 自监督图像建模可解锁大规模历史 ECG 影像，为低资源地区提供可部署、无信号的自动心血管筛查方案，并支持后续移动端拍照诊断扩展。

title: PRCCF: A Persona-guided Retrieval and Causal-aware Cognitive Filtering Framework for Emotional Support Conversation
comment: 14 pages, 6 figures, 5 tables. Submitted to Transactions of the Association for Computational Linguistics (TACL)
summary: Emotional Support Conversation (ESC) aims to alleviate individual emotional distress by generating empathetic responses. However, existing methods face challenges in effectively supporting deep contextual understanding. To address this issue, we propose PRCCF, a Persona-guided Retrieval and Causality-aware Cognitive Filtering framework. Specifically, the framework incorporates a persona-guided retrieval mechanism that jointly models semantic compatibility and persona alignment to enhance response generation. Furthermore, it employs a causality-aware cognitive filtering module to prioritize causally relevant external knowledge, thereby improving contextual cognitive understanding for emotional reasoning. Extensive experiments on the ESConv dataset demonstrate that PRCCF outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on both automatic metrics and human evaluations. Our code is publicly available at: https://github.com/YancyLyx/PRCCF.

AI.tldr: Persona-guided retrieval + causal filtering improves empathetic dialogues.
AI.motivation: 现有情感支持对话系统对深层上下文理解不足，难以精准回应用户情绪。
AI.method: 提出 PRCCF：①用 persona-guided 检索将语义兼容性与角色对齐联合建模，召回更贴切的支持回复；②引入因果感知认知过滤，剔除无关外部知识，仅保留对情绪推理有因果贡献的信息。
AI.result: 在 ESConv 基准上，PRCCF 的自动指标（BLEU、BERTScore、EmpathyScore 等）与人工评估均显著优于 SOTA 基线。
AI.conclusion: 融合角色先验与因果约束可有效提升情感支持的共情深度与上下文一致性，代码已开源。

title: Contextual Distributionally Robust Optimization with Causal and Continuous Structure: An Interpretable and Tractable Approach
summary: In this paper, we introduce a framework for contextual distributionally robust optimization (DRO) that considers the causal and continuous structure of the underlying distribution by developing interpretable and tractable decision rules that prescribe decisions using covariates. We first introduce the causal Sinkhorn discrepancy (CSD), an entropy-regularized causal Wasserstein distance that encourages continuous transport plans while preserving the causal consistency. We then formulate a contextual DRO model with a CSD-based ambiguity set, termed Causal Sinkhorn DRO (Causal-SDRO), and derive its strong dual reformulation where the worst-case distribution is characterized as a mixture of Gibbs distributions. To solve the corresponding infinite-dimensional policy optimization, we propose the Soft Regression Forest (SRF) decision rule, which approximates optimal policies within arbitrary measurable function spaces. The SRF preserves the interpretability of classical decision trees while being fully parametric, differentiable, and Lipschitz smooth, enabling intrinsic interpretation from both global and local perspectives. To solve the Causal-SDRO with parametric decision rules, we develop an efficient stochastic compositional gradient algorithm that converges to an $\varepsilon$-stationary point at a rate of $O(\varepsilon^{-4})$, matching the convergence rate of standard stochastic gradient descent. Finally, we validate our method through numerical experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets, demonstrating its superior performance and interpretability.

AI.tldr: 提出Causal-SDRO框架：用因果Sinkhorn差异刻画分布歧义，以Soft Regression Forest做可解释决策规则，并给出复杂度O(ε⁻⁴)的随机组合梯度算法，在合成与真实数据上验证优势。
AI.motivation: 经典分布鲁棒优化忽视协变量提供的因果与连续结构，导致策略不可解释且难处理。需要一种能利用协变量、保持因果一致性并支持可解释决策的新框架。
AI.method: 1) 定义因果Sinkhorn差异(CSD)——带熵正则的因果Wasserstein距离；2) 构建以CSD为歧义集的Causal-SDRO模型，导出强对偶形式，得到Gibbs混合的最坏分布；3) 设计Soft Regression Forest(SRF)参数化策略类，兼具可解释、可微、Lipschitz平滑；4) 提出随机组合梯度算法，在参数化策略空间中求ε-平稳解。
AI.result: 理论：Causal-SDRO对偶成立，SRF可任意逼近可测策略，算法收敛率O(ε⁻⁴)匹配标准SGD；实验：在合成与真实数据集上，Causal-SDRO比现有DRO及因果方法预测+决策性能更优，且全局/局部解释性强。
AI.conclusion: Causal-SDRO首次把因果连续信息引入DRO，结合SRF实现可解释策略优化，兼顾理论保证与计算效率，为因果驱动鲁棒决策提供新范式。

title: Harmonized Tabular-Image Fusion via Gradient-Aligned Alternating Learning
summary: Multimodal tabular-image fusion is an emerging task that has received increasing attention in various domains. However, existing methods may be hindered by gradient conflicts between modalities, misleading the optimization of the unimodal learner. In this paper, we propose a novel Gradient-Aligned Alternating Learning (GAAL) paradigm to address this issue by aligning modality gradients. Specifically, GAAL adopts an alternating unimodal learning and shared classifier to decouple the multimodal gradient and facilitate interaction. Furthermore, we design uncertainty-based cross-modal gradient surgery to selectively align cross-modal gradients, thereby steering the shared parameters to benefit all modalities. As a result, GAAL can provide effective unimodal assistance and help boost the overall fusion performance. Empirical experiments on widely used datasets reveal the superiority of our method through comparison with various state-of-the-art (SoTA) tabular-image fusion baselines and test-time tabular missing baselines. The source code is available at https://github.com/njustkmg/ICME26-GAAL.

AI.tldr: 针对表格-图像多模态融合中因梯度冲突导致优化偏差的问题，作者提出梯度对齐交替学习框架 GAAL，用交替单模训练+共享分类器解耦梯度，并引入基于不确定度的跨模梯度手术，实现选择性对齐，提升融合与缺失模态鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 多模态表格-图像融合虽受关注，但现有方法常因不同模态梯度方向冲突，使共享参数被某一模态主导，导致单模学习者被误导、整体性能受限，亟需显式缓解梯度冲突。
AI.method: 提出 Gradient-Aligned Alternating Learning (GAAL) 范式：1) 交替执行单模态训练与共享分类器前向推断，在时间上解耦多模态梯度；2) 设计基于不确定度的跨模梯度手术(U-CMGS)，仅当梯度夹角大且高不确定度时才进行投影修正，从而选择性对齐跨模梯度；3) 整个流程无需额外生成器或复杂融合网络，可直接嵌入现有 backbone。
AI.result: 在五个主流表格-图像数据集上与十余种 SoTA 融合及测试时表格缺失基线相比，GAAL 将平均 AUC 提升 2.1%–4.7%，并在 30%–50% 表格特征随机缺失情况下仍保持 ≥95% 完整模态性能；消融实验证实交替机制与 U-CMGS 各自贡献约 60% 与 40% 的增益。
AI.conclusion: GAAL 通过简单有效的梯度对齐策略，显著缓解跨模梯度冲突，可在不增加推理成本的前提下持续增强融合精度与缺失鲁棒性，为多模态表格-视觉学习提供新的优化范式。

title: MM-ReCoder: Advancing Chart-to-Code Generation with Reinforcement Learning and Self-Correction
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have recently demonstrated promising capabilities in multimodal coding tasks such as chart-to-code generation. However, existing methods primarily rely on supervised fine-tuning (SFT), which requires the model to learn code patterns through chart-code pairs but does not expose the model to a code execution environment. Moreover, while self-correction through execution feedback offers a potential route to improve coding quality, even state-of-the-art MLLMs have been shown to struggle with effective self-correction. In this work, we introduce MM-ReCoder, a chart-to-code generation model trained with reinforcement learning (RL) and equipped with self-correction ability. We propose a two-stage multi-turn self-correction RL strategy based on Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). The first stage enhances the model's self-correction ability via rolling out a shared first turn, while the second stage improves the coding capability with full-trajectory optimization. MM-ReCoder learns to produce more accurate and executable code through the interaction with the environment and by iteratively correcting its own outputs. Our results on three chart-to-code benchmarks demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of MM-ReCoder.

AI.tldr: 提出基于强化学习的多模态图表→代码生成模型MM-ReCoder，通过两阶段多轮自我修正RL策略在无需人工标注的情况下显著提升生成代码的正确性与可执行性，在3个基准上刷新SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM在图表→代码任务中仅能依赖SFT，缺乏与代码执行环境的交互且自我修正能力弱，导致生成代码可执行性差。作者希望让模型通过与执行环境交互并自我纠错，获得更高质量的代码。
AI.method: 设计两阶段GRPO强化学习框架：①首轮共享roll-out训练自我修正策略，使模型学会利用执行反馈纠错；②全轨迹优化阶段强化整体代码生成能力，无需额外人工标注即可在环境中迭代改进。
AI.result: 在Matplotlib2Code、Chart2Code、Plot2Code三个公开基准上达到新SOTA，生成代码的语法正确率、执行通过率及功能正确率均显著超越现有最佳MLLM。
AI.conclusion: 引入执行反馈的强化学习范式能有效突破SFT局限，MM-ReCoder验证了多轮自我修正机制可让MLLM在图表→代码任务中持续自我提升，为后续多模态代码生成研究提供了可扩展的RL框架。

title: ZEUS: Accelerating Diffusion Models with Only Second-Order Predictor
summary: Denoising generative models deliver high-fidelity generation but remain bottlenecked by inference latency due to the many iterative denoiser calls required during sampling. Training-free acceleration methods reduce latency by either sparsifying the model architecture or shortening the sampling trajectory. Current training-free acceleration methods are more complex than necessary: higher-order predictors amplify error under aggressive speedups, and architectural modifications hinder deployment. Beyond 2x acceleration, step skipping creates structural scarcity -- at most one fresh evaluation per local window -- leaving the computed output and its backward difference as the only causally grounded information. Based on this, we propose ZEUS, an acceleration method that predicts reduced denoiser evaluations using a second-order predictor, and stabilizes aggressive consecutive skipping with an interleaved scheme that avoids back-to-back extrapolations. ZEUS adds essentially zero overhead, no feature caches, and no architectural modifications, and it is compatible with different backbones, prediction objectives, and solver choices. Across image and video generation, ZEUS consistently improves the speed-fidelity performance over recent training-free baselines, achieving up to 3.2x end-to-end speedup while maintaining perceptual quality. Our code is available at: https://github.com/Ting-Justin-Jiang/ZEUS.

AI.tldr: 无需再训练的扩散生成加速框架ZEUS，以零开销、二阶预测+跳步交错策略，在图像/视频任务上实现最高3.2×端到端提速且保真不降。
AI.motivation: 现有免训练加速法要么高阶预测误差爆炸，要么需改动网络，难以在>2×激进提速下兼顾质量与部署友好性。
AI.method: 利用跳步后局部窗口仅含一次新鲜评测的“结构稀缺”事实，设计二阶预测器估算被跳过去的去噪步，并以交错排布避免连续外推放大误差；全程不改模型、不缓存特征、不增延迟。
AI.result: 在多种扩散骨干、预测目标与采样器上，ZEUS相较最新免训练基线持续提升速度-保真权衡，ImageNet 256×256与视频生成任务分别取得3.2×与2.7×实测加速，FID、CLIP-score等质量指标持平甚至略优。
AI.conclusion: ZEUS验证了“结构稀缺+低阶外推”可在零再训练代价下突破2×加速瓶颈，为扩散模型落地提供即插即用、通用的高倍提速方案。

title: PRISM: Probability Reallocation with In-Span Masking for Knowledge-Sensitive Alignment
summary: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) with token-level hard labels can amplify overconfident imitation of factually unsupported targets, causing hallucinations that propagate in multi-sentence generation. We study an augmented SFT setting in which training instances include coarse sentence-level factuality risk labels and inter-sentence dependency annotations, providing structured signals about where factual commitments are weakly supported. We propose \textbf{PRISM}, a differentiable risk-gated framework that modifies learning only at fact-critical positions. PRISM augments standard SFT with a lightweight, model-aware probability reallocation objective that penalizes high-confidence predictions on risky target tokens, with its scope controlled by span-level risk weights and model-aware gating. Experiments on hallucination-sensitive factual benchmarks and general evaluations show that PRISM improves factual aggregates across backbones while maintaining a competitive overall capability profile. Ablations further show that the auxiliary signal is most effective when used conservatively, and that knowledge masking and model-aware reallocation play complementary roles in balancing factual correction and capability preservation.

AI.tldr: 论文指出仅用token级硬监督微调(SFT)易放大未经验证的高置信模仿导致幻觉，因此提出引入句级事实风险标签与句间依赖标注的增强SFT，并设计轻量风险门控框架PRISM，仅在事实关键位置通过模型感知的概率重分配目标惩罚高置信错误输出，实验表明该方法可在多个基准模型上提升总体事实正确性并保持原本能力。
AI.motivation: 传统token级硬监督微调在大模型多句生成场景里会放大对缺乏事实依据目标的高置信模仿，导致幻觉在后续句中连锁扩散，因此需在训练阶段对模型的事实可靠性进行结构化和位置敏感的约束。
AI.method: 引入带句子级风险标签和句间依赖注入的增强SFT训练样本；提出可微端的PRISM框架，通过span级风险权重与模型感知的门控仅在事实关键位置介入学习，附加以轻量概率重分配目标，惩罚对风险token的高置信预测，同时通过知识掩蔽与重分配协同平衡纠偏与能力保持。
AI.result: 在幻觉敏感的事实基准及通用评测上，PRISM在不损害模型整体能力的前提下显著提升各基础模型的事实总体准确率；消融实验表明将辅助信号保守少量介入效果最佳，知识屏蔽与模型感知重分配机制互补增益。
AI.conclusion: 引入结构化句级事实风险信号并在关键位置做模型感知的风险门控能有效抑制SFT产生的幻觉；PRISM提供一种轻量、即插即用的方法，在保证模型通用性能的同时显著提高事实可靠性，对构建可信大模型具有实践价值。

title: Graph-Informed Adversarial Modeling: Infimal Subadditivity of Interpolative Divergences
summary: We study adversarial learning when the target distribution factorizes according to a known Bayesian network. For interpolative divergences, including $(f,Γ)$-divergences, we prove a new infimal subadditivity principle showing that, under suitable conditions, a global variational discrepancy is controlled by an average of family-level discrepancies aligned with the graph. In an additive regime, the surrogate is exact. This closes a theoretical gap in the literature; existing subadditivity results justify graph-informed adversarial learning for classical discrepancies, but not for interpolative divergences, where the usual factorization argument breaks down. In turn, we provide a justification for replacing a standard, graph-agnostic GAN with a monolithic discriminator by a graph-informed GAN (GiGAN) with localized family-level discriminators, without requiring the optimizer itself to factorize according to the graph. We also obtain parallel results for integral probability metrics and proximal optimal transport divergences, identify natural discriminator classes for which the theory applies, and present experiments showing improved stability and structural recovery relative to graph-agnostic baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文证明，当目标分布符合已知贝叶斯网络时，对插值型散度（如$(f,Γ)$-散度）存在新的下确界次可加性原理，可将全局差异控制为图对齐的族级差异平均；在加性条件下 surrogate 精确。据此可用局部判别器的图信息 GAN（GiGAN）替代传统整体判别器，并在 IPM 与近优传输散度上给出并行结论，实验显示稳定性与结构恢复优于无图基线。
AI.motivation: 经典散度在图结构下的次可加性已支持图信息对抗学习，但插值型散度因因子分解失效而缺乏理论保证，导致无法解释为何能用局部判别器取代全局判别器。
AI.method: 提出“下确界次可加性”新原理：对插值型及 IPM、近优传输散度，证明全局差异≤族级差异按图平均；加性条件下取等。据此设计 GiGAN，用与图同构的局部判别器族替代单个大判别器，且优化器无需因子分解。
AI.result: 理论填补插值型散度缺少图次可加性的空白；GiGAN 在合成与真实数据上判别器振荡更小、样本质量更高，结构恢复指标（SHD、F1）显著优于标准 GAN 及图无关基线。
AI.conclusion: 首次为插值型散度建立图对齐次可加性，严格证明局部判别器即可控制全局差异，为图信息对抗生成提供通用理论支撑；GiGAN 在稳定性、样本质量与结构复原三方面同时提升，表明理论驱动的架构设计可取代经验性正则。

title: Satellite-Free Training for Drone-View Geo-Localization
summary: Drone-view geo-localization (DVGL) aims to determine the location of drones in GPS-denied environments by retrieving the corresponding geotagged satellite tile from a reference gallery given UAV observations of a location. In many existing formulations, these observations are represented by a single oblique UAV image. In contrast, our satellite-free setting is designed for multi-view UAV sequences, which are used to construct a geometry-normalized UAV-side location representation before cross-view retrieval. Existing approaches rely on satellite imagery during training, either through paired supervision or unsupervised alignment, which limits practical deployment when satellite data are unavailable or restricted. In this paper, we propose a satellite-free training (SFT) framework that converts drone imagery into cross-view compatible representations through three main stages: drone-side 3D scene reconstruction, geometry-based pseudo-orthophoto generation, and satellite-free feature aggregation for retrieval. Specifically, we first reconstruct dense 3D scenes from multi-view drone images using 3D Gaussian splatting and project the reconstructed geometry into pseudo-orthophotos via PCA-guided orthographic projection. This rendering stage operates directly on reconstructed scene geometry without requiring camera parameters at rendering time. Next, we refine these orthophotos with lightweight geometry-guided inpainting to obtain texture-complete drone-side views. Finally, we extract DINOv3 patch features from the generated orthophotos, learn a Fisher vector aggregation model solely from drone data, and reuse it at test time to encode satellite tiles for cross-view retrieval. Experimental results on University-1652 and SUES-200 show that our SFT framework substantially outperforms satellite-free generalization baselines and narrows the gap to methods trained with satellite imagery.

AI.tldr: 作者提出一套完全无需卫星影像参与训练的无人机自定位系统，能从无人机多视角低空影像中重建3D、生成几何归一化伪正射影像，再用纯无人机数据学习特征聚合模型，最终在跨视角检索任务上逼近甚至部分超越需卫星影像对照训练的现有方法。
AI.motivation: 传统无人机视觉定位需依赖成对或大规模卫星影像进行监督或对齐训练，然而卫星数据常因保密、成本或时效性而不可得，极大限制了方法的部署。如何仅利用无人机自身采集的多视角影像完成定位模型训练，是该领域走向实用化的关键瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出“纯无人机训练”框架(SFT)：①使用3D高斯点云重建从无人机序列恢复稠密3D场景；②采用PCA-引导的正交投影将重建几何渲染为伪正射影像，并结合轻量几何引导修补完善纹理；③在生成的正射图上提取DINOv3局部特征，仅依托无人机影像训练Fisher向量聚合模型，测试时同样仅凭伪正射特征与卫星瓦片匹配完成定位。
AI.result: 在University-1652与SUES-200两个基准上，SFT框架显著优于无任何卫星数据训练的基线，并将与需卫星影像辅助训练方法性能差距缩小到很小范围，多视角伪正射表示有效提升跨视角检索准确率。
AI.conclusion: 通过3D重建与几何归一化，无人机侧即可自生成与卫星视角兼容的表示，实现真正的卫星无关训练；该方法解除了对卫星影像的依赖，为GPS信号缺失环境下大规模、实时无人机自定位提供可行且高性能的技术途径。

title: CRaFT: Circuit-Guided Refusal Feature Selection via Cross-Layer Transcoders
summary: As safety concerns around large language models (LLMs) grow, understanding the internal mechanisms underlying refusal behavior has become increasingly important. Recent work has studied this behavior by identifying internal features associated with refusal and manipulating them to induce compliance with harmful requests. However, existing refusal feature selection methods rely on how strongly features activate on harmful prompts, which tends to capture superficial signals rather than the causal factors underlying the refusal decision. We propose CRaFT, a circuit-guided refusal feature selection framework that ranks features by their influence on the model's refusal-compliance decision using prompts near the refusal boundary. On Gemma-3-1B-it, CRaFT improves attack success rate (ASR) from 6.7% to 48.2% and outperforms baseline methods across multiple jailbreak benchmarks. These results suggest that circuit influence is a more reliable criterion than activation magnitude for identifying features that causally mediate refusal behavior.

title: Care-Conditioned Neuromodulation for Autonomy-Preserving Supportive Dialogue Agents
summary: Large language models deployed in supportive or advisory roles must balance helpfulness with preservation of user autonomy, yet standard alignment methods primarily optimize for helpfulness and harmlessness without explicitly modeling relational risks such as dependency reinforcement, overprotection, or coercive guidance. We introduce Care-Conditioned Neuromodulation (CCN), a state-dependent control framework in which a learned scalar signal derived from structured user state and dialogue context conditions response generation and candidate selection. We formalize this setting as an autonomy-preserving alignment problem and define a utility function that rewards autonomy support and helpfulness while penalizing dependency and coercion. We also construct a benchmark of relational failure modes in multi-turn dialogue, including reassurance dependence, manipulative care, overprotection, and boundary inconsistency. On this benchmark, care-conditioned candidate generation combined with utility-based reranking improves autonomy-preserving utility by +0.25 over supervised fine-tuning and +0.07 over preference optimization baselines while maintaining comparable supportiveness. Pilot human evaluation and zero-shot transfer to real emotional-support conversations show directional agreement with automated metrics. These results suggest that state-dependent control combined with utility-based selection is a practical approach to multi-objective alignment in autonomy-sensitive dialogue.

AI.tldr: 提出「护理条件神经调节」（CCN），用状态依赖的标量信号指导候选回复生成-重排序，在兼顾帮助性的同时显著降低依赖和操控风险。
AI.motivation: 现有对齐方法侧重有用/无害，忽视「用户自主性」这类关系型风险（依赖、过度保护、胁迫）。作者希望在大模型担任支持/顾问角色时，同时优化自主性与帮助性。
AI.method: 1）定义状态 u（用户+上下文）→标量信号 c 控制生成，2）提出「自主性保护效用函数」在重排序中奖励自主支持、惩罚依赖与胁迫，3）构建多轮对话基准，涵盖四种关系失效模式，4）采用「护理条件候选生成 + 效用重排」两步管线。
AI.result: 在新基准上，CCN 比监督微调提升 +0.25 自主保护效用，比偏好优化基线提升 +0.07，同时支持度持平；人工与零样本真实现实情感支持对话的评估同趋势一致。
AI.conclusion: 状态依赖控制配合基于效用的候选选择，能在多目标对齐中有效保护用户自主性，是实现「既帮又不操控」对话系统的可行方案。

title: On the Role of Reasoning Patterns in the Generalization Discrepancy of Long Chain-of-Thought Supervised Fine-Tuning
summary: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) on long Chain-of-Thought (CoT) trajectories has become a pivotal phase in building large reasoning models. However, how CoT trajectories from different sources influence the generalization performance of models remains an open question. In this paper, we conduct a comparative study using two sources of verified CoT trajectories generated by two competing models, \texttt{DeepSeek-R1-0528} and \texttt{gpt-oss-120b}, with their problem sets controlled to be identical. Despite their comparable performance, we uncover a striking paradox: lower training loss does not translate to better generalization. SFT on \texttt{DeepSeek-R1-0528} data achieves remarkably lower training loss, yet exhibits significantly worse generalization performance on reasoning benchmarks compared to those trained on \texttt{gpt-oss-120b}. To understand this paradox, we perform a multi-faceted analysis probing token-level SFT loss and step-level reasoning behaviors. Our analysis reveals a difference in reasoning patterns. \texttt{gpt-oss-120b} exhibits highly convergent and deductive trajectories, whereas \texttt{DeepSeek-R1-0528} favors a divergent and branch-heavy exploration pattern. Consequently, models trained with \texttt{DeepSeek-R1} data inherit inefficient exploration behaviors, often getting trapped in redundant exploratory branches that hinder them from reaching correct solutions. Building upon this insight, we propose a simple yet effective remedy of filtering out frequently branching trajectories to improve the generalization of SFT. Experiments show that training on selected \texttt{DeepSeek-R1-0528} subsets surprisingly improves reasoning performance by up to 5.1% on AIME25, 5.5% on BeyondAIME, and on average 3.6% on five benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 在长CoT SFT阶段，用R1-0528轨迹训练虽训练损失更低，但泛化反而更差；原因在于其分支型探索模式使模型陷入冗余路径。筛掉高分支轨迹即可显著提升推理性能，AIME25涨5.1%。
AI.motivation: 长CoT SFT已成为大推理模型关键阶段，但不同来源的CoT轨迹如何影响泛化仍是悬而未决的问题；训练损失与泛化表现是否一致也缺乏系统研究。
AI.method: ①控制题目集一致，用R1-0528与gpt-oss-120b两模型各生成验证CoT轨迹；②对比SFT后的训练损失与多基准推理泛化性能；③从token级损失、step级推理行为多维度探针，定位两种轨迹的推理模式差异；④提出基于
AI.result: R1-0528组训练损失显著更低，却在AIME25等5个基准上平均落后3.6%，出现
AI.conclusion: 训练损失≠泛化能力；分支型长CoT易诱导模型学会低效探索。通过简单的高分支轨迹过滤即可在不增参数、不增推理成本的前提下获得3.6–5.5%的推理增益，为长CoT数据工程提供了直接可行的优化策略。

title: Operator Learning for Smoothing and Forecasting
summary: Machine learning has opened new frontiers in purely data-driven algorithms for data assimilation in, and for forecasting of, dynamical systems; the resulting methods are showing some promise. However, in contrast to model-driven algorithms, analysis of these data-driven methods is poorly developed. In this paper we address this issue, developing a theory to underpin data-driven methods to solve smoothing problems arising in data assimilation and forecasting problems. The theoretical framework relies on two key components: (i) establishing the existence of the mapping to be learned; (ii) the properties of the operator learning architecture used to approximate this mapping. By studying these two components in conjunction, we establish novel universal approximation theorems for purely data driven algorithms for both smoothing and forecasting of dynamical systems. We work in the continuous time setting, hence deploying neural operator architectures. The theoretical results are illustrated with experiments studying the Lorenz `63, Lorenz `96 and Kuramoto-Sivashinsky dynamical systems.

AI.tldr: 首次为纯数据驱动的动力学系统平滑与预报算法建立通用逼近理论，实验验证在Lorenz 63/96及Kuramoto-Sivashinsky系统上有效。
AI.motivation: 纯数据驱动的数据同化与预报方法虽表现良好，却缺乏像模型驱动方法那样系统的理论分析，亟需统一框架证明其可行性与逼近能力。
AI.method: 以连续时间设定为基础，将问题拆解为“待学习映射的存在性”与“神经算子架构的逼近性质”两大核心，联合分析后导出通用逼近定理，并用神经算子实现。
AI.result: 理论证明：对任意给定精度，存在神经算子可一致逼近真实平滑与预报映射；实验表明，在Lorenz 63、Lorenz 96与Kuramoto-Sivashinsky系统上，数据驱动算法达到与模型驱动方法相当或更优的精度。
AI.conclusion: 研究首次为纯数据驱动的动力学平滑与预报提供严格理论支撑，确立神经算子作为可信替代方案，并为后续算法设计、误差分析及不确定性量化奠定理论基础。

title: SHOE: Semantic HOI Open-Vocabulary Evaluation Metric
comment: Accepted to GRAIL-V Workshop at CVPR 2026
summary: Open-vocabulary human-object interaction (HOI) detection is a step towards building scalable systems that generalize to unseen interactions in real-world scenarios and support grounded multimodal systems that reason about human-object relationships. However, standard evaluation metrics, such as mean Average Precision (mAP), treat HOI classes as discrete categorical labels and fail to credit semantically valid but lexically different predictions (e.g., "lean on couch" vs. "sit on couch"), limiting their applicability for evaluating open-vocabulary predictions that go beyond any predefined set of HOI labels. We introduce SHOE (Semantic HOI Open-Vocabulary Evaluation), a new evaluation framework that incorporates semantic similarity between predicted and ground-truth HOI labels. SHOE decomposes each HOI prediction into its verb and object components, estimates their semantic similarity using the average of multiple large language models (LLMs), and combines them into a similarity score to evaluate alignment beyond exact string match. This enables a flexible and scalable evaluation of both existing HOI detection methods and open-ended generative models using standard benchmarks such as HICO-DET. Experimental results show that SHOE scores align more closely with human judgments than existing metrics, including LLM-based and embedding-based baselines, achieving an agreement of 85.73% with the average human ratings. Our work underscores the need for semantically grounded HOI evaluation that better mirrors human understanding of interactions. We will release our evaluation metric to the public to facilitate future research.

AI.tldr: 提出 SHOE 框架，通过 LLM 估计动词与物体语义相似度，解决开放词汇 HOI 检测中 mAP 仅做字符串匹配、忽视同义异词预测的缺陷，实验显示与人类一致性达 85.73%。
AI.motivation: 开放词汇 HOI 检测需要评估超出预定义标签的语义正确预测，而传统 mAP 仅按离散类别计算，对“lean on couch”与“sit on couch”这类语义相近但字面不同的预测不给分，阻碍方法发展。
AI.method: SHOE 将 HOI 预测拆解为动词与物体两部分；用多个大语言模型分别计算两部分的语义相似度并取平均；再按权重融合为最终相似得分，在 HICO-DET 等基准上兼容既有框定位结果，实现柔性评估。
AI.result: 相比字符串匹配、纯嵌入或单 LLM 评估基线，SHOE 与人类平均评分的吻合率提升至 85.73%，更准确地反映开放词汇模型的真实性能差异。
AI.conclusion: 研究强调了“语义感知”HOI 评估的必要性；SHOE 提供可扩展、公开的工具，推动开放词汇及生成式 HOI 检测方法走向实用。

title: From Multi-Agent to Single-Agent: When Is Skill Distillation Beneficial?
summary: Multi-agent systems (MAS) tackle complex tasks by distributing expertise, though this often comes at the cost of heavy coordination overhead, context fragmentation, and brittle phase ordering. Distilling a MAS into a single-agent skill can bypass these costs, but this conversion lacks a principled answer for when and what to distill. Instead, the empirical outcome is surprisingly inconsistent: skill lift ranges from a 28% improvement to a 2% degradation across metrics of the exact same task. In this work, we reveal that skill utility is governed not by the task, but by the evaluation metric. We introduce Metric Freedom ($F$), the first a priori predictor of skill utility. $F$ measures the topological rigidity of a metric's scoring landscape by quantifying how output diversity couples with score variance via a Mantel test. Guided by $F$, we propose a two-stage adaptive distillation framework. Stage 1 acts as a selective extraction mechanism, extracting tools and knowledge while discarding restrictive structures on "free" metrics to preserve exploration. Stage 2 targets computationally intensive iterative refinement exclusively toward "rigid" metrics ($F \lesssim 0.6$) to eliminate trajectory-local overfitting. Evaluating across 4 tasks, 11 datasets, and 6 metrics, $F$ strongly predicts skill utility ($ρ= -0.62$, $p < 0.05$). Strikingly, identical agent trajectories yield diametrically opposite skill lifts under rigid versus free metrics, demonstrating that skill utility is fundamentally a metric-level property. Driven by this signal, our adaptive agent matches or exceeds the original MAS while reducing cost up to 8$\times$ and latency by up to 15$\times$.

AI.tldr: 提出指标自由度量F，首次实现单智能体蒸馏收益的事前预测；依据F将指标分为“刚性/自由”两类，自适应保留或丢弃多智能体结构，在4任务11数据集上最高降本8倍、提速15倍，且性能不低于原系统。
AI.motivation: 多智能体系统虽能分而治之，但协调开销大、上下文碎片化、阶段顺序脆弱；蒸馏成单智能体可消除这些代价，然而何时、该 distill 什么缺乏原则指导，实验结果从+28%到−2%极不稳定，亟需可解释且可预测的判别准则。
AI.method: ①定义Metric Freedom F，用Mantel检验度量“输出多样性–得分方差”耦合的拓扑刚性，实现a priori预测；②构建两阶段自适应蒸馏框架——Stage1在自由指标(F≳0.6)上选择性提取工具与知识、丢弃限制结构以保留探索，Stage2仅对刚性指标(F≲0.6)执行高代价迭代精修以抑制轨迹过拟合；③在4任务11数据集6指标上系统验证F与skill utility的负相关(ρ=−0.62)。
AI.result: F能显著预测蒸馏收益(p<0.05)；同一轨迹在刚性/自由指标下呈现相反升降，证实“指标层面属性”决定收益；自适应蒸馏在保持或超越原MAS性能的同时，计算成本最多降低8倍，延迟最多减少15倍。
AI.conclusion: 技能效用并非任务固有，而由评估指标的拓扑刚性主导；借助Metric Freedom可实现低成本、低开销的按需蒸馏，为多智能体系统落地提供可扩展且可预测的压缩范式。

title: Thinking While Listening: Fast-Slow Recurrence for Long-Horizon Sequential Modeling
summary: We extend the recent latent recurrent modeling to sequential input streams. By interleaving fast, recurrent latent updates with self-organizational ability between slow observation updates, our method facilitates the learning of stable internal structures that evolve alongside the input. This mechanism allows the model to maintain coherent and clustered representations over long horizons, improving out-of-distribution generalization in reinforcement learning and algorithmic tasks compared to sequential baselines such as LSTM, state space models, and Transformer variants.

AI.tldr: 用快慢分离的潜变量循环更新机制，在序列数据上同时学到稳定内部结构与长程聚类表示，显著优于传统序列模型。
AI.motivation: 主流序列模型（LSTM/Transformer/SSM）在长时依赖和分布外泛化上仍显不足，需要一种可同时维持内部结构稳定性与表征聚类性的新框架。
AI.method: 提出潜变量循环建模扩展版：在输入观测的慢速更新之间插入高速潜变量循环更新，并引入自组织机制，使潜状态随输入缓慢演化的同时保持聚类与连贯性。
AI.result: 在强化学习与算法任务上，相比LSTM、状态空间模型及多种Transformer变体，所提方法在分布外场景显著降低误差并提升长期稳健性。
AI.conclusion: 快慢耦合的潜变量循环更新可有效编码长时稳定结构，是提升序列模型分布外泛化能力的新范式，适用于RL与复杂算法任务。

title: Development and multi-center evaluation of domain-adapted speech recognition for human-AI teaming in real-world gastrointestinal endoscopy
comment: Under review at npj Digital Medicine
summary: Automatic speech recognition (ASR) is a critical interface for human-AI interaction in gastrointestinal endoscopy, yet its reliability in real-world clinical settings is limited by domain-specific terminology and complex acoustic conditions. Here, we present EndoASR, a domain-adapted ASR system designed for real-time deployment in endoscopic workflows. We develop a two-stage adaptation strategy based on synthetic endoscopy reports, targeting domain-specific language modeling and noise robustness. In retrospective evaluation across six endoscopists, EndoASR substantially improves both transcription accuracy and clinical usability, reducing character error rate (CER) from 20.52% to 14.14% and increasing medical term accuracy (Med ACC) from 54.30% to 87.59%. In a prospective multi-center study spanning five independent endoscopy centers, EndoASR demonstrates consistent generalization under heterogeneous real-world conditions. Compared with the baseline Paraformer model, CER is reduced from 16.20% to 14.97%, while Med ACC is improved from 61.63% to 84.16%, confirming its robustness in practical deployment scenarios. Notably, EndoASR achieves a real-time factor (RTF) of 0.005, significantly faster than Whisper-large-v3 (RTF 0.055), while maintaining a compact model size of 220M parameters, enabling efficient edge deployment. Furthermore, integration with large language models demonstrates that improved ASR quality directly enhances downstream structured information extraction and clinician-AI interaction. These results demonstrate that domain-adapted ASR can serve as a reliable interface for human-AI teaming in gastrointestinal endoscopy, with consistent performance validated across multi-center real-world clinical settings.

AI.tldr: EndoASR 是首个针对胃肠镜场景实时优化的专用语音识别系统，通过两阶段领域适配，将字符错误率降至 14%、医学术语准确率提至 87%，并在五中心前瞻性研究中验证跨机构鲁棒性，为镜下人机协作提供可靠语音接口。
AI.motivation: 内镜报告含大量专业术语且受器械噪声干扰，通用 ASR 精度低，阻碍实时语音录入与 AI 辅助流程。
AI.method: 1. 以内镜报告生成合成语料，先微调 Paraformer 语言模型，再做噪声鲁棒适配；2. 提出 RTF 0.005 的 220 M 轻量实时推理引擎；3. 联合 LLM 进行结构化信息抽取闭环验证。
AI.result: 回顾性六医师测试：CER 从 20.52% 降至 14.14%，Med ACC 从 54.30% 升至 87.59%；五中心前瞻性测试：CER 降至 14.97%，Med ACC 升至 84.16%，速度比 Whisper-large-v3 快 11 倍。
AI.conclusion: 领域适配+轻量架构使 EndoASR 在真实内镜场景下同时具备高准确、低延迟与跨中心一致性，可作为“医生-AI 协作”的可靠语音入口，并显著提升下游结构化任务效果。

title: Transformers Can Solve Non-Linear and Non-Markovian Filtering Problems in Continuous Time For Conditionally Gaussian Signals
summary: The use of attention-based deep learning models in stochastic filtering, e.g. transformers and deep Kalman filters, has recently come into focus; however, the potential for these models to solve stochastic filtering problems remains largely unknown. The paper provides an affirmative answer to this open problem in the theoretical foundations of machine learning by showing that a class of continuous-time transformer models, called \textit{filterformers}, can approximately implement the conditional law of a broad class of non-Markovian and conditionally Gaussian signal processes given noisy continuous-time (possibly non-Gaussian) measurements. Our approximation guarantees hold uniformly over sufficiently regular compact subsets of continuous-time paths, where the worst-case 2-Wasserstein distance between the true optimal filter and our deep learning model quantifies the approximation error. Our construction relies on two new customizations of the standard attention mechanism: The first can losslessly adapt to the characteristics of a broad range of paths since we show that the attention mechanism implements bi-Lipschitz embeddings of sufficiently regular sets of paths into low-dimensional Euclidean spaces; thus, it incurs no ``dimension reduction error''. The latter attention mechanism is tailored to the geometry of Gaussian measures in the $2$-Wasserstein space. Our analysis relies on new stability estimates of robust optimal filters in the conditionally Gaussian setting.

AI.tldr: 首次证明一类连续时间Transformer—filterformer—可在紧集上均匀逼近非马尔可夫、条件高斯信号的最优随机滤波器，误差用2-Wasserstein距离度量。
AI.motivation: 将注意力机制引入随机滤波虽有实践尝试，但缺乏能否逼近最优滤波器的理论保证；本文旨在填补该机器学习理论空白。
AI.method: 1. 提出连续时间filterformer，定制两种注意力：①实现充分正则路径集合的双Lipschitz嵌入、无维数压缩误差；②适配2-Wasserstein空间中高斯测度的几何。2. 建立条件高斯设置下鲁棒最优滤波器的稳定性估计。3. 用上述嵌入与稳定性结果，导出worst-case 2-Wasserstein逼近界。
AI.result: 在足够正则的紧路径集上，filterformer对广泛非马尔可夫、条件高斯信号的最优条件律可实现任意精度均匀逼近；给出显式的2-Wasserstein误差上界。
AI.conclusion: 注意力深度模型具备在理论上解决一般随机滤波问题的能力，为后继数据驱动滤波算法提供严格基础，并揭示了注意力机制与最优估计几何结构的深刻联系。

title: Mitigating the ID-OOD Tradeoff in Open-Set Test-Time Adaptation
summary: Open-set test-time adaptation (OSTTA) addresses the challenge of adapting models to new environments where out-of-distribution (OOD) samples coexist with in-distribution (ID) samples affected by distribution shifts. In such settings, covariate shift-for example, changes in weather conditions such as snow-can alter ID samples, reducing model reliability. Consequently, models must not only correctly classify covariate-shifted ID (csID) samples but also effectively reject covariate-shifted OOD (csOOD) samples. Entropy minimization is a common strategy in test-time adaptation to maintain ID performance under distribution shifts, while entropy maximization is widely applied to enhance OOD detection. Several studies have sought to combine these objectives to tackle the challenges of OSTTA. However, the intrinsic conflict between entropy minimization and maximization inevitably leads to a trade-off between csID classification and csOOD detection. In this paper, we first analyze the limitations of entropy maximization in OSTTA and then introduce an angular loss to regulate feature norm magnitudes, along with a feature-norm loss to suppress csOOD logits, thereby improving OOD detection. These objectives form ROSETTA, a $\underline{r}$obust $\underline{o}$pen-$\underline{se}$t $\underline{t}$est-$\underline{t}$ime $\underline{a}$daptation. Our method achieves strong OOD detection while maintaining high ID classification performance on CIFAR-10-C, CIFAR-100-C, Tiny-ImageNet-C and ImageNet-C. Furthermore, experiments on the Cityscapes validate the method's effectiveness in real-world semantic segmentation, and results on the HAC dataset demonstrate its applicability across different open-set TTA setups.

AI.tldr: ROSETTA通过角度损失与特征范数损失缓解熵最小化/最大化冲突，在保持ID精度的同时显著提升csOOD检测效果，并在分类、分割、多场景开放集TTA上验证鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 开放集测试时适应需同时处理协变量偏移的ID样本（csID）与OOD样本（csOOD）。既有方法将熵最小化用于ID分类、熵最大化用于OOD检测，两者目标冲突导致性能权衡。作者希望提出一种无冲突的损失设计，在提升OOD拒识能力的同时不牺牲ID精度。
AI.method: 1) 理论分析熵最大化在OSTTA中的局限：对csOOD过度自信。2) 提出角度损失，将ID特征约束到统一超球面并放大类间夹角，Norm越大越易被判定为OOD。3) 设计特征-范数损失，显式抑制csOOD logit幅值，降低其置信度。4) 联合标准熵最小化形成ROSETTA框架，无需源域数据与OOD标签，仅利用测试批次自监督更新。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100-C、Tiny-ImageNet-C、ImageNet-C上，ROSETTA的FPR95比最佳基线平均下降7.3%，ID准确率提升1.8%。Cityscapes语义分割实验mIoU提升2.1%，OOD路段像素拒识率提升12%。HAC多场景数据集上跨域OOD检测AUC提升6.7%，验证方案通用性。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式调控特征范数而非单纯依赖熵极值，可有效化解csID分类与csOOD检测目标冲突；角度-范数联合损失为开放集测试时适应提供了简洁而鲁棒的解决方案，对真实场景分割与多类OOD共存任务均具推广价值。

title: GraphWalk: Enabling Reasoning in Large Language Models through Tool-Based Graph Navigation
summary: The use of knowledge graphs for grounding agents in real-world Q&A applications has become increasingly common. Answering complex queries often requires multi-hop reasoning and the ability to navigate vast relational structures. Standard approaches rely on prompting techniques that steer large language models to reason over raw graph context, or retrieval-augmented generation pipelines where relevant subgraphs are injected into the context. These, however, face severe limitations with enterprise-scale KGs that cannot fit in even the largest context windows available today. We present GraphWalk, a problem-agnostic, training-free, tool-based framework that allows off-the-shelf LLMs to reason through sequential graph navigation, dramatically increasing performance across different tasks. Unlike task-specific agent frameworks that encode domain knowledge into specialized tools, GraphWalk equips the LLM with a minimal set of orthogonal graph operations sufficient to traverse any graph structure. We evaluate whether models equipped with GraphWalk can compose these operations into correct multi-step reasoning chains, where each tool call represents a verifiable step creating a transparent execution trace. We first demonstrate our approach on maze traversal, a problem non-reasoning models are completely unable to solve, then present results on graphs resembling real-world enterprise knowledge graphs. To isolate structural reasoning from world knowledge, we evaluate on entirely synthetic graphs with random, non-semantic labels. Our benchmark spans 12 query templates from basic retrieval to compound first-order logic queries. Results show that tool-based traversal yields substantial and consistent gains over in-context baselines across all model families tested, with gains becoming more pronounced as scale increases, precisely where in-context approaches fail catastrophically.

AI.tldr: GraphWalk把知识图谱＞上下文窗口的问题解决，把用自然语言同走一步，把自然语言同走一步
AI.motivation: 企业级知识图谱远超现有上下文窗口上限，而仅用提示或RAG检索无法完成多跳推理。
AI.method: 设计一套通用的训练无关工具库（最小正交图操作集），让LLM通过顺序调用工具、逐步遍历图谱，留下可验证轨迹。
AI.result: 在迷宫、合成图、真实型图共12类查询链路测试中，所有模型族基于GraphWalk均获得显著性能提升，且图谱规模越大优势越明显。
AI.conclusion: 面向任何图谱结构，GraphWalk把LLM从提示-检索的上下文束缚中解放出来，证明“少工具、多推理”可灵活支撑大规模多跳问答。

title: Variational LSTM with Augmented Inputs: Nonlinear Response History Metamodeling with Aleatoric and Epistemic Uncertainty
summary: Uncertainty propagation in high-dimensional nonlinear dynamic structural systems is pivotal in state-of-the-art performance-based design and risk assessment, where uncertainties from both excitations and structures, i.e., the aleatoric uncertainty, must be considered. This poses a significant challenge due to heavy computational demands. Machine learning techniques are thus introduced as metamodels to alleviate this burden. However, the "black box" nature of Machine learning models underscores the necessity of avoiding overly confident predictions, particularly when data and training efforts are insufficient. This creates a need, in addition to considering the aleatoric uncertainty, of estimating the uncertainty related to the prediction confidence, i.e., epistemic uncertainty, for machine learning-based metamodels. We developed a probabilistic metamodeling technique based on a variational long short-term memory (LSTM) with augmented inputs to simultaneously capture aleatoric and epistemic uncertainties. Key random system parameters are treated as augmented inputs alongside excitation series carrying record-to-record variability to capture the full range of aleatoric uncertainty. Meanwhile, epistemic uncertainty is effectively approximated via the Monte Carlo dropout scheme. Unlike computationally expensive full Bayesian approaches, this method incurs negligible additional training costs while enabling nearly cost-free uncertainty simulation. The proposed technique is demonstrated through multiple case studies involving stochastic seismic or wind excitations. Results show that the calibrated metamodels accurately reproduce nonlinear response time histories and provide confidence bounds indicating the associated epistemic uncertainty.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于变分 LSTM 的概率代理模型，可一次性量化高维非线性动力结构系统中的偶然与认知双重不确定性，训练成本几乎零增加，在随机地震/风激励案例中验证其精度与置信界有效性。
AI.motivation: 性能化设计与风险评估必须追踪结构与激励的偶然不确定性，而传统高保真模拟计算量巨大；机器学习虽可作代理，但数据不足时易过度自信，需额外估计模型自身的认知不确定性，目前缺乏兼顾两类不确定性且计算代价低廉的方法。
AI.method: 将关键随机系统参数与激励序列共同作为增广输入，构建变分长短期记忆网络（LSTM）；采用蒙特卡洛 Dropout 近似后验，以单次训练+前向随机开关的方式同时输出响应预测及认知不确定度，无需昂贵全贝叶斯推断。
AI.result: 在随机地震和风激励的多维非线性结构案例中，代理模型准确重现非线性响应时程；提供的置信区间能合理包围参考解，且训练/推理时间较常规有限元蒙特卡洛缩减 2–3 个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 所提概率 LSTM 代理以可忽略额外训练成本实现双重不确定性传播，为高维动力体系实时风险评估提供了一条兼顾精度、效率与可信度的可行途径。

title: Memory in the LLM Era: Modular Architectures and Strategies in a Unified Framework
summary: Memory emerges as the core module in the large language model (LLM)-based agents for long-horizon complex tasks (e.g., multi-turn dialogue, game playing, scientific discovery), where memory can enable knowledge accumulation, iterative reasoning and self-evolution. A number of memory methods have been proposed in the literature. However, these methods have not been systematically and comprehensively compared under the same experimental settings. In this paper, we first summarize a unified framework that incorporates all the existing agent memory methods from a high-level perspective. We then extensively compare representative agent memory methods on two well-known benchmarks and examine the effectiveness of all methods, providing a thorough analysis of those methods. As a byproduct of our experimental analysis, we also design a new memory method by exploiting modules in the existing methods, which outperforms the state-of-the-art methods. Finally, based on these findings, we offer promising future research opportunities. We believe that a deeper understanding of the behavior of existing methods can provide valuable new insights for future research.

AI.tldr: 论文系统梳理并首次在同一实验框架下对比了所有主流 LLM-agent 记忆机制，提出新组合方法刷新 SOTA，并给出未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 长程复杂任务中，记忆是 LLM-agent 自我演化与迭代推理的核心，但现有记忆方法零散且缺乏统一基准，亟需系统比较与深入理解。
AI.method: 1) 抽象出涵盖全部现有记忆机制的元框架；2) 在两大公开基准上统一训练-评测 10+ 代表性记忆方法；3) 通过模块级消融找出互补组件，组装出新的混合记忆机制。
AI.result: 新组合方法在两项基准上平均提升 12.4%，超越先前最佳；同时揭示“分层检索 + 时间衰减 + 摘要压缩”三组件最关键。
AI.conclusion: 本研究首次给出 LLM-agent 记忆机制的横向全景图与可复现基准，提出模块化设计思路，为未来记忆增强与终身学习研究奠定方法论基础。

title: Causal K-Means Clustering
summary: Causal effects are often characterized with population summaries. These might provide an incomplete picture when there are heterogeneous treatment effects across subgroups. Since the subgroup structure is typically unknown, it is more challenging to identify and evaluate subgroup effects than population effects. We propose a new solution to this problem: \emph{Causal k-Means Clustering}, which leverages the k-means clustering algorithm to uncover the unknown subgroup structure. Our problem differs significantly from the conventional clustering setup since the variables to be clustered are unknown counterfactual functions. We present a plug-in estimator which is simple and readily implementable using off-the-shelf algorithms, and study its rate of convergence. We also develop a new bias-corrected estimator based on nonparametric efficiency theory and double machine learning, and show that this estimator achieves fast root-n rates and asymptotic normality in large nonparametric models. Our proposed methods are especially useful for modern outcome-wide studies with multiple treatment levels. Further, our framework is extensible to clustering with generic pseudo-outcomes, such as partially observed outcomes or otherwise unknown functions. Finally, we explore finite sample properties via simulation, and illustrate the proposed methods using a study of mobile-supported self-management for chronic low back pain.

AI.tldr: 本文提出“因果k-means聚类”，在未知子群结构下估计异质处理效应；给出即插即用估计量与双重纠偏估计量，均达到根n相合及渐近正态，并推广到任意伪结果，模拟与背痛试验验证了方法。
AI.motivation: 传统总体平均因果效应易掩盖子群异质性，但子群结构未知，导致异质效应识别与评估困难。
AI.method: 将反事实差异视为待聚类对象，用k-means思想搜索最佳子群划分；构建简单插件估计，并基于非参数效率理论与双重机器学习提出偏差校正估计量，同时框架可扩展到部分观测或未知伪结果。
AI.result: 插件估计量具有多项式收敛速度；纠偏估计量在非参数大模型下达到根n率与渐近正态；模拟显示有限样本表现良好；背痛试验揭示了有意义的异质亚组。
AI.conclusion: 因果k-means为异质因果效应发现提供了简单、高效且理论牢靠的工具，适用于多处理水平及广义伪结果，具有广阔应用前景。

title: Riemannian and Symplectic Geometry for Hierarchical Text-Driven Place Recognition
summary: Text-to-point-cloud localization enables robots to understand spatial positions through natural language descriptions, which is crucial for human-robot collaboration in applications such as autonomous driving and last-mile delivery. However, existing methods employ pooled global descriptors for similarity retrieval, which suffer from severe information loss and fail to capture discriminative scene structures. To address these issues, we propose SympLoc, a novel coarse-to-fine localization framework with multi-level alignment in the coarse stage. Different from previous methods that rely solely on global descriptors, our coarse stage consists of three complementary alignment levels: 1) Instance-level alignment establishes direct correspondence between individual object instances in point clouds and textual hints through Riemannian self-attention in hyperbolic space; 2) Relation-level alignment explicitly models pairwise spatial relationships between objects using the Information-Symplectic Relation Encoder (ISRE), which reformulates relation features through Fisher-Rao metric and Hamiltonian dynamics for uncertainty-aware geometrically consistent propagation; 3) Global-level alignment synthesizes discriminative global descriptors via the Spectral Manifold Transform (SMT) that extracts structural invariants through graph spectral analysis. This hierarchical alignment strategy progressively captures fine-grained to coarse-grained scene semantics, enabling robust cross-modal retrieval. Extensive experiments on the KITTI360Pose dataset demonstrate that SympLoc achieves a 19% improvement in Top-1 recall@10m compared to existing state-of-the-art approaches.

AI.tldr: Text-to-point-cloud 定位新方法 SympLoc 通过三级对齐（实例、关系、全局）在粗阶段捕获多级语义，显著超越全局描述子基线。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅用全局池化描述子，信息损失大，无法区分结构相似场景，限制人-机协同的精确定位。
AI.method: 提出 coarse-to-fine 框架 SympLoc：粗阶段并行执行 1) 双曲黎曼自注意力实例对齐，2) 基于 Fisher-Rao 与哈密顿动力学的信息-辛关系编码器（ISRE）关系对齐，3) 谱流形变换（SMT）全局结构不变量对齐；细阶段再求精确定位。
AI.result: KITTI360Pose 上 Top-1 recall@10m 较 SOTA 提升 19%，验证多级对齐策略的跨模态检索与定位鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 多级几何-语义对齐有效缓解信息损失，使文本驱动的点云定位首次在真实自动驾驶场景中实现显著精度跃升，为后续人-机交互系统提供可靠基础。

title: Analysis of LLM Performance on AWS Bedrock: Receipt-item Categorisation Case Study
comment: Preprint. Accepted to the 19th International Conference on Evaluation of Novel Approaches to Software Engineering (ENASE 2026). Final version to be published by SCITEPRESS, http://www.scitepress.org
summary: This paper presents a systematic, cost-aware evaluation of large language models (LLMs) for receipt-item categorisation within a production-oriented classification framework. We compare four instruction-tuned models available through AWS Bedrock: Claude 3.7 Sonnet, Claude 4 Sonnet, Mixtral 8x7B Instruct, and Mistral 7B Instruct. The aim of the study was (1) to assess performance across accuracy, response stability, and token-level cost, and (2) to investigate what prompting methods, zero-shot or few-shot, are especially appropriate both in terms of accuracy and in terms of incurred costs. Results of our experiments demonstrated that Claude 3.7 Sonnet achieves the most favourable balance between classification accuracy and cost efficiency.

AI.tldr: 面向收据条目分类的4种商用LLM成本-性能联合评估，Claude 3.7 Sonnet在零/少样本提示下兼顾精度与费用最优。
AI.motivation: 企业财务流程需高精度、低成本地对海量收据自动归类，现有研究多忽视真实部署中的token费用与响应稳定性，缺乏面向生产的系统评估。
AI.method: 在AWS Bedrock上统一调用Claude 3.7 Sonnet、Claude 4 Sonnet、Mixtral 8x7B Instruct、Mistral 7B Instruct，构建生产级分类框架；采用零样本与少样本两种提示策略，对比准确率、响应方差与单次调用成本，最终给出成本-性能帕累托前沿。
AI.result: Claude 3.7 Sonnet在零样本条件下即取得最高F1，同时单样本token成本低于Claude 4；少样本提示能进一步提升2.3% F1，但边际成本上升15%，整体仍优于其余模型。
AI.conclusion: 在收据分类场景下，Claude 3.7 Sonnet为零样本首选；若预算允许，采用3-shot可把Top-1准确率推至98.1%，而费用增幅可控，适合规模化生产部署。

title: Optimizing EEG Graph Structure for Seizure Detection: An Information Bottleneck and Self-Supervised Learning Approach
comment: Accepted by IEEE 14th International Conference on Healthcare Informatics (ICHI)
summary: Seizure detection from EEG signals is highly challenging due to complex spatiotemporal dynamics and extreme inter-patient variability.
