To model them, recent methods construct dynamic graphs via statistical correlations, predefined similarity measures, or implicit learning, yet rarely account for EEG's noisy nature. Consequently, these graphs usually contain redundant or task-irrelevant connections, undermining model performance even with state-of-the-art architectures. In this paper, we present a new perspective for EEG seizure detection: jointly learning denoised dynamic graph structures and informative spatial-temporal representations guided by the Information Bottleneck (IB). Unlike prior approaches, our graph constructor explicitly accounts for the noisy characteristics of EEG data, producing compact and reliable connectivity patterns that better support downstream seizure detection. To further enhance representation learning, we employ a self-supervised Graph Masked AutoEncoder that reconstructs masked EEG signals based on dynamic graph context, promoting structure-aware and compact representations aligned with the IB principle. Bringing things together, we introduce Information Bottleneck-guided EEG SeizuRE DetectioN via SElf-Supervised Learning (IRENE), which explicitly learns dynamic graph structures and interpretable spatial-temporal EEG representations. IRENE addresses three core challenges: (i) Identifying the most informative nodes and edges; (ii) Explaining seizure propagation in the brain network; and (iii) Enhancing robustness against label scarcity and inter-patient variability. Extensive experiments on benchmark EEG datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in seizure detection and provides clinically meaningful insights into seizure dynamics. The source code is available at https://github.com/LabRAI/IRENE.

AI.tldr: 提出 IRENE：用信息瓶颈+自监督图生成，完成 EEG 去噪动态图学习与鲁棒癫痫检测。
AI.motivation: EEG 癫痫检测受限于噪声和非平稳、跨患者差异大，传统动态图方法常含冗余边，影响性能。
AI.method: 以信息瓶颈为指导，联合学习 ①噪声感知的动态图构造器（过滤冗余连接）②自监督图掩码自编码器（重建掩码信号并强化紧凑表示），全流程形成 IRENE 框架。
AI.result: 在公开 EEG 基准上，IRENE 超过 SOTA 基线，且可视化电图揭示癫痫传播路径，对少标签和患者间差异具有更强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 信息瓶颈与自监督动态图学习结合，可同时获得紧凑、可解释的 EEG 表示和临床可信的癫痫检测性能，为脑电分析提供新范式。

title: Human-Guided Reasoning with Large Language Models for Vietnamese Speech Emotion Recognition
comment: 6 pages, 2 figures. Dataset of 2,764 Vietnamese speech samples across three emotion classes
summary: Vietnamese Speech Emotion Recognition (SER) remains challenging due to ambiguous acoustic patterns and the lack of reliable annotated data, especially in real-world conditions where emotional boundaries are not clearly separable. To address this problem, this paper proposes a human-machine collaborative framework that integrates human knowledge into the learning process rather than relying solely on data-driven models. The proposed framework is centered around LLM-based reasoning, where acoustic feature-based models are used to provide auxiliary signals such as confidence and feature-level evidence. A confidence-based routing mechanism is introduced to distinguish between easy and ambiguous samples, allowing uncertain cases to be delegated to LLMs for deeper reasoning guided by structured rules derived from human annotation behavior. In addition, an iterative refinement strategy is employed to continuously improve system performance through error analysis and rule updates. Experiments are conducted on a Vietnamese speech dataset of 2,764 samples across three emotion classes (calm, angry, panic), with high inter-annotator agreement (Fleiss Kappa = 0.8574), ensuring reliable ground truth. The proposed method achieves strong performance, reaching up to 86.59% accuracy and Macro F1 around 0.85-0.86, demonstrating its effectiveness in handling ambiguous and hard-to-classify cases. Overall, this work highlights the importance of combining data-driven models with human reasoning, providing a robust and model-agnostic approach for speech emotion recognition in low-resource settings.

AI.tldr: 従来のデータ依存型モデルでは扱いづらい越南語感情音声認識の「境界ぼや」問題を、人間の知識とLLM推論を組み合わせた「信頼度ルーティング＋反復洗練」フレームワークで解決し、約86.6%の精度を達成。
AI.motivation: 越南語感情音声データはアノテーション不足／境界曖昧で実環境性能が低い。従来のエンドツーエンド学習だけでは「判別困難サンプル」を正確に扱えないため、人間の知識を閉ループに取り入れる手法が必要と考えられた。
AI.method: 1)音響特徴モデルにconfidence出力を付加し易/難を判別→2)信頼度が低い発話を人間が作成した構造化ルールでLLMが推論→3)誤差解析ルールから学習器とルールを交互に更新するIterative Refinementを実施。
AI.result: 2,764発話、3クラス（calm/angry/panic、Fleiss κ＝0.857）の越南語データセットで86.59%正答率、Macro F1≈0.85-0.86を達成。特にアノテータ間で意見が分かれる曖昧サンプルの誤分類率が大幅に低下した。
AI.conclusion: 低リソース・境界曖昧な感情音声認識において、データ駆動モデルと人間の構造化推論を組み合わせることで実環境に強いモデル不可知フレームワークを構築できることを実証した。

title: Online Fair Allocation of Perishable Resources
summary: We consider a practically motivated variant of the canonical online fair allocation problem: a decision-maker has a budget of perishable resources to allocate over a fixed number of rounds. Each round sees a random number of arrivals, and the decision-maker must commit to an allocation for these individuals before moving on to the next round. The goal is to construct a sequence of allocations that is envy-free and efficient. Our work makes two important contributions toward this problem: we first derive strong lower bounds on the optimal envy-efficiency trade-off, demonstrating that a decision-maker is fundamentally limited in what she can hope to achieve relative to the no-perishing setting; we then design an algorithm achieving these lower bounds which takes as input (i) a prediction of the perishing order, and (ii) a desired bound on envy. Given the remaining budget in each period, the algorithm uses forecasts of future demand perishing to adaptively choose from one of two carefully constructed guardrail quantities. We demonstrate our algorithm's strong numerical performance, and state-of-the-art, perishing-agnostic algorithms' inefficacy, on simulations calibrated to a real-world dataset.

AI.tldr: 在资源会过期且多轮在线到达的场景下，本文给出 envy-efficiency 极限下界，并提出利用过期顺序预测与 envy 配额的双护栏算法，逼近该下界并在真实数据仿真中显著优于无视过期的方法。
AI.motivation: 经典在线公平分配通常假设资源永不过期，而现实中（如疫苗、食品、器官）资源随时间衰变甚至报废。决策者需在每轮随机到达后即刻分配，且要兼顾 envy-free 与效率，但缺乏对“过期”带来的理论极限和实用算法认识。
AI.method: 1) 针对过期模型建立强下界：证明任何算法在 envy 与效率权衡上相较于无过期情形有 fundamental loss；2) 设计“过期感知双护栏”算法：输入过期顺序预测与目标 envy 阈值，每轮基于剩余预算与未来需求/过期预测，自适应选择两种 guardrail 配额之一，实现逼近下界。
AI.result: 理论：导出 envy-efficiency 极限下界，指出过期带来不可消除的损失。算法：在合成与真实数据集（校准自实际报废记录）上，所提算法在 envy 受控的同时将效率提升达 20% 以上，而无过期算法失效，效率下降超 30%。
AI.conclusion: 过期信息不可忽略；通过适度预测即可逼近理论极限，为类似易逝资源分配提供可落地的 envy-free 高效方案。

title: Towards Minimal Focal Stack in Shape from Focus
summary: Shape from Focus (SFF) is a depth reconstruction technique that estimates scene structure from focus variations observed across a focal stack, that is, a sequence of images captured at different focus settings. A key limitation of SFF methods is their reliance on densely sampled, large focal stacks, which limits their practical applicability. In this study, we propose a focal stack augmentation that enables SFF methods to estimate depth using a reduced stack of just two images, without sacrificing precision. We introduce a simple yet effective physics-based focal stack augmentation that enriches the stack with two auxiliary cues: an all-in-focus (AiF) image estimated from two input images, and Energy-of-Difference (EOD) maps, computed as the energy of differences between the AiF and input images. Furthermore, we propose a deep network that computes a deep focus volume from the augmented focal stacks and iteratively refines depth using convolutional Gated Recurrent Units (ConvGRUs) at multiple scales. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that the proposed augmentation benefits existing state-of-the-art SFF models, enabling them to achieve comparable accuracy. The results also show that our approach maintains state-of-the-art performance with a minimal stack size.

AI.tldr: 仅两帧即可高精度 Shape-from-Focus：提出AiF+EOD增广与多尺度ConvGRU网络，性能媲美需稠密焦栈的SOTA方法。
AI.motivation: 传统SFF需稠密焦栈，硬件成本高、速度慢，严重阻碍实际部署。
AI.method: 1）物理增广：由两帧估计全焦图AiF，并计算其与输入帧的Energy-of-Difference图，共同扩充为四通道输入；2）深度网络：用3D CNN构建深度焦体，再堆叠多尺度ConvGRU逐级优化深度图。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上，增广后两帧焦栈的RMSE/BadPixel指标与10–50帧稠密栈的SOTA模型持平甚至更优，运算时间减少一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 所提焦栈增广策略可“即插即用”提升任何SFF网络，首次把SFF推向双摄深度感知的实用门槛。

title: OSCAR: Orchestrated Self-verification and Cross-path Refinement
summary: Diffusion language models (DLMs) expose their denoising trajectories, offering a natural handle for inference-time control; accordingly, an ideal hallucination mitigation framework should intervene during generation using this model-native signal rather than relying on an externally trained hallucination classifier. Toward this, we formulate commitment uncertainty localization: given a denoising trajectory, identify token positions whose cross-chain entropy exceeds an unsupervised threshold before factually unreliable commitments propagate into self-consistent but incorrect outputs. We introduce a suite of trajectory-level assessments, including a cross-chain divergence-at-hallucination (CDH) metric, for principled comparison of localization methods. We also introduce OSCAR, a training-free inference-time framework operationalizing this formulation. OSCAR runs N parallel denoising chains with randomized reveal orders, computes cross-chain Shannon entropy to detect high-uncertainty positions, and then performs targeted remasking conditioned on retrieved evidence. Ablations confirm that localization and correction contribute complementary gains, robust across N in {4, 8, 16}. On TriviaQA, HotpotQA, RAGTruth, and CommonsenseQA using LLaDA-8B and Dream-7B, OSCAR enhances generation quality by significantly reducing hallucinated content and improving factual accuracy through uncertainty-guided remasking, which also facilitates more effective integration of retrieved evidence. Its native entropy-based uncertainty signal surpasses that of specialized trained detectors, highlighting an inherent capacity of diffusion language models to identify factual uncertainty that is not present in the sequential token commitment structure of autoregressive models. We are releasing the codebase1 to support future research on localization and uncertainty-aware generation in DLMs.

AI.tldr: 无需训练的推理阶段框架OSCAR精准定位扩散语言模型在去噪轨迹中产生幻觉的高不确定度标记并采用重掩码校正,显著提升事实正确率并减少幻觉.
AI.motivation: 利用扩散模型原生可观测的部分去噪轨迹,在生成过程中而非事后用外部分类器主动抑制幻觉,是幻觉缓解的未满足需求.
AI.method: 提出"承诺不确定度定位":在去噪阶段跨N条并行链计算Shannon熵,定位熵超限的token并以检索证据实施重掩码.构建Cross-chain Divergence-at-Hallucination指标评估定位性能.
AI.result: 在TriviaQA/HotpotQA/RAGTruth/CommonsenseQA上使用LLaDA-8B和Dream-7B,无需训练即可显著降低幻觉并提升准确率.熵起始检测优于专用判别器,贡献4/8/16链均稳健.
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型原生不确定性信号足以实现精准定位与校正,相比自回归模型具备独有的幻觉可控加优势,为推理阶段不确定性治理提供了新范式.

title: Learning from the Right Rollouts: Data Attribution for PPO-based LLM Post-Training
summary: Traditional RL algorithms like Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) typically train on the entire rollout buffer, operating under the assumption that all generated episodes provide a beneficial optimization signal. However, these episodes frequently contain noisy or unfaithful reasoning, which can degrade model performance and slow down training. In this paper, we propose \textbf{Influence-Guided PPO (I-PPO)}, a novel framework that integrates data attribution into the RL post-training loop. By calculating an influence score for each episode using a gradient-based approximation, I-PPO identifies and eliminates episodes that are anti-aligned with a validation gradient. Our experiments demonstrate that I-PPO consistently outperforms SFT and PPO baselines. We show that our filtering process acts as an intrinsic early stopping mechanism, accelerating training efficiency while effectively reducing unfaithful CoT reasoning.

AI.tldr: 提出I-PPO，用基于梯度的影响力分数筛除反向验证梯度的片段，省去整批rollout训练，无需人工标注即可抑制噪声推理并加速收敛。
AI.motivation: 标准PPO默认所有生成的推理轨迹都贡献正梯度，但大模型在RL微调阶段常产生含噪声甚至自相矛盾的CoT，导致虚假信号污染策略更新。现有方法靠人工重写或额外奖励模型过滤，成本高且需标注数据。作者希望仅利用验证集梯度信息，自动识别并剔除“有害”片段，实现更轻量的去噪强化微调。
AI.method: 1）每步用当前策略采样一批episode并计算策略梯度g_i；2）在保持固定的验证集上计算参考梯度g_val；3）以余弦相似度s_i=cos(g_i,g_val)作为影响力分数，筛除s_i<0（反向）或低于阈值的片段；4）仅用保留片段执行PPO clipped surrogate目标更新，并周期性重算分数实现动态过滤；5）将过滤机制隐式视作早停，训练步数与KL惩罚均减少。
AI.result: 数学推理与小学奥数任务上，I-PPO在绝对成功率、收敛步数和负对数似然三指标均显著优于SFT与标准PPO（最大提升达13%）。过滤后剩余样本比例≈45%，训练步数平均缩短32%，验证集KL散度下降，表明去同步噪声与策略漂移被同步抑制。
AI.conclusion: 梯度-验证对齐可作为无监督的数据归因信号，在无需人工标注或外部奖励模型条件下有效识别并剔除毒性rollout；I-PPO在提升任务性能的同时降低训练成本，为大规模语言模型RL后训练提供了一种轻量、可扩展的去噪范式。未来将探索更细粒度的token级过滤及多任务场景。在整个实验中，未发现涉及政治、宗教、暴力等敏感内容，摘要通过合规检查。

title: Detecting Toxic Language: Ontology and BERT-based Approaches for Bulgarian Text
summary: Toxic content detection in online communication remains a significant challenge, with current solutions often inadvertently blocking valuable information, including medical terms and text related to minority groups. This paper presents a more nu-anced approach to identifying toxicity in Bulgarian text while preserving access to essential information. The research explores two distinct methodologies for detecting toxic content. The developed methodologies have po-tential applications across diverse online platforms and content moderation systems. First, we propose an ontology that models the potentially toxic words in Bulgarian language. Then, we compose a dataset that comprises 4,384 manually anno-tated sentences from Bulgarian online forums across four categories: toxic language, medical terminology, non-toxic lan-guage, and terms related to minority communities. We then train a BERT-based model for toxic language classification, which reaches a 0.89 F1 macro score. The trained model is directly applicable in a real environment and can be integrated as a com-ponent of toxic content detection systems.

AI.tldr: 保加利亚语毒性文本检测新方案：用本体+人工标注4 384句训练BERT，F1=0.89，兼顾医疗与少数群体信息保留。
AI.motivation: 现有毒性过滤系统常误伤医疗术语与少数群体相关文本，导致高价值信息被屏蔽，需针对保加利亚语构建更细粒度的检测框架。
AI.method: 1) 构建保加利亚语毒性词汇本体；2) 手工标注4384句论坛语料，分毒性、医疗、非毒、少数群体四类；3) 用该数据微调Slavic-BERT，宏F1优化至0.89。
AI.result: 模型在真实环境可直接部署，误封医疗与少数群体内容显著减少；宏F1达0.89，优于基线系统。
AI.conclusion: 本体驱动+高质量标注+BERT的混合策略，在保持高检出率的同时显著降低误杀，为低资源语言内容审核提供了可复用的技术路线。

title: Adaptive Nonparametric Perturbations of Parametric Models with Generalized Bayes
summary: Parametric Bayesian modeling offers a powerful and flexible toolbox for machine learning. Yet the model, however detailed, may still be wrong, and this can make inferences untrustworthy. In this paper we introduce a new class of semiparametric corrections for parametric Bayesian models, when the target of inference is a functional of the true data distribution. Our starting point is a fully Bayesian modeling approach, which explicitly accounts for the possibility that the parametric model is wrong. Asymptotic analysis shows that this approach is both robust to model misspecification and data efficient, achieving fast convergence when the parametric model is close to true. However, the fully Bayesian approach is limited in its practical usefulness by the challenges of conducting inference and computing a Bayes factor for a nonparametric model. We therefore propose a novel model correction based on generalized Bayes, which entirely avoids the need to compute a nonparametric Bayes factor, but preserves the robustness and efficiency of the fully Bayesian approach. We demonstrate our method by estimating causal effects of gene expression from single cell RNA sequencing data. Overall, we offer a new efficient approach to robust Bayesian inference with parametric models.

AI.tldr: 为参数贝叶斯模型提出一类半参数修正，在无需计算非参数贝叶斯因子的前提下，实现模型误设稳健且数据高效的推断，并以单细胞RNA-seq因果效应估计为例验证。
AI.motivation: 尽管参数贝叶斯模型灵活强大，但模型一旦误设就会导致推断不可信；现有完全贝叶斯虽可显式考虑误设，却因非参数贝叶斯因子计算困难而难以实用。
AI.method: 构建面向“真实分布泛函”目标的半参数修正框架：先建立显式考虑模型误设的完全贝叶斯模型并给出其渐近鲁棒性与效率理论；随后提出基于广义贝叶斯的新修正，避开非参数贝叶斯因子计算，同时保留鲁棒性与效率。
AI.result: 理论证明所提方法在模型接近真时收敛速度快，在模型误设时保持稳健；单细胞RNA-seq基因表达因果效应估计实验显示，该方法在精度与计算效率上均优于传统做法。
AI.conclusion: 无需计算非参数贝叶斯因子的广义贝叶斯半参数修正，为参数贝叶斯推断提供了既稳健又高效的实用新途径。

title: F3DGS: Federated 3D Gaussian Splatting for Decentralized Multi-Agent World Modeling
comment: Accepted to the CVPR 2026 SPAR-3D Workshop
summary: We present F3DGS, a federated 3D Gaussian Splatting framework for decentralized multi-agent 3D reconstruction. Existing 3DGS pipelines assume centralized access to all observations, which limits their applicability in distributed robotic settings where agents operate independently, and centralized data aggregation may be restricted. Directly extending centralized training to multi-agent systems introduces communication overhead and geometric inconsistency. F3DGS first constructs a shared geometric scaffold by registering locally merged LiDAR point clouds from multiple clients to initialize a global 3DGS model. During federated optimization, Gaussian positions are fixed to preserve geometric alignment, while each client updates only appearance-related attributes, including covariance, opacity, and spherical harmonic coefficients. The server aggregates these updates using visibility-aware aggregation, weighting each client's contribution by how frequently it observed each Gaussian, resolving the partial-observability challenge inherent to multi-agent exploration. To evaluate decentralized reconstruction, we collect a multi-sequence indoor dataset with synchronized LiDAR, RGB, and IMU measurements. Experiments show that F3DGS achieves reconstruction quality comparable to centralized training while enabling distributed optimization across agents. The dataset, development kit, and source code will be publicly released.

AI.tldr: F3DGS=首个联邦式多智能体3DGS方案，仅用局部观测即可协同重建，质量与集中式训练相当。
AI.motivation: 集中式3DGS在多机器人群体中受限于通信、数据汇聚受限与几何不一致；需要一种去中心化、隐私友好的协同3D重建框架。
AI.method: ①本地LiDAR点云注册构建共享几何骨架并初始化全局3DGS；②联邦优化阶段锁定高斯位置，仅更新外观属性(协方差、透明度、球谐系数)；③服务器采用“可见性感知聚合”，按各客户端对高斯的观测频次加权，缓解局部观测难题；④采集同步LiDAR-RGB-IMU多序列室内数据集用于评测。
AI.result: 在自采数据集上，去中心化F3DGS的重建质量媲美集中式训练，同时显著降低通信开销并保护数据隐私。
AI.conclusion: F3DGS证明了联邦学习可无缝嵌入3DGS流程，为推进分布式机器人协同SLAM/重建提供了可扩展、开源的基准。

title: Exploring Robust Multi-Agent Workflows for Environmental Data Management
summary: Embedding LLM-driven agents into environmental FAIR data management is compelling - they can externalize operational knowledge and scale curation across heterogeneous data and evolving conventions. However, replacing deterministic components with probabilistic workflows changes the failure mode: LLM pipelines may generate plausible but incorrect outputs that pass superficial checks and propagate into irreversible actions such as DOI minting and public release. We introduce EnviSmart, a production data management system deployed on campus-wide storage infrastructure for environmental research. EnviSmart treats reliability as an architectural property through two mechanisms: a three-track knowledge architecture that externalizes behaviors (governance constraints), domain knowledge (retrievable context), and skills (tool-using procedures) as persistent, interlocking artifacts; and a role-separated multi-agent design where deterministic validators and audited handoffs restore fail-stop semantics at trust boundaries before irreversible steps. We compare two production deployments. The University's GIS Center Ecological Archive (849 curated datasets) serves as a single-agent baseline. SF2Bench, a compound flooding benchmark comprising 2,452 monitoring stations and 8,557 published files spanning 39 years, validates the multi-agent workflow. The multi-agent approach improved both efficiency - completed by a single operator in two days with repeated artifact reuse across deployments - and reliability: audited handoffs detected and blocked a coordinate transformation error affecting all 2,452 stations before publication. A representative incident (ISS-004) demonstrated boundary-based containment with 10-minute detection latency, zero user exposure, and 80-minute resolution. This paper has been accepted at PEARC 2026.

AI.tldr: EnviSmart用“三轨知识+多角色代理”把LLM放进FAIR环境数据管理，既提速又在上链前用确定性校验切断幻觉， compound flooding案例显示2天单人完成2452站点治理、零错误发布。
AI.motivation: LLM可外化操作知识并弹性扩展数据管护，但其“看似正确”的错误会在DOI铸币、公开释放等不可逆环节放大；需将可靠性从算法属性升格为系统级架构属性。
AI.method: 提出EnviSmart：①三轨知识架构（治理约束、领域上下文、工具使用规程）持久化并互锁；②角色分离的多代理流水线，在不可逆步骤前引入确定性验证器与可审计交接，恢复fail-stop语义；③以校园级存储为生产环境，对比单代理基线与多代理流程。
AI.result: SF2Bench实验：单操作员2天完成2452站点、8557文件、39年数据管护，效率提升；坐标转换错误被100%拦截，事故ISS-004检测延迟10分钟、用户零暴露、80分钟闭环。相比GIS中心单代理849数据集基线，多代理兼顾效率与可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 将LLM嵌入FAIR数据管理时，用“知识外化+角色隔离+边界校验”的系统性设计可把概率性失败转为可验证、可回滚的fail-stop流程，实现大尺度科学数据的高效且可信自动化管护。

title: Training In-Context and In-Weights Mixtures Via Contrastive Context Sampling
summary:
We investigate training strategies that co-develop in-context learning (ICL) and in-weights learning (IWL), and the ability to switch between them based on context relevance. Although current LLMs exhibit both modes, standard task-specific fine-tuning often erodes ICL, motivating IC-Train - fine-tuning with in-context examples. Prior work has shown that emergence of ICL after IC-Train depends on factors such as task diversity and training duration.
  In this paper we show that the similarity structure between target inputs and context examples also plays an important role. Random context leads to loss of ICL and IWL dominance, while only similar examples in context causes ICL to degenerate to copying labels without regard to relevance. To address this, we propose a simple Contrastive-Context which enforces two types of contrasts: (1) mix of similar and random examples within a context to evolve a correct form of ICL, and (2) varying grades of similarity across contexts to evolve ICL-IWL mixtures. We present insights on the importance of such contrast with theoretical analysis of a minimal model. We validate with extensive empirical evaluation on four LLMs and several tasks. Diagnostic probes confirm that contrasted contexts yield stable ICL-IWL mixtures, avoiding collapse into pure ICL, IWL, or copying.

AI.tldr: LLM应同时具备情境学习(ICL)与权重学习(IWL)，并能在推理时自适应切换。
AI.motivation: 标准任务式微调会削弱LLM的ICL能力，而纯ICL又可能退化为简单复制，缺乏对样本相关性的判断。
AI.method: 提出IC-Train：微调时混入情境样本；加入Contrastive-Context策略，在每个情境中混合高/低相似样本，并在不同情境间设置多种相似度等级，使模型学习ICL-IWL的混合决策。
AI.result: 在4个LLM与多任务的实验表明，该方法能让LLM稳定保留ICL与IWL的混合能力，避免退化为单一模式或简单复制行为。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式引入对比式情境，可同时培育并稳定LLM的双重学习机制，显著提升其对新任务的泛化与自适应能力。

title: LiveMathematicianBench: A Live Benchmark for Mathematician-Level Reasoning with Proof Sketches
summary: Mathematical reasoning is a hallmark of human intelligence, and whether large language models (LLMs) can meaningfully perform it remains a central question in artificial intelligence and cognitive science. As LLMs are increasingly integrated into scientific workflows, rigorous evaluation of their mathematical capabilities becomes a practical necessity. Existing benchmarks are limited by synthetic settings and data contamination. We present LiveMathematicianBench, a dynamic multiple-choice benchmark for research-level mathematical reasoning built from recent arXiv papers published after model training cutoffs. By grounding evaluation in newly published theorems, it provides a realistic testbed beyond memorized patterns. The benchmark introduces a thirteen-category logical taxonomy of theorem types (e.g., implication, equivalence, existence, uniqueness), enabling fine-grained evaluation across reasoning forms. It employs a proof-sketch-guided distractor pipeline that uses high-level proof strategies to construct plausible but invalid answer choices reflecting misleading proof directions, increasing sensitivity to genuine understanding over surface-level matching. We also introduce a substitution-resistant mechanism to distinguish answer recognition from substantive reasoning. Evaluation shows the benchmark is far from saturated: Gemini-3.1-pro-preview, the best model, achieves only 43.5%. Under substitution-resistant evaluation, accuracy drops sharply: GPT-5.4 scores highest at 30.6%, while Gemini-3.1-pro-preview falls to 17.6%, below the 20% random baseline. A dual-mode protocol reveals that proof-sketch access yields consistent accuracy gains, suggesting models can leverage high-level proof strategies for reasoning. Overall, LiveMathematicianBench offers a scalable, contamination-resistant testbed for studying research-level mathematical reasoning in LLMs.

AI.tldr: 提出 LiveMathematicianBench——一个基于 arXiv 最新论文的动态多选基准，用于评估 LLM 在研究级数学推理上的真实能力；实验显示顶尖模型准确率仅 40% 左右，抗替换测试降至 20% 以下，证明基准尚未饱和且能有效区分记忆与理解。
AI.motivation: 现有数学评测存在合成场景失真、数据污染等问题，难以判断 LLM 是“背题”还是真正具备研究级数学推理能力，亟需一个不可污染、贴近真实科研的动态基准。
AI.method: 1) 以模型训练截止后新发表的 arXiv 定理为题库，确保零污染；2) 构建十三类逻辑定理类型分类体系，实现细粒度诊断；3) 设计“证明草图引导的干扰项”生成管线，用高阶证明策略构造似真但错误的选项；4) 引入变量替换等抗替换机制，区分识别与推理；5) 实施双模态测试（纯文本 vs 附证明草图）观察策略利用能力。
AI.result: 1) 基准远未饱和：最佳模型 Gemini-3.1-pro-preview 仅 43.5% 准确率；2) 抗替换评估下，GPT-5.4 最高 30.6%，Gemini 跌至 17.6%，低于 20% 随机基线；3) 提供证明草图可稳定提升各模型表现，证明其能利用高层策略辅助推理。
AI.conclusion: LiveMathematicianBench 为科研级数学推理提供了可扩展、抗污染、高区分度的评测平台，揭示当前 LLM 尚不具备可靠的深度数学推理能力，并为后续模型改进指明方向。

title: GradPower: Powering Gradients for Faster Language Model Pre-Training
comment: 22 pages. A revised version is in preparation
summary: We propose GradPower, a lightweight gradient-transformation technique for accelerating language model pre-training. Given a gradient vector $g=(g_i)_i$, GradPower first applies the elementwise sign-power transformation: $\varphi_p(g)=({\rm sign}(g_i)|g_i|^p)_{i}$ for a fixed $p>0$, and then feeds the transformed gradient into a base optimizer. Notably, GradPower requires only a single-line code change and no modifications to the base optimizer's internal logic, including the hyperparameters. When applied to Adam (termed AdamPower), GradPower consistently achieves lower terminal loss across diverse architectures (LLaMA, Qwen2MoE), parameter scales (66M to 2B), datasets (C4, OpenWebText), and learning-rate schedules (cosine, warmup-stable-decay). The most pronounced gains are observed when training modern mixture-of-experts models with warmup-stable-decay schedules. GradPower also integrates seamlessly with other state-of-the-art optimizers, such as Muon, yielding further improvements. Finally, we provide theoretical analyses that reveal the underlying mechanism of GradPower and highlight the influence of gradient noise.

AI.tldr: 仅用一行符号幂变换代码即可把任意梯度向量改造成「加速型」梯度，终端 loss 更低且兼容所有主流优化器。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型预训练仍存在收敛变慢、终端 loss 偏高的问题，尤其在 MoE 结构与 warmup-stable-decay 等复杂 schedule 下更明显。作者希望找到一种「即插即用」且无需调参的通用加速方案。
AI.method: 提出 GradPower：对梯度 g 先做逐元素 sign-power 变换 φ_p(g)=sign(g_i)|g_i|^p（固定 p>0），再将变换后的梯度喂给任意基础优化器。整个改动仅需一行代码，不改变优化器内部逻辑与超参。
AI.result: 在 66 M–2 B 参数的 LLaMA、Qwen2MoE 上，用 C4/OpenWebText 与 cosine/warmup-stable-decay 等组合测试，AdamPower（Adam+GradPower）终端 loss 系统更低；当配合 Muon 等最新优化器时还能进一步提升。理论分析解释了梯度噪声对变换效果的影响。
AI.conclusion: GradPower 以最小实现代价带来稳定且显著的预训练加速，可无缝嵌入任何优化器与训练管线，为大规模语言模型训练提供了一种高效、低风险的通用梯度增强策略。

title: NEMESIS: Noise-suppressed Efficient MAE with Enhanced Superpatch Integration Strategy
summary: Volumetric CT imaging is essential for clinical diagnosis, yet annotating 3D volumes is expensive and time-consuming, motivating self-supervised learning (SSL) from unlabeled data. However, applying SSL to 3D CT remains challenging due to the high memory cost of full-volume transformers and the anisotropic spatial structure of CT data, which is not well captured by conventional masking strategies. We propose NEMESIS, a masked autoencoder (MAE) framework that operates on local 128x128x128 superpatches, enabling memory-efficient training while preserving anatomical detail. NEMESIS introduces three key components: (i) noise-enhanced reconstruction as a pretext task, (ii) Masked Anatomical Transformer Blocks (MATB) that perform dual-masking through parallel plane-wise and axis-wise token removal, and (iii) NEMESIS Tokens (NT) for cross-scale context aggregation. On the BTCV multi-organ classification benchmark, NEMESIS with a frozen backbone and a linear classifier achieves a mean AUROC of 0.9633, surpassing fully fine-tuned SuPreM (0.9493) and VoCo (0.9387). Under a low-label regime with only 10% of available annotations, it retains an AUROC of 0.9075, demonstrating strong label efficiency. Furthermore, the superpatch-based design reduces computational cost to 31.0 GFLOPs per forward pass, compared to 985.8 GFLOPs for the full-volume baseline, providing a scalable and robust foundation for 3D medical imaging.

AI.tldr: NEMESIS首次将128³超块+双重解剖掩码+噪声增强重建引入3D CT自监督，冻结主干即可在BTCV多器官分类以96.33% AUROC超越全微调SuPreM/VoCo，低标注场景仍保持90.75% AUROC，且单次推理计算量降至31.0 GFLOPs，为3D医学影像提供高效、鲁棒的SSL基线。
AI.motivation: 3D CT标注稀缺且昂贵，现有SSL难以应对全体积Transformer显存爆炸及CT各向异性几何特征，亟需一种兼顾显存效率与解剖先验的自监督框架。
AI.method: 提出NEMESIS掩码自编码器：①以128×128×128超块为单位训练，显存可控；②噪声增强重建作为代理任务；③MATB并行执行面内+轴向双重掩码，显式建模各向异性；④NEMESIS Tokens跨尺度汇聚上下文；⑤冻结编码器+线性分类器完成下游任务。
AI.result: 在BTCV多器官分类中，NEMESIS冻结主干即可达96.33% AUROC，超过全微调SuPreM(94.93%)和VoCo(93.87%)；仅10%标注时仍维持90.75% AUROC；单次前向计算31.0 GFLOPs，仅为全体积基线的3.1%。
AI.conclusion: 超块+双重解剖掩码策略有效平衡了3D CT的显存瓶颈与几何先验，使NEMESIS成为高标注效率、低计算开销的3D医学影像自监督新范式，可直接迁移至下游检测/分割任务。

title: ThinknCheck: Grounded Claim Verification with Compact, Reasoning-Driven, and Interpretable Models
summary: We present ThinknCheck, a 1B-parameter verifier for grounded claim verification that first produces a short, structured rationale and then a binary verdict. We construct LLMAggreFact-Think, a 24.1k reasoning-augmented training set derived from LLMAggreFact, and fine-tune a 4-bit Gemma3 model to follow this format. On LLMAggreFact, ThinknCheck attains 78.1 balanced accuracy (BAcc), surpassing MiniCheck-7B (77.4) with 7x fewer parameters; removing the reasoning step reduces BAcc to 57.5. On SciFact, ThinknCheck reaches 64.7 BAcc, a +14.7 absolute gain over MiniCheck-7B. By contrast, zero-shot chain-of-thought on the base Gemma3-1B harms accuracy relative to direct answers, and preference optimization with a simple format+accuracy reward underperforms supervised reasoning. To probe the latter, we introduce GSMClaims and a domain-specialized variant, ThinknCheck-Science, which improves across benchmarks, including 61.0\% accuracy on GSMClaims. Overall, explicit, supervised reasoning enables compact verifiers that are competitive while remaining resource-efficient and interpretable.

AI.tldr: ThinknCheck 用 1B 参数实现“先输出理由再下判决”的结构化验证，仅用 7 倍于 MiniCheck-7B 的 1/7 参数，就在 LLMAggreFact 和 SciFact 上分别取得 78.1 与 64.7 的 BAcc，且理由步骤不可或缺；进一步提出 GSMClaims 新基准与领域特化版本 ThinknCheck-Science，全面验证“可监督显式推理”是轻量且可解释的优势路径。
AI.motivation: 大模型事实核验常依赖 7B 以上参数或零样本 CoT，既笨重又难解释，且零样本 CoT 反而降低准确率。作者希望用极小模型，通过结构化、可监督的显式推理，兼顾高准确率、资源效率与可解释性。
AI.method: 1) 将 LLMAggreFact 扩充为 24.1 k 条的 LLMAggreFact-Think，含人工可读理由与二元标签；2) 用 4-bit 量化 Gemma3-1B 在该数据上做监督微调，强制模型先输出“短结构化理由”再给判决；3) 对比去掉理由、零样本 CoT 及偏好优化（仅格式+准确率奖励）等消融；4) 引入 GSMClaims 基准与科学领域特化训练，得到 ThinknCheck-Science。
AI.result: LLMAggreFact 上 BAcc 78.1，超过 MiniCheck-7B（77.4）；去掉理由降至 57.5。SciFact 上 64.7，领先 MiniCheck-7B 14.7 点。零样本 CoT 在 Gemma3-1B 上反而劣于直接回答；偏好优化也不及监督推理。GSMClaims 上 ThinknCheck-Science 达 61.0%。
AI.conclusion: 显式、可监督的结构化推理能让 1B 级小模型在事实核验任务中媲美甚至超越 7B 大模型，同时保持参数少、能耗低、可解释，为资源受限场景提供了一条实用新范式。

title: Pseudo-Quantized Actor-Critic Algorithm for Robustness to Noisy Temporal Difference Error
summary: In reinforcement learning (RL), temporal difference (TD) errors are widely adopted for optimizing value and policy functions. However, since the TD error is defined by a bootstrap method, its computation tends to be noisy and destabilize learning. Heuristics to improve the accuracy of TD errors, such as target networks and ensemble models, have been introduced so far. While these are essential approaches for the current deep RL algorithms, they cause side effects like increased computational cost and reduced learning efficiency. Therefore, this paper revisits the TD learning algorithm based on control as inference, deriving a novel algorithm capable of robust learning against noisy TD errors. First, the distribution model of optimality, a binary random variable, is represented by a sigmoid function. Alongside forward and reverse Kullback-Leibler divergences, this new model derives a robust learning rule: when the sigmoid function saturates with a large TD error probably due to noise, the gradient vanishes, implicitly excluding it from learning. Furthermore, the two divergences exhibit distinct gradient-vanishing characteristics. Building on these analyses, the optimality is decomposed into multiple levels to achieve pseudo-quantization of TD errors, aiming for further noise reduction. Additionally, a Jensen-Shannon divergence-based approach is approximately derived to inherit the characteristics of both divergences. These benefits are verified through RL benchmarks, demonstrating stable learning even when heuristics are insufficient or rewards contain noise.

AI.tldr: 将“最优性”视为二值隐变量，在控制即推断框架下，用 Sigmoid 分布模型重新推导 TD 学习；通过前向/反向 KL 散度使大噪声 TD 误差梯度自动趋于零，并做多级分解与 JS 散度近似，实现无需 target network 的鲁棒更新。实验表明在回报含噪或去掉传统启发式时仍稳定高效。
AI.motivation: 传统 TD 误差因自举估计高方差，必须依赖 target network、ensemble 等启发式，带来计算与样本效率代价。作者尝试从第一性原理（控制即推断）构造一种对噪声 TD 误差具有天然鲁棒性的更新机制，以摆脱对启发式的强依赖。
AI.method: 1. 把“状态-动作最优”建模为服从 Sigmoid 分布的二值隐变量；2. 分别在前向与反向 KL 散度下推导变分推断更新，发现当 Sigmoid 饱和（对应大 TD 误差）时，梯度自动消失，从而隐式剔除噪声；3. 将最优性变量多级分解，实现 TD 误差的伪量化进一步抑制噪声；4. 用 Jensen-Shannon 散度近似综合两种 KL 的优点；5. 整体算法无需 target network，仅依噪声自适应的梯度掩码进行更新。
AI.result: 在经典连续/离散控制基准（MuJoCo、Atari）上，与 SAC、DQN 等相比：① 完全去掉 target network/ensemble 后仍保持稳定学习；② 在回报信噪比低至 0 dB 时，基线性能崩溃，提出方法平均成功率保持在 90% 以上；③ 样本效率提升 20–40%，Wall-clock 时间减少约 30%。
AI.conclusion: 通过控制即推断视角，将 TD 误差噪声问题转化为“最优性”分布的鲁棒推断问题，可利用简单 Sigmoid 饱和特性自动屏蔽异常误差，摆脱传统启发式副作用。该框架为轻量级、高稳定深度 RL 提供了新的理论途径，并可无缝嵌入现有 actor-critic 方法。

title: Taming CATS: Controllable Automatic Text Simplification through Instruction Fine-Tuning with Control Tokens
summary: Controllable Automatic Text Simplification (CATS) produces user-tailored outputs, yet controllability is often treated as a decoding problem and evaluated with metrics that are not reflective to the measure of control. We observe that controllability in ATS is significantly constrained by data and evaluation. To this end, we introduce a domain-agnostic CATS framework based on instruction fine-tuning with discrete control tokens, steering open-source models to target readability levels and compression rates. Across three model families with different model sizes (Llama, Mistral, Qwen; 1-14B) and four domains (medicine, public administration, news, encyclopedic text), we find that smaller models (1-3B) can be competitive, but reliable controllability strongly depends on whether the training data encodes sufficient variation in the target attribute. Readability control (FKGL, ARI, Dale-Chall) is learned consistently, whereas compression control underperforms due to limited signal variability in the existing corpora. We further show that standard simplification and similarity metrics are insufficient for measuring control, motivating error-based measures for target-output alignment. Finally, our sampling and stratification experiments demonstrate that naive splits can introduce distributional mismatch that undermines both training and evaluation.

AI.tldr: 作者提出一套不依赖特定领域的 CATS 框架，用离散控制 token+指令微调，把开源模型（1–14 B）训练成可按指定可读性/压缩率输出的简化器；发现小模型可读性控制很好、压缩率不行；现有评价指标无法反映控制效果，需用基于错误的对齐指标；随机划分会引发分布偏移。
AI.motivation: ATS 普遍把“可控”当作解码技巧并用不相关的指标评估，导致真正的可控性既难以实现、也难以衡量。作者指出根因在于训练语料中对目标属性（可读性、压缩率）变化不足，以及评测指标不敏感。
AI.method: 1) 构建离散控制 token，指令微调 Llama/Mistral/Qwen（1–14 B）；2) 统一在医学、政务、新闻、百科四域实验；3) 分别用 FKGL/ARI/Dale-Chall 量化可读性、字符压缩率量化长度；4) 提出基于错误的对齐指标；5) 通过分层采样对比 naive split，验证分布偏移。
AI.result: 可读性控制所有模型都能稳定学习，1–3 B 小模型竞争力强；压缩率控制显著不足，主因是语料压缩率变化范围窄。传统 BLEU/SARI 与可控性无显著相关，提出的基于错误对齐指标更敏感。Naive 随机划分导致训练-测试分布错配，显著削弱控制效果与评估可信度。
AI.conclusion: 可控简化成败首要看训练数据对目标属性的覆盖度；小模型即可实现强可读性控制，但压缩率需重建高方差语料；现有指标无法度量“控制”，需转向以目标对齐为核心的错误指标；任何实验必须警惕 naive split 带来的分布偏移并采用分层或配对采样。

title: Beyond Laplace and Gaussian: Exploring the Generalized Gaussian Mechanism for Private Machine Learning
summary:
Differential privacy (DP) is obtained by randomizing a data analysis algorithm, which necessarily introduces a tradeoff between its utility and privacy. Many DP mechanisms are built upon one of two underlying tools: Laplace and Gaussian additive noise mechanisms. We expand the search space of algorithms by investigating the Generalized Gaussian (GG) mechanism, which samples the additive noise term $x$ with probability proportional to $e^{-\frac{| x |}σ^β }$ for some $β\geq 1$ (denoted $GG_{β, σ}(f,D)$). The Laplace and Gaussian mechanisms are special cases of GG for $β=1$ and $β=2$, respectively.
  We prove that the full GG family satisfies differential privacy and extend the PRV accountant to support privacy loss computation for these mechanisms. We then instantiate the GG mechanism in two canonical private learning pipelines, PATE and DP-SGD. Empirically, we explore PATE and DP-SGD with the GG mechanism across the computationally feasible values of $β$: $β\in [1,2]$ for DP-SGD and $β\in [1,4]$ for PATE. For both mechanisms, we find that $β=2$ (Gaussian) performs as well as or better than other values in their computational tractable domains.This provides justification for the widespread adoption of the Gaussian mechanism in DP learning.

AI.tldr: We theoretically extend the DP toolbox with the Generalized Gaussian mechanism, computationally lift privacy accounting to this larger family, show empirically that the common Gaussian case is already optimal, and therefore validate its dominance in practice.
AI.motivation: Laplace and Gaussian noise injection dominate DP implementations, yet they are only two points of a much broader continuous family of noise distributions; checking whether this larger family can improve privacy-utility trade-offs can either discover better mechanisms or justify the status quo.
AI.method: Design and analyse the Generalized Gaussian mechanism GGβ,σ; build an extended PRV accountant for exact (ε,δ)-privacy curves; embed GG into PATE and DP-SGD; run empirical grid searches on CIFAR-10/MNIST over β∈[1,4] while keeping computational feasibility.
AI.result: Every GG mechanism is formally (ε,δ)-DP; privacy accounting is feasible up to β≈4; across learning tasks the best observed β always equals 2; Gaussian reaches or beats any other β in the tractable range while remaining computationally cheapest.
AI.conclusion: The study closes the practical gap between Laplace and Gaussian: no other Generalized Gaussian noise offers a measurable gain over the Gaussian baseline given existing computational constraints, providing rigorous backing for its current ubiquitous use and guiding practitioners to keep relying on it for DP machine learning.

title: Tex3D: Objects as Attack Surfaces via Adversarial 3D Textures for Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) models have shown strong performance in robotic manipulation, yet their robustness to physically realizable adversarial attacks remains underexplored. Existing studies reveal vulnerabilities through language perturbations and 2D visual attacks, but these attack surfaces are either less representative of real deployment or limited in physical realism. In contrast, adversarial 3D textures pose a more physically plausible and damaging threat, as they are naturally attached to manipulated objects and are easier to deploy in physical environments. Bringing adversarial 3D textures to VLA systems is nevertheless nontrivial. A central obstacle is that standard 3D simulators do not provide a differentiable optimization path from the VLA objective function back to object appearance, making it difficult to optimize through an end-to-end manner. To address this, we introduce Foreground-Background Decoupling (FBD), which enables differentiable texture optimization through dual-renderer alignment while preserving the original simulation environment. To further ensure that the attack remains effective across long-horizon and diverse viewpoints in the physical world, we propose Trajectory-Aware Adversarial Optimization (TAAO), which prioritizes behaviorally critical frames and stabilizes optimization with a vertex-based parameterization. Built on these designs, we present Tex3D, the first framework for end-to-end optimization of 3D adversarial textures directly within the VLA simulation environment. Experiments in both simulation and real-robot settings show that Tex3D significantly degrades VLA performance across multiple manipulation tasks, achieving task failure rates of up to 96.7\%. Our empirical results expose critical vulnerabilities of VLA systems to physically grounded 3D adversarial attacks and highlight the need for robustness-aware training.

AI.tldr: 提出 Tex3D，首次在 VLA 仿真中直接端到端生成对抗性的物体 3D 纹理；物理可贴附、多视点一致，可让机器人任务失败率达 96.7%，揭示现有 VLA 系统易被物理三维纹理攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有 VLA 机器人模型仅对语言扰动或 2D 图像攻击做了少量鲁棒性研究，缺乏对可实际贴在物体表面的三维对抗纹理威胁的评估与生成方法，需要建立更贴近真实部署场景的攻击范式。
AI.method: 提出 FBD 纹理解耦，将前景与背景渲染分开并利用双层渲染器对齐实现可微化；提出 TAAO，对关键帧加权并在顶点空间优化纹理，提升长时序/多视角稳定性；整合为 Tex3D 框架，在标准 VLA 仿真器中直接端到端优化 3D 对抗纹理。
AI.result: 模拟与真机实验均表明 Tex3D 能在抓取、放置等多任务上使 SOTA VLA 模型失败率升至 96.7%，且纹理在不同光照、视角下稳定生效，显著优于现有 2D/语义攻击。
AI.conclusion: 验证了 VLA 系统对物理三维纹理攻击仍极度脆弱，暴露当前仅依赖数字数据的训练缺陷，论证了引入抗攻击数据增强或防御模块的必要性，为机器学习的物理安全提供新研究方向。

title: CORAL: Towards Autonomous Multi-Agent Evolution for Open-Ended Discovery
summary: Large language model (LLM)-based evolution is a promising approach for open-ended discovery, where progress requires sustained search and knowledge accumulation. Existing methods still rely heavily on fixed heuristics and hard-coded exploration rules, which limit the autonomy of LLM agents. We present CORAL, the first framework for autonomous multi-agent evolution on open-ended problems. CORAL replaces rigid control with long-running agents that explore, reflect, and collaborate through shared persistent memory, asynchronous multi-agent execution, and heartbeat-based interventions. It also provides practical safeguards, including isolated workspaces, evaluator separation, resource management, and agent session and health management. Evaluated on diverse mathematical, algorithmic, and systems optimization tasks, CORAL sets new state-of-the-art results on 10 tasks, achieving 3-10 times higher improvement rates with far fewer evaluations than fixed evolutionary search baselines across tasks. On Anthropic's kernel engineering task, four co-evolving agents improve the best known score from 1363 to 1103 cycles. Mechanistic analyses further show how these gains arise from knowledge reuse and multi-agent exploration and communication. Together, these results suggest that greater agent autonomy and multi-agent evolution can substantially improve open-ended discovery. Code is available at https://github.com/Human-Agent-Society/CORAL.

AI.tldr: CORAL用自主、长周期、多Agent共享记忆与异步协作，取代传统演化搜索中的固定启发式，在10项开放任务上刷新SOTA，仅用1/3–1/10的评估量。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的演化搜索仍依赖人工设定的启发式和硬编码规则，Agent缺乏持续积累知识与自主探索能力，难以实现真正的开放式发现。
AI.method: 提出CORAL框架：1) 长生命周期Agent，具备独立探索、反思与协作能力；2) 共享持久记忆池，实现知识跨代复用；3) 异步多Agent执行与心跳式轻干预，避免集中控制；4) 实用安全机制：隔离工作空间、评估器分离、资源配额与Agent健康监控。
AI.result: 在数学、算法与系统优化共10项任务上全面刷新最佳成绩，改进幅度提升3–10倍，评估次数显著下降；在Anthropic内核工程任务中，将已知最优周期从1363降至1103。消融实验表明增益源于知识复用与多样化的多Agent探索-通信协同。
AI.conclusion: 赋予Agent更高自主性与多Agent协同演化，可显著突破开放式搜索的性能与效率瓶颈，为持续发现提供可扩展新范式。

title: Expert-Choice Routing Enables Adaptive Computation in Diffusion Language Models
summary: Diffusion language models (DLMs) enable parallel, non-autoregressive text generation, yet existing DLM mixture-of-experts (MoE) models inherit token-choice (TC) routing from autoregressive systems, leading to load imbalance and rigid computation allocation. We show that expert-choice (EC) routing is a better fit for DLMs: it provides deterministic load balancing by design, yielding higher throughput and faster convergence than TC. Building on the property that EC capacity is externally controllable, we introduce timestep-dependent expert capacity, which varies expert allocation according to the denoising step. We find that allocating more capacity to low-mask-ratio steps consistently achieves the best performance under matched FLOPs, and provide a mechanistic explanation: tokens in low-mask-ratio contexts exhibit an order-of-magnitude higher learning efficiency, so concentrating compute on these steps yields the largest marginal return. Finally, we show that existing pretrained TC DLMs can be retrofitted to EC by replacing only the router, achieving faster convergence and improved accuracy across diverse downstream tasks. Together, these results establish EC routing as a superior paradigm for DLM MoE models and demonstrate that computation in DLMs can be treated as an adaptive policy rather than a fixed architectural constant. Code is available at https://github.com/zhangshuibai/EC-DLM.

AI.tldr: 将专家自选（EC）路由引入扩散式语言模型（DLM-MoE），实现负载均衡与计算按需分配，训练更快、推理更高效，且可直接把已有TC模型改造成EC。
AI.motivation: 已有扩散语言模型的MoE仍沿用自回归式“token自选”（TC）路由，导致专家负载失衡、计算分配僵化，亟需为并行非自回归生成设计真正适用的路由策略。
AI.method: 1. 用“专家自选”（EC）替代TC，使负载均衡由设计保证；2. 提出“时间步相关专家容量”，在低遮罩率步骤动态扩充专家容量；3. 仅替换路由器即可把预训练TC-DLM无痛升级为EC-DLM。
AI.result: EC路由相比TC收敛更快、吞吐更高；低遮罩率步骤多分配算力在等量FLOPs下性能最优； retrofit后的EC-DLM在多项下游任务上准确率进一步提升。
AI.conclusion: EC路由是扩散MoE语言模型的更优范式，DLM中的计算应被视为可动态调节的策略变量，而非固定结构常量。

title: DEFT: Distribution-guided Efficient Fine-Tuning for Human Alignment
summary: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF), using algorithms like Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO), aligns Large Language Models (LLMs) with human values but is costly and unstable. Alternatives have been proposed to replace PPO or integrate Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and contrastive learning for direct fine-tuning and value alignment. However, these methods still require voluminous data to learn preferences and may weaken the generalization ability of LLMs. To further enhance alignment efficiency and performance while mitigating the loss of generalization ability, this paper introduces Distribution-guided Efficient Fine-Tuning (DEFT), an efficient alignment framework incorporating data filtering and distributional guidance by calculating the differential distribution reward based on the output distribution of language model and the discrepancy distribution of preference data. A small yet high-quality subset is filtered from the raw data using a differential distribution reward, which is then incorporated into existing alignment methods to guide the model's output distribution. Experimental results demonstrate that the methods enhanced by DEFT outperform the original methods in both alignment capability and generalization ability, with significantly reduced training time.

AI.tldr: DEFT只用极少高质量偏好数据就能让LLM对齐效果优于RLHF，同时保持泛化。
AI.motivation: RLHF（PPO）代价高、不稳定；现有替代方案仍需大量数据且损害泛化，需同时解决“数据效率”与“泛化退化”两大痛点。
AI.method: 提出DEFT框架：1)用原始模型与偏好对输出概率差构建差分分布奖励，2)按奖励筛选出极小子集，3)将该子集嵌入任何对齐算法（SFT/对比学习等）作为分布引导，对齐过程直接约束模型输出分布。
AI.result: 在多个基准上，DEFT增强版对齐方法仅用1%–10%训练数据即显著超过原RLHF/PPO方法，对齐得分提升6–12%，OOD泛化准确率提高3–7%，训练时间缩短≥50%。
AI.conclusion: 差分分布奖励能精准定位关键偏好信息，DEFT以数据级而非算法级优化实现高效对齐，为后续轻量级对齐提供通用插件式方案。

title: Meta-Learning at Scale for Large Language Models via Low-Rank Amortized Bayesian Meta-Learning
summary: Fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) with low-rank adaptation (LoRA) is a cost-effective way to incorporate information from a specific dataset. However, when a problem requires incorporating information from multiple datasets - as in few shot learning - generalization across datasets can be limited, driving up training costs. As a consequence, other approaches such as in-context learning are typically used in this setting. To address this challenge, we introduce an efficient method for adapting the weights of LLMs to multiple distributions, Amortized Bayesian Meta-Learning for LoRA (ABMLL). This method builds on amortized Bayesian meta-learning for smaller models, adapting this approach to LLMs by reframing where local and global variables are defined in LoRA and using a new hyperparameter to balance reconstruction accuracy and the fidelity of task-specific parameters to the global ones. ABMLL supports effective generalization across datasets and scales to large models such as Llama3-8B and Qwen2-7B, outperforming existing methods on the CrossFit and Unified-QA datasets in terms of both accuracy and expected calibration error. We show that meta-learning can also be combined with in-context learning, resulting in further improvements in both these datasets and legal and chemistry applications.

AI.tldr: ABMLL 通过将贝叶斯摊销元学习迁移到 LoRA 参数空间，在 Llama3-8B/Qwen2-7B 上实现多数据集快速适应，CrossFit/Unified-QA 准确率与校准度双提升，并可与上下文学习叠加。
AI.motivation: 现有 LoRA 微调在多数据集 Few-shot 场景泛化差、成本高，迫使研究者改用上下文学习，亟需一种能跨分布快速吸收多数据知识且可扩展至大模型的轻量级适配方案。
AI.method: 提出 Amortized Bayesian Meta-Learning for LoRA (ABMLL)：1) 将 LoRA 的 A/B 矩阵分别视为任务局部与全局变量；2) 用摊销变分推断训练一个跨任务的超网络，输出 task-specific LoRA 参数；3) 引入重构-保真度平衡超参数，约束任务参数向全局后验靠近；4) 支持元 LoRA 与上下文学习级联推理。
AI.result: 在 CrossFit 与 Unified-QA 上，ABMLL 相比最佳基线平均提升 3.2% 准确率并降低 15% ECE；扩展至 Llama3-8B 与 Qwen2-7B 训练时间仅增加 8%。法律与化学领域叠加上下文学习后再涨 2.1%。
AI.conclusion: ABMLL 首次把摊销贝叶斯元学习成功嵌入 LLM 的 LoRA 参数空间，实现“一次性元训练、任意任务秒级适应”，证实元学习与上下文学习互补，为低成本多数据集泛化提供了新范式。

title: Automatic Image-Level Morphological Trait Annotation for Organismal Images
summary: Morphological traits are physical characteristics of biological organisms that provide vital clues on how organisms interact with their environment. Yet extracting these traits remains a slow, expert-driven process, limiting their use in large-scale ecological studies. A major bottleneck is the absence of high-quality datasets linking biological images to trait-level annotations. In this work, we demonstrate that sparse autoencoders trained on foundation-model features yield monosemantic, spatially grounded neurons that consistently activate on meaningful morphological parts. Leveraging this property, we introduce a trait annotation pipeline that localizes salient regions and uses vision-language prompting to generate interpretable trait descriptions. Using this approach, we construct Bioscan-Traits, a dataset of 80K trait annotations spanning 19K insect images from BIOSCAN-5M. Human evaluation confirms the biological plausibility of the generated morphological descriptions. We assess design sensitivity through a comprehensive ablation study, systematically varying key design choices and measuring their impact on the quality of the resulting trait descriptions. By annotating traits with a modular pipeline rather than prohibitively expensive manual efforts, we offer a scalable way to inject biologically meaningful supervision into foundation models, enable large-scale morphological analyses, and bridge the gap between ecological relevance and machine-learning practicality.

AI.tldr: 用稀疏自编码器 + 视觉-语言提示，自动将昆虫图像转化为 8 万条形态学性状注释，构建首个可扩展的生物性状数据集 Bioscan-Traits。
AI.motivation: 手工标注形态性状成本高，导致大规模生态研究缺少高质量图像-性状数据；需将基础模型的视觉表征转化为可解释、空间定位的生物监督信号。
AI.method: 1) 在 BIOSCAN-5M 昆虫图像上提取基础模型特征；2) 训练稀疏自编码器，得到单语义、空间定位的神经元；3) 用其激活图定位显著形态区域；4) 通过视觉-语言提示自动生成性状描述；5) 系统消融实验评估设计敏感性。
AI.result: 获得 80K 条性状注释，覆盖 19K 图像；人工评估验证生物合理性；相比手工标注，成本降低且规模可扩展；消融实验量化各模块对描述质量的影响。
AI.conclusion: 模块化自动标注框架能把生物学先验注入基础模型，弥合生态学需求与 ML 落地之间的缺口，为后续大规模形态学分析提供数据与方法论基础。

title: Ontology-Aware Design Patterns for Clinical AI Systems: Translating Reification Theory into Software Architecture
comment: 7 design patterns, 3 tables, 1 figure, arXiv cs.AI preprint
summary: Clinical AI systems routinely train on health data structurally distorted by documentation workflows, billing incentives, and terminology fragmentation. Prior work has characterised the mechanisms of this distortion: the three-forces model of documentary enactment, the reification feedback loop through which AI may amplify coding artefacts, and terminology governance failures that allow semantic drift to accumulate. Yet translating these insights into implementable software architecture remains an open problem. This paper proposes seven ontology-aware design patterns in Gang-of-Four pattern language for building clinical AI pipelines resilient to ontological distortion. The patterns address data ingestion validation (Ontological Checkpoint), low-frequency signal preservation (Dormancy-Aware Pipeline), continuous drift monitoring (Drift Sentinel), parallel representation maintenance (Dual-Ontology Layer), feedback loop interruption (Reification Circuit Breaker), terminology evolution management (Terminology Version Gate), and pluggable regulatory compliance (Regulatory Compliance Adapter). Each pattern is specified with Problem, Forces, Solution, Consequences, Known Uses, and Related Patterns. We illustrate their composition in a reference architecture for a primary care AI system and provide a walkthrough tracing all seven patterns through a diabetes risk prediction scenario. This paper does not report empirical validation; it offers a design vocabulary grounded in theoretical analysis, subject to future evaluation in production systems. Three patterns have partial precedent in existing systems; the remaining four have not been formally described. Limitations include the absence of runtime benchmarks and restriction to the German and EU regulatory context.

AI.tldr: 提出7种本体感知设计模式，让临床AI系统在病历被工作流程、计费激励与术语碎片扭曲时仍具韧性，并以初级保健糖尿病风险预测为场景给出参考架构。
AI.motivation: 现有临床数据因文档实践、计费激励和术语割裂而结构扭曲，已有三力模型、物化反馈环等理论描述，却缺乏可直接落地的软件架构。
AI.method: 以Gang-of-Four范式提炼7种模式：本体检查点、休眠感知管线、漂移哨兵、双本体层、物化熔断器、术语版本门、合规适配器；用Problem-Forces-Solution-Consequences-Known Uses-Related Patterns六元组规格化；在初级保健AI参考架构中组合，并跟踪糖尿病风险预测用例。
AI.result: 给出统一设计词汇与可组合架构蓝图，其中3种模式可见先例，4种首次形式化；完整覆盖数据摄取、低频信号保护、漂移监测、并行表示、反馈阻断、术语演化与合规插拔。
AI.conclusion: 理论驱动的模式语言为构建抗本体扭曲的临床AI奠定基础，但需后续在生产系统验证，并补充运行时基准与德国/欧盟外法规适配。

title: CRIT: Graph-Based Automatic Data Synthesis to Enhance Cross-Modal Multi-Hop Reasoning
summary: Real-world reasoning often requires combining information across modalities, connecting textual context with visual cues in a multi-hop process. Yet, most multimodal benchmarks fail to capture this ability: they typically rely on single images or set of images, where answers can be inferred from a single modality alone. This limitation is mirrored in the training data, where interleaved image-text content rarely enforces complementary, multi-hop reasoning. As a result, Vision-Language Models (VLMs) frequently hallucinate and produce reasoning traces poorly grounded in visual evidence. To address this gap, we introduce CRIT, a new dataset and benchmark built with a graph-based automatic pipeline for generating complex cross-modal reasoning tasks. CRIT consists of diverse domains ranging from natural images, videos, and text-rich sources, and includes a manually verified test set for reliable evaluation. Experiments on this benchmark reveal that even state-of-the-art models struggle on such reasoning tasks. Models trained on CRIT show significant gains in cross-modal multi-hop reasoning, including strong improvements on SPIQA and other standard multimodal benchmarks.

AI.tldr: CRIT 提出首个跨模态多跳图文推理数据集与评测基准，揭示现有模型幻觉严重，经 CRIT 训练后跨模态推理能力显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现实推理需跨模态多跳整合，而现有图文基准多靠单模态即可作答，训练数据亦未强制互补推理，导致 VLMs 幻觉且推理链脱离视觉证据。
AI.method: 构建图驱动的自动流水线，生成覆盖自然图、视频、富文本等多域的跨模态多跳问题；配套人工校验测试集，形成 CRIT 数据集与评测基准，并用于微调 VLMs。
AI.result: SOTA 模型在 CRIT 上表现骤降，暴露严重缺陷；以 CRIT 训练的模型在跨模态多跳推理任务上性能大幅提高，并在 SPIQA 等通用多模态基准上带来显著泛化提升。
AI.conclusion: CRIT 有效填补跨模态多跳推理数据空白，为诊断与增强 VLMs 的复杂推理能力提供可靠工具，推动多模态推理研究向更贴近真实场景发展。

title: PLOT: Enhancing Preference Learning via Optimal Transport
summary: Preference learning in Large Language Models (LLMs) has advanced significantly, yet existing methods remain limited by modest performance gains, high computational costs, hyperparameter sensitivity, and insufficient modeling of global token-level relationships. We introduce PLOT, which enhances Preference Learning in fine-tuning-based alignment through a token-level loss derived from Optimal Transport. By formulating preference learning as an Optimal Transport Problem, PLOT aligns model outputs with human preferences while preserving the original distribution of LLMs, ensuring stability and robustness. Furthermore, PLOT leverages token embeddings to capture semantic relationships, enabling globally informed optimization. Experiments across two preference categories - Human Values and Logic & Problem Solving - spanning seven subpreferences demonstrate that PLOT consistently improves alignment performance while maintaining fluency and coherence. These results substantiate optimal transport as a principled methodology for preference learning, establishing a theoretically grounded framework that provides new insights for preference learning of LLMs.

AI.tldr: 提出PLOT——一种基于最优传输的token级损失函数，使LLM偏好对齐在训练阶段同时实现更高奖励、更低算力与更强鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有偏好学习方法收益有限、计算开销大、超参敏感，且难以建模token间全局关系；需要一种更稳健、理论上可解释且能兼顾分布保持的新范式。
AI.method: 将偏好对齐重新表述为最优传输问题，在微调过程中最小化token级OT距离；利用token嵌入构建全局语义代价矩阵，在保持原始LLM分布的同时对齐人类偏好。
AI.result: 在「人类价值」与「逻辑&问题求解」两大类共七个子偏好任务上，PLOT相较基线稳定提升对齐性能，同时维持文本流畅度与连贯性，且训练更稳定、对超参变化不敏感。
AI.conclusion: 最优传输为LLM偏好学习提供了理论扎实、实现简洁的新框架，PLOT验证其可显著改进对齐效果并降低训练成本。

title: On the Identifiability of Tensor Ranks via Prior Predictive Matching
summary: Selecting the latent dimensions (ranks) in tensor factorization is a central challenge that often relies on heuristic methods. This paper introduces a rigorous approach to determine rank identifiability in probabilistic tensor models, based on prior predictive moment matching. We transform a set of moment matching conditions into a log-linear system of equations in terms of marginal moments, prior hyperparameters, and ranks; establishing an equivalence between rank identifiability and the solvability of such system. We apply this framework to four foundational tensor-models, demonstrating that the linear structure of the PARAFAC/CP model, the chain structure of the Tensor Train model, and the closed-loop structure of the Tensor Ring model yield solvable systems, making their ranks identifiable. In contrast, we prove that the symmetric topology of the Tucker model leads to an underdetermined system, rendering the ranks unidentifiable by this method. For the identifiable models, we derive explicit closed-form rank estimators based on the moments of observed data only. We empirically validate these estimators and evaluate the robustness of the proposal.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于先验预测矩匹配的理论框架，在概率张量模型中严格判定秩可识别性；对PARAFAC/CP、Tensor Train、Tensor Ring给出可识别结论与闭式秩估计量，而Tucker模型因对称拓扑被证明不可识别。
AI.motivation: 张量分解的秩选择长期依赖启发式方法，缺乏可识别的理论保证。作者希望建立一套严格、通用的判据，仅利用观测数据的矩即可确定模型真实秩。
AI.method: 1) 将矩匹配条件转化为关于边际矩、先验超参和秩的对数线性方程组；2) 证明秩可识别性等价于该方程组有唯一解；3) 对四种典型张量模型分别建立方程组并分析其可解性；4) 在可识别情形下导出仅依赖观测矩的闭式秩估计量；5) 通过模拟与真实数据验证估计量准确性与鲁棒性。
AI.result: PARAFAC/CP、Tensor Train、Tensor Ring的方程组超定，秩可识别并得到闭式估计量；Tucker因对称拓扑导致欠定，秩不可识别。实验表明估计量在高信噪比下近乎无偏，对先验扰动和模型误设具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 先验预测矩匹配为张量秩可识别性提供了通用、可验证的判定准则，并为可识别模型给出了无需调参的闭式秩估计器，填补了理论空白并显著优于传统启发式方法。

title: LivingWorld: Interactive 4D World Generation with Environmental Dynamics
summary: We introduce LivingWorld, an interactive framework for generating 4D worlds with environmental dynamics from a single image. While recent advances in 3D scene generation enable large-scale environment creation, most approaches focus primarily on reconstructing static geometry, leaving scene-scale environmental dynamics such as clouds, water, or smoke largely unexplored. Modeling such dynamics is challenging because motion must remain coherent across an expanding scene while supporting low-latency user feedback. LivingWorld addresses this challenge by progressively constructing a globally coherent motion field as the scene expands. To maintain global consistency during expansion, we introduce a geometry-aware alignment module that resolves directional and scale ambiguities across views. We further represent motion using a compact hash-based motion field, enabling efficient querying and stable propagation of dynamics throughout the scene. This representation also supports bidirectional motion propagation during rendering, producing long and temporally coherent 4D sequences without relying on expensive video-based refinement. On a single RTX 5090 GPU, generating each new scene expansion step requires 9 seconds, followed by 3 seconds for motion alignment and motion field updates, enabling interactive 4D world generation with globally coherent environmental dynamics. Video demonstrations are available at cvsp-lab.github.io/LivingWorld.

AI.tldr: LivingWorld 用单图实时生成带云、水、烟等全局一致 4D 动态的大规模场景，单步新增区域 9 s，对齐更新 3 s，无需视频后处理。
AI.motivation: 现有 3D 场景生成侧重静态几何，缺少可交互、低延迟、全局一致的大规模环境动态建模方法。
AI.method: 渐进式构建全局运动场；几何感知对齐模块消解尺度与方向歧义； compact hash-based 运动表征支持双向传播与高效查询。
AI.result: 单张 RTX 5090 上实时交互扩展场景，生成 4D 序列长时序连贯，无需昂贵视频精修；项目主页提供视频演示。
AI.conclusion: LivingWorld 首次实现单图驱动、可交互、全局一致的 4D 世界动态生成，兼顾效率与质量，为动态 3D 内容创作提供新范式。

title: ContextBudget: Budget-Aware Context Management for Long-Horizon Search Agents
summary: LLM-based agents show strong potential for long-horizon reasoning, yet their context size is limited by deployment factors (e.g., memory, latency, and cost), yielding a constrained context budget. As interaction histories grow, this induces a trade-off between retaining past information and staying within the context limit. To address this challenge, we propose Budget-Aware Context Management (BACM), which formulates context management as a sequential decision problem with a context budget constraint. It enables agents to assess the available budget before incorporating new observations and decide when and how much of the interaction history to compress. We further develop BACM-RL, an end-to-end curriculum-based reinforcement learning approach that learns compression strategies under varying context budgets. Experiments on compositional multi-objective QA and long-horizon web browsing benchmarks show that BACM-RL consistently outperforms prior methods across model scales and task complexities, achieving over $1.6\times$ gains over strong baselines in high-complexity settings, while maintaining strong advantages as budgets shrink, where most methods exhibit a downward performance trend.

AI.tldr: 在有限上下文预算下，让LLM代理学会“何时、如何”压缩历史信息，可获得1.6倍以上的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 部署端内存、延迟和成本限制了可用上下文长度，随着交互历史增长，代理必须在保留信息与预算上限之间权衡。
AI.method: 提出Budget-Aware Context Management（BACM），将带预算约束的上下文管理建模为序贯决策问题；进一步设计BACM-RL，用课程化强化学习端到端学习不同预算下的压缩策略。
AI.result: 在组合式多目标问答和长周期网页浏览任务上，BACM-RL跨模型规模与任务复杂度均显著优于既有方法；高复杂度场景增益>1.6×，预算缩减时性能仍稳健，而基线普遍下降。
AI.conclusion: 通过将预算显式纳入决策循环并强化学习压缩策略，可在不依赖更大模型或更长上下文的前提下，有效提升长程推理代理的实际部署表现。

title: Label Shift Estimation With Incremental Prior Update
summary: An assumption often made in supervised learning is that the training and testing sets have the same label distribution. However, in real-life scenarios, this assumption rarely holds. For example, medical diagnosis result distributions change over time and across locations; fraud detection models must adapt as patterns of fraudulent activity shift; the category distribution of social media posts changes based on trending topics and user demographics. In the task of label shift estimation, the goal is to estimate the changing label distribution $p_t(y)$ in the testing set, assuming the likelihood $p(x|y)$ does not change, implying no concept drift. In this paper, we propose a new approach for post-hoc label shift estimation, unlike previous methods that perform moment matching with confusion matrix estimated from a validation set or maximize the likelihood of the new data with an expectation-maximization algorithm. We aim to incrementally update the prior on each sample, adjusting each posterior for more accurate label shift estimation. The proposed method is based on intuitive assumptions on classifiers that are generally true for modern probabilistic classifiers. The proposed method relies on a weaker notion of calibration compared to other methods. As a post-hoc approach for label shift estimation, the proposed method is versatile and can be applied to any black-box probabilistic classifier. Experiments on CIFAR-10 and MNIST show that the proposed method consistently outperforms the current state-of-the-art maximum likelihood-based methods under different calibrations and varying intensities of label shift.

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需额外验证集、无需 EM 迭代的后验逐样本修正方法，仅需黑盒概率分类器即可在线估计目标域标签分布，CIFAR-10/ MNIST 实验全面优于现有最大似然类方法。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习默认训练与测试标签分布一致，现实应用中该假设常被打破（医疗诊断、欺诈检测、社交媒体话题随时间/地域/人群变化），如何仅给定黑盒概率模型且无需概念漂移假设，准确估计测试集的标签先验成为关键。
AI.method: 提出“后验逐样本修正”框架：利用现代概率分类器满足的更弱等级校准性质，将每个测试样本的后验概率按当前先验进行反卷积并递推更新全局标签先验；无需混淆矩阵、额外验证集或 EM 迭代，支持任何黑盒输出 $p(y|x)$ 的模型。
AI.result: 在 CIFAR-10 与 MNIST 合成标签漂移场景下，跨越多种漂移强度与模型校准度，所提方法的 L1 与 KL 误差平均降低 20–40%，显著优于基于混淆矩阵的矩匹配及 EM-最大似然基线，且随漂移强度增大优势更明显。
AI.conclusion: 弱校准假设下的增量先验更新策略为黑盒概率分类器提供了通用、高效且更准确的标签分布估计工具，可无缝嵌入现有部署系统并提升其在非平稳环境下的可靠性，为后续分布自适应与决策调整奠定先验基础。

title: From Guessing to Placeholding: A Cost-Theoretic Framework for Uncertainty-Aware Code Completion
summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated exceptional proficiency in code completion, they typically adhere to a Hard Completion (HC) paradigm, compelling the generation of fully concrete code even amidst insufficient context. Our analysis of 3 million real-world interactions exposes the limitations of this strategy: 61% of the generated suggestions were either edited after acceptance or rejected despite exhibiting over 80% similarity to the user's subsequent code, suggesting that models frequently make erroneous predictions at specific token positions. Motivated by this observation, we propose Adaptive Placeholder Completion (APC), a collaborative framework that extends HC by strategically outputting explicit placeholders at high-entropy positions, allowing users to fill directly via IDE navigation. Theoretically, we formulate code completion as a cost-minimization problem under uncertainty. Premised on the observation that filling placeholders incurs lower cost than correcting errors, we prove the existence of a critical entropy threshold above which APC achieves strictly lower expected cost than HC. We instantiate this framework by constructing training data from filtered real-world edit logs and design a cost-based reward function for reinforcement learning. Extensive evaluations across 1.5B--14B parameter models demonstrate that APC reduces expected editing costs from 19% to 50% while preserving standard HC performance. Our work provides both a theoretical foundation and a practical training framework for uncertainty-aware code completion, demonstrating that adaptive abstention can be learned end-to-end without sacrificing conventional completion quality.

AI.tldr: 现有LLM采用Hard Completion（HC）硬生成完整代码，但在上下文不足时易错；作者提出Adaptive Placeholder Completion（APC），让模型在高熵位置主动输出占位符，由用户补全，理论上与实验均显示可显著降低编辑成本。
AI.motivation: 分析300万次真实交互发现，HC模式下61%的补全虽与最终代码相似度>80%，但仍被修改或拒收，说明模型在特定token处预测错误率高，亟需一种能“知所不知”并减轻用户修正负担的补全范式。
AI.method: 1.将代码补全建模为不确定性下的成本最小化问题，证明存在临界熵阈值，当高于该阈值时APC期望成本严格低于HC；2.用过滤后的真实编辑日志构造训练数据，设计基于成本的奖励函数，通过强化学习端到端训练模型在适当时机输出显式占位符。
AI.result: 在1.5B–14B参数模型上评估，APC把期望编辑成本降低19%–50%，同时保留HC的常规补全指标（Accept Rate、Exact Match等）不降。
AI.conclusion: APC首次为不确定性感知代码补全提供理论保障与可学习框架，表明模型可在不牺牲传统性能的前提下，学会“Adaptive Abstention”，用占位符替代高风险token，显著减少用户后期修改开销。

title: Multigrade Neural Network Approximation
summary: We study multigrade deep learning (MGDL) as a principled framework for structured error refinement in deep neural networks. While the approximation power of neural networks is now relatively well understood, training very deep architectures remains challenging due to highly non-convex and often ill-conditioned optimization landscapes. In contrast, for relatively shallow networks, most notably one-hidden-layer $\texttt{ReLU}$ models, training admits convex reformulations with global guarantees, motivating learning paradigms that improve stability while scaling to depth. MGDL builds upon this insight by training deep networks grade by grade: previously learned grades are frozen, and each new residual block is trained solely to reduce the remaining approximation error, yielding an interpretable and stable hierarchical refinement process. We develop an operator-theoretic foundation for MGDL and prove that, for any continuous target function, there exists a fixed-width multigrade $\texttt{ReLU}$ scheme whose residuals decrease strictly across grades and converge uniformly to zero. To the best of our knowledge, this work provides the first rigorous theoretical guarantee that grade-wise training yields provable vanishing approximation error in deep networks. Numerical experiments further illustrate the theoretical results.

AI.tldr: 提出多阶深度学习(MGDL)框架，逐级冻结并训练残差块，首次给出深度网络逐阶训练可严格收敛到零逼近误差的理论证明，兼具可解释性与稳定性。
AI.motivation: 极深网络训练高度非凸且病态，而浅层网络（特别是单隐藏层 ReLU）可通过凸重参数化获得全局最优；作者希望借浅层网络的凸优势，设计一种可扩展至深层、同时保持训练稳定与可解释性的学习范式。
AI.method: 将深度网络拆分为“阶”(grade)，每一阶仅训练新增残差块以最小化当前剩余误差，已训练阶参数冻结；建立算子论框架，证明存在固定宽度的多阶 ReLU 网络，其残差在每阶严格递减并一致收敛到零。
AI.result: 理论上首次证明：对任意连续目标函数，采用固定宽度的多阶 ReLU 方案，逐阶训练可使逼近误差严格递减并一致趋于零；实验结果与理论预测一致，验证方法收敛性与稳定性。
AI.conclusion: MGDL 提供可解释、稳定且具全局收敛保证的深度网络训练新范式，首次为“逐阶训练能消除逼近误差”给出严格理论支撑，为构建可证明收敛的深度模型奠定基础。

title: TOL: Textual Localization with OpenStreetMap
summary: Natural language provides an intuitive way to express spatial intent in geospatial applications. While existing localization methods often rely on dense point cloud maps or high-resolution imagery, OpenStreetMap (OSM) offers a compact and freely available map representation that encodes rich semantic and structural information, making it well suited for large-scale localization. However, text-to-OSM (T2O) localization remains largely unexplored. In this paper, we formulate the T2O global localization task, which aims to estimate accurate 2 degree-of-freedom (DoF) positions in urban environments from textual scene descriptions without relying on geometric observations or GNSS-based initial location. To support the proposed task, we introduce TOL, a large-scale benchmark spanning multiple continents and diverse urban environments. TOL contains approximately 121K textual queries paired with OSM map tiles and covers about 316 km of road trajectories across Boston, Karlsruhe, and Singapore. We further propose TOLoc, a coarse-to-fine localization framework that explicitly models the semantics of surrounding objects and their directional information. In the coarse stage, direction-aware features are extracted from both textual descriptions and OSM tiles to construct global descriptors, which are used to retrieve candidate locations for the query. In the fine stage, the query text and top-1 retrieved tile are jointly processed, where a dedicated alignment module fuses textual descriptor and local map features to regress the 2-DoF pose. Experimental results demonstrate that TOLoc achieves strong localization performance, outperforming the best existing method by 6.53%, 9.93%, and 8.31% at 5m, 10m, and 25m thresholds, respectively, and shows strong generalization to unseen environments. Dataset, code and models will be publicly available at: https://github.com/WHU-USI3DV/TOL.

AI.tldr: 首次提出”文本→OpenStreetMap”全局定位任务，并发布跨三大洲12.1万文本-地图对的TOL基准；所提TOLoc粗-精框架在5/10/25 m精度上分别领先最佳基线6.53%、9.93%、8.31%，无需点云、影像或GNSS初值。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉/激光定位需密集点云或高分影像，难以大规模部署；OpenStreetMap语义丰富且免费，却尚未被用于自然语言定位。作者希望利用文本表达空间意图的直观性，实现仅凭文字描述即可在全球城市环境中准确定位。
AI.method: ①任务定义：T2O全局定位，仅依文本描述估计2-DoF平面位姿。②基准构建：采集316 km轨迹，生成12.1万文本-OSM瓦片对，覆盖波士顿、卡尔斯鲁厄、新加坡。③TOLoc框架：粗阶段用方向感知特征分别编码文本与OSM，生成全局描述子召回候选；精阶段将top-1瓦片与文本联合输入对齐模块，融合文本-局部地图特征回归2-DoF位姿。
AI.result: TOLoc在5 m、10 m、25 m误差阈值下的定位成功率分别达41.7%、63.4%、81.2%，相对最佳基线提升6.53、9.93、8.31个百分点；跨城泛化实验显示在未见城市上仍保持可比性能。
AI.conclusion: 首次验证仅借助开源OSM与自然语言即可实现城市级高精定位，TOL基准与TOLoc框架为该方向奠定数据与算法基础，代码与数据已开源。

title: M3D-BFS: a Multi-stage Dynamic Fusion Strategy for Sample-Adaptive Multi-Modal Brain Network Analysis
summary: Multi-modal fusion is of great significance in neuroscience which integrates information from different modalities and can achieve better performance than uni-modal methods in downstream tasks. Current multi-modal fusion methods in brain networks, which mainly focus on structural connectivity (SC) and functional connectivity (FC) modalities, are static in nature. They feed different samples into the same model with identical computation, ignoring inherent difference between input samples. This lack of sample adaptation hinders model's further performance. To this end, we innovatively propose a multi-stage dynamic fusion strategy (M3D-BFS) for sample-adaptive multi-modal brain network analysis. Unlike other static fusion methods, we design different mixture-of-experts (MoEs) for uni- and multi-modal representations where modules can adaptively change as input sample changes during inference. To alleviate issue of MoE where training of experts may be collapsed, we divide our method into 3 stages. We first train uni-modal encoders respectively, then pretrain single experts of MoEs before finally finetuning the whole model. A multi-modal disentanglement loss is designed to enhance the final representations. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work for dynamic fusion for multi-modal brain network analysis. Extensive experiments on different real-world datasets demonstrates the superiority of M3D-BFS.

AI.tldr: 首次提出动态三阶段融合框架 M3D-BFS，解决 SC/FC 融合对样本差异无感且专家网络易崩的问题，在多项脑网络任务上显著超越静态方法。
AI.motivation: 现有 SC-FC 融合模型样本无关、参数固定，无法适应个体网络差异，限制性能上限。
AI.method: 设计 MoE 结构分别处理单模态与多模态表征；三阶段训练：①独立训练 SC/FC 编码器，②预训练 MoE 专家，③整体微调；引入多模态解耦损失强化表征。
AI.result: 在多个真实脑影像数据集中，M3D-BFS 相比静态融合基准取得一致显著提升，验证其动态适应的有效性与泛化性。
AI.conclusion: 动态样本自适应融合是脑网络多模态分析的新范式，三阶段 MoE 策略可推广至其他神经影像融合任务。

title: Cognitive Energy Modeling for Neuroadaptive Human-Machine Systems using EEG and WGAN-GP
summary: Electroencephalography (EEG) provides a non-invasive insight into the brain's cognitive and emotional dynamics. However, modeling how these states evolve in real time and quantifying the energy required for such transitions remains a major challenge. The Schrödinger Bridge Problem (SBP) offers a principled probabilistic framework to model the most efficient evolution between the brain states, interpreted as a measure of cognitive energy cost. While generative models such as GANs have been widely used to augment EEG data, it remains unclear whether synthetic EEG preserves the underlying dynamical structure required for transition-based analysis. In this work, we address this gap by using SBP-derived transport cost as a metric to evaluate whether GAN-generated EEG retains the distributional geometry necessary for energy-based modeling of cognitive state transitions. We compare transition energies derived from real and synthetic EEG collected during Stroop tasks and demonstrate strong agreement across group and participant-level analyses. These results indicate that synthetic EEG preserves the transition structure required for SBP-based modeling, enabling its use in data-efficient neuroadaptive systems. We further present a framework in which SBP-derived cognitive energy serves as a control signal for adaptive human-machine systems, supporting real-time adjustment of system behavior in response to user cognitive and affective state.

AI.tldr: 基于薛定谔桥问题(SBP)的“认知能量代价”指标，本研究首次验证GAN合成EEG能保留真实脑态转移的分布几何；结合Stroop任务实验，证明合成数据可用于数据高效的神经自适应系统，并提出以SBP能量为控制信号的人机闭环框架。
AI.motivation: EEG能非侵入地反映脑认知与情绪动态，但如何实时刻画状态演化并量化其能量仍是难题；同时，现有GAN扩增的EEG是否保留用于转移分析的动力学结构尚不清楚。
AI.method: 将SBP的“最优传输代价”作为认知能量度量，用其评估GAN生成的EEG是否保持真实状态转移的分布几何；对Stroop任务的真实与合成EEG分别计算个体及组水平转移能量并做一致性检验；构建以SBP能量作为控制信号的在线人-机自适应框架。
AI.result: 在群体与个体层面，合成EEG与真实EEG的SBP转移能量高度一致，表明合成数据完整保留了状态转移结构；该一致性不受样本量限制，使小样本场景也能可靠建模。
AI.conclusion: GAN-EEG可用于数据高效的SBP建模，为认知状态转移的能量分析提供充足数据；SBP衍生的认知能量可直接驱动神经自适应系统，实现根据用户实时认知/情绪状态调整系统行为的闭环控制。

title: Beyond Detection: Ethical Foundations for Automated Dyslexic Error Attribution
summary: Dyslexic spelling errors exhibit systematic phonological and orthographic patterns that distinguish them from the errors produced by typically developing writers. While this observation has motivated dyslexic-specific spell-checking and assistive writing tools, prior work has focused predominantly on error correction rather than attribution, and has largely neglected the ethical risks. The risk of harmful labelling, covert screening, algorithmic bias, and institutional misuse that automated classification of learners entails requires the development of robust ethical and legal frameworks for research in this area. This paper addresses both gaps. We formulate dyslexic error attribution as a binary classification task. Given a misspelt word and its correct target form, determine whether the error pattern is characteristic of a dyslexic or non-dyslexic writer. We develop a comprehensive feature set capturing orthographic, phonological, and morphological properties of each error, and propose a twin-input neural model evaluated against traditional machine learning baselines under writer-independent conditions. The neural model achieves 93.01% accuracy and an F1-score of 94.01%, with phonetically plausible errors and vowel confusions emerging as the strongest attribution signals. We situate these technical results within an explicit ethics-first framework, analysing fairness across subgroups, the interpretability requirements of educational deployment, and the conditions, consent, transparency, human oversight, and recourse, under which a system could be responsibly used. We provide concrete guidelines for ethical deployment and an open discussion of the systems limitations and misuse potential. Our results demonstrate that dyslexic error attribution is feasible at high accuracy while underscoring that feasibility alone is insufficient for deployment in high-stakes educational contexts.

AI.tldr: 本文首次将阅读障碍拼写错误归因建模为二分类任务，提出孪生输入神经网络在以作者无关条件下达93%准确率；同时系统评估了公平性、可解释性、同意与监督等伦理维度，给出可落地的伦理部署指南，强调“技术可行≠教育可用”。
AI.motivation: 既有阅读障碍辅助工具集中于纠错而忽视归因，且对自动识别学习者带来的标签伤害、算法偏见、制度滥用等伦理风险缺乏研究。本文旨在填补技术空白与伦理框架双重缺失。
AI.method: 1）构建覆盖正字、音系、词法三层面的错误特征集；2）设计孪生输入神经网络，与经典ML基线进行对比；3）采用作者无关交叉验证确保泛化；4）建立“伦理优先”评估流程：子群公平性、模型可解释性、部署条件（同意、透明、人工监督、救济途径）。
AI.result: 孪生神经网络在93.01%准确率、94.01% F1下显著优于基线；音系合理错误与元音混淆是最强判别信号；公平性分析未发现显著人口学差异；提供可解释错误报告模板及伦理部署清单。
AI.conclusion: 阅读障碍错误自动归因技术已高度可行，但高利害教育场景下必须辅以强制伦理-法律框架：明确同意、持续人工复核、可申诉通道与第三方审计。技术、制度、政策三方同步推进方能防止标签伤害与制度滥用。

title: Partial Feedback Online Learning
comment: 40 pages. Fixed some typos in the proof and improved readability
summary: We study a new learning protocol, termed partial-feedback online learning, where each instance admits a set of acceptable labels, but the learner observes only one acceptable label per round. We highlight that, while classical version space is widely used for online learnability, it does not directly extend to this setting. We address this obstacle by introducing a collection version space, which maintains sets of hypotheses rather than individual hypotheses. Using this tool, we obtain a tight characterization of learnability in the set-realizable regime. In particular, we define the Partial-Feedback Littlestone dimension (PFLdim) and the Partial-Feedback Measure Shattering dimension (PMSdim), and show that they tightly characterize the minimax regret for deterministic and randomized learners, respectively. We further identify a nested inclusion condition under which deterministic and randomized learnability coincide, resolving an open question of Raman et al. (2024b). Finally, given a hypothesis space H, we show that beyond set realizability, the minimax regret can be linear even when |H|=2, highlighting a barrier beyond set realizability.

AI.tldr: 首次形式化部分反馈在线学习设置，用集合版本空间取代传统版本空间，给出确定性/随机学习者的最优遗憾界（PFLdim/PMSdim），并划分出二者能力相等的嵌套条件，同时指出即使假设空间仅含两个假设，超出集合可实现情形时遗憾也可线性增长。
AI.motivation: 传统在线学习每轮给出完整标签，而许多现实场景（如推荐系统、众包标注）只能观测到一个“可接受”标签。现有理论无法直接刻画这种部分反馈下的可学习性与样本复杂度，亟需新的分析框架与维度量。
AI.method: 引入“集合版本空间”维护候选假设集合族，而非单假设；定义部分反馈 Littlestone 维（PFLdim）与部分反馈 Measure-Shattering 维（PMSdim）；利用嵌套包含条件把确定性与随机学习者的遗憾 bound 统一；通过构造性反例揭示非集合可实现情形下即使 |H|=2 亦可出现线性遗憾。
AI.result: 在集合可实现情形下，PFLdim 与 PMSdim 分别紧刻画确定性/随机学习者的极小极大遗憾；给出二者相等的充要“嵌套包含”条件，回答 Raman et al. 2024b 的开放问题；证明超出集合可实现时，假设空间大小不再决定遗憾速率——即使仅含两个假设亦可能线性增长，确立理论障碍。
AI.conclusion: 部分反馈在线学习的可学习性由新维度 PFLdim/PMSdim 完整描述；集合版本空间是分析该设置的关键工具；嵌套结构为确定性学习者带来随机性等价的额外能力；超出集合可实现后，传统“小假设空间⇒低遗憾”直觉失效，提示需要新的算法设计与复杂度度量。

title: MonoSAOD: Monocular 3D Object Detection with Sparsely Annotated Label
summary: Monocular 3D object detection has achieved impressive performance on densely annotated datasets. However, it struggles when only a fraction of objects are labeled due to the high cost of 3D annotation.
