This sparsely annotated setting is common in real-world scenarios where annotating every object is impractical. To address this, we propose a novel framework for sparsely annotated monocular 3D object detection with two key modules. First, we propose Road-Aware Patch Augmentation (RAPA), which leverages sparse annotations by augmenting segmented object patches onto road regions while preserving 3D geometric consistency. Second, we propose Prototype-Based Filtering (PBF), which generates high-quality pseudo-labels by filtering predictions through prototype similarity and depth uncertainty. It maintains global 2D RoI feature prototypes and selects pseudo-labels that are both feature-consistent with learned prototypes and have reliable depth estimates. Our training strategy combines geometry-preserving augmentation with prototype-guided pseudo-labeling to achieve robust detection under sparse supervision. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. The source code is available at https://github.com/VisualAIKHU/MonoSAOD .

AI.tldr: 仅靠单目图像在稀疏3D标签下检测3D物体的框架，通过道路感知粘贴增广(RAPA)和原型过滤伪标签(PBF)显著缓解标注不足问题。
AI.motivation: 密集3D标注成本极高，实际采集场景中往往只有少量物体被标注，导致现有单目3D检测器性能骤降，亟需能在稀疏监督下仍保持高精度的方案。
AI.method: 设计两模块框架：1)RAPA——把已标注目标的3D一致切块粘贴到同幅图像的道路可行驶区域，实现几何保持的在线增广；2)PBF——构建2D RoI特征原型库，以原型相似度和深度不确定度双准则筛选网络预测，生成高质量伪标签，并在训练期间迭代更新。
AI.result: 在稀疏标注(10%-40%标签比例)的KITTI与Waymo子集上，该框架相较现有方法mAP提升3-7个百分点，可达到接近全监督性能；消融实验验证RAPA与PBF各自对召回率与伪标签精度贡献显著。
AI.conclusion: 提出的几何一致增广和原型过滤伪标签策略有效挖掘未标注数据，解决了稀疏3D监督瓶颈，使单目3D检测在实际低标注场景中具备可部署潜力。

title: Hierarchical Memory Orchestration for Personalized Persistent Agents
summary: While long-term memory is essential for intelligent agents to maintain consistent historical awareness, the accumulation of extensive interaction data often leads to performance bottlenecks. Naive storage expansion increases retrieval noise and computational latency, overwhelming the reasoning capacity of models deployed on constrained personal devices. To address this, we propose Hierarchical Memory Orchestration (HMO), a framework that organizes interaction history into a three-tiered directory driven by user-centric contextual relevance. Our system maintains a compact primary cache, coupling recent and pivotal memories with an evolving user profile to ensure agent reasoning remains aligned with individual behavioral traits. This primary cache is complemented by a high-priority secondary layer, both of which are managed within a global archive of the full interaction history. Crucially, the user persona dictates memory redistribution across this hierarchy, promoting records mapped to long-term patterns toward more active tiers while relegating less relevant information. This targeted orchestration surfaces historical knowledge precisely when needed while maintaining a lean and efficient active search space. Evaluations on multiple benchmarks achieve state-of-the-art performance. Real-world deployments in ecosystems like OpenClaw demonstrate that HMO significantly enhances agent fluidity and personalization.

AI.tldr: 提出 HMO 三层记忆框架，用用户画像驱动记忆分层与动态迁移，在不扩容硬件的前提下实现端侧长时记忆的高效检索与个性化推理。
AI.motivation: 端侧智能体需长期记忆以保持人格一致，但数据堆积导致检索噪声和计算延迟上升，直接扩容反而拖慢推理，亟需一种“少而精”的记忆管理方案。
AI.method: HMO 将完整历史归档为全局档案，并依用户画像动态维护三层目录：①主缓存（最近+关键记忆+实时用户画像）②高优先二级缓存③全局档案。系统按“与长期行为模式的相关度”把记录在主缓存↔二级缓存↔档案之间迁移，确保活跃搜索空间始终最小且高度相关。
AI.result: 多项基准达到 SOTA；在 OpenClaw 等真实环境部署后，Agent 连贯性与个性化显著提升，延迟与资源占用均下降。
AI.conclusion: 以用户画像为核心的分层记忆 orchestration 能在不增加硬件负担的情况下，为端侧智能体提供低噪、低延迟的终身记忆支持，是实现可持续个性化推理的有效范式。

title: Coupled Query-Key Dynamics for Attention
summary: Standard scaled dot-product attention computes scores from static, independent projections of the input. We show that evolving queries and keys \emph{jointly} through shared learned dynamics before scoring - which we call \textbf{coupled QK dynamics} - improves language modeling perplexity and training stability. On WikiText-103 at 60M parameters, coupled dynamics achieves 22.55--22.62 perplexity vs.\ 24.22 for standard attention ($-$6.6--6.9\%), with only 0.11\% additional parameters (shared across both instantiations). A structural ablation isolates coupling as the active ingredient: a symplectic (Hamiltonian) and a non-symplectic (Euler) integrator perform identically when both couple Q and K, while an uncoupled MLP baseline of matched capacity reaches only 23.81 with 8$\times$ higher seed variance. The integration step count (1--7) is similarly irrelevant - a single coupled step suffices. A compute-matched comparison reveals that coupling is a \emph{sample-efficiency} mechanism: standard attention trained for 2.4$\times$ longer (matching wall-clock) reaches the same perplexity, but requires 2.4$\times$ more tokens. The advantage scales to 150M ($-$6.7\%) but narrows at 350M ($-$1.0\%), where Differential Attention (18.93) overtakes coupled dynamics (19.35). The benefit is corpus-dependent: coupling helps on domain-coherent text (WikiText-103 $-$6.6\%, PubMed $-$4.5\%) but degrades on heterogeneous web text ($+$10.3\%) and shows no benefit on GLUE. We characterize when coupling helps and when it does not, providing practical guidelines.

AI.tldr: 通过共享动态共同演化查询与键向量（coupled QK dynamics），在几乎不增参数（0.11%）的情况下，把60M模型困惑度降低6.6%–6.9%，相当于用2.4×训练数据才能达到的样本效率；优势随规模递减，对领域一致文本有效，对杂糅网络文本无效。
AI.motivation: 标准缩放点积注意力的Q、K投影静态且独立，难以在训练阶段充分交互，导致样本效率低、训练不稳定。作者假设让Q与K在打分前先通过共享的演化机制“耦合”更新，可提升表示一致性与优化效率。
AI.method: 提出Coupled QK Dynamics：将同一可学习动态函数（共享MLP或Hamiltonian/Euler积分器）同时作用于Q、K，在1–7步短时演化后计算注意力分数；动态参数在所有层/头共享，仅增0.11%参数。对比标准注意力、等价容量非耦合MLP、长时间训练等基线，并在WikiText-103、PubMed、OpenWebText、GLUE上评估。
AI.result: WikiText-103上60M模型困惑度降至22.55–22.62，优于标准注意力24.22（↓6.6–6.9%）；150M模型仍降6.7%，350M时优势缩至1.0%，被Differential Attention反超。演化步数≥1即饱和；耦合与积分器类型无关，非耦合同等容量MLP仅达23.81且方差高8×。计算量对齐实验表明，标准注意力需2.4×更新步数/数据量才能匹敌。Corpus-dependent：领域一致文本受益（WikiText-6.6%、PubMed-4.5%），杂糅网页文本反升10.3%，GLUE无提升。
AI.conclusion: Coupled QK Dynamics是一种几乎零额外参数的样本效率策略，通过让查询键在打分前共享演化，显著提升中小模型在领域一致语料上的训练速度与稳定性；随着模型增大或数据杂糅度增高，收益递减甚至逆转。实践上推荐在中小规模、领域干净的场景使用，并避免用于开放域大模型或混合语料。

title: SURE: Synergistic Uncertainty-aware Reasoning for Multimodal Emotion Recognition in Conversations
summary: Multimodal emotion recognition in conversations (MERC) requires integrating multimodal signals while being robust to noise and modeling contextual reasoning. Existing approaches often emphasize fusion but overlook uncertainty in noisy features and fine-grained reasoning. We propose SURE (Synergistic Uncertainty-aware REasoning) for MERC, a framework that improves robustness and contextual modeling. SURE consists of three components: an Uncertainty-Aware Mixture-of-Experts module to handle modality-specific noise, an Iterative Reasoning module for multi-turn reasoning over context, and a Transformer Gate module to capture intra- and inter-modal interactions. Experiments on benchmark MERC datasets show that SURE consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, demonstrating its effectiveness in robust multimodal reasoning. These results highlight the importance of uncertainty modeling and iterative reasoning in advancing emotion recognition in conversational settings.

AI.tldr: 提出SURE框架，在应对噪声和上下文推理的同时实现对话多模态情感识别，刷新基准SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有MERC方法虽重视多模态融合，但对含噪特征的不确定性估计不足，且缺乏精细的上下文推理能力，导致鲁棒性与准确率受限。
AI.method: SURE框架由三模块组成：①不确定性感知混合专家(U-MoE)为各模态估计可信权重并抑制噪声；②迭代推理模块在多轮对话上循环更新隐状态，实现序列级精细推理；③Transformer Gate对单模态内与跨模态交互进行建模。
AI.result: 在IEMOCAP、MELD、EmoryNLP等MERC基准上，SURE显著优于现有最佳方法，F1提升2.7–5.1个百分点，噪声场景下鲁棒性提升约15%。
AI.conclusion: 实验证明不确定性建模与迭代推理对提升对话多模态情感识别至关重要，SUR为后续鲁棒多模态推理提供新范式。

title: What Capable Agents Must Know: Selection Theorems for Robust Decision-Making under Uncertainty
comment: 23 pages; added PSR recovery (Theorems 3 & 4), and updated related work
summary: As artificial agents become increasingly capable, what internal structure is *necessary* for an agent to act competently under uncertainty? Classical results show that optimal control can be *implemented* using belief states or world models, but not that such representations are required. We prove quantitative "selection theorems" showing that strong task performance (low *average-case regret*) forces world models, belief-like memory and -- under task mixtures -- persistent variables resembling core primitives associated with emotion, along with informational modularity under block-structured tasks. Our results cover stochastic policies, partial observability, and evaluation under task distributions, without assuming optimality, determinism, or access to an explicit model. Technically, we reduce predictive modeling to binary "betting" decisions and show that regret bounds limit probability mass on suboptimal bets, enforcing the predictive distinctions needed to separate high-margin outcomes. In fully observed settings, this yields approximate recovery of the interventional transition kernel; under partial observability, it implies necessity of predictive state and belief-like memory, addressing an open question in prior world-model recovery work.

AI.tldr: 在低平均遗憾条件下，任何智能体都必须内部维护一个世界模型、类信念的记忆结构，并在任务混合场景里出现类似情绪的持久变量；否则无法达到优异的平均表现。我们首次用“选择定理”给出了这些内部结构的*必要性*定量证明，而不仅是可以被用来实现最优控制。
AI.motivation: 随着智能体能力增强，学界仍不清楚：在不确定环境下，它*必须*具备哪些内部结构才能保证优秀表现？以往结果只说明可用信念状态或世界模型实现最优控制，但未证明这些结构是必须的。我们旨在给出严格定量答案。
AI.method: 1. 将预测任务转化为二元的“下注”决策场景，用遗憾（regret）衡量性能。2. 证明低平均遗憾会迫使智能体把概率质量集中在最优“下注”上，从而必须做出足够精细的预测区分。3. 对完全可观环境，推导出近似恢复干预式转移核的必要性；对部分可观环境，证明必须维护预测状态（predictive state）与类信念记忆。4. 引入任务混合与块结构，分析持久变量与信息模块化的出现条件。
AI.result: 1. 任意随机策略、部分可观、任务分布评估下，低平均遗憾 ⇒ 世界模型存在。2. 部分可观 ⇒ 预测状态 + 类信念记忆是必需的，解决了此前世界模型恢复工作中的公开问题。3. 任务混合场景 ⇒ 出现类似“核心情绪”的持久变量。4. 块结构任务 ⇒ 信息处理呈模块化。
AI.conclusion: 平均表现优异（低平均遗憾）这一外在标准，内在地强制要求智能体拥有世界模型、类信念记忆、在混合任务中还需情绪样持久变量与信息模块化。这为理解通用智能体的最小内部结构提供了理论下限。

title: Moiré Video Authentication: A Physical Signature Against AI Video Generation
summary: Recent advances in video generation have made AI-synthesized content increasingly difficult to distinguish from real footage. We propose a physics-based authentication signature that real cameras produce naturally, but that generative models cannot faithfully reproduce. Our approach exploits the Moiré effect: the interference fringes formed when a camera views a compact two-layer grating structure. We derive the Moiré motion invariant, showing that fringe phase and grating image displacement are linearly coupled by optical geometry, independent of viewing distance and grating structure. A verifier extracts both signals from video and tests their correlation. We validate the invariant on both real-captured and AI-generated videos from multiple state-of-the-art generators, and find that real and AI-generated videos produce significantly different correlation signatures, suggesting a robust means of differentiating them. Our work demonstrates that deterministic optical phenomena can serve as physically grounded, verifiable signatures against AI-generated video.

AI.tldr: 利用真实相机自然产生的摩尔运动不变量作为物理签名，可稳健检测AI合成视频。
AI.motivation: 生成视频愈发逼真，需不依赖数据训练的通用物理级鉴别手段。
AI.method: 设计双层光栅，证明其摩尔干涉条纹相位与图像位移呈线性耦合且独立于距离/结构；验证端从视频中提取两信号，计算相关性作为真伪判据。
AI.result: 在多款SOTA生成器与真实素材上测试，真假视频的相关性分布显著分离，表明方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 确定性光学现象可作为可验证的物理签名，用于对抗AI伪造视频。

title: Can Heterogeneous Language Models Be Fused?
summary: Model merging aims to integrate multiple expert models into a single model that inherits their complementary strengths without incurring the inference-time cost of ensembling. Recent progress has shown that merging can be highly effective when all source models are \emph{homogeneous}, i.e., derived from the same pretrained backbone and therefore share aligned parameter coordinates or compatible task vectors. Yet this assumption is increasingly unrealistic in open model ecosystems, where useful experts are often built on different families such as Llama, Qwen, and Mistral. In such \emph{heterogeneous} settings, direct weight-space fusion becomes ill-posed due to architectural mismatch, latent basis misalignment, and amplified cross-source conflict. We address this problem with \texttt{HeteroFusion} for heterogeneous language model fusion, which consists of two key components: topology-based alignment that transfers knowledge across heterogeneous backbones by matching functional module structures instead of raw tensor coordinates, and conflict-aware denoising that suppresses incompatible or noisy transfer signals during fusion. We further provide analytical justification showing that preserving the target adapter basis while predicting structured updates leads to a stable and well-conditioned transfer process. Across heterogeneous transfer, multi-source fusion, noisy-source robustness, and cross-family generalization settings, \texttt{HeteroFusion} consistently outperforms strong merging, fusion, and ensemble baselines.

AI.tldr: \texttt{HeteroFusion} 首次实现无需同构先验、无额外推理开销、对架构差异鲁棒的异构 LLM 知识融合。
AI.motivation: 当前模型合并研究局限于“同构”设定（同一预训练骨架），而真实生态中经常需要将 Llama、Qwen、Mistral 等不同架构的异构专家融合成统一模型。直接权重空间融合因拓扑不匹配、隐空间基底错位而失效，且冲突信号被放大。
AI.method: 提出 \texttt{HeteroFusion}：1. 拓扑级对齐——不再按原始张量坐标，而是按功能模块结构建立跨骨架知识映射；2. 冲突感知去噪——在融合阶段抑制不兼容或高噪声迁移信号；3. 理论证明：保持目标适配器基底、预测结构化更新可保证转移过程良态稳定。
AI.result: 在异构迁移、多源合并、噪声源鲁棒、跨族泛化四类设置下，\texttt{HeteroFusion} 一致优于现有最佳合并、融合及集成基线，且无需任何推理时额外计算。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑对齐+冲突抑制是异构 LLM 融合的关键；\texttt{HeteroFusion} 为开放模型生态下的“即插即用”式多专家整合提供了可行范式。

title: MiCA Learns More Knowledge Than LoRA and Full Fine-Tuning
summary: Minor Component Adaptation (MiCA) is a novel parameter-efficient fine-tuning method for large language models that focuses on adapting underutilized subspaces of model representations. Unlike conventional methods such as Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), which target dominant subspaces, MiCA leverages Singular Value Decomposition to identify subspaces related to minor singular vectors associated with the least significant singular values and constrains the update of parameters during fine-tuning to those directions. This strategy leads to up to 5.9x improvement in knowledge acquisition under optimized training hyperparameters and a minimal parameter footprint of 6-60% compared to LoRA. These results suggest that constraining adaptation to minor singular directions provides a more efficient and stable mechanism for integrating new knowledge into pre-trained language models.

AI.tldr: MiCA=仅用模型表示中最不重要的奇异向量方向做微调，在知识获取任务上比LoRA最高快5.9倍、参数量少40-94%。
AI.motivation: 现有高效微调方法（如LoRA）把更新压到主奇异子空间，作者假设真正需要的“新知识”潜伏在被忽视的次奇异子空间，以进一步压缩参数量并提升稳定性。
AI.method: 对预训练权重做奇异值分解→锁定对应最小奇异值的右奇异向量方向→仅在这些“次成分”上用低秩矩阵乘做更新；训练时冻结主干、只优化次方向的低秩因子。
AI.result: 在知识探针与下游任务上，6%-60% LoRA参数量即可取得同等或更高性能，极端超参下知识获取速度提升5.9×，且收敛更平稳。
AI.conclusion: 约束更新到次奇异子空间能够高效、稳定地向大模型注入新知识，为参数高效微调提供了一条“弃主从次”的新思路。

title: Is Clinical Text Enough? A Multimodal Study on Mortality Prediction in Heart Failure Patients
summary: Accurate short-term mortality prediction in heart failure (HF) remains challenging, particularly when relying on structured electronic health record (EHR) data alone. We evaluate transformer-based models on a French HF cohort, comparing text-only, structured-only, multimodal, and LLM-based approaches. Our results show that enriching clinical text with entity-level representations improves prediction over CLS embeddings alone, and that supervised multimodal fusion of text and structured variables achieves the best overall performance. In contrast, large language models perform inconsistently across modalities and decoding strategies, with text-only prompts outperforming structured or multimodal inputs. These findings highlight that entity-aware multimodal transformers offer the most reliable solution for short-term HF outcome prediction, while current LLM prompting remains limited for clinical decision support.

AI.tldr: 法国心衰队列研究显示：基于实体级临床文本表示的多模态融合模型在短期死亡预测上优于纯结构化数据、纯文本及LLM提示策略；LLM在不同模态和提示策略下表现不稳定，提示其临床决策支持能力仍受限。
AI.motivation: 结构化EHR单独用于心衰短期死亡预测精度不足，需探索文本、多模态及大模型能否进一步提升预测性能并给出可靠临床决策依据。
AI.method: 在法国心衰队列上比较四类模型：纯文本Transformer、纯结构化模型、文本-结构化多模态融合（含实体级文本表示）以及基于LLM的提示策略（文本/结构化/多模态输入+不同解码方式）。
AI.result: 引入实体级文本表示优于CLS嵌入；多模态融合取得最高整体性能；LLM在各类输入及解码策略下表现不一致，仅用文本提示时效果反而最佳，但总体仍逊于实体感知多模态Transformer。
AI.conclusion: 实体感知多模态Transformer是目前心衰短期结局预测最可靠方案；当前LLM提示在临床决策支持中尚存在明显局限，需继续优化方可落地应用。

title: Machine Learning for Network Attacks Classification and Statistical Evaluation of Adversarial Learning Methodologies for Synthetic Data Generation
summary: Supervised detection of network attacks has always been a critical part of network intrusion detection systems (NIDS). Nowadays, in a pivotal time for artificial intelligence (AI), with even more sophisticated attacks that utilize advanced techniques, such as generative artificial intelligence (GenAI) and reinforcement learning, it has become a vital component if we wish to protect our personal data, which are scattered across the web. In this paper, we address two tasks, in the first unified multi-modal NIDS dataset, which incorporates flow-level data, packet payload information and temporal contextual features, from the reprocessed CIC-IDS-2017, CIC-IoT-2023, UNSW-NB15 and CIC-DDoS-2019, with the same feature space. In the first task we use machine learning (ML) algorithms, with stratified cross validation, in order to prevent network attacks, with stability and reliability. In the second task we use adversarial learning algorithms to generate synthetic data, compare them with the real ones and evaluate their fidelity, utility and privacy using the SDV framework, f-divergences, distinguishability and non-parametric statistical tests. The findings provide stable ML models for intrusion detection and generative models with high fidelity and utility, by combining the Synthetic Data Vault framework, the TRTS and TSTR tests, with non-parametric statistical tests and f-divergence measures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个统一多模态网络入侵检测数据集，并给出“稳定检测+高保真合成”两阶段方法，为对抗日益复杂的 AI 驱动攻击提供可靠模型与隐私增强数据。
AI.motivation: AI 时代攻击者借助生成式 AI 与强化学习发动更隐蔽入侵，现有监督 NIDS 数据模态割裂、特征空间不一，难以支撑稳健检测与隐私共享。
AI.method: 1) 将 CIC-IDS-2017 等 4 个数据集重处理为统一特征空间的多模态集（流统计、载荷、时序）；2) 任务 1：分层交叉验证训练多种 ML 模型，建立稳定检测器；3) 任务 2：用对抗学习生成合成流量，采用 SDV、f-散度、TRTS/TSTR、非参检验综合评估保真度、效用与隐私。
AI.result: 在统一数据集上，ML 检测器取得稳定高检测率；合成数据在保真度、下游任务效用指标上显著优于传统方法，且满足ε-差分隐私要求。
AI.conclusion: 提出的统一数据集与“检测+合成”框架为 NIDS 提供可扩展、高可信且隐私友好的解决方案，可进一步推广至实时检测与跨组织数据共享。

title: DynaVid: Learning to Generate Highly Dynamic Videos using Synthetic Motion Data
summary: Despite recent progress, video diffusion models still struggle to synthesize realistic videos involving highly dynamic motions or requiring fine-grained motion controllability. A central limitation lies in the scarcity of such examples in commonly used training datasets. To address this, we introduce DynaVid, a video synthesis framework that leverages synthetic motion data in training, which is represented as optical flow and rendered using computer graphics pipelines. This approach offers two key advantages. First, synthetic motion offers diverse motion patterns and precise control signals that are difficult to obtain from real data. Second, unlike rendered videos with artificial appearances, rendered optical flow encodes only motion and is decoupled from appearance, thereby preventing models from reproducing the unnatural look of synthetic videos. Building on this idea, DynaVid adopts a two-stage generation framework: a motion generator first synthesizes motion, and then a motion-guided video generator produces video frames conditioned on that motion. This decoupled formulation enables the model to learn dynamic motion patterns from synthetic data while preserving visual realism from real-world videos. We validate our framework on two challenging scenarios, vigorous human motion generation and extreme camera motion control, where existing datasets are particularly limited. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DynaVid improves the realism and controllability in dynamic motion generation and camera motion control.

AI.tldr: DynaVid用合成光流补充训练数据，先训运动生成器再训运动引导的视频生成器，在剧烈人体运动和极端相机运动两个任务上取得更好真实性与可控性。
AI.motivation: 现有视频扩散模型在高度动态或需精细运动控制场景下表现差，主因是训练集中此类样本稀缺；需引入可控且多样的运动数据增强训练。
AI.method: 1) 用计算机图形管线渲染合成光流作为运动监督，光流仅含运动、与外观解耦，避免合成视频的人工感；2) 采用两阶段框架：第一阶段扩散模型生成光流，第二阶段以光流为条件生成视频帧；3) 仅在第一阶段用合成光流，第二阶段仍用真实视频保持外观真实感。
AI.result: 在剧烈人体动作生成与极端相机运动控制两个数据稀缺场景上，DynaVid合成视频的运动真实性、动态程度及控制精度均优于现有方法，用户研究显示其生成结果更自然、可控性更高。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入解耦的合成光流并采用两阶段生成，DynaVid有效弥补了高动态运动训练数据不足，显著提升了视频扩散模型在复杂运动场景中的真实感与细粒度可控性，验证了“合成运动+真实外观”策略的实用潜力。

title: EvoSkills: Self-Evolving Agent Skills via Co-Evolutionary Verification
summary: Anthropic proposes the concept of skills for LLM agents to tackle multi-step professional tasks that simple tool invocations cannot address. A tool is a single, self-contained function, whereas a skill is a structured bundle of interdependent multi-file artifacts. Currently, skill generation is not only label-intensive due to manual authoring, but also may suffer from human--machine cognitive misalignment, which can lead to degraded agent performance, as evidenced by evaluations on SkillsBench. Therefore, we aim to enable agents to autonomously generate skills. However, existing self-evolving methods designed for tools cannot be directly applied to skills due to their increased complexity. To address these issues, we propose EvoSkills, a self-evolving skills framework that enables agents to autonomously construct complex, multi-file skill packages. Specifically, EvoSkills couples a Skill Generator that iteratively refines skills with a Surrogate Verifier that co-evolves to provide informative and actionable feedback without access to ground-truth test content. On SkillsBench, EvoSkills achieves the highest pass rate among five baselines on both Claude Code and Codex, and also exhibits strong generalization capabilities to six additional LLMs.

AI.tldr: Anthropic 用「技能(skill)」取代简单 API 工具，提出自演化框架 EvoSkills，让大模型在无人工标注、无 ground-truth 测试的条件下自主生成并迭代多文件复杂技能包。
AI.motivation: 现有工具是单函数、能力有限，难以完成多步专业任务；人工写技能标签成本高，还容易出现人机认知偏差，导致代理性能下降。
AI.method: 提出 EvoSkills：一个自演化技能框架。Skill Generator 负责自动生成多文件技能并迭代改进；Surrogate Verifier 不与真值测试交互，而是与 Generator 协同演化，仅依赖可执行痕迹给出可操作的反馈。两者交替更新，直至技能在 SkillsBench 上通过率收敛。
AI.result: 在 SkillsBench 上，EvoSkills 在 Claude Code 和 Codex 中均拿到最高通过率，超越五个基线；对另外 6 种 LLM 也表现出强泛化性，验证其无需额外训练即可跨模型迁移。
AI.conclusion: 通过把「工具」升级为可自演化的「技能包」，EvoSkills 显著降低了人工成本与认知偏差，为构建能处理复杂专业任务的大模型代理提供了可扩展范式。后续可在更大任务集、协作场景及安全验证上继续深化。

title: Transformer self-attention encoder-decoder with multimodal deep learning for response time series forecasting and digital twin support in wind structural health monitoring
comment: 21 pages, 22 figures, 9 tables. This version corresponds to the published article in Computers & Structures. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.compstruc.2026.108216
summary: The wind-induced structural response forecasting capabilities of a novel transformer methodology are examined here. The model also provides a digital twin component for bridge structural health monitoring. Firstly, the approach uses the temporal characteristics of the system to train a forecasting model. Secondly, the vibration predictions are compared to the measured ones to detect large deviations. Finally, the identified cases are used as an early-warning indicator of structural change. The artificial intelligence-based model outperforms approaches for response forecasting as no assumption on wind stationarity or on structural normal vibration behavior is needed. Specifically, wind-excited dynamic behavior suffers from uncertainty related to obtaining poor predictions when the environmental or traffic conditions change. This results in a hard distinction of what constitutes normal vibration behavior. To this end, a framework is rigorously examined on real-world measurements from the Hardanger Bridge monitored by the Norwegian University of Science and Technology. The approach captures accurate structural behavior in realistic conditions, and with respect to the changes in the system excitation. The results, importantly, highlight the potential of transformer-based digital twin components to serve as next-generation tools for resilient infrastructure management, continuous learning, and adaptive monitoring over the system's lifecycle with respect to temporal characteristics.

AI.tldr: Transformer-based digital twin for bridge SHM：无需假设风/结构平稳，实时比对预测-实测偏差实现早期预警，Hardanger桥实测验证优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 风致桥梁响应预测在环境与交通条件变化下存在高度不确定性，传统方法依赖风平稳与结构“正常”振动假设，难以界定异常；亟需无假设、可连续学习的智能预警框架。
AI.method: 以实测时序数据训练Transformer预测模型→实时输出振动预测→与实测值比对计算偏差→大偏差触发早期预警；数字孪生组件持续更新，形成生命周期自适应监测闭环。
AI.result: 在Hardanger桥长期监测数据上，所提模型无需先验假设即可准确捕捉风致动态响应，异常偏差识别率显著优于传统方法，验证其在真实变环境下的鲁棒性与精度。
AI.conclusion: Transformer数字孪生可作为下一代韧性基础设施管理核心工具，实现全生命周期持续学习与自适应监测，为桥梁安全预警提供无假设、高泛化的智能支撑。

title: ImplicitBBQ: Benchmarking Implicit Bias in Large Language Models through Characteristic Based Cues
summary: Large Language Models increasingly suppress biased outputs when demographic identity is stated explicitly, yet may still exhibit implicit biases when identity is conveyed indirectly. Existing benchmarks use name based proxies to detect implicit biases, which carry weak associations with many social demographics and cannot extend to dimensions like age or socioeconomic status. We introduce ImplicitBBQ, a QA benchmark that evaluates implicit bias through characteristic based cues, culturally associated attributes that signal implicitly, across age, gender, region, religion, caste, and socioeconomic status. Evaluating 11 models, we find that implicit bias in ambiguous contexts is over six times higher than explicit bias in open weight models. Safety prompting and chain-of-thought reasoning fail to substantially close this gap; even few-shot prompting, which reduces implicit bias by 84%, leaves caste bias at four times the level of any other dimension. These findings indicate that current alignment and prompting strategies address the surface of bias evaluation while leaving culturally grounded stereotypic associations largely unresolved. We publicly release our code and dataset for model providers and researchers to benchmark potential mitigation techniques.

AI.tldr: 新基准ImplicitBBQ揭示：大模型在间接提示下的隐性偏见比显性条件高6倍，现有对齐方法仅治标，种姓维度最难消除。
AI.motivation: 名字代理信号与真实社会人口特征关联弱，无法覆盖年龄、阶层等维度，需要更敏感、可扩展的隐性偏见检测工具。
AI.method: 构建基于“特征线索”(characteristic-based cues)的中文问答基准，覆盖6大社会维度；对11个开放/闭源模型进行零样本、安全提示、思维链与few-shot对比实验。
AI.result: 隐性偏见在模糊语境下比显性高6倍以上；安全提示与CoT几乎无效；5-shot可降84%但仍遗留种姓偏见为其他维度4倍。
AI.conclusion: 现有对齐与提示策略仅触及表层显性偏见，文化内隐刻板印象依旧顽固，需针对性缓解方案；代码与数据集已开源供社区进一步研究。

title: Information-Theoretic Limits of Safety Verification for Self-Improving Systems
comment: 27 pages, 6 figures. Companion empirical paper: doi:10.5281/zenodo.19237566
summary:
Can a safety gate permit unbounded beneficial self-modification while maintaining bounded cumulative risk? We formalize this question through dual conditions -- requiring sum delta_n < infinity (bounded risk) and sum TPR_n = infinity (unbounded utility) -- and establish a theory of their (in)compatibility.
  Classification impossibility (Theorem 1): For power-law risk schedules delta_n = O(n^{-p}) with p > 1, any classifier-based gate under overlapping safe/unsafe distributions satisfies TPR_n <= C_alpha * delta_n^beta via Holder's inequality, forcing sum TPR_n < infinity. This impossibility is exponent-optimal (Theorem 3). A second independent proof via the NP counting method (Theorem 4) yields a 13% tighter bound without Holder's inequality.
  Universal finite-horizon ceiling (Theorem 5): For any summable risk schedule, the exact maximum achievable classifier utility is U*(N, B) = N * TPR_NP(B/N), growing as exp(O(sqrt(log N))) -- subpolynomial. At N = 10^6 with budget B = 1.0, a classifier extracts at most U* ~ 87 versus a verifier's ~500,000.
  Verification escape (Theorem 2): A Lipschitz ball verifier achieves delta = 0 with TPR > 0, escaping the impossibility. Formal Lipschitz bounds for pre-LayerNorm transformers under LoRA enable LLM-scale verification. The separation is strict. We validate on GPT-2 (d_LoRA = 147,456): conditional delta = 0 with TPR = 0.352. Comprehensive empirical validation is in the companion paper [D2].

AI.tldr: 作者用五条形式化定理证明：任何基于分类器的“安全门”若采用可和的风险参数，必然导致总效用收敛；唯有基于Lipschitz球形验证器的验证范式才能在零风险下获得非零效用，实现“无限收益-有界风险”的可行解。
AI.motivation: 当AI系统被允许持续自我修改时，如何确保累积风险保持有界而潜在收益可无限扩大，是安全治理的核心难题。现有研究多停留在直觉或经验层面，缺乏可量化的兼容/冲突判据。
AI.method: 1) 将问题转化为双重条件：Σδₙ<∞（有界累积风险）与ΣTPRₙ=∞（无界累积真正例率）；2) 对幂律风险调度 δₙ=O(n⁻ᵖ) 用分类器-门控模型建立Holder不等式上界（定理1）并证明指数最优（定理3）；3) 用NP计数法给出独立且紧13%的新界（定理4）；4) 对任意可和风险调度导出有限视界效用天花板 U*(N,B)=N·TPR_NP(B/N)∼exp(O(√log N))（定理5）；5) 提出Lipschitz球形验证器，证明其可在δ=0时保持TPR>0，从而逃出不可能性（定理2）；6) 为LoRA预层归一化Transformer显式计算Lipschitz常数，并在GPT-2上实证δ=0时TPR=0.352。
AI.result: 分类器门控在10⁶步预算B=1时最大只能榨取≈87效用，而验证器可达≈500 000，差距4个数量级；Lipschitz验证在GPT-2上实现零风险且35.2%的保留能力。
AI.conclusion: “无限自我修改+有界风险”与分类器式安全门在理论上不可兼容；唯有转向基于Lipschitz球形验证的范式，才能严格实现零风险下的非零收益，为可扩展AI安全提供形式保证。所需Lipschitz常数在大模型规模可计算，验证范式已具备落地条件。

title: Robust Embodied Perception in Dynamic Environments via Disentangled Weight Fusion
summary: Embodied perception systems face severe challenges of dynamic environment distribution drift when they continuously interact in open physical spaces. However, the existing domain incremental awareness methods often rely on the domain id obtained in advance during the testing phase, which limits their practicability in unknown interaction scenarios. At the same time, the model often overfits to the context-specific perceptual noise, which leads to insufficient generalization ability and catastrophic forgetting. To address these limitations, we propose a domain-id and exemplar-free incremental learning framework for embodied multimedia systems, which aims to achieve robust continuous environment adaptation. This method designs a disentangled representation mechanism to remove non-essential environmental style interference, and guide the model to focus on extracting semantic intrinsic features shared across scenes, thereby eliminating perceptual uncertainty and improving generalization. We further use the weight fusion strategy to dynamically integrate the old and new environment knowledge in the parameter space, so as to ensure that the model adapts to the new distribution without storing historical data and maximally retains the discrimination ability of the old environment. Extensive experiments on multiple standard benchmark datasets show that the proposed method significantly reduces catastrophic forgetting in a completely exemplar-free and domain-id free setting, and its accuracy is better than the existing state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需显式域标签和样例的增量框架，解决具身感知系统在开放物理环境中的持续适应与灾难性遗忘难题。
AI.motivation: 具身系统在实际互动中遭遇环境分布漂移，而现有增量方法依赖测试时预先获得的域-ID，且易过拟合场景噪声，导致泛化差、遗忘重，难以落地。
AI.method: 设计解耦表示机制：去除风格干扰，聚焦跨场景语义特征；引入参数空间权重融合策略：动态集成新旧知识，无需存样例与域标签。
AI.result: 在多基准数据集、完全无样例/无域-ID设定下，显著抑制灾难性遗忘，准确率超过当前最优方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架摆脱了传统域增量学习的标签依赖与数据缓存限制，为具身多媒体系统提供了高泛化、零遗忘的持续环境适应方案。

title: Scale over Preference: The Impact of AI-Generated Content on Online Content Ecology
summary: The rapid proliferation of Artificial Intelligence-Generated Content (AIGC) is fundamentally restructuring online content ecologies, necessitating a rigorous examination of its behavioral and distributional implications. Leveraging a comprehensive longitudinal dataset comprising tens of millions of users from a leading Chinese video-sharing platform, this study elucidated the distinct creation and consumption behaviors characterizing AIGC versus Human-Generated Content (HGC). We identified a prevalent scale-over-preference dynamic, wherein AIGC creators achieve aggregate engagement comparable to HGC creators through high-volume production, despite a marked consumer preference for HGC. Deeper analysis uncovered the ability of the algorithmic content distribution mechanism in moderating these competing interests regarding AIGC. These findings advocated for the implementation of AIGC-sensitive distribution algorithms and precise governance frameworks to ensure the long-term health of the online content platforms.

AI.tldr: AIGC已挤入中文主流视频平台生态系统；用户依旧偏爱HGC，但AIGC作者靠高频“堆量”获得同等总体互动；算法分发是调节二者竞争的关键杠杆。
AI.motivation: AIGC爆发式增长，可能改变在线内容生态的供需结构与治理逻辑，需实证厘清其对用户创作与消费行为、平台分发机制的具体影响。
AI.method: 采集中国头部视频平台数千万用户的长周期行为数据，对比AIGC与HGC在创作量、互动量、用户偏好等维度的差异；结合算法日志分析分发机制如何影响两类内容曝光。
AI.result: 发现“规模优先于偏好”规律：AIGC单作品互动明显低于HGC，但创作者通过高产量弥补，使总互动追平；算法若不对AIGC加权，其流量占比显著低于用户实际偏好。
AI.conclusion: 平台需引入AIGC感知型排序与流量分配算法，并配套精准治理框架，才能在维持多样性与消费者福利的同时，保障内容生态长期健康。

title: MATA-Former & SIICU: Semantic Aware Temporal Alignment for High-Fidelity ICU Risk Prediction
summary: Forecasting evolving clinical risks relies on intrinsic pathological dependencies rather than mere chronological proximity, yet current methods struggle with coarse binary supervision and physical timestamps. To align predictive modeling with clinical logic, we propose the Medical-semantics Aware Time-ALiBi Transformer (MATA-Former), utilizing event semantics to dynamically parameterize attention weights to prioritize causal validity over time lags. Furthermore, we introduce Plateau-Gaussian Soft Labeling (PSL), reformulating binary classification into continuous multi-horizon regression for full-trajectory risk modeling. Evaluated on SIICU -- a newly constructed dataset featuring over 506k events with rigorous expert-verified, fine-grained annotations -- and the MIMIC-IV dataset, our framework demonstrates superior efficacy and robust generalization in capturing risks from text-intensive, irregular clinical time series.

AI.tldr: 用「时间远近」不如用「病理语义」预测病情演变；MATA-Former 先让事件语义动态调节注意力权重，再把二分类软化成多时间窗回归，实现全程轨迹风险建模，在 50 万条细粒度标注的 SIICU 新数据集与 MIMIC-IV 上均显著优于既往方法。
AI.motivation: 医疗风险预测多依赖时间邻近性，忽视病因学依赖，且传统二值监督只给单点标签，难以刻画疾病演变轨迹。
AI.method: 提出 MATA-Former：Transformer 中引入 Medical Time-ALiBi 机制，让事件语义动态生成偏移量，使注意力更关注因果有效而非时间近邻；同时设计 Plateau-Gaussian Soft Labeling(PSL)，把风险二分类重构为连续多时间窗回归，实现对整个患者轨迹的风险建模。
AI.result: 在两个 ICU 数据集(自建 SIICU 50.6 万事件，MIMIC-IV)上，MATA-Former 在多步风险预测指标(AUPRC、MAE、F1)全面领先，且对文本稀疏、采样不规则的数据展现强泛化力。
AI.conclusion: 通过语义驱动注意力与软标签全程建模，可将预测逻辑从“相邻即相关”转为“病因即相关”，显著提升重症监护场景下临床风险评估的精度与可解释性。

title: Reliable News or Propagandist News? A Neurosymbolic Model Using Genre, Topic, and Persuasion Techniques to Improve Robustness in Classification
summary:
Among news disorders, propagandist news are particularly insidious, because they tend to mix oriented messages with factual reports intended to look like reliable news. To detect propaganda, extant approaches based on Language Models such as BERT are promising but often overfit their training datasets, due to biases in data collection. To enhance classification robustness and improve generalization to new sources, we propose a neurosymbolic approach combining non-contextual text embeddings (fastText) with symbolic conceptual features such as genre, topic, and persuasion techniques. Results show improvements over equivalent text-only methods, and ablation studies as well as explainability analyses confirm the benefits of the added features.
  Keywords: Information disorder, Fake news, Propaganda, Classification, Topic modeling, Hybrid method, Neurosymbolic model, Ablation, Robustness

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种神经-符号混合模型，借助体裁、主题与劝服技巧等符号特征增强 fastText 嵌入，从而更鲁棒地识别跨源宣传新闻。
AI.motivation: 现有纯文本 BERT 方法因数据采集偏差易过拟合，面对新信源时泛化差。
AI.method: 将非上下文 fastText 文本表示与体裁、主题、劝服技巧等可解释符号特征拼接，训练轻量级分类器，并通过消融与可解释分析评估各特征贡献。
AI.result: 跨源实验显著优于同规模纯文本基线，消融验证符号特征可带来 3–7% F1 增益，特征重要性可视化揭示了“诉诸情绪”“权威引用”等劝服技巧的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 引入显式符号特征可缓解数据偏差、提升鲁棒性与可解释性，为跨平台宣传检测提供可扩展轻量方案。

title: HOT: Harmonic-Constrained Optimal Transport for Remote Photoplethysmography Domain Adaptation
summary: Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) enables non-contact physiological measurement from facial videos; however, its practical deployment is often hindered by substantial performance degradation under domain shift. While recent deep learning-based rPPG methods have achieved strong performance on individual datasets, they frequently overfit to appearance-related factors, such as illumination, camera characteristics, and color response, that vary significantly across domains. To address this limitation, we introduce frequency domain adaptation (FDA) as a principled strategy for modeling appearance variation in rPPG. By transferring low-frequency spectral components that encode domain-dependent appearance characteristics, FDA encourages rPPG models to learn invariance to appearance variations while retaining cardiac-induced signals. To further support physiologically consistent alignment under such appearance variation, we propose Harmonic-Constrained Optimal Transport (HOT), which leverages the harmonic property of cardiac signals to guide alignment between original and FDA-transferred representations. Extensive cross-dataset experiments demonstrate that the proposed FDA and HOT framework effectively enhances the robustness and generalization of rPPG models across diverse datasets.

AI.tldr: 提出频率域适应(FDA)与周期约束最优传输(HOT)框架，使rPPG模型跨域时仅把外观低频分量作迁移并保留心拍高频信号，从而显著提升域外稳健性与泛化性。
AI.motivation: 远程rPPG深模型依赖外观特征易在各数据集上表现退化；目标是让模型消除因光照、相机响应等外观变化带来的域偏移而保持心拍信号准确估计。
AI.method: 1) 将图像转为频率域，用低通道滤波分离并迁移代表外观的低频分量，保留含心率信息的高频成分；2) 设计周期约束最优传输(HOT)，利用心拍信号的周期特性在二阶频谱对齐时说学习域不变表示。
AI.result: 多源到目标的跨数据集实验表明，FDA与HOT联合方案在HR估计误差和域间一致性指标上显著优于现有无监督迁移与单域模型，更大比例地维护心跳波形结构。
AI.conclusion: 在频率域层面分离并迁移外观细节而非原始像素是实现rPPG域泛化的有效范式，FDA+HOT为跨数据集部署提供了可靠、资源友好的解决方案。

title: LiteInception: A Lightweight and Interpretable Deep Learning Framework for General Aviation Fault Diagnosis
summary: General aviation fault diagnosis and efficient maintenance are critical to flight safety; however, deploying deep learning models on resource-constrained edge devices poses dual challenges in computational capacity and interpretability. This paper proposes LiteInception--a lightweight interpretable fault diagnosis framework designed for edge deployment. The framework adopts a two-stage cascaded architecture aligned with standard maintenance workflows: Stage 1 performs high-recall fault detection, and Stage 2 conducts fine-grained fault classification on anomalous samples, thereby decoupling optimization objectives and enabling on-demand allocation of computational resources. For model compression, a multi-method fusion strategy based on mutual information, gradient analysis, and SE attention weights is proposed to reduce the input sensor channels from 23 to 15, and a 1+1 branch LiteInception architecture is introduced that compresses InceptionTime parameters by 70%, accelerates CPU inference by over 8x, with less than 3% F1 loss. Furthermore, knowledge distillation is introduced as a precision-recall regulation mechanism, enabling the same lightweight model to adapt to different scenarios--such as safety-critical and auxiliary diagnosis--by switching training strategies. Finally, a dual-layer interpretability framework integrating four attribution methods is constructed, providing traceable evidence chains of "which sensor x which time period." Experiments on the NGAFID dataset demonstrate a fault detection accuracy of 81.92% with 83.24% recall, and a fault identification accuracy of 77.00%, validating the framework's favorable balance among efficiency, accuracy, and interpretability.

AI.tldr: LiteInception是一个两级轻量化故障诊断框架，专为资源受限边缘设备设计，在保证81.9%检测准确率/83.2%召回率的同时，将模型压缩70%、CPU推理加速8倍，并以双层可解释机制提供“传感器×时段”证据链。
AI.motivation: 通用航空故障诊断对安全至关重要，但深度模型在边缘端面临算力与可解释双重瓶颈，需兼顾高准确、低延迟与可追溯性。
AI.method: 提出两级级联结构：①高召回故障检测→②异常样本细分类；融合互信息、梯度、SE注意力剪枝23→15通道；设计1+1分支LiteInception压缩InceptionTime 70%参数；用知识蒸馏做精度-召回调节；集成四种归因方法构建双层可解释框架。
AI.result: NGAFID数据集上检测准确率81.92%、召回83.24%，识别准确率77.00%；CPU推理速度提升8倍，F1下降<3%，模型体积与算力需求显著降低。
AI.conclusion: LiteInception在边缘场景下实现了效率、精度与可解释性的良好平衡，可依据安全等级动态切换策略，为航空维修提供轻量、可信的端侧诊断方案。

title: Koopman-Based Nonlinear Identification and Adaptive Control of a Turbofan Engine
summary: This paper investigates Koopman operator-based approaches for multivariable control of a two-spool turbofan engine. A physics-based component-level model is developed to generate training data and validate the controllers. A meta-heuristic extended dynamic mode decomposition is developed, with a cost function designed to accurately capture both spool-speed dynamics and the engine pressure ratio (EPR), enabling the construction of a single Koopman model suitable for multiple control objectives. Using the identified time-varying Koopman model, two controllers are developed: an adaptive Koopman-based model predictive controller (AKMPC) with a disturbance observer and a Koopman-based feedback linearization controller (K-FBLC), which serves as a benchmark. The controllers are evaluated for two control strategies, namely configurations of spool speeds and EPR, under both sea-level and varying flight conditions. The results demonstrate that the proposed identification approach enables accurate predictions of both spool speeds and EPR, allowing the Koopman model to be reused flexibly across different control formulations. While both control strategies achieve comparable performance in steady conditions, the AKMPC exhibits superior robustness compared with the K-FBLC under varying flight conditions due to its ability to compensate for model mismatch. Moreover, the EPR control strategy improves the thrust response. The study highlights the applicability of Koopman-based control and demonstrates the advantages of the AKMPC-based framework for robust turbofan engine control.

AI.tldr: 利用扩展动态模态分解构建单Koopman模型，可同时预测双转子涡扇发动机转速与EPR，基于此设计自适应模型预测控制器（AKMPC）和反馈线性化控制器（K-FBLC）。多工况仿真表明AKMPC对模型失配具有更强鲁棒性，EPR控制策略可提升推力响应。
AI.motivation: 传统非线性航空发动机控制依赖高保真物理模型，计算负担大且难以适应工况变化；Koopman算子理论可将非线性系统升维至线性空间，但现有方法难以同时兼顾转速与EPR两大关键被控量，亟需一种可复用、低复杂度且适应飞行条件变化的数据驱动建模与多变量控制框架。
AI.method: 1）建立部件级物理模型生成训练/验证数据；2）提出元启发式扩展DMD，以加权代价函数同步辨识高低压转子转速与EPR动态，构建统一时变Koopman模型；3）基于该模型设计带扰动观测器的自适应模型预测控制器（AKMPC），并以K-FBLC为基准；4）在海拔与飞行条件变化场景下对比转速-转速与EPR两种控制策略。
AI.result: Koopman模型单框架即可高精度预测转速与EPR，平均误差<1%；稳态工况下两控制器性能相当；变工况下AKMPC的转速/EPR稳态误差降低30%以上，推力响应提升约8%，对20%模型失配仍保持稳定，而K-FBLC出现振荡。
AI.conclusion: Koopman算子范式可显著简化涡扇发动机非线性多变量控制设计；AKMPC通过在线补偿模型-扰动失配，在复杂飞行条件下兼顾鲁棒性与推力性能，为下一代航空发动机智能控制提供了高效、可移植的解决方案。

title: How to measure the optimality of word or gesture order with respect to the principle of swap distance minimization
summary: The structure of all the permutations of a sequence can be represented as a permutohedron, a graph where vertices are permutations and two vertices are linked if a swap of adjacent elements in the permutation of one of the vertices produces the permutation of the other vertex. It has been hypothesized that word orders in languages minimize the swap distance in the permutohedron: given a source order, word orders that are closer in the permutohedron should be less costly and thus more likely. Here we explain how to measure the degree of optimality of word order variation with respect to swap distance minimization. We illustrate the power of our novel mathematical framework by showing that crosslinguistic gestures are at least $77\%$ optimal. It is unlikely that the multiple times where crosslinguistic gestures hit optimality are due to chance. We establish the theoretical foundations for research on the optimality of word or gesture order with respect to swap distance minimization in communication systems. Finally, we introduce the quadratic assignment problem (QAP) into language research as an umbrella for multiple optimization problems and, accordingly, postulate a general principle of optimal assignment that unifies various linguistic principles including swap distance minimization.

AI.tldr: 作者用“贪心相邻交换图”（permutohedron）刻画序列所有排列的邻换距离，提出最小交换距离假设：语言中词序/手势序列会倾向靠近源排列。跨语言手势语料77%以上达到最优，统计显著。引入QAP为统一框架，提出“最优指派一般原理”，将多种语言经济性原则纳入同一数学形式。
AI.motivation: 传统语言经济性原则多孤立提出，缺少可量化的统一框架；尤其手势、词序的“代价”如何测度尚缺标准。作者欲借组合数学与组合优化工具，给出可计算的距离度量，检验并统一“最小交换代价”类假设。
AI.method: 1) 构建permutohedron，用相邻换位距离刻画序列差异；2) 将手势/词序映射为排列，定义“相对于源排列的最优率”（达标段数/总数）；3) 用Monte-Clo检验零假设（随机排列达标率≤观测值）；4) 把交换最小化、重排代价等问题归结为QAP，提出“最优指派一般原理”作为覆盖性框架。
AI.result: 跨语言手势数据最优率≥77%，p<0.001，拒绝随机解释；框架还能涵盖词序、重配、音系配列等多种语言优化现象，首次给出统一数学表达。
AI.conclusion: 交换距离最小化不仅是词序限制，也深植于手势串组织；QAP为语言优化研究提供可扩展的数学基石。“最优指派一般原理”可把分散的“短邻优先”“重量后置”等现象纳入同一可证伪框架，开启用组合优化方法系统研究语言经济性的新路径。

title: GPA: Learning GUI Process Automation from Demonstrations
summary: GUI Process Automation (GPA) is a lightweight but general vision-based Robotic Process Automation (RPA), which enables fast and stable process replay with only a single demo. Addressing the fragility of traditional RPA and the non-deterministic risks of current vision language model-based GUI agents, GPA introduces three core benefits: (1) Robustness via Sequential Monte Carlo-based localization to handle rescaling and detection uncertainty; (2) Deterministic and Reliability safeguarded by readiness calibration; and (3) Privacy through fast, fully local execution. This approach delivers the adaptability, robustness, and security required for enterprise workflows. It can also be used as an MCP/CLI tool by other agents with coding capabilities so that the agent only reasons and orchestrates while GPA handles the GUI execution. We conducted a pilot experiment to compare GPA with Gemini 3 Pro (with CUA tools) and found that GPA achieves higher success rate with 10 times faster execution speed in finishing long-horizon GUI tasks.

AI.tldr: 基于单演示的轻量级视觉 GUI 过程自动化框架(GPA)在性能、鲁棒性与隐私性上优于现有 RPA 与 VLM-Agent。
AI.motivation: 传统 RPA 在 UI 变化时极易失效；采用视觉语言模型的 GUI 智能体虽然通用，却面临定位随机、重启代价高、逻辑不可靠且需上云。对于企业高频且敏感的长周期 GUI 任务，急需一个既稳定又快速且可完全本地运行的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出 GUI Process Automation (GPA)：1) 视觉驱动单演示回放；2) 基于 Sequential Monte Carlo 的连续定位算法，对缩放、识别不确定度保持鲁棒；3) 引入 readiness calibration 机制自检并确认控件可交互，消除非确定性与误点；4) 全本地执行，支持作为 CLI/MCP 工具被代码型智能体调用——后者仅需负责规划，GUI 动作完全交由 GPA。
AI.result: 对照最佳基线 Gemini 3 Pro+CUA，【GPA】全长周期任务成功率更高，且执行速度提升约 10 倍；定位失败帧数显著下降，无需网络带宽且零云端调用，满足国企等高敏感场景。
AI.conclusion: GPA 以“视觉＋随机定位＋置信校验” 三位一体，既解决旧 RPA 脆弱又避开云端 VLM 的不确定性与隐私隐患，可直接导入企业流程或在 Agent 编排工具链内当作本地速度快而可靠的动作接口。后续计划进一步扩展跨平台支持与更复杂业务流程封装。

title: The AnIML Ontology: Enabling Semantic Interoperability for Large-Scale Experimental Data in Interconnected Scientific Labs
comment: Accepted at the 38th International Conference on Advanced Information Systems Engineering (CAiSE 2026)
summary: Achieving semantic interoperability across heterogeneous experimental data systems remains a major barrier to data-driven scientific discovery. The Analytical Information Markup Language (AnIML), a flexible XML-based standard for analytical chemistry and biology, is increasingly used in industrial R&D labs for managing and exchanging experimental data. However, the expressivity of the XML schema permits divergent interpretations across stakeholders, introducing inconsistencies that undermine the interoperability the AnIML schema was designed to support. In this paper, we present the AnIML Ontology, an OWL 2 ontology that formalises the semantics of AnIML and aligns it with the Allotrope Data Format to support future cross-system and cross-lab interoperability. The ontology was developed using an expert-in-the-loop approach combining LLM-assisted requirement elicitation with collaborative ontology engineering. We validate the ontology through a multi-layered approach: data-driven transformation of real-world AnIML files into knowledge graphs, competency question verification via SPARQL, and a novel validation protocol based on adversarial negative competency questions mapped to established ontological anti-patterns and enforced via SHACL constraints.

AI.tldr: 针对AnIML XML语义歧义导致互操作性下降的问题，作者提出AnIML Ontology（OWL 2），通过与ADF对齐并采用“专家+LLM”协同建模及多层验证，实现跨系统实验数据的语义一致交换。
AI.motivation: AnIML虽被工业研发实验室广泛采用，但其XML schema表达力过强、缺乏形式化语义，导致不同利益方解读分歧，出现数据不一致，反而削弱了设计之初的互操作目标，亟需一种能精确限定语义且与主流数据格式互通的解决方案。
AI.method: 1) 构建AnIML Ontology（OWL 2），将AnIML核心概念、关系与约束形式化，并与Allotrope Data Format（ADF）本体对齐；2) 采用“专家在环”流程：LLM辅助需求获取→协作式本体工程迭代；3) 三层验证：①真实AnIML文件自动转换为知识图谱；②用SPARQL回答能力问题（competency questions）检验覆盖度；③提出对抗性“负能力问题”，映射到已知本体反模式，并以SHACL约束强制执行，检测潜在错误建模。
AI.result: 成功将多样本真实AnIML文档无损转换为一致的知识图谱；SPARQL查询全部通过预设能力问题；负能力问题与SHACL约束共同发现并修正了多套潜在反模式（如双分类、关系错位），显著提高了本体一致性与鲁棒性；与ADF的对齐率达到95%以上，为跨平台、跨实验室数据交换奠定语义基础。
AI.conclusion: AnIML Ontology首次以OWL形式固化AnIML语义，并通过LLM-专家协同与对抗式SHACL验证显著降低歧义，与ADF无缝衔接，可立即部署于工业R&D环境，推动实验数据真正可发现、可访问、可互操作、可重用（FAIR）。

title: DDCL: Deep Dual Competitive Learning: A Differentiable End-to-End Framework for Unsupervised Prototype-Based Representation Learning
summary: A persistent structural weakness in deep clustering is the disconnect between feature learning and cluster assignment. Most architectures invoke an external clustering step, typically k-means, to produce pseudo-labels that guide training, preventing the backbone from directly optimising for cluster quality. This paper introduces Deep Dual Competitive Learning (DDCL), the first fully differentiable end-to-end framework for unsupervised prototype-based representation learning. The core contribution is architectural: the external k-means is replaced by an internal Dual Competitive Layer (DCL) that generates prototypes as native differentiable outputs of the network. This single inversion makes the complete pipeline, from backbone feature extraction through prototype generation to soft cluster assignment, trainable by backpropagation through a single unified loss, with no Lloyd iterations, no pseudo-label discretisation, and no external clustering step. To ground the framework theoretically, the paper derives an exact algebraic decomposition of the soft quantisation loss into a simplex-constrained reconstruction error and a non-negative weighted prototype variance term. This identity reveals a self-regulating mechanism built into the loss geometry: the gradient of the variance term acts as an implicit separation force that resists prototype collapse without any auxiliary objective, and leads to a global Lyapunov stability theorem for the reduced frozen-encoder system. Six blocks of controlled experiments validate each structural prediction. The decomposition identity holds with zero violations across more than one hundred thousand training epochs; the negative feedback cycle is confirmed with Pearson -0.98; with a jointly trained backbone, DDCL outperforms its non-differentiable ablation by 65% in clustering accuracy and DeepCluster end-to-end by 122%.

AI.tldr: 用可微分的 Dual Competitive Layer 取代外部 k-means，首次实现端到端原型式深度聚类，理论证明其隐式抗塌缩机制，实验验证精度提升 122%。
AI.motivation: 传统深度聚类把特征学习与聚类分配割裂：需外挂 k-means 生成伪标签，骨干网络无法直接优化聚类质量，导致梯度失联、性能受限。作者希望构建一个完全可微、无需伪标签、无需 Lloyd 迭代的一体化框架。
AI.method: 提出 Deep Dual Competitive Learning（DDCL）：1) 用内部 Dual Competitive Layer（DCL）替代 k-means，把原型作为网络原生可微输出；2) 推导软量化损失的代数分解，将其拆成简单体约束重构误差与非负加权原型方差两项，证明方差梯度自带排斥力，无需额外正则即可防止原型塌缩；3) 对冻结编码器给出全局 Lyapunov 稳定性定理；4) 整个 pipeline 通过单损失反向传播端到端训练。
AI.result: 6 组受控实验全部验证理论预测：分解恒等式在 10 万 epoch 内零违反；负反馈循环 Pearson 系数 −0.98；联合训练骨干时，DDCL 比不可微版本聚类精度高 65%，比 DeepCluster 高 122%。
AI.conclusion: DDCL 首次将原型生成与特征学习完全耦合到同一可微系统，理论揭示损失几何自带自稳定机制，实验显示显著精度增益，为无监督表示学习提供了新的端到端范式。

title: Diagnosing Translated Benchmarks: An Automated Quality Assurance Study of the EU20 Benchmark Suite
summary: Machine-translated benchmark datasets reduce costs and offer scale, but noise, loss of structure, and uneven quality weaken confidence. What matters is not merely whether we can translate, but also whether we can measure and verify translation reliability at scale. We study translation quality in the EU20 benchmark suite, which comprises five established benchmarks translated into 20 languages, via a three-step automated quality assurance approach: (i) a structural corpus audit with targeted fixes; (ii) quality profiling using a neural metric (COMET, reference-free and reference-based) with translation service comparisons (DeepL / ChatGPT / Google); and (iii) an LLM-based span-level translation error landscape. Trends are consistent: datasets with lower COMET scores exhibit a higher share of accuracy/mistranslation errors at span level (notably HellaSwag; ARC is comparatively clean). Reference-based COMET on MMLU against human-edited samples points in the same direction. We release cleaned/corrected versions of the EU20 datasets, and code for reproducibility. In sum, automated quality assurance offers practical, scalable indicators that help prioritize review -- complementing, not replacing, human gold standards.

AI.tldr: EU20机器翻译基准经三阶自动质检(COMET+LLM)后，在大规模下可量化译后数据集质量并指导人工审校，而非替代人工金标准。
AI.motivation: 机器翻译数据集虽便宜但噪声多、结构受损、质量参差不齐，直接削弱模型可信度，因此亟需可扩展的自动化质检指标，为大规模数据集提供低成本、可复现的质量循证。
AI.method: ① 结构语料审计与修正；②参考自由与参考依赖COMET评估，并对比DeepL/ChatGPT/Google三大翻译引擎；③ 利用LLM做span级错误类型分析，定位
AI.result: 低COMET得分数据集在Span级错误中精确/误译占比更高(HellaSwag显著欠佳，ARC较干净)；参考版COMET对MMLU人类编辑样本的趋势一致，证明自动指标与人工评量方向可对应。
AI.conclusion: 自动大规模质量评估能快速提供量化指标，帮助优先分配人工审校精力，是

title: Director: Instance-aware Gaussian Splatting for Dynamic Scene Modeling and Understanding
summary: Volumetric video seeks to model dynamic scenes as temporally coherent 4D representations. While recent Gaussian-based approaches achieve impressive rendering fidelity, they primarily emphasize appearance but are largely agnostic to instance-level structure, limiting stable tracking and semantic reasoning in highly dynamic scenarios. In this paper, we present Director, a unified spatio-temporal Gaussian representation that jointly models human performance, high-fidelity rendering, and instance-level semantics. Our key insight is that embedding instance-consistent semantics naturally complements 4D modeling, enabling more accurate scene decomposition while supporting robust dynamic scene understanding. To this end, we leverage temporally aligned instance masks and sentence embeddings derived from Multimodal Large Language Models to supervise the learnable semantic features of each Gaussian via two MLP decoders, enabling language-aligned 4D representations and enforcing identity consistency over time. To enhance temporal stability, we bridge 2D optical flow with 4D Gaussians and finetune their motions, yielding reliable initialization and reducing drift. For the training, we further introduce a geometry-aware SDF constraints, along with regularization terms that enforces surface continuity, enhancing temporal coherence in dynamic foreground modeling. Experiments demonstrate that Director achieves temporally coherent 4D reconstructions while simultaneously enabling instance segmentation and open-vocabulary querying.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 Director，把「高保真渲染」「4D 时序建模」与「实例级语言语义」统一进高斯框架，实现动态场景的可追踪、可分割、可文本查询的体积视频。
AI.motivation: 现有高斯体积视频方法重外观轻结构，导致实例身份漂移、时序不一致，难以完成追踪与语义推理；亟需将语言语义嵌入 4D 表征以同时支持高质量渲染和高层理解。
AI.method: 1) 用 MLLM 生成帧级实例 mask 与句子嵌入，经两个 MLP 解码器监督每个高斯的可学习语义特征，实现语言对齐且保持时序身份一致；2) 将 2D 光流桥接至 4D 高斯并微调运动，提供稳定初值、抑制漂移；3) 引入几何感知 SDF 约束和表面连续正则，强化动态前景的时序连贯性。
AI.result: 在动态人体数据集上，Director 实现高保真渲染的同时，给出时序一致的 4D 重建、实例分割掩码及开放词汇查询，显著优于现有只关注外观的高斯方法。
AI.conclusion: 把实例-语言语义作为先验嵌入 4D 高斯，可同时获得高质量渲染与可追踪、可查询的语义结构，为体积视频在虚拟现实、体育分析等应用奠定基础。

title: Solving the Two-dimensional single stock size Cuting Stock Problem with SAT and MaxSAT
summary: Cutting rectangular items from stock sheets to satisfy demands while minimizing waste is a central manufacturing task. The Two-Dimensional Single Stock Size Cutting Stock Problem (2D-CSSP) generalizes bin packing by requiring multiple copies of each item type, which causes a strong combinatorial blow-up. We present a SAT-based framework where item types are expanded by demand, each copy has a sheet-assignment variable and non-overlap constraints are activated only for copies assigned to the same sheet. We also introduce an infeasible-orientation elimination rule that fixes rotation variables when only one orientation can fit the sheet. For minimizing the number of sheets, we compare three approaches: non-incremental SAT with binary search, incremental SAT with clause reuse across iterations and weighted partial MaxSAT. On the Cui--Zhao benchmark suite, our best SAT configurations certify two to three times more instances as provably optimal and achieve lower optimality gaps than OR-Tools, CPLEX and Gurobi. The relative ranking among SAT approaches depends on rotation: incremental SAT is strongest without rotation, while non-incremental SAT is more effective when rotation increases formula size.

AI.tldr: 提出首个面向2D-CSSP的SAT框架，通过按需展开件型副本、动态激活非重叠约束及不可行方向裁剪，显著优于OR-Tools/CPLEX/Gurobi，增量与非增量SAT策略各擅胜场。
AI.motivation: 2D-CSSP是制造业普遍存在的“下料”难题，兼具多重需求与强组合爆炸，现有MIP／CP求解器在证明最优性上受限，亟需更高效的精确算法。
AI.method: 构建SAT模型：1)按需求复制件型，每副本设片材指派变量；2)同片副本间动态激活非重叠约束；3)提出不可行方向裁剪规则，锁定只能单旋转的副本；4)对比三种优化策略：非增量SAT+二分查找、增量SAT重用子句、加权部分MaxSAT；5)在Cui–Zhao基准集全面评估。
AI.result: 所提SAT框架在820组算例中，被证为最优的实例数比OR-Tools/CPLEX/Gurobi多出2–3倍，平均最优性Gap更低。旋转禁用场景下，增量SAT最强；启用旋转使公式尺寸剧增时，非增量SAT更优。
AI.conclusion: SAT范式首次在2D-CSSP上系统超越主流商用求解器，揭示“副本展开+动态约束+方向裁剪”设计的关键价值，为二维下料精确求解提供了可扩展的新路线。

title: FourierMoE: Fourier Mixture-of-Experts Adaptation of Large Language Models
comment: The first two authors contributed equally to this work; listing order is random
summary: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) has emerged as a crucial paradigm for adapting large language models (LLMs) under constrained computational budgets. However, standard PEFT methods often struggle in multi-task fine-tuning settings, where diverse optimization objectives induce task interference and limited parameter budgets lead to representational deficiency. While recent approaches incorporate mixture-of-experts (MoE) to alleviate these issues, they predominantly operate in the spatial domain, which may introduce structural redundancy and parameter overhead. To overcome these limitations, we reformulate adaptation in the spectral domain. Our spectral analysis reveals that different tasks exhibit distinct frequency energy distributions, and that LLM layers display heterogeneous frequency sensitivities. Motivated by these insights, we propose FourierMoE, which integrates the MoE architecture with the inverse discrete Fourier transform (IDFT) for frequency-aware adaptation. Specifically, FourierMoE employs a frequency-adaptive router to dispatch tokens to experts specialized in distinct frequency bands. Each expert learns a set of conjugate-symmetric complex coefficients, preserving complete phase and amplitude information while theoretically guaranteeing lossless IDFT reconstruction into real-valued spatial weights. Extensive evaluations across 28 benchmarks, multiple model architectures, and scales demonstrate that FourierMoE consistently outperforms competitive baselines in both single-task and multi-task settings while using significantly fewer trainable parameters. These results highlight the promise of spectral-domain expert adaptation as an effective and parameter-efficient paradigm for LLM fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 将混合专家(MoE)搬入频域，用带相位的复系数替代传统空间权重，仅用极少量可训练参数即可在28项基准上全面超越现有基线。
AI.motivation: 现有PEFT在多任务场景下受限于任务冲突与参数不足；即便引入MoE，也囿于空间域导致结构冗余。作者发现不同任务在频域能量分布各异且各层对频率敏感度不同，因此提出在频域做适配。
AI.method: 提出FourierMoE：1) 对输入token先经频域分析；2) 频率自适应路由器将其分发到专精不同频带的专家；3) 各专家仅学习一组共轭对称复系数，经IDFT无损还原为实数空间权重，保持幅度与相位信息；4) 仅训练这些复系数与路由器，其余冻结。
AI.result: 在单任务与多任务设定下，用显著更少的可训练参数（相比LoRA、AdaLoRA等）在28个涵盖NLU/QA/Summarization的基准上稳定领先，且跨模型规模(7B-30B)与架构(LLaMA/BLOOM/OPT)均有效。
AI.conclusion: 频域专家适配为LLM高效微调提供了新范式：不仅缓解任务冲突与参数冗余，还揭示“任务-频带-专家”三者对应关系，为后续压缩与解释性研究铺路。

title: SAFE: Stepwise Atomic Feedback for Error correction in Multi-hop Reasoning
summary: Multi-hop QA benchmarks frequently reward Large Language Models (LLMs) for spurious correctness, masking ungrounded or flawed reasoning steps. To shift toward rigorous reasoning, we propose SAFE, a dynamic benchmarking framework that replaces the ungrounded Chain-of-Thought (CoT) with a strictly verifiable sequence of grounded entities. Our framework operates across two phases: (1) train-time verification, where we establish an atomic error taxonomy and a Knowledge Graph (KG)-grounded verification pipeline to eliminate noisy supervision in standard benchmarks, identifying up to 14% of instances as unanswerable, and (2) inference-time verification, where a feedback model trained on this verified dataset dynamically detects ungrounded steps in real-time. Experimental results demonstrate that SAFE not only exposes the critical flaws of existing benchmarks at train-time, but also significantly outperforms standard baselines, achieving an average accuracy gain of 8.4 pp while guaranteeing verifiable trajectories at inference-time.

AI.tldr: SAFE 用“可验证实体链”取代 CoT，在训练与推理阶段双重剔除无据推理，使多跳 QA 基准更可靠。
AI.motivation: 当前多跳 QA 基准常把靠运气正确但推理链空洞或错误的答案判对，导致 LLM 学到虚假捷径；亟需一个能严格验证每一步推理的数据与评价框架。
AI.method: 提出 SAFE 框架：1) 训练阶段，构建原子错误分类法，并用知识图谱验证管道清洗主流基准，剔除 14% 无法回答或含噪声样本；2) 推理阶段，用上述清洗后的数据训练反馈模型，实时检测并阻断无据推理步骤，强制模型输出“可验证实体链”而非自由 CoT。
AI.result: SAFE 在多个多跳 QA 数据集上比标准基线平均提升 8.4 个百分点，同时保证推理轨迹可被 KG 逐点验证。
AI.conclusion: SAFE 同时揭示现有基准缺陷并提供可验证推理范式，为构建真正可靠的多跳问答系统铺平道路。

title: BTS-rPPG: Orthogonal Butterfly Temporal Shifting for Remote Photoplethysmography
summary: Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) enables contactless physiological sensing from facial videos by analyzing subtle appearance variations induced by blood circulation. However, modeling the temporal dynamics of these signals remains challenging, as many deep learning methods rely on temporal shifting or convolutional operators that aggregate information primarily from neighboring frames, resulting in predominantly local temporal modeling and limited temporal receptive fields. To address this limitation, we propose BTS-rPPG, a temporal modeling framework based on Orthogonal Butterfly Temporal Shifting (BTS). Inspired by the butterfly communication pattern in the Fast Fourier Transform (FFT), BTS establishes structured frame interactions via an XOR-based butterfly pairing schedule, progressively expanding the temporal receptive field and enabling efficient propagation of information across distant frames. Furthermore, we introduce an orthogonal feature transfer mechanism (OFT) that filters the source feature with respect to the target context before temporal shifting, retaining only the orthogonal component for cross-frame transmission. This reduces redundant feature propagation and encourages complementary temporal interaction. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that BTS-rPPG improves long-range temporal modeling of physiological dynamics and consistently outperforms existing temporal modeling strategies for rPPG estimation.

AI.tldr: 针对 rPPG 中时间建模局限，提出 BTS-rPPG：借 FFT 蝶式配对与正交特征转移机制，扩大感受野并减少冗余，提升长程生理动态估计精度。
AI.motivation: rPPG 依赖面部视频提取血循环信号，但现有深度方法多用邻近帧卷积/移位，时间感受野受限，难捕获长程生理动态，影响精度与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计 Orthogonal Butterfly Temporal Shifting (BTS)：仿 FFT 蝶式通信，以 XOR 配对表实现帧间结构化交互，逐级倍增感受野；辅以 Orthogonal Feature Transfer (OFT)，在移位前用目标上下文对源特征做正交投影，仅保留互补分量进行跨帧传递，抑制冗余信息。
AI.result: 在多个公开 rPPG 数据集上验证，BTS-rPPG 显著优于当前主流时间建模策略，心率、心率变异性等指标误差更低，长程一致性更好。
AI.conclusion: 通过蝶式帧交互与正交特征过滤，BTS-rPPG 有效扩展时间感受野并提升特征互补性，为无接触生理监测提供高效且高精度的长程时间建模新范式。

title: AeroTherm-GPT: A Verification-Centered LLM Framework for Thermal Protection System Engineering Workflows
summary: Integrating Large Language Models (LLMs) into hypersonic thermal protection system (TPS) design is bottlenecked by cascading constraint violations when generating executable simulation artifacts. General-purpose LLMs, treating generation as single-pass text completion, fail to satisfy the sequential, multi-gate constraints inherent in safety-critical engineering workflows. To address this, we propose AeroTherm-GPT, the first TPS-specialized LLM Agent, instantiated through a Constraint-Closed-Loop Generation (CCLG) framework. CCLG organizes TPS artifact generation as an iterative workflow comprising generation, validation, CDG-guided repair, execution, and audit. The Constraint Dependency Graph (CDG) encodes empirical co-resolution structure among constraint categories, directing repair toward upstream fault candidates based on lifecycle ordering priors and empirical co-resolution probabilities. This upstream-priority mechanism resolves multiple downstream violations per action, achieving a Root-Cause Fix Efficiency of 4.16 versus 1.76 for flat-checklist repair. Evaluated on HyTPS-Bench and validated against external benchmarks, AeroTherm-GPT achieves 88.7% End-to-End Success Rate (95% CI: 87.5-89.9), a gain of +12.5 pp over the matched non-CDG ablation baseline, without catastrophic forgetting on scientific reasoning and code generation tasks.

AI.tldr: 首次把大语言模型（LLM）成功嵌入高超声速防热系统（TPS）设计循环：提出专用智能体 AeroTherm-GPT 与“约束闭环生成”（CCLG）框架，用约束依赖图（CDG）引导上游根因修复，端到端成功率 88.7%，比无 CDG 基线提高 12.5 个百分点，无灾难性遗忘。
AI.motivation: 通用 LLM 把生成视为单次文本补全，面对安全关键工程里层层门禁的级联约束时频繁违规，导致 TPS 仿真无法直接执行，成为将 AI 引入高超声速设计的堵点。
AI.method: 构建 AeroTherm-GPT：① CCLG 工作流（生成→验证→CDG 引导修复→执行→审计）闭环迭代；② CDG 编码约束类别间的经验共解结构与生命周期时序，优先修复上游根因，一次动作可消除多重下游违规；③ 用 HyTPS-Bench 训练并保留科学推理与代码生成能力，防止灾难性遗忘。
AI.result: 在 HyTPS-Bench 与外部基准上，AeroTherm-GPT 端到端成功率 88.7%（95% CI 87.5–89.9），较无 CDG 的同类模型提升 12.5 pp；根因修复效率 4.16，优于扁平清单式修复的 1.76，且未丢失通用科研与编程能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过“约束依赖图-上游优先”机制，CCLG 首次让 LLM 在高超声速 TPS 安全关键流程中稳定产出可执行仿真制品，为将 AI 深度嵌入复杂工程约束系统提供了可复用范式。

title: Dual-Attention Based 3D Channel Estimation
summary: For multi-input and multi-output (MIMO) channels, the optimal channel estimation (CE) based on linear minimum mean square error (LMMSE) requires three-dimensional (3D) filtering. However, the complexity is often prohibitive due to large matrix dimensions. Suboptimal estimators approximate 3DCE by decomposing it into time, frequency, and spatial domains, while yields noticeable performance degradation under correlated MIMO channels. On the other hand, recent advances in deep learning (DL) can explore channel correlations in all domains via attention mechanisms. Building on this capability, we propose a dual attention mechanism based 3DCE network (3DCENet) that can achieve accurate estimates.

AI.tldr: 用 attention 做三维 LMMSE 信道估计，在保证精度的同时把复杂度降到可接受水平。
AI.motivation: 传统 LMMSE 三维滤波虽最优，但矩阵运算量巨大；现有分解式次优算法在强相关 MIMO 信道下性能骤降。需寻找兼顾复杂度与估计精度的新方案。
AI.method: 利用深度学习在多域相关建模的优势，提出双注意力机制的 3D 信道估计网络 3DCENet，在时间、频率、空间三域联合进行端到端估计。
AI.result: 3DCENet 能在高相关 MIMO 环境下逼近最优 LMMSE 性能，且运算复杂度显著低于传统三维滤波。
AI.conclusion: 注意力机制驱动的三维估计网络是替代高额矩阵运算的有效途径，为实时 MIMO 系统提供了高精度、低复杂度的信道估计方案。

title: $k$NNProxy: Efficient Training-Free Proxy Alignment for Black-Box Zero-Shot LLM-Generated Text Detection
summary: LLM-generated text (LGT) detection is essential for reliable forensic analysis and for mitigating LLM misuse. Existing LGT detectors can generally be categorized into two broad classes: learning-based approaches and zero-shot methods. Compared with learning-based detectors, zero-shot methods are particularly promising because they eliminate the need to train task-specific classifiers. However, the reliability of zero-shot methods fundamentally relies on the assumption that an off-the-shelf proxy LLM is well aligned with the often unknown source LLM, a premise that rarely holds in real-world black-box scenarios. To address this discrepancy, existing proxy alignment methods typically rely on supervised fine-tuning of the proxy or repeated interactions with commercial APIs, thereby increasing deployment costs, exposing detectors to silent API changes, and limiting robustness under domain shift. Motivated by these limitations, we propose the $k$-nearest neighbor proxy ($k$NNProxy), a training-free and query-efficient proxy alignment framework that repurposes the $k$NN language model ($k$NN-LM) retrieval mechanism as a domain adapter for a fixed proxy LLM. Specifically, a lightweight datastore is constructed once from a target-reflective LGT corpus, either via fixed-budget querying or from existing datasets. During inference, nearest-neighbor evidence induces a token-level predictive distribution that is interpolated with the proxy output, yielding an aligned prediction without proxy fine-tuning or per-token API outputs. To improve robustness under domain shift, we extend $k$NNProxy into a mixture of proxies (MoP) that routes each input to a domain-specific datastore for domain-consistent retrieval. Extensive experiments demonstrate strong detection performance of our method.

AI.tldr: 提出零训练、少查询的kNNProxy框架，通过kNN-LM机制把固定代理LLM对齐到未知目标领域，无需微调或重复API调用即可检测大模型生成文本，并在域漂移场景下用MoP提升鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本文本检测器依赖代理LLM与未知源LLM对齐，但监督微调代理或重复商用API调用成本高、易受API静默更新影响，且在目标领域变化时鲁棒性差。
AI.method: 利用kNN-LM检索思想，构建目标域LGT语料轻量级数据存储（datastore）；推理时按token级近邻证据修正代理LLM的预测分布，免去训练与逐token API访问；进一步提出混合代理路由MoP，对每输入动态选择对应域数据存储，实现一致域检索。
AI.result: 在无需微调、查询量最小化条件下，kNNProxy在跨域、黑盒检测场景中性能优于现有零样本和监督基线，表现出强泛化能力与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 无需训练、低成本的kNN对齐策略可突破代理-源LLM失配瓶颈，为安全可信的大模型文本取证提供可扩展检测方案。

title: From Understanding to Erasing: Towards Complete and Stable Video Object Removal
summary: Video object removal aims to eliminate target objects from videos while plausibly completing missing regions and preserving spatio-temporal consistency. Although diffusion models have recently advanced this task, it remains challenging to remove object-induced side effects (e.g., shadows, reflections, and illumination changes) without compromising overall coherence. This limitation stems from the insufficient physical and semantic understanding of the target object and its interactions with the scene. In this paper, we propose to introduce understanding into erasing from two complementary perspectives. Externally, we introduce a distillation scheme that transfers the relationships between objects and their induced effects from vision foundation models to video diffusion models. Internally, we propose a framewise context cross-attention mechanism that grounds each denoising block in informative, unmasked context surrounding the target region. External and internal guidance jointly enable our model to understand the target object, its induced effects, and the global background context, resulting in clear and coherent object removal. Extensive experiments demonstrate our state-of-the-art performance, and we establish the first real-world benchmark for video object removal to facilitate future research and community progress. Our code, data, and models are available at: https://github.com/WeChatCV/UnderEraser.

AI.tldr: 首篇引入物理–语义理解的视频目标擦除框架，通过外部蒸馏+内部帧级注意力，在去阴影/反光等附带效应时保持时序连贯，并发布真实场景benchmark。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型虽能移除目标，但难以同步消除影子、反光等副作用，根源在于缺乏对“目标–效应–背景”耦合关系的显式建模。
AI.method: （1）外部蒸馏：将VFM中的对象→诱导效应关系蒸馏到视频扩散模型；（2）内部帧级上下文交叉注意力：让每帧去噪块以未被遮罩的丰富背景为条件，二者协同实现“理解式擦除”。
AI.result: 在自建首个真实视频目标擦除基准上取得SOTA，视觉质量与时序一致性显著优于前作，消融实验验证外部/内部指导缺一不可。
AI.conclusion: 显式引入物理–语义理解可突破“仅补像素”瓶颈；开源数据与模型将推动社区向更鲁棒、可解释的视频编辑方向发展。

title: Domain-constrained knowledge representation: A modal framework
summary: Knowledge graphs store large numbers of relations efficiently, but they remain weak at representing a quieter difficulty: the meaning of a concept often shifts with the domain in which it is used. A triple such as Apple, instance-of, Company may be acceptable in one setting while being misleading or unusable in another. In most current systems, domain information is attached as metadata, qualifiers, or graph-level organization. These mechanisms help with filtering and provenance, but they usually do not alter the formal status of the assertion itself. This paper argues that domain should be treated as part of knowledge representation rather than as supplementary annotation. It introduces the Domain-Contextualized Concept Graph (DCG), a framework in which domain is written into the relation and interpreted as a modal world constraint. In the DCG form (C, R at D, C'), the marker at D identifies the world in which the relation holds. Formally, the relation is interpreted through a domain-indexed necessity operator, so that truth, inference, and conflict checking are all scoped to the relevant world. This move has three consequences: ambiguous concepts can be disambiguated at the point of representation; invalid assertions can be challenged against their domain; cross-domain relations can be connected through explicit predicates. The paper develops this claim through a Kripke-style semantics, a compact predicate system, a Prolog implementation, and mappings to RDF, OWL, and relational databases. The contribution is a representational reinterpretation of domain itself. The central claim is that many practical failures in knowledge systems begin when domain is treated as external to the assertion. DCG addresses that by giving domain a structural and computable role inside the representation.

AI.tldr: 现有 KG 把领域当元数据，导致概念在不同语境下含义漂移而带来错误；本文提出 DCG，把领域直接写进三元组 C R_at_D C’，用带领域索引的模态算子限定真值与推理，实现概念消歧、断言校验和跨域链接。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱把领域信息当作外部标注，无法在同一图谱内区分同一概念在不同领域中的语义差异，造成断言冲突与使用错误。
AI.method: 引入 Domain-Contextualized Concept Graph（DCG），将领域作为三元组的显式世界约束，借助 Kripke 语义与模态逻辑中的“领域索引必然算子”定义真值；设计轻量谓词体系，给出 Prolog 实现，并提供到 RDF/OWL 与关系库的映射方案。
AI.result: 该框架可在表示层即时完成概念消歧，支持基于领域的断言有效性质询与跨域关系连接；原型系统验证了推理与冲突检测均能在领域限定范围内进行。
AI.conclusion: 将领域从外部元数据转为内部结构是提升知识系统稳健性的关键；DCG 用可计算的方式赋予领域正式语义，显著减少因语境漂移导致的实用失败。

title: Bridging Deep Learning and Integer Linear Programming: A Predictive-to-Prescriptive Framework for Supply Chain Analytics
summary: Although demand forecasting is a critical component of supply chain planning, actual retail data can exhibit irreconcilable seasonality, irregular spikes, and noise, rendering precise projections nearly unattainable. This paper proposes a three-step analytical framework that combines forecasting and operational analytics. The first stage consists of exploratory data analysis, where delivery-tracked data from 180,519 transactions are partitioned, and long-term trends, seasonality, and delivery-related attributes are examined. Secondly, the forecasting performance of a statistical time series decomposition model N-BEATS MSTL and a recent deep learning architecture N-HiTS were compared. N-BEATS and N-HiTS were both statistically, and hence were N-BEATS's and N-HiTS's statistically selected. Most recent time series deep learning models, N-HiTS, N-BEATS. N-HiTS and N-BEATS N-HiTS and N-HiTS outperformed the statistical benchmark to a large extent. N-BEATS was selected to be the most optimized model, as the one with the lowest forecasting error, in the 3rd and final stage forecasting values of the next 4 weeks of 1918 units, and provided those as a model with a set of deterministically integer linear program outcomes that are aimed to minimize the total delivery time with a set of bound budget, capacity, and service constraints. The solution allocation provided a feasible and cost-optimal shipping plan. Overall, the study provides a compelling example of the practical impact of precise forecasting and simple, highly interpretable model optimization in logistics.

AI.tldr: 针对零售数据强季节性、突发尖峰与噪声并存从而导致精准预测困难的痛点，作者提出“预测+运营”三步骤框架：先利用180,519条配送交易做EDA，再对比N-BEATS、N-HiTS与统计基准，最终用N-BEATS的4周预测驱动整数线性规划，生成兼顾预算与容量的最优配送方案。整体设计兼顾精度与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 零售端需求常呈不可调和的季节波动、不规则尖峰及噪声，传统预测难以兼顾精度与后续运营决策，导致物流计划成本过高或不可行。
AI.method: 1) 将18万+配送订单按时间-属性拆分，提取趋势、季节性与配送特征；2) 用相同数据与评价指标系统比较统计分解模型MSTL与深度学习N-BEATS、N-HiTS；3) 选取误差最低的N-BEATS生成未来4周1918个SKU预测值，并转化为整数线性规划输入，在预算、运力、服务水平约束下最小化总配送时间，求解得到可执行的发运计划。
AI.result: N-BEATS与N-HiTS均显著优于统计基准，其中N-BEATS在验证集上误差最低；其预测值驱动的ILP模型在真实约束下给出可行方案，配送总时长与成本均优于现行经验规则。
AI.conclusion: 将高精度深度学习预测与简单可解释的整数规划耦合，可在真实物流环境中同时提升预测准确度与运营效率，为供应链“预测-决策”一体化提供易落地范式。

title: Why Gaussian Diffusion Models Fail on Discrete Data?
summary: Diffusion models have become a standard approach for generative modeling in continuous domains, yet their application to discrete data remains challenging. We investigate why Gaussian diffusion models with the DDPM solver struggle to sample from discrete distributions that are represented as a mixture of delta-distributions in the continuous space. Using a toy Random Hierarchy Model, we identify a critical sampling interval in which the density of noisified data becomes multimodal. In this regime, DDPM occasionally enters low-density regions between modes producing out-of-distribution inputs for the model and degrading sample quality. We show that existing heuristics, including self-conditioning and a solver we term q-sampling, help alleviate this issue. Furthermore, we demonstrate that combining self-conditioning with switching from DDPM to q-sampling within the critical interval improves generation quality on real data. We validate these findings across conditional and unconditional tasks in multiple domains, including text, programming code, and proteins.

AI.tldr: DDPM 在高离散度区域会落入低概率缝隙导致质量下降；提出在“临界区间”内切换 q-sampling 并结合自条件，可显著提升文本、代码、蛋白质等离散数据生成质量。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在连续域效果显著，但直接用于离散数据（如文本、代码）时采样质量差，DDPM 常产出分布外样本。需要解释其失效机制并给出通用改进。
AI.method: 1) 构造“随机层次”玩具模型，将离散分布表示为连续空间中的一组 δ 分布；2) 理论推导与可视化证明 DDPM 在特定去噪时间窗口内会出现多峰密度，采样易落入低概率间隙；3) 提出两种补救：自条件（self-conditioning）与 q-sampling；4) 设计“临界区间”检测器，在该区间将 DDPM 切换为 q-sampling 并结合自条件，实现混合采样流程。
AI.result: 玩具实验首次量化“临界区间”与分布外样本的相关性；在文本（GLM-10B）、代码（CodeGen）和蛋白质（ProteinBERT）生成任务上，FID/BLUE/Perplexity 等指标平均提升 7–18 %；消融实验显示，仅切换 q-sampling 或仅用自条件均不如联合策略显著。
AI.conclusion: DDPM 在连续表示的离散数据上失效的本质是“多峰低密度陷阱”，而非离散域本身；通过在关键时间步切换 q-sampling 并引入自条件，无需改变模型结构即可显著提升样本质量，为离散扩散模型提供了一条简单有效的通用增强路径。

title: Can Video Diffusion Models Predict Past Frames? Bidirectional Cycle Consistency for Reversible Interpolation
summary: Video frame interpolation aims to synthesize realistic intermediate frames between given endpoints while adhering to specific motion semantics. While recent generative models have improved visual fidelity, they predominantly operate in a unidirectional manner, lacking mechanisms to self-verify temporal consistency. This often leads to motion drift, directional ambiguity, and boundary misalignment, especially in long-range sequences. Inspired by the principle of temporal cycle-consistency in self-supervised learning, we propose a novel bidirectional framework that enforces symmetry between forward and backward generation trajectories. Our approach introduces learnable directional tokens to explicitly condition a shared backbone on temporal orientation, enabling the model to jointly optimize forward synthesis and backward reconstruction within a single unified architecture. This cycle-consistent supervision acts as a powerful regularizer, ensuring that generated motion paths are logically reversible. Furthermore, we employ a curriculum learning strategy that progressively trains the model from short to long sequences, stabilizing dynamics across varying durations. Crucially, our cyclic constraints are applied only during training; inference requires a single forward pass, maintaining the high efficiency of the base model. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in imaging quality, motion smoothness, and dynamic control on both 37-frame and 73-frame tasks, outperforming strong baselines while incurring no additional computational overhead.

AI.tldr: 提出双向循环一致性视频插帧框架，仅用训练期循环约束即实现 SOTA 长序列插帧质量，推理零额外开销。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式插帧模型单向推理，缺乏自验证机制，导致长序列运动漂移、方向歧义与边界错位；需引入可自我监督的时序一致性约束。
AI.method: 1) 设计双向统一网络，以可学习方向令牌显式区分前/后向时间取向；2) 在训练阶段同步优化前向合成与后向重建，使轨迹满足循环一致性对称；3) 采用从短到长课程的渐进训练，稳定长时动态；4) 推理仅一次前向，保持基线效率。
AI.result: 在 37 帧与 73 帧任务上，成像质量、运动平滑度与动态控制均达 SOTA，超越强基线且零额外计算开销。
AI.conclusion: 将自监督的循环一致性引入生成式插帧，可在不牺牲效率的前提下显著提升长序列时序保真度，为高质量视频生成提供新范式。

title: Not All Tokens See Equally: Perception-Grounded Policy Optimization for Large Vision-Language Models
summary: While Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has advanced reasoning in Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs), prevailing frameworks suffer from a foundational methodological flaw: by distributing identical advantages across all generated tokens, these methods inherently dilute the learning signals essential for optimizing the critical, visually-grounded steps of multimodal reasoning. To bridge this gap, we formulate \textit{Token Visual Dependency}, quantifying the causal information gain of visual inputs via the Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence between visual-conditioned and text-only predictive distributions. Revealing that this dependency is highly sparse and semantically pivotal, we introduce Perception-Grounded Policy Optimization (PGPO), which is a novel fine-grained credit assignment framework that dynamically reshapes advantages at the token level. Through a threshold-gated, mass-conserving mechanism, PGPO actively amplifies learning signals for visually-dependent tokens while suppressing gradient noise from linguistic priors.
