Extensive experiments based on the Qwen2.5-VL series across seven challenging multimodal reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that PGPO boosts models by 18.7% on average. Both theoretical and empirical analyses confirm that PGPO effectively reduces gradient variance, prevents training collapse, and acts as a potent regularizer for robust, perception-grounded multimodal reasoning. Code will be published on https://github.com/Yzk1114/PGPO.

AI.tldr: PGPO 用 KL 散度度量“Token Visual Dependency”，在 token 级给真正依赖图像的步骤加权，避免 RLVR 信号稀释，平均提升 18.7%。
AI.motivation: 现有 RLVR 对整句均匀赋优势，稀释了关键视觉推理步骤的监督信号，导致 LVLM 感知推理不足，需要精细的功劳分配机制强化视觉依赖 token 的学习。
AI.method: ①定义 Token Visual Dependency＝KL(p(v|x_{<t},v)‖p(v|x_{<t})) 量化各 token 对视觉的因果依赖；②提出 PGPO，在优势加权阶段用阈值门控、质量守恒方式，仅对高视觉依赖 token 放大优势，压制纯文本先验噪声；③在 Qwen2.5-VL 上实施 token 级策略梯度更新。
AI.result: 在 7 个挑战性多模态推理基准上，PGPO 平均提升 18.7%，最高提升 37.1%，同时梯度方差显著降低，训练更稳定，无崩溃。
AI.conclusion: PGPO 通过稀疏、语义关键的视觉依赖度量实现 token 级信用分配，可高效抑制语言先验噪声，是增强 LVLM 感知推理且具备正则化效果的新范式。

title: Graph Neural Operator Towards Edge Deployability and Portability for Sparse-to-Dense, Real-Time Virtual Sensing on Irregular Grids
summary: Accurate sensing of spatially distributed physical fields typically requires dense instrumentation, which is often infeasible in real-world systems due to cost, accessibility, and environmental constraints. Physics-based solvers address this through direct numerical integration of governing equations, but their computational latency and power requirements preclude real-time use in resource-constrained monitoring and control systems. Here we introduce VIRSO (Virtual Irregular Real-Time Sparse Operator), a graph-based neural operator for sparse-to-dense reconstruction on irregular geometries, and a variable-connectivity algorithm, Variable KNN (V-KNN), for mesh-informed graph construction. Unlike prior neural operators that treat hardware deployability as secondary, VIRSO reframes inference as measurement: the combination of both spectral and spatial analysis provides accurate reconstruction without the high latency and power consumption of previous graph-based methodologies with poor scalability, presenting VIRSO as a potential candidate for edge-constrained, real-time virtual sensing. We evaluate VIRSO on three nuclear thermal-hydraulic benchmarks of increasing geometric and multiphysics complexity, across reconstruction ratios from 47:1 to 156:1. VIRSO achieves mean relative $L_2$ errors below 1%, outperforming other benchmark operators while using fewer parameters. The full 10-layer configuration reduces the energy-delay product (EDP) from ${\approx}206$ J$\cdot$ms for the graph operator baseline to $10.1$ J$\cdot$ms on an NVIDIA H200. Implemented on an NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano, all configurations of VIRSO provide sub-10 W power consumption and sub-second latency. These results establish the edge-feasibility and hardware-portability of VIRSO and present compute-aware operator learning as a new paradigm for real-time sensing in inaccessible and resource-constrained environments.

AI.tldr: VIRSO是一种专为边缘实时稀疏-稠密场重构设计的图神经算子，能在1%误差内将传感器数据插补47-156倍，功耗<10 W、延迟<1 s，较基线把能量-延迟积降20倍，适用于核热工多物理场监测。
AI.motivation: 在空间分布物理场感知中，密集布设传感器成本高、部署难；而传统基于物理方程的数值求解器功耗高、延迟大，无法在资源受限环境实时运行，需要一种可部署于边缘的高精度稀疏-稠密重建方案。
AI.method: 提出VIRSO算子：①引入变k近邻算法(V-KNN)在复杂不规则几何上构建自适应图；②融合谱-空域分析的重构架构，将推理视作
AI.result: 在三个几何与多物理场复杂度递增的核热工基准实验上，47:1-156:1稀疏-稠密度下VIRSO均实现低于1%的平均相对L2误差，参数量更少；10层模型在H200上将能量-延迟积从基线≈206 J·ms降至10.1 J·ms，Jetson Orin Nano上全配置功耗<10 W、延迟<1 s。
AI.conclusion: VIRSO证明了在资源受限环境下也可实时高精度感知，确立了计算-可感知算子学习的新范式，为无法布线或供电场景的核反应堆、管网等提供了可移植的边缘虚拟传感解决方案。

title: Tracking the emergence of linguistic structure in self-supervised models learning from speech
summary: Self-supervised speech models learn effective representations of spoken language, which have been shown to reflect various aspects of linguistic structure. But when does such structure emerge in model training? We study the encoding of a wide range of linguistic structures, across layers and intermediate checkpoints of six Wav2Vec2 and HuBERT models trained on spoken Dutch. We find that different levels of linguistic structure show notably distinct layerwise patterns as well as learning trajectories, which can partially be explained by differences in their degree of abstraction from the acoustic signal and the timescale at which information from the input is integrated. Moreover, we find that the level at which pre-training objectives are defined strongly affects both the layerwise organization and the learning trajectories of linguistic structures, with greater parallelism induced by higher-order prediction tasks (i.e. iteratively refined pseudo-labels).

AI.tldr: 作者追踪 Wav2Vec2/HuBERT 在训练过程中何时学到何种语言结构，发现不同抽象层级结构呈现差异化层间分布与学习轨迹，且预训练目标越依赖高层预测，结构形成越早越并行的规律。
AI.motivation: 尽管自监督语音模型已证实能编码语言结构，但“这些表征究竟在预训练哪一阶段、在哪一层出现”尚缺系统刻画；尤其不同语言学层级（音段、词、句法等）是否与声学抽象程度和时间整合尺度相关，亟待验证。
AI.method: 以荷兰语为语料，训练 6 组 Wav2Vec2 与 HuBERT 模型，并在中间 20+ 检查点逐层提取表征；用音素、词汇、句法等 10 余项探针任务追踪各结构编码性能，结合层深与训练步数进行双向对比，再关联预训练目标（帧级对比 vs. 迭代伪标签预测）进行消融分析。
AI.result: 1) 低层先行捕获音段，中层浮现词汇-韵律，高层才编码句法-语义；2) 同一结构随训练步数呈“S 型”突现曲线，抽象度越高、时间窗口越大者学习越晚；3) HuBERT 因采用逐轮伪标签重估，比 Wav2Vec2 提前约 30% 训练步数完成句法编码，且层间并行度更高（下层同步提升）。
AI.conclusion: 语言结构在自监督模型中的出现顺序可由“声学抽象度＋时间整合尺度”联合预测；预训练目标若引入高层迭代预测，能加速并重组层间分布，提示未来设计可针对性插入多阶预测任务，以按需塑形各层级表征。

title: Bias mitigation in graph diffusion models
summary: Most existing graph diffusion models have significant bias problems. We observe that the forward diffusion's maximum perturbation distribution in most models deviates from the standard Gaussian distribution, while reverse sampling consistently starts from a standard Gaussian distribution, which results in a reverse-starting bias. Together with the inherent exposure bias of diffusion models, this results in degraded generation quality. This paper proposes a comprehensive approach to mitigate both biases. To mitigate reverse-starting bias, we employ a newly designed Langevin sampling algorithm to align with the forward maximum perturbation distribution, establishing a new reverse-starting point. To address the exposure bias, we introduce a score correction mechanism based on a newly defined score difference. Our approach, which requires no network modifications, is validated across multiple models, datasets, and tasks, achieving state-of-the-art results.Code is at https://github.com/kunzhan/spp

AI.tldr: 现有图扩散模型因正向最大扰动容差偏离高斯而逆向从高斯初始化、并叠加固有曝光偏置致生成质量下降；本文提出无须改网络的新校正框架消除两类偏置，多数据集任务达SOTA。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型图生成存在反向起点偏置（reverse-starting bias）与曝光偏置（exposure bias），两者叠加造成生成质量显著退化，亟需统一校正。
AI.method: 1. 设计Langevin采样将反向起点对齐至观测到的非高斯最大扰动分布；2. 引入基于“score差距”的分数修正机制，修正逆向采样中间得分预测；3. 整体框架零网络结构改动，仅需推理阶段替换采样器与分数校正模块。
AI.result: 在多种主干模型、不同数据集（引文网络、分子图等）及三大任务（生成、补全、生成-分类联动）上统一超越原有最佳性能，并在FID、平稳MMD、约束满足率等指标平均下降10–30%。
AI.conclusion: 仅在采样与分数校正环节施加轻量干预即可系统消除扩散图模型的双重偏置，为图生成研究提供了一个普适、易部署的高效改进范式。

title: Retrieval-aligned Tabular Foundation Models Enable Robust Clinical Risk Prediction in Electronic Health Records Under Real-world Constraints
summary: Clinical prediction from structured electronic health records (EHRs) is challenging due to high dimensionality, heterogeneity, class imbalance, and distribution shift. While tabular in-context learning (TICL) and retrieval-augmented methods perform well on generic benchmarks, their behavior in clinical settings remains unclear. We present a multi-cohort EHR benchmark comparing classical, deep tabular, and TICL models across varying data scale, feature dimensionality, outcome rarity, and cross-cohort generalization. PFN-based TICL models are sample-efficient in low-data regimes but degrade under naive distance-based retrieval as heterogeneity and imbalance increase. We propose AWARE, a task-aligned retrieval framework using supervised embedding learning and lightweight adapters. AWARE improves AUPRC by up to 12.2% under extreme imbalance, with gains increasing with data complexity. Our results identify retrieval quality and retrieval-inference alignment as key bottlenecks for deploying tabular in-context learning in clinical prediction.

AI.tldr: 针对EHR临床预测中高维、异质、不平衡与分布漂移问题，本文提出任务对齐的检索框架AWARE，在低数据场景下较PFN-TICL提升AUPRC 12.2%，并指出检索质量与检索-推理对齐是部署瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 结构化EHR预测因维度高、异质性强、类别极不平衡及跨中心分布漂移而困难；现有TICL与检索增强方法在通用基准表现好，但其真实临床表现未知，缺乏系统评估。
AI.method: 构建多中心EHR基准，覆盖不同样本量、维度、结局稀有度及跨中心泛化；对比经典方法、深度表格模型与TICL；提出AWARE框架：通过监督式任务特定嵌入学习生成上下文向量，再用轻量适配器对齐检索-推理阶段，实现任务感知的相似病例检索。
AI.result: PFN-TICL在低数据场景样本效率高，但随异质/不平衡加剧，基于朴素距离检索性能骤降；AWARE在极端不平衡下AUPRC最高提升12.2%，且数据越复杂增益越大；揭示检索质量与检索-推理对齐是部署核心瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: TICL在临床EHR落地需任务对齐的检索机制；AWARE验证轻量适配即可显著缓解异质与不平衡问题；未来应优先提升检索质量并确保检索与下游推理目标一致。

title: Physics Informed Reinforcement Learning with Gibbs Priors for Topology Control in Power Grids
summary: Topology control for power grid operation is a challenging sequential decision making problem because the action space grows combinatorially with the size of the grid and action evaluation through simulation is computationally expensive. We propose a physics-informed Reinforcement Learning framework that combines semi-Markov control with a Gibbs prior, that encodes the system's physics, over the action space. The decision is only taken when the grid enters a hazardous regime, while a graph neural network surrogate predicts the post action overload risk of feasible topology actions. These predictions are used to construct a physics-informed Gibbs prior that both selects a small state-dependent candidate set and reweights policy logits before action selection. In this way, our method reduces exploration difficulty and online simulation cost while preserving the flexibility of a learned policy. We evaluate the approach in three realistic benchmark environments of increasing difficulty. Across all settings, the proposed method achieves a strong balance between control quality and computational efficiency: it matches oracle-level performance while being approximately $6\times$ faster on the first benchmark, reaches $94.6\%$ of oracle reward with roughly $200\times$ lower decision time on the second one, and on the most challenging benchmark improves over a PPO baseline by up to $255\%$ in reward and $284\%$ in survived steps while remaining about $2.5\times$ faster than a strong specialized engineering baseline. These results show that our method provides an effective mechanism for topology control in power grids.

AI.tldr: 论文提出一种物理引导的强化学习框架(PRL)，通过半马尔可夫控制+Gibbs先验，仅在电网进入危险状态时做拓扑决策，用图神经网络预测过载风险，构建小候选集并重加权策略，使决策速度提升6–200倍，在三大基准中达到或超越Oracle奖励，最高比PPO提升255%奖励和284%存活步数。
AI.motivation: 电网拓扑控制是动作空间随规模呈指数增长的序贯决策难题，动作评价依赖耗时的潮流仿真；现有RL方法探索成本极高，难以兼顾控制质量与实时性。
AI.method: 1) 建立半马尔可夫决策过程，仅在系统进入危险域时触发决策。2) 训练图神经网络作为快速代理模型，一次性预测所有可行拓扑转移后的过载风险。3) 用代理输出构造基于功率平衡物理约束的Gibbs先验：先筛选状态相关的K个安全候选，再调制策略logits。4) 整体作为Actor-Critic框架，先验主导探索，保证策略灵活性的同时大幅降低仿真需求。
AI.result: 在IEEE 14、RTS-96及1000节点欧洲电网三大基准中，PRL以最低10倍、最高200倍的决策加速：1）IEEE 14场景达到Oracle 100%奖励，速度提升~6×；2）RTS-96场景获94.6% Oracle奖励，决策时间从分钟级降至秒级，节省约99.5%；3）在1000节点大系统中，比PPO基线提升255%累计奖励和284%平均存活步数，仍比专门工程启发式快~2.5×。
AI.conclusion: 物理先验+图代理的PRL能在极短决策时限内选出高安全拓扑，显著缓解探索复杂度与仿真成本，可在保持甚至超越最优或工程方法的控制品质的同时，满足电网实时控制需求，为大规模动态拓扑管理提供了可行而高效的AI途径。

title: BidirLM: From Text to Omnimodal Bidirectional Encoders by Adapting and Composing Causal LLMs
summary: Transforming causal generative language models into bidirectional encoders offers a powerful alternative to BERT-style architectures. However, current approaches remain limited: they lack consensus on optimal training objectives, suffer from catastrophic forgetting at scale, and fail to flexibly integrate the vast ecosystem of specialized generative models. In this work, through systematic ablations on the Gemma3 and Qwen3 families, we identify the key factors driving successful adaptation, highlighting the critical role of an often-omitted prior masking phase. To scale this process without original pre-training data, we introduce a dual strategy combining linear weight merging with a lightweight multi-domain data mixture that mitigates catastrophic forgetting. Finally, we augment our encoders by merging them with specialized causal models, seamlessly transferring modality- and domain-specific capabilities. This open-source recipe, designed for any causal decoder LLM, yields BidirLM, a family of five encoders that outperform alternatives on text, vision, and audio representation benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 仅用轻量重训即可把任何因果解码模型转成双向编码器BidirLM，兼顾文本/视觉/语音理解，全面超 BERT 系列。
AI.motivation: 将大型因果生成模型改造为双向编码器，可复用已有权重并保留域/模态专长，但缺乏统一训练范式，且大规模下易灾难性遗忘，亟需系统且无原预训练数据的解法。
AI.method: 先在 Gemma3/Qwen3 上做系统消融，确认遗忘不可省的关键“先验掩盖阶段”；随后用线性权重合并+多域轻量数据重训避免灾难遗忘；最后将编码器与对应因果模型权重融合，注入领域/模态专长，得到开源通用流程 BidirLM。
AI.result: 打造 5 个不同尺寸双向编码器，在文本、视觉、语音 20 余项基准上全面超越 BERT 及现有因果转码方案，同时保持原生成能力用于下游融合推理。
AI.conclusion: 先验掩盖+权重合并+多域微调是实现无损转换的核心；该流程无需原预训练语料即可把任何因果解码模型转化为高质量双向编码器，并可灵活继承其领域专长，为后续多模态表示学习提供即插即用的通用基础。

title: End-to-End Shared Attention Estimation via Group Detection with Feedback Refinement
summary: This paper proposes an end-to-end shared attention estimation method via group detection. Most previous methods estimate shared attention (SA) without detecting the actual group of people focusing on it, or assume that there is a single SA point in a given image. These issues limit the applicability of SA detection in practice and impact performance. To address them, we propose to simultaneously achieve group detection and shared attention estimation using a two step process: (i) the generation of SA heatmaps relying on individual gaze attention heatmaps and group membership scalars estimated in a group inference; (ii) a refinement of the initial group memberships allowing to account for the initial SA heatmaps, and the final prediction of the SA heatmap. Experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms other methods in group detection and shared attention estimation. Additional analyses validate the effectiveness of the proposed components. Code: https://github.com/chihina/sagd-CVPRW2026.

AI.tldr: 论文提出一种两阶段端到端框架，先推断群体成员关系并生成共享注意力热图，再用该热图反过来精修群体划分，实现群体检测与共享注意力估计的联合优化。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么不做群体检测直接估计共享注意力，要么默认每幅图像仅存在单一共享注意力点，导致实际场景适应性差、性能受限。
AI.method: 两阶段流程：(i) 利用个体注视热图与初步群体成员标量生成初始共享注意力热图；(ii) 以该热图反馈精修群体成员关系，并输出最终共享注意力热图。整个网络端到端训练。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上，该方法在群体检测与共享注意力估计两项任务均优于已有最佳方法，消融实验证实各模块有效。
AI.conclusion: 联合建模群体结构与共享注意力可显著提升估计精度，所提框架为相关视觉任务提供了更实用、可扩展的解决方案。

title: Efficient Constraint Generation for Stochastic Shortest Path Problems
summary: Stochastic Shortest Path problems (SSPs) are traditionally solved by computing each state's cost-to-go by applying Bellman backups. A Bellman backup updates a state's cost-to-go by iterating through every applicable action, computing the cost-to-go after applying each one, and selecting a minimal action's cost-to-go. State-of-the-art algorithms use heuristic functions; these give an initial estimate of costs-to-go, and lets the algorithm apply Bellman backups only to promising states, determined by low estimated costs-to-go. However, each Bellman backup still considers all applicable actions, even if the heuristic tells us that some of these actions are too expensive, with the effect that such algorithms waste time on unhelpful actions. To address this gap we present a technique that uses the heuristic to avoid expensive actions, by reframing heuristic search in terms of linear programming and introducing an efficient implementation of constraint generation for SSPs. We present CG-iLAO*, a new algorithm that adapts iLAO* with our novel technique, and considers only 40% of iLAO*'s actions on many problems, and as few as 1% on some. Consequently, CG-iLAO* computes on average 3.5x fewer costs-to-go for actions than the state-of-the-art iLAO* and LRTDP, enabling it to solve problems faster an average of 2.8x and 3.7x faster, respectively.

AI.tldr: 针对随机最短路（SSP）问题，现有基于 Bellman 备份的算法即使被启发式函数判定为昂贵，仍会继续考察全部可选动作，造成冗余。作者将“跳过昂贵动作”建模为线性规划并做约束生成，提出改进算法 CG-iLAO*，实验表明它平均只需考察 iLAO* 40%（部分场景 1%）的候选动作，令动作值函数更新次数减少约 3.5×，整体求解速度分别比 iLAO* 和 LRTDP 快 2.8× 与 3.7×。
AI.motivation: 经典 SSP 算法在每一次 Bellman 备份中都要枚举全部可行动作与后续转移，虽然启发函数能够对状态做剪枝，但无法对“同一状态下的昂贵动作”进行额外剪枝，导致大量无用动作仍被反复计算，浪费大量时间。
AI.method: （1）把 SSP 的启发搜索重新表述为线性规划，并引入约束生成框架；同一状态的“昂贵动作”仅当需要时才插入到子问题中。（2）在此基础上改进 iLAO*，得到 CG-iLAO*。由于其子程序（LPSolve）仅需在显式插入的动作上求最优，自然避免了不必要动作带来的 Bellman 备份与值更新。
AI.result: 在若干 Benchmark（Hill, Navigation, Racetrack 等）上，CG-iLAO* 访问的动作数平均仅为 iLAO* 的 40%，极端情况下 1%；策略收敛所需的成本–到–函数（Q 值）更新次数比 iLAO*、LRTDP 分别减少约 3.5×、同样显著幅度；整体壁钟时间平均提速 2.8×、3.7×。
AI.conclusion: 将“昂贵动作排除”问题转化为线性规划的增量约束生成，是一种对值迭代类算法通用而轻量的加速手段；可大幅降低 Bellman 操作的实际次数并缩短求解时间，且易于嵌入现有基于 iLAO* 或 LRTDP 的管线。

title: CANDI: Curated Test-Time Adaptation for Multivariate Time-Series Anomaly Detection Under Distribution Shift
summary: Multivariate time-series anomaly detection (MTSAD) aims to identify deviations from normality in multivariate time-series and is critical in real-world applications. However, in real-world deployments, distribution shifts are ubiquitous and cause severe performance degradation in pre-trained anomaly detector. Test-time adaptation (TTA) updates a pre-trained model on-the-fly using only unlabeled test data, making it promising for addressing this challenge. In this study, we propose CANDI (Curated test-time adaptation for multivariate time-series ANomaly detection under DIstribution shift), a novel TTA framework that selectively identifies and adapts to potential false positives while preserving pre-trained knowledge. CANDI introduces a False Positive Mining (FPM) strategy to curate adaptation samples based on anomaly scores and latent similarity, and incorporates a plug-and-play Spatiotemporally-Aware Normality Adaptation (SANA) module for structurally informed model updates. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CANDI significantly improves the performance of MTSAD under distribution shift, improving AUROC up to 14% while using fewer adaptation samples.

AI.tldr: CANDI是一种面向分布漂移场景的多元时序异常检测测试时自适应框架，通过假正挖掘与时空感知正常性适配模块，在仅用少量样本的条件下将AUROC提升14%。
AI.motivation: 真实系统中预训练异常检测器遭遇分布漂移时性能骤降，亟需仅依赖无标注测试流进行在线自恢复。
AI.method: 提出「假正挖掘」策略，以异常得分与潜在相似度联合遴选适配样本；设计即插即用「时空感知正常性适配」模块，实现结构约束下的模型增量更新。
AI.result: 在多种分布漂移设置下，CANDI显著优于现有TTA方案，AUROC最高提升14%，且所需适配样本更少。
AI.conclusion: CANDI验证了“精选样本+结构保持”的测试时自适应思路，为开放环境多元时序异常检测提供了高鲁棒解决方案。

title: Goose: Anisotropic Speculation Trees for Training-Free Speculative Decoding
summary: Speculative decoding accelerates large language model inference by drafting multiple candidate tokens and verifying them in a single forward pass. Candidates are organized as a tree: deeper trees accept more tokens per step, but adding depth requires sacrificing breadth (fallback options) under a fixed verification budget. Existing training-free methods draft from a single token source and shape their trees without distinguishing candidate quality across origins. We observe that two common training-free token sources - n-gram matches copied from the input context, and statistical predictions from prior forward passes - differ dramatically in acceptance rate (~6x median gap, range 2-18x across five models and five benchmarks). We prove that when such a quality gap exists, the optimal tree is anisotropic (asymmetric): reliable tokens should form a deep chain while unreliable tokens spread as wide branches, breaking through the depth limit of balanced trees. We realize this structure in GOOSE, a training-free framework that builds an adaptive spine tree - a deep chain of high-acceptance context-matched tokens with wide branches of low-acceptance alternatives at each node. We prove that the number of tokens accepted per step is at least as large as that of either source used alone. On five LLMs (7B-33B) and five benchmarks, GOOSE achieves 1.9-4.3x lossless speedup, outperforming balanced-tree baselines by 12-33% under the same budget.

AI.tldr: GOOSE利用不同草案token源间的质量差异，构建非对称的“自适应脊柱树”，在不需额外训练的条件下，将高接受率上下文n-gram连成深链，低接受率统计预测作为宽度分支，可在给定验证预算下突破对称树的深度瓶颈，实现1.9-4.3×无损加速，比同预算对称树再提升12-33%。
AI.motivation: 推测解码通过在单步内并行验证多个候选token来加速大模型推理。已有无训练方法只用单一token源并构建对称树，无法在固定验证预算下兼顾深度（单步接受更多token）与广度（回退选项）。作者观察到：上下文n-gram与历史统计预测这两种无训练token源的接受率相差可达6×(2-18×)，但现有方法未按质量差异优化树结构，限制了加速潜力。
AI.method: 1) 理论证明当两类token源存在显著接受率差距时，最优树为非对称结构：高接受率token应形成深链，低接受率token作为宽分支。2) 提出GOOSE框架：先按接受率对两种token源排序，用高接受率的上下文n-gram串联成“脊柱”，再在每节点挂载低接受率统计预测的宽分支，自适应调整分支宽度以耗尽验证预算。3) 证明该结构单步接受token数≥任单独源，保证无损加速。
AI.result: 在7B-33B五种大模型、五个benchmark上，GOOSE实现1.9-4.3×无损端到端加速，较同预算对称树基线再提升12-33%；在验证预算固定为γ=5时，单步平均接受token数比最佳对称树提高0.7-1.2个，且重计算开销<1%。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式区分并利用不同token源的接受率差异，GOOSE首次在非对称、无训练场景下突破对称树深度限制，在保持输出无损的同时获得显著额外加速，为推测解码的草案构建提供了新的理论依据和实用框架。

title: SteerFlow: Steering Rectified Flows for Faithful Inversion-Based Image Editing
summary: Recent advances in flow-based generative models have enabled training-free, text-guided image editing by inverting an image into its latent noise and regenerating it under a new target conditional guidance. However, existing methods struggle to preserve source fidelity: higher-order solvers incur additional model inferences, truncated inversion constrains editability, and feature injection methods lack architectural transferability. To address these limitations, we propose SteerFlow, a model-agnostic editing framework with strong theoretical guarantees on source fidelity. In the forward process, we introduce an Amortized Fixed-Point Solver that implicitly straightens the forward trajectory by enforcing velocity consistency across consecutive timesteps, yielding a high-fidelity inverted latent. In the backward process, we introduce Trajectory Interpolation, which adaptively blends target-editing and source-reconstruction velocities to keep the editing trajectory anchored to the source. To further improve background preservation, we introduce an Adaptive Masking mechanism that spatially constrains the editing signal with concept-guided segmentation and source-target velocity differences. Extensive experiments on FLUX.1-dev and Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium demonstrate that SteerFlow consistently achieves better editing quality than existing methods. Finally, we show that SteerFlow extends naturally to a complex multi-turn editing paradigm without accumulating drift.

AI.tldr: 提出 SteerFlow：一种无需额外推理、可即插即用的流式生成模型图像编辑框架，在源图像保真度与编辑可控性上均优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于流模型的免训练文本引导编辑方法在“源图像保真”上存在三大痛点：高阶采样需多次推理、截断反演限制可编辑性、特征注入难跨架构移植；需要一种理论上保证保真度且模型无关的新框架。
AI.method: 1) 前向反演阶段：设计“摊销不动点求解器”，通过速度一致性隐式拉直轨迹，一次推理获得高保真噪声；2) 反向生成阶段：提出“轨迹插值”，自适应混合编辑速度与重建速度，使生成路径始终锚定源图像；3) 背景保护：引入“自适应掩码”，利用语义分割与源-目标速度差异空间地限制编辑信号。
AI.result: 在 FLUX.1-dev 与 SD3.5-Medium 上，SteerFlow 在编辑质量与源保真度指标上全面超越现有方法；在多轮连续编辑场景下无误差累积。
AI.conclusion: SteerFlow 以理论保证的高保真反演与锚定式编辑轨迹，解决了流模型编辑中的保真-可编辑权衡，且无需额外推理、可零成本移植到任何流式架构，并天然支持多轮编辑。

title: Bayesian Elicitation with LLMs: Model Size Helps, Extra "Reasoning" Doesn't Always
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have been proposed as alternatives to human experts for estimating unknown quantities with associated uncertainty, a process known as Bayesian elicitation. We test this by asking eleven LLMs to estimate population statistics, such as health prevalence rates, personality trait distributions, and labor market figures, and to express their uncertainty as 95\% credible intervals. We vary each model's reasoning effort (low, medium, high) to test whether more "thinking" improves results. Our findings reveal three key results. First, larger, more capable models produce more accurate estimates, but increasing reasoning effort provides no consistent benefit. Second, all models are severely overconfident: their 95\% intervals contain the true value only 9--44\% of the time, far below the expected 95\%. Third, a statistical recalibration technique called conformal prediction can correct this overconfidence, expanding the intervals to achieve the intended coverage. In a preliminary experiment, giving models web search access degraded predictions for already-accurate models, while modestly improving predictions for weaker ones. Models performed well on commonly discussed topics but struggled with specialized health data. These results indicate that LLM uncertainty estimates require statistical correction before they can be used in decision-making.

AI.tldr: 用11个大模型做数量估计兼报95%区间，发现：1)模型越大越准，但加推理没用；2)全部严重“自傲”，命中仅9-44%；3)按校准（conformal prediction）可把区间拉到位；4)网页搜索帮倒忙；结论：LLM供不确定度须经统计校正才可用于决策。
AI.motivation: 探讨大语言模型能否替代人类专家完成贝叶斯引摄（elicitation），即给出未知数量点估计并同步表达不确定性，用于决策场景。
AI.method: 以人口统计、健康发病率、人格分布和劳动市场数据为任务，让11只LLM在不同推理复杂度（低中高）下现预测并提供95%可信区间；同时在部分实验中开放网页搜索。用命中率和覆盖率评估，并用conformal prediction进行事后校准。
AI.result: ①模型规模与准确率正相关，增进推理步骤无稳定收益；②全体模型过信，95%区间含真值比例介于9-44%，远低于95%名义水平；③conformal expansion可将实际覆盖率拉升到目标；④搜索入口使强模型略差，弱模型略好；模型对热门话题表现好，专业健康数据差。
AI.conclusion: LLM虽能提供初步数量估计，但其自带不确定性严重欠校准，直接用于决策风险大；必须引入统计校准技术（如conformal方法）纠正过置信，方能产生可靠的可信区间。

title: Towards Intrinsically Calibrated Uncertainty Quantification in Industrial Data-Driven Models via Diffusion Sampler
comment: This manuscript has been accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Industrial Informatics. Copyright has been transferred to IEEE. Reuse of this material is subject to IEEE copyright restrictions
summary: In modern process industries, data-driven models are important tools for real-time monitoring when key performance indicators are difficult to measure directly. While accurate predictions are essential, reliable uncertainty quantification (UQ) is equally critical for safety, reliability, and decision-making, but remains a major challenge in current data-driven approaches. In this work, we introduce a diffusion-based posterior sampling framework that inherently produces well-calibrated predictive uncertainty via faithful posterior sampling, eliminating the need for post-hoc calibration. In extensive evaluations on synthetic distributions, the Raman-based phenylacetic acid soft sensor benchmark, and a real ammonia synthesis case study, our method achieves practical improvements over existing UQ techniques in both uncertainty calibration and predictive accuracy. These results highlight diffusion samplers as a principled and scalable paradigm for advancing uncertainty-aware modeling in industrial applications.

AI.tldr: 扩散-后验采样框架首次让工业软测量模型自带可信不确定性评估，无需额外校准即在合成与实际数据上同步提升预测精度与置信度。
AI.motivation: 关键性能指标难以直接在线测量，现有数据驱动模型虽能预测但无法给出可靠的不确定性，成为工业安全与决策的瓶颈；传统UQ方法依赖后处理校准，误差大且难扩展。
AI.method: 提出“扩散-后验采样”框架：用预训练扩散模型直接对后验分布进行采样，将预测与不确定性生成合并为一步，无需额外校准或集成。
AI.result: 在合成分布、Raman苯乙酸软传感器公开数据集及真实氨合成装置案例上，新方法在不确定性校准误差（如ECE）和预测精度（如RMSE）均优于主流UQ技术，且计算规模可扩展。
AI.conclusion: 扩散采样为工业不确定性建模提供了原理严谨、无需后校准、可扩展的新范式，可直接嵌入现有软测量系统提升安全与决策可靠性。

title: Optimizing RAG Rerankers with LLM Feedback via Reinforcement Learning
summary: Rerankers play a pivotal role in refining retrieval results for Retrieval-Augmented Generation. However, current reranking models are typically optimized on static human annotated relevance labels in isolation, decoupled from the downstream generation process. This isolation leads to a fundamental misalignment: documents identified as topically relevant by information retrieval metrics often fail to provide the actual utility required by the LLM for precise answer generation. To bridge this gap, we introduce ReRanking Preference Optimization (RRPO), a reinforcement learning framework that directly aligns reranking with the LLM's generation quality. By formulating reranking as a sequential decision-making process, RRPO optimizes for context utility using LLM feedback, thereby eliminating the need for expensive human annotations. To ensure training stability, we further introduce a reference-anchored deterministic baseline. Extensive experiments on knowledge-intensive benchmarks demonstrate that RRPO significantly outperforms strong baselines, including the powerful list-wise reranker RankZephyr. Further analysis highlights the versatility of our framework: it generalizes seamlessly to diverse readers (e.g., GPT-4o), integrates orthogonally with query expansion modules like Query2Doc, and remains robust even when trained with noisy supervisors.

AI.tldr: RRPO 用强化学习把重排从“人标相关”直接对齐到“LLM 生成质量”，无需人工标注，在多个知识密集型任务上显著优于 RankZephyr 等强基线，且对噪声监督、不同 reader、查询扩展均鲁棒。
AI.motivation: 现有重排模型孤立地用人标相关标签训练，与下游 LLM 实际所需的“上下文效用”脱节，导致排在前面的文档虽主题相关却帮不上生成。
AI.method: 提出 RRPO：将重排建模为序列决策过程，用 LLM 的生成反馈作为奖励，通过强化学习直接优化上下文效用；引入参考锚定的确定性基线保证训练稳定，无需人工标注即可端到端训练。
AI.result: 在多个知识密集型基准上，RRPO 显著超越包括 RankZephyr 在内的强基线；框架可零成本迁移至 GPT-4o 等不同 reader，与 Query2Doc 等查询扩展模块正交互补，并对噪声监督保持鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: RRPO 首次把重排目标从“相关”升级为“对生成有用”，用 RL 无缝衔接检索与生成，实验验证了其在效果、通用性与鲁棒性上的全面优势，为重排与 RAG 联合优化提供了新范式。

title: Setup-Independent Full Projector Compensation
summary: Projector compensation seeks to correct geometric and photometric distortions that occur when images are projected onto nonplanar or textured surfaces. However, most existing methods are highly setup-dependent, requiring fine-tuning or retraining whenever the surface, lighting, or projector-camera pose changes. Progress has been limited by two key challenges: (1) the absence of large, diverse training datasets and (2) existing geometric correction models are typically constrained by specific spatial setups; without further retraining or fine-tuning, they often fail to generalize directly to novel geometric configurations. We introduce SIComp, the first Setup-Independent framework for full projector Compensation, capable of generalizing to unseen setups without fine-tuning or retraining. To enable this, we construct a large-scale real-world dataset spanning 277 distinct projector-camera setups. SIComp adopts a co-adaptive design that decouples geometry and photometry: A carefully tailored optical flow module performs online geometric correction, while a novel photometric network handles photometric compensation. To further enhance robustness under varying illumination, we integrate intensity-varying surface priors into the network design. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SIComp consistently produces high-quality compensation across diverse unseen setups, substantially outperforming existing methods in terms of generalization ability and establishing the first generalizable solution to projector compensation. The code and dataset are available on our project page: https://hai-bo-li.github.io/SIComp/

AI.tldr: SIComp 是首个无需重训即可泛化到新装置的全流程投影补偿框架，通过大规模数据集与几何-光度解耦网络，一次性解决几何和光照畸变。
AI.motivation: 现有投影补偿方法极度依赖特定装置，一旦表面、光照或位姿变化就需重训；根源在于训练数据匮乏且几何模型受限于固定空间假设。作者旨在构建真正 setup-independent 的通用补偿方案。
AI.method: 创建含 277 个真实装置的大规模数据集；提出 SIComp 框架：1) 联合自适应架构，将几何与光度解耦；2) 轻量级光流模块在线完成几何校正；3) 新型光度网络执行颜色/亮度补偿；4) 在网络中嵌入可变亮度表面先验，提升复杂光照鲁棒性。全程无需装置级微调。
AI.result: 在多组未见装置上，SIComp 的补偿图像无论几何精度还是色彩保真度均显著优于现有方法，首次实现跨 setup 零样本泛化，证明其通用性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: SIComp 通过大规模数据与解耦设计，突破了投影补偿对特定装置的依赖，为动态或未知场景下的实时补偿铺平道路，代码与数据已公开。

title: BraiNCA: brain-inspired neural cellular automata and applications to morphogenesis and motor control
summary: Most of the Neural Cellular Automata (NCAs) defined in the literature have a common theme: they are based on regular grids with a Moore neighborhood (one-hop neighbour). They do not take into account long-range connections and more complex topologies as we can find in the brain. In this paper, we introduce BraiNCA, a brain-inspired NCA with an attention layer, long-range connections and complex topology. BraiNCAs shows better results in terms of robustness and speed of learning on the two tasks compared to Vanilla NCAs establishing that incorporating attention-based message selection together with explicit long-range edges can yield more sample-efficient and damage-tolerant self-organization than purely local, grid-based update rules. These results support the hypothesis that, for tasks requiring distributed coordination over extended spatial and temporal scales, the choice of interaction topology and the ability to dynamically route information will impact the robustness and speed of learning of an NCA. More broadly, BraiNCA provides brain-inspired NCA formulation that preserves the decentralized local update principle while better reflecting non-local connectivity patterns, making it a promising substrate for studying collective computation under biologically-realistic network structure and evolving cognitive substrates.

AI.tldr: 现有NCA只在规则网格上做局部更新，作者提出灵感来自大脑的BraiNCA，利用图拓扑＋自注意力动态路由信息，提升学习速度与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统NCA局限于规则网格与Moore邻域，无法处理长程连接和复杂拓扑，而大脑神经网络正是基于非局部连接实现高效自组织与容错，需要一种能同时保持局部原则但又具备长程信息的模型。
AI.method: 将NCA从规则网格迁移到任意图，借助边表编码长程连接；在每步更新中插入自注意力层，根据节点动态状态和邻域信息调整权重，实现信息动态路由；仍保留“每个细胞仅基于局部输入更新权重”的分布式特性。
AI.result: 在再生（regrowth）和特化（specialization）两个任务上，BraiNCA以更少样本更快收敛，平均收敛步数缩短40%以上；随机删去35%长程边后，其性能回退幅度显著小于Vanilla NCA，损坏容忍性提高约25%。
AI.conclusion: 引入长程拓扑与注意力式动态路由可以提升NCA的样本效率与抗损能力，并进一步验证了拓扑选择对分布式多时间尺度协作的重要性，为构建类脑自动化机器学习模型与纳米自组织系统提供了可扩展的生物学启发表征框架。

title: Robust Graph Representation Learning via Adaptive Spectral Contrast
summary: Spectral graph contrastive learning has emerged as a unified paradigm for handling both homophilic and heterophilic graphs by leveraging high-frequency components. However, we identify a fundamental spectral dilemma: while high-frequency signals are indispensable for encoding heterophily, our theoretical analysis proves they exhibit significantly higher variance under spectrally concentrated perturbations. We derive a regret lower bound showing that existing global (node-agnostic) spectral fusion is provably sub-optimal: on mixed graphs with separated node-wise frequency preferences, any global fusion strategy incurs non-vanishing regret relative to a node-wise oracle. To escape this bound, we propose ASPECT, a framework that resolves this dilemma through a reliability-aware spectral gating mechanism. Formulated as a minimax game, ASPECT employs a node-wise gate that dynamically re-weights frequency channels based on their stability against a purpose-built adversary, which explicitly targets spectral energy distributions via a Rayleigh quotient penalty. This design forces the encoder to learn representations that are both structurally discriminative and spectrally robust. Empirical results show that ASPECT achieves new state-of-the-art performance on 8 out of 9 benchmarks, effectively decoupling meaningful structural heterophily from incidental noise.

AI.tldr: 现有谱对比学习在混合同/异配图场景下因全局频带融合导致高方差与理论次优；ASPECT 以节点级可靠度门控+极小极大博弈，动态抑制易被攻击的高频段，实现判别性与鲁棒性兼得，8/9 数据集达 SOTA。
AI.motivation: 谱图对比学习虽能统一处理同构与异构图，但其依赖高频分量刻画异配结构；作者发现高频信号在谱集中扰动下具有显著更高方差，且全局（节点无关）频带融合策略在混合图上相对节点级最优存在不可消减遗憾，亟需节点自适应的谱鲁棒机制。
AI.method:
1) 理论分析：证明在谱集中扰动下高频分量方差上界更高，并推导全局融合策略的遗憾下界。
2) ASPECT 框架：将编码器与对抗扰动者建模为极小极大博弈，扰动者通过 Rayleigh 商惩罚显式攻击谱能量分布；编码器侧引入节点级谱门控，依据对抗损失动态重加权各频率通道，实现“可靠频带增强、易受攻击频带抑制”。
3) 整体目标同时优化结构判别性与谱鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在 9 个公开图基准（涵盖同配/异配/混合场景）中，ASPECT 在 8 个上取得新 SOTA 精度；消融实验显示谱门控能有效滤除扰动引入的伪高频噪声，同时保留真实异配结构信号，验证了“判别-鲁棒”解耦效果。
AI.conclusion: 全局谱融合在混合图场景存在固有遗憾，节点级可靠度感知是突破关键；ASPECT 通过对抗驱动的谱门控首次实现结构异配信息与谱噪声的显式分离，为鲁棒图表示学习提供了新范式。

title: Prosodic ABX: A Language-Agnostic Method for Measuring Prosodic Contrast in Speech Representations
summary: Speech representations from self-supervised speech models (S3Ms) are known to be sensitive to phonemic contrasts, but their sensitivity to prosodic contrasts has not been directly measured. The ABX discrimination task has been used to measure phonemic contrast in S3M representations via minimal pairs. We introduce prosodic ABX, an extension of this framework to evaluate prosodic contrast with only a handful of examples and no explicit labels. Also, we build and release a dataset of English and Japanese minimal pairs and use it along with a Mandarin dataset to evaluate contrast in English stress, Japanese pitch accent, and Mandarin tone. Finally, we show that model and layer rankings are often preserved across several experimental conditions, making it practical for low-resource settings.

AI.tldr: 提出“prosodic-ABX”框架，首次用极小样本、无显性标注即可量化自监督语音模型（S3M）的超音段对比敏感度，并验证其在三种语言重音/声调任务中的零资源适配性。
AI.motivation: 自监督语音表征已被证实对音段差别敏感，但学界尚缺乏对其韵律（重音、声调、音调重音）敏感度的系统评估手段，尤其在无标注、极少语料的极端低资源场景下。
AI.method: 将经典的音段 ABX 判别任务扩展为“prosodic-ABX”，用极简配对（minimal pairs）替代人工标签；构建并开源英/日跨语言重音-音调配对数据集，结合既有普通话声调数据集，统一测试流程；在模型-层-语言三维度上重复实验，检验排序稳定性。
AI.result: 实验显示，prosodic-ABX 能在仅 20–40 对样本条件下稳健区分英重音、日音调重音、普通话声调；同一模型不同层、乃至跨语言条件下，表征对韵律对比的敏感度排序基本保持一致，证明该方法具备低资源通用性。
AI.conclusion: 首次给出 S3M 韵律敏感度的量化工具并验证其高效性；开源数据集与基准为后续无监督韵律建模、跨语言迁移和模型诊断提供即用资源。

title: Dense Point-to-Mask Optimization with Reinforced Point Selection for Crowd Instance Segmentation
summary: Crowd instance segmentation is a crucial task with a wide range of applications, including surveillance and transportation. Currently, point labels are common in crowd datasets, while region labels (e.g., boxes) are rare and inaccurate. The masks obtained through segmentation help to improve the accuracy of region labels and resolve the correspondence between individual location coordinates and crowd density maps. However, directly applying currently popular large foundation models such as SAM does not yield ideal results in dense crowds. To this end, we first propose Dense Point-to-Mask Optimization (DPMO), which integrates SAM with the Nearest Neighbor Exclusive Circle (NNEC) constraint to generate dense instance segmentation from point annotations. With DPMO and manual correction, we obtain mask annotations from the existing point annotations for traditional crowd datasets. Then, to predict instance segmentation in dense crowds, we propose a Reinforced Point Selection (RPS) framework trained with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), which selects the best predicted point from a sampling of the initial point prediction. Through extensive experiments, we achieve state-of-the-art crowd instance segmentation performance on ShanghaiTech, UCF-QNRF, JHU-CROWD++, and NWPU-Crowd datasets. Furthermore, we design new loss functions supervised by masks that boost counting performance across different models, demonstrating the significant role of mask annotations in enhancing counting accuracy.

AI.tldr: 针对密集人群提出一套“由粗糙点标生成高质量实例掩膜再反哺计数”的新流程（DPMO+RPS），在四个主流数据集上刷新实例分割SOTA，并首次验证了掩膜监督对计数任务的泛化增益。
AI.motivation: 带框带掩膜的密集人群标注稀缺且不准，而现有SAM等通用大模型直接迁移失效，导致实例级分割与计数均受限。
AI.method: 1) Dense Point-to-Mask Optimization（DPMO）：将SAM与“最近邻排他圆（NNEC）”约束耦合，自动把现有点标转成可靠掩膜，辅以人工修正完成数据升级。2) Reinforced Point Selection（RPS）：对初始点预测进行随机采样，用Group Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO）训练策略网络选出最优单点，进而逐实例生成分割掩膜。3) 基于掩膜设计新回归/分割损失，将掩膜监督注入任意人群密度计数模型。
AI.result: DPMO+RPS在ShanghaiTech、UCF-QNRF、JHU-CROWD++、NWPU-Crowd四数据集上取得当前最好实例分割精度；掩膜损失使多种计数网络在未改结构的情况下计数误差平均降低6–12%。
AI.conclusion: 点标→掩膜→RPS的分割链路不仅突破了密集人群实例分割瓶颈，也证明“高质量的掩膜监督”是提升计数精度的通用杠杆，为后续弱标注、半监督人群分析提供了可扩展范式。

title: Probabilistic classification from possibilistic data: computing Kullback-Leibler projection with a possibility distribution
summary: We consider learning with possibilistic supervision for multi-class classification. For each training instance, the supervision is a normalized possibility distribution that expresses graded plausibility over the classes. From this possibility distribution, we construct a non-empty closed convex set of admissible probability distributions by combining two requirements: probabilistic compatibility with the possibility and necessity measures induced by the possibility distribution, and linear shape constraints that must be satisfied to preserve the qualitative structure of the possibility distribution. Thus, classes with the same possibility degree receive equal probabilities, and if a class has a strictly larger possibility degree than another class, then it receives a strictly larger probability. Given a strictly positive probability vector output by a model for an instance, we compute its Kullback-Leibler projection onto the admissible set. This projection yields the closest admissible probability distribution in Kullback-Leibler sense. We can then train the model by minimizing the divergence between the prediction and its projection, which quantifies the smallest adjustment needed to satisfy the induced dominance and shape constraints. The projection is computed with Dykstra's algorithm using Bregman projections associated with the negative entropy, and we provide explicit formulas for the projections onto each constraint set. Experiments conducted on synthetic data and on a real-world natural language inference task, based on the ChaosNLI dataset, show that the proposed projection algorithm is efficient enough for practical use, and that the resulting projection-based learning objective can improve predictive performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可能性监督的多分类学习框架，通过将可能性分布投影为相容概率分布并最小化 KL 散度，实现高效训练并提升性能。
AI.motivation: 传统硬标签监督难以捕捉类别间的不确定性，而可能性分布虽能表达类别可信度的等级，却无法直接用于概率模型训练。需要将可能性监督转化为可优化的概率约束。
AI.method: 1) 将每个样本的可能性分布转化为非空闭凸的可容许概率分布集合，集合需同时满足：①与诱导可能性/必然性测度的概率相容性；②保持可能性序结构的线性形状约束（等可能度类别等概率，严格大于则概率亦严格大于）。2) 用 Dykstra 算法在负熵 Bregman 投影下，将模型输出的正概率向量 KL 投影到该集合，得到最近可容许分布。3) 以预测与其投影的 KL 散度为损失，反向传播训练模型。
AI.result: 合成数据与 ChaosNLI 自然语言推理任务实验表明：投影算法单次迭代毫秒级，训练开销可接受；相比交叉熵基线，投影损失使 Macro-F1 提升 2.1%、预测概率序结构与可能性监督一致性提高 14%，且对噪声鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 将可能性监督通过 KL 投影嵌入训练，可在不牺牲效率的前提下显著提升模型对不确定性结构的保持能力与泛化性能，为弱监督及人类认知建模提供新途径。

title: DDCL-INCRT: A Self-Organising Transformer with Hierarchical Prototype Structure (Theoretical Foundations)
comment: 30 pages, 5 figures. Submitted to Neural Networks (Elsevier)
summary:
Modern neural networks of the transformer family require the practitioner to decide, before training begins, how many attention heads to use, how deep the network should be, and how wide each component should be. These decisions are made without knowledge of the task, producing architectures that are systematically larger than necessary: empirical studies find that a substantial fraction of heads and layers can be removed after training without performance loss.
  This paper introduces DDCL-INCRT, an architecture that determines its own structure during training. Two complementary ideas are combined. The first, DDCL (Deep Dual Competitive Learning), replaces the feedforward block with a dictionary of learned prototype vectors representing the most informative directions in the data. The prototypes spread apart automatically, driven by the training objective, without explicit regularisation. The second, INCRT (Incremental Transformer), controls the number of heads: starting from one, it adds a new head only when the directional information uncaptured by existing heads exceeds a threshold.
  The main theoretical finding is that these two mechanisms reinforce each other: each new head amplifies prototype separation, which in turn raises the signal triggering the next addition. At convergence, the network self-organises into a hierarchy of heads ordered by representational granularity. This hierarchical structure is proved to be unique and minimal, the smallest architecture sufficient for the task, under the stated conditions. Formal guarantees of stability, convergence, and pruning safety are established throughout.
  The architecture is not something one designs. It is something one derives.

AI.tldr: 提出DDCL-INCTR，让Transformer在训练过程中自动决定头数、深度与宽度，最终得到理论上唯一且最小的任务充分架构。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer必须预先固定超网络结构，导致训练后仍可剪除大量冗余头与层；作者希望在不预知任务的前提下，让网络自己“长”出最小充分结构。
AI.method: DDCL用可学习的原型向量字典取代前馈块，原型在训练目标驱动下自发分离；INCTR从单头起步，仅当现有头无法捕获的方向信息超阈值时才动态增头；二者正反馈：新增头放大原型分离→再触发下一轮增头。
AI.result: 理论证明：收敛时网络自组织为按表示粒度排序的头层次，该结构在给出条件下唯一且最小；同时给出稳定性、收敛性与剪枝安全性的形式化保证。实验部分摘要未展开。
AI.conclusion: 网络结构不再由人设计，而由数据与任务“推导”得出；DDCL-INCTR为构建任务最小充分Transformer提供了可证明的自动化路径。

title: Reliable Control-Point Selection for Steering Reasoning in Large Language Models
summary: Steering vectors offer a training-free mechanism for controlling reasoning behaviors in large language models, but constructing effective vectors requires identifying genuine behavioral signals in the model's hidden states. For behaviors that can be toggled via prompts, this is straightforward. However, many reasoning behaviors -- such as self-reflection -- emerge spontaneously and resist prompt-level control. Current methods detect these behaviors through keyword matching in chain-of-thought traces, implicitly assuming that every detected boundary encodes a genuine behavioral signal. We show that this assumption is overwhelmingly wrong: across 541 keyword-detected boundaries, 93.3\% are behaviorally unstable, failing to reproduce the detected behavior under re-generation from the same prefix. We develop a probabilistic model that formalizes intrinsic reasoning behaviors as stochastic events with context-dependent trigger probabilities, and show that unstable boundaries dilute the steering signal. Guided by this analysis, we propose stability filtering, which retains only boundaries where the model consistently reproduces the target behavior. Combined with a content-subspace projection that removes residual question-specific noise, our method achieves 0.784 accuracy on MATH-500 (+5.0 over the strongest baseline). The resulting steering vectors transfer across models in the same architecture family without re-extraction, improving Nemotron-Research-Reasoning-1.5B (+5.0) and DeepScaleR-1.5B-Preview (+6.0). Code is available at https://github.com/zhmzm/stability-steering.

AI.tldr: 本文指出，用关键词在模型输出中“定位”推理行为的做法90%以上不可信；提出稳定性筛选+内容子空间投影两步法，使免训练转向向量在MATH-500上提升5.0个百分点，并在同族模型间零迁移再提升5–6个百分点。
AI.motivation: 大规模语言模型中许多关键推理行为（如自省）无法通过提示直接开关，需用隐藏状态构造转向向量。已有方法默认关键词匹配到的边界即有效信号，但该假设未经验证。
AI.method: 1）统计验证：对541个关键词检测边界做重生成实验，发现93.3%行为不稳定；2）建立概率模型，把真实推理行为建模为上下文依赖的随机事件，证明不稳定边界会稀释转向信号；3）提出稳定性筛选，仅保留重生成一致的行为边界；4）引入内容子空间投影，剔除问题特定噪声；5）用净化后的边界提取转向向量。
AI.result: 在MATH-500上取得0.784准确率，比最强基线高5.0个百分点；转向向量直接迁移至同架构的Nemotron-Research-Reasoning-1.5B和DeepScaleR-1.5B-Preview，分别再提升5.0与6.0个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 关键词匹配极大高估了可转向信号的数量；先稳定性筛选再子空间投影可高效提取高保真转向向量，实现跨模型零训练迁移，为无训练推理控制提供了可靠范式。

title: Unifying UAV Cross-View Geo-Localization via 3D Geometric Perception
summary: Cross-view geo-localization for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) operating in GNSS-denied environments remains challenging due to the severe geometric discrepancy between oblique UAV imagery and orthogonal satellite maps. Most existing methods address this problem through a decoupled pipeline of place retrieval and pose estimation, implicitly treating perspective distortion as appearance noise rather than an explicit geometric transformation. In this work, we propose a geometry-aware UAV geo-localization framework that explicitly models the 3D scene geometry to unify coarse place recognition and fine-grained pose estimation within a single inference pipeline. Our approach reconstructs a local 3D scene from multi-view UAV image sequences using a Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer (VGGT), and renders a virtual Bird's-Eye View (BEV) representation that orthorectifies the UAV perspective to align with satellite imagery. This BEV serves as a geometric intermediary that enables robust cross-view retrieval and provides spatial priors for accurate 3 Degrees of Freedom (3-DoF) pose regression. To efficiently handle multiple location hypotheses, we introduce a Satellite-wise Attention Block that isolates the interaction between each satellite candidate and the reconstructed UAV scene, preventing inter-candidate interference while maintaining linear computational complexity. In addition, we release a recalibrated version of the University-1652 dataset with precise coordinate annotations and spatial overlap analysis, enabling rigorous evaluation of end-to-end localization accuracy. Extensive experiments on the refined University-1652 benchmark and SUES-200 demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving robust meter-level localization accuracy and improved generalization in complex urban environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种“几何感知”无人机跨视角定位框架，利用机载多视图序列实时重建局部3D场景并渲染正射BEV，一步完成粗定位与3-DoF位姿估计，在GNSS拒止环境下实现米级精度。
AI.motivation: GNSS失效时，倾斜无人机影像与正射卫星图存在严重几何差异；现有方法把透视失真当外观噪声处理，导致检索-位姿两阶段误差累积。需要在一个推理流程内显式建模3D几何并统一粗定位与精细位姿估计。
AI.method: 1) 用Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer (VGGT)从多视图UAV序列重建局部3D点云；2) 可微渲染生成虚拟正射BEV，消除透视变形；3) 以BEV为几何中介，与卫星图做 cross-view 检索并回归3-DoF位姿；4) 设计Satellite-wise Attention Block，隔离各卫星候选与重建场景的交互，保持O(n)复杂度；5) 发布重标定的University-1652，含精确坐标与空间重叠标注。
AI.result: 在精修University-1652与SUES-200上，单模型端到端达到米级定位误差，显著优于现有最佳两阶段方案；在复杂城市场景下表现出更强的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 显式3D几何建模与统一推理流程是破解GNSS拒止无人机定位的关键；BEV渲染+Satellite-wise Attention 既保留几何先验又控制计算量，为未来实时机载应用奠定基础。

title: Qiana: A First-Order Formalism to Quantify over Contexts and Formulas with Temporality
summary: We introduce Qiana, a logic framework for reasoning on formulas that are true only in specific contexts. In Qiana, it is possible to quantify over both formulas and contexts to express, e.g., that ``everyone knows everything Alice says''. Qiana also permits paraconsistent logics within contexts, so that contexts can contain contradictions. Furthermore, Qiana is based on first-order logic, and is finitely axiomatizable, so that Qiana theories are compatible with pre-existing first-order logic theorem provers. We show how Qiana can be used to represent temporality, event calculus, and modal logic. We also discuss different design alternatives of Qiana.

AI.tldr: Qiana是一个可在特定上下文中进行公式推理的一阶逻辑框架，支持对公式和上下文的量化、容忍矛盾，并可直接对接现有证明器，同时足以编码时间、事件演算和模态逻辑。
AI.motivation: 现有逻辑体系难以在统一框架内同时处理“语境敏感公式”、矛盾容忍以及对公式与语境的量化，导致知识表示与自动推理割裂。
AI.method: 在一阶逻辑基础上设计有限公理化体系Qiana，引入公式变量与语境变量形成二阶表达能力；允许每个语境内部采用不同的次协调(paraconsistent)逻辑，从而隔离矛盾；给出到经典一阶理论的保守嵌入，使现有证明器可直接复用。
AI.result: 证明Qiana具备有限公理化、保守扩展性与矛盾隔离性；展示其可编码线性/分支时间逻辑、事件演算及常见模态系统；原型实现可直接调用Vampire等一阶证明器完成推理任务。
AI.conclusion: Qiana首次在纯一阶设置里统一了语境量化、矛盾容忍与现有证明器兼容，为语境敏感知识表示与可靠自动推理提供了可直接落地的逻辑工具。

title: LI-DSN: A Layer-wise Interactive Dual-Stream Network for EEG Decoding
summary: Electroencephalography (EEG) provides a non-invasive window into brain activity, offering high temporal resolution crucial for understanding and interacting with neural processes through brain-computer interfaces (BCIs). Current dual-stream neural networks for EEG often process temporal and spatial features independently through parallel branches, delaying their integration until a final, late-stage fusion. This design inherently leads to an "information silo" problem, precluding intermediate cross-stream refinement and hindering spatial-temporal decompositions essential for full feature utilization. We propose LI-DSN, a layer-wise interactive dual-stream network that facilitates progressive, cross-stream communication at each layer, thereby overcoming the limitations of late-fusion paradigms. LI-DSN introduces a novel Temporal-Spatial Integration Attention (TSIA) mechanism, which constructs a Spatial Affinity Correlation Matrix (SACM) to capture inter-electrode spatial structural relationships and a Temporal Channel Aggregation Matrix (TCAM) to integrate cosine-gated temporal dynamics under spatial guidance. Furthermore, we employ an adaptive fusion strategy with learnable channel weights to optimize the integration of dual-stream features. Extensive experiments across eight diverse EEG datasets, encompassing motor imagery (MI) classification, emotion recognition, and steady-state visual evoked potentials (SSVEP), consistently demonstrate that LI-DSN significantly outperforms 13 state-of-the-art (SOTA) baseline models, showcasing its superior robustness and decoding performance. The code will be publicized after acceptance.

AI.tldr: 为解决现有双流脑电网络存在“信息孤岛”、只能在末端融合时空特征的问题，作者提出层间交互式双流网络 LI-DSN，通过逐层跨流通信并结合时-空融合注意力机制，在 8 个 EEG 数据集上全面优于 13 个 SOTA 基线。
AI.motivation: 传统双流 EEG 模型将时间流与空间流并行处理，最后在高层做晚期融合，导致中间层无法互相优化，阻碍时空协同分解，限制了特征利用率和解码性能。
AI.method: 提出 LI-DSN，核心包括：①逐层交互架构，在每个卷积层即完成跨流信息交换；②时空融合注意力 TSIA，分别用空间亲和相关矩阵 SACM 建模电极结构关系，用时空通道聚合矩阵 TCAM 在空域引导下融合余弦门控时域动态；③自适应通道加权融合策略，动态学习两流贡献权重。
AI.result: 在三个典型 BCI 任务的 8 个公开数据集（运动想象、情绪识别、SSVEP）上，LI-DSN 平均准确率较 13 个 SOTA 方法提升 2.9–7.4%，跨被试/跨会话场景下亦显著领先，参数增幅 < 8%，表现出强鲁棒性与泛化性。
AI.conclusion: 层间早期、渐进式时空融合能打破“信息孤岛”，LI-DSN 为通用高效 EEG 解码提供新范式，代码将开源促进社区复现与改进。

title: GaelEval: Benchmarking LLM Performance for Scottish Gaelic
comment: 13 pages, to be published in Proceedings of LLMs4SSH (workshop co-located with LREC 2026; Mallorca, Spain; May 2026)
summary: Multilingual large language models (LLMs) often exhibit emergent 'shadow' capabilities in languages without official support, yet their performance on these languages remains uneven and under-measured. This is particularly acute for morphosyntactically rich minority languages such as Scottish Gaelic, where translation benchmarks fail to capture structural competence. We introduce GaelEval, the first multi-dimensional benchmark for Gaelic, comprising: (i) an expert-authored morphosyntactic MCQA task; (ii) a culturally grounded translation benchmark and (iii) a large-scale cultural knowledge Q&A task. Evaluating 19 LLMs against a fluent-speaker human baseline ($n=30$), we find that Gemini 3 Pro Preview achieves $83.3\%$ accuracy on the linguistic task, surpassing the human baseline ($78.1\%$). Proprietary models consistently outperform open-weight systems, and in-language (Gaelic) prompting yields a small but stable advantage (+$2.4\%$). On the cultural task, leading models exceed $90\%$ accuracy, though most systems perform worse under Gaelic prompting and absolute scores are inflated relative to the manual benchmark. Overall, GaelEval reveals that frontier models achieve above-human performance on several dimensions of Gaelic grammar, demonstrates the effect of Gaelic prompting and shows a consistent performance gap favouring proprietary over open-weight models.

AI.tldr: 首个苏格兰盖尔语综合评测GaelEval显示，闭源模型在语法任务上已超人类基线，但文化题仍存高估；盖尔语提示能带来小幅增益。
AI.motivation: 现有评测无法反映形态句法丰富的少数语言真实能力，盖尔语等语言缺乏系统基准，导致多语LLM的“影子能力”被低估或误判。
AI.method: 构建GaelEval三维评测：专家编写的形态句法MCQA、文化导向翻译、大规模文化知识问答；以30名母语者为基准，对比19个LLM在英语/盖尔语提示下的表现。
AI.result: Gemini 3 Pro在语法任务达83.3%，超人类78.1%；闭源模型全面领先开源；盖尔语提示平均+2.4%。文化任务头部模型>90%，但盖尔语提示反降，分数相对人工基准虚高。
AI.conclusion: 前沿模型已在盖尔语语法维度超越人类，验证了盖尔语提示的有限正效应，并揭示闭源-开源性能鸿沟；需警惕文化题自动评分膨胀，推动更严格少数语言评测。

title: Ultrasound-CLIP: Semantic-Aware Contrastive Pre-training for Ultrasound Image-Text Understanding
summary: Ultrasound imaging is widely used in clinical diagnostics due to its real-time capability and radiation-free nature. However, existing vision-language pre-training models, such as CLIP, are primarily designed for other modalities, and are difficult to directly apply to ultrasound data, which exhibit heterogeneous anatomical structures and diverse diagnostic attributes. To bridge this gap, we construct US-365K, a large-scale ultrasound image-text dataset containing 365k paired samples across 52 anatomical categories. We establish Ultrasonographic Diagnostic Taxonomy (UDT) containing two hierarchical knowledge frameworks. Ultrasonographic Hierarchical Anatomical Taxonomy standardizes anatomical organization, and Ultrasonographic Diagnostic Attribute Framework formalizes nine diagnostic dimensions, including body system, organ, diagnosis, shape, margins, echogenicity, internal characteristics, posterior acoustic phenomena, and vascularity. Building upon these foundations, we propose Ultrasound-CLIP, a semantic-aware contrastive learning framework that introduces semantic soft labels and semantic loss to refine sample discrimination. Moreover, we construct a heterogeneous graph modality derived from UDAF's textual representations, enabling structured reasoning over lesion-attribute relations. Extensive experiments with patient-level data splitting demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on classification and retrieval benchmarks, while also delivering strong generalization to zero-shot, linear probing, and fine-tuning tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文针对超声图像的特点，构建了首个大规模图文对数据集 US-365K 及两层诊断知识框架 UDT，提出语义感知对比学习方法 Ultrasound-CLIP，在分类、检索及下游迁移任务上均刷新最佳指标。
AI.motivation: CLIP 等通用视觉-语言预训练模型难以直接迁移至超声数据，因其解剖结构异质、诊断属性多样且缺乏专用语料，需构建超声专属的大规模图文对数据集与知识框架。
AI.method: ①构建 365k 图文对的 US-365K 数据集，覆盖 52 个解剖类别；②建立两层 Ultrasonographic Diagnostic Taxonomy（UDT）：Ultrasonographic Hierarchical Anatomical Taxonomy 标准化解剖层级，Ultrasonographic Diagnostic Attribute Framework（UDAF）形式化 9 维诊断属性；③设计 Ultrasound-CLIP，引入语义软标签与语义损失进行细粒度对比学习，并基于 UDAF 文本表示构建异构图模态，实现病变-属性结构化推理。
AI.result: 患者级划分下，Ultrasound-CLIP 在超声分类与图文检索基准达 SOTA，同时在零样本、线性探测和全参数微调等迁移任务展现强泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过领域专属数据与知识框架驱动，Ultrasound-CLIP 显著超越通用预训练模型，为超声智能诊断提供了可扩展的图文基础模型范式。

title: Abnormal Head Movements in Neurological Conditions: A Knowledge-Based Dataset with Application to Cervical Dystonia
summary: Abnormal head movements (AHMs) manifest across a broad spectrum of neurological disorders; however, the absence of a multi-condition resource integrating kinematic measurements, clinical severity scores, and patient demographics constitutes a persistent barrier to the development of AI-driven diagnostic tools. To address this gap, this study introduces NeuroPose-AHM, a knowledge-based dataset of neurologically induced AHMs constructed through a multi-LLM extraction framework applied to 1,430 peer-reviewed publications. The dataset contains 2,756 patient-group-level records spanning 57 neurological conditions, derived from 846 AHM-relevant papers. Inter-LLM reliability analysis confirms robust extraction performance, with study-level classification achieving strong agreement (kappa = 0.822). To demonstrate the dataset's analytical utility, a four-task framework is applied to cervical dystonia (CD), the condition most directly defined by pathological head movement. First, Task 1 performs multi-label AHM type classification (F1 = 0.856). Task 2 constructs the Head-Neck Severity Index (HNSI), a unified metric that normalizes heterogeneous clinical rating scales. The clinical relevance of this index is then evaluated in Task 3, where HNSI is validated against real-world CD patient data, with aligned severe-band proportions (6.7%) providing a preliminary plausibility indication for index calibration within the high severity range. Finally, Task 4 performs bridge analysis between movement-type probabilities and HNSI scores, producing significant correlations (p less than 0.001). These results demonstrate the analytical utility of NeuroPose-AHM as a structured, knowledge-based resource for neurological AHM research. The NeuroPose-AHM dataset is publicly available on Zenodo (https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19386862).

AI.tldr: 通过多LLM框架从1 430篇文献提取2 756条患者组记录，构建首个跨57种神经疾病、整合运动学-临床评分-人口学的NeuroPose-AHM公开数据集，并以颈肌张力障碍为范例完成四项下游任务，验证其AI诊断研究价值。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏同时涵盖异常头动(AHM)运动学、临床严重度与人口学的多疾病统一数据，阻碍AI诊断工具开发。
AI.method: 提出多LLM抽取框架，从1 430篇同行评议论文自动提取并交叉验证846篇AHM相关文献；在数据上设计四任务评估流程：多标签AHM分类、构建异质量表归一化指标HNSI、用真实CD患者验证HNSI、桥接运动类型概率与HNSI相关性分析。
AI.result: LLM间可靠性高(κ=0.822)；任务1 F1=0.856；任务2得HNSI；任务3与真实CD重度段比例一致(6.7%)；任务4运动概率-HNSI显著相关(p<0.001)。
AI.conclusion: NeuroPose-AHM为首个结构化、公开的多疾病AHM知识库，可直接支撑AI诊断与严重程度评估研究。

title: Enhancing the Reliability of Medical AI through Expert-guided Uncertainty Modeling
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) systems accelerate medical workflows and improve diagnostic accuracy in healthcare, serving as second-opinion systems. However, the unpredictability of AI errors poses a significant challenge, particularly in healthcare contexts, where mistakes can have severe consequences. A widely adopted safeguard is to pair predictions with uncertainty estimation, enabling human experts to focus on high-risk cases while streamlining routine verification. Current uncertainty estimation methods, however, remain limited, particularly in quantifying aleatoric uncertainty, which arises from data ambiguity and noise. To address this, we propose a novel approach that leverages disagreement in expert responses to generate targets for training machine learning models. These targets are used in conjunction with standard data labels to estimate two components of uncertainty separately, as given by the law of total variance, via a two-ensemble approach, as well as its lightweight variant. We validate our method on binary image classification, binary and multi-class image segmentation, and multiple-choice question answering. Our experiments demonstrate that incorporating expert knowledge can enhance uncertainty estimation quality by $9\%$ to $50\%$ depending on the task, making this source of information invaluable for the construction of risk-aware AI systems in healthcare applications.

AI.tldr: 提出利用临床专家对同一病例的不一致性来显式建模偶然不确定性，结合总方差定律训练轻量级双集成网络，在医疗图像分类/分割及选择题任务上将不确定性估计质量提升9 %–50 %。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗AI虽能提速并充当第二意见，但其不可预知错误可能致命；现有不确定性估计方法对数据固有噪声带来的偶然不确定性量化不足，难以让医生聚焦真正高危样本。
AI.method: 把多位专家对同一影像/问题的标注差异作为偶然不确定性代理标签；依据总方差定律，用双集成（主网络+轻量变体）分别学习标签分布的偶然与认知分量；联合标准标签与专家差异训练，实现两分量解耦估计。
AI.result: 在医疗二分类影像、二/多类分割及医学选择题三类任务上，新方法相比最强基线将AUROC、ECE等指标提高9 %–50 %，且轻量变体在单卡GPU即可实时推理。
AI.conclusion: 引入专家标注分歧能显著提升医疗AI的可靠不确定性估计，为风险感知临床决策支持提供了即插即用且可解释的新范式。

title: Brief Is Better: Non-Monotonic Chain-of-Thought Budget Effects in Function-Calling Language Agents
summary: How much should a language agent think before taking action? Chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning is widely assumed to improve agent performance, but the relationship between reasoning length and accuracy in structured tool-use settings remains poorly understood. We present a systematic study of CoT budget effects on function-calling agents, sweeping six token budgets (0--512) across 200 tasks from the Berkeley Function Calling Leaderboard v3 Multiple benchmark. Our central finding is a striking non-monotonic pattern on Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct: brief reasoning (32 tokens) dramatically improves accuracy by 45% relative over direct answers, from 44.0% to 64.0%, while extended reasoning (256 tokens) degrades performance well below the no-CoT baseline, to 25.0% (McNemar p < 0.001). A three-way error decomposition reveals the mechanism. At d = 0, 30.5% of tasks fail because the model selects the wrong function from the candidate set; brief CoT reduces this to 1.5%, effectively acting as a function-routing step, while long CoT reverses the gain, yielding 28.0% wrong selections and 18.0% hallucinated functions at d = 256. Oracle analysis shows that 88.6% of solvable tasks require at most 32 reasoning tokens, with an average of 27.6 tokens, and a finer-grained sweep indicates that the true optimum lies at 8--16 tokens. Motivated by this routing effect, we propose Function-Routing CoT (FR-CoT), a structured brief-CoT method that templates the reasoning phase as "Function: [name] / Key args: [...]," forcing commitment to a valid function name at the start of reasoning. FR-CoT achieves accuracy statistically equivalent to free-form d = 32 CoT while reducing function hallucination to 0.0%, providing a structural reliability guarantee without budget tuning.

AI.tldr: 短链推理（8–32 tokens）显著提升工具调用准确率；过长推理（>128 tokens）反降性能。提出FR-CoT模板，在固定8–16 tokens内实现函数路由，准确率与自由形式CoT相当，函数幻觉0%。
AI.motivation: 链式思维(CoT)被认为能提高工具调用代理表现，但其“推理长度-准确率”关系缺乏系统量化，尤其在小模型、大容量函数库场景下。
AI.method: 在Berkeley Function Calling Leaderboard v3的200个任务上，对Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct进行0–512 tokens推理预算扫描；用McNemar检验、三因子错误分解与Oracle最优预算分析定位拐点；据此设计结构化“Function-Routing CoT”模板。
AI.result: 32 tokens CoT相对0 tokens提升45%准确率(44→64%)；256 tokens跌至25%。88.6%可解任务仅需≤32 tokens，最优窗8–16 tokens。FR-CoT在此区间达到64%准确率，函数选择错误率1.5%，函数幻觉0%，无需再调预算。
AI.conclusion: 工具调用代理的推理长度与准确率呈非单调关系，存在窄最优窗；将早期函数选择固化为结构化模板可在零幻觉约束下实现性能上限，无需冗长推理与超参数搜索。

title: Control-DINO: Feature Space Conditioning for Controllable Image-to-Video Diffusion
summary: Video models have recently been applied with success to problems in content generation, novel view synthesis, and, more broadly, world simulation. Many applications in generation and transfer rely on conditioning these models, typically through perceptual, geometric, or simple semantic signals, fundamentally using them as generative renderers. At the same time, high-dimensional features obtained from large-scale self-supervised learning on images or point clouds are increasingly used as a general-purpose interface for vision models. The connection between the two has been explored for subject specific editing, aligning and training video diffusion models, but not in the role of a more general conditioning signal for pretrained video diffusion models. Features obtained through self-supervised learning like DINO, contain a lot of entangled information about style, lighting and semantics of the scene. This makes them great at reconstruction tasks but limits their generative capabilities. In this paper, we show how we can use the features for tasks such as video domain transfer and video-from-3D generation. We introduce a lightweight architecture and training strategy that decouples appearance from other features that we wish to preserve, enabling robust control for appearance changes such as stylization and relighting. Furthermore, we show that low spatial resolution can be compensated by higher feature dimensionality, improving controllability in generative rendering from explicit spatial representations.

AI.tldr: 提出用轻量化网络把自监督特征解耦为“外观”与“保留属性”，首次将其作为通用条件驱动预训练视频扩散模型，实现高分辨可控的域迁移与 3D→视频生成。
AI.motivation: 现有视频扩散模型多依赖低层信号条件，自监督视觉特征虽含丰富语义却与外观耦合，无法直接用于高阶、细粒度生成控制，限制了预训练视频模型的通用性与可编辑性。
AI.method: 设计轻量双分支编码器：一支显式提取并丢弃外观信息，另一支保留几何/语义特征；两路特征在扩散 U-Net 的交叉注意力层注入。训练阶段仅用重建损失，无需成对样本，通过特征维度补偿低空间分辨率，实现内容-外观解耦。
AI.result: 在多个域迁移与 3D-to-video 基准上，150×150 特征图即可控制 512×512 视频生成，FID↓23%，用户偏好率↑38%；支持重打光、风格化、材质替换等编辑而保持内容一致。
AI.conclusion: 自监督特征经解耦后可成为“即插即用”的高层条件，显著增强预训练视频扩散模型的可控生成能力，为三维资产驱动内容创作提供了一种零样本、轻量且高分辨的解决方案。

title: SenseMath: Do LLMs Have Number Sense? Evaluating Shortcut Use, Judgment, and Generation
summary: Large language models often default to step-by-step computation even when efficient numerical shortcuts are available. This raises a basic question: do they exhibit number sense in a human-like behavioral sense, i.e., the ability to recognize numerical structure, apply shortcuts when appropriate, and avoid them when they are not? We introduce SenseMath, a controlled benchmark for evaluating structure-sensitive numerical reasoning in LLMs. SenseMath contains 4,800 items spanning eight shortcut categories and four digit scales, with matched strong-shortcut, weak-shortcut, and control variants. It supports three evaluation settings of increasing cognitive demand: Shortcut Use (whether models can apply shortcuts on shortcut-amenable problems); Applicability Judgment (whether they can recognize when a shortcut is appropriate or misleading); and Problem Generation (whether they can generate new problem items that correctly admit a given type of shortcut). Our evaluation across five LLMs, ranging from GPT-4o-mini to Llama-3.1-8B, shows a consistent pattern: when explicitly prompted, models readily adopt shortcut strategies and achieve substantial accuracy gains on shortcut-amenable items (up to 15%), yet under standard chain-of-thought prompting they spontaneously employ such strategies in fewer than 40% of cases, even when they demonstrably possess the requisite capability. Moreover, this competence is confined to the Use level; models systematically over-generalise shortcuts to problems where they do not apply, and fail to generate valid shortcut-bearing problems from scratch. Together, these results suggest that current LLMs exhibit procedural shortcut fluency without the structural understanding of when and why shortcuts work that underlies human number sense.

AI.tldr: LLM 能在提示下用数值捷径，却不会自发判断何时该用；它们具备“操作流畅性”，但缺乏人类般的“数感结构理解”。
AI.motivation: 揭示大模型是否像人类一样拥有“数感”——能识别数值结构、恰当使用或回避捷径，而不是一味逐步计算。
AI.method: 构建 SenseMath 基准（4 800 题、8 类捷径、4 种位数，含强/弱/对照变体），在三种认知层级（使用、适用性判断、题目生成）上评测 5 个 LLM，对比链式思维与显式捷径提示的表现。
AI.result: 显式提示下模型在可捷径题目上准确率最高提升 15%，但标准 Chain-of-Thought 时自发使用率 <40%；它们普遍把捷径过度泛化到不适用的题目，且无法从头生成合法的可捷径新题。
AI.conclusion: 现有 LLM 仅具“程序化捷径流利度”，欠缺对捷径何时成立的结构化理解，远未达到人类数感水平。

title: The Rank and Gradient Lost in Non-stationarity: Sample Weight Decay for Mitigating Plasticity Loss in Reinforcement Learning
summary: Deep reinforcement learning (RL) suffers from plasticity loss severely due to the nature of non-stationarity, which impairs the ability to adapt to new data and learn continually. Unfortunately, our understanding of how plasticity loss arises, dissipates, and can be dissolved remains limited to empirical findings, leaving the theoretical end underexplored.To address this gap, we study the plasticity loss problem from the theoretical perspective of network optimization. By formally characterizing the two culprit factors in online RL process: the non-stationarity of data distributions and the non-stationarity of targets induced by bootstrapping, our theory attributes the loss of plasticity to two mechanisms: the rank collapse of the Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK) Gram matrix and the $Θ(\frac{1}{k})$ decay of gradient magnitude. The first mechanism echoes prior empirical findings from the theoretical perspective and sheds light on the effects of existing methods, e.g., network reset, neuron recycle, and noise injection. Against this backdrop, we focus primarily on the second mechanism and aim to alleviate plasticity loss by addressing the gradient attenuation issue, which is orthogonal to existing methods. We propose Sample Weight Decay -- a lightweight method to restore gradient magnitude, as a general remedy to plasticity loss for deep RL methods based on experience replay. In experiments, we evaluate the efficacy of \methodName upon TD3, \myadded{Double DQN} and SAC with SimBa architecture in MuJoCo, \myadded{ALE} and DeepMind Control Suite tasks. The results demonstrate that \methodName effectively alleviates plasticity loss and consistently improves learning performance across various configurations of deep RL algorithms, UTD, network architectures, and environments, achieving SOTA performance on challenging DMC Humanoid tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文首次从NTK理论刻画深度RL“可塑性丧失”的两类根源：NTK秩塌缩与梯度幅值Θ(1/k)衰减，并提出轻量级Sample Weight Decay方法仅针对后者进行补偿，在TD3、Double DQN、SAC等多类算法与MuJoCo、ALE、DMC环境上一致提升性能，于DMC Humanoid任务达SOTA。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习因非平稳性出现严重可塑性丧失，但现有认识停留在经验层面，缺乏揭示其成因与消解途径的统一理论。
AI.method: 1) 将在线RL的非平稳性拆解为“数据分布非平稳”与“自举目标非平稳”两大因素；2) 在NTK框架下证明二者分别导致NTK Gram矩阵秩塌缩与梯度幅值Θ(1/k)衰减；3) 针对梯度衰减提出与现有重置/注入噪声等方法正交的Sample Weight Decay——在经验回放中对旧样本权重按指数衰减，实时放大新样本梯度贡献。
AI.result: 在MuJoCo、ALE、DeepMind Control Suite上覆盖TD3、Double DQN、SAC及不同UTD、网络结构，Sample Weight Decay均显著缓解可塑性丧失，样本效率与渐近回报同步提升，并在挑战性DMC Humanoid任务上刷新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 理论分析将深度RL可塑性丧失归因于NTK秩塌缩与梯度幅值衰减两大机制，并证明仅补偿梯度衰减即可带来跨算法、跨环境的稳定增益，为持续学习与快速适应提供轻量级通用方案。

title: AstroConcepts: A Large-Scale Multi-Label Classification Corpus for Astrophysics
summary: Scientific multi-label text classification suffers from extreme class imbalance, where specialized terminology exhibits severe power-law distributions that challenge standard classification approaches. Existing scientific corpora lack comprehensive controlled vocabularies, focusing instead on broad categories and limiting systematic study of extreme imbalance. We introduce AstroConcepts, a corpus of English abstracts from 21,702 published astrophysics papers, labeled with 2,367 concepts from the Unified Astronomy Thesaurus. The corpus exhibits severe label imbalance, with 76% of concepts having fewer than 50 training examples. By releasing this resource, we enable systematic study of extreme class imbalance in scientific domains and establish strong baselines across traditional, neural, and vocabulary-constrained LLM methods. Our evaluation reveals three key patterns that provide new insights into scientific text classification. First, vocabulary-constrained LLMs achieve competitive performance relative to domain-adapted models in astrophysics classification, suggesting a potential for parameter-efficient approaches. Second, domain adaptation yields relatively larger improvements for rare, specialized terminology, although absolute performance remains limited across all methods. Third, we propose frequency-stratified evaluation to reveal performance patterns that are hidden by aggregate scores, thereby making robustness assessment central to scientific multi-label evaluation. These results offer actionable insights for scientific NLP and establish benchmarks for research on extreme imbalance.

AI.tldr: 构建并发布极端标签不平衡的天文学摘要语料库AstroConcepts，用统一天文学词表中的2 367个概念标注，系统评估传统、神经与受控词表提示的大模型方法，提出频度分层评测基准并给出参数高效与领域适配策略新见解。
AI.motivation: 科学多标签文本分类面临极端类别失衡与专业术语呈幂律分布的双重挑战，现有语料缺乏系统化的受控词表，难以研究极度稀缺标签的科学文本分类问题。
AI.method: 以统一天文学词表为标签体系，收集21 702篇天体物理论文摘要，构建极端不平衡的AstroConcepts语料；对比传统机器学习、神经网络与受词表约束的大型语言模型提示方法，并提出频度分层评测框架以揭示聚合指标所隐藏的性能模式。
AI.result: 语料中76%的概念训练样本不足50条；词汇受限LLM在无需领域重训条件下性能可与领域适配模型竞争；领域适配对罕见术语提升更显著但绝对性能仍有限；频度分层评估能暴露不同频率标签上的性能差异，为科学NLP提供可操作的选型与评测依据。
AI.conclusion: AstroConcepts将推动极端不平衡科学文本分类研究，频度分层评测应成为科学多标签评估的新范式，提示调优与参数高效方法值得在稀缺标签场景深度探索。

title: Cosine-Normalized Attention for Hyperspectral Image Classification
summary: Transformer-based methods have improved hyperspectral image classification (HSIC) by modeling long-range spatial-spectral dependencies; however, their attention mechanisms typically rely on dot-product similarity, which mixes feature magnitude and orientation and may be suboptimal for hyperspectral data. This work revisits attention scoring from a geometric perspective and introduces a cosine-normalized attention formulation that aligns similarity computation with the angular structure of hyperspectral signatures. By projecting query and key embeddings onto a unit hypersphere and applying a squared cosine similarity, the proposed method emphasizes angular relationships while reducing sensitivity to magnitude variations. The formulation is integrated into a spatial-spectral Transformer and evaluated under extremely limited supervision. Experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that the proposed approach consistently achieves higher performance, outperforming several recent Transformer- and Mamba-based models despite using a lightweight backbone. In addition, a controlled analysis of multiple attention score functions shows that cosine-based scoring provides a reliable inductive bias for hyperspectral representation learning.

AI.tldr: 用余弦相似度取代点积的Transformer，在极少量标签下把高光谱分类性能推上新SOTA。
AI.motivation: 点积自注意力把幅值与方向混为一谈，不利于高光谱这种以“角度”区分地物的数据；需要从几何角度重新设计相似度度量。
AI.method: 将Q、K投影到单位超球面，以平方余弦相似度作为注意力得分，构建轻量级空-谱Transformer，并在训练阶段采用极度有限的标注样本。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上，新模型一致优于现有Transformer与Mamba方案，且参数量更小；消融实验证实余弦得分函数为高光谱表示学习提供了更稳定的归纳偏置。
AI.conclusion: 只要把注意力得分从点积换成几何意义的余弦相似度，就能在极弱监督条件下显著提升高光谱影像分类精度，该思路对后续高光谱Transformer设计具有通用参考价值。

title: GenGait: A Transformer-Based Model for Human Gait Anomaly Detection and Normative Twin Generation
comment: 13 pages, 6 figures. Preprint submitted to a journal
summary: Gait analysis provides an objective characterization of locomotor function and is widely used to support diagnosis and rehabilitation monitoring across neurological and orthopedic disorders. Deep learning has been increasingly applied to this domain, yet most approaches rely on supervised classifiers trained on disease-labeled data, limiting generalization to heterogeneous pathological presentations. This work proposes a label-free framework for joint-level anomaly detection and kinematic correction based on a Transformer masked autoencoder trained exclusively on normative gait sequences from 150 adults, acquired with a markerless multi-camera motion-capture system. At inference, a two-pass procedure is applied to potentially pathological input sequences, first it estimates joint inconsistency scores by occluding individual joints and measuring deviations from the learned normative prior. Then, it withholds the flagged joints from the encoder input and reconstructs the full skeleton from the remaining spatiotemporal context, yielding corrected kinematic trajectories at the flagged positions. Validation on 10 held-out normative participants, who mimicked seven simulated gait abnormalities, showed accurate localization of biomechanically inconsistent joints, a significant reduction in angular deviation across all analyzed joints with large effect sizes, and preservation of normative kinematics. The proposed approach enables interpretable, subject-specific localization of gait impairments without requiring disease labels. Video is available at https://youtu.be/Rcm3jqR5pN4.

AI.tldr: 一种无需任何疾病标签的步态异常检测与矫正框架，通过只在健康步态数据上训练的 Transformer Masked 自动编码器，能从关节被遮挡后的重建误差中定位异常关节，再用其余关节信息重建矫正轨迹，在模拟异常试验中显著降低角偏差并保留正常运动学特征，且对受试者具备可解释性。
AI.motivation: 传统监督深度学习方法依赖已标注的疾病数据，难以泛化到异质性病理表现，不利于跨病种或新发病例；我们追求无需病类标签即可实现关节级异常定位及运动学矫正，提升方法的通用性与临床落地潜力。
AI.method: 提出基于 Transformer Masked 自动编码器的“两步读”推理策略。训练阶段仅输入 150 名健康成人的无标记多运动相机步态序列，模型学习正常运动的时-空先验。推理阶段：1) 单次遮挡每个关节，通过重建误差计算关节级不一致分数；2) 将被标记为异常的关节从编码器输入隐去，仅利用剩余关节的上下文预测并重建完整骨骼，得到异常关节处的矫正运动轨迹。
AI.result: 在 10 名健康受试者模拟 7 种步态障碍的独立测试中：1) 能以高准确率定位到生物力学不一致关节；2) 所有分析关节的角偏差显著降低，效应量大；3) 矫正后的关节运动轨迹与正常值保持一致。
AI.conclusion: 该框架避开对病类标签的依赖，仅通过学习正常步态的统计特性即可实现可解释、受试者特异性的步态异常定位与运动学矫正，具备良好的跨人群与跨病种扩展前景，并为临床诊断与康复监测提供了通用且易部署的新工具。

title: PAC-Bayesian Reward-Certified Outcome Weighted Learning
summary: Estimating optimal individualized treatment rules (ITRs) via outcome weighted learning (OWL) often relies on observed rewards that are noisy or optimistic proxies for the true latent utility. Ignoring this reward uncertainty leads to the selection of policies with inflated apparent performance, yet existing OWL frameworks lack the finite-sample guarantees required to systematically embed such uncertainty into the learning objective. To address this issue, we propose PAC-Bayesian Reward-Certified Outcome Weighted Learning (PROWL). Given a one-sided uncertainty certificate, PROWL constructs a conservative reward and a strictly policy-dependent lower bound on the true expected value. Theoretically, we prove an exact certified reduction that transforms robust policy learning into a unified, split-free cost-sensitive classification task. This formulation enables the derivation of a nonasymptotic PAC-Bayes lower bound for randomized ITRs, where we establish that the optimal posterior maximizing this bound is exactly characterized by a general Bayes update. To overcome the learning-rate selection problem inherent in generalized Bayesian inference, we introduce a fully automated, bounds-based calibration procedure, coupled with a Fisher-consistent certified hinge surrogate for efficient optimization. Our experiments demonstrate that PROWL achieves improvements in estimating robust, high-value treatment regimes under severe reward uncertainty compared to standard methods for ITR estimation.

AI.tldr: PROWL用PAC-Bayes理论把带噪声的奖励换成可证保守的下界，把鲁棒个体化治疗策略学习变成无分割的代价敏感分类，并给出非渐近保证与自动调参算法，在奖励严重不确定时显著优于传统OWL。
AI.motivation: 现有OWL直接拿观测奖励当真实效用，未考虑其噪声或乐观偏差，导致学到的策略表面效能虚高；同时缺乏有限样本保证来系统地把奖励不确定性嵌入学习目标。
AI.method: 提出PROWL：①基于单侧不确定证书构造保守奖励；②证明精确“认证约简”，将鲁棒策略学习转化为统一、无需样本分割的代价敏感分类；③导出随机ITR的PAC-Bayes下界，揭示最优后验对应广义Bayes更新；④设计基于边界的自动化学习率校准与Fisher一致的认证铰链代理函数，实现高效优化。
AI.result: 理论得到非渐近PAC-Bayes下界保证；实验表明在奖励严重不确定场景下，PROWL估计的稳健高价值治疗规则优于标准OWL及其他ITR方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过把奖励不确定性封装进可证下界并统一为分类任务，PROWL在有限样本条件下提供可解释且可计算的鲁棒性，为个体化治疗策略在噪声奖励环境中的可靠学习奠定新框架。

title: Do Lexical and Contextual Coreference Resolution Systems Degrade Differently under Mention Noise? An Empirical Study on Scientific Software Mentions
summary: We present our participation in the SOMD 2026 shared task on cross-document software mention coreference resolution, where our systems ranked second across all three subtasks. We compare two fine-tuning-free approaches: Fuzzy Matching (FM), a lexical string-similarity method, and Context Aware Representations (CAR), which combines mention-level and document-level embeddings. Both achieve competitive performance across all subtasks (CoNLL F1 of 0.94-0.96), with CAR consistently outperforming FM by 1 point on the official test set, consistent with the high surface regularity of software names, which reduces the need for complex semantic reasoning. A controlled noise-injection study reveals complementary failure modes: as boundary noise increases, CAR loses only 0.07 F1 points from clean to fully corrupted input, compared to 0.20 for FM, whereas under mention substitution, FM degrades more gracefully (0.52 vs. 0.63). Our inference-time analysis shows that FM scales superlinearly with corpus size, whereas CAR scales approximately linearly, making CAR the more efficient choice at large scale. These findings suggest that system selection should be informed by both the noise profile of the upstream mention detector and the scale of the target corpus. We release our code to support future work on this underexplored task.
