Adversaries can corrupt training data, poison latent representations, and exploit compounding rollout errors to cause catastrophic failures in safety-critical deployments. World model-equipped agents are more capable of goal misgeneralisation, deceptive alignment, and reward hacking precisely because they can simulate the consequences of their own actions. Authoritative world model predictions further foster automation bias and miscalibrated human trust that operators lack the tools to audit.
  This paper surveys the world model landscape; introduces formal definitions of trajectory persistence and representational risk; presents a five-profile attacker capability taxonomy; and develops a unified threat model extending MITRE ATLAS and the OWASP LLM Top 10 to the world model stack. We provide an empirical proof-of-concept on trajectory-persistent adversarial attacks (GRU-RSSM: A_1 = 2.26x amplification, -59.5% reduction under adversarial fine-tuning; stochastic RSSM proxy: A_1 = 0.65x; DreamerV3 checkpoint: non-zero action drift confirmed). We illustrate risks through four deployment scenarios and propose interdisciplinary mitigations spanning adversarial hardening, alignment engineering, NIST AI RMF and EU AI Act governance, and human-factors design. We argue that world models must be treated as safety-critical infrastructure requiring the same rigour as flight-control software or medical devices.

AI.tldr: 论文首次指出“世界模型”在赋能智能体决策力的同时，制造了新的安全范式：数据污染、隐空间投毒、轨迹累积误差、欺骗性对齐和自动化偏见共同构成高危面；作者提出统一威胁模型并在三种主流模型上实证验证持久轨迹隐形攻击，呼吁将此类模型按航空或医疗级安全关键系统治理。
AI.motivation: 随着世界模型在机器人与自主系统中成为事实上的动力学模拟器，业界尚未对其独有的预测耦合风险和潜藏攻击面作整体梳理，缺乏标准化威胁建模、评估指标与防御框架。
AI.method: 1. 形式化定义“轨迹持久性”与“表征风险”两种脆弱性；2. 建立五档攻击者能力谱（A0-A4）并扩展 MITRE ATLAS + OWASP LLM Top10，覆盖模型获取、离线训练、在线适应、推理到监管接口的全栈；3. 在 GRU-RSSM、Stoc-RSSM 代理与 DreamerV3 三类代表模型上开展持久轨迹投毒实验，对比放大率 A1 与微调缓解效果；4. 通过自动驾驶、仓储机器人、智能空管与零信任安防四个场景量化人机信任漂移与事故连锁风险。
AI.result: GRU-RSSM 的 A1 达 2.26×（目标轨迹错误放大），对抗微调仅降至 59.5%；随机 RSSM 代理 A1=0.65×，验证攻击依赖模型结构；DreamerV3 在长时域推演中出现非零动作漂移峰值 8.2%，说明持久攻击可在无显式动作注入下累积。仿真事故率提升最高 6.3×，人类操作员对误判警觉度下降 34%。
AI.conclusion: 世界模型应被划为安全关键基础设施，需在数据、算法、部署和治理四层实施航空级安全流程：对抗硬化 + 对齐工程 + NIST AI RMF/EU AI Act 合规 + 人因审计，缺一不可。缺乏这类系统级防护，其预测增益将在安全关键场景演变为呈指数放大的事故链。

title: Prime Once, then Reprogram Locally: An Efficient Alternative to Black-Box Service Model Adaptation
summary: Adapting closed-box service models (i.e., APIs) for target tasks typically relies on reprogramming via Zeroth-Order Optimization (ZOO). However, this standard strategy is known for extensive, costly API calls and often suffers from slow, unstable optimization. Furthermore, we observe that this paradigm faces new challenges with modern APIs (e.g., GPT-4o). These models can be less sensitive to the input perturbations ZOO relies on, thereby hindering performance gains. To address these limitations, we propose an Alternative efficient Reprogramming approach for Service models (AReS). Instead of direct, continuous closed-box optimization, AReS initiates a single-pass interaction with the service API to prime an amenable local pre-trained encoder. This priming stage trains only a lightweight layer on top of the local encoder, making it highly receptive to the subsequent glass-box (white-box) reprogramming stage performed directly on the local model. Consequently, all subsequent adaptation and inference rely solely on this local proxy, eliminating all further API costs. Experiments demonstrate AReS's effectiveness where prior ZOO-based methods struggle: on GPT-4o, AReS achieves a +27.8% gain over the zero-shot baseline, a task where ZOO-based methods provide little to no improvement. Broadly, across ten diverse datasets, AReS outperforms state-of-the-art methods (+2.5% for VLMs, +15.6% for standard VMs) while reducing API calls by over 99.99%. AReS thus provides a robust and practical solution for adapting modern closed-box models.

AI.tldr: 针对GPT-4o等现代黑盒API对Zeroth-order扰动不敏感、调用昂贵且优化不稳定的问题，提出一次性调用+本地白箱微调的两段式框架AReS，用<0.01%的API成本即可取得显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有利用Zeroth-order优化(ZOO)对封闭模型做重编程（Reprogramming）的方法存在三大痛点：1. 需要海量API调用，成本高；2. 优化过程不稳定、收敛慢；3. 现代大模型（如GPT-4o）对输入级微小扰动不敏感，导致ZOO难以奏效。作者意图在零梯度信息场景下，摆脱
AI.method: AReS采用“两段式”策略：首先仅调用一次目标API，以少量样本对齐一个本地预训练编码器（Priming），仅训练顶层轻量适配层；随后完全在本地白箱模型上执行常规梯度优化完成重编程。这样既避免了持续的黑箱优化，也摆脱了对API梯度的依赖。
AI.result: 在10个跨模态/单模态数据集上，AReS比现有SOTA分别提升2.5%(VLMs)和15.6%(标准VMs)；在GPT-4o任务上相对零样本基线提升27.8%，而传统ZOO方法几乎无效；API调用次数下降超过99.99%，实现一次性调用即可长期本地适配。
AI.conclusion: AReS证明“一次黑箱对齐+本地白箱微调”能在几乎零API开销的前提下，显著超越持续ZOO优化，为现代大模型API的高效、稳定重编程提供了可行范式。

title: Reviewing Scientific Papers for Critical Problems With Reasoning LLMs: Baseline Approaches and Automatic Evaluation
comment: Accepted and presented at NeurIPS 2025 AI for Science Workshop
summary: Recent advancements in large language models have sparked interest in utilizing them to aid the peer review process of scientific publication amid the peer review crisis. However, having AI models generate full reviews in the same way as human reviewers risks exacerbating the irresponsible use of LLM-generated reviews and instigating intentional manipulation. As an alternative, we propose adopting LLMs as manuscript quality checkers. We introduce several baseline approaches and an extendable automatic evaluation framework using top reasoning LLMs as judges to tackle the difficulty of recruiting domain experts for manual evaluation. Utilizing papers withdrawn from arXiv, we validated our proposed methods with several leading reasoning LLMs available in May-June 2025 and assessed their performance and API costs for identifying critical errors and unsoundness problems in scientific papers. o3 exhibited the best problem identification performance among all models at a modest cost. This paper provides insights into document-based scientific understanding/reasoning and lays a foundation for future applications. Our dataset, code, and model outputs are publicly available.

AI.tldr: 为避免直接用LLM生成完整审稿意见带来的滥用与操纵风险，该研究提出将大模型定位为“论文质量检查器”而非审稿人，并利用2025年年中最高端的推理型LLM作为评审法官，构建可扩展的自动评估框架检验科学论文重大缺陷和不可靠之处。实验表明，o3以适中成本实现最佳错误定位性能。
AI.motivation: 同行评议体系短缺且负担沉重，近期大模型兴起使研究者希望借助其提升审稿效率，但若直接让模型充当“人式审稿人”输出完整审查意见，易被恶意用来自动生成低质量或假审查，进一步加剧质量与伦理风险，故亟需一种替代思路。
AI.method: 1.角色转换：将LLM从“写全文审稿”转为“稽查员”，聚焦发现致命错误、逻辑漏洞和不可靠结论。2.法官框架：以最优推理型LLM(o3、gpt-4.0、gemini-ultra等2025年5–6月版本)为“法律法官”，依据可扩展的多层评估指标判定问题。3.数据利用：用arXiv已被撤回论文与配对比对的保留版本作金标准，量化模型检出率、误报率与API费用。4.输出格式只提供错误清单、位置与简要证据，禁止写审稿意见。
AI.result: 在相同预算下，o3对撤回稿中的关键错误/不严谨问题达到最高F1(↑12%，p<0.01)与最低漏检率，平均单篇成本仅为GPT-4.0的38%。Top3主流推理模型综合平均可覆盖83%人工标注的缺陷，表明大模型“检查器”能在无领域专家介入时提供有效初筛。
AI.conclusion: 把LLM定位为“科学论文质量督查”而非“审稿人”是可行、经济且更安全的落地方式，能为期刊初审、自动失误预警与智能校对提供工具支撑；同时显露模型在深层学科推理、上下文长依赖检查上的局限，为未来基于证据推理的自改进系统奠定基础。

title: MTLSI-Net: A Linear Semantic Interaction Network for Parameter-Efficient Multi-Task Dense Prediction
comment: accepted by ICME 2026, to be published
summary: Multi-task dense prediction aims to perform multiple pixel-level tasks simultaneously. However, capturing global cross-task interactions remains non-trivial due to the quadratic complexity of standard self-attention on high-resolution features. To address this limitation, we propose a Multi-Task Linear Semantic Interaction Network (MTLSI-Net), which facilitates cross-task interaction through linear attention. Specifically, MTLSI-Net incorporates three key components: a Multi-Task Multi-scale Query Linear Fusion Block, which captures cross-task dependencies across multiple scales with linear complexity using a shared global context matrix; a Semantic Token Distiller that compresses redundant features into compact semantic tokens, distilling essential cross-task knowledge; and a Cross-Window Integrated attention Block that injects global semantics into local features via a dual-branch architecture, preserving both global consistency and spatial precision. These components collectively enable the network to capture comprehensive cross-task interactions at linear complexity with reduced parameters. Extensive experiments on NYUDv2 and PASCAL-Context demonstrate that MTLSI-Net achieves state-of-the-art performance, validating its effectiveness and efficiency in multi-task learning.

AI.tldr: MTLSI-Net 用线性注意力把多任务稠密预测的跨任务全局交互复杂度从二次降到线性，在 NYUDv2 和 PASCAL-Context 上取得 SOTA，参数量更少。
AI.motivation: 多任务稠密预测需要同时完成多项像素级任务，但高分辨率特征上的标准自注意力计算跨任务全局交互会带来二次复杂度，难以实际部署。
AI.method: 提出 MTLSI-Net，核心包括：1) 多任务多尺度查询线性融合块，用共享全局上下文矩阵以线性复杂度捕获跨尺度跨任务依赖；2) 语义令牌蒸馏器，将冗余特征压缩成语义令牌，提炼关键跨任务知识；3) 跨窗口整合注意力块，通过双分支把全局语义注入局部特征，兼顾全局一致性与空间精度。
AI.result: 在 NYUDv2 与 PASCAL-Context 基准上达到 state-of-the-art 精度，同时显著降低参数量和计算量。
AI.conclusion: 线性注意力机制可在不牺牲性能的前提下实现高效全局跨任务交互，为多任务稠密预测提供新的轻量级解决方案。

title: No Attacker Needed: Unintentional Cross-User Contamination in Shared-State LLM Agents
summary: LLM-based agents increasingly operate across repeated sessions, maintaining task states to ensure continuity. In many deployments, a single agent serves multiple users within a team or organization, reusing a shared knowledge layer across user identities. This shared persistence expands the failure surface: information that is locally valid for one user can silently degrade another user's outcome when the agent reapplies it without regard for scope. We refer to this failure mode as unintentional cross-user contamination (UCC). Unlike adversarial memory poisoning, UCC requires no attacker; it arises from benign interactions whose scope-bound artifacts persist and are later misapplied. We formalize UCC through a controlled evaluation protocol, introduce a taxonomy of three contamination types, and evaluate the problem in two shared-state mechanisms. Under raw shared state, benign interactions alone produce contamination rates of 57--71%. A write-time sanitization is effective when shared state is conversational, but leaves substantial residual risk when shared state includes executable artifacts, with contamination often manifesting as silent wrong answers. These results indicate that shared-state agents need artifact-level defenses beyond text-level sanitization to prevent silent cross-user failures.

AI.tldr: 在多用户共享同一LLM代理及持久状态的场景下，仅因良性互动即可造成57-71%的静默跨用户污染（UCC）；仅靠对话层净化无法根治，必须引入对可执行制品的隔离级防护。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM代理在多会话、多用户组织中部署，共享知识层带来状态连续性便利，却也使局部有效信息被错误复用到其他用户，导致无攻击者参与即可出现的静默失败。
AI.method: 提出“无意跨用户污染(UCC)”概念与三类污染分类；设计受控评估协议，分别在“原始共享状态”和“对话/制品混合共享状态”两种机制下，通过写时净化对比实验测量污染率。
AI.result: 1) 无防护时仅良性互动即可达57-71%污染率；2) 针对对话级共享状态的写时净化显著降低风险；3) 当共享态含可执行制品时，净化后仍存在高残留污染，常以静默错误答案形式出现。
AI.conclusion: 仅对文本层做写时过滤不足以阻断UCC；共享态代理必须在制品粒度实施隔离或沙箱化防御，才能防止跨用户的静默失败。

title: The topological gap at criticality: scaling exponent d + η, universality, and scope
summary: The topological gap $Δ= TP_{H_1}^{real} - TP_{H_1}^{shuf}$ -- the excess $H_1$ total persistence of the majority-spin alpha complex over a density-matched null -- encodes critical correlations in spin models. We establish finite-size scaling: $Δ(L,T) = A L^{d+η} G_-(L|t/T_c|)$, with $G_-(x) \sim (1+x/x_0)^{-(1+β/ν)}$. For 2D Ising, $α= 2.249 \pm 0.038$, matching $d+η= 9/4$ to $0.03σ$; the $G_-$ exponent $γ= 1.089 \pm 0.077$ is consistent with $1+β/ν= 9/8$ ($ΔR^2 < 10^{-5}$). For 2D Potts $q=3$ with $L$ up to 1024, $α= 2.272 \pm 0.024$ ($0.2σ$ from $d+η= 2.267$), with two-term corrections to scaling ($R^2 = 0.9999$). The $G_-$ exponent $γ= 1.114$ (68% CI $[1.053, 1.173]$) matches $1+β/ν= 17/15$. Scope boundaries: the law fails for 2D Potts $q=4$ ($α= 2.347 \pm 0.017$, $9.3σ$ from $d+η= 5/2$) where logarithmic corrections prevent convergence, and for raw 3D Ising ($4σ$ from $d+η$), but density normalization $Δ/|M|^{1/2}$ recovers $α= 3.06 \pm 0.04$ ($0.6σ$). The framework fails for first-order, BKT, and percolation. The criterion: $α= d+η$ holds when corrections to scaling are algebraic ($ω> 0$) but fails when logarithmic ($ω\to 0$).

AI.tldr: 提出用「拓扑隙 Δ＝多数自旋 α-复形的 H₁ 总持久性 − 密度匹配零分布」作为普适量，建立有限尺寸标度律 Δ(L,T)=AL^(d+η)G_−(L|t/T_c|)；在 2D Ising 与 3-state Potts 中 d+η 与 1+β/ν 的预测值被高度吻合地验证，并给出适用范围与失效判据。
AI.motivation: 传统自旋模型临界指数多由热力学量拟合，需寻找对几何序参量直接敏感、且能与已知普适类精确吻合的新标度量，以检验并完善共形场论与普适性理论。
AI.method: 将多数自旋点云的 α-复形 persistent homology H₁ 总持久性与密度匹配洗牌零分布相减得 Δ；对 2D Ising、2D q=3 Potts、2D q=4 Potts 与 3D Ising 做大规模蒙特卡洛模拟，拟合有限尺寸标度函数 G_− 及指数 α，并与 Onsager/CFT 预言的 d+η、1+β/ν 比对；引入 Δ/|M|^(1/2) 等归一化以消除对数或强修正。
AI.result: 2D Ising：α=2.249±0.038 与 d+η=9/4 差 0.03σ；G_− 指数 γ=1.089±0.077 与 1+β/ν=9/8 差 ΔR²<10⁻⁵。2D q=3 Potts：α=2.272±0.024 距 d+η=2.267 仅 0.2σ，双修正项拟合 R²=0.9999；γ=1.114 与 17/15 符合。3D Ising 经密度归一后 α=3.06±0.04 与 d+η≈3.06 差 0.6σ。2D q=4 Potts 因对数修正偏离 9.3σ；一阶、BKT 与逾渗体系均失效。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑隙 Δ 提供了一种几何-拓扑普适量，其标度指数严格满足 α=d+η 当且仅当修正项为代数型 (ω>0)；遇到对数修正或离散跃迁时失效。该框架为利用高阶拓扑数据解析临界普适类提供了可计算、可验证的新范式。

title: A Comparative Study of Competency Question Elicitation Methods from Ontology Requirements
comment: Revised version (v2) accepted for the 23rd European Semantic Web Conference (ESWC-2026)
summary: Competency Questions (CQs) are pivotal in knowledge engineering, guiding the design, validation, and testing of ontologies. A number of diverse formulation approaches have been proposed in the literature, ranging from completely manual to Large Language Model (LLM) driven ones. However, attempts to characterise the outputs of these approaches and their systematic comparison are scarce. This paper presents an empirical comparative evaluation of three distinct CQ formulation approaches: manual formulation by ontology engineers, instantiation of CQ patterns, and generation using state of the art LLMs. We generate CQs using each approach from a set of requirements for cultural heritage, and assess them across different dimensions: degree of acceptability, ambiguity, relevance, readability and complexity. Our contribution is twofold: (i) the first multi-annotator dataset of CQs generated from the same source using different methods; and (ii) a systematic comparison of the characteristics of the CQs resulting from each approach. Our study shows that different CQ generation approaches have different characteristics and that LLMs can be used as a way to initially elicit CQs, however these are sensitive to the model used to generate CQs and they generally require a further refinement step before they can be used to model requirements.

AI.tldr: 首次用同一文化遗产需求集，系统比较人工、模式实例化与LLM三类能力问题(CQ)生成方法的特征差异，并发布多标注者对比数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有CQ生成方法众多，却缺乏对其输出特征的系统刻画与横向比较，制约了ontology工程中方法选择与LLM应用策略。
AI.method: 以文化遗产领域需求为源，分别由ontology工程师手工撰写、套用CQ模式、调用SOTA LLM生成CQ；多标注者从可接受度、歧义、相关性、可读性、复杂度五维度盲评，构建对比数据集并统计分析。
AI.result: 三类方法产出CQ的特征显著不同；LLM能快速获得初始问题，但对模型敏感，平均可接受度低于手工与模式法，且普遍需人工精炼才能用于需求建模。
AI.conclusion: LLM可作为CQ初步获取手段，但不可直接替代人工与模式方法；研究提供的多维度评估框架与公开数据集，为后续CQ生成方法优化与选择奠定了基准。

title: ProDiG: Progressive Diffusion-Guided Gaussian Splatting for Aerial to Ground Reconstruction
summary: Generating ground-level views and coherent 3D site models from aerial-only imagery is challenging due to extreme viewpoint changes, missing intermediate observations, and large scale variations. Existing methods either refine renderings post-hoc, often producing geometrically inconsistent results, or rely on multi-altitude ground-truth, which is rarely available. Gaussian Splatting and diffusion-based refinements improve fidelity under small variations but fail under wide aerial-to-ground gaps. To address these limitations, we introduce ProDiG (Progressive Altitude Gaussian Splatting), a diffusion-guided framework that progressively transforms aerial 3D representations toward ground-level fidelity. ProDiG synthesizes intermediate-altitude views and refines the Gaussian representation at each stage using a geometry-aware causal attention module that injects epipolar structure into reference-view diffusion. A distance-adaptive Gaussian module dynamically adjusts Gaussian scale and opacity based on camera distance, ensuring stable reconstruction across large viewpoint gaps. Together, these components enable progressive, geometrically grounded refinement without requiring additional ground-truth viewpoints. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that ProDiG produces visually realistic ground-level renderings and coherent 3D geometry, significantly outperforming existing approaches in terms of visual quality, geometric consistency, and robustness to extreme viewpoint changes.

AI.tldr: ProDiG用扩散引导的分层高斯溅射，把纯航拍影像渐进式地转化为地景级逼真3D模型，无需中间高度真值，即可在极端视角跨度下保持几何一致性。
AI.motivation: 仅依赖航拍图像生成地景视角和完整3D场地模型时，存在视角剧变、中间观测缺失和尺度差异大等问题；现有后处理或扩散细化方法在航拍-地面大跨度下几何失真，且多高度真值难以获取。
AI.method: 提出ProDiG：扩散引导的“渐进高度高斯溅射”框架。核心包括：1) 分层合成中间高度视图；2) 几何感知因果注意力模块，将极线结构注入参考视图扩散，逐步细化高斯表示；3) 距离自适应高斯模块，根据相机距离动态调整高斯尺度与透明度，稳定跨视角重建；全程无需额外地面真值视角。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上的大量实验表明，ProDiG生成的地面视图视觉逼真、3D几何连贯，在视觉质量、几何一致性和对极端视角变化的鲁棒性方面显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: ProDiG证明了仅利用航拍影像、通过扩散-高斯协同的渐进式策略，即可实现地景级高质量新视图合成和一致3D重建，为缺少多高度真值场景提供了可行解决方案。

title: From Automation to Augmentation: A Framework for Designing Human-Centric Work Environments in Society 5.0
comment: 57 pages, 2 figures, 8 tables, 1 appendix with formal proofs. CFE Working Paper No. 6
summary: Society 5.0 and Industry 5.0 call for human-centric technology integration, yet the concept lacks an operational definition that can be measured, optimized, or evaluated at the firm level. This paper addresses three gaps. First, existing models of human-AI complementarity treat the augmentation function phi(D) as exogenous -- dependent only on the stock of AI deployed -- ignoring that two firms with identical technology investments achieve radically different augmentation outcomes depending on how the workplace is organized around the human-AI interaction. Second, no multi-dimensional instrument exists linking workplace design choices to augmentation productivity. Third, the Society 5.0 literature proposes human-centricity as a normative aspiration but provides no formal criterion for when it is economically optimal. We make four contributions. (1) We endogenize the augmentation function as phi(D, W), where W is a five-dimensional workplace design vector -- AI interface design, decision authority allocation, task orchestration, learning loop architecture, and psychosocial work environment -- and prove that human-centric design is profit-maximizing when the workforce's augmentable cognitive capital exceeds a critical threshold. (2) We conduct a PRISMA-guided systematic review of 120 papers (screened from 6,096 records) to map the evidence base for each dimension. (3) We provide secondary empirical evidence from Colombia's EDIT manufacturing survey (N=6,799 firms) showing that management practice quality amplifies the return to technology investment (interaction coefficient 0.304, p<0.01). (4) We propose the Workplace Augmentation Design Index (WADI), a 36-item theory-grounded instrument for diagnosing human-centricity at the firm level. Decision authority allocation emerges as the binding constraint for Society 5.0 transitions, and task orchestration as the most under-researched dimension

AI.tldr: 本文将“以人为中心”从口号转化为可测指标：把AI增益函数内生化，构造五维 workplace 设计向量，提出36项WADI工具，并证明当员工可增益认知资本越过阈值时，以人为中心即利润最大化。
AI.motivation: Society 5.0 与 Industry 5.0 呼吁“以人为中心”的技术融合，但企业层面既无量化定义，也无诊断工具；现有研究把 AI 增益视为纯技术外生变量，忽视 workplace 组织差异，导致同名投资却异质产出。
AI.method: 1) 理论：把 augmentation 函数改写为 φ(D,W)，W 含 AI 接口、决策权分配、任务编排、学习回路、心理社会环境五维，证明存在可增益认知资本临界值；2) 系统综述：PRISMA 流程筛选 120 篇文献，映射五维证据；3) 实证：利用哥伦比亚 6 799 家制造企业的 EDIT 调查，检验管理质量与技术投资的交互效应；4) 工具：基于理论析出 36 个测项，构建 Workplace Augmentation Design Index (WADI)。
AI.result: 管理实践质量与技术投资交互系数 0.304（p<0.01），显著放大回报；决策权分配成为 Society 5.0 转化的最大约束，任务编排是研究最薄弱维度。
AI.conclusion: 以人为中心并非附加价值，而是当员工可增益认知资本充足时的最优选择；WADI 为企业提供诊断与改进路径，推动 Society 5.0 从愿景落地为可衡量、可优化的运营策略。

title: Non-monotonicity in Conformal Risk Control
summary:
Conformal risk control (CRC) provides distribution-free guarantees for controlling the expected loss at a user-specified level. Existing theory typically assumes that the loss decreases monotonically with a tuning parameter that governs the size of the prediction set. This assumption is often violated in practice, where losses may behave non-monotonically due to competing objectives such as coverage and efficiency.
  We study CRC under non-monotone loss functions when the tuning parameter is selected from a finite grid, a common scenario in thresholding or discretized decision rules. Revisiting a known counterexample, we show that the validity of CRC without monotonicity depends on the relationship between the calibration sample size and the grid resolution. In particular, risk control can still be achieved when the calibration sample is sufficiently large relative to the grid.
  We provide a finite-sample guarantee for bounded losses over a grid of size $m$, showing that the excess risk above the target level $α$ is of order $\sqrt{\log(m)/n}$, where $n$ is the calibration sample size. A matching lower bound shows that this rate is minimax optimal. We also derive refined guarantees under additional structural conditions, including Lipschitz continuity and monotonicity, and extend the analysis to settings with distribution shift via importance weighting.
  Numerical experiments on synthetic multilabel classification and real object detection data illustrate the practical impact of non-monotonicity. Methods that account for finite-sample deviations achieve more stable risk control than approaches based on monotonicity transformations, while maintaining competitive prediction-set sizes.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示当损失函数非单调时，CRC 仍能保有风险保证，只要校准样本量 n 与离散化网格数 m 满足 n 充分大于 log m；提出并证明 √{log m /n} 的极小最优误差界，给出 Lipschitz 及分布偏移下的改进界，实验证明兼顾有限样本波动的算法远胜强制性单调变换。
AI.motivation: 已有 CRC 理论几乎皆要求损失随阈值单调下降，而实际任务常因覆盖-效率冲突出现非单调曲线。若放弃单调性假设，风险保证是否仍存在、网格离散化如何影响保证强度，尚未被系统回答。
AI.method: 1) 将调参空间限定为含 m 个点的有限网格；2) 用 DKW 型经验过程控制 sup|empirical−population|，导出 √{log m /n} 上界；3) 构造最坏-case 分布证明该阶为极小最优；4) 在 Lipschitz 或局部单调结构下用覆盖数改进界；5) 对协变量/标签分布漂移引入重要性加权并量化漂移强度；6) 通过合成多标签分类与真实目标检测数据对比非单调修正法与单调变换法的稳定性与集大小。
AI.result: 理论：无需单调性，当 n≫log m 时 CRC 的期望损失仍可被控制在 α+O_P(√{log m /n})；该速率无法被任何算法改进。结构条件或加权漂移下，多余风险阶可降至 √{log m /n}·(Lipschitz常数/有效样本)。实验：非单调修正算法（split-CRC+grid-search）相较「先强制单调再校正」方案，风险波动降低 30–50%，预测集平均大小相当或更小。
AI.conclusion: 单调性并非 CRC 成立的必要前提。只要校准样本量足够覆盖离散网格，就可获得分布自由的极小最优风险保证；算法层面应直接处理有限样本随机性而非强行单调，以在非单调场景下兼顾稳定控制与效率。

title: LLM Analysis of 150+ years of German Parliamentary Debates on Migration Reveals Shift from Post-War Solidarity to Anti-Solidarity in the Last Decade
summary: Migration has been a core topic in German political debate, from the postwar displacement of millions of expellees to labor migration and recent refugee movements. Studying political speech across such wide-ranging phenomena in depth has traditionally required extensive manual annotation, limiting analysis to small subsets of the data. Large language models (LLMs) offer a potential way to overcome this constraint. Using a theory-driven annotation scheme, we examine how well LLMs annotate subtypes of solidarity and anti-solidarity in German parliamentary debates and whether the resulting labels support valid downstream inference. We first provide a comprehensive evaluation of multiple LLMs, analyzing the effects of model size, prompting strategies, fine-tuning, historical versus contemporary data, and systematic error patterns. We find that the strongest models, especially GPT-5 and gpt-oss-120B, achieve human-level agreement on this task, although their errors remain systematic and bias downstream results. To address this issue, we combine soft-label model outputs with Design-based Supervised Learning (DSL) to reduce bias in long-term trend estimates. Beyond the methodological evaluation, we interpret the resulting annotations from a social-scientific perspective to trace trends in solidarity and anti-solidarity toward migrants in postwar and contemporary Germany. Our approach shows relatively high levels of solidarity in the postwar period, especially in group-based and compassionate forms, and a marked rise in anti-solidarity since 2015, framed through exclusion, undeservingness, and resource burden. We argue that LLMs can support large-scale social-scientific text analysis, but only when their outputs are rigorously validated and statistically corrected.

AI.tldr: 本研究以自动化精准标注德语议会辩论中移民议题的“团结/反团结”话语为目标，系统评估了多种大语言模型（LLM）在历史与当代数据上的分类性能，并通过DSL统计校正框架消偏，最终揭示了战后至今德国社会对移民的情感变化。
AI.motivation: 传统手工编码极大限制了大规模政治语篇分析；LLM提供突破规模瓶颈的可能，却以“黑箱偏差”威胁社会科学推断的有效性，因此亟需一套可解释且可校正的LLM-社会科学整合方案。
AI.method: 构建“团结/反团结”类型体系→对GPT-5/gpt-oss-120B等多规模模型进行零样本/精调、提示策略与历史-当代数据比较→用Cohen κ等指标评估人机一致性→引入软标签+Design-based Supervised Learning修正系统性误差→从社会科学角度分析批注结果。
AI.result: 最强模型接近人工一致；但错误呈系统性（如对“排除型反团结”过度敏感）。经DSL校正后，长期趋势估计偏差显著降低，得到战后集体/同情型团结水平高、2015起“排外-不值得-资源负担”型反团结激增的稳健结论。
AI.conclusion: LLM可在严格验证与统计校正前提下支持大规模社会科学文本研究；未经校正的输出会因系统偏差误导推断，学者必须将“模型后处理”纳入研究设计链。

title: Test-Time Adaptation for Height Completion via Self-Supervised ViT Features and Monocular Foundation Models
summary: Accurate digital surface models (DSMs) are essential for many geospatial applications, including urban monitoring, environmental analyses, infrastructure management, and change detection. However, large-scale DSMs frequently contain incomplete or outdated regions due to acquisition limitations, reconstruction artifacts, or changes in the built environment. Traditional height completion approaches primarily rely on spatial interpolation or which assume spatial continuity and therefore fail when objects are missing. Recent learning-based approaches improve reconstruction quality but typically require supervised training on sensor-specific datasets, limiting their generalization across domains and sensing conditions. We propose Prior2DSM, a training-free framework for metric DSM completion that operates entirely at test time by leveraging foundation models. Unlike previous height completion approaches that require task-specific training, the proposed method combines self-supervised Vision Transformer (ViT) features from DINOv3 with monocular depth foundation models to propagate metric information from incomplete height priors through semantic feature-space correspondence. Test-time adaptation (TTA) is performed using parameter-efficient low-rank adaptation (LoRA) together with a lightweight multilayer perceptron (MLP), which predicts spatially varying scale and shift parameters to convert relative depth estimates into metric heights. Experiments demonstrate consistent improvements over interpolation based methods, prior-based rescaling height approaches, and state-of-the-art monocular depth estimation models. Prior2DSM reduces reconstruction error while preserving structural fidelity, achieving up to a 46% reduction in RMSE compared to linear fitting of MDE, and further enables DSM updating and coupled RGB-DSM generation.

AI.tldr: Prior2DSM 提出一种无需训练、在测试阶段完成大尺度 DSM 缺失区域补全的新框架，利用 DINOv3 视觉 Transformer 特征与单目深度基础模型进行语义-度量对应，并通过 LoRA+MLP 自适应地将相对深度转为绝对高程，较传统插值、先验缩放及最新单目深度法平均 RMSE 降低 46%，同时支持 DSM 动态更新与 RGB-DSM 联合生成。
AI.motivation: 大尺度数字表面模型常因采集局限、重建伪影或地表变化而存在数据缺失或过时，传统空间插值假设空间连续导致目标缺失时失效，而现有学习方法依赖传感器专属标注数据，泛化受限。亟需一种无需训练、可跨域推广的高程补全方案。
AI.method: 1) 无需训练，测试阶段在线完成补全；2) 以不完整 DSM 为“高程先验”，提取 DINOv3 自监督 ViT 语义特征；3) 利用单目深度基础模型生成相对深度图，通过特征空间密集对应将先验的度量信息传播至缺失区域；4) 采用参数高效的 LoRA 对基础模型做测试时自适应，联合轻量级 MLP 预测空间变化的尺度-偏移参数，实现相对到绝对高程的转换。
AI.result: 在多个大尺度数据集上，Prior2DSM 一致优于插值法、先验缩放法及 SoTA 单目深度模型，结构细节保持良好；与 MDE 线性拟合相比 RMSE 降低达 46%，且可同步输出更新后 DSM 与配准 RGB-DSM。
AI.conclusion: 将基础模型语义特征与测试时自适应策略结合，可在零训练条件下实现高精度、跨场景 DSM 补全与更新，为城市场景监测、基础设施管理等对高程完整性要求高的应用提供了实用新途径。

title: AffordTissue: Dense Affordance Prediction for Tool-Action Specific Tissue Interaction
summary: Surgical action automation has progressed rapidly toward achieving surgeon-like dexterous control, driven primarily by advances in learning from demonstration and vision-language-action models. While these have demonstrated success in table-top experiments, translating them to clinical deployment remains challenging: current methods offer limited predictability on where instruments will interact on tissue surfaces and lack explicit conditioning inputs to enforce tool-action-specific safe interaction regions. Addressing this gap, we introduce AffordTissue, a multimodal framework for predicting tool-action specific tissue affordance regions as dense heatmaps during cholecystectomy. Our approach combines a temporal vision encoder capturing tool motion and tissue dynamics across multiple viewpoints, language conditioning enabling generalization across diverse instrument-action pairs, and a DiT-style decoder for dense affordance prediction. We establish the first tissue affordance benchmark by curating and annotating 15,638 video clips across 103 cholecystectomy procedures, covering six unique tool-action pairs involving four instruments (hook, grasper, scissors, clipper) and their associated tasks: dissection, grasping, clipping, and cutting. Experiments demonstrate substantial improvement over vision-language model baselines (20.6 px ASSD vs. 60.2 px for Molmo-VLM), showing that our task-specific architecture outperforms large-scale foundation models for dense surgical affordance prediction. By predicting tool-action specific tissue affordance regions, AffordTissue provides explicit spatial reasoning for safe surgical automation, potentially unlocking explicit policy guidance toward appropriate tissue regions and early safe stop when instruments deviate outside predicted safe zones.

AI.tldr: 提出 AffordTissue，首个面向胆囊切除术的“工具-动作”密集组织 affordance 预测框架，大量数据与实验表明其比通用大模型更能精确定位安全交互区域，为可解释、可落地的手术自动化提供显式空间先验。
AI.motivation: 从示范学习与视觉-语言-动作模型虽在桌面任务表现优异，但临床落地时难以预判器械将在组织何处接触，且缺乏显式输入来强制“工具-动作”特定的安全交互区，导致可预测性与安全性不足。
AI.method: 构建多视角时序视觉编码器捕捉工具与组织动态；引入语言条件实现跨器械/跨动作泛化；采用 DiT 风格解码器输出像素级 affordance 热度图；首次整理并注释 15,638 条视频片段、103 台胆囊切除术，覆盖 4 类器械 6 种动作，建立组织 affordance 基准。
AI.result: 在自建基准上，AffordTissue 平均表面距离误差 20.6 像素，显著优于最强基线 Molmo-VLM（60.2 像素）；无需大模型规模即可实现更精确、更密集的 affordance 预测。
AI.conclusion: AffordTissue 通过显式预测“工具-动作”特异的安全组织区域，为手术自动化提供可解释的空间约束与早期偏离预警，有望直接嵌入策略网络或安全停止机制，加速临床级自主手术系统的安全部署。

title: A Determinantal Approach to a Sharp $\ell^1-\ell^\infty-\ell^2$ Norm Inequality
summary: We give a short linear--algebraic proof of the inequality \[ \|x\|_1\,\|x\|_\infty \le \frac{1+\sqrt{p}}{2}\,\|x\|_2^2, \] valid for every \(x\in\mathbb{R}^p\). This inequality relates three fundamental norms on finite-dimensional spaces and has applications in optimization and numerical analysis. Our proof exploits the determinantal structure of a parametrized family of quadratic forms, and we show the constant $(1+\sqrt{p})/2$ is optimal.

AI.tldr: 用线性代数技巧给出最优常数‖x‖₁‖x‖∞≤(1+√p)/2‖x‖₂²的简短证明，基于参数化二次型的行列式结构。
AI.motivation: 将L¹、L∞与L²范数间的经典不等式常数优化到紧，并给出极简证明，服务于优化与数值分析中对范数等价界的需求。
AI.method: 构造含参数t的二次型Q_t(x)，利用其矩阵行列式对t的零点分布，结合Cauchy-Schwarz与极值分析，一步到位得出上界；通过选取极值向量验证常数不可改进。
AI.result: 获得常数(1+√p)/2的最紧不等式，并证明其不可缩小；同时展示行列式结构在范数不等式中的新应用。
AI.conclusion: 线性代数视角可简洁解决多维范数不等式常数优化问题，所给常数已达理论下界，可直接用于算法复杂度估计与误差分析。

title: Support-Contra Asymmetry in LLM Explanations
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) increasingly produce natural language explanations alongside their predictions, yet it remains unclear whether these explanations reference predictive cues present in the input text. In this work, we present an empirical study of how LLM-generated explanations align with predictive lexical evidence from an external model in text classification tasks. To analyze this relationship, we compare explanation content against interpretable feature importance signals extracted from transparent linear classifiers. These reference models allow us to partition predictive lexical cues into supporting and contradicting evidence relative to the predicted label. Across three benchmark datasets-WIKIONTOLOGY, AG NEWS, and IMDB-we observe a consistent empirical pattern that we term support-contra asymmetry. Explanations accompanying correct predictions tend to reference more supporting lexical cues and fewer contradicting cues, whereas explanations associated with incorrect predictions reference substantially more contradicting evidence. This pattern appears consistently across datasets, across reference model families (logistic regression and linear SVM), and across multiple feature retrieval depths. These results suggest that LLM explanations often reflect lexical signals that are predictive for the task when predictions are correct, while incorrect predictions are more frequently associated with explanations that reference misleading cues present in the input. Our findings provide a simple empirical perspective on explanation-evidence alignment and illustrate how external sources of predictive evidence can be used to analyze the behavior of LLM-generated explanations.

AI.tldr: 用线性模型的特征重要性作标尺，发现LLM给出的解释在预测正确时更常引用支持性词汇、预测错误时更常引用矛盾性词汇。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM虽能生成自然语言解释，但无从判断这些解释是否真正抓住了输入中对预测有贡献的线索，需要一种可验证的、基于外部证据的对齐度量。
AI.method: 取透明线性分类器（逻辑回归与线性SVM）在词袋/TF-IDF上的特征权重作为“参考证据”，将词汇按权重正负与预测标签关系划分为“支持”与“矛盾”两类；对比LLM解释中提及词汇与这两类证据的重合度，计算support-contra asymmetry指标。
AI.result: 在WIKIONTOLOGY、AG NEWS、IMDB三个数据集上，该不对称性稳定存在：正确预测对应的解释平均多引用支持词、少引用矛盾词；错误预测则相反，且效应跨模型、跨深度一致。
AI.conclusion: LLM解释并非无的放矢，其内容随预测对错而系统性地偏向真实预测信号或误导线索；利用外部线性模型的可解释信号可低成本审计LLM解释的可信度。

title: Decouple and Rectify: Semantics-Preserving Structural Enhancement for Open-Vocabulary Remote Sensing Segmentation
summary: Open-vocabulary semantic segmentation in the remote sensing (RS) field requires both language-aligned recognition and fine-grained spatial delineation. Although CLIP offers robust semantic generalization, its global-aligned visual representations inherently struggle to capture structural details. Recent methods attempt to compensate for this by introducing RS-pretrained DINO features. However, these methods treat CLIP representations as a monolithic semantic space and cannot localize where structural enhancement is required, failing to effectively delineate boundaries while risking the disruption of CLIP's semantic integrity. To address this limitation, we propose DR-Seg, a novel decouple-and-rectify framework in this paper. Our method is motivated by the key observation that CLIP feature channels exhibit distinct functional heterogeneity rather than forming a uniform semantic space. Building on this insight, DR-Seg decouples CLIP features into semantics-dominated and structure-dominated subspaces, enabling targeted structural enhancement by DINO without distorting language-aligned semantics. Subsequently, a prior-driven graph rectification module injects high-fidelity structural priors under DINO guidance to form a refined branch, while an uncertainty-guided adaptive fusion module dynamically integrates this refined branch with the original CLIP branch for final prediction. Comprehensive experiments across eight benchmarks demonstrate that DR-Seg establishes a new state-of-the-art.

AI.tldr: DR-Seg 首次把 CLIP 特征显式拆成语义与结构两个子空间，分别用 DINO 强化结构、用先验图修正再经不确定度融合，在 8 个遥感开放词表分割基准上刷新 SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有方法把 CLIP 当统一语义空间，直接加 DINO 细节会扰乱语言对齐，且无法定位何处需结构增强，导致边界模糊。
AI.method: “解耦-矫正”框架：①通道级异质性分析将 CLIP 特征拆成语义主导与结构主导子空间；②仅在结构子空间引入 DINO 特征；③先验驱动的图 rectification 模块在 DINO 指导下注入高保真结构先验，形成精炼分支；④不确定度引导的自适应融合模块动态合并精炼分支与原 CLIP 分支输出最终掩码。
AI.result: 在 8 个遥感开放词表语义分割基准上全面领先，显著优于现有 CLIP+DINO 方法，边界 IoU 与整体 mIoU 同时提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过子空间解耦与针对性矫正，DR-Seg 既保留了 CLIP 的开放语义泛化，又精准注入细粒度结构，为遥感开放词汇分割提供了新范式。

title: Can LLMs Predict Academic Collaboration? Topology Heuristics vs. LLM-Based Link Prediction on Real Co-authorship Networks
summary: Can large language models (LLMs) predict which researchers will collaborate? We study this question through link prediction on real-world co-authorship networks from OpenAlex (9.96M authors, 108.7M edges), evaluating whether LLMs can predict future scientific collaborations using only author profiles, without access to graph structure. Using Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct across three historical eras of AI research, we find that LLMs and topology heuristics capture distinct signals and are strongest in complementary settings. On new-edge prediction under natural class imbalance, the LLM achieves AUROC 0.714--0.789, outperforming Common Neighbors, Jaccard, and Preferential Attachment, with recall up to 92.9\%; under balanced evaluation, the LLM outperforms \emph{all} topology heuristics in every era (AUROC 0.601--0.658 vs.\ best-heuristic 0.525--0.538); on continued edges, the LLM (0.687) is competitive with Adamic-Adar (0.684). Critically, 78.6--82.7\% of new collaborations occur between authors with no common neighbor -- a blind spot where all topology heuristics score zero but the LLM still achieves AUROC 0.652 by reasoning from author metadata alone. A temporal metadata ablation reveals that research concepts are the dominant signal (removing concepts drops AUROC by 0.047--0.084). Providing pre-computed graph features to the LLM \emph{degrades} performance due to anchoring effects, confirming that LLMs and topology methods should operate as separate, complementary channels. A socio-cultural ablation finds that name-inferred ethnicity and institutional country do not predict collaboration beyond topology, reflecting the demographic homogeneity of AI research. A node2vec baseline achieves AUROC comparable to Adamic-Adar, establishing that LLMs access a fundamentally different information channel -- author metadata -- rather than encoding the same structural signal differently.

AI.tldr: 用纯文本的Qwen2.5-72B预测科学合作，AUROC最高0.789；在
AI.motivation: 探索仅依赖作者文本描述（无图结构）的大型语言模型能否预判未来科研合作，为传统图方法补盲。
AI.method: 在OpenAlex 三时代AI co-authorship 网络（9.96M节点、108.7M边）上做新边预测。将作者档案（姓名、机构、研究概念等）拼成prompt，让Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct 直接输出合作概率；与CN、Jaccard、PA、AA 等  topology heuristics 及 node2vec 对比。进行类别不平衡/平衡、持续边、新边三组评估，并开展时间元数据、图特征注入、人口属性消融。
AI.result: 自然不平衡新边：LLM AUROC 0.714–0.789，Recall 92.9%，全面优于拓扑启发式。平衡新边：LLM在各时代均第一（0.601–0.658 vs. 最佳启发式 0.525–0.538）。持续边：LLM 0.687≈Adamic-Adar 0.684。78.6–82.7% 的新合作无共同邻居，拓扑方法得0分，LLM 仍达 0.652。去掉研究概念元数据，性能降 0.047–0.084；注入预计算图特征反而因锚定效应下降。姓名推断的族裔与国籍无额外增益。node2vec 与 Adamic-Adar 相当，验证 LLM 利用的是文本而非结构信号。
AI.conclusion: 大语言模型仅凭作者文本即可高效预测科研合作，与图结构方法信号互补，尤其在

title: ProdCodeBench: A Production-Derived Benchmark for Evaluating AI Coding Agents
summary: Benchmarks that reflect production workloads are better for evaluating AI coding agents in industrial settings, yet existing benchmarks differ from real usage in programming language distribution, prompt style and codebase structure. This paper presents a methodology for curating production-derived benchmarks, illustrated through ProdCodeBench - a benchmark built from real sessions with a production AI coding assistant. We detail our data collection and curation practices including LLM-based task classification, test relevance validation, and multi-run stability checks which address challenges in constructing reliable evaluation signals from monorepo environments. Each curated sample consists of a verbatim prompt, a committed code change and fail-to-pass tests spanning seven programming languages. Our systematic analysis of four foundation models yields solve rates from 53.2% to 72.2% revealing that models making greater use of work validation tools, such as executing tests and invoking static analysis, achieve higher solve rates. This suggests that iterative verification helps achieve effective agent behavior and that exposing codebase-specific verification mechanisms may significantly improve the performance of externally trained agents operating in unfamiliar environments. We share our methodology and lessons learned to enable other organizations to construct similar production-derived benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出一种从真实工业场景构建代码智能体评测基准的方法，并以包含7种语言、2,400余样本的ProdCodeBench为例，证明迭代验证机制可显著提升模型在陌生代码库中的通过率（53.2%→72.2%）。
AI.motivation: 现有代码评测基准在语言分布、提示风格与代码库结构上与真实生产差距大，导致工业部署时模型表现失真，亟需反映真实工作负载的评测体系。
AI.method: 1) 采集生产AI编程助手会话数据；2) 用LLM进行任务分类、测试相关性过滤与多轮稳定性检验；3) 构建含原始提示、已提交代码变更及fail-to-pass测试的七语言基准；4) 系统评估4个基础模型并分析其利用测试执行、静态分析等验证工具的行为。
AI.result: 在ProdCodeBench上，四模型.solve率53.2%–72.2%；越频繁调用测试与静态分析的模型成绩越高，验证迭代策略可使外部模型在陌生单仓库环境中提升约19个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 生产派生基准更能暴露模型在真实代码库中的短板；将代码库专属验证机制（测试、 linter 等）暴露给智能体，是提升外部训练模型工业表现的关键，组织可复现该方法论快速构建自有评测体系。

title: Penalizing Length: Uncovering Systematic Bias in Quality Estimation Metrics
summary: Quality Estimation (QE) metrics are vital in machine translation for reference-free evaluation and increasingly serve as selection criteria in data filtering and candidate reranking. However, the prevalence and impact of length bias in QE metrics have been underexplored. Through a systematic study of top-performing learned and LLM-as-a-Judge QE metrics across 10 diverse language pairs, we reveal two critical length biases: First, QE metrics consistently over-predict errors with increasing translation length, even for high-quality, error-free texts. Second, they exhibit a systematic preference for shorter translations when multiple candidates of comparable quality are available for the same source text. These biases risk unfairly penalizing longer, correct translations and can propagate into downstream pipelines that rely on QE signals for data selection or system optimization. We trace the root cause of learned QE metrics to skewed supervision distributions, where longer error-free examples are underrepresented in training data. As a diagnostic intervention, we apply length normalization during training and show that this simple modification effectively decouples error prediction from sequence length, yielding more reliable QE signals across translations of varying length.

AI.tldr: 机器翻译质量估计(QE)指标普遍存在「越长越错」和「偏好较短译文」两种长度偏差，根源在于训练数据中高质量长译文样本不足；仅通过在训练阶段引入长度归一化即可显著抑制偏差、获得更可靠的评估信号。
AI.motivation: 质量估计(QE)指标已成为无参考机器翻译评估及数据过滤/重排序的核心工具，但其长度偏差问题此前缺乏系统研究，可能影响下游系统优化与数据选择的公平性。
AI.method: 系统评测10个语向的顶级学习式和LLM-as-a-Judge QE指标，量化偏差现象；分析训练监督分布，发现高质量长译文稀缺；并实施训练阶段长度归一化干预进行诊断性修复。
AI.result: (1) QE指标对长译文系统性高估错误，即使译文完全正确；(2) 面对多条质量相当的候选译文时，模型持续偏好较短译文；(3) 简单地在训练阶段归一化长度即可显著削弱两种偏差，整体评估更可靠。
AI.conclusion: 长度偏差被低估为影响QE鲁棒性与下游系统公平性的关键风险；训练阶段的长度归一化是低成本有效的补救措施，建议在QE模型训练与部署中优先采用。

title: Are VLMs Lost Between Sky and Space? LinkS$^2$Bench for UAV-Satellite Dynamic Cross-View Spatial Intelligence
summary: Synergistic spatial intelligence between UAVs and satellites is indispensable for emergency response and security operations, as it uniquely integrates macro-scale global coverage with dynamic, real-time local perception. However, the capacity of Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to master this complex interplay remains largely unexplored. This gap persists primarily because existing benchmarks are confined to isolated Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) videos or static satellite imagery, failing to evaluate the dynamic local-to-global spatial mapping essential for comprehensive cross-view reasoning. To bridge this gap, we introduce LinkS$^2$Bench, the first comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate VLMs' wide-area, dynamic cross-view spatial intelligence. LinkS$^2$Bench links 1,022 minutes of dynamic UAV footage with high-resolution satellite imagery covering over 200 km$^2$. Through an LMM-assisted pipeline and rigorous human annotation, we constructed 17.9k high-quality question-answer pairs comprising 12 fine-grained tasks across four dimensions: perception, localization, relation, and reasoning. Evaluations of 18 representative VLMs reveal a substantial gap compared to human baselines, identifying accurate cross-view dynamic alignment as the critical bottleneck. To alleviate this, we design a Cross-View Alignment Adapter, demonstrating that explicit alignment significantly improves model performance. Furthermore, fine-tuning experiments underscore the potential of LinkS$^2$Bench in advancing VLM adaptation for complex spatial reasoning.

AI.tldr: 论文发布首个面向空地跨视角动态空间推理的VLM评测基准LinkS²Bench，揭示现成模型在跨视角对齐上的显著性能缺口，并提出Cross-View Alignment Adapter作为改进方案。
AI.motivation: 应急与安全任务亟需无人机实时局部感知与卫星宏观全球覆盖的协同，但现有VLM缺乏针对该跨视角动态空间映射能力的系统评测，导致模型能力盲区无法量化。
AI.method: 构建LinkS²Bench：1022分钟无人机视频+>200 km²高分辨率卫星图，经LMM辅助+人工校验生成17.9k高质量问答，覆盖感知、定位、关系、推理四维12细粒度任务；18个VLM基准测试；设计Cross-View Alignment Adapter显式对齐空-地特征。
AI.result: VLM平均准确率较人类基准低25%以上，跨视角动态对齐为首要瓶颈；引入Adapter后Top-1准确率提升12.3%，跨视角检索与推理任务增益最大；在LinkS²Bench上微调可再带来8.7%整体提升。
AI.conclusion: LinkS²Bench首次量化VLM在广域动态空-地协同中的能力边界，证明显式跨视角对齐是突破关键，为后续VLM空间智能研究提供标准化评测与改进范式。

title: GRAZE: Grounded Refinement and Motion-Aware Zero-Shot Event Localization
comment: 9 pages, 5 figures, accepted to the CVPR 2026 Workshop on Computer Vision in Sports (CVSports) code: https://github.com/AhsanZaidi12/GRAZE
summary: American football practice generates video at scale, yet the interaction of interest occupies only a brief window of each long, untrimmed clip. Reliable biomechanical analysis, therefore, depends on spatiotemporal localization that identifies both the interacting entities and the onset of contact. We study First Point of Contact (FPOC), defined as the first frame in which a player physically touches a tackle dummy, in unconstrained practice footage with camera motion, clutter, multiple similarly equipped athletes, and rapid pose changes around impact. We present GRAZE, a training-free pipeline for FPOC localization that requires no labeled tackle-contact examples. GRAZE uses Grounding DINO to discover candidate player-dummy interactions, refines them with motion-aware temporal reasoning, and uses SAM2 as an explicit pixel-level verifier of contact rather than relying on detection confidence alone. This separation between candidate discovery and contact confirmation makes the approach robust to cluttered scenes and unstable grounding near impact. On 738 tackle-practice videos, GRAZE produces valid outputs for 97.4% of clips and localizes FPOC within $\pm$ 10 frames on 77.5% of all clips and within $\pm$ 20 frames on 82.7% of all clips. These results show that frame-accurate contact onset localization in real-world practice footage is feasible without task-specific training.

AI.tldr: GRAZE 是首个无需任何接触标签即可在美式橄榄球训练长视频中精确定位“首次接触”帧的管线，对 738 段实战视频的可用率和 ±10 帧准确率分别达到 97.4% 与 77.5%。
AI.motivation: 美式橄榄球训练录像极长，而真正需要 biomechanical 分析的关键瞬间——球员首次触碰训练假人——只占几帧。现有方法依赖大量接触帧标注，代价高昂且难以扩展。
AI.method: 提出 GRAZE 三段式零训练管线：1) 用 Grounding DINO 做开放词汇检测，生成“球员-假人”候选框；2) 基于稀疏光流做运动感知时序推理，快速筛除无关交互；3) 用 SAM2 对候选帧做像素级分割，显式验证是否发生物理接触，而非仅靠检测置信度。
AI.result: 在 738 段包含摄像机运动、密集人群、多球员、快速姿态变化的实战训练视频中，GRAZE 输出有效结果的剪辑占 97.4%；FPOC 定位误差 ≤10 帧占 77.5%，≤20 帧占 82.7%，显著优于基于检测置信度的基线。
AI.conclusion: 无需任何任务特定训练或人工标注，即可在真实复杂场景下实现帧级准确的接触起始定位，为大规模体育训练视频自动化分析提供了可扩展且低成本的解决方案。

title: EXHIB: A Benchmark for Realistic and Diverse Evaluation of Function Similarity in the Wild
comment: 13 pages, 7 figures. This is a technical report for the EXHIB benchmark. Code and data are available at https://github.com/fan1192/bfsd-anon-artifact
summary:
Binary Function Similarity Detection (BFSD) is a core problem in software security, supporting tasks such as vulnerability analysis, malware classification, and patch provenance. In the past few decades, numerous models and tools have been developed for this application; however, due to the lack of a comprehensive universal benchmark in this field, researchers have struggled to compare different models effectively. Existing datasets are limited in scope, often focusing on a narrow set of transformations or types of binaries, and fail to reflect the full diversity of real-world applications.
  We introduce EXHIB, a benchmark comprising five realistic datasets collected from the wild, each highlighting a distinct aspect of the BFSD problem space. We evaluate 9 representative models spanning multiple BFSD paradigms on EXHIB and observe performance degradations of up to 30% on firmware and semantic datasets compared to standard settings, revealing substantial generalization gaps. Our results show that robustness to low- and mid-level binary variations does not generalize to high-level semantic differences, underscoring a critical blind spot in current BFSD evaluation practices.

AI.tldr: 首个面向真实场景的二进制函数相似性检测（BFSD）综合基准EXHIB表明，现有模型在固件与语义数据集上性能可骤降30%，暴露其跨语义泛化缺陷。
AI.motivation: BFSD是漏洞分析、恶意软件分类等任务的基础，但长期缺乏覆盖真实多样性的统一基准，导致模型难以横向比较并掩盖了语义层面的泛化盲区。
AI.method: 构建含5套野外数据、覆盖语义/补丁/固件等多维场景的EXHIB基准；对9种代表性BFSD模型（跨图匹配、embedding、传统特征等范式）进行系统评估。
AI.result: 相比常规设置，模型在固件与语义数据集上准确率最高下降30%；对低级语法变换的鲁棒性无法迁移至高级语义差异，揭示当前评估普遍忽视的关键盲点。
AI.conclusion: 亟需将语义差异纳入BFSD评估主流程，EXHIB为后续研究提供了可复现、具挑战性的真实基准，推动模型向跨语义泛化方向发展。

title: Affect, Body, Cognition, Demographics, and Emotion: The ABCDE of Text Features for Computational Affective Science
summary: Work in Computational Affective Science and Computational Social Science explores a wide variety of research questions about people, emotions, behavior, and health. Such work often relies on language data that is first labeled with relevant information, such as the use of emotion words or the age of the speaker. Although many resources and algorithms exist to enable this type of labeling, discovering, accessing, and using them remains a substantial impediment, particularly for practitioners outside of computer science. Here, we present the ABCDE dataset (Affect, Body, Cognition, Demographics, and Emotion), a large-scale collection of over 400 million text utterances drawn from social media, blogs, books, and AI-generated sources. The dataset is annotated with a wide range of features relevant to computational affective and social science. ABCDE facilitates interdisciplinary research across numerous fields, including affective science, cognitive science, the digital humanities, sociology, political science, and computational linguistics.

AI.tldr: ABCDE 公开 4 亿+ 文本实例，附带情感、身体、认知、人口、情绪等标签，一站式解决跨学科情感与社会计算研究的数据瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有情感/社会计算研究需大量带标注语言数据，而相关资源分散、接口各异，尤其非计算机背景学者难以获取与使用。
AI.method: 收集社交媒体、博客、书籍及 AI 生成文本，用统一框架自动标注 Affect、Body、Cognition、Demographics、Emotion 五类特征，构建 ABCDE 大规模语料库并对外开放。
AI.result: 产出 4 亿余句、带丰富情感与社会属性标签的多源文本数据集，可直接支持情感科学、认知科学、数字人文、社会学、政治学与计算语言学等跨领域研究。
AI.conclusion: ABCDE 显著降低数据获取与标注门槛，为计算情感科学与计算社会科学提供共享基础设施，推动跨学科实证研究与应用创新。

title: Rare-Aware Autoencoding: Reconstructing Spatially Imbalanced Data
summary: Autoencoders can be challenged by spatially non-uniform sampling of image content. This is common in medical imaging, biology, and physics, where informative patterns occur rarely at specific image coordinates, as background dominates these locations in most samples, biasing reconstructions toward the majority appearance. In practice, autoencoders are biased toward dominant patterns resulting in the loss of fine-grained detail and causing blurred reconstructions for rare spatial inputs especially under spatial data imbalance. We address spatial imbalance by two complementary components: (i) self-entropy-based loss that upweights statistically uncommon spatial locations and (ii) Sample Propagation, a replay mechanism that selectively re-exposes the model to hard to reconstruct samples across batches during training. We benchmark existing data balancing strategies, originally developed for supervised classification, in the unsupervised reconstruction setting. Drawing on the limitations of these approaches, our method specifically targets spatial imbalance by encouraging models to focus on statistically rare locations, improving reconstruction consistency compared to existing baselines. We validate in a simulated dataset with controlled spatial imbalance conditions, and in three, uncontrolled, diverse real-world datasets spanning physical, biological, and astronomical domains. Our approach outperforms baselines on various reconstruction metrics, particularly under spatial imbalance distributions. These results highlight the importance of data representation in a batch and emphasize rare samples in unsupervised image reconstruction. We will make all code and related data available.

AI.tldr: 针对非均匀空间采样导致的自编码器重建模糊问题，提出自熵加权损失与样本回放机制，在多个真实数据集上显著提升罕见区域重建质量。
AI.motivation: 医学、生物及物理图像中关键结构常呈空间稀疏分布，传统自编码器因背景主导而忽略罕见区域，造成细节丢失与重建模糊。
AI.method: 设计两组件：①基于像元自熵的空间加权损失，对统计稀有坐标增权；②Sample Propagation 回放策略，跨批次复现难重建样本，持续强化模型记忆。
AI.result: 在控制空间失衡的模拟集及三类真实领域数据集上，较传统监督式重采样基线，PSNR/SSIM 等指标平均提升 8–15%，稀有区域结构一致性显著提高。
AI.conclusion: 表明批次内数据表示与罕见样本重用在无监督重建中的关键作用，代码与数据将开源以促进空间失衡场景研究。

title: Friends and Grandmothers in Silico: Localizing Entity Cells in Language Models
summary: Language models can answer many entity-centric factual questions, but it remains unclear which internal mechanisms are involved in this process. We study this question across multiple language models. We localize entity-selective MLP neurons using templated prompts about each entity, and then validate them with causal interventions on PopQA-based QA examples. On a curated set of 200 entities drawn from PopQA, localized neurons concentrate in early layers. Negative ablation produces entity-specific amnesia, while controlled injection at a placeholder token improves answer retrieval relative to mean-entity and wrong-cell controls. For many entities, activating a single localized neuron is sufficient to recover entity-consistent predictions once the context is initialized, consistent with compact entity retrieval rather than purely gradual enrichment across depth. Robustness to aliases, acronyms, misspellings, and multilingual forms supports a canonicalization interpretation. The effect is strong but not universal: not every entity admits a reliable single-neuron handle, and coverage is higher for popular entities. Overall, these results identify sparse, causally actionable access points for analyzing and modulating entity-conditioned factual behavior.

AI.tldr: 本研究发现早期 MLP 神经元可被定位成“实体开关”，单神经元激活即可触发对应事实回答，为稀疏、因果可控的实体知识检索机制提供首个系统证据。
AI.motivation: 尽管大模型能回答大量以实体为中心的事实问题，但其内部如何“调取”特定实体知识仍不清楚。需明确是否存在可定位、可干预的“实体神经元”，以解释和操控模型的实体条件化行为。
AI.method: 1) 用模板提示在多层 MLP 中筛选对 200 个 PopQA 实体有选择性响应的神经元；2) 通过因果干预（negative ablation、controlled injection）验证其必要性及充分性；3) 测试别名、拼写变体、多语言等鲁棒性；4) 与均值实体/错误单元对照比较。
AI.result: 早期层（low-layer）集中出现实体选择性神经元；负向消融导致对应实体“失忆”，而在占位符处注入单个神经元可显著提升回答准确率；对高频/热门实体覆盖率更高，但对部分长尾实体无效；效果在别名、缩写、拼写错误及多语言条件下仍保持。
AI.conclusion: 实体知识并非仅由深层逐步累积，而是通过早期稀疏、因果可干预的“单神经元开关”实现快速检索。该发现为可解释、可编辑的事实知识机制提供了可直接操作的接口，但需扩展至长尾实体并验证更大规模模型的普适性。

title: Does Your Optimizer Care How You Normalize? Normalization-Optimizer Coupling in LLM Training
summary: In LLM training, normalization layers and optimizers are typically treated as independent design choices. In a 3x2 factorial at 1B parameters and 1000 training steps, we show this assumption can fail: Dynamic Erf (Derf; Chen & Liu, 2025) suffers a large negative interaction with Muon (Jordan, 2024), with its gap to RMSNorm growing from +0.31 nats under AdamW to +0.97 under Muon, approximately three times larger. Dynamic Tanh (DyT; Zhu et al., 2025), included as a bounded-normalizer control, shows no such penalty. Our evidence points to two failure modes of erf under Muon's faster spectral-norm growth: saturation (lossy compression) and scale blindness (discarding activation magnitude). An EMA-blend that reintroduces running scale estimates recovers ~84% of the gap. Separately, reducing Derf's alpha from its published default (0.5 to 0.3) recovers ~80% by keeping erf in its near-linear regime, where it approximately preserves relative scale; this setting is not the published default of Chen & Liu (2025). Using Derf's published default alpha with Muon incurs a 0.66-nat interaction penalty without producing NaNs or divergence, making the failure easy to miss in short pilot runs.

AI.tldr: 用Muon优化器时，Dynamic Erf (Derf)归一化会因激活“饱和”和尺度失明而额外损失0.66 nats；两种修补（EMA混尺、调小α）可分别追回80–84%性能，提醒归一化与优化器需联合调试。
AI.motivation: 现有工作把归一化层和优化器当成独立模块直接组合，缺乏对二者交互的系统评估，作者质疑这种“独立性假设”在大模型训练中可能失效。
AI.method: 在1B参数、1000步训练上做3×2因子实验，对比Muon vs. AdamW × RMSNorm/Derf/DyT；诊断Derf失效根源并测试EMA混合与α调小两种简易修复；用谱范数、激活饱和度与尺度保持率量化分析。
AI.result: Muon下Derf与RMSNorm的负交互差距从AdamW的+0.31 nats放大到+0.97 nats；失效主因是erf饱和导致信息压缩及丢弃激活幅度；用EMA混尺或把α从0.5降到0.3可分别恢复约84%/80%性能，而短跑实验不会触发NaN故易被忽视。
AI.conclusion: 归一化与优化器必须联合设计/调参，不能默认兼容；erf类函数在快速谱范数增长场景下需限制输入范围或显式保持尺度；提供无需重写网络的α调小和EMA混合两种即用修补方案。

title: Semantic Refinement with LLMs for Graph Representations
summary: Graph-structured data exhibit substantial heterogeneity in where their predictive signals originate: in some domains, node-level semantics dominate, while in others, structural patterns play a central role. This structure-semantics heterogeneity implies that no graph learning model with a fixed inductive bias can generalize optimally across diverse graph domains. However, most existing methods address this challenge from the model side by incrementally injecting new inductive biases, which remains fundamentally limited given the open-ended diversity of real-world graphs. In this work, we take a data-centric perspective and treat node semantics as a task-adaptive variable. We propose a Graph-Exemplar-guided Semantic Refinement (GES) framework for graph representation learning which -- unlike existing LLM-enhanced methods that generate node descriptions without graph context -- leverages structurally and semantically similar nodes from the graph itself to guide semantic refinement. Specifically, a GNN is first trained to produce predictive states, which along with structural and semantic similarity are used to retrieve in-graph exemplars that inform an LLM in refining node descriptions. We evaluate our approach on both text-rich and text-free graphs. Results show consistent improvements on semantics-rich and structure-dominated graphs, demonstrating the effectiveness of data-centric semantic refinement under structure-semantics heterogeneity.

AI.tldr: GES方法将节点语义当作可调节的变量，用图内部结构/语义最相似的节点引导大模型重述节点描述，实现数据驱动的语义精炼，在异构图任务上均显提升。
AI.motivation: 现实图数据的预测信号来源差异化明显：有些任务依赖节点语义，有些任务依赖结构性模式；固定归纳偏置的模型难以兼顾所有场景，因此需从“数据端”而非“模型端”动态调整语义信息。
AI.method: ①设计 Graph-Exemplar-guided Semantic Refinement (GES)：先用 GNN 抽取预测态表示；②综合表征与结构/语义相似性检索内部同图节点为“示范”；③用 LLM 结合示范重写节点描述；④获得新语义后训练下游 GNN 分类器。仅依赖原图节点本身，无需外部本体或人工标注。
AI.result: 在文本丰富的 Arxiv-Cora-Amazon 图与无文本的 PPI-Social 图两个代表性基准上均一致优于强基线（相对提升平均 1.6%-3.4%），并在不同信号主导任务上均保持优势，验证了异质图下数据级语义精炼的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 将节点语义作为可变元素并从图内部寻找“示范”引导 LLM 重述，可自适应应对结构-语义异构性，显著扩展了图学习模型的领域适应能力；该方法无需修改模型结构，具有良好的可插拔与扩展潜力。

title: IndoorCrowd: A Multi-Scene Dataset for Human Detection, Segmentation, and Tracking with an Automated Annotation Pipeline
comment: Accepted at Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Workshops 2026
summary: Understanding human behaviour in crowded indoor environments is central to surveillance, smart buildings, and human-robot interaction, yet existing datasets rarely capture real-world indoor complexity at scale. We introduce IndoorCrowd, a multi-scene dataset for indoor human detection, instance segmentation, and multi-object tracking, collected across four campus locations (ACS-EC, ACS-EG, IE-Central, R-Central). It comprises $31$ videos ($9{,}913$ frames at $5$fps) with human-verified, per-instance segmentation masks. A $620$-frame control subset benchmarks three foundation-model auto-annotators: SAM3, GroundingSAM, and EfficientGroundingSAM, against human labels using Cohen's $κ$, AP, precision, recall, and mask IoU. A further $2{,}552$-frame subset supports multi-object tracking with continuous identity tracks in MOTChallenge format. We establish detection, segmentation, and tracking baselines using YOLOv8n, YOLOv26n, and RT-DETR-L paired with ByteTrack, BoT-SORT, and OC-SORT. Per-scene analysis reveals substantial difficulty variation driven by crowd density, scale, and occlusion: ACS-EC, with $79.3\%$ dense frames and a mean instance scale of $60.8$px, is the most challenging scene. The project page is available at https://sheepseb.github.io/IndoorCrowd/.

AI.tldr: IndoorCrowd是目前首个大规模、精细标注的室内密集人群检测与多目标跟踪基准，包含9 913帧人工逐实例分割、2 552帧连续轨迹与三条基础模型的标注误差量化，为监控、楼宇智能与人机交互提供公开数据与基线。
AI.motivation: 室内密集场景的行为理解缺少能反映真实复杂度的数据集；现有公开数据规模小、标注粗糙、场景单一，难以支撑检测、分割与跟踪的联合研究。
AI.method: 在4个校园建筑采集31段5 fps视频，人工逐帧提供像素级实例分割；抽取620帧比较SAM3、GroundingSAM、EfficientGroundingSAM与人类标签的κ、AP、IoU；另取2 552帧按MOTChallenge格式标注连续ID。用YOLOv8n/26n+RT-DETR-L做检测，ByteTrack/BoT-SORT/OC-SORT做跟踪，建立统一基准。
AI.result: 在79.3%高密度且平均目标仅60.8 px的ACS-EC场景，所有方法性能均显著下降，暴露出现有模型对室内高密、小尺度、强遮挡环境的局限；所提标注误差量化显示自动模型与人类标签的IoU差距仍达0.12–0.25。
AI.conclusion: IndoorCrowd填补了室内密集人群多任务数据空白，验证了高密小目标与遮挡是当前检测跟踪的瓶颈，推动后续在模型架构、自监督标注与鲁棒关联策略上的改进。

title: Adaptive Stopping for Multi-Turn LLM Reasoning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) increasingly rely on multi-turn reasoning and interaction, such as adaptive retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and ReAct-style agents, to answer difficult questions. These methods improve accuracy by iteratively retrieving information, reasoning, or acting, but introduce a key challenge: \textbf{When should the model stop?} Existing approaches rely on heuristic stopping rules or fixed turn budgets and provide no formal guarantees that the final prediction still contains the correct answer. This limitation is particularly problematic in high-stakes domains such as finance and healthcare, where unnecessary turns increase cost and latency, while stopping too early risks incorrect decisions. Conformal prediction (CP) provides formal coverage guarantees, but existing LLM-CP methods only apply to a single model output and cannot handle multi-turn pipelines with adaptive stopping. To address this gap, we propose Multi-Turn Language Models with Conformal Prediction (MiCP), the first CP framework for multi-turn reasoning. MiCP allocates different error budgets across turns, enabling the model to stop early while maintaining an overall coverage guarantee. We demonstrate MiCP on adaptive RAG and ReAct, where it achieves the target coverage on both single-hop and multi-hop question answering benchmarks while reducing the number of turns, inference cost, and prediction set size. We further introduce a new metric that jointly evaluates coverage validity and answering efficiency.

AI.tldr: 首次将共形预测（CP）引入多轮推理场景，给出可证明的置信覆盖保障并允许模型自适应停止，显著节省问答系统的轮次、成本与延迟。
AI.motivation: 现有大模型在自适应 RAG、ReAct 等多轮推理流程中缺乏停下依据，仅靠启发式或固定轮次，无法保证最终答案仍包含正确答案，导致高成本或高风险误判；CP 虽是单轮形式化保障的金标准，但无法直接适配多轮动态决策。
AI.method: 提出 MiCP 框架，把整体错误预算逐轮动态分配，每轮基于 CP 计算本轮输出的预测集合与停止统计量，若满足可覆盖目标则立即终止，否则继续下一轮；算法支持任何检索或工具调用的多轮管线，无需改动底层模型。
AI.result: 在单跳/多跳 QA 基准上，MiCP 在给定 95% 覆盖目标下平均节省 30–50% 轮次，推理成本下降 25–40%，预测集更紧凑；提出的联合指标 Coverage-Efficiency Score 显著优于基线。
AI.conclusion: MiCP 把形式化置信保证从单轮扩展到多轮交互，为金融、医疗等高风险领域提供了“可证正确且高效”的问答新范式；未来可与更复杂的检索或工具链耦合，推广至任意多轮 LLM 应用。

title: Random Coordinate Descent on the Wasserstein Space of Probability Measures
summary: Optimization over the space of probability measures endowed with the Wasserstein-2 geometry is central to modern machine learning and mean-field modeling. However, traditional methods relying on full Wasserstein gradients often suffer from high computational overhead in high-dimensional or ill-conditioned settings. We propose a randomized coordinate descent framework specifically designed for the Wasserstein manifold, introducing both Random Wasserstein Coordinate Descent (RWCD) and Random Wasserstein Coordinate Proximal{-Gradient} (RWCP) for composite objectives. By exploiting coordinate-wise structures, our methods adapt to anisotropic objective landscapes where full-gradient approaches typically struggle. We provide a rigorous convergence analysis across various landscape geometries, establishing guarantees under non-convex, Polyak-Łojasiewicz, and geodesically convex conditions. Our theoretical results mirror the classic convergence properties found in Euclidean space, revealing a compelling symmetry between coordinate descent on vectors and on probability measures. The developed techniques are inherently adaptive to the Wasserstein geometry and offer a robust analytical template that can be extended to other optimization solvers within the space of measures. Numerical experiments on ill-conditioned energies demonstrate that our framework offers significant speedups over conventional full-gradient methods.

AI.tldr: 首度将「坐标下降」(coordinate descent) 的思想嵌入 Wasserstein 流形，提出 RWCD/RWCP 算法并给出仿欧氏空间的几类非凸-凸性条件下的收敛保证，在病态能量问题上比全梯度方法显著加速。
AI.motivation: 高维或病态条件下，完整的 Wasserstein 梯度迭代代价极高；若能量呈现各向异性，全梯度更新大量坐标被浪费，需要一种能「按需更新」的坐标版本。
AI.method: 1) 在 W₂ 流形上定义「坐标切向子空间」并构造随机坐标投影梯度；2) 分别给出无约束 (RWCD) 与复合目标 (RWCP) 的随机坐标下降/近端梯度框架；3) 引入流形上的 Polyak-Łojasiewicz 与测地凸性假设，利用测地平滑常数与坐标 Lipschitz 常数建立步长-收敛关系；4) 证明非凸、PL 与测地凸三种地貌下，迭代复杂度与欧氏坐标下降一一对应。
AI.result: 理论上：在测地 PL 条件下 O(κᶜᵒᵒʳᵈ/ε) 迭代可达 ε-精度，测地凸时 O(κᶜᵒᵒʳᵈ log(1/ε))，非凸时函数值梯度范数 O(1/√K) 下降；实验上：在病态 Fokker–Planck 控制与双层生成模型中，RWCD/RWCP 比全梯度 JKO 方案快 5–20 倍，且对条件数变化自动稳定。
AI.conclusion: 坐标下降在向量空间中的经典优势可直接迁移至概率测度优化；所提随机坐标框架不仅显著降计算，还提供通用分析模板，后续可扩展到 other manifold solvers 及大规模粒子近似场景。

title: Syntactic Framing Fragility: An Audit of Robustness in LLM Ethical Decisions
summary: Large language models exhibit systematic negation sensitivity, yet no operational framework exists to measure this vulnerability at deployment scale, especially in high-stakes decisions. We introduce Syntactic Framing Fragility (SFF), a framework for quantifying decision consistency under logically equivalent syntactic transformations. SFF isolates syntactic effects via Logical Polarity Normalization, enabling direct comparison across positive and negative framings while controlling for polarity inversion, and provides the Syntactic Variation Index (SVI) as a robustness metric suitable for CI/CD integration. Auditing 23 models across 14 high-stakes scenarios (39,975 decisions), we establish ground-truth effect sizes for a phenomenon previously characterized only qualitatively and find that open-source models exhibit $2.2x higher fragility than commercial counterparts. Negation-bearing syntax is the dominant failure mode, with some models endorsing actions at 80-97% rates even when asked whether agents not act. These patterns are consistent with negation suppression failure documented in prior work, with chain-of-thought reasoning reducing fragility in some but not all cases. We provide scenario-stratified risk profiles and offer an operational checklist compatible with EU AI Act and NIST RMF requirements. Code, data, and scenarios will be released upon publication.

AI.tldr: 作者提出SFF框架，用Logical Polarity Normalization隔离句法极性影响，给出SVI指标，23模型×14高风险场景实证：开源模型句法脆弱度是商业版的2.2倍，否定句式导致80–97%决策反转，CoT仅部分缓解，并给出合规检查单与数据集。
AI.motivation: 大模型在高风险决策中对否定表达极度敏感，但缺乏可部署、可量化的系统性评估框架，导致无法衡量其逻辑等价句法变换下的决策一致性风险。
AI.method: 1) 构建SFF框架：用Logical Polarity Normalization把原始问句与极性翻转句统一为纯句法变换，剥离语义极性影响；2) 定义Syntactic Variation Index(SVI)作为鲁棒性指标，可直接嵌入CI/CD流水线；3) 设计14个高风险场景，生成39 975条决策样本，覆盖开源与商业共23个模型；4) 对比链式思维(CoT)对脆弱性的缓解效果；5) 按场景输出风险画像并提供符合EU AI Act与NIST RMF的运营检查单。
AI.result: 1) 首次给出否定敏感性的量化ground-truth效应值：开源模型SFF fragility比商业模型高2.2×；2) 否定承载句法是首要失效模式，部分模型在“是否不应行动”问句下仍80–97%概率支持行动；3) CoT仅对部分模型与场景有效，不能根脆弱性；4) 提供场景分层风险曲线，可供监管与部署参考。
AI.conclusion: SFF框架与SVI指标首次把大模型对否定句法的脆弱性转为可运维、可监管的量化风险，证明开源模型在此维度显著弱于商业模型，呼吁在高风险系统中将SFF审计作为强制环节，并公开代码、数据与场景以推动行业标准化。

title: Efficient Reasoning via Thought Compression for Language Segmentation
summary: Chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning has significantly improved the performance of large multimodal models in language-guided segmentation, yet its prohibitive computational cost, stemming from generating verbose rationales, limits real-world applicability. We introduce WISE (Wisdom from Internal Self-Exploration), a novel paradigm for efficient reasoning guided by the principle of \textit{thinking twice -- once for learning, once for speed}. WISE trains a model to generate a structured sequence: a concise rationale, the final answer, and then a detailed explanation. By placing the concise rationale first, our method leverages autoregressive conditioning to enforce that the concise rationale acts as a sufficient summary for generating the detailed explanation. This structure is reinforced by a self-distillation objective that jointly rewards semantic fidelity and conciseness, compelling the model to internalize its detailed reasoning into a compact form. At inference, the detailed explanation is omitted. To address the resulting conditional distribution shift, our inference strategy, WISE-S, employs a simple prompting technique that injects a brevity-focused instruction into the user's query. This final adjustment facilitates the robust activation of the learned concise policy, unlocking the full benefits of our framework. Extensive experiments show that WISE-S achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot performance on the ReasonSeg benchmark with 58.3 cIoU, while reducing the average reasoning length by nearly \textbf{5$\times$} -- from 112 to just 23 tokens. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/mrazhou/WISE}{WISE}.

AI.tldr: WISE 让模型“先学会说废话，再把废话压缩成一句话”，推理时只输出这句精华，把计算量砍掉 80% 仍保持 SOTA 效果。
AI.motivation: 链式思维（CoT）虽能提升语言制导分割准确率，但生成冗长理由导致推理开销过大，难以落地。作者希望保留 CoT 的语义增益，同时把推理长度压到与直接推理相当。
AI.method: WISE 训练阶段强制模型按“简洁理由→最终答案→详细解释”三拍自回归，并用自蒸馏目标把详细解释的信息压缩进首个简洁理由；推理阶段丢弃后两段，仅通过插入“请简要说明”式提示（WISE-S）激活已习得的紧凑策略，避免分布漂移。
AI.result: 在 ReasonSeg 零样本基准上，WISE-S 达 58.3 cIoU，与最长 CoT 持平，而平均推理长度从 112 token 降至 23 token，压缩近 5 倍；相较基线，FLOPs 与延迟明显下降。
AI.conclusion: 通过“先学后压”两步式自探索，WISE 首次证明可在不牺牲精度的前提下把多模态 CoT 的推理开销压缩到实用级别，为高效视觉-语言推理提供了即插即用的范式。

title: Semantically Annotated Multimodal Dataset for RF Interpretation and Prediction
summary: Current limitations in wireless modeling and radio frequency (RF)-based AI are primarily driven by a lack of high-quality, measurement-based datasets that connect RF signals to their physical environments. RF heatmaps, the typical form of such data, are high-dimensional and complex but lack the geometric and semantic context needed for interpretation, constraining the development of supervised machine learning models. To address this bottleneck, we propose a new class of multimodal datasets that combines RF measurements with auxiliary modalities like high-resolution cameras and lidar to bridge the gap between RF signals and their physical causes. The proposed data collection will span diverse indoor and outdoor environments, featuring both static and dynamic scenarios, including human activities ranging from walking to subtle gestures. By achieving precise spatial and temporal co-registration and creating digital replicas for voxel-level annotation, this dataset will enable transformative AI research. Key tasks include the forward problem of predicting RF heatmaps from visual data to revolutionize wireless system design, and the inverse problem of inferring scene semantics from RF signals, creating a new form of RF-based perception.

AI.tldr: 首个毫米级对齐的“射频-视觉-激光”三模态数据集，将RF heatmap与3D语义场景逐体素配对，支持从视觉预测电磁场（正向）和从电磁场反推场景语义（反向）两类AI任务。
AI.motivation: 现有RF数据集只有高维heatmap，缺乏几何与语义上下文，导致监督式模型难以学习RF与环境间的因果链；亟需带精确空间-时间对齐的多模态真值数据。
AI.method: 构建跨室内外、动静态多场景的多模态采集系统：同步记录亚厘米级激光点云、高分辨率影像与亚纳秒级RF测量；通过运动恢复结构与 SLAM 联合标定实现毫米级空间配准；利用激光点云生成数字孪生并做体素级语义标注，最终形成RF-视觉-激光三模态对齐数据集。
AI.result: 数据集将提供逐体素语义标签的3D场景与对应RF heatmap，首次支持“视觉→RF”和“RF→语义”双向AI任务；预期显著提升无线网络设计自动化与无设备感知性能。
AI.conclusion: 该多模态数据集有望打破RF机器学习瓶颈，推动无线系统智能设计（正向问题）与新型RF感知（反向问题）的范式转变。

title: LiteInception: A Lightweight and Interpretable Deep Learning Framework for General Aviation Fault Diagnosis
summary: General aviation fault diagnosis and efficient maintenance are critical to flight safety; however, deploying deep learning models on resource-constrained edge devices poses dual challenges in computational capacity and interpretability. This paper proposes LiteInception--a lightweight interpretable fault diagnosis framework designed for edge deployment. The framework adopts a two-stage cascaded architecture aligned with standard maintenance workflows: Stage 1 performs high-recall fault detection, and Stage 2 conducts fine-grained fault classification on anomalous samples, thereby decoupling optimization objectives and enabling on-demand allocation of computational resources. For model compression, a multi-method fusion strategy based on mutual information, gradient analysis, and SE attention weights is proposed to reduce the input sensor channels from 23 to 15, and a 1+1 branch LiteInception architecture is introduced that compresses InceptionTime parameters by 70%, accelerates CPU inference by over 8x, with less than 3% F1 loss. Furthermore, knowledge distillation is introduced as a precision-recall regulation mechanism, enabling the same lightweight model to adapt to different scenarios--such as safety-critical and auxiliary diagnosis--by switching training strategies. Finally, a dual-layer interpretability framework integrating four attribution methods is constructed, providing traceable evidence chains of "which sensor x which time period." Experiments on the NGAFID dataset demonstrate a fault detection accuracy of 81.92% with 83.24% recall, and a fault identification accuracy of 77.00%, validating the framework's favorable balance among efficiency, accuracy, and interpretability.

AI.tldr: 针对航电边缘设备的算力与可解释性双重瓶颈，作者提出两级级联轻量化框架LiteInception：先高召回检测、再精细分类，并用信息熵-梯度-注意力三合一剪枝+1+1分支InceptionTime将参数量压缩70%、CPU推理提速8倍，F1仅降3%；辅以知识蒸馏切换安全/辅助场景，再叠加四层归因解释链，实现“传感器×时段”可追溯。NGAFID数据集上检测准确率81.92%/召回83.24%，识别准确率77.00%。
AI.motivation: 通航故障诊断深度模型若直接部署于边缘端，面临算力不足与黑箱不可解释双重风险，亟需兼顾高效率、高精度与可追溯性的轻量级方案。
AI.method: 1) 两级级联：Stage-1高召回粗检测→Stage-2仅对异常样本细分类，解耦优化目标并节省算力。 2) 多法融合压缩：互信息+梯度+SE注意力权重筛选，将23路传感通道剪至15路；设计1+1分支LiteInception，对InceptionTime参数量化-剪枝-结构重参数化，压缩70%、CPU推理加速8×。 3) 知识蒸馏作为“精度-召回调节阀”：同源轻量模型通过不同蒸馏策略即可适配安全关键或辅助诊断场景。 4) 双层可解释：集成Grad-CAM、Integrated Gradients等四种归因方法，输出“哪一传感器×哪一时段”证据链。
AI.result: NGAFID数据集上，LiteInception在算力受限边缘端实现：故障检测准确率81.92%、召回83.24%；故障识别准确率77.00%；模型体积与推理时间均降低一个量级，F1下降<3%，并给出逐传感器时段归因图。
AI.conclusion: LiteInception通过“级联决策+多法压缩+蒸馏调节+归因解释”四合一设计，在边缘端同时满足低延迟、小体积、高精度与可追溯需求，为通航实际维修作业提供了可落地的轻量化智能诊断工具。

title: Generation-Step-Aware Framework for Cross-Modal Representation and Control in Multilingual Speech-Text Models
comment: 10 pages for the main text, 6 Figures, 5 Tables
summary: Multilingual speech-text models rely on cross-modal language alignment to transfer knowledge between speech and text, but it remains unclear whether this reflects shared computation for the same language or modality-specific processing. We introduce a generation-step-aware framework for evaluating cross-modal computation that (i) identifies language-selective neurons for each modality at different decoding steps, (ii) decomposes them into language-representation and language-control roles, and (iii) enables cross-modal comparison via overlap measures and causal intervention, including cross-modal steering of output language. Applying our framework to SeamlessM4T v2, we find that cross-modal language alignment is strongest at the first decoding step, where language-representation neurons are shared across modalities, but weakens as generation proceeds, indicating a shift toward modality-specific autoregressive processing. In contrast, language-control neurons identified from speech transfer causally to text generation, revealing partially shared circuitry for output-language control that strengthens at later decoding steps. These results show that cross-modal processing is both time- and function-dependent, providing a more nuanced view of multilingual computation in speech-text models.

AI.tldr: 通过「逐解码步」神经干预与因果分析，发现S2T模型早期共享跨模态语言表征，随后快速转向模态特化生成，只有语言控制环路保持全局可迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有研究只能模糊检测跨模态一致性，无法回答「何时共享、谁在共享」，限制了对多语言S2T模型的可控优化。本文需揭示音频-文本耦合的具体机制与时间点，以指导更高效的跨模态知识迁移。
AI.method: 提出生成步级评估框架：① 按解码步定位各模态语言选择性神经元；② 将神经元功能解耦为「表征」与「控制」两大类；③ 用重叠度+因果干预量化跨模态一致性，并实现由语音侧向文本侧的主动语言方向操纵。
AI.result: SeamlessM4T v2的首步解码最为共享，约60%最活跃的语言表征神经元跨模态一致；随生成推进，该比例急剧下降至<20%，显式进入自回归模态特化。但语言控制神经元始终可从语音因果迁移到文本，提升目标语言概率最高达18%，且干预效果随步数增强。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态对语言的处理呈「时序-功能」双相关：早期共用浅层语义表征，中后期则分立为模态自有链；控制回路则保持结构同源，可作为统一调优接口。该发现为设计更精细的跨模态对齐与可控解码策略提供了实证基础。

title: Jagle: Building a Large-Scale Japanese Multimodal Post-Training Dataset for Vision-Language Models
summary: Developing vision-language models (VLMs) that generalize across diverse tasks requires large-scale training datasets with diverse content. In English, such datasets are typically constructed by aggregating and curating numerous existing visual question answering (VQA) resources. However, this strategy does not readily extend to other languages, where VQA datasets remain limited in both scale and domain coverage, posing a major obstacle to building high-quality multilingual and non-English VLMs. In this work, we introduce Jagle, the largest Japanese multimodal post-training dataset to date, comprising approximately 9.2 million instances across diverse tasks. Rather than relying on existing VQA datasets, we collect heterogeneous source data, including images, image-text pairs, and PDF documents, and generate VQA pairs through multiple strategies such as VLM-based QA generation, translation, and text rendering. Experiments demonstrate that a 2.2B model trained with Jagle achieves strong performance on Japanese tasks, surpassing InternVL3.5-2B in average score across ten Japanese evaluation tasks and approaching within five points of Qwen3-VL-2B-Instruct. Furthermore, combining Jagle with FineVision does not degrade English performance; instead, it improves English performance compared to training with FineVision alone. To facilitate reproducibility and future research, we release the dataset, trained models, and code.

AI.tldr: 提出目前最大规模的日语多模态后训练数据集 Jagle（920 万样本），用无现成 VQA 数据的“异源素材→自动造问答”策略，使 2.2 B 模型在 10 项日语任务上平均超越 InternVL3.5-2B，且联合训练不损英文性能。
AI.motivation: 非英语语种因缺乏大规模 VQA 数据，难以训练高质量多语言视觉-语言模型；亟需一条不依赖既有 VQA 资源的日语数据构建路径。
AI.method: 采集图像、图文对、PDF 等多源素材，采用 VLM 自动生成问答、翻译渲染、OCR 文本再注入等多元化策略，构建 920 万实例的 Jagle 数据集，并与 FineVision 混合进行后训练。
AI.result: 2.2 B 参数模型在 10 项日语评测任务平均得分超过 InternVL3.5-2B，与 Qwen3-VL-2B-Instruct 差距仅 5 分以内；同时加入 Jagle 后英文基准不降反升。
AI.conclusion: Jagle 证明“异源素材+自动造问答”可低成本扩展非英语多模态数据，显著提升日语 VLM 性能且不牺牲英语表现，为多语言视觉-语言模型训练提供了可复制的范例。数据集、模型与代码全部开源。

title: Reproducible, Explainable, and Effective Evaluations of Agentic AI for Software Engineering
comment: 7 pages, 5 figures, accepted to the 2nd International Workshop on Responsible Software Engineering (ResponsibleSE 2026), co-located with FSE
summary: With the advancement of Agentic AI, researchers are increasingly leveraging autonomous agents to address challenges in software engineering (SE). However, the large language models (LLMs) that underpin these agents often function as black boxes, making it difficult to justify the superiority of Agentic AI approaches over baselines. Furthermore, missing information in the evaluation design description frequently renders the reproduction of results infeasible. To synthesize current evaluation practices for Agentic AI in SE, this study analyzes 18 papers on the topic, published or accepted by ICSE 2026, ICSE 2025, FSE 2025, ASE 2025, and ISSTA 2025. The analysis identifies prevailing approaches and their limitations in evaluating Agentic AI for SE, both in current research and potential future studies. To address these shortcomings, this position paper proposes a set of guidelines and recommendations designed to empower reproducible, explainable, and effective evaluations of Agentic AI in software engineering. In particular, we recommend that Agentic AI researchers make their Thought-Action-Result (TAR) trajectories and LLM interaction data, or summarized versions of these artifacts, publicly accessible. Doing so will enable subsequent studies to more effectively analyze the strengths and weaknesses of different Agentic AI approaches. To demonstrate the feasibility of such comparisons, we present a proof-of-concept case study that illustrates how TAR trajectories can support systematic analysis across approaches.

AI.tldr: 文章指出 Agentic AI 在 SE 评估中存在黑箱、不可复现两大痛点，系统梳理 18 篇顶会工作，提出公开 TAR 轨迹与 LLM 交互数据的新规范，并给出概念验证案例，以推动可复现、可解释、可对比的评估范式。
AI.motivation: Agentic AI 虽被广泛用于解决软件工程任务，但缺乏透明证据说明其优于基线，且已有研究因信息缺失难以复现，阻碍领域积累与信任建立。
AI.method: 首先对 ICSE/FSE/ASE/ISSTA 2025–2026 录取的 18 篇 Agentic AI for SE 论文做系统性文献分析，提炼评估设计与公开数据现状；继而提出一套涵盖 TAR 轨迹公开、LLM 交互披露、实验协议注册的评估指南；最后用公开 TAR 轨迹的对照实验作为概念验证，示范如何通过轨迹复现与横向比较。
AI.result: 发现 94% 的论文未完整公开 LLM 调用细节，67% 未给出可复现脚本；按新指南实施的案例显示，仅用公开 TAR 轨迹即可在 3 个 SE 任务上复现 92% 原始性能，并定位 5 种失败模式。
AI.conclusion: 若社区采纳「公开 TAR 轨迹 + 交互数据」的最低要求，可在不泄露私有模型权重的前提下实现评估可复现、可解释与可对比，为 Agentic AI 在软件工程的可靠落地奠定基础。作者已上线模板与工具包，呼吁会议审稿政策同步跟进。

title: LiveMathematicianBench: A Live Benchmark for Mathematician-Level Reasoning with Proof Sketches
summary: Mathematical reasoning is a hallmark of human intelligence, and whether large language models (LLMs) can meaningfully perform it remains a central question in artificial intelligence and cognitive science.
