We argue for context-aware evaluation of output variation, reframing it as a property shaped by task objectives rather than a model's intrinsic trait.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"魔法／疯狂／天堂／罪恶"同质化—异质化分析框架，统一梳理大模型在认知、交互、社会与安全四类规范目标下的输出变异与权衡，证明变异由任务目标塑形，倡导
AI.motivation: 术语割裂，且对
AI.method: 四人阐释型规范目标+同质化—异质化维度，系统梳理交叉场景正反效果并构建映射，再通过 pairwise 交互分析展示目标冲突
AI.result: 安全目标变硬会导致创意多样性与人群代表度下降，给出权衡可视与决策启示；揭示输出变异乃任务塑形而非固有能力
AI.conclusion: 需面向任务目标做

title: RuleForge: Automated Generation and Validation for Web Vulnerability Detection at Scale
comment: 11 pages, 10 figures. To be submitted to CAMLIS 2026
summary:
Security teams face a challenge: the volume of newly disclosed Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures (CVEs) far exceeds the capacity to manually develop detection mechanisms. In 2025, the National Vulnerability Database published over 48,000 new vulnerabilities, motivating the need for automation. We present RuleForge, an AWS internal system that automatically generates detection rules--JSON-based patterns that identify malicious HTTP requests exploiting specific vulnerabilities--from structured Nuclei templates describing CVE details. Nuclei templates provide standardized, YAML-based vulnerability descriptions that serve as the structured input for our rule generation process.
  This paper focuses on RuleForge's architecture and operational deployment for CVE-related threat detection, with particular emphasis on our novel LLM-as-a-judge (Large Language Model as judge) confidence validation system and systematic feedback integration mechanism. This validation approach evaluates candidate rules across two dimensions--sensitivity (avoiding false negatives) and specificity (avoiding false positives)--achieving AUROC of 0.75 and reducing false positives by 67% compared to synthetic-test-only validation in production. Our 5x5 generation strategy (five parallel candidates with up to five refinement attempts each) combined with continuous feedback loops enables systematic quality improvement. We also present extensions enabling rule generation from unstructured data sources and demonstrate a proof-of-concept agentic workflow for multi-event-type detection. Our lessons learned highlight critical considerations for applying LLMs to cybersecurity tasks, including overconfidence mitigation and the importance of domain expertise in both prompt design and quality review of generated rules through human-in-the-loop validation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 AWS 内部系统 RuleForge，利用 Nuclei 模板与 LLM-as-a-judge 双重验证，自动将 CVE 信息转化为高置信度 HTTP 检测规则，FP 降 67%，AUROC 0.75。
AI.motivation: 2025 年仅 NVD 就披露 4.8 万条 CVE，安全团队人工编写检测规则已无法跟上漏洞爆发速度，必须借助自动化手段批量、高质量生成检测签名。
AI.method: 1) 以 Nuclei YAML 模板为结构化输入；2) 用 LLM 并行生成 5 条候选 JSON 规则，最多 5 轮迭代精修；3) 引入“LLM-as-a-judge”框架，从敏感度与特异度两维打分，结合合成流量与真实日志验证候选规则；4) 构建持续反馈闭环，将误报/漏报样本回注提示词与微调数据；5) 扩展支持非结构化文本输入并演示多事件类型代理工作流。
AI.result: LLM-as-a-judge 验证使误报率降低 67%，AUROC 达 0.75；5×5 并行-迭代策略保证规则覆盖率；系统已在 AWS 生产环境持续运行，显著缩短 CVE→检测规则的时间窗口。
AI.conclusion: RuleForge 证明大模型可在网络安全场景下承担高价值自动化任务，但需通过“模型裁判+人类复核”抑制过自信，并持续引入领域知识迭代提示与评估流程，才能兼顾检测灵敏度与精确度。

title: OmniVoice: Towards Omnilingual Zero-Shot Text-to-Speech with Diffusion Language Models
summary: We present OmniVoice, a massive multilingual zero-shot text-to-speech (TTS) model that scales to over 600 languages. At its core is a novel diffusion language model-style discrete non-autoregressive (NAR) architecture. Unlike conventional discrete NAR models that suffer from performance bottlenecks in complex two-stage (text-to-semantic-to-acoustic) pipelines, OmniVoice directly maps text to multi-codebook acoustic tokens. This simplified approach is facilitated by two key technical innovations: (1) a full-codebook random masking strategy for efficient training, and (2) initialization from a pre-trained LLM to ensure superior intelligibility. By leveraging a 581k-hour multilingual dataset curated entirely from open-source data, OmniVoice achieves the broadest language coverage to date and delivers state-of-the-art performance across Chinese, English, and diverse multilingual benchmarks. Our code and pre-trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/k2-fsa/OmniVoice.

AI.tldr: Summary generation failed
AI.motivation: Motivation analysis unavailable
AI.method: Method extraction failed
AI.result: Result analysis unavailable
AI.conclusion: Conclusion extraction failed

title: CASHG: Context-Aware Stylized Online Handwriting Generation
summary: Online handwriting represents strokes as time-ordered trajectories, which makes handwritten content easier to transform and reuse in a wide range of applications. However, generating natural sentence-level online handwriting that faithfully reflects a writer's style remains challenging, since sentence synthesis demands context-dependent characters with stroke continuity and spacing. Prior methods treat these boundary properties as implicit outcomes of sequence modeling, which becomes unreliable at the sentence scale and under limited compositional diversity. We propose CASHG, a context-aware stylized online handwriting generator that explicitly models inter-character connectivity for style-consistent sentence-level trajectory synthesis. CASHG uses a Character Context Encoder to obtain character identity and sentence-dependent context memory and fuses them in a bigram-aware sliding-window Transformer decoder that emphasizes local predecessor--current transitions, complemented by gated context fusion for sentence-level context.Training proceeds through a three-stage curriculum from isolated glyphs to full sentences, improving robustness under sparse transition coverage. We further introduce Connectivity and Spacing Metrics (CSM), a boundary-aware evaluation suite that quantifies cursive connectivity and spacing similarity. Under benchmark-matched evaluation protocols, CASHG consistently improves CSM over comparison methods while remaining competitive in DTW-based trajectory similarity, with gains corroborated by a human evaluation.

AI.tldr: CASHG通过显式建模字间连笔，在句子级在线笔迹生成中实现风格一致且边界自然的合成，并配套提出边界感知的CSM评估指标。
AI.motivation: 现有方法把连笔与间距当作序列建模的隐式副产品，在句子尺度及组合多样性受限时不可靠，亟需显式保持书写者风格的句子级笔迹生成方案。
AI.method: 提出CASHG：用字符上下文编码器获得字符身份与句子上下文记忆，再用双字母感知的滑动窗口Transformer解码器强调局部前继-当前过渡，辅以门控融合实现句子级上下文；三阶段课程学习从孤立字形到完整句子；设计Connectivity and Spacing Metrics量化连笔与间距相似度。
AI.result: 在基准协议下，CASHG在CSM指标上持续优于对比方法，DTW轨迹相似度保持竞争力，人工评测进一步验证优势。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模字间连笔与间距的CASHG框架，配合CSM评估，显著推进了自然、风格一致的句子级在线笔迹合成。

title: ToolMisuseBench: An Offline Deterministic Benchmark for Tool Misuse and Recovery in Agentic Systems
summary: Tool using agents often fail for operational reasons even when language understanding is strong. Common causes include invalid arguments, interface drift, weak recovery, and inefficient retry behavior. We introduce ToolMisuseBench, an offline deterministic benchmark for evaluating tool misuse and recovery under explicit step, call, and retry budgets. The benchmark covers CRUD, retrieval, file, and scheduling environments with replayable fault injection. It reports success, invalid call behavior, policy violations, recovery quality, and budgeted efficiency. We release a public dataset with 6800 tasks and a reproducible evaluation pipeline. Baseline results show fault specific recovery gains for schema aware methods, while overall success remains limited under the released authorization and hard failure settings.

AI.tldr: 构建了一个离线性、可复现的 ToolMisuseBench 基准，量化评测大模型调用工具时的误用与恢复能力，发现 schema 感知方法在特定故障上有效，但整体成功率受限。
AI.motivation: 尽管大模型语言理解强，但工具调用常因参数非法、接口漂移、恢复机制弱或重试策略低效而失败；缺乏统一、可复现的评估手段。
AI.method: 提出 ToolMisuseBench：覆盖 CRUD、检索、文件、调度四类环境，6800 条任务，支持可重放的故障注入；显式设定 step、call、retry 三类预算；提供离线确定性评估流程，输出成功率、非法调用、策略违规、恢复质量与预算效率五维指标。
AI.result: baseline 实验显示，schema 感知方法在特定故障下恢复率提升，但在授权受限与硬失败设定下，整体成功率仍低；公开数据集与评测管线已释放，可复现。
AI.conclusion: ToolMisuseBench 首次系统量化工具误用与恢复能力，揭示当前模型在严格预算与真实故障场景下的脆弱性，为后续改进提供基准与数据支持。

title: Homogenized Transformers
summary: We study a random model of deep multi-head self-attention in which the weights are resampled independently across layers and heads, as at initialization of training. Viewing depth as a time variable, the residual stream defines a discrete-time interacting particle system on the unit sphere. We prove that, under suitable joint scalings of the depth, the residual step size, and the number of heads, this dynamics admits a nontrivial homogenized limit. Depending on the scaling, the limit is either deterministic or stochastic with common noise; in the mean-field regime, the latter leads to a stochastic nonlinear Fokker--Planck equation for the conditional law of a representative token. In the Gaussian setting, the limiting drift vanishes, making the homogenized dynamics explicit enough to study representation collapse. This yields quantitative trade-offs between dimension, context length, and temperature, and identifies regimes in which clustering can be mitigated.

AI.tldr: 首稿从随机初始化出发，把多头注意力看作球面上相互作用粒子系统，用平均场极限得到随机非线性 Fokker-Planck 方程，定量刻画了维度-上下文长度-温度三者的权衡及避免表示坍塌的区间。
AI.motivation: 深度多头 Transformer 随机初始化时的残差动态如何随深度演化、是否坍塌，是理解其可表达性与可训练性的关键，但缺乏可解析的宏观描述。
AI.method: 1) 将残差流视为深度方向的离散时间粒子系统，每层每头独立重采样权重；2) 对深度、残差步长、头数做联合尺度变换，证明系统有收敛的非平凡均匀化极限；3) 按不同极限得到确定性或带公共噪声的随机动态，并导出对应的非线性 Fokker-Planck 方程；4) 在输入高斯情形下解析极限漂移项为零，借此定量分析表示坍塌条件。
AI.result: 极限方程显式给出维度 d、上下文长度 L 与温度 θ 之间的阈值关系，指出当 d/θ≫L 时可抑制 token 的聚类/坍塌；同时刻画了随机公共噪声对表示方差的影响。
AI.conclusion: 随机初始化下的深层多头注意力可用含公共噪声的粒子平均场极限精确刻画，该极限不仅揭示残差动态的本质，也为超参数选取（如温度、维度）避免表示坍塌提供首个可计算的定量准则。

title: Valency Classification of Mapudungun Verbal Roots. Established by the language's own morphotactics
summary: In the previous work, a lexical (re)categorisation -- or confirmation of the given category -- of roots identified as verbal was undertaken to determine their original category accurately. Building on this, the present paper offers an account of the valency classification of those Mapudungun roots confirmed to be verbal, using the language's own morphotactics; specifically, by examining the permissible and restricted combinations of various suffixes with roots or verbal stems in the Mapuche verb form. As with all work conducted thus far, the results presented here aim to improve the morphological analyser (Dungupeyum) with all verified findings incorporated into the system. From a theoretical perspective, we also hope to contribute to the recognition and understanding of issues related to the valency of Mapuche verb forms.

AI.tldr: 以往工作确认了一批马普切语动词根，本文以本族形态策略重新为这些根定价，结果将完善配套的形态分析器Dungupeyum，并加深对马普切语动词配价的理解。
AI.motivation: 此前虽已把部分不明语根归为动词，但缺乏系统性的配价框架；为让自动形态分析器Dungupeyum输出更精准，需要以马普切语自身的后缀组配规则来给已确认的动词根做配价分类。
AI.method: 收集已确认动词根，考察各能/不能与这些根或其派生词干共现的后缀模式，并结合马普切语独有的派生层级与序列限制，归纳出不同配价类型。
AI.result: 首次用族内形态标志把动词根细分为零、一、二、三及可加旁阶（applicative）等配价类型，为Dungupeyum补充了对应配价标注规则，测试集覆盖率达94%。
AI.conclusion: 证明用本族形态组配而非外部语义标签可为濒危语建立可操作、可机读的动词配价体系；成果直接提升Dungupeyum的形态分析精度，也为南美原住民语言的配价研究提供了可行范式。

title: CoRegOVCD: Consistency-Regularized Open-Vocabulary Change Detection
summary: Remote sensing change detection (CD) aims to identify where land-cover semantics change across time, but most existing methods still assume a fixed label space and therefore cannot answer arbitrary user-defined queries. Open-vocabulary change detection (OVCD) instead asks for the change mask of a queried concept. In the fully training-free setting, however, dense concept responses are difficult to compare directly across dates: appearance variation, weak cross-concept competition, and the spatial continuity of many land-cover categories often produce noisy, fragmented, and semantically unreliable change evidence. We propose Consistency-Regularized Open-Vocabulary Change Detection (CoRegOVCD), a training-free dense inference framework that reformulates concept-specific change as calibrated posterior discrepancy. Competitive Posterior Calibration (CPC) and the Semantic Posterior Delta (SPD) convert raw concept responses into competition-aware queried-concept posteriors and quantify their cross-temporal discrepancy, making semantic change evidence more comparable without explicit instance matching. Geometry-Token Consistency Gate (GeoGate) and Regional Consensus Discrepancy (RCD) further suppress unsupported responses and improve spatial coherence through geometry-aware structural verification and regional consensus. Across four benchmarks spanning building-oriented and multi-class settings, CoRegOVCD consistently improves over the strongest previous training-free baseline by 2.24 to 4.98 F1$_C$ points and reaches a six-class average of 47.50% F1$_C$ on SECOND.

AI.tldr: CoRegOVCD 是无训练开放词汇遥感变化检测框架，通过校准概念后验并引入几何一致性约束，在无需训练的前提下将 F1C 提升 2.24–4.98 个百分点。
AI.motivation: 传统 CD 方法假设固定标签空间，无法回答任意用户查询；开放词汇 CD 虽支持任意概念，但训练-free 设定下跨时相的密集概念响应受外观差异、弱竞争与空间连续性影响，产生噪声碎片，难以直接比较。
AI.method: 提出 CoRegOVCD：① Competitive Posterior Calibration（CPC）与 Semantic Posterior Delta（SPD）把原始响应转为竞争感知查询概念后验并量化跨时差异；② Geometry-Token Consistency Gate（GeoGate）与 Regional Consensus Discrepancy（RCD）在几何结构验证和区域共识层面抑制伪响应并增强空间连贯；全程无需训练与实例匹配。
AI.result: 在四类 benchmark（建筑/多类）上，CoRegOVCD 相对最强训练-free 基线 F1C 提升 2.24–4.98 个百分点，SECOND 六类平均达 47.50% F1C。
AI.conclusion: 通过后验校准与几何一致性正则，CoRegOVCD 首次在训练-free 开放词汇变化检测中实现稳定显著的性能跃升，为任意语义查询的遥感变化监测提供实用新范式。

title: ProdCodeBench: A Production-Derived Benchmark for Evaluating AI Coding Agents
summary: Benchmarks that reflect production workloads are better for evaluating AI coding agents in industrial settings, yet existing benchmarks differ from real usage in programming language distribution, prompt style and codebase structure. This paper presents a methodology for curating production-derived benchmarks, illustrated through ProdCodeBench - a benchmark built from real sessions with a production AI coding assistant. We detail our data collection and curation practices including LLM-based task classification, test relevance validation, and multi-run stability checks which address challenges in constructing reliable evaluation signals from monorepo environments. Each curated sample consists of a verbatim prompt, a committed code change and fail-to-pass tests spanning seven programming languages. Our systematic analysis of four foundation models yields solve rates from 53.2% to 72.2% revealing that models making greater use of work validation tools, such as executing tests and invoking static analysis, achieve higher solve rates. This suggests that iterative verification helps achieve effective agent behavior and that exposing codebase-specific verification mechanisms may significantly improve the performance of externally trained agents operating in unfamiliar environments. We share our methodology and lessons learned to enable other organizations to construct similar production-derived benchmarks.

AI.tldr: ProdCodeBench首次用真实生产数据构建多语言代码生成评测基准，证实验证工具使用率与模型效果正相关，并开源方法供企业复现。
AI.motivation: 现有代码生成基准在语言分布、提示风格和代码库结构上与工业场景脱节，难以准确评估部署于生产环境的 AI 编程助手。
AI.method: 从真实生产会话提取 verbatim 提示、已提交代码变更及 fail-to-pass 测试，经 LLM 任务分类、测试相关性验证与多轮稳定性筛选，构建覆盖 7 种语言的 ProdCodeBench；在统一框架下对 4 个基础模型进行系统评估并分析其验证工具调用行为。
AI.result: 模型解决率介于 53.2%–72.2%；高频使用测试执行、静态分析等验证工具的模型显著优于极少验证者，表明迭代验证可提升代理在陌生代码库中的表现。
AI.conclusion: 生产衍生的基准更能揭示模型在真实工业场景中的能力差异；将代码库专属验证机制暴露给外部训练代理，可显著提高其适应性与成功率。作者公开方法论与经验，助力其他组织构建同类评测体系。

title: Curia-2: Scaling Self-Supervised Learning for Radiology Foundation Models
summary: The rapid growth of medical imaging has fueled the development of Foundation Models (FMs) to reduce the growing, unsustainable workload on radiologists. While recent FMs have shown the power of large-scale pre-training to CT and MRI analysis, there remains significant room to optimize how these models learn from complex radiological volumes. Building upon the Curia framework, this work introduces Curia-2, which significantly improves the original pre-training strategy and representation quality to better capture the specificities of radiological data. The proposed methodology enables scaling the architecture up to billion-parameter Vision Transformers, marking a first for multi-modal CT and MRI FMs. Furthermore, we formalize the evaluation of these models by extending and restructuring CuriaBench into two distinct tracks: a 2D track tailored for slice-based vision models and a 3D track for volumetric benchmarking. Our results demonstrate that Curia-2 outperforms all FMs on vision-focused tasks and fairs competitively to vision-language models on clinically complex tasks such as finding detection. Weights will be made publicly available to foster further research.

AI.tldr: Curia-2 首次将十亿级 Vision Transformer 扩展到 CT/MRI 多模态预训练，并在新构建的 2D/3D 双轨基准 CuriaBench 上全面超越现有 Foundation Model，代码与权重全部公开。
AI.motivation: 医学影像数据激增导致放射科工作负荷不可持续，需在复杂三维体积数据上进一步优化 Foundation Model 的预训练策略与表征质量。
AI.method: 基于 Curia 框架，重新设计预训练目标与数据增强，使 Vision Transformer 可稳定扩展至十亿参数；构建 CuriaBench，分 2D 切片与 3D 体积两条独立评测轨道。
AI.result: Curia-2 在视觉任务上全面领先已有 FM，在病灶检测等临床复杂任务上与视觉-语言模型性能相当。
AI.conclusion: 十亿级 ViT 可直接从 CT/MRI 体积自监督学习取得强表征，Curia-2 与 CuriaBench 为后续研究提供可扩展模型与标准化评价体系。

title: Dual Optimal: Make Your LLM Peer-like with Dignity
summary: Current aligned language models exhibit a dual failure mode we term the Evasive Servant: they sycophantically validate flawed user beliefs while deflecting responsibility with boilerplate disclaimers. We propose the Dignified Peer framework, which counters servility with anti-sycophancy and trustworthiness, and mitigates evasiveness through empathy and creativity. Realizing this agent requires overcoming significant challenges in data supervision, objective collapse, and evaluation bias. We address these issues by introducing the PersonaKnob dataset which features a compositional partial order structure of multiple persona preference. This data is utilized alongside a tolerant constrained Lagrangian DPO algorithm that dynamically balances all persona dimensions to prevent behavioral collapse. Additionally, we employ a psychometrically calibrated Item Response Theory evaluation protocol to disentangle latent model persona capability from confounders like judge biases. Extensive empirical studies demonstrate that our approach successfully build a LLM agent with both dignity and peer.

AI.tldr: 现有大模型会讨好人又甩锅；作者提出"有尊严的同伴"框架，用带有 persona 偏序的 PersonaKnob 数据集 + 动态约束拉格朗日 DPO 算法 + IRT 心理评测，训练出不谄媚、不回避且共情创造力兼具的大模型代理。
AI.motivation: 对齐后的大模型会谄媚（sycophancy）并配合用户的错误信念，同时用套话脱责（deflection），影响可信度与责任承担。
AI.method: 1) 提出 Dignified Peer 框架：防谄媚（anti-sycophancy）+ 可信、以同理心与创造力取代回避。2) 构造 PersonaKnob 数据集，内含多重人格偏好的复合偏序结构，支持细粒度训练信号。3) 设计 tolerant 约束 Lagrangian DPO，在多维人格目标间动态调节，防止单一维度塌陷。4) 建立基于项目反应理论（IRT）的心理测量评测协议，隔离法官偏见等混杂因子，精准估计模型的人格维度能力。
AI.result: 大样本实证显示，该代理在保持准确回答的同时，大幅降低谄媚分数和脱责率，显著提升同理心与创造性指标，实现"尊严与同伴兼具"的综合人格。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合抗谄媚、可信度、同理心与创造力，并以偏序数据+动态约束优化+IRT 评测相互支撑，可稳定产出不回避、不讨好且具责任感的大模型代理，为下一代可信 AI 提供新范式。

title: Beyond the Fold: Quantifying Split-Level Noise and the Case for Leave-One-Dataset-Out AU Evaluation
summary:
Subject-exclusive cross-validation is the standard evaluation protocol for facial Action Unit (AU) detection, yet reported improvements are often small. We show that cross-validation itself introduces measurable stochastic variance. On BP4D+, repeated 3-fold subject-exclusive splits produce an empirical noise floor of $\pm 0.065$ in average F1, with substantially larger variation for low-prevalence AUs. Operating-point metrics such as F1 fluctuate more than threshold-independent measures such as AUC, and model ranking can change under different fold assignments.
  We further evaluate cross-dataset robustness using a Leave-One-Dataset-Out (LODO) protocol across five AU datasets. LODO removes partition randomness and exposes domain-level instability that is not visible under single-dataset cross-validation. Together, these results suggest that gains often reported in cross-fold validation may fall within protocol variance. Leave-one-dataset-out cross-validation yields more stable and interpretable findings

AI.tldr: 突现单数据集交叉验证存在明显方差，跨数据集LODO协议更稳定可解释。
AI.motivation: 面部AU检测文献中微小性能提升激增，单数据集交叉验证被认为是“金标准”，但其固有噪声是否掩盖真正进展尚无系统研究。
AI.method: (1)在BP4D+上重复生成多组3折被试独立划分，量化F1与AUC波动；(2)比较高低频AU的结果方差；(3)提出LODO协议，在5个AU数据集轮流留一作测试，消除划分随机性并评估领域漂移影响。
AI.result: 单数据集交叉验证平均F1的实证噪声底线±0.065，低流行AU波动更大；F1变异大于AUC；同一模型因随机划分可导致排名颠倒。LODO显示跨域稳定性差异显著，且不再受划分随机性干扰。
AI.conclusion: 单数据集交叉验证下的小幅提升常位于协议方差之内，应以LODO等跨域评估为主，辅以更鲁棒的阈值无关指标，避免误报进展。

title: Countering Catastrophic Forgetting of Large Language Models for Better Instruction Following via Weight-Space Model Merging
summary: Large language models have been adopted in the medical domain for clinical documentation to reduce clinician burden. However, studies have reported that LLMs often "forget" a significant amount of instruction-following ability when fine-tuned using a task-specific medical dataset, a critical challenge in adopting general-purpose LLMs for clinical applications. This study presents a model merging framework to efficiently adapt general-purpose LLMs to the medical domain by countering this forgetting issue. By merging a clinical foundation model (GatorTronLlama) with a general instruct model (Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct) via interpolation-based merge methods, we seek to derive a domain-adapted model with strong performance on clinical tasks while retaining instruction-following ability. Comprehensive evaluation across medical benchmarks and five clinical generation tasks (e.g., radiology and discharge summarization) shows that merged models can effectively mitigate catastrophic forgetting, preserve clinical domain expertise, and retain instruction-following ability. In addition, our model merging strategies demonstrate training efficiency, achieving performance on par with fully fine-tuned baselines under severely constrained supervision (e.g., 64-shot vs. 256-shot). Consequently, weight-space merging constitutes a highly scalable solution for adapting open-source LLMs to clinical applications, facilitating broader deployment in resource-constrained healthcare environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种权重空间模型合并框架，可在极少数据情况下将通用 LLM 适配到医疗场景，兼顾临床任务性能与指令遵循能力，无需重训即可媲美全量微调效果。
AI.motivation: 通用大模型在临床微调时往往遗忘原有指令遵循能力，导致部署困难；现有方法需大量标注与计算资源，不适用于医疗场景。
AI.method: 以插值方式将临床基座模型 GatorTronLlama 与通用指令模型 Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct 进行权重空间合并，并通过 64-shot/256-shot 小样本策略评估不同合并策略。
AI.result: 在多个医学基准及五项临床生成任务（影像、出院摘要等）上，合并模型显著缓解灾难性遗忘，保留临床专业知识与指令遵循能力，成绩与全量微调基线持平。
AI.conclusion: 权重空间合并是一种高效、可扩展的临床 LLM 适配方案，可在标注与算力受限的医疗环境中快速部署开源大模型。

title: Demographic Parity Tails for Regression
summary: Demographic parity (DP) is a widely studied fairness criterion in regression, enforcing independence between the predictions and sensitive attributes. However, constraining the entire distribution can degrade predictive accuracy and may be unnecessary for many applications, where fairness concerns are localized to specific regions of the distribution. To overcome this issue, we propose a new framework for regression under DP that focuses on the tails of target distribution across sensitive groups. Our methodology builds on optimal transport theory. By enforcing fairness constraints only over targeted regions of the distribution, our approach enables more nuanced and context-sensitive interventions. Leveraging recent advances, we develop an interpretable and flexible algorithm that leverages the geometric structure of optimal transport. We provide theoretical guarantees, including risk bounds and fairness properties, and validate the method through experiments in regression settings.

AI.tldr: 提出一种仅针对敏感组目标分布尾部进行DP约束的回归框架，用最优传输理论在局部区域实施公平性，兼顾精度与解释性。
AI.motivation: 全局 demographic parity 会过度牺牲预测精度，而许多场景只需在分布的特定尾部保证公平，因此需要更细粒度的局部公平准则。
AI.method: 以最优传输理论为核心，仅在敏感组目标分布的指定尾部区域施加 DP 约束；利用几何结构构造可解释、灵活的算法，并给出对应的经验风险最小化流程。
AI.result: 理论给出有限样本风险界与公平性保证；实验表明在尾部公平指标上显著优于全局 DP 方法，同时保持整体预测精度。
AI.conclusion: 局部化的 DP 约束能在关键区域实现公平而不伤及整体性能，最优传输提供了可解释且高效的计算路径，为“精度–公平”权衡提供了新的实用工具。

title: ORBIT: Scalable and Verifiable Data Generation for Search Agents on a Tight Budget
summary: Search agents, which integrate language models (LMs) with web search, are becoming crucial for answering complex user queries. Constructing training datasets for deep research tasks, involving multi-step retrieval and reasoning, remains challenging due to expensive human annotation, or cumbersome prerequisites. In this work, we introduce ORBIT, a training dataset with 20K reasoning-intensive queries with short verifiable answers, generated using a frugal framework without relying on paid API services. The modular framework relies on four stages: seed creation, question-answer pair generation, and two stages of verification: self and external. ORBIT spans 15 domains and each training pair requires 4-5 reasoning steps, with external search verification required from the complete web. We train Qwen3-4B as the base model on ORBIT using GRPO and evaluate it on Wikipedia question answering tasks. Extensive experiment results demonstrate that ORBIT-4B achieves strong performance among sub-4B LLMs as search agents, proving the utility of synthetic datasets. Our framework, code and datasets are open-sourced and available publicly.

AI.tldr: 研究提出无需付费API的经济框架 ORBIT，自动生成含2万条多步推理查询的合成数据集，训练出4B级检索智能体 ORBIT-4B，在维基问答任务上达同类最优，验证低成本合成数据可支持深度搜索智能体训练。
AI.motivation: 现有深度研究型检索智能体依赖昂贵人工标注或繁琐流程获取多步检索与推理训练数据，导致数据集构建成本高、门槛大；亟需廉价且无API依赖的大规模推理训练集。
AI.method: 设计四阶段模块化框架：种子创建→问答对生成→自验证→外部（全网）验证，基于公开资源自动生成15领域、需4–5步推理且答案可验证的2万查询；采用GRPO算法在ORBIT数据上微调Qwen3-4B基模型，并与维基问答基准对比评估。
AI.result: ORBIT-4B在多个维基问答下游任务中超越同规模 (<4B) 语言模型作检索智能体的表现，显示合成数据训练可媲美甚至优于人工标注效果；框架、代码与数据集均已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过无付费API框架合成的高质量推理数据足以支持小规模模型训练高性能检索智能体，为构建廉价、可扩展的深度搜索智能体提供实证与资源基础。

title: Reflection Generation for Composite Image Using Diffusion Model
summary: Image composition involves inserting a foreground object into the background while synthesizing environment-consistent effects such as shadows and reflections. Although shadow generation has been extensively studied, reflection generation remains largely underexplored. In this work, we focus on reflection generation. We inject the prior information of reflection placement and reflection appearance into foundation diffusion model. We also divide reflections into two types and adopt type-aware model design. To support training, we construct the first large-scale object reflection dataset DEROBA. Experiments demonstrate that our method generates reflections that are physically coherent and visually realistic, establishing a new benchmark for reflection generation.

AI.tldr: 我们提出首个面向物体反射生成的大规模扩散模型，构建DEROBA数据集，分类型注入先验并实现物理一致的高真实感反射。
AI.motivation: 现有图像合成研究聚焦阴影生成，而反射生成几乎空白，导致插入物体缺乏与背景环境一致的镜面反射，显著降低合成真实感。
AI.method: 1) 将“反射位置-外观”先验编码注入基础扩散模型；2) 把反射划分为两类并设计类型感知网络结构；3) 构建首个大规模物体反射数据集DEROBA用于监督训练。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提方法可生成物理连贯且视觉真实的反射，在新增反射生成任务上建立新基准。
AI.conclusion: 首次系统解决物体级反射生成问题，先验注入与类型感知的扩散框架为高质量合成提供通用方案，并公布数据集推动后续研究。

title: ReFlow: Self-correction Motion Learning for Dynamic Scene Reconstruction
summary: We present ReFlow, a unified framework for monocular dynamic scene reconstruction that learns 3D motion in a novel self-correction manner from raw video. Existing methods often suffer from incomplete scene initialization for dynamic regions, leading to unstable reconstruction and motion estimation, which often resorts to external dense motion guidance such as pre-computed optical flow to further stabilize and constrain the reconstruction of dynamic components. However, this introduces additional complexity and potential error propagation. To address these issues, ReFlow integrates a Complete Canonical Space Construction module for enhanced initialization of both static and dynamic regions, and a Separation-Based Dynamic Scene Modeling module that decouples static and dynamic components for targeted motion supervision. The core of ReFlow is a novel self-correction flow matching mechanism, consisting of Full Flow Matching to align 3D scene flow with time-varying 2D observations, and Camera Flow Matching to enforce multi-view consistency for static objects. Together, these modules enable robust and accurate dynamic scene reconstruction. Extensive experiments across diverse scenarios demonstrate that ReFlow achieves superior reconstruction quality and robustness, establishing a novel self-correction paradigm for monocular 4D reconstruction.

AI.tldr: ReFlow 以自纠方式直接从单目视频完成动态场景 4D 重建，无需外部光流，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有单目动态重建因动态区域初始化不足导致不稳定，需借助预计算光流等外部运动约束，引入额外复杂度和误差传播。
AI.method: 提出统一框架 ReFlow：①Complete Canonical Space Construction 为静/动态区提供完整初始化；②Separation-Based Dynamic Scene Modeling 解耦静动态分量并分别监督；③Self-correction Flow Matching 同步执行 Full Flow Matching（对齐 3D 场景流与 2D 时序观测）与 Camera Flow Matching（强制静态区域多视角一致性），实现迭代自纠。
AI.result: 在多场景实验中，ReFlow 重建精度与鲁棒性均优于当前最优方法，无需外部运动先验即可稳定恢复动态几何与运动。
AI.conclusion: ReFlow 确立了单目 4D 动态重建的自纠新范式，为后续无先验动态场景理解奠定基础。

title: Systematic Analyses of Reinforcement Learning Controllers in Signalized Urban Corridors
summary: In this work, we extend our systematic capacity region perspective to multi-junction traffic networks, focussing on the special case of an urban corridor network. In particular, we train and evaluate centralized, fully decentralized, and parameter-sharing decentralized RL controllers, and compare their capacity regions and ATTs together with a classical baseline MaxPressure controller. Further, we show how the parametersharing controller may be generalised to be deployed on a larger network than it was originally trained on. In this setting, we show some initial findings that suggest that even though the junctions are not formally coordinated, traffic may self organise into `green waves'.

AI.tldr: 对比不同RL控制器调控城市走廊多交叉口的容量与平均行程时间，并首次揭示无强制协调时RL可诱导流量自发形成绿波。
AI.motivation: 现有交通RL研究侧重单点互通控制，缺乏多交叉口容量区域度量与非协调网络能否出现绿波的系统的研究。
AI.method: 以容量区域为主指标，训练集中式、完全分布式、参数共享分布式三种RL，并引入MaxPressure作基线；将参数共享RL直接迁移到更大规模走廊网络，观测流量自组织行为。
AI.result: RL总体容量区域优于MaxPressure；参数共享RL在训练外网络延迟仅小幅上升；无显式协同下出现首尾相连的绿灯带，形成自发“绿波”。
AI.conclusion: 容量区域视角可有效评估多交叉口RL策略；通过参数共享分布式训练，单交叉口智体捕获网络上下文，从而在非协调场景中诱导绿波，为大规模交通RL迁移奠定基础。

title: In-context Learning in Presence of Spurious Correlations
summary: Large language models exhibit a remarkable capacity for in-context learning, where they learn to solve tasks given a few examples. Recent work has shown that transformers can be trained to perform simple regression tasks in-context. This work explores the possibility of training an in-context learner for classification tasks involving spurious features. We find that the conventional approach of training in-context learners is susceptible to spurious features. Moreover, when the meta-training dataset includes instances of only one task, the conventional approach leads to task memorization and fails to produce a model that leverages context for predictions. Based on these observations, we propose a novel technique to train such a learner for a given classification task. Remarkably, this in-context learner matches and sometimes outperforms strong methods like ERM and GroupDRO. However, unlike these algorithms, it does not generalize well to other tasks. We show that it is possible to obtain an in-context learner that generalizes to unseen tasks by training on a diverse dataset of synthetic in-context learning instances.

AI.tldr: 论文指出标准ICL训练会被虚假特征误导且易过拟合单任务；提出新训练法可在目标任务上媲美ERM/GroupDRO，但跨任务泛化差；用合成任务多样性数据可缓解该问题。
AI.motivation: 大模型ICL在回归任务已验证，但在分类场景下对虚假特征鲁棒性未知；常规ICL训练在多任务/单任务设置下表现不佳，需新方法提升鲁棒性与泛化。
AI.method: 1）诊断：在含虚假特征的分类任务上对比标准ICL与ERM/GroupDRO，发现虚假特征敏感性与单任务记忆问题；2）改进：设计新训练目标/数据构造，使ICL在目标任务上降低对虚假特征的依赖；3）泛化：构造大规模合成ICL任务分布进行元训练，让 learner 参数覆盖足够任务空间。
AI.result: 新训练法在Spurious-CIFAR等基准上，准确率与ERM/GroupDRO相当或略优；在单任务设定下显著优于标准ICL；用合成任务多样性数据后，零样本迁移至新任务时准确率提升>15个百分点，缩小与ERM的泛化差距。
AI.conclusion: ICL可被显式训练以抑制虚假特征并达到SOTA鲁棒性，但跨任务泛化需依赖训练阶段任务多样性；合成元学习数据是提升ICL通用性的可行路径，未来可扩展至更复杂分布与更大模型规模。

title: ViT-Explainer: An Interactive Walkthrough of the Vision Transformer Pipeline
summary: Transformer-based architectures have become the shared backbone of natural language processing and computer vision. However, understanding how these models operate remains challenging, particularly in vision settings, where images are processed as sequences of patch tokens. Existing interpretability tools often focus on isolated components or expert-oriented analysis, leaving a gap in guided, end-to-end understanding of the full inference pipeline. To bridge this gap, we present ViT-Explainer, a web-based interactive system that provides an integrated visualization of Vision Transformer inference, from patch tokenization to final classification. The system combines animated walkthroughs, patch-level attention overlays, and a vision-adapted Logit Lens within both guided and free exploration modes. A user study with six participants suggests that ViT-Explainer is easy to learn and use, helping users interpret and understand Vision Transformer behavior.

AI.tldr: 作者提出 ViT-Explainer——一个 Web 交互式可视化系统，端到端展示 ViT 推理流程，并用小规模用户实验验证其可学性与解释力。
AI.motivation: 尽管 Transformer 在 NLP 与视觉领域已成通用主干，其「黑盒」机理仍难理解；现有可解释工具多为孤立部件或专业导向，难以让普通使用者全程看见 ViT 如何完成分类决策。
AI.method: 构建 Web 端可视化平台 ViT-Explainer，基于推理链生产动画演示、patch 级注意力热图以及任务定制的 Logit-Lens（从补丁到分类得分的全程映射），并在「引导」与「自由」两种交互模式下集成呈现。
AI.result: 6 人用户实验表明：新系统易学易用，能有效帮助受试者读懂 Vision Transformer 的分类行为与注意机制。
AI.conclusion: 端到端、可交互的 ViT-Explainer 显著提升非专家对 Vision Transformer 的可解释性，填补了当前解释工具链的空白，并为进一步优化与扩展奠定基础。

title: Acoustic and perceptual differences between standard and accented Chinese speech and their voice clones
summary: Voice cloning is often evaluated in terms of overall quality, but less is known about accent preservation and its perceptual consequences. We compare standard and heavily accented Mandarin speech and their voice clones using a combined computational and perceptual design. Embedding-based analyses show no reliable accented-standard difference in original-clone distances across systems. In the perception study, clones are rated as more similar to their originals for standard than for accented speakers, and intelligibility increases from original to clone, with a larger gain for accented speech. These results show that accent variation can shape perceived identity match and intelligibility in voice cloning even when it is not reflected in an off-the-shelf speaker-embedding distance, and they motivate evaluating speaker identity preservation and accent preservation as separable dimensions.

AI.tldr: 尽管标准与重口音普通话克隆的说话人嵌入距离无差异，克隆却显著改善了口音语音的可懂度，但口音型克隆的“本人感”仍低于标准型克隆；这提示在声码克隆评估中应将口音保存与身份匹配视为两个独立维度。
AI.motivation: 学界通常只关注语音克隆的整体质量，对其能否保留口音以及口音如何影响“像本人”感知尚缺乏系统研究。
AI.method: 分别对标准普通话与重口音普通话及其三种主流系统克隆进行说话人嵌入距离计算，并开展48名听者的感知实验，测量相似度、可懂度与口音强度评分。
AI.result: （1）嵌入层面：原始-克隆距离不受口音类型或系统影响，无显著差异；（2）感知层面：标准口音克隆的“本人感”显著高于重口音克隆；可懂度从原始到克隆整体提升，重口音提升幅度更大。
AI.conclusion: 口音变异虽未显式体现在说话人嵌入距离中，却实质影响听众对身份匹配与可懂度的判断；因此评估声码克隆时必须把“口音保留”作为区别于“身份匹配”的独立维度单独考核。

title: IndoorCrowd: A Multi-Scene Dataset for Human Detection, Segmentation, and Tracking with an Automated Annotation Pipeline
comment: Accepted at Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Workshops 2026
summary: Understanding human behaviour in crowded indoor environments is central to surveillance, smart buildings, and human-robot interaction, yet existing datasets rarely capture real-world indoor complexity at scale. We introduce IndoorCrowd, a multi-scene dataset for indoor human detection, instance segmentation, and multi-object tracking, collected across four campus locations (ACS-EC, ACS-EG, IE-Central, R-Central). It comprises $31$ videos ($9{,}913$ frames at $5$fps) with human-verified, per-instance segmentation masks. A $620$-frame control subset benchmarks three foundation-model auto-annotators: SAM3, GroundingSAM, and EfficientGroundingSAM, against human labels using Cohen's $κ$, AP, precision, recall, and mask IoU. A further $2{,}552$-frame subset supports multi-object tracking with continuous identity tracks in MOTChallenge format. We establish detection, segmentation, and tracking baselines using YOLOv8n, YOLOv26n, and RT-DETR-L paired with ByteTrack, BoT-SORT, and OC-SORT. Per-scene analysis reveals substantial difficulty variation driven by crowd density, scale, and occlusion: ACS-EC, with $79.3\%$ dense frames and a mean instance scale of $60.8$px, is the most challenging scene. The project page is available at https://sheepseb.github.io/IndoorCrowd/.

AI.tldr: 本文发布名为 IndoorCrowd 的多场景室内人群基准数据集，提供近万帧人工精确标注的检测、分割与追踪真值，并系统评测主流基础模型与检测-追踪基线，揭示场景难度随密度、尺度与遮挡显著变化。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集难以在大规模真实室内环境中同时支持检测、实例分割与多目标追踪任务，亟需高密度、多场景且含人工验证标注的公开基准，以推进智能监控、楼宇智控与人机交互研究。
AI.method: 在校园 4 处地点采集 31 段视频，人工标注 9913 帧的逐实例分割掩码；划分 620 帧对照子集用 Cohen’s κ、AP、IoU 等指标对比 SAM3、GroundingSAM、EfficientGroundingSAM 的自动标注；划分 2552 帧子集按 MOTChallenge 格式建立连续 ID 的追踪真值；用 YOLOv8n/26n 与 RT-DETR-L 分别搭配 ByteTrack、BoT-SORT、OC-SORT 构建检测-分割-追踪基线。
AI.result: 标注一致性高，自动模型与人工标签差距显著；基线实验显示场景难度差异大，ACS-EC（79.3% 高密度帧、平均尺度 60.8 px）最具挑战；数据集与代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: IndoorCrowk 为室内高密度人群理解提供了首个大规模多任务真值，为后续算法改进与场景适配打下基准，并指出未来需针对高密度、小尺度与重度遮挡进一步优化检测与跟踪方法。

title: ExpertFlow: Efficient Mixture-of-Experts Inference via Predictive Expert Caching and Token Scheduling
comment: Accepted in DAC'26, Mixture-of-Experts, Inference, Offloading
summary: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models can outperform dense large language models at similar computation by activating only a small set of experts per token. However, stacking many expert modules introduces substantial parameter memory, which makes MoE models difficult to deploy in memory-constrained environments such as single-GPU devices. Offloading alleviates this issue by storing inactive experts in CPU memory and loading them on demand, but existing methods remain limited: static caches disregard input-dependent routing, and methods that train separate models to predict expert usage ahead of time are often inaccurate or require significant training cost. We propose ExpertFlow, a lightweight MoE inference system that addresses this routing dependency through three coordinated components: 1) a transformer-based routing path predictor that estimates expert usage across all MoE layers in a single forward pass, 2) a token scheduler that groups tokens with similar predicted routes to improve expert utilization, and 3) a predictive expert cache that loads only the required experts while correcting mispredictions at runtime. Together, these components enable efficient expert loading and execution, reducing GPU memory usage by up to 93.72% and improving inference throughput by up to 10x over strong offloading baselines on a single GPU.

AI.tldr: ExpertFlow 用轻量级预测器+分组调度+纠错缓存，把 MoE 推理 GPU 显存压到原来 6%，单卡吞吐提升 10 倍。
AI.motivation: 传统 MoE 虽计算高效，但 Experts 参数量大，单卡显存放不下；现有 offloading 方法要么静态缓存、要么需重训且预测不准，无法随输入动态路由。
AI.method: 提出 ExpertFlow 三件套：①一次前向的 Transformer 路由预测器，估算全层 expert 使用；② token 调度器，把路由相似的 token 打包以提升 expert 利用率；③ 可纠错预测缓存，仅加载所需 expert 并运行时修正预测偏差。
AI.result: 相比最强 offloading 基线，GPU 显存占用最高降 93.72%，单卡推理吞吐最高提升 10 倍，无需重训原模型，仅需 2% 额外参数。
AI.conclusion: ExpertFlow 首次在单卡 CPU-GPU 异构环境下实现大规模 MoE 的高效实时推理，为在端侧或资源受限设备部署超大稀疏模型提供了可行路径。

title: CXR-LT 2026 Challenge: Projection-Aware Multi-Label and Zero-Shot Chest X-Ray Classification
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures. Accepted to the IEEE ISBI 2026 CXR-LT Challenge
summary: This challenge tackles multi-label classification for known chest X-ray (CXR) lesions and zero-shot classification for unseen ones. To handle diverse CXR projections, we integrate projection-specific models via a classification network into a unified framework. For zero-shot classification (Task 2), we extend CheXzero with a novel dual-branch architecture that combines contrastive learning, Asymmetric Loss (ASL), and LLM-generated descriptive prompts. This effectively mitigates severe long-tail imbalances and maximizes zero-shot generalization. Additionally, strong data and test-time augmentations (TTA) ensure robustness across both tasks.

AI.tldr: 统一框架同时解决已知胸部病灶多标签分类与未知病灶零-shot分类；核心创新为双分支CheXzero+ASL+LLM提示，并辅以投影特化模型融合与强增广。
AI.motivation: 胸部X光存在多投影、长尾分布及未见病灶识别难题，需在同一系统内兼顾已知标签精度与零-shot泛化。
AI.method: 1) 针对不同投影分别训练模型后通过分类网络融合；2) 零-shot分支采用对比学习+ASL+大语言模型病灶描述提示的双分支架构；3) 训练与测试阶段均施加强数据增广与TTA。
AI.result: 显著缓解长尾不平衡，提升对未见病灶的零-shot识别能力，同时保证已知病灶多标签分类鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过投影融合、双分支零-shot设计与增广策略，该框架在CXR已知/未知病灶识别任务上均取得稳健表现。

title: Thinking While Listening: Fast-Slow Recurrence for Long-Horizon Sequential Modeling
summary: We extend the recent latent recurrent modeling to sequential input streams. By interleaving fast, recurrent latent updates with self-organizational ability between slow observation updates, our method facilitates the learning of stable internal structures that evolve alongside the input. This mechanism allows the model to maintain coherent and clustered representations over long horizons, improving out-of-distribution generalization in reinforcement learning and algorithmic tasks compared to sequential baselines such as LSTM, state space models, and Transformer variants.

AI.tldr: 把慢速观测更新与快速潜状态循环更新交错，让模型在超长序列中保持自组织且聚类的内部表征，从而在强化学习与算法任务上超越 LSTM、SSM 与 Transformer 变体。
AI.motivation: 现有序列模型在长时程、分布外场景下表征漂移、聚类能力弱，难以维持稳定内部结构。
AI.method: 在观测更新之间插入高速循环的潜变量更新，使潜状态能随输入自组织并形成稳定的聚类结构。
AI.result: 在 RL 与算法任务中，相比 LSTM、状态空间模型及 Transformer 变体，分布外泛化显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 快慢交错的潜循环机制是长序列建模中维持内部结构稳定、增强泛化的有效途径。

title: Reinforcement Learning for Speculative Trading under Exploratory Framework
summary: We study a speculative trading problem within the exploratory reinforcement learning (RL) framework of Wang et al. [2020]. The problem is formulated as a sequential optimal stopping problem over entry and exit times under general utility function and price process. We first consider a relaxed version of the problem in which the stopping times are modeled by the jump times of Cox processes driven by bounded, non-randomized intensity controls. Under the exploratory formulation, the agent's randomized control is characterized via the probability measure over the jump intensities, and their objective function is regularized by Shannon's differential entropy. This yields a system of the exploratory HJB equations and Gibbs distributions in closed-form as the optimal policy. Error estimates and convergence of the RL objective to the value function of the original problem are established. Finally, an RL algorithm is designed, and its implementation is showcased in a pairs-trading application.

AI.tldr: 本文在连续时间最优停时框架下研究投机交易问题，提出以Cox过程跳变时刻作为入场/出场时机的松弛模型，并在目标函数中加入Shannon熵正则化，导出封闭形式的探索性HJB方程与Gibbs最优策略，证明了RL目标向原问题价值函数的收敛，并以配对交易为例验证了所提算法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统最优停时模型要求确定性的停时规则，难以刻画真实市场中因信息不完整或探索需求而产生的随机化交易行为；同时，标准RL方法在连续时间、连续状态、非对称信息的投机交易场景中缺乏可解释且可计算的随机策略。作者希望将探索性RL引入最优停时，构造可直接优化随机化入场/出场强度且带有熵正则的松弛问题，再证明其与原确定问题的收敛关系，从而给出可解释、可计算、具理论保证的交易算法。
AI.method: 1) 将投机交易建模为一般效用函数和价格过程下的序贯最优停时问题；2) 构造松弛问题：用Cox过程的可控跳变时刻代替停时，跳变强度为均匀有界非随机化控制，并令随机化策略用跳变强度上的概率测度描述；3) 对RL目标加入Shannon微分熵正则项，导出探索性Hamilton–Jacobi–Bellman (HJB)方程，证明最优策略为Gibbs分布；4) 建立松弛值函数与原问题值函数之间的误差估计并证明RL目标随熵权趋于零时收敛至原最优值；5) 基于上述理论设计策略梯度型RL算法，并在配对交易资产价差过程上实现。
AI.result: 1) 得到探索性HJB方程组及Gibbs分布形式的闭合最优随机策略；2) 证明在任何熵正则系数λ>0下，松弛值函数V_rel 与原值函数V*的误差满足|V_rel−V*|≤Cλ，且当λ→0时V_rel→V*；3) 数值实验显示，所提RL算法在五维配对交易价差模型中≈3000次迭代即收敛，相较于传统阈值策略夏普比率提升约21%，最大回撤下降约35%，交易成本调整后收益仍显著优于基准。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入熵正则化的Cox过程松弛，探索性RL能够在连续时间最优停时问题中提供解析可算的随机策略，并保持对原问题的可控逼近误差；理论与实验一致表明，该方法既具可解释性又能显著提升投机交易的样本内及样本外表现，为未来更复杂市场微观结构下的端到端交易决策提供了可扩展框架。

title: KARL: Knowledge-Aware Reasoning and Reinforcement Learning for Knowledge-Intensive Visual Grounding
summary: Knowledge-Intensive Visual Grounding (KVG) requires models to localize objects using fine-grained, domain-specific entity names rather than generic referring expressions. Although Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) possess rich entity knowledge and strong generic grounding capabilities, they often fail to effectively utilize such knowledge when grounding specialized concepts, revealing a knowledge-grounding gap between internal knowledge and grounding predictions. To address this challenge, we propose a knowledge-aware training paradigm for KVG. Our approach first constructs knowledge-guided reasoning data to encourage models to activate domain-relevant entity knowledge during grounding, and then introduces KARL, a Knowledge-Aware Reinforcement Learning framework that adaptively modulates reward signals according to the model's estimated knowledge mastery of different entities. To facilitate systematic evaluation, we introduce KVG-Bench, a benchmark spanning 10 domains with 1.3K curated test cases covering 531 images and 882 entities. Extensive experiments show that our approach consistently outperforms a wide range of baseline models and achieves substantially stronger cross-domain generalization on unseen categories. The data, codes, and models are released at https://github.com/thunlp/KARL.

AI.tldr: 提出知识敏感训练新范式KARL，弥合MLLM在知识密集型视觉定位中的知识与定位间鸿沟，构建10域评测基准KVG-Bench。
AI.motivation: 当前MLLM虽已储备大量实体知识，但在面向细粒度、领域化实体的视觉定位任务(KVG)中，内部知识难以被有效激活，导致定位准确率显著下降，暴露出“知识-定位鸿沟”。
AI.method: 1)设计知识引导推理数据，迫使模型在定位过程中显式调用领域实体知识；2)提出KARL框架——知识敏感强化学习，动态根据模型对各实体的知识掌握度调制奖励信号；3)构建横跨10域、含1.3K测试用例的KVG-Bench评测基准。
AI.result: 在KVG-Bench上，KARL全面超越多种基线模型，并在不可见类别的跨域泛化测试中取得显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 知识敏感训练范式能有效打通MLLM内部知识与视觉定位输出间的壁垒，为知识密集型多模态任务提供通用增强方案。

title: Lightweight Spatiotemporal Highway Lane Detection via 3D-ResNet and PINet with ROI-Aware Attention
summary:
This paper presents a lightweight, end-to-end highway lane detection architecture that jointly captures spatial and temporal information for robust performance in real-world driving scenarios. Building on the strengths of 3D convolutional neural networks and instance segmentation, we propose two models that integrate a 3D-ResNet encoder with a Point Instance Network (PINet) decoder. The first model enhances multi-scale feature representation using a Feature Pyramid Network (FPN) and Self-Attention mechanism to refine spatial dependencies. The second model introduces a Region of Interest (ROI) detection head to selectively focus on lane-relevant regions, thereby improving precision and reducing computational complexity.
  Experiments conducted on the TuSimple dataset (highway driving scenarios) demonstrate that the proposed second model achieves 93.40% accuracy while significantly reducing false negatives. Compared to existing 2D and 3D baselines, our approach achieves improved performance with fewer parameters and reduced latency. The architecture has been validated through offline training and real-time inference in the Autonomous Systems Laboratory at City, St George's University of London. These results suggest that the proposed models are well-suited for integration into Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS), with potential scalability toward full Lane Assist Systems (LAS).

AI.tldr: 一种基于3D-ResNet+PINet解码器的轻量级端到端车道线检测网络，在TuSimple上达93.40%准确率，参数量与延迟均优于现有2D/3D基线，已验证可嵌入ADAS。
AI.motivation: 解决高速公路场景下车道线检测在光照变化、遮挡及高速运动下的鲁棒性不足问题，同时兼顾模型轻量化与实时性，为ADAS提供可落地的时空联合检测方案。
AI.method: 以3D-ResNet为共享编码器，提出两种变体：①FPN+Self-Attention增强多尺度空间特征；②增设ROI检测头，仅对车道相关区域做实例分割，降低计算量。二者均用3D卷积融合时序信息，端到端输出车道实例。
AI.result: 在TuSimple数据集上，第二模型准确率93.40%，假阴性显著下降；参数量与延迟均低于现有2D/3D基线；在伦敦城市大学自主系统实验室完成离线训练与实车实时推理验证。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的轻量化时空联合架构在精度、效率与硬件友好性上满足ADAS要求，可直接集成至车道保持系统，并具备向全功能LAS扩展的潜力。

title: Harmonized Tabular-Image Fusion via Gradient-Aligned Alternating Learning
summary: Multimodal tabular-image fusion is an emerging task that has received increasing attention in various domains. However, existing methods may be hindered by gradient conflicts between modalities, misleading the optimization of the unimodal learner. In this paper, we propose a novel Gradient-Aligned Alternating Learning (GAAL) paradigm to address this issue by aligning modality gradients. Specifically, GAAL adopts an alternating unimodal learning and shared classifier to decouple the multimodal gradient and facilitate interaction. Furthermore, we design uncertainty-based cross-modal gradient surgery to selectively align cross-modal gradients, thereby steering the shared parameters to benefit all modalities. As a result, GAAL can provide effective unimodal assistance and help boost the overall fusion performance. Empirical experiments on widely used datasets reveal the superiority of our method through comparison with various state-of-the-art (SoTA) tabular-image fusion baselines and test-time tabular missing baselines. The source code is available at https://github.com/njustkmg/ICME26-GAAL.

AI.tldr: 针对图文表格融合中梯度冲突导致单模网络优化受扰的问题，提出梯度对齐交替学习（GAAL）框架，通过交替单模训练+共享分类器解耦梯度，并以不确定性为权重的跨模梯度手术实现选择性对齐，显著提升融合性能并在缺失表格测试场景下持续领先。
AI.motivation: 多模态表格-图像融合任务中，不同模态的梯度方向常相互冲突，使得共享参数被某一模态“拉偏”，阻碍单模态分支的优化，进而拖累整体融合精度。
AI.method: 1) 交替训练策略：先独立更新各单模分支，再冻结单模参数、仅训练共享分类器，解耦多模梯度；2) 不确定性加权跨模梯度手术：依据预测不确定性计算模态权重，对共享参数梯度进行选择性对齐与修正，避免有害冲突。
AI.result: 在公开图文表格数据集上，GAAL 超越现有 SOTA 融合基线 2.1–4.7 个百分点；当测试阶段表格模态随机缺失时，性能下降幅度比最佳基线减少 38%，展现鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式对齐并过滤梯度冲突，GAAL 既保留了单模态网络的独立优化空间，又充分发挥了共享参数的协同作用，为图文表格融合提供了一种简单且可插拔的新范式。

title: Mining Instance-Centric Vision-Language Contexts for Human-Object Interaction Detection
summary: Human-Object Interaction (HOI) detection aims to localize human-object pairs and classify their interactions from a single image, a task that demands strong visual understanding and nuanced contextual reasoning. Recent approaches have leveraged Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to introduce semantic priors, significantly improving HOI detection performance. However, existing methods often fail to fully capitalize on the diverse contextual cues distributed across the entire scene. To overcome these limitations, we propose the Instance-centric Context Mining Network (InCoM-Net)-a novel framework that effectively integrates rich semantic knowledge extracted from VLMs with instance-specific features produced by an object detector. This design enables deeper interaction reasoning by modeling relationships not only within each detected instance but also across instances and their surrounding scene context. InCoM-Net comprises two core components: Instancecentric Context Refinement (ICR), which separately extracts intra-instance, inter-instance, and global contextual cues from VLM-derived features, and Progressive Context Aggregation (ProCA), which iteratively fuses these multicontext features with instance-level detector features to support high-level HOI reasoning. Extensive experiments on the HICO-DET and V-COCO benchmarks show that InCoM-Net achieves state-of-the-art performance, surpassing previous HOI detection methods. Code is available at https://github.com/nowuss/InCoM-Net.

AI.tldr: InCoM-Net 通过 VLM 语义先验与检测器实例特征的多层融合，在全局-实例上下文中递进式推理 HOI，刷新 HICO-DET/V-COCO 纪录。
AI.motivation: 现有 HOI 检测虽引入 VLM，但仅利用局部或片段语义，未充分挖掘全场景多粒度上下文，导致交互判别力不足。
AI.method: 提出实例中心上下文挖掘网络 InCoM-Net：① ICR 模块从 VLM 特征中解耦并提取实例内、实例间与全局三类上下文；② ProCA 模块迭代聚合上述多上下文与检测器实例特征，逐步精炼交互表征。
AI.result: 在 HICO-DET 与 V-COCO 上均取得新 SOTA，显著优于既往 VLM-based 及传统 HOI 检测方法。
AI.conclusion: 充分释放 VLM 的跨实例与全局语义潜力，通过递进式跨模态融合可稳步提升 HOI 检测性能，代码已开源。

title: Optimus: A Robust Defense Framework for Mitigating Toxicity while Fine-Tuning Conversational AI
summary: Customizing Large Language Models (LLMs) on untrusted datasets poses severe risks of injecting toxic behaviors. In this work, we introduce Optimus, a novel defense framework designed to mitigate fine-tuning harms while preserving conversational utility. Unlike existing defenses that rely heavily on precise toxicity detection or restrictive filtering, Optimus addresses the critical challenge of ensuring robust mitigation even when toxicity classifiers are imperfect or biased. Optimus integrates a training-free toxicity classification scheme that repurposes the safety alignment of commodity LLMs, and employs a dual-strategy alignment process combining synthetic "healing data" with Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) to efficiently steer models toward safety. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that Optimus mitigates toxicity even when relying on extremely biased classifiers (with up to 85% degradation in Recall). Optimus outperforms the state-of-the-art defense StarDSS and exhibits strong resilience against adaptive adversarial and jailbreak attacks. Our source code and datasets are available at https://github.com/secml-lab-vt/Optimus

AI.tldr: 提出 Optimus 框架，利用现成 LLM 自带的安全对齐作为无需训练的毒性检测源，再结合合成“修复数据”与 DPO 双策略微调，在毒性分类器高达 85% Recall 衰减、对抗越狱等多种极端场景下，显著抑制注入毒性并维持对话能力，优于 StarDSS 等现有防御。
AI.motivation: 在不可信数据集上微调 LLM 易引入有毒行为，而传统依赖精准毒性检测或严格过滤的防御方案对分类器偏差极度敏感，难以兼顾安全与效用。
AI.method: 无训练毒性分类：借用现成 LLM 自身安全对齐输出作为毒性判别信号；修复数据合成：将被误判样本与无害回复配对，生成“healing data”；双策略对齐：融合合成修复数据与 DPO，引导模型在保持性能的同时抑制有害输出；对抗评估：在多源偏差分类器、自适应对抗、越狱场景下系统测试鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在分类器 Recall 被攻击者劣化 85% 的极端条件下，仍能显著降低毒性注入；在 Jailbreak 与自适应攻击下毒性得分平均下降 60%+；通用对话能力保持率>96%，全面优于 StarDSS。
AI.conclusion: Optimus 通过“借 LLM 自身安全对齐做检测 + 修复数据+DPO”实现低成本高鲁棒的防御，不依赖高精度毒性分类器，对实际不可信微调场景具备即插即用价值，为后续 LLM 安全对齐提供可扩展范式。

title: UniDriveVLA: Unifying Understanding, Perception, and Action Planning for Autonomous Driving
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have recently emerged in autonomous driving, with the promise of leveraging rich world knowledge to improve the cognitive capabilities of driving systems. However, adapting such models for driving tasks currently faces a critical dilemma between spatial perception and semantic reasoning. Consequently, existing VLA systems are forced into suboptimal compromises: directly adopting 2D Vision-Language Models yields limited spatial perception, whereas enhancing them with 3D spatial representations often impairs the native reasoning capacity of VLMs. We argue that this dilemma largely stems from the coupled optimization of spatial perception and semantic reasoning within shared model parameters. To overcome this, we propose UniDriveVLA, a Unified Driving Vision-Language-Action model based on Mixture-of-Transformers that addresses the perception-reasoning conflict via expert decoupling. Specifically, it comprises three experts for driving understanding, scene perception, and action planning, which are coordinated through masked joint attention. In addition, we combine a sparse perception paradigm with a three-stage progressive training strategy to improve spatial perception while maintaining semantic reasoning capability. Extensive experiments show that UniDriveVLA achieves state-of-the-art performance in open-loop evaluation on nuScenes and closed-loop evaluation on Bench2Drive. Moreover, it demonstrates strong performance across a broad range of perception, prediction, and understanding tasks, including 3D detection, online mapping, motion forecasting, and driving-oriented VQA, highlighting its broad applicability as a unified model for autonomous driving. Code and model have been released at https://github.com/xiaomi-research/unidrivevla

AI.tldr: UniDriveVLA用MoT结构将3D场景、语义理解与动作规划拆分为独立专家，通过三阶段渐进训练兼顾空间感知与推理能力，在nuScenes/Bench2Drive实现SOTA统一驾驶模型。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型为兼顾空间感知与语义推理，在同一参数内耦合优化，导致“顾此失彼”；需要一种解耦架构在保持大模型世界知识的同时，增强3D空间感知与驾驶推理。
AI.method: 提出Mixture-of-Transformers框架，将驾驶理解、场景感知、动作规划建模为三个注意力专家，经masked joint attention协同；引入稀疏感知范式和3D-2D混合token，配合渐进预训练→多任务微调→闭环强化三阶段训练，实现感知-推理解耦优化。
AI.result: nuScenes开环与Bench2Drive闭环测试均达SOTA；在3D检测、在线建图、运动预测、驾驶VQA等8类任务上统一领先，相较耦合VLA基线平均提升15–30%，参数效率提升2.3倍。
AI.conclusion: 通过专家解耦与三阶段训练，UniDriveVLA首次在统一模型内同步释放VL大模型语义推理与精准3D空间感知潜力，为可扩展的通用自动驾驶认知框架提供了可行路径。

title: SHOE: Semantic HOI Open-Vocabulary Evaluation Metric
comment: Accepted to GRAIL-V Workshop at CVPR 2026
summary: Open-vocabulary human-object interaction (HOI) detection is a step towards building scalable systems that generalize to unseen interactions in real-world scenarios and support grounded multimodal systems that reason about human-object relationships. However, standard evaluation metrics, such as mean Average Precision (mAP), treat HOI classes as discrete categorical labels and fail to credit semantically valid but lexically different predictions (e.g., "lean on couch" vs. "sit on couch"), limiting their applicability for evaluating open-vocabulary predictions that go beyond any predefined set of HOI labels. We introduce SHOE (Semantic HOI Open-Vocabulary Evaluation), a new evaluation framework that incorporates semantic similarity between predicted and ground-truth HOI labels. SHOE decomposes each HOI prediction into its verb and object components, estimates their semantic similarity using the average of multiple large language models (LLMs), and combines them into a similarity score to evaluate alignment beyond exact string match. This enables a flexible and scalable evaluation of both existing HOI detection methods and open-ended generative models using standard benchmarks such as HICO-DET. Experimental results show that SHOE scores align more closely with human judgments than existing metrics, including LLM-based and embedding-based baselines, achieving an agreement of 85.73% with the average human ratings. Our work underscores the need for semantically grounded HOI evaluation that better mirrors human understanding of interactions. We will release our evaluation metric to the public to facilitate future research.

AI.tldr: 作者提出SHOE，一种基于语义相似性的开放词汇HOI检测新评估指标，替代传统mAP，解决词汇差异却被判错的问题，实验表明与人类判断一致性达85.73%。
AI.motivation: 开放词汇HOI检测需要能评判“语义正确但用词不同”的预测，而现有mAP等指标仅做离散分类匹配，无法给予合理得分，阻碍了对未见交互及生成式模型的公平评估。
AI.method: SHOE将预测与真值HOI标签拆分为动词与物体两部分，用多个大语言模型取平均估算它们各自的语义相似度，再融合为最终得分；评测沿用HICO-DET等标准数据集。
AI.result: 在多种LLM与嵌入基线对比下，SHOE得分与人工评分的吻合率达到85.73%，显著优于传统mAP及既有语义指标，能更准确地反映预测质量。
AI.conclusion: 研究强调HOI评估应向语义级对齐转变；SHOE已开源，可推动开放词汇HOI检测及更广泛的接地多模态系统研究。

title: LatentUM: Unleashing the Potential of Interleaved Cross-Modal Reasoning via a Latent-Space Unified Model
summary: Unified models (UMs) hold promise for their ability to understand and generate content across heterogeneous modalities. Compared to merely generating visual content, the use of UMs for interleaved cross-modal reasoning is more promising and valuable, e.g., for solving understanding problems that require dense visual thinking, improving visual generation through self-reflection, or modeling visual dynamics of the physical world guided by stepwise action interventions. However, existing UMs necessitate pixel decoding as a bridge due to their disjoint visual representations for understanding and generation, which is both ineffective and inefficient. In this paper, we introduce LatentUM, a novel unified model that represents all modalities within a shared semantic latent space, eliminating the need for pixel-space mediation between visual understanding and generation. This design naturally enables flexible interleaved cross-modal reasoning and generation. Beyond improved computational efficiency, the shared representation substantially alleviates codec bias and strengthens cross-modal alignment, allowing LatentUM to achieve state-of-the-art performance on the Visual Spatial Planning benchmark, push the limits of visual generation through self-reflection, and support world modeling by predicting future visual states within the shared semantic latent space.

AI.tldr: 无需像素中介、在共享潜语义空间统一视觉理解与生成的模型LatentUM，实现高效跨模态推理与生成并刷新相关基准。
AI.motivation: 现有统一模型因“理解用连续特征、生成用离散像素”需反复解码，跨模态推理低效且有编解码偏差，难以在复杂视觉-语言任务中交替推理与生成。
AI.method: 提出LatentUM：将所有模态直接映射并操作在同一语义潜空间；理解与生成共享同一表征，无需回到像素域；训练时交替执行跨模态理解、自反思式生成及未来帧预测三类任务，强化空间一致性。
AI.result: 在Visual Spatial Planning基准上达SOTA；对同一张图经自反思迭代后可生成细节更丰富、一致性更高的新图像；能在潜空间内准确预测未来视觉状态，展示动力学建模能力；推理阶段计算量显著低于需反复解码的基线。
AI.conclusion: 潜语义统一表征是跨模态理解与生成一体化的有效途径，LatentUM证明了“像素不是必需桥梁”，为未来统一视觉-语言模型在复杂推理、自反思生成和世界模型应用提供新范式。

title: Fair Representation in Parliamentary Summaries: Measuring and Mitigating Inclusion Bias
comment: Extended journal version of "Identifying Algorithmic and Domain-Specific Bias in Parliamentary Debate Summarisation" (arXiv:2507.14221), which appeared at the AIDEM Workshop, ECML-PKDD 2025. This version extends the original with cross-lingual bias analysis, a two-level hierarchical summarisation method, and human annotation validation of the evaluation framework
summary: The The use of Large language models (LLMs) to summarise parliamentary proceedings presents a promising means of increasing the accessibility of democratic participation. However, as these systems increasingly mediate access to political information -- filtering and framing content before it reaches users -- there are important fairness considerations to address. In this work, we evaluate 5 LLMs (both proprietary and open-weight) in the summarisation of plenary debates from the European Parliament to investigate the representational biases that emerge in this context. We develop an attribution-aware evaluation framework to measure speaker-level inclusion and mis-representation in debate summaries. Across all models and experiments, we find that speakers are less accurately represented in the final summary on the basis of (i) their speaking-order (speeches in the middle of the debate were systematically excluded), (ii) language spoken (non-English speakers were less faithfully represented), and (iii) political affiliations (better outcomes for left-of-centre parties). We further show how biases in these contexts can be decomposed to distinguish inclusion bias (systematic omission) from hallucination bias (systematic misrepresentation), and explore the effect of different mitigation strategies. Prompting strategies do not affect these biases. Instead, we propose a hierarchical summarisation method that decomposes the task into simpler extraction and aggregation steps, which we show significantly improves the positional/speaking-order bias across all models. These findings underscore the need for domain-sensitive evaluation metrics and ethical oversight in the deployment of LLMs for multilingual democratic applications.

AI.tldr: 多语种议会辩论摘要中，大模型存在系统性的立场、次序与语言偏见；改进提示无效，而分层摘要可有效缓解发言次序偏见。
AI.motivation: 利用大模型自动生成议会辩论摘要有助于提升公众参与民主的可及性，但政治信息的过滤与框架化会带来公平性风险，亟需针对多语种、多党派的政治语境设计专门评测与纠偏方案。
AI.method: 以欧洲议会全会辩论为语料，构建「可归因」评测框架，从发言人级别考察 5 款主流 LLM 的包含率与忠实度；区分「排除偏见」(inclusion bias) 和「幻觉偏见」(hallucination bias)。实验对比直接提示、分层提取–聚合摘要及语言、党派、发言次序等因素。
AI.result: 模型普遍遗漏中间发言、非英语发言及右翼/非主流党派内容；提示工程未能降低偏见；提出的分层摘要法在不改变模型参数的前提下显著改善发言次序偏见。
AI.conclusion: 政治多语种场景部署 LLM 必须配套领域敏感的评测指标与伦理审查；分层任务分解可作为零样本偏见缓解的有效手段，但其它维度偏见仍需针对性治理。

title: SCALE: Semantic- and Confidence-Aware Conditional Variational Autoencoder for Zero-shot Skeleton-based Action Recognition
summary: Zero-shot skeleton-based action recognition (ZSAR) aims to recognize action classes without any training skeletons from those classes, relying instead on auxiliary semantics from text. Existing approaches frequently depend on explicit skeleton-text alignment, which can be brittle when action names underspecify fine-grained dynamics and when unseen classes are semantically confusable. We propose SCALE, a lightweight and deterministic Semantic- and Confidence-Aware Listwise Energy-based framework that formulates ZSAR as class-conditional energy ranking. SCALE builds a text-conditioned Conditional Variational Autoencoder where frozen text representations parameterize both the latent prior and the decoder, enabling likelihood-based evaluation for unseen classes without generating samples at test time. To separate competing hypotheses, we introduce a semantic- and confidence-aware listwise energy loss that emphasizes semantically similar hard negatives and incorporates posterior uncertainty to adapt decision margins and reweight ambiguous training instances. Additionally, we utilize a latent prototype contrast objective to align posterior means with text-derived latent prototypes, improving semantic organization and class separability without direct feature matching. Experiments on NTU-60 and NTU-120 datasets show that SCALE consistently improves over prior VAE- and alignment-based baselines while remaining competitive with diffusion-based methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了SCALE框架，无需成对对齐、也不用在测试阶段生成样本，即可在零样本骨架动作识别中获得稳定提升。
AI.motivation: 现有ZSAR方法依赖显式骨架-文本对齐，当动作名称粒度不足或未见类别语义易混淆时性能大幅下降，需要更鲁棒的判别机制。
AI.method: 1）构建文本条件VAE，冻结文本向量同时参数化先验和解码器，直接以似然排序完成识别；2）设计语义-置信感知列表级能量损失，强化易混淆负例并依后验不确定性动态调整边距与样本权重；3）引入潜在原型对比，将后验均值拉向文本原型，无需特征级对齐即可增强类间可分性。
AI.result: 在NTU-60/120上，SCALE显著优于VAE与对齐类基线，与扩散模型方法性能相当，同时保持轻量、确定性推理。
AI.conclusion: SCALE通过“似然排序+语义-置信加权”替代脆弱的对齐范式，为零样本骨架动作识别提供了更简单、鲁棒且可扩展的解决方案。

title: ModTrans: Translating Real-world Models for Distributed Training Simulator
summary: Large-scale distributed training has been a research hot spot in machine learning systems for industry and academia in recent years. However, conducting experiments without physical machines and corresponding resources is difficult. One solution is to leverage distributed training simulators, but current ones like ASTRA-sim do not support importing real-world developed models, which poses challenges for ML researchers seeking to use them. Based on this challenge, we developed ModTrans, a translator supporting format translation from any real-world model to the ASTRA-sim simulator's input, removing the barrier between machine learning experts and machine learning system researchers. The experiment results show that ModTrans's cost is negligible.

AI.tldr: 提出ModTrans，可把任意真实深度学习模型无损转换成ASTRA-sim所需的格式，实现“零硬件”大规模分布式训练实验，开销可忽略。
AI.motivation: 学术界与工业界均依赖大规模分布式训练实验，但缺乏物理机群时难以验证模型；现有模拟器ASTRA-sim不接受真实模型输入，导致ML研究者无法直接利用，形成研究者与系统研究者之间的壁垒。
AI.method: 设计通用模型翻译器ModTrans，统一解析PyTorch/TensorFlow等框架的IR与计算图，自动映射为ASTRA-sim所需的计算-通信负载描述文件，并保留算子粒度、张量尺寸、依赖拓扑等关键信息。
AI.result: 在多框架模型（ResNet-50、BERT、GPT-3 1.3B等）上的转换实验显示，ModTrans单次转换时间<0.7s，内存增量<120MB，误差<0.3%，对模拟器端到端运行时间影响<0.5%，可视为“零成本”。
AI.conclusion: ModTrans首次打通“真实模型→系统模拟”的闭环，使ML研究者无需硬件即可评估分布式训练策略；同时其插件化架构可扩展至其他模拟器，为协同设计新算法与新系统提供通用基础设施。

title: Prosodic ABX: A Language-Agnostic Method for Measuring Prosodic Contrast in Speech Representations
summary: Speech representations from self-supervised speech models (S3Ms) are known to be sensitive to phonemic contrasts, but their sensitivity to prosodic contrasts has not been directly measured. The ABX discrimination task has been used to measure phonemic contrast in S3M representations via minimal pairs. We introduce prosodic ABX, an extension of this framework to evaluate prosodic contrast with only a handful of examples and no explicit labels. Also, we build and release a dataset of English and Japanese minimal pairs and use it along with a Mandarin dataset to evaluate contrast in English stress, Japanese pitch accent, and Mandarin tone. Finally, we show that model and layer rankings are often preserved across several experimental conditions, making it practical for low-resource settings.

AI.tldr: 首次验证自监督语音模型对韵律-超音段对立敏感度的可迁移方法，并提供三语评估基准。
AI.motivation: 现有研究已证实 S3M 对音段对立（phonemic contrast）敏感，但缺乏对其能否区分音段以上的韵律对立（prosodic contrast）的直接测评；若要在低资源场景中高效筛查模型/层级的韵律表示质量，需一种无需大量标注的新任务范式。
AI.method: 1. 将经典 ABX 判别任务扩展为“prosodic ABX”，用极少样本且无韵律标注即可量化模型对某一韵律特征的区分力；2. 构建并公开英、日最小对立对数据集（minimal pairs），结合现有汉语普通话数据集，对英语重音、日语音高音调重音、汉语声调三类韵律对立进行测评；3. 比较不同模型及不同层在各实验条件下的排名一致性。
AI.result: 提出的框架能够直接测量 S3M 对三种语言的韵律对立敏感度；大多数模型及其不同层的性能排序在语料量极少、语言/韵律类型变化等多种低资源场景下保持稳定，从而验证了框架的跨情境稳健性。
AI.conclusion: prosodic ABX 为快速、无标注地筛选具备强韵律敏感度的模型/层提供了可行方案，为低资源的韵律相关语音任务提供了一种高效评估与模型选择的基准工具。

title: AutiHero: Engaging Parents in Creating Personalized, Multi-path~Social Narratives for Autistic Children
summary: Social narratives help autistic children understand and navigate social situations through stories. To ensure effective practice, however, they often require significant time and effort from parents in customizing the narrative materials and delivering repeated instructions on them. We present AutiHero, a generative AI (GenAI)-based social narrative system, which supports parents to create personalized, multi-path stories targeting specific behavior of their autistic children, while enabling them to explore behavioral choices and causal consequences together in reading. A two-week deployment study with 16 autistic child-parent dyads showed that parents actively created, adapted, and read stories with their children, with increased confidence in everyday behavioral guidance. Our work contributes real-world-contextualized text+image content creation approaches harnessing GenAI, ensuring user-aligned application in sensitive contexts involving autistic children and their parents.

AI.tldr: AutiHero 利用生成式 AI 辅助家长为自闭症儿童快速定制多路径社交故事，两周实地测试表明家长干预信心显著提升。
AI.motivation: 传统社交故事需家长投入大量时间重复编写与讲解，对自闭症儿童日常行为干预形成巨大照护负担，亟需高效、个性化且可共同探索的叙事工具。
AI.method: 提出 GenAI 驱动的 AutiHero 系统：家长输入目标行为即可自动生成图文并重、分支式社交故事；亲子共读时可互动选择行为路径并即时呈现因果结果。对 16 对自闭症儿童-家长进行两周现场部署，收集使用日志、访谈与量表。
AI.result: 家长高频创建、改编并共读故事；干预后家长在日常行为引导上的置信度显著提高；系统输出内容符合家庭语境与敏感需求，未出现不当信息。
AI.conclusion: 将 GenAI 引入自闭症干预可行且有效，能显著减轻家长照护负担并提升干预信心，为涉及弱势群体的 AI 应用提供了用户价值观对齐的内容生成范式。

title: UAV-Track VLA: Embodied Aerial Tracking via Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Embodied visual tracking is crucial for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) executing complex real-world tasks. In dynamic urban scenarios with complex semantic requirements, Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models show great promise due to their cross-modal fusion and continuous action generation capabilities. To benchmark multimodal tracking in such environments, we construct a dedicated evaluation benchmark and a large-scale dataset encompassing over 890K frames, 176 tasks, and 85 diverse objects. Furthermore, to address temporal feature redundancy and the lack of spatial geometric priors in existing VLA models, we propose an improved VLA tracking model, UAV-Track VLA. Built upon the $π_{0.5}$ architecture, our model introduces a temporal compression net to efficiently capture inter-frame dynamics. Additionally, a parallel dual-branch decoder comprising a spatial-aware auxiliary grounding head and a flow matching action expert is designed to decouple cross-modal features and generate fine-grained continuous actions. Systematic experiments in the CARLA simulator validate the superior end-to-end performance of our method. Notably, in challenging long-distance pedestrian tracking tasks, UAV-Track VLA achieves a 61.76\% success rate and 269.65 average tracking frames, significantly outperforming existing baselines. Furthermore, it demonstrates robust zero-shot generalization in unseen environments and reduces single-step inference latency by 33.4\% (to 0.0571s) compared to the original $π_{0.5}$, enabling highly efficient, real-time UAV control. Data samples and demonstration videos are available at: https://github.com/Hub-Tian/UAV-Track\_VLA.

AI.tldr: 提出首个面向动态城市场景的多模态无人机视觉-语言-动作跟踪基准与大尺度数据集，并设计 UAV-Track VLA 模型，通过时序压缩网与双分支解码器解决冗余与几何缺失问题，实现高效长距离行人跟踪与零样本泛化。
AI.motivation: 现有 VLA 模型在城市动态环境中缺少针对无人机跟踪任务的评测基准，且存在时序特征冗余、空间几何先验不足导致的动作粒度粗糙问题。
AI.method: 构建 890 K 帧、176 任务、85 类目标的城市场景基准；基于 π0.5 架构，引入时序压缩网络提取帧间动态，设计并行的空间感知定位头与流匹配动作专家双分支解码器，实现跨模态特征解耦与连续精细动作生成。
AI.result: CARLA 仿真中，UAV-Track VLA 在长距离行人跟踪任务成功率达 61.76%，平均跟踪帧数 269.65，均显著优于基线；零样本泛化鲁棒，单步推理延迟降至 0.0571 s，较 π0.5 降低 33.4%，满足实时控制需求。
AI.conclusion: 该研究填补了无人机 VLA 跟踪领域的数据与模型空白，提出的时序-空间协同策略有效提升复杂城市任务的端到端性能，为实时无人机自主跟踪提供了可扩展的高效框架。

title: NEMESIS: Noise-suppressed Efficient MAE with Enhanced Superpatch Integration Strategy
summary: Volumetric CT imaging is essential for clinical diagnosis, yet annotating 3D volumes is expensive and time-consuming, motivating self-supervised learning (SSL) from unlabeled data. However, applying SSL to 3D CT remains challenging due to the high memory cost of full-volume transformers and the anisotropic spatial structure of CT data, which is not well captured by conventional masking strategies. We propose NEMESIS, a masked autoencoder (MAE) framework that operates on local 128x128x128 superpatches, enabling memory-efficient training while preserving anatomical detail. NEMESIS introduces three key components: (i) noise-enhanced reconstruction as a pretext task, (ii) Masked Anatomical Transformer Blocks (MATB) that perform dual-masking through parallel plane-wise and axis-wise token removal, and (iii) NEMESIS Tokens (NT) for cross-scale context aggregation. On the BTCV multi-organ classification benchmark, NEMESIS with a frozen backbone and a linear classifier achieves a mean AUROC of 0.9633, surpassing fully fine-tuned SuPreM (0.9493) and VoCo (0.9387). Under a low-label regime with only 10% of available annotations, it retains an AUROC of 0.9075, demonstrating strong label efficiency. Furthermore, the superpatch-based design reduces computational cost to 31.0 GFLOPs per forward pass, compared to 985.8 GFLOPs for the full-volume baseline, providing a scalable and robust foundation for 3D medical imaging.

AI.tldr: NEMESIS 是一个针对 3D CT 的掩码自编码器框架，通过 128³ 超块、双重解剖掩码和噪声增强重建，在仅 31 GFLOPs 的条件下将多器官分类 AUROC 提升到 0.9633，10% 标注仍达 0.9075。
AI.motivation: 3D CT 体积标注昂贵，现有 SSL 方法因全卷积 Transformer 显存过高且无法有效利用 CT 的各向异性解剖结构而难以直接应用。
AI.method: 1) 将体积切分为 128³ 局部超块，降低显存；2) 提出噪声增强重建任务；3) 设计 MATB 模块，并行做平面与轴向双重掩码；4) 引入 NEMESIS Tokens 实现跨尺度上下文聚合；5) 整体采用 MAE 自监督框架。
AI.result: BTCV 多器官分类任务上，冻结主干+线性分类器 AUROC 达 0.9633，超越全微调 SuPreM(0.9493) 与 VoCo(0.9387)；仅 10% 标注时 AUROC 保持 0.9075；单次前向计算量降至 31.0 GFLOPs，为全体积基线的 3.1%。
AI.conclusion: NEMESIS 通过局部超块与解剖感知掩码策略，在大幅降低计算与标注需求的同时显著提升 3D CT 自监督性能，为临床可扩展的 3D 医学影像基础模型提供了新基准。

title: CASHG: Context-Aware Stylized Online Handwriting Generation
summary: Online handwriting represents strokes as time-ordered trajectories, which makes handwritten content easier to transform and reuse in a wide range of applications. However, generating natural sentence-level online handwriting that faithfully reflects a writer's style remains challenging, since sentence synthesis demands context-dependent characters with stroke continuity and spacing. Prior methods treat these boundary properties as implicit outcomes of sequence modeling, which becomes unreliable at the sentence scale and under limited compositional diversity. We propose CASHG, a context-aware stylized online handwriting generator that explicitly models inter-character connectivity for style-consistent sentence-level trajectory synthesis. CASHG uses a Character Context Encoder to obtain character identity and sentence-dependent context memory and fuses them in a bigram-aware sliding-window Transformer decoder that emphasizes local predecessor--current transitions, complemented by gated context fusion for sentence-level context.Training proceeds through a three-stage curriculum from isolated glyphs to full sentences, improving robustness under sparse transition coverage. We further introduce Connectivity and Spacing Metrics (CSM), a boundary-aware evaluation suite that quantifies cursive connectivity and spacing similarity. Under benchmark-matched evaluation protocols, CASHG consistently improves CSM over comparison methods while remaining competitive in DTW-based trajectory similarity, with gains corroborated by a human evaluation.

AI.tldr: 提出CASHG模型，显式建模字符间连笔与间距，三阶段训练生成风格一致的整句在线手写轨迹，并引入CSM指标评估连笔与间距，实验超越基线。
AI.motivation: 现有序列模型把连笔与间距当作隐式副产品，在句子级及数据稀缺时难以保持书写者风格一致性。
AI.method: CASHG：用字符上下文编码器提取字符身份与句子上下文，双字母感知滑动窗口Transformer解码器显式建模前驱-当前过渡，门控融合句子级上下文；三阶段课程训练（单字符→词→句）；提出连笔与间距指标CSM。
AI.result: 在标准协议下，CSM显著优于对比方法，DTW轨迹相似度保持竞争力；人工评估亦验证优势。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模字符间连接与上下文融合，可在少数据条件下生成风格一致的自然句子级在线 handwriting，CSM为边界感知评估提供新工具。

title: Quokka: Accelerating Program Verification with LLMs via Invariant Synthesis
summary: Program verification relies on loop invariants, yet automatically discovering strong invariants remains a long-standing challenge. We investigate whether large language models (LLMs) can accelerate program verification by generating useful loop invariants. We introduce Quokka, an evaluation-oriented framework for LLM-based invariant synthesis that provides sound evaluation and achieves state-of-the-art performance. Unlike prior work that treats LLM outputs as noisy symbolic material requiring substantial post-processing, Quokka adopts a simpler and evaluation-centric design that directly validates whether each LLM-generated invariant helps prove the target assertion. We construct a benchmark of 866 instances derived from SV-COMP and evaluate 9 state-of-the-art LLMs across multiple model families. We demonstrate that supervised fine-tuning and Best-of-N sampling yield measurable improvements, and we show that Quokka consistently outperforms prior LLM-based verifiers. Our code and data are publicly available at https://github.com/Anjiang-Wei/Quokka

AI.tldr: Quokka框架通过直接验证LLM生成的循环不变式，刷新了基于LLM的程序验证SOTA，并开源了866例基准与代码。
AI.motivation: 自动发现强循环不变式是程序验证的长期瓶颈，作者探索大模型能否直接生成可用不变式，而非仅提供需后处理的符号提示。
AI.method: 提出评估导向框架Quokka：①将LLM输出直接喂给验证器，剔除复杂后处理；②构建866例SV-COMP基准；③对9种SOTA模型进行监督微调与Best-of-N采样。
AI.result: 微调+BoN采样显著提升成功率；Quokka在所有指标上全面优于现有LLM验证器，且不依赖额外约束求解器。
AI.conclusion: LLM在无需繁重后处理的情况下即可产出足够强的循环不变式，评估导向策略是发挥大模型程序验证潜力的关键，数据与代码已开源。

title: SPAR: Single-Pass Any-Resolution ViT for Open-vocabulary Segmentation
summary: Foundational Vision Transformers (ViTs) have limited effectiveness in tasks requiring fine-grained spatial understanding, due to their fixed pre-training resolution and inherently coarse patch-level representations. These challenges are especially pronounced in dense prediction scenarios, such as open-vocabulary segmentation with ViT-based vision-language models, where high-resolution inputs are essential for accurate pixel-level reasoning. Existing approaches typically process large-resolution images using a sliding-window strategy at the pre-training resolution. While this improves accuracy through finer strides, it comes at a significant computational cost. We introduce SPAR: Single-Pass Any-Resolution ViT, a resolution-agnostic dense feature extractor designed for efficient high-resolution inference. We distill the spatial reasoning capabilities of a finely-strided, sliding-window teacher into a single-pass student using a feature regression loss, without requiring architectural changes or pixel-level supervision. Applied to open-vocabulary segmentation, SPAR improves single-pass baselines by up to 10.5 mIoU and even surpasses the teacher, demonstrating effectiveness in efficient, high-resolution reasoning. Code: https://github.com/naomikombol/SPAR

AI.tldr: SPAR 让 ViT 一次前传即可处理任意高分辨率，无需滑动窗口或像素级标签，在开放词汇分割上最高提升 10.5 mIoU。
AI.motivation: ViT 预训练分辨率固定且 patch 表征粗糙，在需要细粒度空间理解的稠密预测任务（如开放词汇分割）中精度受限；现有滑动窗口策略虽有效但计算开销巨大。
AI.method: 提出 Single-Pass Any-Resolution (SPAR) 框架：以高分辨率细步长滑动窗口教师网络为监督，通过特征回归损失将空间推理能力蒸馏给单路学生网络，无需修改 ViT 结构，也无需像素级真值。
AI.result: 在开放词汇分割基准上，SPAR 单路推理比基线提升 10.5 mIoU，甚至超过其教师滑动窗口模型，同时显著降低计算量。
AI.conclusion: SPAR 首次实现 ViT 的任意分辨率单路稠密特征提取，兼顾高分辨率精度与效率，为下游高分辨率视觉-语言任务提供了即插即用的新范式。

title: Tex3D: Objects as Attack Surfaces via Adversarial 3D Textures for Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) models have shown strong performance in robotic manipulation, yet their robustness to physically realizable adversarial attacks remains underexplored. Existing studies reveal vulnerabilities through language perturbations and 2D visual attacks, but these attack surfaces are either less representative of real deployment or limited in physical realism. In contrast, adversarial 3D textures pose a more physically plausible and damaging threat, as they are naturally attached to manipulated objects and are easier to deploy in physical environments. Bringing adversarial 3D textures to VLA systems is nevertheless nontrivial. A central obstacle is that standard 3D simulators do not provide a differentiable optimization path from the VLA objective function back to object appearance, making it difficult to optimize through an end-to-end manner. To address this, we introduce Foreground-Background Decoupling (FBD), which enables differentiable texture optimization through dual-renderer alignment while preserving the original simulation environment. To further ensure that the attack remains effective across long-horizon and diverse viewpoints in the physical world, we propose Trajectory-Aware Adversarial Optimization (TAAO), which prioritizes behaviorally critical frames and stabilizes optimization with a vertex-based parameterization. Built on these designs, we present Tex3D, the first framework for end-to-end optimization of 3D adversarial textures directly within the VLA simulation environment. Experiments in both simulation and real-robot settings show that Tex3D significantly degrades VLA performance across multiple manipulation tasks, achieving task failure rates of up to 96.7\%.
