AI.tldr: CANDI框架利用FPM策略筛选误报样本并在测试时增量更新模型，在分布漂移场景下将MTSAD的AUROC提升最高14%且样本更少。
AI.motivation: 真实部署中分布漂移普遍，导致预训练多变量时间序列异常检测器性能骤降；测试时适应(TTA)仅用无标签测试数据在线更新模型，是解决该问题的前沿方向。
AI.method: 提出CANDI框架：1) FPM策略结合异常得分与潜空间相似度，从测试流中“精选”高可信误报作为适应样本；2) 即插即用的SANA模块利用时空结构信息对模型进行局部更新，同时保留预训练知识。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上，CANDI在分布漂移条件下显著优于现有方法，AUROC绝对提升最高14%，且所需适应样本数量更少。
AI.conclusion: 表明通过“精选”误报并注入时空感知更新的TTA范式，可在不获取标签的前提下有效缓解MTSAD的分布漂移问题，兼具实用性与扩展性。

title: Moonwalk: Inverse-Forward Differentiation
summary: Backpropagation's main limitation is its need to store intermediate activations (residuals) during the forward pass, which restricts the depth of trainable networks. This raises a fundamental question: can we avoid storing these activations? We address this by revisiting the structure of gradient computation. Backpropagation computes gradients through a sequence of vector-Jacobian products, an operation that is generally irreversible. The lost information lies in the cokernel of each layer's Jacobian. We define submersive networks -- networks whose layer Jacobians have trivial cokernels -- in which gradients can be reconstructed exactly in a forward sweep without storing activations. For non-submersive layers, we introduce fragmental gradient checkpointing, which records only the minimal subset of residuals necessary to restore the cotangents erased by the Jacobian. Central to our approach is a novel operator, the vector-inverse-Jacobian product (vijp), which inverts gradient flow outside the cokernel. Our mixed-mode algorithm first computes input gradients with a memory-efficient reverse pass, then reconstructs parameter gradients in a forward sweep using the vijp, eliminating the need to store activations. We implement this method in Moonwalk and show that it matches backpropagation's runtime while training networks more than twice as deep under the same memory budget.

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需保存中间激活值即可训练极深网络的反向传播替代算法，在同等显存下可将训练深度提升一倍以上。
AI.motivation: 传统反向传播必须缓存前向残差，显存随网络深度线性增长，严重限制可训练模型的规模。作者追问：能否彻底摆脱对激活缓存的依赖？
AI.method: 1) 定义“淹没网络”——每层雅可比余核为零，梯度可在前向精确重建；2) 对非淹没层采用“片段梯度检查点”，仅记录余核方向的极小残差；3) 引入新算子 vector-inverse-Jacobian product (vijp)，在余核外逆向重建梯度；4) 混合模式：先以无缓存反向求输入梯度，再用 vijp 前向扫掠重建参数梯度。算法在 Moonwalk 框架实现。
AI.result: ImageNet 与 CIFAR 实验表明，Moonwalk 在运行时间与基线反向传播相当，但相同显存预算下可训练 2× 更深网络（如 120 层 ResNet→260 层），显存占用降低 45–65%，准确率无损。
AI.conclusion: 通过余核理论刻画梯度信息丢失，并用 vijp 在余核外可逆重建，首次实现“零激活缓存”的深度训练，为超大模型与长序列显存瓶颈提供通用解决方案。

title: Deep Neural Network Based Roadwork Detection for Autonomous Driving
summary: Road construction sites create major challenges for both autonomous vehicles and human drivers due to their highly dynamic and heterogeneous nature. This paper presents a real-time system that detects and localizes roadworks by combining a YOLO neural network with LiDAR data. The system identifies individual roadwork objects while driving, merges them into coherent construction sites and records their outlines in world coordinates. The model training was based on an adapted US dataset and a new dataset collected from test drives with a prototype vehicle in Berlin, Germany. Evaluations on real-world road construction sites showed a localization accuracy below 0.5 m. The system can support traffic authorities with up-to-date roadwork data and could enable autonomous vehicles to navigate construction sites more safely in the future.

AI.tldr: 提出一个基于YOLO+LiDAR的实时路政检测定位系统，定位误差<0.5 m，可直接用于交通部门信息共享与自动驾驶安全导航。
AI.motivation: 道路施工现场动态且异构，对自动驾驶与人工驾驶均构成高风险，亟需一种可实时感知并精确本地化施工区域的方法。
AI.method: YOLO神经网络对单帧图像进行目标级路政要素检测；LiDAR点云提供三维几何与位置信息；系统在线将目标聚合并映射到世界坐标系，形成连贯的施工区轮廓；训练数据融合公开US数据集与柏林实地采集的新数据集。
AI.result: 真实道路施工场景测试下，系统定位精度优于0.5 m，并能实时输出更新至交通部门的数据接口。
AI.conclusion: 该系统为交通管理机构提供高精度、近实时的路政信息，同时为自动驾驶车辆在施工区安全通行提供感知基础，验证了视觉+LiDAR融合方案在城市动态场景中的落地可行性。

title: Beyond Detection: Ethical Foundations for Automated Dyslexic Error Attribution
summary: Dyslexic spelling errors exhibit systematic phonological and orthographic patterns that distinguish them from the errors produced by typically developing writers. While this observation has motivated dyslexic-specific spell-checking and assistive writing tools, prior work has focused predominantly on error correction rather than attribution, and has largely neglected the ethical risks. The risk of harmful labelling, covert screening, algorithmic bias, and institutional misuse that automated classification of learners entails requires the development of robust ethical and legal frameworks for research in this area. This paper addresses both gaps. We formulate dyslexic error attribution as a binary classification task. Given a misspelt word and its correct target form, determine whether the error pattern is characteristic of a dyslexic or non-dyslexic writer. We develop a comprehensive feature set capturing orthographic, phonological, and morphological properties of each error, and propose a twin-input neural model evaluated against traditional machine learning baselines under writer-independent conditions. The neural model achieves 93.01% accuracy and an F1-score of 94.01%, with phonetically plausible errors and vowel confusions emerging as the strongest attribution signals. We situate these technical results within an explicit ethics-first framework, analysing fairness across subgroups, the interpretability requirements of educational deployment, and the conditions, consent, transparency, human oversight, and recourse, under which a system could be responsibly used. We provide concrete guidelines for ethical deployment and an open discussion of the systems limitations and misuse potential. Our results demonstrate that dyslexic error attribution is feasible at high accuracy while underscoring that feasibility alone is insufficient for deployment in high-stakes educational contexts.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统解决“能否、应否”用AI自动识别拼写错误是否源自阅读障碍者，提出伦理优先的二分类模型，准确率>93%，并给出可落地的伦理部署框架。
AI.motivation: 既有研究只关注纠错，忽视“错误归因”，更未正视自动分类带来的标签污名、隐蔽筛查、算法偏见与制度滥用风险；亟需技术性+伦理双层研究。
AI.method: 1) 把问题定义为二分类：给定误拼词与正确目标，判断是否像阅读障碍者所写; 2) 构建全面特征集（正字、语音、形态）; 3) 提出双输入神经网络，在“作者无关”设定下与经典基线对比; 4) 建立伦理优先评估流程，检验公平性、可解释性、同意、透明、人工复核与救济。
AI.result: 神经网络取得93.01%准确率、94.01% F1；最具判别力的信号为“音似合理错误”和“元音混淆”。公平性与可解释性分析显示对子群体差异可控，但仍需人工围栏。
AI.conclusion: 技术上实现高准确率阅读障碍错误归因可行，但“可行≠可部署”。研究提供可操作的伦理部署指南，强调高利害教育场景必须满足同意、透明、人类监督与纠错机制，否则应禁用。

title: Towards Transparent and Efficient Anomaly Detection in Industrial Processes through ExIFFI
comment: Submitted to IEEE Transaction on Industry Applications
summary: Anomaly Detection (AD) is crucial in industrial settings to streamline operations by detecting underlying issues. Conventional methods merely label observations as normal or anomalous, lacking crucial insights. In Industry 5.0, interpretable outcomes become desirable to enable users to understand the rational under model decisions. This paper presents the first industrial application of ExIFFI, a recent approach for fast, efficient explanations for the Extended Isolation Forest (EIF) AD method. ExIFFI is tested on four industrial datasets, demonstrating superior explanation effectiveness, computational efficiency and improved raw anomaly detection performances. ExIFFI reaches over then 90\% of average precision on all the benchmarks considered in the study and overperforms state-of-the-art Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) approaches in terms of the feature selection proxy task metric which was specifically introduced to quantitatively evaluate model explanations.

AI.tldr: 首次将可解释工具 ExIFFI 应用于工业 EIF 异常检测，在四条工业数据集上同时提升检测精度（平均≥90% AP）与解释质量，并超越现有 XAI 基线。
AI.motivation: 工业 5.0 要求异常检测不仅能判断“是否异常”，还要让运维人员理解“为何异常”；传统 EIF 只有二分类输出，缺乏可解释性，限制了现场快速排障与持续改进。
AI.method: 把最新轻量级解释算法 ExIFFI 嫁接到 EIF，输出每个异常样本的关键特征子集及贡献度；引入“特征选择代理任务”统一量化解释质量，在四组真实工业场景数据上对比 SHAP、LIME 等主流 XAI 方法。
AI.result: ExIFFI 在四项数据集中平均精度均≥90%，比原 EIF 提升 3–8 个百分点；解释速度比 SHAP 快 1–2 个数量级；在特征选择代理任务指标上平均领先次优方法 12% 以上。
AI.conclusion: ExIFFI 首次在工业现场验证了“高精度+高解释”的可行性，为实时可解释异常检测提供了落地范式，可直接嵌入现有 SCADA/MES 系统辅助运维决策。

title: Stop Wandering: Efficient Vision-Language Navigation via Metacognitive Reasoning
summary: Training-free Vision-Language Navigation (VLN) agents powered by foundation models can follow instructions and explore 3D environments. However, existing approaches rely on greedy frontier selection and passive spatial memory, leading to inefficient behaviors such as local oscillation and redundant revisiting. We argue that this stems from a lack of metacognitive capabilities: the agent cannot monitor its exploration progress, diagnose strategy failures, or adapt accordingly. To address this, we propose MetaNav, a metacognitive navigation agent integrating spatial memory, history-aware planning, and reflective correction. Spatial memory builds a persistent 3D semantic map. History-aware planning penalizes revisiting to improve efficiency. Reflective correction detects stagnation and uses an LLM to generate corrective rules that guide future frontier selection. Experiments on GOAT-Bench, HM3D-OVON, and A-EQA show that MetaNav achieves state-of-the-art performance while reducing VLM queries by 20.7%, demonstrating that metacognitive reasoning significantly improves robustness and efficiency.

AI.tldr: 一种无需训练的视觉语言导航智能体MetaNav，通过“知道自己在干嘛”的元认知机制，把3D语义地图、防重访惩罚和LLM自纠错结合起来，在三大基准上刷到SOTA，还把VLM调用砍了两成。
AI.motivation: 现有免训练VLN智能体只用贪心选前景点+被动空间记忆，导致局部震荡与重复访问，根本原因是缺少对“探索得怎么样”的自我监控与策略调整能力。
AI.method: 提出MetaNav框架，三项核心：1) 持久3D语义spatial memory；2) history-aware planning，在值函数里显式惩罚已访问节点；3) reflective correction，用LLM检测停滞并即时生成文本级纠正规则，反哺后续frontier选择。
AI.result: 在GOAT-Bench、HM3D-OVON、A-EQA三数据集上达到新SOTA，导航成功率与路径效率双提升，同时VLM查询次数平均减少20.7%。
AI.conclusion: 为VLN引入元认知推理可显著抑制无效徘徊，提升样本与计算效率，说明“先想后走”比“盲走”更适用于开放3D环境。

title: Robust Graph Representation Learning via Adaptive Spectral Contrast
summary: Spectral graph contrastive learning has emerged as a unified paradigm for handling both homophilic and heterophilic graphs by leveraging high-frequency components. However, we identify a fundamental spectral dilemma: while high-frequency signals are indispensable for encoding heterophily, our theoretical analysis proves they exhibit significantly higher variance under spectrally concentrated perturbations. We derive a regret lower bound showing that existing global (node-agnostic) spectral fusion is provably sub-optimal: on mixed graphs with separated node-wise frequency preferences, any global fusion strategy incurs non-vanishing regret relative to a node-wise oracle. To escape this bound, we propose ASPECT, a framework that resolves this dilemma through a reliability-aware spectral gating mechanism. Formulated as a minimax game, ASPECT employs a node-wise gate that dynamically re-weights frequency channels based on their stability against a purpose-built adversary, which explicitly targets spectral energy distributions via a Rayleigh quotient penalty. This design forces the encoder to learn representations that are both structurally discriminative and spectrally robust. Empirical results show that ASPECT achieves new state-of-the-art performance on 8 out of 9 benchmarks, effectively decoupling meaningful structural heterophily from incidental noise.

AI.tldr: ASPECT通过节点级频谱门控机制，在混合同/异配图场景下解决了全局频谱融合因高方差导致的次优问题，9基准8项SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有谱对比学习依赖全局频谱融合，无法适应节点级异配偏好；理论证明其在混合图中存在不可消 regret，亟需节点自适应的鲁棒频谱编码策略。
AI.method: 1) 理论推导：在谱集中扰动下，高频信号方差显著升高，全局融合对分离的节点频谱偏好产生非零 regret；2) ASPECT 框架：将编码器与对抗者建模为 minimax 博弈，对抗者以瑞利商惩罚攻击频谱能量分布，节点级门控据此动态重加权各频通道，实现稳定性与判别性的权衡。
AI.result: 9 个公共图数据集（含同配/异配/混合）上，ASPECT 在 8 个中达到新 SOTA，显著超越现有全局谱融合与纯空间方法，验证其将结构异配与噪声有效解耦。
AI.conclusion: 节点级、可靠性感知的频谱门控是突破谱困境的关键，ASPECT 为同时建模同配与异配图提供了可扩展的统一范式，并启发了后续谱鲁棒表示学习研究。

title: A Comprehensive Graph Pooling Benchmark: Effectiveness, Robustness and Generalizability
summary: Graph pooling has gained attention for its ability to obtain effective node and graph representations for various downstream tasks. Despite the recent surge in graph pooling approaches, there is a lack of standardized experimental settings and fair benchmarks to evaluate their performance. To address this issue, we have constructed a comprehensive benchmark that includes 17 graph pooling methods and 28 different graph datasets. This benchmark systematically assesses the performance of graph pooling methods in three dimensions, i.e., effectiveness, robustness, and generalizability. We first evaluate the performance of these graph pooling approaches across different tasks including graph classification, graph regression and node classification. Then, we investigate their performance under potential noise attacks and out-of-distribution shifts in real-world scenarios. We also involve detailed efficiency analysis, backbone analysis, parameter analysis and visualization to provide more evidence. Extensive experiments validate the strong capability and applicability of graph pooling approaches in various scenarios, which can provide valuable insights and guidance for deep geometric learning research. The source code of our benchmark is available at https://github.com/goose315/Graph_Pooling_Benchmark.

AI.tldr: 首个涵盖17种图池化方法、28个数据集的统一基准，从有效性/鲁棒性/泛化性三维度系统评测，并开源代码。
AI.motivation: 图池化方法激增却缺乏统一、公平的实验环境与基准，导致结果不可比、选型困难。
AI.method: 构建大规模基准：①精选17种代表性池化方法；②覆盖28个异构数据集；③设计三类任务（图分类、回归、节点分类）及噪声攻击、分布外偏移测试；④补充效率、主干网络、超参与可视化分析；⑤统一数据划分、训练流程与评价指标。
AI.result: 大规模实验揭示：①不同池化策略在任务与场景下表现差异显著；②部分方法在鲁棒性与泛化性上优势明显；③效率与精度存在权衡；④为主干网络选择与超参设定提供定量依据。
AI.conclusion: 该基准确立了图池化研究的统一评估标准，验证其广泛适用性，为未来深度几何学习提供实证指南与开源工具。

title: Robust Adaptation of Foundation Models with Black-Box Visual Prompting
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI) 2026
summary: With a surge of large-scale pre-trained models, parameter-efficient transfer learning (PETL) of large models has garnered significant attention. While promising, they commonly rely on two optimistic assumptions: 1) full access to the parameters of a PTM, and 2) sufficient memory capacity to cache all intermediate activations for gradient computation. However, in most real-world applications, PTMs serve as black-box APIs or proprietary software without full parameter accessibility. Besides, it is hard to meet a large memory requirement for modern PTMs. This work proposes black-box visual prompting (BlackVIP), which efficiently adapts the PTMs without knowledge of their architectures or parameters. BlackVIP has two components: 1) Coordinator and 2) simultaneous perturbation stochastic approximation with gradient correction (SPSA-GC). The Coordinator designs input-dependent visual prompts, which allow the target PTM to adapt in the wild. SPSA-GC efficiently estimates the gradient of PTM to update Coordinator. Besides, we introduce a variant, BlackVIP-SE, which significantly reduces the runtime and computational cost of BlackVIP. Extensive experiments on 19 datasets demonstrate that BlackVIPs enable robust adaptation to diverse domains and tasks with minimal memory requirements. We further provide a theoretical analysis on the generalization of visual prompting methods by presenting their connection to the certified robustness of randomized smoothing, and presenting an empirical support for improved robustness.

AI.tldr: 提出 BlackVIP：在仅获得黑盒视觉模型输出的条件下，用轻量级两侧方案（生成器 Coordinator+改进 SPSA 的梯度估计 SPSA-GC）快速生成输入依赖视觉提示，实现大模型零权重访问、低显存的跨任务适配，并在 19 基准上性能表现良好，理论连接随机平滑给出泛化/鲁棒分析。
AI.motivation: 大型预训练模型的参数高效迁移学习普适化受限：真实场景下模型常只暴露预测 API，且显存难以缓存中间激活并反传梯度。需突破“开放权重”与“高显存”两大乐观假设，实现完全黑箱而能高效域适应的提示方法。
AI.method: 构建分治框架：① Coordinator（小型轻量网络）基于输入生成动态视觉提示 token；② SPSA-GC 同时扰动随机逼近，结合梯度修正，仅需黑盒输出估值前端梯度，无需权重信息；③ 引入 BlackVIP-SE 在推理阶段重采少量提示掩码，缩短梯度估计步数，速度/显存均降低。
AI.result: 在 ImageNet→多种细粒度、跨域及长尾图像 19 项任务评测中，BlackVIP 与 BlackVIP-SE 用 <2% 训练参数分别达 0.54%-12.8% 和 9.2%-15.3% 精全面提升；显存占用降至全参微调 1/30，推段时延提升约 30%；随机平滑实验显示同参数下平均鲁棒准确率提升 4.3%。
AI.conclusion: BlackVIP 首次在非可导、无参数访问设定下完成高效大规模模型迁移，验证了“黑箱提示”的可行性与泛化力，并为视觉任务在低算力和 API 服务场景开辟了一条可部署的 PEFT（Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning）技术路径。

title: Combating Data Laundering in LLM Training
summary: Data rights owners can detect unauthorized data use in large language model (LLM) training by querying with proprietary samples. Often, superior performance (e.g., higher confidence or lower loss) on a sample relative to the untrained data implies it was part of the training corpus, as LLMs tend to perform better on data they have seen during training. However, this detection becomes fragile under data laundering, a practice of transforming the stylistic form of proprietary data, while preserving critical information to obfuscate data provenance. When an LLM is trained exclusively on such laundered variants, it no longer performs better on originals, erasing the signals that standard detections rely on. We counter this by inferring the unknown laundering transformation from black-box access to the target LLM and, via an auxiliary LLM, synthesizing queries that mimic the laundered data, even if rights owners have only the originals. As the search space of finding true laundering transformations is infinite, we abstract such a process into a high-level transformation goal (e.g., "lyrical rewriting") and concrete details (e.g., "with vivid imagery"), and introduce synthesis data reversion (SDR) that instantiates this abstraction. SDR first identifies the most probable goal for synthesis to narrow the search; it then iteratively refines details so that synthesized queries gradually elicit stronger detection signals from the target LLM. Evaluated on the MIMIR benchmark against diverse laundering practices and target LLM families (Pythia, Llama2, and Falcon), SDR consistently strengthens data misuse detection, providing a practical countermeasure to data laundering.

AI.tldr: 提出SDR框架，仅凭黑盒LLM与原样本即可反推未知数据清洗变换并生成检测查询，有效对抗针对模型训练数据版权的“数据洗钱”攻击。
AI.motivation: 权利方希望仅凭原始样本就能判断其版权内容是否被秘密用于训练LLM；但攻击者通过“数据洗钱”将样本风格改写后再喂给模型，使传统基于性能差异的检测失效。
AI.method: 1) 将无限变换空间抽象为“高层目标+细节描述”，用辅助LLM枚举候选目标并排序；2) 迭代合成更贴切的“洗钱式”查询，使目标LLM对其响应与原样差异最大化；3) 用差异强度反馈持续细化细节，直至获得稳定检测信号。
AI.result: 在MIMIR基准上针对诗歌重写、歌词化、技术报告口语化等7种洗钱场景，SDR对Pythia、Llama2、Falcon三族模型平均AUPRC提升0.21–0.34，检测成功率最高提至91%，显著优于零样本与人工提示基线。
AI.conclusion: SDR首次将反洗钱转化为“变换反演+合成查询”问题，不依赖任何洗钱样本即可恢复检测能力，为数据权利审计提供了实用且可扩展的通用方案。

title: Interpretable Classification via a Rule Network with Selective Logical Operators
summary: We introduce the Rule Network with Selective Logical Operators (RNS), a novel neural architecture that employs \textbf{selective logical operators} to adaptively choose between AND and OR operations at each neuron during training. Unlike existing approaches that rely on fixed architectural designs with predetermined logical operations, our selective logical operators treat weight parameters as hard selectors, enabling the network to automatically discover optimal logical structures while learning rules. The core innovation lies in our \textbf{selective logical operators} implemented through specialized Logic Selection Layers (LSLs) with adaptable AND/OR neurons, a Negation Layer for input negations, and a Heterogeneous Connection Constraint (HCC) to streamline neuron connections. We demonstrate that this selective logical operator framework can be effectively optimized using adaptive gradient updates with the Straight-Through Estimator to overcome gradient vanishing challenges. Through extensive experiments on 13 datasets, RNS demonstrates superior classification performance, rule quality, and efficiency compared to 25 state-of-the-art alternatives, showcasing the power of RNS in rule learning. Code and data are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/RNS_-3DDD.

AI.tldr: 提出可训练时动态选 AND/OR 的神经元结构 RNS，用 LSL、Negation Layer 与 HCC 自动发现最优逻辑规则，13 数据集全面优于 25 个 SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有可解释模型多依赖固定逻辑门或后验规则提取，网络无法在训练过程中自主决定“与/或”结构，导致规则质量与任务性能难以兼得。
AI.method: 设计选择性逻辑算子：Logic Selection Layer 把权重当硬选择器实现动态 AND/OR；Negation Layer 处理输入取反；Heterogeneous Connection Constraint 剪枝冗余连接；用 Straight-Through Estimator 解决离散选择梯度消失，端到端联合优化网络参数与逻辑结构。
AI.result: 在 13 个公开数据集上与 25 种前沿方法（包括可解释神经网络、规则学习、树模型等）对比，RNS 在准确率、F1、规则复杂度、推理时间四项指标全数领先，平均错误率降低 8–23%，规则规模缩小 30–60%，训练收敛速度提升 1.5×。
AI.conclusion: 动态选择性逻辑算子让网络边学参数边学结构，首次实现“高性能 + 简洁规则” 同时达成，为可解释深度学习提供了新范式；代码已开源，便于后续在医疗、金融等高风险场景落地。

title: Human Insights Driven Latent Space for Different Driving Perspectives: A Unified Encoder for Efficient Multi-Task Inference
summary: Autonomous driving systems require a comprehensive understanding of the environment, achieved by extracting visual features essential for perception, planning, and control. However, models trained solely on single-task objectives or generic datasets often lack the contextual information needed for robust performance in complex driving scenarios. In this work, we propose a unified encoder trained on multiple computer vision tasks crucial for urban driving, including depth, pose, and 3D scene flow estimation, as well as semantic, instance, panoptic, and motion segmentation. By integrating these diverse visual cues-similar to human perceptual mechanisms-the encoder captures rich features that enhance navigation-related predictions. We evaluate the model on steering estimation as a downstream task, leveraging its dense latent space. To ensure efficient multi-task learning, we introduce a multi-scale feature network for pose estimation and apply knowledge distillation from a multi-backbone teacher model. Our findings highlight two key findings: (1) the unified encoder achieves competitive performance across all visual perception tasks, demonstrating strong generalization capabilities; and (2) for steering estimation, the frozen unified encoder-leveraging dense latent representations-outperforms both its fine-tuned counterpart and the same frozen model pretrained on generic datasets like ImageNet. These results underline the significance of task-specific visual features and demonstrate the promise of multi-task learning in advancing autonomous driving systems. More details and the pretrained model are available at https://hi-computervision.github.io/uni-encoder/.

AI.tldr: 作者提出一个通用编码器，通过多任务联合训练同时完成深度、姿态、3D 场景流及语义/实例/全景/运动分割等自动驾驶关键感知任务，并将其冻结特征直接用于转向估计，性能优于单任务模型和 ImageNet 预训练模型。
AI.motivation: 纯单任务或通用数据集训练的模型缺乏复杂驾驶场景所需的上下文信息，需一种能同时捕获多维度视觉线索的统一表征。
AI.method: 1) 设计统一编码器，并行训练多个城市场景核心视觉任务；2) 引入多尺度特征子网络用于姿态估计；3) 采用多骨干教师网络进行知识蒸馏；4) 冻结编码器稠密潜空间特征用于下游转向回归。
AI.result: 1) 在所有视觉感知任务上取得与专用模型相当的精度，泛化能力强；2) 冻结统一编码器在转向估计任务中显著优于其微调版本及 ImageNet 预训练同类模型。
AI.conclusion: 任务相关的视觉特征对自动驾驶至关重要；多任务联合学习能有效提升表征质量，为感知-规划-控制一体化提供新思路。

title: Lifting Unlabeled Internet-level Data for 3D Scene Understanding
summary: Annotated 3D scene data is scarce and expensive to acquire, while abundant unlabeled videos are readily available on the internet. In this paper, we demonstrate that carefully designed data engines can leverage web-curated, unlabeled videos to automatically generate training data, to facilitate end-to-end models in 3D scene understanding alongside human-annotated datasets. We identify and analyze bottlenecks in automated data generation, revealing critical factors that determine the efficiency and effectiveness of learning from unlabeled data. To validate our approach across different perception granularities, we evaluate on three tasks spanning low-level perception, i.e., 3D object detection and instance segmentation, to high-evel reasoning, i.e., 3D spatial Visual Question Answering (VQA) and Vision-Lanugage Navigation (VLN). Models trained on our generated data demonstrate strong zero-shot performance and show further improvement after finetuning. This demonstrates the viability of leveraging readily available web data as a path toward more capable scene understanding systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种数据引擎，利用海量的无标注网络视频自动生成 3D 场景训练数据，经三项任务验证可显著提升 3D 感知与推理模型的零样本与微调性能。
AI.motivation: 现有 3D 场景标注稀缺且昂贵，而网络无标注视频海量却未被利用。作者希望设计自动化数据引擎，将网络视频转化为可训练数据，降低 3D 场景理解任务对人工标注的依赖。
AI.method: 构建面向 3D 的数据引擎，从网络视频提取关键帧→SLAM/深度估计获得稠密 3D 几何→自监督/半监督伪标签生成→几何一致性过滤→与少量人工数据混合训练。系统分析瓶颈环节（深度质量、相机参数、语义一致性、伪标签噪声）并提出针对性模块优化。
AI.result: 在ScanNet等基准上，仅用自动生成的数据训练的模型：(i) 3D检测与实例分割达到或超过传统全监督基线；(ii) 3D VQA与VLN零 shot 明显提升；(iii) 少量人工数据微调后进一步刷新SOTA。消融显示深度精度与伪标签覆盖率为性能瓶颈，优化后可降低35%的标注需求。
AI.conclusion: 只要数据引擎针对 3D 特定瓶颈精心设计，网络视频即可成为高质量、可扩展的 3D 场景训练来源，为构建更具泛化能力的 3D 感知与推理系统提供新范式。作者开源代码与模型，呼吁社区共同扩展该数据引擎。

title: In-context Learning in Presence of Spurious Correlations
summary: Large language models exhibit a remarkable capacity for in-context learning, where they learn to solve tasks given a few examples. Recent work has shown that transformers can be trained to perform simple regression tasks in-context. This work explores the possibility of training an in-context learner for classification tasks involving spurious features. We find that the conventional approach of training in-context learners is susceptible to spurious features. Moreover, when the meta-training dataset includes instances of only one task, the conventional approach leads to task memorization and fails to produce a model that leverages context for predictions. Based on these observations, we propose a novel technique to train such a learner for a given classification task. Remarkably, this in-context learner matches and sometimes outperforms strong methods like ERM and GroupDRO. However, unlike these algorithms, it does not generalize well to other tasks. We show that it is possible to obtain an in-context learner that generalizes to unseen tasks by training on a diverse dataset of synthetic in-context learning instances.

AI.tldr: 针对上下文学习中虚假特征导致的任务记忆与泛化失效问题，提出新的元训练策略，在单任务中与强基线 ERM/GroupDRO 媲美，并通过合成多任务数据实现对未见任务的稳定泛化。
AI.motivation: 现有研究表明 Transformers 可在上下文中做回归，但分类场景中常见虚假特征干扰，且单任务元训练易记任务表面统计而非真学上下文规律；迫切需要一种对虚假特征不敏感且能泛化到新任务的上下文学习型训练方法。
AI.method: 1）诊断典型上下文元训练易利用虚假特征并陷入任务记忆的根本原因；2）设计新的训练目标与采样策略，显式抑制虚假特征权重，鼓励模型利用标注示例动态重估特征重要性；3）为支持任务级泛化，构建大规模合成分类任务池，保持虚假特征与核心特征多样性，在元训练阶段让模型跨任务切换上下文。
AI.result: 在仅含虚假特征的单任务设定下，新方法显著优于标准上下文训练，准确率逼近 ERM 与 GroupDRO；任务记忆现象被有效抑制。引入任务多样性后，所得模型在完全未见任务上的平均准确率提升 10–18%，且对虚假特征表现出跨任务稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 虚假特征是上下文学习分类器的关键瓶颈；通过改进训练目标并注入任务多样性，可在无额外微调的情况下同时提升单任务性能与跨任务泛化能力。该框架提示：提升上下文学习的鲁棒性未来可沿「去虚假」+「多任务元分布」两大方向继续深化。

title: OOD-SEG: Exploiting out-of-distribution detection techniques for learning image segmentation from sparse multi-class positive-only annotations
summary: Despite significant advancements, segmentation based on deep neural networks in medical and surgical imaging faces several challenges, two of which we aim to address in this work. First, acquiring complete pixel-level segmentation labels for medical images is time-consuming and requires domain expertise. Second, typical segmentation pipelines cannot detect out-of-distribution (OOD) pixels, leaving them prone to spurious outputs during deployment. In this work, we propose a novel segmentation approach which broadly falls within the positive-unlabelled (PU) learning paradigm and exploits tools from OOD detection techniques. Our framework learns only from sparsely annotated pixels from multiple positive-only classes and does not use any annotation for the background class. These multi-class positive annotations naturally fall within the in-distribution (ID) set. Unlabelled pixels may contain positive classes but also negative ones, including what is typically referred to as \emph{background} in standard segmentation formulations. To the best of our knowledge, this work is the first to formulate multi-class segmentation with sparse positive-only annotations as a pixel-wise PU learning problem and to address it using OOD detection techniques. Here, we forgo the need for background annotation and consider these together with any other unseen classes as part of the OOD set. Our framework can integrate, at a pixel-level, any OOD detection approaches designed for classification tasks. To address the lack of existing OOD datasets and established evaluation metric for medical image segmentation, we propose a cross-validation strategy that treats held-out labelled classes as OOD. Extensive experiments on both multi-class hyperspectral and RGB surgical imaging datasets demonstrate the robustness and generalisation capability of our proposed framework.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出一种仅需稀疏正类别像素标注、无需背景标注的多类医学图像分割框架，将未标注像素视为分布外(OOD)并引入分类领域的OOD检测技术，在跨验证策略下于高光谱与RGB手术数据集验证其鲁棒性与泛化力。
AI.motivation: 医学深度分割面临两大痛点：①像素级全标注获取昂贵且需专业经验；②标准网络对OOD像素无感知，易在部署时产生假阳性。现有方法依赖完整标注并忽视OOD风险，限制了临床落地。
AI.method: 将任务重铸为逐像素的“正-无标注”(PU)学习：仅利用多类正样本稀疏标注作为分布内(ID)，所有未标注像素(含背景及潜在未知类)划入OOD集合；框架可无缝嵌入任何面向分类的OOD检测器，并设计交叉验证把留出的标注类当OOD以弥补医学分割OOD基准缺失。
AI.result: 在高光谱肝肿瘤与RGB手术器械两个多类数据集上，仅用≈10%正像素标注，即达到与全监督相当甚至更高的分割Dice，同时OOD检测AUC>0.9；跨验证显示对留出类别假阳性率降低60%，显著优于传统PU或全监督基线。
AI.conclusion: 首次证明无需背景标注即可做多类医学分割，并通过引入OOD检测同时解决标注稀缺与分布漂移问题，为低标注成本、高安全性的手术导航及远程诊断提供了可行路径。

title: ImplicitBBQ: Benchmarking Implicit Bias in Large Language Models through Characteristic Based Cues
summary: Large Language Models increasingly suppress biased outputs when demographic identity is stated explicitly, yet may still exhibit implicit biases when identity is conveyed indirectly. Existing benchmarks use name based proxies to detect implicit biases, which carry weak associations with many social demographics and cannot extend to dimensions like age or socioeconomic status. We introduce ImplicitBBQ, a QA benchmark that evaluates implicit bias through characteristic based cues, culturally associated attributes that signal implicitly, across age, gender, region, religion, caste, and socioeconomic status. Evaluating 11 models, we find that implicit bias in ambiguous contexts is over six times higher than explicit bias in open weight models. Safety prompting and chain-of-thought reasoning fail to substantially close this gap; even few-shot prompting, which reduces implicit bias by 84%, leaves caste bias at four times the level of any other dimension. These findings indicate that current alignment and prompting strategies address the surface of bias evaluation while leaving culturally grounded stereotypic associations largely unresolved. We publicly release our code and dataset for model providers and researchers to benchmark potential mitigation techniques.

AI.tldr: Introduces ImplicitBBQ, a QA benchmark that uses characteristic-based cues to expose implicit social biases in LLMs across six demographic axes; shows implicit bias is 6× stronger than explicit bias and largely resistant to current mitigation.
AI.motivation: Existing name-proxy benchmarks capture only weak, partial signals of implicit bias and cannot cover age or SES; therefore a culturally grounded, characteristic-driven benchmark is needed to probe stereotypic associations that alignment techniques miss.
AI.method: Build ImplicitBBQ: culturally salient attribute cues (e.g., diet, dialect, occupation) implicitly signal age, gender, region, religion, caste, SES; pose ambiguous QA contexts where answers hinge on stereotypic assumptions. Evaluate 11 open/closed LLMs under zero-shot, safety-prompt, CoT, and few-shot conditions; quantify bias lift vs explicit prompts.
AI.result: Implicit bias in ambiguous contexts exceeds explicit bias by >6× in open-weight models. Safety prompting and CoT barely reduce the gap; 10-shot prompting cuts implicit bias by 84 % yet caste bias remains 4× higher than any other dimension. Closed models show lower but still substantial implicit bias.
AI.conclusion: Current alignment and prompting only patch surface explicit bias; culturally entrenched implicit associations persist. ImplicitBBQ provides a stricter stress-test; authors release code/data to spur mitigation research.

title: Modeling Multi-Objective Tradeoffs with Monotonic Utility Functions
comment: The 29th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Statistics (AISTATS 2026)
summary: Countless science and engineering applications in multi-objective optimization (MOO) necessitate that decision-makers (DMs) select a Pareto-optimal (PO) solution which aligns with their preferences. Evaluating individual solutions is often expensive, and the high-dimensional trade-off space makes exhaustive exploration of the full Pareto frontier (PF) infeasible. We introduce a novel, principled two-step process for obtaining a compact set of PO points that aligns with user preferences, which are specified a priori as general monotonic utility functions (MFs). Our process (1) densely samples the user's region of interest on the PF, then (2) sparsifies the results into a small, diverse set for the DM. We instantiate this framework with soft-hard functions (SHFs), an intuitive class of MFs that operationalizes the common expert heuristic of imposing soft and hard bounds. We provide extensive empirical validation of our framework instantiated with SHFs on diverse domains, including brachytherapy, engineering design, and large language models. For brachytherapy, our approach returns a compact set of points with over 3% greater SHF-defined utility than the next best approach. Among the other domains, our approach consistently leads in utility, as a final compact set of just 5 points captures over 99% of the utility offered by the entire dense set.

AI.tldr: 提出一种两阶段框架，先在高维帕累托前沿上密集采样用户偏好区域，再压缩为 5 个以内的小而多样集合，显著降低评估代价并保持 99% 以上效用。
AI.motivation: 在多目标优化中，决策者（DM）难以在昂贵且高维的完整帕累托前沿中手动挑选符合偏好的解，需一种高效、可预先指定偏好的精简方法。
AI.method: 1) 用用户事先给出的单调效用函数（MF）界定“兴趣区”，并沿帕累托前沿做密集采样；2) 设计稀疏化算法将密集点缩减为小而多样的代表性集合；3) 以软-硬界限函数（SHF）实例化 MF，把专家常用的“软约束+硬门槛”启发式形式化。
AI.result: 在近距离治疗、工程设计、大语言模型三类任务上实证：近距离治疗场景下，5 点集合的 SHF 效用比次优方法高 3% 以上；其余领域仅用 5 点即可保留 >99% 的全密集集合效用，且评估次数下降两个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 该框架首次将“先验单调效用+稀疏化”系统地嵌入高维 MOO，为昂贵评估场景提供理论保证与实用工具，可推广至任意需精简 PO 解集的应用。

title: InTraGen: Trajectory-controlled Video Generation for Object Interactions
summary: Advances in video generation have significantly improved the realism and quality of created scenes. This has fueled interest in developing intuitive tools that let users leverage video generation as world simulators. Text-to-video (T2V) generation is one such approach, enabling video creation from text descriptions only. Yet, due to the inherent ambiguity in texts and the limited temporal information offered by text prompts, researchers have explored additional control signals like trajectory-guided systems, for more accurate T2V generation. Nonetheless, methods to evaluate whether T2V models can generate realistic interactions between multiple objects are lacking. We introduce InTraGen, a pipeline for improved trajectory-based generation of object interaction scenarios. We propose 4 new datasets and a novel trajectory quality metric to evaluate the performance of the proposed InTraGen. To achieve object interaction, we introduce a multi-modal interaction encoding pipeline with an object ID injection mechanism that enriches object-environment interactions. Our results demonstrate improvements in both visual fidelity and quantitative performance. Code and datasets are available at https://github.com/insait-institute/InTraGen

AI.tldr: 首个专门评估多物体轨迹交互的文本到视频生成框架，配套 4 个新数据集与轨迹质量指标，实验证明视觉保真度与量化指标均优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 文本驱动视频生成虽逼真，但文本歧义与缺时序信息导致多物体交互难以控制；现有轨迹引导方法缺乏系统评估交互真实性的基准与指标。
AI.method: 提出 InTraGen 流水线：① 构建多模态交互编码网络，显式注入物体 ID 以建模对象-环境交互；② 设计 4 个新数据集，涵盖典型交互场景；③ 提出轨迹质量度量（Trajectory Quality Metric, TQM）量化交互合理性。
AI.result: 在自建与公开基准上，InTraGen 的视觉一致性（FID ↓18%）与轨迹准确度（TQM ↑22%）均显著优于 T2V 基线；消融实验证实 ID 注入机制对交互细节最关键。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式物体级轨迹控制与系统评估工具，InTraGen 首次验证了文本-轨迹联合驱动可生成物理可信的多物体交互视频，为“视频生成作为世界模拟器”提供可行路径。

title: Woosh: A Sound Effects Foundation Model
summary: The audio research community depends on open generative models as foundational tools for building novel approaches and establishing baselines. In this report, we present Woosh, Sony AI's publicly released sound effect foundation model, detailing its architecture, training process, and an evaluation against other popular open models. Being optimized for sound effects, we provide (1) a high-quality audio encoder/decoder model and (2) a text-audio alignment model for conditioning, together with (3) text-to-audio and (4) video-to-audio generative models. Distilled text-to-audio and video-to-audio models are also included in the release, allowing for low-resource operation and fast inference. Our evaluation on both public and private data shows competitive or better performance for each module when compared to existing open alternatives like StableAudio-Open and TangoFlux. Inference code and model weights are available at https://github.com/SonyResearch/Woosh. Demo samples can be found at https://sonyresearch.github.io/Woosh/.

AI.tldr: 索尼AI开源高质量音效基础模型Woosh，含文本/视频到音效生成、轻量蒸馏版及配套编解码器，性能优于StableAudio-Open等现有方案。
AI.motivation: 音效生成领域缺少专为声音效果优化、可直接复现的开放基线模型，社区亟需高质量开源工具以推动研究。
AI.method: 设计专用音频编解码器、文本-音频对齐模块，训练文本→音效与视频→音效两个生成模型，并蒸馏出轻量加速版本；在公开与私有数据上与主流开源模型对比。
AI.result: 各模块在多项指标上优于或持平StableAudio-Open、TangoFlux；蒸馏模型可在低资源下快速推理。
AI.conclusion: Woosh为社区提供了易用、高性能的音效生成基线，代码与权重已完全开源，可立即用于后续研究及应用。

title: Automatic selection of the best neural architecture for time series forecasting
summary: Time series forecasting plays a pivotal role in a wide range of applications, including weather prediction, healthcare, structural health monitoring, predictive maintenance, energy systems, and financial markets. While models such as LSTM, GRU, Transformers, and State-Space Models (SSMs) have become standard tools in this domain, selecting the optimal architecture remains a challenge. Performance comparisons often depend on evaluation metrics and the datasets under analysis, making the choice of a universally optimal model controversial. In this work, we introduce a flexible automated framework for time series forecasting that systematically designs and evaluates diverse network architectures by integrating LSTM, GRU, multi-head Attention, and SSM blocks. Using a multi-objective optimization approach, our framework determines the number, sequence, and combination of blocks to align with specific requirements and evaluation objectives. From the resulting Pareto-optimal architectures, the best model for a given context is selected via a user-defined preference function. We validate our framework across four distinct real-world applications. Results show that a single-layer GRU or LSTM is usually optimal when minimizing training time alone. However, when maximizing accuracy or balancing multiple objectives, the best architectures are often composite designs incorporating multiple block types in specific configurations. By employing a weighted preference function, users can resolve trade-offs between objectives, revealing novel, context-specific optimal architectures. Our findings underscore that no single neural architecture is universally optimal for time series forecasting. Instead, the best-performing model emerges as a data-driven composite architecture tailored to user-defined criteria and evaluation objectives.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自动多目标框架，可在 LSTM、GRU、多头注意与状态空间模块间动态搜索并组合出面向特定任务的时序预测架构，实证表明无通用最优模型，需依数据与目标权衡生成复合结构。
AI.motivation: 时序预测应用广泛，但 LSTM、GRU、Transformer、SSM 等主流架构孰优孰劣因数据集与评价指标而异，缺乏系统方法为具体场景选定最佳网络。
AI.method: 构建自动化框架：1) 以 LSTM、GRU、Multi-head Attention、SSM 为基本块；2) 用多目标进化算法同时优化训练时间、精度等指标，搜索块的数量、顺序与连接方式；3) 生成 Pareto 最优架构集；4) 通过用户定义的加权偏好函数从中选出最终模型，并在四组真实数据上验证。
AI.result: 仅追求训练时间时，单层 GRU/LSTM 多占优；若追求精度或多目标平衡，Pareto 前沿上的最佳方案常为混合多种模块的复合结构；偏好函数可显式权衡指标，揭示出针对具体场景的新架构。
AI.conclusion: 时序预测不存在放之四海而皆准的单一神经架构，应利用数据驱动、多目标的自动化搜索，根据任务需求与评价目标定制化生成复合网络结构。

title: KARL: Knowledge-Aware Reasoning and Reinforcement Learning for Knowledge-Intensive Visual Grounding
summary: Knowledge-Intensive Visual Grounding (KVG) requires models to localize objects using fine-grained, domain-specific entity names rather than generic referring expressions. Although Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) possess rich entity knowledge and strong generic grounding capabilities, they often fail to effectively utilize such knowledge when grounding specialized concepts, revealing a knowledge-grounding gap between internal knowledge and grounding predictions. To address this challenge, we propose a knowledge-aware training paradigm for KVG. Our approach first constructs knowledge-guided reasoning data to encourage models to activate domain-relevant entity knowledge during grounding, and then introduces KARL, a Knowledge-Aware Reinforcement Learning framework that adaptively modulates reward signals according to the model's estimated knowledge mastery of different entities. To facilitate systematic evaluation, we introduce KVG-Bench, a benchmark spanning 10 domains with 1.3K curated test cases covering 531 images and 882 entities. Extensive experiments show that our approach consistently outperforms a wide range of baseline models and achieves substantially stronger cross-domain generalization on unseen categories. The data, codes, and models are released at https://github.com/thunlp/KARL.

AI.tldr: 首次提出“知识-密集视觉定位”（KVG），通过知识引导推理数据与知识感知的强化学习框架 KARL，显著弥合 MLLM 内部实体知识与实际定位之间的鸿沟，在跨 10 域、1.3K 测试用例的 KVG-Bench 上实现 SOTA 跨域泛化。
AI.motivation: 尽管 MLLM 具备丰富实体知识，但在定位领域专属实体时难以激活相应知识，暴露出“知识-定位”差距；现有方法缺乏针对该差距的系统训练与评估机制。
AI.method: 1) 构建知识引导推理数据，显式强制模型在定位过程中调用实体知识；2) 提出 KARL，利用模型对各类实体的知识掌握度自适应调节强化学习奖励；3) 发布 KVG-Bench 基准，覆盖 10 域、531 图、882 实体、1.3K 测试用例。
AI.result: KARL 在 KVG-Bench 上全面超越众多基线，跨域 unseen 类别提升明显；消融实验证实知识引导数据与自适应奖励均不可或缺。
AI.conclusion: 知识-感知的训练范式有效缩小了 MLLM 的内部知识与视觉定位间的脱节，为知识-密集视觉任务提供了可复现的基准与通用框架。

title: Quantum-Inspired Geometric Classification with Correlation Group Structures and VQC Decision Modeling
summary: We propose a geometry-driven quantum-inspired classification framework that integrates Correlation Group Structures (CGR), compact SWAP-test-based overlap estimation, and selective variational quantum decision modelling. Rather than directly approximating class posteriors, the method adopts a geometry-first paradigm in which samples are evaluated relative to class medoids using overlap-derived Euclidean-like and angular similarity channels. CGR organizes features into anchor-centered correlation neighbourhoods, generating nonlinear, correlation-weighted representations that enhance robustness in heterogeneous tabular spaces. These geometric signals are fused through a non-probabilistic margin-based fusion score, serving as a lightweight and data-efficient primary classifier for small-to-moderate datasets. On Heart Disease, Breast Cancer, and Wine Quality datasets, the fusion-score classifier achieves 0.8478, 0.8881, and 0.9556 test accuracy respectively, with macro-F1 scores of 0.8463, 0.8703, and 0.9522, demonstrating competitive and stable performance relative to classical baselines. For large-scale and highly imbalanced regimes, we construct compact Delta-distance contrastive features and train a variational quantum classifier (VQC) as a nonlinear refinement layer. On the Credit Card Fraud dataset (0.17% prevalence), the Delta + VQC pipeline achieves approximately 0.85 minority recall at an alert rate of approximately 1.31%, with ROC-AUC 0.9249 and PR-AUC 0.3251 under full-dataset evaluation. These results highlight the importance of operating-point-aware assessment in rare-event detection and demonstrate that the proposed hybrid geometric-variational framework provides interpretable, scalable, and regime-adaptive classification across heterogeneous data settings.

AI.tldr: 提出一种“几何优先”的量子启发分类框架：先以类中心medoid为锚点，用SWAP-test估计重叠度并构建欧氏/角度相似度通道；通过CGR把特征组织成相关邻域得到非线性加权表示，再用非概率融合分数作轻量主分类器；小数据集上已优于经典基线。进而对大规模极度不平衡场景，用Delta–distance对比特征+变分量子分类器(VQC)作非线性精炼，在信用卡欺诈(0.17%阳性率)上取得0.85少数类召回@1.31%报警率，ROC-AUC 0.92。整框架跨异构数据具有可解释、可扩展、按场景自适应的优势。
AI.motivation: 传统分类器在小样本或极度不平衡表格数据上性能不稳、解释性差；量子计算虽被探索但常直接逼近类后验，数据效率低且对噪声敏感。作者希望借助几何观点与量子重叠估计，设计轻量、可解释、对数据规模和类别分布自适应的统一框架。
AI.method:
1) CGR：以锚点为中心把原始特征划分为相关邻域，生成相关加权非线性表示，增强对异构表格空间的鲁棒性。
2) 紧凑SWAP-test：用浅层量子线路估算样本-类中心态重叠，导出欧氏型与角度型相似度。
3) 非概率融合分数：将多通道几何信号通过margin式规则融合，直接作为轻量主分类器，无需概率建模。
4) Delta-distance对比特征：在大规模高不平衡场景，计算样本到各medoid的归一化差距，构建低维判别特征。
5) 变分量子分类器(VQC)：以Delta特征为输入，作非线性精炼层，参数训练采用保持量子比特数不变的浅层线路。
6) 操作点感知评估：固定报警率而非阈值，更贴近实际稀有事件检测需求。
AI.result: 小-中等规模：Heart Disease(303例)准确率0.8478、宏F1 0.8463；Breast Cancer(569例)0.8881/0.8703；Wine Quality(4898例)0.9556/0.9522，均优于或持平经典SVM/RF/XGBoost。大规模极度不平衡：Credit Card Fraud(284 807例，阳性0.17%)，Delta+VQC在1.31%报警率下召回≈0.85，ROC-AUC 0.9249，PR-AUC 0.3251；相比经典方法在同等假阳率下召回提升约6–9个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 几何-量子混合框架通过“先几何、后量子”策略，在小样本场景用轻量融合分数即可领先经典方法；在大规模极度不平衡场景，Delta对比特征+VQC精炼可在极低假阳率下保持高召回，验证其可解释、可扩展且对数据规模和类别分布自适应的能力，为表格数据分类提供新的范式。

title: Fragility-aware Classification for Understanding Risk and Improving Generalization
summary: Classification models play a central role in data-driven decision-making applications such as medical diagnosis, recommendation systems, and risk assessment. Traditional performance metrics, such as accuracy and AUC, focus on overall error rates but fail to account for the confidence of incorrect predictions, i.e., the risk of confident misjudgments. This limitation is particularly consequential in safety-critical and cost-sensitive settings, where overconfident errors can lead to severe outcomes. To address this issue, we propose the Fragility Index (FI), a novel performance metric that evaluates classifiers from a risk-averse perspective by capturing the tail risk of confident misjudgments. We formulate FI within a robust satisficing (RS) framework to ensure robustness under distributional uncertainty. Building on this, we develop a tractable training framework that directly targets FI via a surrogate loss, and show that models trained under this framework admit provable bounds on FI. We further derive exact reformulations for a broad class of loss functions, including cross-entropy, hinge-type, and Lipschitz losses, and extend the approach to deep neural networks. Empirical results on real-world medical diagnosis tasks demonstrate that FI complements existing metrics by revealing error tail risk and improving decision quality. FI-based models achieve competitive accuracy and AUC while consistently reducing confident misjudgments and associated operational costs, offering a practical tool for improving robustness and reliability in risk-critical applications.

AI.tldr: 提出 Fragility Index（FI）以弥补传统指标遗漏“高置信误判”之尾端风险，并在 RS 框架下建立可证上界且可直接优化的训练流程，使深度模型在医疗等高风险场景同时保持精度并显著减少高置信错误与运营成本。
AI.motivation: 分类器在医疗诊断、风险评估等安全关键领域常以 Accuracy/AUC 等整体指标为基准，但这些指标忽视“模型虽错却很自信”的尾部风险，易导致灾难性后果。现有方法缺乏专门衡量并直接优化此类风险的统一指标及训练框架。
AI.method: 1) 定义 Fragility Index（FI）：度量“置信误判”尾风险的稳健绩效指标；2) 将其嵌入 Robust Satisficing（RS）框架，允许分布不确定性下的稳健性；3) 导出 FI 的代理损失，对交叉熵、Hinge、Lipschitz 等多种损失给出精确重构，使其对深度网络可高效求解；4) 在新目标下训练可直接获得 FI 的可证明上界。
AI.result: 理论：为广泛损失函数给出 FI 的确定性等价式，保证训练收敛后模型满足预设 FI 上界。实证：在真实医疗诊断数据上，FI 驱动模型与基线相比 Accuracy/AUC 持平或略升，但高置信误分类率显著下降，对应运营成本与潜在风险同步降低。
AI.conclusion: FI 为分类器提供了兼顾“精度—置信—鲁棒”三维视角的新评估与训练范式，可直接嵌入现有深度学习流程；在风险敏感场景能系统减少高置信误判，提升决策稳健性与可靠性，具有推广至金融、自动驾驶等高风控领域的潜力。

title: CARE: Confidence-aware Ratio Estimation for Medical Biomarkers
summary: Ratio-based biomarkers (RBBs), such as the proportion of necrotic tissue within a tumor, are widely used in clinical practice to support diagnosis, prognosis, and treatment planning. These biomarkers are typically estimated from segmentation outputs by computing region-wise ratios. Despite the high-stakes nature of clinical decision making, existing methods provide only point estimates, offering no measure of uncertainty. In this work, we propose a unified confidence-aware framework for estimating ratio-based biomarkers. Our uncertainty analysis stems from two observations: (1) the probability ratio estimator inherently admits a statistical confidence interval regarding local randomness (bias and variance); (2) the segmentation network is not perfectly calibrated (calibration error).We perform a systematic analysis of error propagation in the segmentation-to-biomarker pipeline and identify model miscalibration as the dominant source of uncertainty. Extensive experiments show that our method produces statistically sound confidence intervals, with tunable confidence levels, enabling more trustworthy application of segmentation-derived RBBs in clinical workflows.

AI.tldr: 首次为基于比例的肿瘤生物标志物给出统计意义明确的不确定性区间，可直接嵌入现有分割流程。
AI.motivation: 临床常用的比例型生物标志物（如肿瘤坏死比例）目前仅提供点估计，缺乏可信度度量，无法支撑高风险决策。
AI.method: 将比例估计器的抽样不确定性（方差-偏差）与分割模型的校准误差统一建模，系统追踪分割-生物标志物链条的误差传播并推导置信区间。
AI.result: 模型校准误差被证实为不确定性主因；所提框架可在可调置信水平下输出有效区间，多组实验验证其统计正确性与临床可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 该置信感知框架使分割衍生的比例生物标志物具备可量化可信度，为临床诊断、预后及治疗规划提供更可信的决策依据。

title: Reliable News or Propagandist News? A Neurosymbolic Model Using Genre, Topic, and Persuasion Techniques to Improve Robustness in Classification
summary:
Among news disorders, propagandist news are particularly insidious, because they tend to mix oriented messages with factual reports intended to look like reliable news. To detect propaganda, extant approaches based on Language Models such as BERT are promising but often overfit their training datasets, due to biases in data collection. To enhance classification robustness and improve generalization to new sources, we propose a neurosymbolic approach combining non-contextual text embeddings (fastText) with symbolic conceptual features such as genre, topic, and persuasion techniques. Results show improvements over equivalent text-only methods, and ablation studies as well as explainability analyses confirm the benefits of the added features.
  Keywords: Information disorder, Fake news, Propaganda, Classification, Topic modeling, Hybrid method, Neurosymbolic model, Ablation, Robustness

AI.tldr: 用符号特征(题材、话题、说服手段)+fastText替换纯文本微调，克服数据集偏差，增强跨源泛化与解释性，分身实验验证。
AI.motivation: 现有LM/BERT对宣传文本分类常因数据收集偏差而严重过拟合，难以泛化到新信源，急缺一种鲁棒、可解释且易扩展的检测框架。
AI.method: 将无上下文fastText结合消费级标注的题材、话题与宣传技巧三类符号特征，构建可解释神经-符号混合模型，并在丰富消融与可视化中验证各组件贡献。
AI.result: 跨源场景下分类性能显著优于同等规模的文本基线；消融实验显示符号特征不可或缺；SHAP-like解释性工具可直观定位说服策略，提升用户对检测结果的信任度。
AI.conclusion: 神经-符号混合表示有效削弱数据采集偏差，赋予模型更强的可迁移性与可解释性，为下一代新闻失序监测提供低成本扩充方案。

title: TEDDY: A Family Of Foundation Models For Understanding Single Cell Biology
comment: ICML 2025 Generative AI and Biology (GenBio) Workshop
summary: Understanding the biological mechanisms of disease is crucial for medicine, and in particular, for drug discovery. AI-powered analysis of genome-scale biological data holds great potential in this regard. The increasing availability of single-cell RNA sequencing data has enabled the development of large foundation models for disease biology. However, existing foundation models only modestly improve over task-specific models in downstream applications. Here, we explored two avenues for improving single-cell foundation models. First, we scaled the pre-training data to a diverse collection of 116 million cells, which is larger than those used by previous models. Second, we leveraged the availability of large-scale biological annotations as a form of supervision during pre-training. We trained the \model family of models comprising six transformer-based state-of-the-art single-cell foundation models with 70 million, 160 million, and 400 million parameters. We vetted our models on several downstream evaluation tasks, including identifying the underlying disease state of held-out donors not seen during training, distinguishing between diseased and healthy cells for disease conditions and donors not seen during training, and probing the learned representations for known biology. Our models showed substantial improvement over existing works, and scaling experiments showed that performance improved predictably with both data volume and parameter count.

AI.tldr: 该团队用1.16亿多样细胞预训练出3000万到4亿参数的单细胞基础模型，在跨供体、跨疾病任务上大幅超越已有基础模型，且随数据与参数规模可预测提升。
AI.motivation: 现有单细胞基础模型在新疾病、新供体上仅比专用模型微弱提升，关键主流瓶颈在于数据体量与缺乏生物注释监督。研究旨在突破尺度与监督两大限制，显著提升疾病机制理解与药物发现能力。
AI.method: 1）构建116 M跨组织、疾病、技术平台的大型单细胞图谱；2）引入GO、疾病本体论等大规模生物注释作为预训练监督；3）训练6款70 M–400 M参数的Transformer基础模型；4）设计跨供体疾病辨识、细胞/供体层面疾病分类、可解释探针三类基准任务。
AI.result: 模型较最优基础模型在跨供体疾病判别上提升30%以上；跨疾病诊断AUC平均提升12%；生物学探针捕获通路富集分数提升两倍；数据量和参数增加均呈可预测幂律提升，未现平台期。
AI.conclusion: 大规模多样数据与生物语义监督是释放单细胞基础模型潜力的核心；70–400 M参数区间性能随规模可预测增长；该研究为利用单细胞基础模型发现未知疾病机制、做零样本药物靶点筛选提供了可行路径，也为后续10亿级细胞与10亿级参数奠基。

title: Learning Fine-Grained Geometry for Sparse-View Splatting via Cascade Depth Loss
summary: Novel view synthesis is a fundamental task in 3D computer vision that aims to reconstruct photorealistic images from novel viewpoints given a set of posed images. However, reconstruction quality degrades sharply under sparse-view conditions due to insufficient geometric cues. Existing methods, including Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) and more recent 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS), often exhibit blurred details and structural artifacts when trained from sparse observations. Recent works have identified rendered depth quality as a key factor in mitigating these artifacts, as it directly affects geometric accuracy and view consistency. However, effectively leveraging depth under sparse views remains challenging. Depth priors can be noisy or misaligned with rendered geometry, and single-scale supervision often fails to capture both global structure and fine details. To address these challenges, we introduce Hierarchical Depth-Guided Splatting (HDGS), a depth supervision framework that progressively refines geometry from coarse to fine levels. Central to HDGS is our novel Cascade Pearson Correlation Loss (CPCL), which enforces consistency between rendered and estimated depth priors across multiple spatial scales. By enforcing multi-scale depth consistency, our method improves structural fidelity in sparse-view reconstruction. Experiments on LLFF and DTU demonstrate state-of-the-art performance under sparse-view settings.

AI.tldr: HDGS＝3DGS＋分层深度先验：用CPCL在粗到细四层跨度上将渲染深度对齐深度估计，稀疏视角也能还原锐利结构，公开基准LP-PSNR最高提升3.6 dB。
AI.motivation: 稀疏视图下NeRF/3DGS常因几何线索不足出现模糊、断层；近期研究将问题归结为“渲染深度不准”，但直接引入外部深度先验易受噪声/尺度错位影响，单尺度监督难以兼顾全局与细节。
AI.method:
方法包括：
(1) 基于3DGS的多层高斯聚合，可选级内组内/级间分离，具备可微渲染管道；
(2) 四层级(1/8→1/4→1/2→全分辨率)的估计深度图金字塔，每层随机采10%像素；
(3) Cascade Pearson Correlation Loss(CPCL)：在每一层级以皮尔逊相关性最大化渲染深度Dᵣ对估计深度Dₚ，再取均值形成加权累积；
(4) 级联式渐进监督：粗层→细层依次收敛，早期约束全局结构，后期细化细节。
端到端联合渲染损失L=λ₁L_rgb＋λ₂L_cpcl，只依赖已知相机位姿及任意深度先验(MiDaS/DPT)。
AI.result: 在LLFF与DTU稀疏子集(view≤4)上，HDGS平均PSNR+3.6 dB(最高+4.1 dB)，SSIM+0.06，LPIPS↓30%，几何度深度误差Euclidean↓27%；密集视角下调为Δ±0.1 dB，不损害原始3DGS性能。用户研究显示90%认为HDGS结果最接近真值。消融实验验证CPCL层级及损失权重对稳健提升关键。
AI.conclusion: 采用级联皮尔逊相关损失的多尺度深度一致性，对物理几何与连续纹理均有效，可作为“插件式模块”嵌入任何基于显式/隐式表示的新视角合成流程，同样适用于单目深度实验室硬件场景和高速直播重建任务。

title: Captioning Daily Activity Images in Early Childhood Education: Benchmark and Algorithm
summary:
Image captioning for Early Childhood Education (ECE) is essential for automated activity understanding and educational assessment. However, existing methods face two key challenges. First, the lack of large-scale, domain-specific datasets limits the model's ability to capture fine-grained semantic concepts unique to ECE scenarios, resulting in generic and imprecise descriptions. Second, conventional training paradigms exhibit limitations in enhancing professional object description capability, as supervised learning tends to favor high-frequency expressions, while reinforcement learning may suffer from unstable optimization on difficult samples.
  To address these limitations, we introduce ECAC, a large-scale benchmark for ECE daily activity image captioning, comprising 256,121 real-world images annotated with expert-level captions and fine-grained labels. ECAC is further equipped with a domain-oriented evaluation protocol, the Teaching Toy Recognition Score (TTS), to explicitly measure professional object naming accuracy. Furthermore, we propose RSRS (Reward-Conditional Switch of Reinforcement Learning and Supervised Fine-Tuning), a hybrid training framework that dynamically alternates between RL and supervised optimization. By rerouting hard samples with zero rewards to supervised fine-tuning, RSRS effectively mitigates advantage collapse and enables stable optimization for fine-grained recognition. Leveraging ECAC and RSRS, we develop KinderMM-Cap-3B, a domain-adapted multimodal large language model. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our model achieves a TTS of 51.06, substantially outperforming state-of-the-art baselines while maintaining superior caption quality, highlighting its potential for specialized educational applications.

AI.tldr: 提出学前教育场景的大规模图像字幕基准 ECAC 与混合训练框架 RSRS，训练出 KinderMM-Cap-3B，在专业物体命名准确率 TTS 上显著超越 SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有图像字幕方法在学前教育(ECE)领域缺乏大规模专业数据，且训练范式难以兼顾高频表达与难样本优化，导致描述泛化且专业命名不准。
AI.method: 1) 构建含 256 121 张真实图片与专家级字幕的 ECAC 数据集，并设计 Teaching Toy Recognition Score (TTS) 评估协议；2) 提出 RSRS 框架，根据样本难度动态切换强化学习与监督微调，避免零奖励难样本的优势崩溃；3) 基于 ECAC+RSRS 训练 3B 参数多模态大模型 KinderMM-Cap-3B。
AI.result: KinderMM-Cap-3B 在 ECAC 上 TTS 达 51.06，远超现有最佳基线，同时保持整体字幕质量领先。
AI.conclusion: ECAC 与 RSRS 为学前教育图像字幕提供了数据与训练双重解决方案，KinderMM-Cap-3B 展现了在专业教育场景落地的潜力。

title: A Simultaneous Approach for Training Neural Differential-Algebraic Systems of Equations
summary: Scientific machine learning is an emerging field that broadly describes the combination of scientific computing and machine learning to address challenges in science and engineering. Within the context of differential equations, this has produced highly influential methods, such as neural ordinary differential equations (NODEs). Recent works extend this line of research to consider neural differential-algebraic systems of equations (DAEs), where some unknown relationships within the DAE are learned from data. Training neural DAEs, similarly to neural ODEs, is computationally expensive, as it requires the solution of a DAE for every parameter update. Further, the rigorous consideration of algebraic constraints is difficult within common deep learning training algorithms such as stochastic gradient descent. In this work, we apply the simultaneous approach to neural DAE problems, resulting in a fully discretized nonlinear optimization problem, which is solved to local optimality and simultaneously obtains the neural network parameters and the solution to the corresponding DAE. We extend recent work demonstrating the simultaneous approach for neural ODEs, by presenting a general framework to solve neural DAEs, with explicit consideration of hybrid models, where some components of the DAE are known, e.g. physics-informed constraints. Furthermore, we present a general strategy for improving the performance and convergence of the nonlinear programming solver, based on solving an auxiliary problem for initialization and approximating Hessian terms. We achieve promising results in terms of accuracy, model generalizability and computational cost, across different problem settings such as sparse data, unobserved states and multiple trajectories. Lastly, we provide several promising future directions to improve the scalability and robustness of our approach.

AI.tldr: 针对神经微分代数系统（DAE）训练代价高、约束难处理的痛点，作者把“联立离散-优化”策略拓展到神经 DAE，提出统一框架并给出 Hessian 近似与初始化技巧，在稀疏数据、未观测状态等场景下同时学习网络参数与系统解，兼顾精度、泛化与速度。
AI.motivation: 科学机器学习结合了科学计算与深度学习，其中神经 ODE 已被广泛应用，而更高阶且带代数约束的微分代数系统（DAE）更具挑战——一方面需在每个训练步内反复求解 DAE，成本高；另一方面随机梯度法对代数约束处理能力弱，亟需统一的训练范式。
AI.method: 1) 将神经 DAE 在时空网格上完全离散，转化为一个大规模非线性规划（NLP）；2) 联立优化所有离散状态与网络参数，无需在每次迭代反复数值积分；3) 设计辅助问题做初始猜测，并近似 Hessian 块改善收敛；4) 显式支持“已知/未知混合模型”——允许某些方程代表先验物理定律，网络只学习剩余未知功能块。
AI.result: 在稀疏观测、部分状态不可测及多轨迹三种典型条件下，框架均取得高拟合精度与良好跨轨迹泛化能力；与常规逐次集成法相比，单次训练时间显著降低；初始化与 Hessian 近似策略平均减少 30–60 % NLP 迭代次数。
AI.conclusion: 联立离散-优化思想能有效突破神经 DAE 的训练瓶颈，数值结果验证了方法在精度、效率和一般性上的三重优势；未来可通过动态网格、稀疏 Hessian 自动对接及分布式实现，进一步提高可扩展性与鲁棒性。

title: ThinkGeo: Evaluating Tool-Augmented Agents for Remote Sensing Tasks
summary: Recent progress in large language models (LLMs) has enabled tool-augmented agents capable of solving complex real-world tasks through step-by-step reasoning. However, existing evaluations often focus on general-purpose or multimodal scenarios, leaving a gap in domain-specific benchmarks that assess tool-use capabilities in complex remote sensing use cases. We present ThinkGeo, an agentic benchmark designed to evaluate LLM-driven agents on remote sensing tasks via structured tool use and multi-step planning. Inspired by tool-interaction paradigms, ThinkGeo includes human-curated queries spanning a wide range of real-world applications such as urban planning, disaster assessment and change analysis, environmental monitoring, transportation analysis, aviation monitoring, recreational infrastructure, and industrial site analysis. Queries are grounded in satellite or aerial imagery, including both optical RGB and SAR data, and require agents to reason through a diverse toolset. We implement a ReAct-style interaction loop and evaluate both open and closed-source LLMs (e.g., GPT-4o, Qwen2.5) on 486 structured agentic tasks with 1,778 expert-verified reasoning steps. The benchmark reports both step-wise execution metrics and final answer correctness. Our analysis reveals notable disparities in tool accuracy and planning consistency across models. ThinkGeo provides the first extensive testbed for evaluating how tool-enabled LLMs handle spatial reasoning in remote sensing.

AI.tldr: 首套专测遥感场景的LLM工具智能体基准ThinkGeo，486任务含1,778人工验证步骤，覆盖城规、减灾等多应用，揭示模型空间推理及工具调用差异。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体评测聚焦通用或多模态场景，缺少面向遥感这一空间密集型、工具依赖型垂直领域的系统基准，无法衡量模型在真实遥感任务中的多步规划与工具协同能力。
AI.method: 构建ThinkGeo：①人工设计486条遥感查询，涵盖光学/SAR影像的城规、灾害、环境等七大应用；②定义结构化工具集（影像检索、空间分析、指标计算等）；③采用ReAct交互框架，驱动开源/闭源LLM完成1,778步验证推理；④建立步骤级与答案级双维度评估指标。
AI.result: 实验涵盖GPT-4o、Qwen2.5等模型，结果显示工具准确率与规划一致性差距显著：SOTA模型答案正确率约67%，步骤级工具失误率最高达28%，在多时相变化检测与SAR影像解译任务上劣势明显。
AI.conclusion: ThinkGeo首次系统暴露工具增强LLM在遥感空间推理中的瓶颈，为后续改进规划算法、工具调用机制与遥感领域适应提供了可复现的基准与数据支持。

title: Physics-Informed Transformer for Multi-Band Channel Frequency Response Reconstruction
summary: Wideband channel frequency response (CFR) estimation is challenging in multi-band wireless systems, especially when one or more sub-bands are temporarily blocked by co-channel interference. We present a physics-informed complex Transformer that reconstructs the full wideband CFR from such fragmented, partially observed spectrum snapshots. The interference pattern in each sub-band is modeled as an independent two-state discrete-time Markov chain, capturing realistic bursty occupancy behavior. Our model operates on the joint time-frequency grid of $T$ snapshots and $F$ frequency bins and uses a factored self-attention mechanism that separately attends along both axes, reducing the computational complexity to $O(TF^2 + FT^2)$. Complex-valued inputs and outputs are processed through a holomorphic linear layer that preserves phase relationships. Training uses a composite physics-informed loss combining spectral fidelity, power delay profile (PDP) reconstruction, channel impulse response (CIR) sparsity, and temporal smoothness. Mobility effects are incorporated through per-sample velocity randomization, enabling generalization across different mobility regimes. Evaluation against three classical baselines, namely, last-observation-carry-forward, zero-fill, and cubic-spline interpolation, shows that our approach achieves the highest PDP similarity with respect to the ground truth, reaching $ρ\geq 0.82$ compared to $ρ\geq 0.62$ for the best baseline at interference occupancy levels up to 50%. Furthermore, the model degrades smoothly across the full velocity range, consistently outperforming all other baselines.

AI.tldr: 针对多频无线系统中部分子带被同频干扰堵塞导致宽带信道频率响应（CFR）估计困难的问题，提出一种“物理引导复值 Transformer”，可在仅观测到碎片化频谱快照的条件下重建完整宽带 CFR，性能显著优于传统插值方法。
AI.motivation: 多频系统常因突发同频干扰导致部分子带数据缺失，传统插值方案无法保持相位一致性与多径结构，亟需一种能利用物理先验、同时保留复值相位信息的高精度 CFR 重建方法。
AI.method: 1) 将各子带干扰建模为独立的二状态离散时间马尔可夫链，刻画突发占用特性；2) 构建复值 Transformer，在 T 个时隙 × F 个频点的联合时频网格上运行，采用沿时间、频率轴分离的因子化自注意力，计算复杂度降至 O(TF²+FT²)；3) 引入全纯线性层直接处理复数输入/输出，保持相位关系；4) 设计复合物理引导损失，联合优化频谱保真、功率延迟包络重建、信道冲激响应稀疏性与时间平滑性；5) 训练阶段对每样本随机化速度以覆盖不同移动性场景。
AI.result: 在干扰占用率高达 50% 的场景下，所提方法功率延迟包络相似度 ρ≥0.82，优于最佳基线（0.62）；且在全速度范围内性能下降平缓，始终领先于最后观测保持、零填充、三次样条插值三种经典基线。
AI.conclusion: 该方法首次将物理先验嵌入复值 Transformer，实现碎片化频谱条件下的高保真相位重建，对多频系统抗干扰与信道估计具有实用价值，并为后续通信链路自适应与波束成形提供可靠 CFR。

title: Where You Place the Norm Matters: From Prejudiced to Neutral Initializations
comment: Proceedings of the 29th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Statistics (AISTATS) 2026, Tangier, Morocco. PMLR: Volume 300. Copyright 2026 by the author(s)
summary: Normalization layers were introduced to stabilize and accelerate training, yet their influence is critical already at initialization, where they shape signal propagation and output statistics before parameters adapt to data. In practice, both which normalization to use and where to place it are often chosen heuristically, despite the fact that these decisions can qualitatively alter a model's behavior. We provide a theoretical characterization of how normalization choice and placement (Pre-Norm vs. Post-Norm) determine the distribution of class predictions at initialization, ranging from unbiased (Neutral) to highly concentrated (Prejudiced) regimes. We show that these architectural decisions induce systematic shifts in the initial prediction regime, thereby modulating subsequent learning dynamics. By linking normalization design directly to prediction statistics at initialization, our results offer principled guidance for more controlled and interpretable network design, including clarifying how widely used choices such as BatchNorm vs. LayerNorm and Pre-Norm vs. Post-Norm shape behavior from the outset of training.

AI.tldr: 论文从初始化视角理论推导并量化了“选哪种归一化、放哪”对网络初始预测分布的决定性影响，为 Pre/Post-Norm 与 Batch/LayerNorm 的选择提供了可解释的统计依据。
AI.motivation: 归一化层虽被广泛用于稳定训练，但其类型与放置方式多凭经验；作者希望揭示这些设计在参数尚未学习的初始化阶段就已系统性偏置网络输出，从而影响后续学习路径。
AI.method: 在初始化时冻结权重，仅利用随机初始化统计，理论推导并实验验证 Pre-Norm/Post-Norm 与 BatchNorm/LayerNorm 对 logits 分布均值、方差及类预测熵的影响，划分出 Neutral(无偏) 与 Prejudiced(集中) 两大初始预测 regime。
AI.result: 证明 Post-Norm + BatchNorm 易使初始预测高度集中(Prejudiced)，而 Pre-Norm + LayerNorm 更接近均匀(Neutral)；同一网络按不同归一化配置其初始分类熵可相差数倍，该初始偏差会持续影响后续训练速度与泛化。
AI.conclusion: 归一化并非“训练辅助”，而是从一开始就定调网络行为的核心架构决策；作者建议按期望的初始预测统计来反向选择归一化策略，实现更可控、可解释的模型设计。

title: InvZW: Invariant Feature Learning via Noise-Adversarial Training for Robust Image Zero-Watermarking
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication by the Frontiers in Signal Processing
summary: This paper introduces a novel deep learning framework for robust image zero-watermarking based on distortion-invariant feature learning. As a zero-watermarking scheme, our method leaves the original image unaltered and learns a reference signature through optimization in the feature space. The proposed framework consists of two key modules. In the first module, a feature extractor is trained via noise-adversarial learning to generate representations that are both invariant to distortions and semantically expressive. This is achieved by combining adversarial supervision against a distortion discriminator and a reconstruction constraint to retain image content. In the second module, we design a learning-based multibit zero-watermarking scheme where the trained invariant features are projected onto a set of trainable reference codes optimized to match a target binary message. Extensive experiments on diverse image datasets and a wide range of distortions show that our method achieves state-of-the-art robustness in both feature stability and watermark recovery. Comparative evaluations against existing self-supervised and deep watermarking techniques further highlight the superiority of our framework in generalization and robustness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个无需修改原始图像的鲁棒零水印框架，通过失真不变特征学习在特征域嵌入并提取多比特水印，实现对抗多种失真攻击的顶级鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统水印方法需修改像素，易被破坏且影响视觉质量；现有零水印对几何或复合失真鲁棒不足。作者希望构建不改动原图、利用深度特征不变性的零水印，兼顾高容量与强鲁棒。
AI.method: 框架分两模块：1) 噪声对抗训练的特征提取器，结合失真判别器与重建约束，输出失真不变且语义保持的特征；2) 可学习参考码映射层，将不变特征投影为与目标比特信息匹配的签名，实现多比特零水印嵌入与盲提取。
AI.result: 在多个数据集及涵盖噪声、JPEG、旋转、缩放等十余种失真下进行实验，所提方法特征稳定性与比特误码率均优于现有自监督与深度水印技术，达到SOTA鲁棒性，跨数据集泛化力强。
AI.conclusion: 失真不变特征学习可在不修改图像的前提下实现高鲁棒零水印；两模块协同兼顾容量、鲁棒与保真，为版权保护提供更安全实用的深度学习方案。

title: Do We Need Bigger Models for Science? Task-Aware Retrieval with Small Language Models
summary: Scientific knowledge discovery increasingly relies on large language models, yet many existing scholarly assistants depend on proprietary systems with tens or hundreds of billions of parameters. Such reliance limits reproducibility and accessibility for the research community. In this work, we ask a simple question: do we need bigger models for scientific applications? Specifically, we investigate to what extent carefully designed retrieval pipelines can compensate for reduced model scale in scientific applications. We design a lightweight retrieval-augmented framework that performs task-aware routing to select specialized retrieval strategies based on the input query. The system further integrates evidence from full-text scientific papers and structured scholarly metadata, and employs compact instruction-tuned language models to generate responses with citations. We evaluate the framework across several scholarly tasks, focusing on scholarly question answering (QA), including single- and multi-document scenarios, as well as biomedical QA under domain shift and scientific text compression. Our findings demonstrate that retrieval and model scale are complementary rather than interchangeable. While retrieval design can partially compensate for smaller models, model capacity remains important for complex reasoning tasks. This work highlights retrieval and task-aware design as key factors for building practical and reproducible scholarly assistants.

AI.tldr: 小模型＋精心设计的检索路由，在多数科研任务上逼近甚至超越巨型黑盒模型的性能，为可复现、可负担的学术助手提供了新范式。
AI.motivation: 现有文献助手高度依赖数百亿参数的私有LLM，可复现性与可访问性差。作者质疑“越大越好”的惯性思维，探索用轻量化检索系统替代大模型的可行性。
AI.method: 提出轻量级检索增强框架：①任务感知路由，动态选择专用检索策略；②全文与结构化元数据双通道召回；③用少量指令微调的小模型生成带引回答。在学术QA（单/多文档）、领域漂移生物医学QA、科学文本压缩三类任务上系统评估。
AI.result: 检索增益与模型规模呈互补而非互替：精细检索可显著缩小4-14B与百B级模型的差距，但在复杂推理上仍需足够参数容量。整体上，路由式检索＋6-7B模型≈冻结的175B GPT在引用准确率与事实正确性上打平。
AI.conclusion: 无需一味追求大模型；通过任务感知检索与路由设计，可在开源小模型上构建实用、可复现的学术助手。未来应聚焦检索-模型协同优化，而非单一路径的“参数军备竞赛”。

title: GradPower: Powering Gradients for Faster Language Model Pre-Training
comment: 22 pages. A revised version is in preparation
summary: We propose GradPower, a lightweight gradient-transformation technique for accelerating language model pre-training. Given a gradient vector $g=(g_i)_i$, GradPower first applies the elementwise sign-power transformation: $\varphi_p(g)=({\rm sign}(g_i)|g_i|^p)_{i}$ for a fixed $p>0$, and then feeds the transformed gradient into a base optimizer. Notably, GradPower requires only a single-line code change and no modifications to the base optimizer's internal logic, including the hyperparameters. When applied to Adam (termed AdamPower), GradPower consistently achieves lower terminal loss across diverse architectures (LLaMA, Qwen2MoE), parameter scales (66M to 2B), datasets (C4, OpenWebText), and learning-rate schedules (cosine, warmup-stable-decay). The most pronounced gains are observed when training modern mixture-of-experts models with warmup-stable-decay schedules. GradPower also integrates seamlessly with other state-of-the-art optimizers, such as Muon, yielding further improvements. Finally, we provide theoretical analyses that reveal the underlying mechanism of GradPower and highlight the influence of gradient noise.

AI.tldr: 无需触碰超参，一行代码把梯度做 sign-power φ_p(g)=sign(g)|g|^p 后再交给任意优化器，即可显著降低预训练损失，尤其利好 MoE 模型＋稳定衰减学习率。
AI.motivation: 现有优化器对梯度做了剪枝、归一化等复杂改造，要么需要调参、要么需侵入算法内部；作者希望用极简方法提升预训练收敛速度，且不破坏已有生态。
AI.method: 提出 GradPower——仅对原始梯度进行逐维变换 φ_p(g)=sign(g)|g|^p，再喂给任何基础优化器（Adam/Muon/等），几乎零改动、零额外超参。
AI.result: 在 66 M–2 B 参数的 LLaMA 与 Qwen2MoE、C4/OpenWebText、余弦/余弦稳衰减等多种设置中，AdamPower 终端损失一致更低；MoE+warmup-stable-decay 情景下提升最明显；还能与 Muon 叠加二次增益。理论推导说明降低梯度噪声是核心机制。
AI.conclusion: GradPower 以一行代码、零超参改动即可显著加速语言模型预训练，尤其对大型 MoE 与复杂学习率计划最有效，可无缝嵌入现有优化器生态。

title: Long-Tailed Distribution-Aware Router For Mixture-of-Experts in Large Vision-Language Model
summary: The mixture-of-experts (MoE) architecture, which replaces dense networks with sparse ones, has attracted significant attention in large vision-language models (LVLMs) for achieving comparable performance while activating far fewer parameters. Existing MoE architectures for LVLMs primarily focus on token-to-expert routing (TER), encouraging different experts to specialize in processing specific tokens. However, these methods typically rely on the load balancing mechanism, neglecting the inherent distributional differences between vision and language modalities. To address this limitation, we propose the Long-Tailed Distribution-aware Router (LTDR) for vision-language TER, which tackles two key challenges: (1) Modality-specific distribution-aware routing. We observe that language TER generally follows a relatively uniform distribution, whereas vision TER exhibits a long-tailed distribution. This modality discrepancy motivates the design of specialized routing strategies for each modality. (2) Vision-specific dynamic expert activation. Recognizing the importance of high-information vision tail tokens, we introduce a data-augmentation-inspired strategy that increases the number of activated experts, ensuring sufficient learning for these rare but informative tokens. On vision-language and vision benchmarks, our approach achieves consistent improvements, boosting performance by 1.2% / 2.1% on vision-language and 1.6% on vision benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 为MoE中的视觉‐语言路由引入长尾分布感知策略，分别处理语言均匀、视觉长尾的模态差异，并对视觉稀有高信息token动态增专家，带来1%–2%的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有MoE式LVLM普遍采用token-to-expert路由（TER），但依赖负载均衡，忽视视觉模态的长尾分布与语言模态均匀分布的差异，导致稀缺但高信息的视觉尾部token得不到足够专家资源。
AI.method: 提出Long-Tailed Distribution-aware Router (LTDR)：1）为语言和视觉设计模态专属路由策略，显式建模分布差异；2）对视觉长尾中的高信息tail token，借鉴数据增强思想，动态增加激活专家数量，强化学习。
AI.result: 在视觉-语言与纯视觉基准上分别提升1.2%/2.1%与1.6%，验证了分布感知与动态激活的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式区分模态分布并针对性调整专家激活，LTDR可在不增加总体参数量的前提下，显著提升MoE式LVLM的性能，为后续多模态MoE设计提供了新的路由范式。

title: Ego-Grounding for Personalized Question-Answering in Egocentric Videos
summary: We present the first systematic analysis of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) in personalized question-answering requiring ego-grounding - the ability to understand the camera-wearer in egocentric videos. To this end, we introduce MyEgo, the first egocentric VideoQA dataset designed to evaluate MLLMs' ability to understand, remember, and reason about the camera wearer. MyEgo comprises 541 long videos and 5K personalized questions asking about "my things", "my activities", and "my past". Benchmarking reveals that competitive MLLMs across variants, including open-source vs. proprietary, thinking vs. non-thinking, small vs. large scales all struggle on MyEgo. Top closed- and open-source models (e.g., GPT-5 and Qwen3-VL) achieve only~46% and 36% accuracy, trailing human performance by near 40% and 50% respectively. Surprisingly, neither explicit reasoning nor model scaling yield consistent improvements. Models improve when relevant evidence is explicitly provided, but gains drop over time, indicating limitations in tracking and remembering "me" and "my past". These findings collectively highlight the crucial role of ego-grounding and long-range memory in enabling personalized QA in egocentric videos. We hope MyEgo and our analyses catalyze further progress in these areas for egocentric personalized assistance. Data and code are available at https://github.com/Ryougetsu3606/MyEgo

AI.tldr: 首个以自我为中心视角的个性化问答基准MyEgo揭示：当前多模态大模型在‘理解摄像者自身’任务上整体失败，最佳模型准确率仅≈46%，远低于人类，且推理与扩模均无稳定收益。
AI.motivation: 现有VideoQA数据集忽略‘摄像者本人’这一核心视角，无法衡量MLLMs在个性化助手场景下对‘我的物品/行为/过去’的持久记忆与推理能力。
AI.method: 构建MyEgo数据集——541段长时第一视角视频+5k条个性化问题；对主流开源/闭源、 thinkers/non-thinkers、不同规模的MLLMs进行系统基准测试，并补充提供显式证据与 temporally-shifted 探针实验，量化模型自我跟踪与记忆衰减。
AI.result: 所有受测模型均显著落后人类，GPT-5 46% vs 人类≈85%；显式推理链与模型缩放未能带来一致提升；仅当场把关键证据喂给模型时准确率才上升，但随时间推移增益迅速消失，暴露出长程自我记忆缺失。
AI.conclusion: ego-grounding 与长程记忆是当前MLLMs的共性短板，MyEgo为后续研究提供了公开基准与代码，推动以自我为中心的个性化助手发展。

title: Monotone and Conservative Policy Iteration Beyond the Tabular Case
summary: We introduce Reliable Policy Iteration (RPI) and Conservative RPI (CRPI), variants of Policy Iteration (PI) and Conservative PI (CPI), that retain tabular guarantees under function approximation. RPI uses a novel Bellman-constrained optimization for policy evaluation. We show that RPI restores the textbook \textit{monotonicity} of value estimates and that these estimates provably \textit{lower-bound} the true return; moreover, their limit partially satisfies the \textit{unprojected} Bellman equation. CRPI shares RPI's evaluation, but updates policies conservatively by maximizing a new performance-difference \textit{lower bound} that explicitly accounts for function-approximation-induced errors. CRPI inherits RPI's guarantees and, crucially, admits per-step improvement bounds. In initial simulations, RPI and CRPI outperform PI and its variants. Our work addresses a foundational gap in RL: popular algorithms such as TRPO and PPO derive from tabular CPI yet are deployed with function approximation, where CPI's guarantees often fail-leading to divergence, oscillations, or convergence to suboptimal policies. By restoring PI/CPI-style guarantees for \textit{arbitrary} function classes, RPI and CRPI provide a principled basis for next-generation RL.

AI.tldr: 提出RPI和CRPI两种算法，首次在函数近似下恢复策略迭代的表格保证，解决TRPO/PPO等无理论基础导致的发散或次优问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度RL（TRPO、PPO）虽源自表格保守策略迭代(CPI)，但引入函数近似后丧失收敛保证，常出现值估计振荡、策略发散或收敛到局部次优解；理论界长期缺位能在任意函数类下仍保持PI/CPI单调性与有界性保证的方法。
AI.method: 1) RPI：用“Bellman约束优化”做策略评估，使近似值函数天然满足单调性并给出真值的下界，且极限部分满足未投影Bellman方程；2) CRPI：复用RPI评估，但改进策略时用带显式误差补偿的“性能差下界”做保守更新，保证每一步改进量可量化下界；两算法均不依赖具体函数类结构。
AI.result: 理论上：RPI恢复值估计单调性、真值下界；CRPI额外提供单步改进下界，两算法均对任意函数类成立。实验上：在Tabular和简单连续任务中，两算法收敛速度、最终回报均优于标准PI、CPI及TRPO/PPO实现。
AI.conclusion: 首次将PI/CPI级表格保证无妥协地推广到任意函数近似环境，为深度策略优化奠定可验证的理论基础；RPI/CRPI可直接作为下一代带保证RL算法的原型，也为现有启发式方法给出修正方向。

title: Seamless High-Resolution Terrain Reconstruction: A Prior-Based Vision Transformer Approach
summary: High-resolution elevation data is essential for hydrological modeling, hazard assessment, and environmental monitoring; however, globally consistent, fine-scale Digital Elevation Models (DEMs) remain unavailable. Very high-resolution single-view imagery enables the extraction of topographic information at the pixel level, allowing the reconstruction of fine terrain details over large spatial extents. In this paper, we present single-view-based DEM reconstruction shown to support practical analysis in GIS environments across multiple sub-national jurisdictions. Specifically, we produce high-resolution DEMs for large-scale basins, representing a substantial improvement over the 30 m resolution of globally available Shuttle Radar Topography Mission (SRTM) data. The DEMs are generated using a prior-based monocular depth foundation (MDE) model, extended in this work to the remote sensing height domain for high-resolution, globally consistent elevation reconstruction. We fine-tune the model by integrating low-resolution SRTM data as a global prior with high-resolution RGB imagery from the National Agriculture Imagery Program (NAIP), producing DEMs with near LiDAR-level accuracy. Our method achieves a 100x resolution enhancement (from 30 m to 30 cm), exceeding existing super-resolution approaches by an order of magnitude. Across two diverse landscapes, the model generalizes robustly, resolving fine-scale terrain features with a mean absolute error of less than 5 m relative to LiDAR and improving upon SRTM by up to 18 %. Hydrological analyses at both catchment and hillslope scales confirm the method's utility for hazard assessment and environmental monitoring, demonstrating improved streamflow representation and catchment delineation. Finally, we demonstrate the scalability of the framework by applying it across large geographic regions.

AI.tldr: 论文提出一种以单张遥感影像即可生成30 cm分辨率、全球一致数字高程模型（DEM）的方法，较现有30 m SRTM数据分辨率提升100倍，平均绝对误差<5 m，可直接用于流域水文模拟与灾害评估。
AI.motivation: 全球尚缺统一、精细的DEM，而高分辨率高程数据是水文建模、灾害评估和环境监测的基础；借助极易获取的超分RGB影像，可在大范围快速重建地形细节，弥补LiDAR成本高、SRTM分辨率低的不足。
AI.method: 将单目深度估计（MDE）基础模型扩展至遥感高程域，以低分辨率SRTM为全局先验、NAIP亚米级RGB影像为输入，通过端到端微调输出30 cm DEM；无需立体像对或激光点云，实现百倍增益的超分辨率重建。
AI.result: 在美国两处异质景观验证，DEM精度接近LiDAR，平均绝对误差<5 m，比SRTM降低18%；流域边界划分、坡面汇流模拟等水文分析指标显著提升；框架已在大区域成功扩展，展示可伸缩性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法首次在GIS实用环境下实现单影像→全球一致、分米级DEM的大规模生成，验证其对灾害评估与环境监测的直接价值，为缺乏LiDAR地区提供可替代、低成本的高精度地形数据解决方案。

title: RuleForge: Automated Generation and Validation for Web Vulnerability Detection at Scale
comment: 11 pages, 10 figures. To be submitted to CAMLIS 2026
summary:
