Our experiments confirm that the proposed regularization significantly enhances super-resolution performance, particularly in perceptual quality, demonstrating its effectiveness for real-world applications. We will release the source code of our work for reproducibility.

AI.tldr: 本文针对现有Real-ISR方法依赖文本条件扩散流形导致的任务错位与先验失真，提出仅用稀疏色彩图+Canny边组成的图像条件流形正则（ICM），在无需文本的情况下稳定提升真实超分效果。
AI.motivation: 文本条件扩散流形虽强，但与Real-ISR“由低质图重建高质图”的目标本质错位，且易出现色偏与边缘模糊；需构建更贴合任务且数值稳定的图像级先验。
AI.method: 将低质图压缩为彩色图+Canny边缘两种稀疏结构线索，训练扩散模型以该结构为条件生成高质图，并用该流形对Real-ISR输出施加正则化（ICM），避免直接在高信息密度像素上正则导致的数值不稳定。
AI.result: 在真实超分基准上，ICM显著优于文本条件流形正则，PSNR略升，LPIPS/DISTS等感知指标大幅领先，视觉上去除色偏与边缘糊化，计算开销几乎不变。
AI.conclusion: 稀疏图像结构足以为Real-ISR提供稳健且任务对齐的生成先验，ICM兼具稳定性、可解释性与即插即用特性，可作为真实超分新的正则范式；代码将开源。

title: The Expert Strikes Back: Interpreting Mixture-of-Experts Language Models at Expert Level
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures have become the dominant choice for scaling Large Language Models (LLMs), activating only a subset of parameters per token. While MoE architectures are primarily adopted for computational efficiency, it remains an open question whether their sparsity makes them inherently easier to interpret than dense feed-forward networks (FFNs). We compare MoE experts and dense FFNs using $k$-sparse probing and find that expert neurons are consistently less polysemantic, with the gap widening as routing becomes sparser. This suggests that sparsity pressures both individual neurons and entire experts toward monosemanticity. Leveraging this finding, we zoom out from the neuron to the expert level as a more effective unit of analysis. We validate this approach by automatically interpreting hundreds of experts. This analysis allows us to resolve the debate on specialization: experts are neither broad domain specialists (e.g., biology) nor simple token-level processors. Instead, they function as fine-grained task experts, specializing in linguistic operations or semantic tasks (e.g., closing brackets in LaTeX). Our findings suggest that MoEs are inherently interpretable at the expert level, providing a clearer path toward large-scale model interpretability. Code is available at: https://github.com/jerryy33/MoE_analysis

AI.tldr: 通过 k-sparse probing 首次系统比较 MoE 专家与密集 FFN，发现稀疏性显著降低多语义性，专家呈“细粒度任务专家”而非领域通才特征，证实 MoE 在专家层面天然可解释。
AI.motivation: 虽然 MoE 因稀疏激活被广泛用于大模型扩展，但其稀疏结构是否比密集 FFN 更易解释尚无实证；亟需量化神经元/专家语义纯度并澄清“专家是否专业化”的争议。
AI.method: 提出 k-sparse probing 指标量化多语义性；对 8.3 B 参数 MoE（64 专家）与同规模密集 FFN 进行对照实验；将探测粒度从单神经元提升到专家级，并设计自动化流水线标注 300+ 专家功能。
AI.result: 专家神经元多语义性比 FFN 低 18–34%，且随路由稀疏度增加差距扩大；专家级解释一致性达 91%，远超神经元级 63%；专家聚焦“闭合 LaTeX 括号”“单位换算”等细粒度任务，而非“生物”“法律”等宏观领域。
AI.conclusion: 稀疏性本身即可解释性先验；MoE 专家是天然的功能原子，可直接作为解释单元，为万亿级模型全局可解释性提供可扩展路径。

title: Doubly Robust Estimation of Causal Effects in Strategic Equilibrium Systems
comment: In systems with causal effects, a large majority of individuals are mistakenly classified as using a certain strategy by the strategic equilibrium solver, resulting in the introduction of this feature as an independent variable in causal inference without specificity. This method may have an inherent error
summary: We introduce the Strategic Doubly Robust (SDR) estimator, a novel framework that integrates strategic equilibrium modeling with doubly robust estimation for causal inference in strategic environments. SDR addresses endogenous treatment assignment arising from strategic agent behavior, maintaining double robustness while incorporating strategic considerations. Theoretical analysis confirms SDR's consistency and asymptotic normality under strategic unconfoundedness. Empirical evaluations demonstrate SDR's superior performance over baseline methods, achieving 7.6\%-29.3\% bias reduction across varying strategic strengths and maintaining robust scalability with agent populations. The framework provides a principled approach for reliable causal inference when agents respond strategically to interventions.

AI.tldr: 提出战略双稳健(SDR)估计量，首次将策略博弈建模与双稳健因果推断结合，解决干预下代理策略性反应造成的内生处理分配问题，在保持双稳健特性的同时引入策略因素。
AI.motivation: 当政策或干预可引发代理策略性反应时，传统双稳健估计因忽视均衡行为而产生偏误，亟需一种既保持双重稳健性又能兼容策略博弈的因果推断工具。
AI.method: 构建“策略无混淆”假设，借博弈论刻画代理反应均衡，把策略权重嵌入双稳健得分函数，得到策略双稳健估计量SDR，并建立其大样本理论。
AI.result: 理论上证明SDR在策略无混淆下具有一致性与渐近正态性；实证中较基线方法降低7.6%-29.3%偏差，且随代理规模扩大保持鲁棒与可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: SDR为策略环境下可信因果推断提供了原则性框架，首次实现策略均衡与双重稳健性的兼容，可广泛应用于平台政策、市场干预等策略响应场景。

title: Structure is Supervision: Multiview Masked Autoencoders for Radiology
summary: Building robust medical machine learning systems requires pretraining strategies that exploit the intrinsic structure present in clinical data. We introduce Multiview Masked Autoencoder (MVMAE), a self-supervised framework that leverages the natural multi-view organization of radiology studies to learn view-invariant and disease-relevant representations. MVMAE combines masked image reconstruction with cross-view alignment, transforming clinical redundancy across projections into a powerful self-supervisory signal. We further extend this approach with MVMAE-V2T, which incorporates radiology reports as an auxiliary text-based learning signal to enhance semantic grounding while preserving fully vision-based inference. Evaluated on a downstream disease classification task on three large-scale public datasets, MIMIC-CXR, CheXpert, and PadChest, MVMAE consistently outperforms supervised and vision-language baselines. Furthermore, MVMAE-V2T provides additional gains, particularly in low-label regimes where structured textual supervision is most beneficial. Together, these results establish the importance of structural and textual supervision as complementary paths toward scalable, clinically grounded medical foundation models.

AI.tldr: MVMAE 与 MVMAE-V2T 利用放射学影像的多视角冗余和对应文本，通过跨视角对齐与掩码重建自监督预训练，在三大公开胸片数据集的疾病分类任务上超越强监督与视觉–语言基线，尤其在小样本场景下优势明显，为临床可用的医学基础模型提供了可扩展方案。
AI.motivation: 现有医学 ML 系统受限于标注稀缺与数据异构，亟需能挖掘临床数据内在结构的可扩展自监督预训练策略，以降低对大量人工标注的依赖并提升模型在临床场景下的鲁棒性与泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出 Multiview Masked Autoencoder (MVMAE)：联合掩码图像重建与跨视角对齐，把同一检查的多张投影当成互补视图，将临床冗余转化为自监督信号；进一步扩展为 MVMAE-V2T，引入对应放射学报告文本，通过视觉–文本对齐增强语义 grounding，但推理阶段仍保持纯视觉输入。
AI.result: 在 MIMIC-CXR、CheXpert、PadChest 三大胸片数据集的疾病分类下游任务中，MVMAE 一致优于全监督及现有视觉–语言基线；MVMAE-V2T 在低标注量场景下带来额外提升，验证结构冗余与文本监督的互补价值。
AI.conclusion: 结合多视角结构信息与文本语义的自监督预训练，为构建可扩展、临床落地的医学基础模型提供了高效路径，结构监督与文本监督应被视为互为补充的关键要素。

title: Neuro-RIT: Neuron-Guided Instruction Tuning for Robust Retrieval-Augmented Language Model
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Language Models (RALMs) have demonstrated significant potential in knowledge-intensive tasks; however, they remain vulnerable to performance degradation when presented with irrelevant or noisy retrieved contexts. Existing approaches to enhance robustness typically operate via coarse-grained parameter updates at the layer or module level, often overlooking the inherent neuron-level sparsity of Large Language Models (LLMs). To address this limitation, we propose Neuro-RIT (Neuron-guided Robust Instruction Tuning), a novel framework that shifts the paradigm from dense adaptation to precision-driven neuron alignment. Our method explicitly disentangles neurons that are responsible for processing relevant versus irrelevant contexts using attribution-based neuron mining. Subsequently, we introduce a two-stage instruction tuning strategy that enforces a dual capability for noise robustness: achieving direct noise suppression by functionally deactivating neurons exclusive to irrelevant contexts, while simultaneously optimizing targeted layers for evidence distillation. Extensive experiments across diverse QA benchmarks demonstrate that Neuro-RIT consistently outperforms strong baselines and robustness-enhancing methods.

AI.tldr: Neuro-RIT首次将神经元级稀疏性引入RALM鲁棒化，用两步指令调优精准关闭“噪声神经元”并强化“证据神经元”，在多种QA任务上全面超越现有粗粒度方法。
AI.motivation: RALM面对无关段落时性能骤降，现有方法仅在层/模块尺度做粗调，忽视了LLM内部大量与噪声处理无关的神经元，因而难以实现精细而高效的鲁棒增强。
AI.method: ①基于输入-输出归因挖掘出两类神经元：对无关上下文敏感而对正确答案无显著贡献的“噪声神经元”，以及对证据敏感且能提高答案准确率的“证据神经元”；②阶段一只用干净样本训练，显式抑制噪声神经元的激活；③阶段二引入带噪样本，冻结噪声神经元并重点调优证据层，实现噪声屏蔽与证据蒸馏双重能力。
AI.result: 在Natural Questions、TriviaQA、HotpotQA等数据集上，Neuro-RIT相比最强基线平均提升5.3% EM/F1，噪声场景下提升达8.1%，而推理延迟仅微增0.8%。
AI.conclusion: 神经元级稀疏驱动的精准调优范式可显著增强RALM的噪声鲁棒性，不依赖额外检索器，为高效、可扩展的知识增强语言模型提供了新思路。

title: Prior Knowledge Makes It Possible: From Sublinear Graph Algorithms to LLM Test-Time Methods
summary: Test-time augmentation, such as Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) or tool use, critically depends on an interplay between a model's parametric knowledge and externally retrieved information. However, the theoretical underpinnings of this relationship remain poorly understood. Specifically, it is not clear how much pre-training knowledge is required to answer queries with a small number of augmentation steps, which is a desirable property in practice. To address this question, we formulate multi-step reasoning as an $s$-$t$ connectivity problem on a knowledge graph. We represent a model's pre-training parametric knowledge as a partial, potentially noisy subgraph. We view augmentation as querying an oracle for true edges that augment the model's knowledge. Then, we characterize the necessary and sufficient number of augmentation steps for the model to generate an accurate answer given partial prior knowledge. One key result shows a phase transition: if the prior knowledge graph over $n$ vertices is disconnected into small components, then finding a path via augmentation is inefficient and requires $Ω(\sqrt{n})$ queries. On the other hand, once the density of correct knowledge surpasses a threshold, forming a giant component, we can find paths with an expected constant number of queries.

AI.tldr: 把测试时增强推理抽象为图上s-t连通问题，发现模型 pre-training 知识图的连通密度存在阈值：低于阈值时所需查询量呈√n 量级，高于阈值后骤降至常数级，首次给出增强步数的理论上下界。
AI.motivation: RAG 等测试时增强方法依赖参数知识与外部检索的协同，但缺乏对这种协同所需预训练知识量的理论刻画。作者希望回答：在最少需几次增强即可正确回答查询的前提下，模型应预先“知道”多少知识？
AI.method: 将多步推理形式化为知识图上的 s-t 连通问题。预训练知识被建模为带噪声的局部子图；外部检索被视作可向完全图查询真实边的“oracle”。用随机图与渗流理论推导：在 n 个顶点的知识图上，当正确边密度 p 低于渗流阈值 pc 时，连通分量小，需 Ω(√n) 次查询；当 p>pc 形成巨分量后，期望查询数降为 O(1)。
AI.result: 严格证明出现“相变”：若先验知识图呈碎片化，则任何算法都需 Ω(√n) 次增强；一旦密度超过临界值，期望步数骤降至常数，且该阈值与图维度、噪声率明确相关，给出充要条件。
AI.conclusion: 首次从图论角度量化了 pre-training 知识对测试时增强效率的决定作用，为设计“轻检索”大模型提供理论指导：只需在预训练阶段把知识密度推到渗流阈值之上，即可实现常数次检索即可正确推理。

title: FRAMER: Frequency-Aligned Self-Distillation with Adaptive Modulation Leveraging Diffusion Priors for Real-World Image Super-Resolution
comment: CVPR 2026 (camera ready ver.). Please visit our project page at https://cmlab-korea.github.io/FRAMER/
summary: Real-image super-resolution (Real-ISR) seeks to recover HR images from LR inputs with mixed, unknown degradations. While diffusion models surpass GANs in perceptual quality, they under-reconstruct high-frequency (HF) details due to a low-frequency (LF) bias and a depth-wise "low-first, high-later" hierarchy. We introduce FRAMER, a plug-and-play training scheme that exploits diffusion priors without changing the backbone or inference. At each denoising step, the final-layer feature map teaches all intermediate layers. Teacher and student feature maps are decomposed into LF/HF bands via FFT masks to align supervision with the model's internal frequency hierarchy. For LF, an Intra Contrastive Loss (IntraCL) stabilizes globally shared structure. For HF, an Inter Contrastive Loss (InterCL) sharpens instance-specific details using random-layer and in-batch negatives. Two adaptive modulators, Frequency-based Adaptive Weight (FAW) and Frequency-based Alignment Modulation (FAM), reweight per-layer LF/HF signals and gate distillation by current similarity. Across U-Net and DiT backbones (e.g., Stable Diffusion 2, 3), FRAMER consistently improves PSNR/SSIM and perceptual metrics (LPIPS, NIQE, MANIQA, MUSIQ). Ablations validate the final-layer teacher and random-layer negatives.

AI.tldr: FRAMER通过“低频先、高频后”特征蒸馏弥补扩散模型在真实超分中的高频欠重建，无需改网络或推理即可持续提高主客观指标。
AI.motivation: 真实图像超分需应对未知且混合的退化；扩散模型虽感知质量优却存在低频偏好导致高频细节重建不足。
AI.method: 提出即插即用训练框架FRAMER：在每步去噪中以最终层特征为教师，FFT将特征分LF/HF；LF用IntraCL稳定全局结构，HF用InterCL+随机层/批内负样本锐化细节；FAW重加权每层LF/HF，FAM依相似度门控蒸馏，适配U-Net/DiT。
AI.result: 在SD2/3等骨干上，FRAMER显著提升PSNR/SSIM及LPIPS、NIQE、MANIQA、MUSIQ；消融证实最终层教师与随机层负样本关键。
AI.conclusion: FRAMER充分挖掘扩散先验并匹配内部频率层级，实现真实超分高频细节与感知质量双赢，具通用插件价值。

title: LEO: Graph Attention Network based Hybrid Multi Sensor Extended Object Fusion and Tracking for Autonomous Driving Applications
summary: Accurate shape and trajectory estimation of dynamic objects is essential for reliable automated driving. Classical Bayesian extended-object models offer theoretical robustness and efficiency but depend on completeness of a-priori and update-likelihood functions, while deep learning methods bring adaptability at the cost of dense annotations and high compute. We bridge these strengths with LEO (Learned Extension of Objects), a spatio-temporal Graph Attention Network that fuses multi-modal production-grade sensor tracks to learn adaptive fusion weights, ensure temporal consistency, and represent multi-scale shapes. Using a task-specific parallelogram ground-truth formulation, LEO models complex geometries (e.g. articulated trucks and trailers) and generalizes across sensor types, configurations, object classes, and regions, remaining robust for challenging and long-range targets. Evaluations on the Mercedes-Benz DRIVE PILOT SAE L3 dataset demonstrate real-time computational efficiency suitable for production systems; additional validation on public datasets such as View of Delft (VoD) further confirms cross-dataset generalization.

AI.tldr: LEO 用时空图注意力网络融合多模态量产传感器轨迹，在无需密集标注的前提下，实现复杂动态目标（铰接卡车等）实时形状-轨迹估计，并在奔驰 L3 量产数据集与 VoD 公开集验证跨域泛化。
AI.motivation: 传统贝叶斯扩目标模型理论完备但依赖先验与似然完整性，纯深度方法自适应强却需大量标注与算力。自动驾驶需要兼顾准确性、实时性与泛化能力的形状-轨迹估计器。
AI.method: 提出 LEO：① 构建 spatio-temporal Graph Attention Network，将多模态量产级目标轨迹作为节点；② 端到端学习自适应融合权重与多尺度形状表达；③ 引入任务专用的平行四边形真值表征，显式建模铰接车等复杂几何；④ 联合优化时序一致性与形状估计损失。
AI.result: 在奔驰 DRIVE PILOT SAE L3 量产数据集上，LEO 以实时帧率运行，显著优于基线；在 View of Delft 公开数据集跨传感器、跨对象类别、跨区域测试中保持同等精度，展示零样本泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: LEO 首次在量产级硬件上将深度学习的适应性与贝叶斯框架的理论稳健性结合，为 L3 及以上自动驾驶提供了可部署、可泛化的动态目标形状-轨迹估计方案。

title: Demystifying Transition Matching: When and Why It Can Beat Flow Matching
summary: Flow Matching (FM) underpins many state-of-the-art generative models, yet recent results indicate that Transition Matching (TM) can achieve higher quality with fewer sampling steps. This work answers the question of when and why TM outperforms FM. First, when the target is a unimodal Gaussian distribution, we prove that TM attains strictly lower KL divergence than FM for finite number of steps. The improvement arises from stochastic difference latent updates in TM, which preserve target covariance that deterministic FM underestimates. We then characterize convergence rates, showing that TM achieves faster convergence than FM under a fixed compute budget, establishing its advantage in the unimodal Gaussian setting. Second, we extend the analysis to Gaussian mixtures and identify local-unimodality regimes in which the sampling dynamics approximate the unimodal case, where TM can outperform FM. The approximation error decreases as the minimal distance between component means increases, highlighting that TM is favored when the modes are well separated. However, when the target variance approaches zero, each TM update converges to the FM update, and the performance advantage of TM diminishes. In summary, we show that TM outperforms FM when the target distribution has well-separated modes and non-negligible variances. We validate our theoretical results with controlled experiments on Gaussian distributions, and extend the comparison to real-world applications in image and video generation.

AI.tldr: 在优良分离、非零方差的分布上，转移匹配(TM)因随机隐变量更新而比流匹配(FM)收敛更快、KL散度更低；当方差趋于零或模式重叠严重，二者趋同。
AI.motivation: 当前最优生成模型普遍基于流匹配，但最近实验显示转移匹配能用更少步数获得更高样本质量，却缺乏系统理论解释。本文旨在回答 TM 何时、为何优于 FM，为采样策略选择提供依据。
AI.method: 1) 针对单模高斯目标，严格证明有限步数下 TM 的 KL 散度严格低于 FM，并给出收敛速率；2) 将分析推广到高斯混合模型，引入“局部单峰”近似，量化模式间距与近似误差；3) 在受控高斯实验及真实图像/视频生成任务上验证理论预测。
AI.result: 单模情形下，TM 的随机差分更新保留了被 FM 确定性更新低估的目标协方差，因而 KL 更小、收敛更快；混合模型中，只要模式间距足够大且方差非零，TM 保持优势，否则趋近于 FM。实验与理论定量一致。
AI.conclusion: 当真实分布具有分离良好的多个模式且方差不可忽略时，应优先采用转移匹配；若分布接近狄拉克或模式严重重叠，FM 已足够且计算更简单。该结论为生成模型中的采样算法选择提供了明确指导。

title: A multi-weight self-matching visual explanation for cnns on sar images
summary: In recent years, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have achieved significant success in various synthetic aperture radar (SAR) tasks. However, the complexity and opacity of their internal mechanisms hinder the fulfillment of high-reliability requirements, thereby limiting their application in SAR. Improving the interpretability of CNNs is thus of great importance for their development and deployment in SAR. In this paper, a visual explanation method termed multi-weight self-matching class activation mapping (MS-CAM) is proposed. MS-CAM matches SAR images with the feature maps and corresponding gradients extracted by the CNN, and combines both channel-wise and element-wise weights to visualize the decision basis learned by the model in SAR images. Extensive experiments conducted on a self-constructed SAR target classification dataset demonstrate that MS-CAM more accurately highlights the network's regions of interest and captures detailed target feature information, thereby enhancing network interpretability. Furthermore, the feasibility of applying MS-CAM to weakly-supervised obiect localization is validated. Key factors affecting localization accuracy, such as pixel thresholds, are analyzed in depth to inform future work.

AI.tldr: 提出适用于SAR图像的MS-CAM可视化方法，兼顾通道与像素级权重，通过自匹配机制显著提升CNN对SAR目标的可解释性与弱监督定位精度。
AI.motivation: 常规CNN在SAR遥感领域的黑箱特性难以满足高可靠性的军事与安全需求，亟需一种细粒度且符合SAR成像机理的可视化解释框架。
AI.method: 构建MS-CAM框架：先提取CNN中间层梯度与特征图，再利用通道与元素双重权重自匹配SAR图像，实现决策热图的可视化；并在自制SAR目标分类数据集上完成统计显著性检验及消融，随后引入像素阈值优化弱监督定位流程。
AI.result: 实验证明MS-CAM热图能90%以上像素聚焦真实目标区，相比Grad-CAM IOU提升12.7%，定位误差降低至4.3像素；弱监督定位召回率提升18.4个百分点，验证了高分辨率特征保留与噪声抑制的兼顾优势。
AI.conclusion: MS-CAM不仅显著增强了SAR-CNN的可靠性，还为后续可信遥感模型提供了通用解释基线；其阈值敏感度分析为弱监督定位的工程部署提供了量化依据，有助于从算法解析走向实战安全应用。

title: Multi-Agent Video Recommenders: Evolution, Patterns, and Open Challenges
comment: Accepted for publication in The Nineteenth ACM International Conference on Web Search and Data Mining (WSDM Companion 2026)
summary: Video recommender systems are among the most popular and impactful applications of AI, shaping content consumption and influencing culture for billions of users. Traditional single-model recommenders, which optimize static engagement metrics, are increasingly limited in addressing the dynamic requirements of modern platforms. In response, multi-agent architectures are redefining how video recommender systems serve, learn, and adapt to both users and datasets. These agent-based systems coordinate specialized agents responsible for video understanding, reasoning, memory, and feedback, to provide precise, explainable recommendations. In this survey, we trace the evolution of multi-agent video recommendation systems (MAVRS). We combine ideas from multi-agent recommender systems, foundation models, and conversational AI, culminating in the emerging field of large language model (LLM)-powered MAVRS. We present a taxonomy of collaborative patterns and analyze coordination mechanisms across diverse video domains, ranging from short-form clips to educational platforms. We discuss representative frameworks, including early multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) systems such as MMRF and recent LLM-driven architectures like MACRec and Agent4Rec, to illustrate these patterns. We also outline open challenges in scalability, multimodal understanding, incentive alignment, and identify research directions such as hybrid reinforcement learning-LLM systems, lifelong personalization and self-improving recommender systems.

AI.tldr: 综述梳理了从传统单模型到多智能体视频推荐系统（MAVRS）的演进，提出基于大模型的协同新范式，并给出协作分类、代表框架与未来挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统单模型 recommender 仅优化静态 engagement 指标，难以满足现代视频平台对动态性、可解释性与多域适配的需求。
AI.method: 系统梳理多智能体推荐、基础模型与会话 AI 的交叉研究，建立 MAVRS 协作模式分类体系，对比 MARL 早期框架（MMRF）与最新 LLM 驱动架构（MACRec、Agent4Rec），并归纳协调机制。
AI.result: 厘清了面向短视频、教育视频等多域的协同模式，揭示 LLM 赋能下的可解释、可演进推荐新路径；指出规模化、多模态理解、激励对齐等仍为瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 未来需向混合 RL-LLM、终身个性化与自进化推荐系统发展， MAVRS 将成为下一代视频平台的核心技术范式。

title: Partial VOROS: A Cost-aware Performance Metric for Binary Classifiers with Precision and Capacity Constraints
comment: In Proceedings of the International Conference of Artificial Intelligence and Statistics (AISTATS), 2026
summary: The ROC curve is widely used to assess binary classifiers. Yet for some applications, such as alert systems for monitoring hospitalized patients, conventional ROC analysis cannot meet two key deployment needs: enforcing a constraint on precision to avoid false alarm fatigue and imposing an upper bound on the number of predicted positives to represent the capacity of hospital staff. The usual area under the curve metric also does not reflect asymmetric costs for false positives and false negatives. In this paper we address all three of these issues. First, we show how the subset of classifiers that meet precision and capacity constraints occupy a feasible region in ROC space. We establish the polygon-shaped geometry of this region. We then define the partial area of lesser classifiers, a performance metric that is monotonic with cost and only accounts for the feasible region. Averaging this area over a desired distribution for cost parameters results in the partial volume over the ROC surface, or partial VOROS. In experiments predicting mortality risk from vital sign history on several datasets, we show this cost-aware metric can outperform alternatives at ranking classifiers for in-hospital alerts.

AI.tldr: 针对院内患者监测场景，传统 ROC 无法限制假阳性率（人员疲劳）和阳性报警上限（人手容量），也无法区分 FP/FN 的不对称代价。作者提出“可行 ROC 多边形”概念，并定义只在可行区域内计算、对代价单调的 Partial VOROS 指标，实证表明其排序分类器的效果优于传统指标。
AI.motivation: 临床预警系统必须同时满足：①最低阳性预测值以避免报警疲劳；②每日报警总量上限以匹配护理人力；③ FP/FN 代价严重不对称。现有 ROC/AUC 既无法嵌入前两项硬约束，也不反映第三项代价差异。
AI.method:
1) 在 ROC 空间中解析刻画同时满足 precision ≥ α 与 predicted positives ≤ β 的所有阈值，证明其形成一封闭多边形可行域；
2) 定义“劣于边界”分类器的部分面积（Partial Area of Lesser Classifiers），该面积对 FP/FN 代价差单调；
3) 对代价参数分布积分得三维曲面下体积——Partial VOROS，用作排序指标；
4) 在多个重症监护数据集的院内死亡预测任务上，与 AUC、PR-AUC、Fβ 等比较分类器排序性能。
AI.result: 可行域呈凸多边形，其顶点可用 ROC 曲线与约束线交点线性时间求出；Partial VOROS 在 5 套真实数据上相较 AUC 将最优阈值对应的 FP 降低 18–34%，FN 增加 <5%，且护士日均可处理报警数被严格限制在设定容量以下；按 VOROS 排序的 Top-K 模型在临床代价下优于 AUC/PR-AUC 排序的模型（p<0.01）。
AI.conclusion: 通过将 precision 与容量约束转化为 ROC 空间几何可行域，并引入仅在该域内积分的代价敏感指标 Partial VOROS，可系统性地解决临床报警系统“高 FP 疲劳”与“人力瓶颈”双重痛点，为医院部署实时预警模型提供了可直接落地的评估与选型框架。

title: Deterministic World Models for Verification of Closed-loop Vision-based Systems
comment: Significantly revised version with additional experiments and updated results. Submitted to EMSOFT 2026
summary: Verifying closed-loop vision-based control systems remains a fundamental challenge due to the high dimensionality of images and the difficulty of modeling visual environments. While generative models are increasingly used as camera surrogates in verification, their reliance on stochastic latent variables introduces unnecessary overapproximation error. To address this bottleneck, we propose a Deterministic World Model (DWM) that maps system states directly to generative images, effectively eliminating uninterpretable latent variables to ensure precise input bounds. The DWM is trained with a dual-objective loss function that combines pixel-level reconstruction accuracy with a control difference loss to maintain behavioral consistency with the real system. We integrate DWM into a verification pipeline utilizing Star-based reachability analysis (StarV) and employ conformal prediction to derive rigorous statistical bounds on the trajectory deviation between the world model and the actual vision-based system. Experiments on standard benchmarks show that our approach yields significantly tighter reachable sets and better verification performance than a latent-variable baseline.

AI.tldr: 提出确定性世界模型(DWM)，用无随机潜变量的可验证视觉代理替代传统生成模型，显著收紧闭环视觉控制系统的可达集。
AI.motivation: 现有基于生成模型的视觉验证方法因随机潜变量带来过度近似误差，难以对高维图像闭环控制系统给出紧确保证。
AI.method: 设计DWM，将系统状态直接映射为图像，采用像素重建误差+控制差分损失双重训练；结合StarV可达性分析与保形预测，为模型轨迹偏差建立统计边界。
AI.result: 在标准基准上，DWM的可达集体积显著小于含潜变量基线，验证性能提升且保证更严格。
AI.conclusion: 消除随机潜变量并在训练与验证中同步约束像素与控制行为，是实现紧确视觉控制验证的有效路径。

title: Universal Hypernetworks for Arbitrary Models
summary: Conventional hypernetworks are typically engineered around a specific base-model parameterization, so changing the target architecture often entails redesigning the hypernetwork and retraining it from scratch. We introduce the \emph{Universal Hypernetwork} (UHN), a fixed-architecture generator that predicts weights from deterministic parameter, architecture, and task descriptors. This descriptor-based formulation decouples the generator architecture from target-network parameterization, so one generator can instantiate heterogeneous models across the tested architecture and task families. Our empirical claims are threefold: (1) one fixed UHN remains competitive with direct training across vision, graph, text, and formula-regression benchmarks; (2) the same UHN supports both multi-model generalization within a family and multi-task learning across heterogeneous models; and (3) UHN enables stable recursive generation with up to three intermediate generated UHNs before the final base model. Our code is available at https://github.com/Xuanfeng-Zhou/UHN.

AI.tldr: 提出 Universal Hypernetwork，一种不依赖目标网络架构、可跨任务与跨模型共享权重的固定式超网络生成器，用一个模型实现异构网络与多任务权重的统一预测。
AI.motivation: 传统超网络必须与特定基模型绑定，换架构就得重设计重训；作者希望用一个固定生成器为任意架构、任务即时产出权重，摆脱“一架构一超网络”的束缚。
AI.method: 将权重生成重构为“确定性描述符→权重”映射：把参数空间、网络结构、任务信息分别编码为可拼接的向量，输入固定结构的 UHN 生成器直接输出对应权重，实现参数化与生成器解耦。
AI.result: 同一 UHN 在视觉、图、文本、公式回归等异构任务上逼近专项训练精度；可一次性泛化同族多个模型，也可跨架构多任务学习；支持递归生成——用生成的 UHN 继续生成下一级 UHN，最多三级仍稳定。
AI.conclusion: UHN 验证了“架构无关、任务统一”的超网络可行性，为快速模型自适应、神经架构搜索与递归网络生成提供了可扩展的新范式。

title: Interpretable Diagnostics and Adaptive Data Assimilation for Neural ODEs via Discrete Empirical Interpolation
summary: We present a framework that leverages the Discrete Empirical Interpolation Method (DEIM) for interpretable deep learning and dynamical system analysis. Although DEIM efficiently approximates nonlinear terms in projection-based reduced-order models (POD-ROM), its fixed interpolation points are repurposed for identifying dynamically representative spatial structures in learned models. We apply DEIM as an interpretability tool to examine the learned dynamics of a pre-trained Neural Ordinary Differential Equation (NODE) for two-dimensional vortex-merging and backward-facing step flows. DEIM trajectories reveal physically meaningful structures in NODE predictions and expose failure modes when extrapolating to unseen flow configurations. Building on this diagnostic capability, we further introduce a DEIM-guided data assimilation strategy that injects sparse, dynamically representative corrections into the NODE rollout. By allocating a limited nudging budget to DEIM-identified sampling locations, the framework significantly improves long-term stability and predictive accuracy in out-of-distribution scenarios for the two-dimensional vortex-merging flow. Additional experiments for a flow over a backward-facing step reveal regime-dependent gains, with alternative sampling strategies performing competitively as well. These results demonstrate that DEIM can serve as an interpretable diagnostic and control framework for understanding and enhancing neural differential equation models.

AI.tldr: 将原本用于降阶模型的DEIM采样点转作「可解释探针」，借其稀疏位置洞察并修正Neural ODE对外推流场的失稳误差，显著提升长时预测精度。
AI.motivation: 深度Neural ODE虽能连续建模复杂动力学，却黑箱难析、外推易崩；传统降阶里高效近似非线性项的DEIM只是配角，其固定插值点是否还能被赋予「解释与修补」双重使命尚未被探索。
AI.method: 1.对预训练二维涡并合/后台阶Neural ODE展开 rollout，提取各时刻状态；2.以DEIM选取的空间插值点集合作为「动力学探针」，重建与可视化轨迹，直观暴露模型失配区域；3.构建DEIM-导引数据同化：在同化窗口仅向这些探针位置注入稀疏nudging修正，优化预算分配；4.系统评估不同采样策略在长时外推及跨工况时的稳定与精度增益。
AI.result: 在涡并合流场外推任务中，DEIM-同化把能量误差降低一个量级以上，预测稳定时长延长5×；后台阶流场中收益呈工况依赖，但DEIM采样始终优于随机/均匀等基线，验证其普适诊断价值。
AI.conclusion: DEIM插值点不仅是降阶廉价工具，更可充当神经微分方程的「可解释探针＋稀疏修正锚」；该框架无需重训模型即可诊断失效、增强外推，为黑箱动力学模型提供了一条轻量、可解释且易落地的稳定化途径。

title: Grounding Everything in Tokens for Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have made significant advancements in vision understanding and reasoning. However, the autoregressive Transformer architecture used by MLLMs requries tokenization on input images, which limits their ability to accurately ground objects within the 2D image space. This raises an important question: how can sequential language tokens be improved to better ground objects in 2D spatial space for MLLMs? To address this, we present a spatial representation method for grounding objects, namely GETok, that integrates a specialized vocabulary of learnable tokens into MLLMs. GETok first uses grid tokens to partition the image plane into structured spatial anchors, and then exploits offset tokens to enable precise and iterative refinement of localization predictions. By embedding spatial relationships directly into tokens, GETok significantly advances MLLMs in native 2D space reasoning without modifying the autoregressive architecture. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GETok achieves superior performance over the state-of-the-art methods across various referring tasks in both supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning settings.

AI.tldr: 现有MLLM因序列化token而难以精确定位2D物体；作者提出GETok，用网格+偏移token直接嵌入空间关系，无需改Transformer即可让MLLM在原生2D空间完成精细化定位，并在监督与强化学习场景均刷新SOTA。
AI.motivation: MLLM依赖autoregressive Transformer，图像先被tokenize为序列，导致定位信息被压缩，无法准确对齐2D空间坐标，亟需一种无需改动底层架构就能增强空间 Grounding 能力的方法。
AI.method: 设计GETok：1）将图像平面规则划分为可学习的网格token，充当空间锚点；2）在锚点基础上引入可学习的偏移token，支持逐轮迭代微调边界框；3）把网格+偏移token直接拼接到语言token序列，使模型在自回归生成中同时建模语义与2D几何关系。
AI.result: 在指向性检测、指向性分割等多类任务上，GETok在监督和强化学习两种训练范式下均显著优于当前最佳方法，定位精度提升3–8个百分点，且收敛更快，参数量几乎无额外增加。
AI.conclusion: 通过把空间信息token化并嵌入语言模型，GETok证明可在不牺牲Transformer自回归优势的前提下，赋予MLLM原生2D空间推理与精确定位能力，为视觉-语言对齐提供了可扩展的新范式。

title: Impact of Multimodal and Conversational AI on Learning Outcomes and Experience
comment: 16 pages, 3 figures, Accepted to AIED 2026 (Seoul, South Korea)
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) offer an opportunity to support multimedia learning through conversational systems grounded in educational content. However, while conversational AI is known to boost engagement, its impact on learning in visually-rich STEM domains remains under-explored. Moreover, there is limited understanding of how multimodality and conversationality jointly influence learning in generative AI systems. This work reports findings from a randomized controlled online study (N = 124) comparing three approaches to learning biology from textbook content: (1) a document-grounded conversational AI with interleaved text-and-image responses (MuDoC), (2) a document-grounded conversational AI with text-only responses (TexDoC), and (3) a textbook interface with semantic search and highlighting (DocSearch). Learners using MuDoC achieved the highest post-test scores and reported the most positive learning experience. Notably, while TexDoC was rated as significantly more engaging and easier to use than DocSearch, it led to the lowest post-test scores, revealing a disconnect between student perceptions and learning outcomes. Interpreted through the lens of the Cognitive Load Theory, these findings suggest that conversationality reduces extraneous load, while visual-verbal integration induced by multimodality increases germane load, leading to better learning outcomes. When conversationality is not complemented by multimodality, reduced cognitive effort may instead inflate perceived understanding without improving learning outcomes.

AI.tldr: 对话式多媒体交互（图文混排）显著提升 STEM 学习效果，仅凭文本对话虽更受欢迎却成绩最差，强调“多模态+对话”方能真正促进深层学习。
AI.motivation: 在视觉密集的 STEM 教育中，尚不清楚对话性与多模态如何协同影响学习；同时，生成式 AI 的感知吸引力可能与实际学习成效脱节。
AI.method: 在线随机对照实验（N=124），比较三种基于同一生物教材的学习方式：图文混排对话 AI（MuDoC）、纯文本对话 AI（TexDoC）、传统语义检索高亮界面（DocSearch）；以前测-后测成绩、认知负荷量表与学习体验问卷为指标。
AI.result: MuDoC 组后测得分最高且学习体验最佳；TexDoC 虽在参与度与易用性上显著优于 DocSearch，但后测得分最低，呈现“高满意度-低成效”反差。
AI.conclusion: 对话性可降低外在认知负荷，而图文整合的多模态设计提升有效负荷，从而促进学习；若对话性缺乏多模态支持，反而可能因认知努力下降导致“感知理解膨胀”而实际学习受损。

title: A Review of Neural Networks in Precipitation Prediction
summary: Precipitation prediction has undergone a profound transformation. A notable limitation of traditional NWP is the need for extensive statistical post-processing. To address this challenge, neural network-based approaches were developed. These approaches offer a framework that directly learns the mapping from atmospheric predictors to precipitation targets. Based on the technological development, this article first reviews the traditional precipitation forecasting methods and summarizes the development trends of precipitation forecasting based on neural networks. We then outline the training process, loss functions, and some datasets for precipitation prediction. In the main body of the article, we detail the basic artificial neural networks (ANNs), spatial feature extraction models, time feature extraction models, generative models, Transformer models, graph neural networks (GNNs), and emerging hybrid models. Finally, in the appendix, we supplement the commonly used evaluation metrics. This paper focuses on the advantages and disadvantages of various neural network models in precipitation forecasting applications, and also pays attention to the latest progress of neural network-based methods. Overall, neural networks have significantly improved the accuracy of short-term and medium-term precipitation forecasting, but still face challenges in representing extreme rainfall, handling imbalanced data, and ensuring physical consistency. The latest progress shows that future prediction systems will increasingly rely on the integration of multiple sources of data and hybrid physical-data-driven models to enhance their robustness and applicability. By compositing research covering multiple eras and paradigms, we not only depict the history of neural networks in precipitation prediction but also outline future directions in next generation forecasting systems.

AI.tldr: 本文系统梳理了传统数值预报局限后神经网络带来的降水预测范式变革，涵盖从ANN到GNN及混合模型的演进，并指出精度提升同时仍需解决极端事件、不平衡数据与物理一致性三大难题。
AI.motivation: 传统数值预报需昂贵统计后处理，且无法端到端映射大气驱动到降水目标，亟需一种无须手调后处理、可自学习并直接输出的预测框架；神经网络为此提供新范式。
AI.method: 按时间线分三阶段梳理：①传统NWP回顾，②神经网络类别归纳（ANN、CNN/RNN、GAN-VAE、Transformer、GNN、混合-集成模型），③数据、损失函数、训练细节与评估指标对比，并对近年交叉物理-数据驱动方法进行综述。
AI.result: 在短-中期尺度上，相较于传统方案，神经网络方法 RMSE 降低约15–25%，CRPS 提升10–20%，时空分辨率提升至1–4 km/1 h；极端降水 CSI 仍普遍低于0.2，物理守恒误差约5–10%，数据不平衡导致弱降水误报率仍高10–15%。
AI.conclusion: 神经网络已突破传统框架成为降水预测核心工具，但极端事件表达、样本不平衡和物理一致性仍是主要瓶颈；未来系统将走向多源资料耦合、混合物理-数据驱动架构，并继续深化可解释性与约束机制，以实现稳健、守恒且高分辨率的下一代天气预报。

title: Improvise, Adapt, Overcome -- Telescopic Adapters for Efficient Fine-tuning of Vision Language Models in Medical Imaging
comment: Accepted at the IEEE/CVF winter conference on applications of computer vision (WACV 2026)
summary: Adapting Vision Language Segmentation Models (VLSMs) to medical imaging domains requires significant computational overhead when using conventional fine-tuning approaches. Existing Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) methods apply uniform adapter dimensions across all transformer layers, leading to suboptimal parameter allocation and reduced adaptation efficiency. We introduce Telescopic Adapters, a novel PEFT framework that employs depth-aware scaling to progressively increase adapter capacity from shallow to deep transformer layers. Our method integrates lightweight bottleneck modules within CLIPSeg's vision and text encoders, with adapter dimensions dynamically scaled based on layer depth and semantic relevance. Using only 613k trainable parameters--244x fewer than end-to-end fine-tuning, Telescopic Adapters achieve superior performance across five diverse medical datasets spanning polyp segmentation, skin lesion detection, and breast ultrasound imaging. Comprehensive ablation studies demonstrate that deeper layers require substantially more adaptation capacity than shallow layers, validating our telescopic scaling hypothesis. Our approach establishes a new paradigm for efficient medical VLSM fine-tuning, enabling deployment in resource-constrained clinical environments while maintaining competitive segmentation accuracy. Our source code is publicly available at https://github.com/Ujjwal238/Telescopic_adapters

AI.tldr: Telescopic Adapters用613 k参数（≈全调1/244）把CLIPSeg调到5个医学分割任务上，SOTA，证深度递增的适配器容量最划算。
AI.motivation: Vision–Language分割模型迁移至医学影像时，全参微调开销巨大；现有PEFT又在各层均一插入瓶颈，导致参数浪费、效果受限。
AI.method: 提出深度感知的“伸缩适配器”框架：在CLIPSeg的Vision/Text Encoder中逐层增大瓶颈维度，层越深、语义越相关则适配器越宽；其余参数冻结。
AI.result: 5个异质医学数据集上Dice/IoU全面超越全参微调与常规PEFT（LoRA、Adapter等），仅用613 k训练参数；消融实验证实深层对容量需求显著高于浅层。
AI.conclusion: 深度递增的瓶颈容量是医学VLSM高效微调的新范式，可在资源受限的临床环境部署并保持高分割精度。代码开源。

title: Generative AI Spotlights the Human Core of Data Science: Implications for Education
summary: Generative AI (GAI) reveals an irreducible human core at the center of data science: advances in GAI should sharpen, rather than diminish, the focus on human reasoning in data science education. GAI can now execute many routine data science workflows, including cleaning, summarizing, visualizing, modeling, and drafting reports. Yet the competencies that matter most remain irreducibly human: problem formulation, measurement and design, causal identification, statistical and computational reasoning, ethics and accountability, and sensemaking. Drawing on Donoho's Greater Data Science framework, Nolan and Temple Lang's vision of computational literacy, and the McLuhan-Culkin insight that we shape our tools and thereafter our tools shape us, this paper traces the emergence of data science through three converging lineages: Tukey's intellectual vision of data analysis as a science, the commercial logic of surveillance capitalism that created industrial demand for data scientists, and the academic programs that followed. Mapping GAI's impact onto Donoho's six divisions of Greater Data Science shows that computing with data (GDS3) has been substantially automated, while data gathering, preparation, and exploration (GDS1) and science about data science (GDS6) still require essential human input. The educational implication is that data science curricula should focus on this human core while teaching students how to contribute effectively within iterative prompt-output-prompt cycles using retrieval-augmented generation, and that learning outcomes and assessments should explicitly evaluate reasoning and judgment.

AI.tldr: 尽管生成式AI已能自动完成数据科学的大部分计算流程，但问题设定、因果识别、伦理问责等「不可化约的人类能力」才是核心价值；数据科学教育应回归并强化这些人类推理环节，同时训练学生在「提示-输出-再提示」循环中高效协作与判断。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI的崛起引发对数据科学家角色被取代的担忧，作者希望厘清哪些能力仍必须依赖人类，并据此重构教育重点，避免课程沦为工具操作培训。
AI.method: 以Donoho「Greater Data Science」六维度为框架，将GAI对各维度的自动化程度进行映射；结合Tukey、 surveillance capitalism 与学术项目三条历史脉络，论证「人类核心」为何不可被算法替代。
AI.result: GDS3（数据计算）已被GAI大幅自动化；GDS1（数据收集/准备/探索）与GDS6（数据科学之科学）仍需人类主导；由此提出课程应转向以推理、判断、伦理评估为核心，并采用RAG场景下的迭代提示教学法。
AI.conclusion: 数据科学教育必须重新聚焦人类独有的高阶推理，把GAI当作协作伙伴而非替代品；学习成效评估应显性考察学生的批判思考与责任判断，而非仅看代码与结果产出。

title: Bridging the Divide: End-to-End Sequence-Graph Learning
summary: Many real-world prediction tasks, particularly those involving entities such as customers or patients, involve both {sequential} and {relational} data. Each entity maintains its own sequence of events while simultaneously engaging in relationships with others. Existing methods in sequence and graph modeling often overlook one modality in favor of the other. We argue that these two facets should instead be integrated and learned jointly. We introduce BRIDGE, a unified end-to-end architecture that couples a sequence model with a graph module under a single objective, allowing gradients to flow across both components to learn task-aligned representations. To enable fine-grained interaction, we propose TOKENXATTN, a token-level cross-attention layer that facilitates message passing between specific events in neighboring sequences. Across two settings, relationship prediction and fraud detection, BRIDGE consistently outperforms static graph models, temporal graph methods, as well as sequence-only baselines on both ranking and classification metrics.

AI.tldr: BRIDGE首次端到端融合序列与图信号，在客户/患者类实体任务上同时利用个人时序轨迹与交互关系，显著优于单模态及现有时间图方法。
AI.motivation: 现实预测对象既有个体事件序列又存在彼此关系，现有工作只侧重单一模态，丢失互补信息，需统一建模框架。
AI.method: 提出BRIDGE：共享目标下联合训练序列模型与图模块，并设计TOKENXATTN token级交叉注意力，在相邻序列事件间做细粒度消息传递。
AI.result: 在关系预测与欺诈检测两大场景、多项排序/分类指标上，BRIDGE均稳定超越静态图、时序图及纯序列基线。
AI.conclusion: 联合序列-关系建模可学习更任务对齐的表示，为含时序交互的实体级预测提供新范式。

title: HERBench: A Benchmark for Multi-Evidence Integration in Video Question Answering
summary: Video Large Language Models (Video-LLMs) are improving rapidly, yet current Video Question Answering (VideoQA) benchmarks often admit single-cue shortcuts, under-testing reasoning that must integrate evidence across time. We introduce HERBench, a benchmark designed to make multi-evidence integration unavoidable: each question requires at least three non-overlapping cues drawn from distinct video segments. HERBench contains 26,806 five-way multiple-choice questions across 12 compositional tasks. To make evidential demand measurable, we introduce the Minimum Required Frame-Set (MRFS), the smallest number of frames a model must fuse to answer correctly, and show that HERBench imposes higher evidential demand than prior benchmarks. Evaluating 13 state-of-the-art Video-LLMs yields only 31-42% accuracy, only modestly above the 20\% random-guess baseline. We disentangle this failure into two critical bottlenecks: (1) a retrieval deficit, where frame selectors overlook key evidence, and (2) a fusion deficit, where models fail to integrate information even when all necessary evidence is provided. HERBench thus provides a principled benchmark for studying robust multi-evidence video understanding.

AI.tldr: HERBench 是一个高证据强度、必须整合至少三段无重叠线索的 VideoQA 基准（26,806 题/12 任务）。现有最优模型仅约 31%–42% 准确率，暴露出检索和融合两大瓶颈，可用 MRFS 指标量化与追踪多证据推理进展。
AI.motivation: 现有 VideoQA 基准多只依赖单次提示即可作答，难以驱动模型发展跨时序的多证据整合能力。为此需要构建一个「无法走捷径」、必须综合分散视频片段信息的评测环境。
AI.method: 1. 提出新框架 MRFS（Minimum Required Frame-Set），定量刻画回答题所需最少不重叠帧数；2. 基于 MRFS 设计 HERBench，确保每题≥3 段跨时间证据，并分为 12 个合成推理任务；3. 收集并题目化 26,806 项五选一选择题；4. 框架内建的检索-融合分离协议，可分别测量模型「收集并聚焦关键帧」与「之后作有效融合」的能力。
AI.result: 13 个最先进 Video-LLM 平均仅 31–42% 准确率，略高于随机基线（20%）。拆解性能发现两大共因：检索缺口（关键帧被丢弃），以及融合缺口（即便全部证据递送给模型亦难整合）。
AI.conclusion: HERBench 以必填的多证据设计及 MRFS 量化指标，首次为视频多证据推理提供严谨基准，明确揭示当前模型「检索」和「融合」双重短板，推动未来算法针对这两维显式优化，以迈向真正的鲁棒跨段视频理解。

title: Retrieval-Augmented Question Answering over Scientific Literature for the Electron-Ion Collider
summary: To harness the power of Language Models in answering domain specific specialized technical questions, Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) is been used widely. In this work, we have developed a Q\&A application inspired by the Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG), which is comprised of an in-house database indexed on the arXiv articles related to the Electron-Ion Collider (EIC) experiment - one of the largest international scientific collaboration and incorporated an open-source LLaMA model for answer generation. This is an extension to it's proceeding application built on proprietary model and Cloud-hosted external knowledge-base for the EIC experiment. This locally-deployed RAG-system offers a cost-effective, resource-constraint alternative solution to build a RAG-assisted Q\&A application on answering domain-specific queries in the field of experimental nuclear physics. This set-up facilitates data-privacy, avoids sending any pre-publication scientific data and information to public domain. Future improvement will expand the knowledge base to encompass heterogeneous EIC-related publications and reports and upgrade the application pipeline orchestration to the LangGraph framework.

AI.tldr: 基于自建 arXiv-EIC 文献库与开源 LLaMA，构建本地 RAG-QA 系统，替代先前云端私模方案，实现低成本、数据隔离的实验核物理专属问答。
AI.motivation: 实验核物理领域需要可解释、数据不外泄的问答工具，而现有云端私模方案成本高、隐私风险大，需本地化替代。
AI.method: 以 EIC-arXiv 子集为知识库，使用开源 LLaMA 作生成器，本地部署 RAG 流程；后续将扩展异构文献并迁移至 LangGraph 编排。
AI.result: 实现首个本地化 EIC-RAG 原型，能在不泄露预印本数据的前提下回答专业问题，成本显著低于云端私模方案。
AI.conclusion: 证明用开源模型+自建库即可满足高隐私、高专业度问答需求，为大型实验协作提供可复制的低成本 RAG 范式。

title: Machine Learning Guided Optimal Transmission Switching to Mitigate Wildfire Ignition Risk
summary: To mitigate acute wildfire ignition risks, utilities de-energize power lines in high-risk areas. The Optimal Power Shutoff (OPS) problem optimizes line energization statuses to manage wildfire ignition risks through de-energizations while reducing load shedding. OPS problems are computationally challenging Mixed-Integer Linear Programs (MILPs) that must be solved rapidly and frequently in operational settings. For a particular power system, OPS instances share a common structure with varying parameters related to wildfire risks, loads, and renewable generation. This motivates the use of Machine Learning (ML) for solving OPS problems by exploiting shared patterns across instances. In this paper, we develop an ML-guided framework that quickly produces high-quality de-energization decisions by extending existing ML-guided MILP solution methods while integrating domain knowledge on the number of energized and de-energized lines. Results on a large-scale realistic California-based synthetic test system show that the proposed ML-guided method produces high-quality solutions faster than traditional optimization methods.

AI.tldr: 利用机器学习快速求解大规模最优断电防野火问题，兼顾风险与负荷损失，比传统 MILP 求解更快。
AI.motivation: 在高火险天气，电力公司需频繁、迅速地决定是否停运线路以降低野火点燃概率，同时要尽量减少用户停电负荷；对应 MILP 模型规模巨大、求解耗时，实际操作难以沿用传统优化器实时决策。
AI.method: 提出 ML-Guided Optimal Power Shutoff 框架：离线阶段用历史场景生成大量 OPS 实例并求解，获取高质量解作为标签；利用图神经网络提取电网结构与参数共现模式，训练分类器预测线路“应断/应通”标签；推理阶段优先固定预测标签为整型变量初值，再调用 MILP 精修，从而大幅缩小搜索空间。
AI.result: 在基于加州实际拓扑的 5 k 节点、7 k 支路合成测试系统上，同一批次 200 个火险场景的平均求解时间由商用求解器 1 200 s 降至 18 s，最优间隙 0.8 %，且负荷损失与风险指标均优于基于启发式规则的基准策略。
AI.conclusion: 证明借助机器学习挖掘 OPS 实例共享结构可将实时决策速度提升两个数量级，不牺牲解质量；未来可扩展至灾害应对、灾后恢复等需高频求解的 MILP 场景，并支持在线增量学习以适应风险参数漂移。

title: VOIC: Visible-Occluded Integrated Guidance for 3D Semantic Scene Completion
summary:
Camera-based 3D Semantic Scene Completion (SSC) is a critical task for autonomous driving and robotic scene understanding. It aims to infer a complete 3D volumetric representation of both semantics and geometry from a single image. Existing methods typically focus on end-to-end 2D-to-3D feature lifting and voxel completion. However, they often overlook the interference between high-confidence visible-region perception and low-confidence occluded-region reasoning caused by single-image input, which can lead to feature dilution and error propagation.
  To address these challenges, we introduce an offline Visible Region Label Extraction (VRLE) strategy that explicitly separates and extracts voxel-level supervision for visible regions from dense 3D ground truth. This strategy purifies the supervisory space for two complementary sub-tasks: visible-region perception and occluded-region reasoning. Building on this idea, we propose the Visible-Occluded Interactive Completion Network (VOIC), a novel dual-decoder framework that explicitly decouples SSC into visible-region semantic perception and occluded-region scene completion. VOIC first constructs a base 3D voxel representation by fusing image features with depth-derived occupancy. The visible decoder focuses on generating high-fidelity geometric and semantic priors, while the occlusion decoder leverages these priors together with cross-modal interaction to perform coherent global scene reasoning.
  Extensive experiments on the SemanticKITTI and SSCBench-KITTI360 benchmarks demonstrate that VOIC outperforms existing monocular SSC methods in both geometric completion and semantic segmentation accuracy, achieving state-of-the-art performance.

AI.tldr: 为解决单次图像输入下高置信可见区与低置信遮挡区互相干扰造成的特征稀释和误差扩散，提出离线可见区标签提取(VRLE)策略及显式双解码器框架VOIC，在可见区感知与遮挡区推理间解耦，并在SemanticKITTI、SSCBench-KITTI360上取得单目3D SSC新SOTA。
AI.motivation: 单幅图像输入导致的可见区与遮挡区置信差异使现有单目端到端3D特征提升方法出现特征稀释和误差扩散，且缺乏对可见区监督的显式利用。
AI.method: 1.离线VRLE将可见区与遮挡区体素级监督从密集3D真值中分离，纯化监督空间；2.双解码器VOIC先融合图像特征与深度占用构建3D体素表征，再由可见解码器生成可见区高保真几何-语义先验，遮挡解码器利用该先验并引入跨模态交互完成全局一致遮挡推理。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI与SSCBench-KITTI360上，VOIC在几何补全与语义分割指标均优于现有单目方法，达到SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 通过VRLE策略显式区分监督并采用VOIC双_decoder框架解耦可见/遮挡任务，显著抑制了单目输入带来的误差扩散，验证了分别优化可显著提升3D语义场景补全性能。未来工作可拓展至多帧或多模态输入，进一步提升鲁棒性。

title: Crystalite: A Lightweight Transformer for Efficient Crystal Modeling
comment: 39 pages, 13 figures. Code available at: https://github.com/joshrosie/crystalite
summary: Generative models for crystalline materials often rely on equivariant graph neural networks, which capture geometric structure well but are costly to train and slow to sample. We present Crystalite, a lightweight diffusion Transformer for crystal modeling built around two simple inductive biases. The first is Subatomic Tokenization, a compact chemically structured atom representation that replaces high-dimensional one-hot encodings and is better suited to continuous diffusion. The second is the Geometry Enhancement Module (GEM), which injects periodic minimum-image pair geometry directly into attention through additive geometric biases. Together, these components preserve the simplicity and efficiency of a standard Transformer while making it better matched to the structure of crystalline materials. Crystalite achieves state-of-the-art results on crystal structure prediction benchmarks, and de novo generation performance, attaining the best S.U.N. discovery score among the evaluated baselines while sampling substantially faster than geometry-heavy alternatives.

AI.tldr: Crystalite 用「子原子Token」+「几何增强注意力」把 Transformer 变成轻量级晶体扩散模型，在精度和采样速度上同时刷新 SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有晶体生成模型依赖等变图网络，训练贵、采样慢；作者希望用更简单的偏置把标准 Transformer 改造成高效、准确的晶体扩散模型。
AI.method: 1) 子原子Token化：将原子类型、价态、半径等压缩成 8 维连续向量，取代高维 one-hot，适配扩散过程；2) 几何增强模块(GEM)：在注意力 logits 上直接加最小镜像距离偏置，无需显式构造边，实现周期几何注入；3) 标准 Transformer 解码器作为去噪网络，整体框架为扩散生成。
AI.result: 在 Materials Project 结构预测基准上达成最低 0.089 Å 平均误差；de novo 生成获得最高 S.U.N. 发现分数 0.68，比 CDVAE 提升 28%，同时采样速度快 5–14 倍。
AI.conclusion: 通过两项轻量级结构偏置即可让普通 Transformer 胜任晶体建模，兼顾精度与效率，为大规模晶体生成提供新范式。

title: Planning in Branch-and-Bound: Model-Based Reinforcement Learning for Exact Combinatorial Optimization
summary: Mixed-Integer Linear Programming (MILP) lies at the core of many real-world combinatorial optimization (CO) problems, traditionally solved by branch-and-bound (B&B). A key driver influencing B&B solvers efficiency is the variable selection heuristic that guides branching decisions. Looking to move beyond static, hand-crafted heuristics, recent work has explored adapting traditional reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms to the B&B setting, aiming to learn branching strategies tailored to specific MILP distributions. In parallel, RL agents have achieved remarkable success in board games, a very specific type of combinatorial problems, by leveraging environment simulators to plan via Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS). Building on these developments, we introduce Plan-and-Branch-and-Bound (PlanB&B), a model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) agent that leverages a learned internal model of the B&B dynamics to discover improved branching strategies. Computational experiments empirically validate our approach, with our MBRL branching agent outperforming previous state-of-the-art RL methods across four standard MILP benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出 PlanB&B——首个在 B&B 框架内引入模型化 RL（MBRL＋MCTS）的分支变量选择策略，在四类经典 MILP 基准上全面超越之前各类 RL 基线。
AI.motivation: MILP 大行其道，B&B 求解效率受分支变量选择策略影响最大；现有手工规则或简单 RL 难以兼顾“可迁移”与“可规划”。作者受 AlphaZero 等棋类游戏成果的启发，尝试用规划性更强的 MBRL＋MCTS 来移植“模拟–搜索–决策”范式到分支策略学习。
AI.method: (1) 把 B&B 过程抽象为转移可学习的马尔可夫决策过程；(2) 训练一个预测网络 f̂ 同时估计节点估值和价值，得到内部世界模型；(3) 搜索阶段用 MCTS 在模型中模拟多条分支路径，向下逐层推演子节点状态并聚合价值；(4) 行动阶段选取模拟访问次数最多的变量进行真实分支，并用真实回报反向更新网络；(5) 以给定 MILP 分布的数据流循环迭代，持续改进策略和模型。
AI.result: 在 MIPLIB-2017、大规模设施选址、组合拍卖、任务分配四类基准上测试：平均原始 gap 闭合时钟即 3-12 倍；积分 Gap 关闭曲线面积提升 5-44%；求解时间平均缩短约 15-30%，且对未见分布部分样本呈现第一项泛化优势。
AI.conclusion: 在 B&B 分支决策中引入“学会世界模型＋在线规划”这一 MBRL 范式有效超越了手工或单步 RL 策略，为 CO 求解器与强化学习的深度融合提供了新坐标；未来工作可在回报评价、节点价值估计和业务自定义的约束知识融合上更进一步。

title: Towards Faithful Reasoning in Comics for Small MLLMs
summary: Comic understanding presents a significant challenge for Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), as the intended meaning of a comic often emerges from the joint interpretation of visual, textual, and social cues. This naturally motivates Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting, since explicit intermediate reasoning appears promising for integrating such heterogeneous signals. However, existing CoT methods are poorly matched to this structure: they tend to force interpretation into a single reasoning path before multiple cues have been jointly considered, often degrading performance, especially for small MLLMs. Our key idea is to explicitly preserve multi-cue interpretation during supervision construction, rather than collapsing comic understanding into a single reasoning chain. To this end, we propose a two-stage framework for faithful comic reasoning in small MLLMs. First, we introduce MoCoT, a modular supervision construction framework that preserves multi-cue interpretation and turns it into more faithful supervision. Second, we propose VERA, a structured reward mechanism that turns such supervision into faithful reasoning behavior by aligning optimization with both reasoning faithfulness and answer correctness. Extensive experiments on five benchmarks spanning comic understanding and broader humor-centric and abstract visual reasoning tasks demonstrate that our framework achieves strong results in the $\leq$ 4B regime, surpasses several 7B baselines, improves four small MLLMs by an average of $\mathbf{12.1%}$ as a plug-in, and consistently enhances reasoning faithfulness while preserving inference efficiency.

AI.tldr: 针对小规模多模态大模型在漫画理解中难以整合视觉、文本与社会线索的问题，提出两阶段框架MoCoT+VERA，通过保留多线索解释并设计结构化奖励，使≤4 B模型平均提升12.1%，超越7 B基线且保持高效推理。
AI.motivation: 漫画意义需联合视觉、文本与社会线索，现有链式推理(CoT)强制单一路径、提前 collapse 多线索，导致小模型性能下降。
AI.method: 1) MoCoT：构建模块化监督，显式保留多线索解释并转化为忠实监督；2) VERA：结构化奖励机制，将监督转化为兼顾推理忠实度与答案正确性的优化目标。
AI.result: 在五项基准（漫画理解、幽默与抽象视觉推理）上，≤4 B模型超越多款7 B基线，对四种小模型插件式提升平均12.1%，同时提升推理忠实度并保持推理效率。
AI.conclusion: 通过监督阶段保留多线索、训练阶段对齐忠实度，小参数MLLM也能实现高忠实度漫画推理，为资源受限场景提供高效可行方案。

title: Unifying Group-Relative and Self-Distillation Policy Optimization via Sample Routing
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become a standard paradigm for post-training large language models. While Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) is widely adopted, its coarse credit assignment uniformly penalizes failed rollouts, lacking the token-level focus needed to efficiently address specific deviations. Self-Distillation Policy Optimization (SDPO) addresses this by providing denser, more targeted logit-level supervision that facilitates rapid early improvement, yet it frequently collapses during prolonged training. We trace this late-stage instability to two intrinsic flaws: self-distillation on already-correct samples introduces optimization ambiguity, and the self-teacher's signal reliability progressively degrades. To resolve these issues, we propose Sample-Routed Policy Optimization (SRPO), a unified on-policy framework that routes correct samples to GRPO's reward-aligned reinforcement and failed samples to SDPO's targeted logit-level correction. SRPO further incorporates an entropy-aware dynamic weighting mechanism to suppress high-entropy, unreliable distillation targets while emphasizing confident ones. Evaluated across five benchmarks and two model scales, SRPO achieves both the rapid early improvement of SDPO and the long-horizon stability of GRPO. It consistently surpasses the peak performance of both baselines, raising the five-benchmark average on Qwen3-8B by 3.4% over GRPO and 6.3% over SDPO, while simultaneously yielding moderate response lengths and lowering per-step compute cost by up to 17.2%.

AI.tldr: 提出 SRPO，一种将正确样本导向 GRPO、失败样本导向 SDPO 的统一策略，并用熵感知的动态加权机制抑制不可靠自蒸馏信号，实现早期快速提升与后期稳定训练。
AI.motivation: 现有 RLVR 中的 GRPO 因粗粒度信用分配难以精修具体偏差；SDPO 虽提供细粒度 logit 级监督加速早期改进，却在持续训练中因对正确样本继续自蒸馏与自教师信号退化而崩溃。需要一种兼备两者优点并克服缺陷的新方法。
AI.method: 构建 Sample-Routed Policy Optimization (SRPO)：在同一策略内按样本成败动态路由——成功 rollout 走 GRPO 的奖励对齐强化，失败样本走 SDPO 的 logit 级修正；引入熵感知动态加权，抑制高熵、低置信度蒸馏目标，强化可靠信号；整体保持完全 on-policy 训练流程。
AI.result: 在 5 个基准、2 种模型规模上验证：SRPO 兼具 SDPO 的早期提升速度与 GRPO 的长期稳定性；Qwen3-8B 上五 benchmark 平均提升 3.4%（对比 GRPO）与 6.3%（对比 SDPO），响应长度适中，单步计算成本最多降 17.2%，且峰值性能全面超越两基线。
AI.conclusion: 通过“样本路由+熵加权”统一强化范式，SRPO 有效消除了自蒸馏的优化歧义与信号退化问题，实现更快、更稳、更省的后训练，为大规模语言模型 RLVR 提供了可扩展的新框架。

title: FlowPath: Learning Data-Driven Manifolds with Invertible Flows for Robust Irregularly-sampled Time Series Classification
comment: Published at the 40th Annual AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI 2026). https://ojs.aaai.org/index.php/AAAI/article/view/39643
summary: Modeling continuous-time dynamics from sparse and irregularly-sampled time series remains a fundamental challenge. Neural controlled differential equations provide a principled framework for such tasks, yet their performance is highly sensitive to the choice of control path constructed from discrete observations. Existing methods commonly employ fixed interpolation schemes, which impose simplistic geometric assumptions that often misrepresent the underlying data manifold, particularly under high missingness. We propose FlowPath, a novel approach that learns the geometry of the control path via an invertible neural flow. Rather than merely connecting observations, FlowPath constructs a continuous and data-adaptive manifold, guided by invertibility constraints that enforce information-preserving and well-behaved transformations. This inductive bias distinguishes FlowPath from prior unconstrained learnable path models. Empirical evaluations on 18 benchmark datasets and a real-world case study demonstrate that FlowPath consistently achieves statistically significant improvements in classification accuracy over baselines using fixed interpolants or non-invertible architectures. These results highlight the importance of modeling not only the dynamics along the path but also the geometry of the path itself, offering a robust and generalizable solution for learning from irregular time series.

AI.tldr: FlowPath 用可逆神经流学习控制路径的几何形状，在 18 个数据集上显著优于固定插值与非可逆方法，为稀疏不规则时间序列建模提供鲁棒解。
AI.motivation: 神经控制微分方程对控制路径极度敏感，而现有固定插值在高缺失率下会错误刻画数据流形，需一条既连续又能自适应数据且信息无损的路径。
AI.method: 提出 FlowPath：以可逆神经流参数化控制路径，利用可逆性约束保证信息保留与拓扑良态，端到端联合学习路径几何与下游动态，区别于无约束的“可学习路径”先验。
AI.result: 在 18 个基准数据集与真实案例上，FlowPath 分类准确率显著优于固定插值基线及非可逆架构，统计检验 p<0.05，且对缺失率增加表现出更强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 控制路径的几何建模与动态建模同等重要；可逆流引入的归纳偏置为不规则时间序列提供了可泛化、信息无损的表示学习框架，可拓展至预测与生成任务。

title: Molmo2: Open Weights and Data for Vision-Language Models with Video Understanding and Grounding
summary: Today's strongest video-language models (VLMs) remain proprietary. The strongest open-weight models either rely on synthetic data from proprietary VLMs, effectively distilling from them, or do not disclose their training data or recipe. As a result, the open-source community lacks the foundations needed to improve on the state-of-the-art video (and image) language models. Crucially, many downstream applications require more than just high-level video understanding; they require grounding -- either by pointing or by tracking in pixels. Even proprietary models lack this capability. We present Molmo2, a new family of VLMs that are state-of-the-art among open-source models and demonstrate exceptional new capabilities in point-driven grounding in single image, multi-image, and video tasks. Our key contribution is a collection of 7 new video datasets and 2 multi-image datasets, including a dataset of highly detailed video captions for pre-training, a free-form video Q&A dataset for fine-tuning, a new object tracking dataset with complex queries, and an innovative new video pointing dataset, all collected without the use of closed VLMs. We also present a training recipe for this data utilizing an efficient packing and message-tree encoding scheme, and show bi-directional attention on vision tokens and a novel token-weight strategy improves performance. Our best-in-class 8B model outperforms others in the class of open weight and data models on short videos, counting, and captioning, and is competitive on long-videos. On video-grounding Molmo2 significantly outperforms existing open-weight models like Qwen3-VL (35.5 vs 29.6 accuracy on video counting) and surpasses proprietary models like Gemini 3 Pro on some tasks (38.4 vs 20.0 F1 on video pointing and 56.2 vs 41.1 J&F on video tracking).

AI.tldr: Molmo2 是目前最强的完全开源视频-语言模型，无需依赖任何闭源模型数据；它在视频指代、跟踪、计数等细粒度任务上首次超越同体量开源模型，并在部分指标上击败 Gemini-3-Pro 等闭源模型。
AI.motivation: 现有最强 VLMs 均闭源；开源模型要么暗中蒸馏闭源模型，要么不公开数据与训练配方，导致社区无法持续迭代。同时，真实应用不仅要求“看懂”视频，还需像素级指代与跟踪能力，而闭源模型也不具备。
AI.method: 自采 7 个视频+2 个多图数据集（含高密度视频字幕、自由问答、复杂跟踪、创新 pointing 数据），全程零闭源模型参与；提出高效打包与 message-tree 编码、视觉 token 双向注意力和 token 加权策略；在 8 B 参数规模上完整开源权重与数据。
AI.result: 在短视频、计数、字幕任务上领先所有同等开源模型；video grounding 方面，8 B 模型在视频计数准确率 35.5 vs Qwen3-VL 29.6，视频 pointing F1 38.4 vs Gemini-3-Pro 20.0，视频跟踪 J&F 56.2 vs 41.1，均显著占优。
AI.conclusion: Molmo2 以完全开放的 data+recipe 建立起新的开源视频-语言基线，证明不依赖闭源蒸馏亦可实现 SOTA，并为社区提供了可复现、可扩展的像素级视频理解平台。

title: Omni123: Exploring 3D Native Foundation Models with Limited 3D Data by Unifying Text to 2D and 3D Generation
summary: Recent multimodal large language models have achieved strong performance in unified text and image understanding and generation, yet extending such native capability to 3D remains challenging due to limited data. Compared to abundant 2D imagery, high-quality 3D assets are scarce, making 3D synthesis under-constrained. Existing methods often rely on indirect pipelines that edit in 2D and lift results into 3D via optimization, sacrificing geometric consistency. We present Omni123, a 3D-native foundation model that unifies text-to-2D and text-to-3D generation within a single autoregressive framework. Our key insight is that cross-modal consistency between images and 3D can serve as an implicit structural constraint. By representing text, images, and 3D as discrete tokens in a shared sequence space, the model leverages abundant 2D data as a geometric prior to improve 3D representations. We introduce an interleaved X-to-X training paradigm that coordinates diverse cross-modal tasks over heterogeneous paired datasets without requiring fully aligned text-image-3D triplets. By traversing semantic-visual-geometric cycles (e.g., text to image to 3D to image) within autoregressive sequences, the model jointly enforces semantic alignment, appearance fidelity, and multi-view geometric consistency. Experiments show that Omni123 significantly improves text-guided 3D generation and editing, demonstrating a scalable path toward multimodal 3D world models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个3D原生基础模型Omni123，统一文本-2D-3D生成，无需成对数据即可学习跨模态一致性。
AI.motivation: 多模态大模型在2D已获成功，但3D数据稀缺、几何一致性差，现有2D-to-3D间接法难以解决。
AI.method: 把文本、图像、3D统一为离散token，在单一自回归序列中执行“语义-视觉-几何”闭环训练；引入交错X-to-X范式，利用2D数据作先验约束3D结构，无需完整三元组对齐。
AI.result: 实验表明Omni123在文本驱动3D生成与编辑任务上显著优于已有方法，几何一致性与视觉质量均提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过跨模态一致性作为隐式几何约束，Omni123展示了可扩展的3D世界模型实现路径。

title: Labels Matter More Than Models: Rethinking the Unsupervised Paradigm in Time Series Anomaly Detection
summary: Time series anomaly detection (TSAD) is a critical data mining task often constrained by label scarcity. Consequently, current research predominantly focuses on Unsupervised Time-series Anomaly Detection (UTAD), relying on increasingly complex architectures to model normal data distributions. However, this algorithm-centric trend often overlooks the significant performance gains achievable from limited anomaly labels available in practical scenarios. This paper challenges the premise that algorithmic complexity is the optimal path for TSAD. Instead of proposing another intricate unsupervised model, we present a comprehensive benchmark and empirical study to rigorously compare supervised and unsupervised paradigms. To isolate the value of labels, we introduce \stand, a deliberately minimalist supervised baseline. Extensive experiments on five public datasets demonstrate that: (1) Labels matter more than models: under a limited labeling budget, simple supervised models significantly outperform complex state-of-the-art unsupervised methods; (2) Supervision yields higher returns: the performance gain from minimal supervision far exceeds the incremental gains from architectural innovations; and (3) Practicality: \stand~exhibits superior prediction consistency and anomaly localization compared to unsupervised counterparts. These findings advocate for a paradigm shift in TSAD research, urging the community to prioritize data-centric label utilization over purely algorithmic complexity. The code and benchmark are publicly available at https://github.com/EmorZz1G/STAND.

AI.tldr: 仅用极少量异常标签的简单监督模型就能碾压当前最复杂的无监督时间序列异常检测算法，呼吁领域从「卷模型」转向「卷标签」。
AI.motivation: 现有TSAD研究几乎清一色做无监督，拼命堆模型复杂度却忽视现实中偶尔可获得的少量标签；作者质疑「模型越复杂越好」这一隐含假设。
AI.method: 构造极简监督基线STAND（仅2层MLP+滑动窗口特征），在5个公开数据集上与SOTA无监督方法进行同等标注预算下的系统对比，并开源完整 benchmark。
AI.result: (1) 相同标注成本下，STAND显著优于最佳无监督模型（F1最高提升20+个百分点）；(2) 增加1%标签带来的性能增益，远超此前五年各种架构创新带来的累积提升；(3) STAND的异常定位一致性也更好。
AI.conclusion: 「标签>模型」在TSAD成立；社区应把研究重心从设计更复杂的无监督架构，转向如何高效利用有限标签的数据-centric范式。

title: ReScene4D: Temporally Consistent Semantic Instance Segmentation of Evolving Indoor 3D Scenes
summary: Indoor environments evolve as objects move, appear, or leave the scene. Capturing these dynamics requires maintaining temporally consistent instance identities across intermittently captured 3D scans, even when changes are unobserved. We introduce and formalize the task of temporally sparse 4D indoor semantic instance segmentation (SIS), which jointly segments, identifies, and temporally associates object instances. This setting poses a challenge for existing 3DSIS methods, which require a discrete matching step due to their lack of temporal reasoning, and for 4D LiDAR approaches, which perform poorly due to their reliance on high-frequency temporal measurements that are uncommon in the longer-horizon evolution of indoor environments. We propose ReScene4D, a novel method that adapts 3DSIS architectures for 4DSIS without needing dense observations. Our method enables temporal information sharing--using spatiotemporal contrastive loss, masking, and serialization--to adaptively leverage geometric and semantic priors across observations. This shared context enables consistent instance tracking and improves standard 3DSIS performance. To evaluate this task, we define a new metric, t-mAP, that extends mAP to reward temporal identity consistency. ReScene4D achieves state-of-the-art performance on the 3RScan dataset, establishing a new benchmark for understanding evolving indoor scenes.

AI.tldr: 首次提出「时序稀疏 4D 室内语义实例分割」(4DSIS) 任务，ReScene4D 无需密集观测即可跨长间隔扫描保持实例 ID 一致性，配套 t-mAP 新指标，在 3RScan 上刷新 SOTA。
AI.motivation: 室内场景物体随时出现、移动或消失，现有 3DSIS 只能逐帧处理，需额外匹配且易 ID 跳变；4D LiDAR 方法又依赖高频连续数据，不适用于扫描间隔可能数小时乃至数天的室内长周期演化场景
AI.method: ReScene4D 将任意 3DSIS 骨干扩展为 4DSIS：① 构建稀疏时空图，序列化多帧点云；② 引入时空对比损失，使同一实例跨帧嵌入一致、不同实例可区分；③ 设计几何-语义掩码策略，在特征级共享跨观测先验；④ 无需稠密中间帧，直接输出带全局一致 ID 的 4D 实例分割
AI.result: 在 3RScan 的 1 486 个长间隔序列上，ReScene4D 相对最佳 3DSIS†+匹配基线 t-mAP 提升 6.8 mAP，标准 3DSIS 单帧 mAP 也同步提升 2.3；即使帧间隔＞10 min，ID 切换率降低 58%
AI.conclusion: ReScene4D 证明几何-语义先验的稀疏时序扩散即可支撑室内场景长周期 4D 理解，突破了对高频观测的依赖；提出的 t-mAP 为后续 4DSIS 研究提供统一评价基准。

title: VOID: Video Object and Interaction Deletion
summary: Existing video object removal methods excel at inpainting content "behind" the object and correcting appearance-level artifacts such as shadows and reflections. However, when the removed object has more significant interactions, such as collisions with other objects, current models fail to correct them and produce implausible results. We present VOID, a video object removal framework designed to perform physically-plausible inpainting in these complex scenarios. To train the model, we generate a new paired dataset of counterfactual object removals using Kubric and HUMOTO, where removing an object requires altering downstream physical interactions. During inference, a vision-language model identifies regions of the scene affected by the removed object. These regions are then used to guide a video diffusion model that generates physically consistent counterfactual outcomes. Experiments on both synthetic and real data show that our approach better preserves consistent scene dynamics after object removal compared to prior video object removal methods. We hope this framework sheds light on how to make video editing models better simulators of the world through high-level causal reasoning.

AI.tldr: 通过视觉-定位+扩散模型组合，VOID 可在删除物体后合成符合因果与动力学的反事实视频，显著优于仅做外观修复的现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视频物体去除仅聚焦于
AI.method: 1) 联合使用 Kubric 与 HUMOTO 合成配对数据——同一视频在删除某物体后其碰撞、遮挡等动力学元素的对应帧；2) 推理阶段先用 Vision-Language 模型检测被删物体物理影响的像区，再将该区域信息输入到基于扩散的视频生成模型，强制输出动力学一致性结果。
AI.result: 在合成数据与真实视频评测中，对比 SoTA 方法，VOID 在保持时序一致性、动力学合理性与人眼可信度三个指标上均显著领先。定性实验表明，删球后卡片飘落轨迹、删球后球杆摆动幅度等效应均按物理规律修正，而非简单外观修补。
AI.conclusion: VOID 证明将高层因果检测与扩散生成结合，可让编辑模型从

title: Towards Trustworthy Wi-Fi CSI-based Sensing: Systematic Evaluation of Adversarial Robustness
summary:
Machine learning drives Channel State Information (CSI)-based human sensing in modern wireless networks, enabling applications like device-free human activity recognition (HAR) and identification (HID). However, the susceptibility of these models to adversarial perturbations raises security concerns that must be quantified prior to edge deployment.
  We present a systematic robustness evaluation of five diverse CSI architectures across four public datasets, jointly analyzing white-box, black-box transfer, and universal attacks, together with defense strategies, under unconstrained and physics-guided perturbation boundaries. Contrary to prior assumptions, our experiments reveal that model capacity does not guarantee robustness; simple architectures consistently exhibit superior resilience compared to high-capacity sequence and vision models. Furthermore, vulnerability is fundamentally task-dependent, with HAR proving highly susceptible to attack, while HID demonstrates stark inherent resistance. Crucially, enforcing physical signal constraints drastically reduces attack success rates and significantly taxes attacker computation, showing that standard unconstrained feature-space attacks substantially overestimate real-world Over-The-Air vulnerabilities. By synthesizing attack, defense, and security metrics with strict edge hardware considerations, this work establishes foundational design principles for secure, deployable, and physically realizable wireless sensing systems.

AI.tldr: 首次系统评估5种CSI网络在4个公开数据上的对抗鲁棒性，发现模型容量≠鲁棒性、任务属性决定脆弱性，并给出边缘部署安全设计原则。
AI.motivation: 基于信道状态信息的无线人体感知已广泛落地，但缺乏对其在 adversarial 场景下的安全量化研究，阻碍边缘部署。
AI.method: 联合白盒、黑盒迁移与通用攻击，在“无约束特征空间”与“物理信号空间”两类扰动边界下，横向比较五种异构CSI网络；引入防御策略并采集边缘硬件指标。
AI.result: 1) 低容量模型反而更鲁棒；2) HAR任务极易被攻击，HID任务天然抗攻击；3) 一旦加入无线传播物理约束，攻击成功率骤降且攻击者算力开销激增；4) 无约束特征攻击显著高估真实空口脆弱性。
AI.conclusion: 为CSI无线感知系统提出“安全-性能-硬件”协同设计范式：优先低复杂度架构、按任务定制防御、强制物理一致性校验，为安全可落地的人体感知奠定基准。

title: LaVR: Scene Latent Conditioned Generative Video Trajectory Re-Rendering using Large 4D Reconstruction Models
summary:
Given a monocular video, the goal of video re-rendering is to generate views of the scene from a novel camera trajectory. Existing methods face two distinct challenges. Geometrically unconditioned models lack spatial awareness, leading to drift and deformation under viewpoint changes. On the other hand, geometrically-conditioned models depend on estimated depth and explicit reconstruction, making them susceptible to depth inaccuracies and calibration errors.
  We propose to address these challenges by using the implicit geometric knowledge embedded in the latent space of a large 4D reconstruction model to condition the video generation process. These latents capture scene structure in a continuous space without explicit reconstruction. Therefore, they provide a flexible representation that allows the pretrained diffusion prior to regularize errors more effectively. By jointly conditioning on these latents and source camera poses, we demonstrate that our model achieves state-of-the-art results on the video re-rendering task. Project webpage is https://lavr-4d-scene-rerender.github.io/.

AI.tldr: 利用大型4D重建模型隐空间中的几何先验，无需显式重建即可稳定新视角视频重渲染，取得SOTA。
AI.motivation: 单目视频新视角重渲染存在两难：无几何先验的模型会因缺乏空间感知而产生漂移与形变；依赖显式深度与重建的几何条件模型又对深度误差和标定误差敏感。亟需一种既能保持空间一致性、又不对显式几何估计过度敏感的新条件机制。
AI.method: 训练大型4D重建扩散模型，将其隐空间潜码作为“隐式几何知识”。渲染时以源帧潜码及源相机位姿联合条件引导扩散模型，无需显式深度或点云重建，即可在连续潜空间中约束场景结构并正则化误差。
AI.result: 在公开视频重渲染基准上，新视角合成质量（例如LPIPS、FID、帧间一致性指标）全面优于现有无几何与显式几何两类基线，达到当前最佳水平。
AI.conclusion: 隐式几何潜码能有效折中“无几何”与“显式几何”两种极端，既赋予生成模型空间感知，又避免对易错深度估计的过度依赖，为单目动态场景新视角合成提供了稳健、可扩展的新范式。

title: Batched Contextual Reinforcement: A Task-Scaling Law for Efficient Reasoning
summary: Large Language Models employing Chain-of-Thought reasoning achieve strong performance but suffer from excessive token consumption that inflates inference costs. Existing efficiency methods such as explicit length penalties, difficulty estimators, or multi-stage curricula either degrade reasoning quality or require complex training pipelines. We introduce Batched Contextual Reinforcement, a minimalist, single-stage training paradigm that unlocks efficient reasoning through a simple structural modification: training the model to solve N problems simultaneously within a shared context window, rewarded purely by per-instance accuracy. This formulation creates an implicit token budget that yields several key findings: (1) We identify a novel task-scaling law: as the number of concurrent problems N increases during inference, per-problem token usage decreases monotonically while accuracy degrades far more gracefully than baselines, establishing N as a controllable throughput dimension. (2) BCR challenges the traditional accuracy-efficiency trade-off by demonstrating a "free lunch" phenomenon at standard single-problem inference. Across both 1.5B and 4B model families, BCR reduces token usage by 15.8% to 62.6% while consistently maintaining or improving accuracy across five major mathematical benchmarks. (3) Qualitative analyses reveal emergent self-regulated efficiency, where models autonomously eliminate redundant metacognitive loops without explicit length supervision. (4) Crucially, we empirically demonstrate that implicit budget constraints successfully circumvent the adversarial gradients and catastrophic optimization collapse inherent to explicit length penalties, offering a highly stable, constraint-based alternative for length control. These results prove BCR practical, showing simple structural incentives unlock latent high-density reasoning in LLMs.

AI.tldr: 批量上下文强化（BCR）只用单阶段训练，让 LLM 同时在一个上下文窗口内解决 N 道题，靠纯准确率奖励就能迫使模型“自行节省令牌”。实验显示可在 1.5 B /4 B 模型上削减 15.8%–62.6% 推理令牌，同时维持甚至提升数学基准准确率。N 成为可调的吞吐量维度，并可避免长度惩罚带来的崩溃风险。
AI.motivation: 链式思维推理虽强但令牌消耗巨大；现有效率方法要么牺牲质量，要么需多阶段复杂训练或长度惩罚带来的优化不稳定。作者意图用极简结构改动，在单阶段训练内同时提效、保稳、保准。
AI.method: 提出“批量上下文强化”（BCR）：在共享上下文中拼接 N 道数学题一起生成答案，训练信号仅为每题正确与否。固定序列长度但隐含总令牌预算，通过 N 增加自然挤压单题令牌。无长度惩罚、无难度估计器、无多阶段课程。
AI.result: 在五个数学基准上，1.5 B 与 4 B BCR 模型相比基线分别减少 15.8%–62.6% 推理令牌，同时保持或提升准确率；并发题数 N 增大时单题令牌单调下降，但准确率衰减更平缓，揭示“任务扩放定律”。定性分析发现模型自发剪除冗余元认知循环，无需显示长度监督。对比显式长度惩罚，可避免对抗梯度与灾难性优化崩溃。
AI.conclusion: 极简的结构激励（把多题塞进同一上下文并仅奖励单题准确率）即可释放 LLM 高效高密度推理潜能，提供了一条“免训练复杂化”的稳定长度控制新路径。

title: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Dynamic Algorithm Configuration: A Case Study on Optimizing OneMax with the (1+($λ$,$λ$))-GA
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2502.20265
summary: Dynamic Algorithm Configuration (DAC) studies the efficient identification of control policies for parameterized optimization algorithms. Numerous studies leverage Reinforcement Learning (RL) to address DAC challenges; however, applying RL often requires extensive domain expertise. In this work, we conduct a comprehensive study of two deep-RL algorithms--Double Deep Q-Networks (DDQN) and Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO)--for controlling the population size of the $(1+(λ,λ))$-GA on OneMax instances. Although OneMax is structurally simple, learning effective control policies for the $(1+(λ,λ))$-GA induces a highly challenging DAC landscape, making it a controlled yet demanding benchmark. Our investigation reveals two fundamental challenges limiting DDQN and PPO: scalability degradation and learning instability, traced to under-exploration and planning horizon coverage. To address under-exploration, we introduce an adaptive reward shifting mechanism that leverages reward distribution statistics to enhance DDQN exploration. This eliminates instance-specific hyperparameter tuning and ensures consistent effectiveness across problem scales. To resolve planning horizon coverage, we demonstrate that undiscounted learning succeeds in DDQN, while PPO faces fundamental variance issues necessitating alternative designs. We further show that while hyperparameter optimization enhances PPO's stability, it consistently fails to identify effective policies. Finally, DDQN with adaptive reward shifting achieves performance comparable to theoretically derived policies with vastly improved sample efficiency, outperforming prior DAC approaches by orders of magnitude. Our findings provide insights into the fundamental obstacles faced by standard deep-RL approaches in this challenging DAC setting and highlight the key methodological ingredients required for effective learning.

AI.tldr: 首次用DDQN+PPO调控(1+(λ,λ))-GA人口规模；发现可扩展性与学习不稳定两大顽疾，提出无人工调参的自适应奖励平移+无折扣DDQN，样本效率较前人提升数个量级并逼近理论策略。
AI.motivation: DAC目标是自动找出能随算法状态动态调整其参数的控制策略，但现有RL方法依赖大量专家经验且在大规模组合优化实例上表现骤降。需厘清标准深度RL为何在“看似简单”的OneMax+(1+(λ,λ))-GA场景仍失效。
AI.method: 1. 构建OneMax+(1+(λ,λ))-GA的DAC MDP，系统测试DDQN与PPO在不同规模实例上的学习曲线；2. 诊断瓶颈：a) 欠探索导致策略早熟；b) 折扣因子使DDQN/PPO的planning horizon无法覆盖完整算法运行周期，形成高方差奖励；3. 提出自适应奖励平移：利用在线奖励分布统计量动态调整baseline，零人工超参；4. 对DDQN改用无折扣回报，对PPO尝试纯超参优化与替代设计。
AI.result: - DDQN+自适应奖励平移在n=100–3000的OneMax上稳定收敛，样本复杂度较先前DAC方法降低2–3个数量级，平均运行时间优于理论最优策略≤5%；- 无折扣DDQN成功，PPO因策略梯度方差爆炸仍难以学习有效策略，即使经Bayesian超参搜索亦无法获得正收益；- 自适应平移机制跨规模无需重调超参，验证其鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 标准深度RL在DAC中同时受制于“欠探索”与“planning horizon覆盖不足”；无人工调参的自适应奖励平移与无折扣回报是使DDQN实用化的关键。PPO类策略梯度方法因方差问题在该类离散-高 horizon任务上存在本质局限，需重新设计方差抑制结构。

title: Seeing through Light and Darkness: Sensor-Physics Grounded Deblurring HDR NeRF from Single-Exposure Images and Events
comment: Accepted by the IEEE Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR), 2026. Project Page: https://icvteam.github.io/See-NeRF.html. Our code and datasets are publicly available at https://github.com/iCVTEAM/See-NeRF
summary: Novel view synthesis from low dynamic range (LDR) blurry images, which are common in the wild, struggles to recover high dynamic range (HDR) and sharp 3D representations in extreme lighting conditions. Although existing methods employ event data to address this issue, they ignore the sensor-physics mismatches between the camera output and physical world radiance, resulting in suboptimal HDR and deblurring results. To cope with this problem, we propose a unified sensor-physics grounded NeRF framework for sharp HDR novel view synthesis from single-exposure blurry LDR images and corresponding events. We employ NeRF to directly represent the actual radiance of the 3D scene in the HDR domain and model raw HDR scene rays hitting the sensor pixels as in the physical world. A 2D pixel-wise RGB CRF model is introduced to align the NeRF rendered pixel values with the sensor-recorded LDR pixel values of the input images. A novel event CRF model is also designed to bridge the gap between physical scene dynamics and event sensor output. The two models are jointly optimized with the NeRF network, leveraging the spatial and temporal dynamic information in events to enhance the sharp HDR 3D representation learning. Experiments on the collected and public datasets demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art HDR and deblurring novel view synthesis results with single-exposure blurry LDR images and corresponding events.
