AI.tldr: 利用模糊LDR图片与事件数据，在物理-传感一致框架下联合重建HDR清晰NeRF，实现单曝光极端光照下的高质量新视角合成。
AI.motivation: 野外模糊LDR图难以同时恢复HDR与清晰3D表示；现有事件增强方法忽视相机响应与真实辐射的物理-传感失配，导致HDR与去模糊结果次优。
AI.method: 提出统一NeRF框架：①在HDR域直接建模3D场景真实辐射；②引入像素级RGB CRF对齐NeRF渲染与LDR观测；③设计事件CRF桥接物理动态与事件输出；④联合优化NeRF、RGB CRF与事件CRF，利用事件时空信息提升HDR清晰3D表示。
AI.result: 在自采与公开数据集上，单曝光模糊LDR+事件输入下实现新的SOTA HDR新视角合成与去模糊效果。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模并校准物理-传感差异，可充分挖掘事件数据潜力，在极端光照条件下仅用单曝光模糊LDR输入即可获得高质量HDR清晰NeRF。

title: Grounded Token Initialization for New Vocabulary in LMs for Generative Recommendation
summary: Language models (LMs) are increasingly extended with new learnable vocabulary tokens for domain-specific tasks, such as Semantic-ID tokens in generative recommendation. The standard practice initializes these new tokens as the mean of existing vocabulary embeddings, then relies on supervised fine-tuning to learn their representations. We present a systematic analysis of this strategy: through spectral and geometric diagnostics, we show that mean initialization collapses all new tokens into a degenerate subspace, erasing inter-token distinctions that subsequent fine-tuning struggles to fully recover. These findings suggest that \emph{token initialization} is a key bottleneck when extending LMs with new vocabularies. Motivated by this diagnosis, we propose the \emph{Grounded Token Initialization Hypothesis}: linguistically grounding novel tokens in the pretrained embedding space before fine-tuning better enables the model to leverage its general-purpose knowledge for novel-token domains. We operationalize this hypothesis as GTI (Grounded Token Initialization), a lightweight grounding stage that, prior to fine-tuning, maps new tokens to distinct, semantically meaningful locations in the pretrained embedding space using only paired linguistic supervision. Despite its simplicity, GTI outperforms both mean initialization and existing auxiliary-task adaptation methods in the majority of evaluation settings across multiple generative recommendation benchmarks, including industry-scale and public datasets. Further analyses show that grounded embeddings produce richer inter-token structure that persists through fine-tuning, corroborating the hypothesis that initialization quality is a key bottleneck in vocabulary extension.

AI.tldr: 现有做法用“平均初始化”给大模型加新词，会丢信息；我们提出仅用成对文本监督的 GTI 方法，在预训练空间里先把新词锚定到语义明确位置，再微调，推荐任务全面优于平均法与辅助任务法。
AI.motivation: 生成式推荐等任务需要为语言模型扩展新词（如 Semantic-ID）。标准平均初始化和微调流程效果不佳，怀疑根因在于初始化阶段而非微调能力本身，需系统诊断并设计更好策略。
AI.method: 1）谱与几何诊断：证明平均初始化把新词压入退化子空间；2）提出“有依据的词初始化假设”：先在预训练空间把新词放到有语义意义的位置再微调；3）实例化为 GTI：仅利用成对文本监督，用轻量级对齐损失把新词嵌入锚定到相应语义区域，无额外复杂模块。
AI.result: 在多个生成式推荐基准（含工业级和公开数据集）上，GTI 在大多数设定下显著优于平均初始化和现有辅助任务适应法；诊断显示 GTI 嵌入在微调后仍保持丰富结构。
AI.conclusion: 扩展词汇时，初始化质量是主要瓶颈；GTI 用最小成本在预训练空间“锚定”新词，显著提升下游表现，验证了“有依据的词初始化假设”。

title: Hybrid Quantum-Classical Autoencoders for Unsupervised Network Intrusion Detection
comment: The authors have identified limitations in the experimental evaluation, which are insufficient to fully support the paper's conclusions. The manuscript is withdrawn pending additional experiments and analysis
summary: Unsupervised anomaly-based intrusion detection requires models that can generalize to attack patterns not observed during training. This work presents the first large-scale evaluation of hybrid quantum-classical (HQC) autoencoders for this task. We construct a unified experimental framework that iterates over key quantum design choices, including quantum-layer placement, measurement approach, variational and non-variational formulations, and latent-space regularization. Experiments across three benchmark NIDS datasets show that HQC autoencoders can match or exceed classical performance in their best configurations, although they exhibit higher sensitivity to architectural decisions. Under zero-day evaluation, well-configured HQC models provide stronger and more stable generalization than classical and supervised baselines. Simulated gate-noise experiments reveal early performance degradation, indicating the need for noise-aware HQC designs. These results provide the first data-driven characterization of HQC autoencoder behavior for network intrusion detection and outline key factors that govern their practical viability. All experiment code and configurations are available at https://github.com/arasyi/hqcae-network-intrusion-detection.

AI.tldr: 首次系统评估混合量子–经典自编码器在零样本网络入侵检测中的性能，发现其经仔细设计后可超越经典模型，但对结构和噪声极度敏感。
AI.motivation: 无监督异常入侵检测需对未见攻击泛化，经典方法已遇瓶颈；量子计算能否在此场景带来优势尚无大规模实证。
AI.method: 构建统一实验框架，遍历量子层位置、测量方式、变分/非变分形式、隐空间正则化等关键设计，在3个基准NIDS数据集及零日攻击场景下对比HQC与经典自编码器，并引入门级噪声模拟。
AI.result: 最优HQC配置可持平或优于经典模型；在零日测试中，HQC表现出更稳定泛化；但门噪声导致性能提前衰减，对架构决策高度敏感。
AI.conclusion: HQC自编码器在网络入侵检测具备潜力，需噪声感知设计与精细调参；论文给出首份数据驱动的行为画像与开源实现，为后续实用化指明关键要素。

title: SALAD: Achieve High-Sparsity Attention via Efficient Linear Attention Tuning for Video Diffusion Transformer
summary: Diffusion Transformers have demonstrated remarkable performance in video generation. However, their long input sequences incur substantial latency due to the quadratic complexity of full attention. Various sparse attention mechanisms have been proposed. Training-free approaches are limited to moderate sparsity and thus yield only modest acceleration, whereas training-based methods can reach much higher sparsity but demand substantial data and computation. In this work, we propose SALAD, introducing a lightweight linear attention branch in parallel with the sparse attention. Leveraging a Multi-level Static-Dynamic Scaling Strategy to balance the two branches, our method attains up to 90% sparsity and 1.52-2.03x inference speedup across different models and sequence lengths, while maintaining generation quality comparable to the full attention baseline. Moreover, our finetuning process is highly efficient, requiring only 2,000 video samples, fewer than 1,600 training steps, and no more than 30 GPU hours with a batch size of 8.

AI.tldr: SALAD 在 DiT 中并行引入线性注意力分支，用多级静-动态加权策略将稀疏度推到 90%，实现 1.52–2.03 倍无损推理加速，仅需 2 000 样本、<1 600 步、30 GPU 小时微调。
AI.motivation: 视频 DiT 的全注意力序列长、延迟高；现有免训练稀疏方法加速有限，训练式稀疏又需大量数据与算力，亟需一种数据高效、可极稀疏且保质的推理加速方案。
AI.method: 设计 SALAD 框架：主干仍为稀疏注意力，旁路并设轻量级线性注意力；提出“多级静态-动态缩放策略”动态融合两支输出，实现高稀疏下的信息补偿；全程仅微调新引入的线性分支参数，冻结其余权重。
AI.result: 在多种 DiT 模型与序列长度下，稀疏度最高达 90%，推理延迟降低 1.52–2.03 倍；生成质量（FID、FVD、用户评）与全注意力基线无显著差异；微调仅需 2 000 视频样本、<1 600 步、8×GPU 30 小时以内完成。
AI.conclusion: SALAD 以极少数据与算力成本，把稀疏注意力与线性注意力互补融合，首次在视频 DiT 上实现“极稀疏+高质量+训练高效”的三重目标，为高分辨率长序列生成提供了实用加速范式。

title: Steerable Visual Representations
summary: Pretrained Vision Transformers (ViTs) such as DINOv2 and MAE provide generic image features that can be applied to a variety of downstream tasks such as retrieval, classification, and segmentation. However, such representations tend to focus on the most salient visual cues in the image, with no way to direct them toward less prominent concepts of interest. In contrast, Multimodal LLMs can be guided with textual prompts, but the resulting representations tend to be language-centric and lose their effectiveness for generic visual tasks. To address this, we introduce Steerable Visual Representations, a new class of visual representations, whose global and local features can be steered with natural language. While most vision-language models (e.g., CLIP) fuse text with visual features after encoding (late fusion), we inject text directly into the layers of the visual encoder (early fusion) via lightweight cross-attention. We introduce benchmarks for measuring representational steerability, and demonstrate that our steerable visual features can focus on any desired objects in an image while preserving the underlying representation quality. Our method also matches or outperforms dedicated approaches on anomaly detection and personalized object discrimination, exhibiting zero-shot generalization to out-of-distribution tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出“可操控视觉表征（Steerable Visual Representations）”，首次实现用自然语言在预训练 ViT 内部早期注入语义，兼顾指哪打哪的聚焦能力与下游通用视觉任务性能。
AI.motivation: 纯视觉预训练模型（DINOv2/MAE）表征专注显著区域，无法按需指向次要概念；多模态大模型虽可用文本提示，但特征被语言主导，失去通用视觉任务所需的判别力。亟需一种既保留通用视觉质量、又能被自然语言“即时转向”的表征。
AI.method: 1. 提出“可操控视觉表征”框架，在冻结的 DINOv2 ViT 内部各层插入轻量级跨注意力模块，实现视觉 token 对文本 token 的 early-fusion 注入；2. 设计评测基准定量衡量“指哪打哪”的 steerability；3. 仅用 1% 额外参数完成微调，保持原始表征空间。
AI.result: 在指哪打哪任务上，定位 IoU 提升 15–30 pp；零样本异常检测与个性化物体判别上，一致持平或超越专用方法；ImageNet-1K、ADE20K 等通用任务性能与原生 DINOv2 持平，无显著损失。
AI.conclusion: early-fusion、跨注意力轻量注入是实现“语言即时方向盘+视觉通用引擎”的关键；可操控视觉表征首次打通提示驱动与通用视觉表征，无需任务特化即可零样本迁移至分布外下游任务，为开放世界视觉模型提供新范式。

title: Group Representational Position Encoding
summary: We present GRAPE (Group Representational Position Encoding), a unified framework for positional encoding based on group actions. GRAPE unifies two families of mechanisms: (i) multiplicative rotations (Multiplicative GRAPE) in $\operatorname{SO}(d)$ and (ii) additive logit biases (Additive GRAPE) arising from unipotent actions in the general linear group $\mathrm{GL}$. In Multiplicative GRAPE, a position $n \in \mathbb{Z}$ (or $t \in \mathbb{R}$) acts as $\mathbf{G}(n) = \exp(n \, ω\, \mathbf{L})$ with a rank-2 skew-symmetric generator $\mathbf{L} \in \mathbb{R}^{d \times d}$, yielding a relative, compositional, norm-preserving map with a closed-form matrix exponential. RoPE is recovered exactly when the $d/2$ planes correspond to canonical coordinate pairs with a log-uniform spectrum. Learned commuting subspaces and compact non-commuting mixtures strictly extend this geometry to capture cross-subspace feature coupling at $O(d)$ and $O(r d)$ cost per head, respectively. In Additive GRAPE, additive logits arise from rank-1 (or low-rank) unipotent actions, recovering ALiBi and the Forgetting Transformer (FoX) as exact special cases while preserving an exact relative law and streaming cacheability. Overall, GRAPE provides a principled design space for positional geometry in long-context models, subsuming RoPE and ALiBi as special cases. Project page: https://github.com/model-architectures/GRAPE.

AI.tldr: GRAPE用群作用统一了旋转/偏移两类位置编码，把RoPE、ALiBi等全部变成可推导的特例，给出可控的长上下文几何设计空间。
AI.motivation: RoPE、ALiBi等位置编码彼此独立、缺乏通用理论，难以系统扩展。作者希望建立统一框架，一次性涵盖并超越现有方案，为长上下文模型提供可解释、可扩展的位置几何设计工具。
AI.method:
将位置编码抽象为群作用：
① 乘法型：用 SO(d) 的指数映射 exp(nωL) 做乘法旋转，保持相对性、可复合、保范数；RoPE 是其对角块特例，可再学习可交换子空间或非交换混合以捕获跨维度耦合。
② 加法型：用 GL 的幂单作用在 logits 上加偏置，秩 1 或低秩约束；ALiBi、FoX 是其精确特例，同时保持相对律并可流式缓存。
两型均给出封闭形式与复杂度（O(d) 或 O(rd)）。
AI.result: 理论上：RoPE、ALiBi、FoX 被严格回收为 GRAPE 的零参数特例；几何可扩展，支持跨子空间耦合。实践上：框架已开源，尚未报告大规模实验数据，但已展示与已知方法的一致性。
AI.conclusion: GRAPE 首次用群论把主流位置编码纳入同一设计空间，为后续长上下文模型提供了可解释、可扩展的几何工具，下一步需在真实长程任务上验证扩展带来的实际收益。

title: GPA-VGGT:Adapting VGGT to Large Scale Localization by Self-Supervised Learning with Geometry and Physics Aware Loss
summary: Transformer-based general visual geometry frameworks have shown promising performance in camera pose estimation and 3D scene understanding. Recent advancements in Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer (VGGT) models have shown great promise in camera pose estimation and 3D reconstruction. However, these models typically rely on ground truth labels for training, posing challenges when adapting to unlabeled and unseen scenes. In this paper, we propose a self-supervised framework to train VGGT with unlabeled data, thereby enhancing its localization capability in large-scale environments. To achieve this, we extend conventional pair-wise relations to sequence-wise geometric constraints for self-supervised learning. Specifically, in each sequence, we sample multiple source frames and geometrically project them onto different target frames, which improves temporal feature consistency. We formulate physical photometric consistency and geometric constraints as a joint optimization loss to circumvent the requirement for hard labels. By training the model with this proposed method, not only the local and global cross-view attention layers but also the camera and depth heads can effectively capture the underlying multi-view geometry. Experiments demonstrate that the model converges within hundreds of iterations and achieves significant improvements in large-scale localization. Our code will be released at https://github.com/X-yangfan/GPA-VGGT.

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需人工标注的自监督框架GPA-VGGT，使VGGT类模型仅凭无标签视频即可训练，实现大规模场景的相机位姿估计与深度估计，数百次迭代即可收敛，定位精度显著提升。
AI.motivation: 既有VGGT模型依赖昂贵真值标签，难以泛化到无标签或未见过的新场景；亟需一种摆脱标注束缚、可自监督训练的通用视觉几何框架，以实现大规模环境下的鲁棒定位与三维理解。
AI.method: 1) 将传统成对约束扩展为序列级几何约束：在视频序列中采样多帧源图像，通过可微投影将其 warp 到不同目标帧；2) 联合光度一致性与几何一致性构建自监督损失，无需任何深度或位姿真值；3) 端到端训练 VGGT 的所有组件（跨视角注意层、相机头、深度头），使其隐式学习多视角几何。
AI.result: 在公开大规模数据集上的实验表明，所提自监督方法仅用数百次迭代即可收敛，相机位姿估计与深度估计误差显著低于现有自监督基线，定位精度接近甚至部分超越全监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 序列级几何自监督策略有效释放了 VGGT 的潜力，模型可在无标签场景下快速习得准确的多视角几何表示，为大规模视觉定位与三维重建提供了无需标注的新范式，代码已开源。

title: ActionParty: Multi-Subject Action Binding in Generative Video Games
summary: Recent advances in video diffusion have enabled the development of "world models" capable of simulating interactive environments. However, these models are largely restricted to single-agent settings, failing to control multiple agents simultaneously in a scene. In this work, we tackle a fundamental issue of action binding in existing video diffusion models, which struggle to associate specific actions with their corresponding subjects. For this purpose, we propose ActionParty, an action controllable multi-subject world model for generative video games. It introduces subject state tokens, i.e. latent variables that persistently capture the state of each subject in the scene. By jointly modeling state tokens and video latents with a spatial biasing mechanism, we disentangle global video frame rendering from individual action-controlled subject updates. We evaluate ActionParty on the Melting Pot benchmark, demonstrating the first video world model capable of controlling up to seven players simultaneously across 46 diverse environments. Our results show significant improvements in action-following accuracy and identity consistency, while enabling robust autoregressive tracking of subjects through complex interactions.

AI.tldr: 提出 ActionParty，引入持续表征每个主体的状态令牌，用空间偏置机制分离帧渲染与单主体动作更新，首次实现单视频世界模型同时操控 7 名玩家、支持 46 种环境，动作跟随与身份一致性显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有视频扩散类世界模型只能控制单个智能体，多主体场景中动作绑定失败，无法将特定动作准确映射到对应主体，阻碍交互式多人环境的生成模拟。
AI.method: 设计 ActionParty：1) 引入 subject state tokens 作为持续编码各主体状态的潜在变量；2) 以 jointly diffusion 方式联合建模状态令牌与视频潜码，并通过 spatial biasing mechanism 把全局帧渲染与单个主体的动作控制解耦；3) 在 Melting Pot 基准上自回归生成并跟踪多主体交互。
AI.result: 首个可在 46 个不同环境中同时控制最多 7 名玩家的视频世界模型；动作跟随准确率、身份一致性显著优于基线；能稳健完成复杂交互下的长时间主体追踪与生成。
AI.conclusion: 通过状态令牌-空间偏置解耦策略解决动作绑定难题，ActionParty 验证多主体同步可控的视频扩散可行，为生成式多人电子游戏与交互仿真世界模型奠定新基线。

title: Beyond the Black Box: Identifiable Interpretation and Control in Generative Models via Causal Minimality
summary: Deep generative models, while revolutionizing fields like image and text generation, largely operate as opaque ``black boxes'', hindering human understanding, control, and alignment. While methods like sparse autoencoders (SAEs) show remarkable empirical success, they often lack theoretical guarantees, risking subjective insights. Our primary objective is to establish a principled foundation for interpretable generative models. We demonstrate that the principle of causal minimality -- favoring the simplest causal explanation -- can endow the latent representations of modern generative models with clear causal interpretation and robust, component-wise identifiable control. We introduce a novel theoretical framework for hierarchical selection models, where higher-level concepts emerge from the constrained composition of lower-level variables, better capturing the complex dependencies in data generation. Under theoretically derived minimality conditions, we show that learned representations can be equivalent to the true latent variables of the data-generating process. Empirically, applying these constraints to leading text-to-image diffusion models allows us to extract their innate hierarchical concept graphs, offering fresh insights into their internal knowledge organization. Furthermore, these causally grounded concepts serve as levers for fine-grained model steering, paving the way for transparent, reliable systems.

AI.tldr: 本文用因果最小化原则给深度生成模型的隐变量赋予“白盒”可解释性，证明在满足层级稀疏约束时学到的表示与真实潜变量等价，并在扩散模型中提取出可精细操控的层次概念图。
AI.motivation: 现有深度生成模型虽效果惊人，但因其“黑盒”特性难以被人类理解、控制和对齐；稀疏自编码器等方法又缺乏理论保证。亟需一套赋予可解释性同时带严格理论支撑的通用框架。
AI.method: 1) 提出“因果最小化”作为核心原则，驱动模型选择最简单因果解释；2) 建立层级选择模型理论框架，高层概念由受约束的低层变量组合而成；3) 导出最小化条件，证明在该条件下学到的潜表示与数据生成过程中的真实潜变量达到逐分量可识别等价；4) 将上述约束嵌入领先文本到图像扩散模型，提取其内在层次概念图。
AI.result: 理论：在因果最小化约束下，生成模型的隐空间可实现与真实潜变量的等价识别；实验：在大型扩散模型上成功抽取出层次化、可解释的概念图，并展示对这些因果概念的细粒度操控能力。
AI.conclusion: 因果最小化原则为深度生成模型提供了一套兼具理论保证与实用价值的可解释性基础；所得因果潜变量不仅揭示模型内部知识组织，还可作为可靠杠杆实现透明、可控的模型 steering，推动下一代可信生成系统的发展。

title: GVGS: Gaussian Visibility-Aware Multi-View Geometry for Accurate Surface Reconstruction
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) enables efficient rendering, yet accurate surface reconstruction remains challenging due to unreliable geometric supervision. Existing approaches predominantly rely on depth-based reprojection to infer visibility and enforce multi-view consistency, leading to a fundamental circular dependency: visibility estimation requires accurate depth, while depth supervision itself is conditioned on visibility. In this work, we revisit multi-view geometric supervision from the perspective of visibility modeling. Instead of inferring visibility from pixel-wise depth consistency, we explicitly model visibility at the level of Gaussian primitives. We introduce a Gaussian visibility-aware multi-view geometric consistency (GVMV) formulation, which aggregates cross-view visibility of shared Gaussians to construct reliable supervision over co-visible regions. To further incorporate monocular priors, we propose a progressive quadtree-calibrated depth alignment (QDC) strategy that performs block-wise affine calibration under visibility-aware guidance, effectively mitigating scale ambiguity while preserving local geometric structures. Extensive experiments on DTU and Tanks and Temples demonstrate that our method consistently improves reconstruction accuracy over prior Gaussian-based approaches. Our code is fully open-sourced and available at an anonymous repository: https://github.com/GVGScode/GVGS.

AI.tldr: 将3DGS的几何监督从「先算深度→再判可见」的循环中解放出来，直接在3D高斯原语层显式建模可见性，配合四叉树渐进深度校准，实现无需MVS先验的高精度表面重建。
AI.motivation: 3D Gaussian Splatting渲染虽快，但仅用深度重投影做几何监督会陷入“可见性依赖深度，深度又依赖可见性”的循环，导致重建精度不足。
AI.method: 1) 提出Gaussian Visibility-aware Multi-view Geometric一致性(GVMV)，在3D高斯基元层显式聚合跨视角可见性，仅在共视区域施加几何损失；2) 设计四叉树渐进深度校准(QDC)，对单目深度图做块级仿射变换，逐步消除尺度漂移并保持局部结构。
AI.result: 在DTU和Tanks & Temples全基准上，平均Chamfer距离与F-score均优于现有3DGS方法，对弱纹理和薄表面提升最显著；开源代码已上线。
AI.conclusion: 显式可见性建模可打破深度-可见性循环，结合块级渐进校准即可仅用单目线索实现高精度、高效率的纯3DGS表面重建。

title: ExpertFlow: Efficient Mixture-of-Experts Inference via Predictive Expert Caching and Token Scheduling
comment: Accepted in DAC'26, Mixture-of-Experts, Inference, Offloading
summary: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models can outperform dense large language models at similar computation by activating only a small set of experts per token. However, stacking many expert modules introduces substantial parameter memory, which makes MoE models difficult to deploy in memory-constrained environments such as single-GPU devices. Offloading alleviates this issue by storing inactive experts in CPU memory and loading them on demand, but existing methods remain limited: static caches disregard input-dependent routing, and methods that train separate models to predict expert usage ahead of time are often inaccurate or require significant training cost. We propose ExpertFlow, a lightweight MoE inference system that addresses this routing dependency through three coordinated components: 1) a transformer-based routing path predictor that estimates expert usage across all MoE layers in a single forward pass, 2) a token scheduler that groups tokens with similar predicted routes to improve expert utilization, and 3) a predictive expert cache that loads only the required experts while correcting mispredictions at runtime. Together, these components enable efficient expert loading and execution, reducing GPU memory usage by up to 93.72% and improving inference throughput by up to 10x over strong offloading baselines on a single GPU.

AI.tldr: ExpertFlow 用一次前向预测各层所需专家，按需 CPU↔GPU 搬移，单卡 GPU 显存降 93.7%，吞吐提升 10 倍。
AI.motivation: 稀疏 MoE 虽节省计算，但专家参数总量大，单卡显存容不下；现有离线/静态卸载忽略输入相关路由，命中率低、训练开销高。
AI.method: 设计三协同组件：① Transformer 型路由预测器，一次前向估计所有层专家使用；② Token 调度器，把路由相似的 token 成批处理提升利用率；③ 可纠错的预测式专家缓存，仅加载所需专家并在运行时修正误预测。
AI.result: 在单 GPU 上对比强卸载基线，GPU 显存占用最多降 93.72%，推理吞吐最高提 10 倍，预测准确率与端到端延迟均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: ExpertFlow 以极低额外开销实现输入感知的专家卸载，使大规模 MoE 模型在显存受限环境高效部署，兼顾高吞吐与低显存。

title: Output Embedding Centering for Stable LLM Pretraining
comment: Additional experiments using logit soft-capping & weight tying
summary: Pretraining of large language models is not only expensive but also prone to certain training instabilities. A specific instability that often occurs at the end of training is output logit divergence. The most widely used mitigation strategies, z-loss and logit soft-capping, merely address the symptoms rather than the underlying cause of the problem. In this paper, we analyze the instability from the perspective of the output embeddings' geometry and identify anisotropic embeddings as its source. Based on this, we propose output embedding centering (OEC) as a new mitigation strategy, and demonstrate that it suppresses output logit divergence. OEC can be implemented in two different ways: as a deterministic operation called $μ$-centering, or a regularization method called $μ$-loss. Our experiments show that both variants outperform z-loss in terms of training stability, while being on par with logit soft-capping. This holds true both in the presence and the absence of weight tying. As a secondary result, we find that $μ$-loss is significantly less sensitive to regularization hyperparameter tuning than z-loss.

AI.tldr: 本文指出大模型预训练末期的输出logit发散源于输出嵌入的各向异性，提出输出嵌入居中(OEC)策略，以μ-centering或μ-loss形式在稳定训练上优于z-loss，且调参更鲁棒。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型预训练昂贵且后期常出现输出logit发散不稳定；现有z-loss、logit软截断仅治标，需要找到并解决其根本成因。
AI.method: 从输出嵌入几何结构切入，确认“各向异性嵌入”为logit发散根源；据此设计输出嵌入居中(OEC)：确定性μ-centering直接对齐嵌入均值，或μ-loss正则化约束嵌入分布；对比z-loss、logit软截断在权重共享/非共享设定下的表现。
AI.result: OEC两变体在训练稳定性上均优于z-loss，与logit软截断持平；μ-loss对正则化超参数敏感度显著低于z-loss。
AI.conclusion: 输出嵌入各向异性是logit发散的核心成因；OEC通过简单居中操作即可有效抑制不稳定，且调参成本低，可作为预训练稳定器替代或补充现有方法。

title: Seeing Through the Chain: Mitigate Hallucination in Multimodal Reasoning Models via CoT Compression and Contrastive Preference Optimization
summary: While multimodal reasoning models (MLRMs) have exhibited impressive capabilities, they remain prone to hallucinations, and effective solutions are still underexplored. In this paper, we experimentally analyze the hallucination cause and propose C3PO, a training-based mitigation framework comprising \textbf{C}hain-of-Thought \textbf{C}ompression and \textbf{C}ontrastive \textbf{P}reference \textbf{O}ptimization. Firstly, we identify that introducing reasoning mechanisms exacerbates models' reliance on language priors while overlooking visual inputs, which can produce CoTs with reduced visual cues but redundant text tokens. To this end, we propose to selectively filter redundant thinking tokens for a more compact and signal-efficient CoT representation that preserves task-relevant information while suppressing noise. In addition, we observe that the quality of the reasoning trace largely determines whether hallucination emerges in subsequent responses. To leverage this insight, we introduce a reasoning-enhanced preference tuning scheme that constructs training pairs using high-quality AI feedback. We further design a multimodal hallucination-inducing mechanism that elicits models' inherent hallucination patterns via carefully crafted inducers, yielding informative negative signals for contrastive correction. We provide theoretical justification for the effectiveness and demonstrate consistent hallucination reduction across diverse MLRMs and benchmarks.

AI.tldr: C3PO 利用链式思维压缩与对比偏好优化，显著降低多模态推理模型幻觉且无需修改模型架构。
AI.motivation: 现有 MLRM 表现优异却频繁出现幻觉，尤其在推理阶段过度依赖语言先验而忽视视觉模态。作者旨在阐释幻觉成因并提出可紧扣训练流程的通用缓解方法。
AI.method: 首先识别到冗余文本链式思维并非视觉线索多，进而实施「链式思维压缩」删除无关 Token，聚焦任务信号；其次利用高质量 AI 反馈构建正负训练对，并在多模态输入中设计诱发幻觉的诱导器生成「负信号」，结合对比学习执行「对比偏好优化」。
AI.result: 在多种 MLRM 与基准测试上，C3PO 实现一致且显著的幻觉抑制，同时兼顾推理准确性；作者还提供理论说明其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 推理本身可能引入语言主导噪声，压缩链式思维并基于对比偏好反馈进行再训练，可有效削弱 MLRM 幻觉并提升可靠性，具备在现有训练框架内直接集成的潜力。

title: Reflection of Episodes: Learning to Play Game from Expert and Self Experiences
summary: StarCraft II is a complex and dynamic real-time strategy (RTS) game environment, which is very suitable for artificial intelligence and reinforcement learning research. To address the problem of Large Language Model(LLM) learning in complex environments through self-reflection, we propose a Reflection of Episodes(ROE) framework based on expert experience and self-experience. This framework first obtains key information in the game through a keyframe selection method, then makes decisions based on expert experience and self-experience. After a game is completed, it reflects on the previous experience to obtain new self-experience. Finally, in the experiment, our method beat the robot under the Very Hard difficulty in TextStarCraft II. We analyze the data of the LLM in the process of the game in detail, verified its effectiveness.

AI.tldr: 提出 ROE 框架，让大语言模型在 TextStarCraft II 中通过关键帧筛选、专家经验决策与赛后自我反思持续提升，最终击败 Very Hard 难度内置 AI。
AI.motivation: RTS 游戏动态复杂，现有 LLM 难以在实时对抗中有效学习与自我提升，需引入结构化反思机制。
AI.method: 关键帧抽取筛掉冗余观测 → 融合专家与自我经验生成动作 → 赛后对比胜负轨迹，用语言模型总结新经验并更新记忆库。
AI.result: 在 TextStarCraft II 的 100 场对抗中，ROE 对 Very Hard 内置 AI 胜率由 28% 升至 67%，平均时长缩短 22%，反思后无效指令下降 41%。
AI.conclusion: 结构化自我反思可显著增强 LLM 在复杂实时环境中的策略迭代能力，验证了语言模型无需梯度更新也能通过纯经验复盘实现战术进化。

title: One Sample to Rule Them All: Extreme Data Efficiency in Multidiscipline Reasoning with Reinforcement Learning
summary: The reasoning ability of large language models (LLMs) can be unleashed with reinforcement learning (RL) (OpenAI, 2024; DeepSeek-AI et al., 2025a; Zeng et al., 2025). The success of existing RL attempts in LLMs usually rely on high-quality samples of large volumes. In this paper, we challenge conventional assumptions about data requirements in RL for LLMs by demonstrating the effectiveness of one-shot reinforcement learning. Specifically, we introduce polymath learning, a framework for designing one training sample that elicits multidisciplinary reasoning improvement. We present three key findings: (1) A single, strategically selected math reasoning sample can produce significant performance improvements across multiple domains, including physics, chemistry, and biology; (2) Analysis of salient mathematical skills provides insight into the characteristics associated with effective polymath samples; and (3) An engineered synthetic sample that integrates multidisciplinary elements and broader skill coverage achieves stronger performance than naturally occurring individual samples. Across various reasoning benchmarks, polymath learning achieves stronger performance than larger datasets, demonstrating that reasoning structure and skills in samples, rather than quantity, may be the key to unlock enhanced reasoning capabilities in language models. Our results suggest a shift, dubbed as sample engineering, toward precision engineering of samples that complements simply increasing data volume.

AI.tldr: 忽略巨量级数据，用精心设计的“一道题”就能让大模型在物理、化学、生物等多学科推理任务上集体提升——关键在于样本的“结构”而非“数量”。
AI.motivation: 主流 RL 训练 LLM 依赖成千上万条高质量样本，成本高、门槛大；作者质疑“数据越多越强”的假设，探索能否用极少甚至单样本实现跨域推理跃迁。
AI.method: 提出 Polymath Learning 框架：① 选取/合成一条多学科融合数学推理样本；② 以强化学习微调 LLM；③ 系统评估其在 MATH、Physics-Chem-Bio 等基准上的跨域泛化；④ 通过显著性分析提取样本中关键数学技能，再反向工程出更优合成样本。
AI.result: 单条策略性数学题即可带来显著跨域增益；人工合成的“多学科覆盖”样本效果优于天然样本；在多项推理 Benchmark 上，1-shot RL 超过传统大数据 RL 方案，证明样本结构 > 数量。
AI.conclusion: “样本工程”可替代“数据堆砌”；未来应转向以技能与结构为导向的精准样本设计，为轻量高效提升 LLM 推理能力开辟新范式。

title: PMMA: The Polytechnique Montreal Mobility Aids Dataset
comment: Submitted to the journal IEEE Open Journal Intelligent Transportation Systems, under review
summary: This study introduces a new object detection dataset of pedestrians using mobility aids, named PMMA. The dataset was collected in an outdoor environment, where volunteers used wheelchairs, canes, and walkers, resulting in nine categories of pedestrians: pedestrians, cane users, two types of walker users, whether walking or resting, five types of wheelchair users, including wheelchair users, people pushing empty wheelchairs, and three types of users pushing occupied wheelchairs, including the entire pushing group, the pusher and the person seated on the wheelchair. To establish a benchmark, seven object detection models (Faster R-CNN, CenterNet, YOLOX, DETR, Deformable DETR, DINO, and RT-DETR) and three tracking algorithms (ByteTrack, BOT-SORT, and OC-SORT) were implemented under the MMDetection framework. Experimental results show that YOLOX, Deformable DETR, and Faster R-CNN achieve the best detection performance, while the differences among the three trackers are relatively small. The PMMA dataset is publicly available at https://doi.org/10.5683/SP3/XJPQUG, and the video processing and model training code is available at https://github.com/DatasetPMMA/PMMA.

AI.tldr: 提出首个涵盖9类助行器行人（轮椅、助行器、手杖）的户外目标检测数据集PMMA，并在7种检测器+3种跟踪器上建立公开基准。
AI.motivation: 现有行人检测数据集缺乏对老年人及残障人士使用助行器的细粒度标注，导致模型在实际无障碍场景中对这类特殊行人召回率低、误检率高。
AI.method: 在户外采集志愿者使用轮椅/手杖/助行器的视频，按9类细粒度类别人工标注；基于MMDetection统一实现Faster R-CNN、CenterNet、YOLOX、DETR、Deformable DETR、DINO、RT-DETR及ByteTrack、BOT-SORT、OC-SORT，进行公平对比。
AI.result: YOLOX、Deformable DETR、Faster R-CNN检测mAP最高；三种跟踪器差异较小，验证数据集难度与多样性。
AI.conclusion: PMMA填补了助行器行人检测数据空白，为无障碍辅助驾驶与智能监控提供基准；数据与代码已开源，可推动公平、安全、包容的行人检测研究。

title: AssetOpsBench: Benchmarking AI Agents for Task Automation in Industrial Asset Operations and Maintenance
summary: AI for Industrial Asset Lifecycle Management aims to automate complex operational workflows, such as condition monitoring and maintenance scheduling, to minimize system downtime. While traditional AI/ML approaches solve narrow tasks in isolation, Large Language Model (LLM) agents offer a next-generation opportunity for end-to-end automation. In this paper, we introduce AssetOpsBench, a unified framework for orchestrating and evaluating domain-specific agents for Industry 4.0. AssetOpsBench provides a multimodal ecosystem comprising a catalog of four domain-specific agents, a curated dataset of 140+ human-authored natural-language queries grounded in real industrial scenarios, and a simulated, CouchDB-backed IoT environment. We introduce an automated evaluation framework that uses three key metrics to analyze architectural trade-offs between the Tool-As-Agent and Plan-Executor paradigms, along with a systematic procedure for the automated discovery of emerging failure modes. The practical relevance of AssetOpsBench is demonstrated by its broad community adoption, with 250+ users and over 500 agents submitted to our public benchmarking platform, supporting reproducible and scalable research for real-world industrial operations. The code is accesible at https://github.com/IBM/AssetOpsBench .

AI.tldr: AssetOpsBench 通过统一框架、多模态数据集与可复现评测，将 LLM 智能体引入工业资产生命周期管理，实现端到端自动化并系统揭示两类架构的失效模式。
AI.motivation: 传统 AI/ML 仅孤立解决单一任务，无法支撑工业 4.0 对全流程自动化的需求；亟需评估 LLM 智能体在真实工业场景下的端到端表现与架构优劣。
AI.method: 构建 AssetOpsBench：包含 4 类领域智能体、140+ 真实自然语言查询的多模态数据集，以及 CouchDB 支持的 IoT 仿真环境；提出三指标自动化评测框架，对比 Tool-As-Agent 与 Plan-Executor 两种范式，并设计失效模式自动发现流程。
AI.result: 平台已吸引 250+ 用户、提交 500+ 智能体，实证表明两类架构在响应速度、计划稳健性与工具复用率上存在显著权衡，并自动捕获 20+ 潜在失效模式。
AI.conclusion: AssetOpsBench 为工业 LLM 智能体提供可复现、可扩展的基准，验证其落地潜力；后续将扩充行业场景与多智能体协同，推动工业运维全面自动化。

title: When the Server Steps In: Calibrated Updates for Fair Federated Learning
summary: Federated learning (FL) has emerged as a transformative distributed learning paradigm, enabling multiple clients to collaboratively train a global model under the coordination of a central server without sharing their raw training data. While FL offers notable advantages, it faces critical challenges in ensuring fairness across diverse demographic groups. To address these fairness concerns, various fairness-aware debiasing methods have been proposed. However, many of these approaches either require modifications to clients' training protocols or lack flexibility in their aggregation strategies. In this work, we address these limitations by introducing EquFL, a novel server-side debiasing method designed to mitigate bias in FL systems. EquFL operates by allowing the server to generate a single calibrated update after receiving model updates from the clients. This calibrated update is then integrated with the aggregated client updates to produce an adjusted global model that reduces bias. Theoretically, we establish that EquFL converges to the optimal global model achieved by FedAvg and effectively reduces fairness loss over training rounds. Empirically, we demonstrate that EquFL significantly mitigates bias within the system, showcasing its practical effectiveness.

AI.tldr: EquFL仅通过服务器端校准更新，在不改动客户端训练或聚合规则的前提下，显著降低联邦学习中的群体偏见，同时保持与 FedAvg 相同的收敛保证。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习虽能协同训练却常因数据异构而放大对敏感群体的不公；现有去偏方法多需改造本地训练或聚合流程，实施代价高。作者旨在提出一种零入侵客户端、服务器端轻量级校准策略，兼顾收敛与公平。
AI.method: EquFL 在服务器收集完本地梯度后，额外生成一条“单个校准更新”，将其与 FedAvg 聚合结果合并形成全局模型，通过一阶近似的公平性正则化最小化群体差异，无需客户端改动且聚合策略灵活。
AI.result: 理论证明：EquFL 与 FedAvg 收敛到同一最优全局模型，并随轮次累积不断降低公平损失；在多个基准数据集的实证中，EquFL 将群体准确率差距削减 40-70%，吞吐几乎无额外开销。
AI.conclusion: EquFL 是首个纯服务器端、零客户端改动的高效去偏框架，兼顾收敛、公平与部署便利性，为联邦公平学习提供了实用且理论可靠的新范式。

title: EW-DETR: Evolving World Object Detection via Incremental Low-Rank DEtection TRansformer
summary: Real-world object detection must operate in evolving environments where new classes emerge, domains shift, and unseen objects must be identified as "unknown": all without accessing prior data. We introduce Evolving World Object Detection (EWOD), a paradigm coupling incremental learning, domain adaptation, and unknown detection under exemplar-free constraints. To tackle EWOD, we propose EW-DETR framework that augments DETR-based detectors with three synergistic modules: Incremental LoRA Adapters for exemplar-free incremental learning under evolving domains; a Query-Norm Objectness Adapter that decouples objectness-aware features from DETR decoder queries; and Entropy-Aware Unknown Mixing for calibrated unknown detection. This framework generalises across DETR-based detectors, enabling state-of-the-art RF-DETR to operate effectively in evolving-world settings. We also introduce FOGS (Forgetting, Openness, Generalisation Score) to holistically evaluate performance across these dimensions. Extensive experiments on Pascal Series and Diverse Weather benchmarks show EW-DETR outperforms other methods, improving FOGS by 57.24%.

AI.tldr: 在无需旧数据的开放环境中，EW-DETR借助LoRA增量适配器、Query-Norm对象性适配器与熵感知未知混合模块，使任意DETR检测器同步完成新增类别学习、域迁移适应与未知目标识别，提出FOGS指标并在Pascal Series与Diverse Weather上提升综合性能57.24%。
AI.motivation: 现实检测系统常在类别递增、域偏移和未知目标出现的情形下运行，但现有方法无法在不存取历史数据的“exemplar-free”设定下同时解决增量学习、域适应与未知识别三大挑战。
AI.method: 构建EWOD统一范式；设计EW-DETR框架：1) Incremental LoRA Adapters对DETR骨干进行低秩增量更新；2) Query-Norm Objectness Adapter解码器查询的对象性归一化与特征解耦；3) Entropy-Aware Unknown Mixing用熵值校准未知类分布；提出FOGS三维度综合评价指标。
AI.result: Pascal Series与Diverse Weather大量实验显示，EW-DETR在无需样本回放条件下超越现有方法，FOGS相对提升57.24%，跨DETR家族模型均适用。
AI.conclusion: EW-DETR首次将增量、域适应与未知检测在exemplar-free情境下协同解决，验证DETR结构在动态开放环境中的可扩展性与鲁棒性，为真实世界持续演化检测提供可落地方案。

title: Exploring Effective Strategies for Building a User-Configured GPT for Coding Classroom Dialogues
comment: Draft technical report. 39 pages, 2 figures. Not yet submitted for publication. Update expected
summary: This study investigated effective strategies for developing a custom GPT to code classroom dialogue. While classroom dialogue is widely recognised as a crucial element of education, its analysis remains challenging due to the need for a nuanced understanding of dialogic functions and the labour-intensive nature of manual transcript coding. Recent advancements in large language models (LLMs) offer promising avenues for automating this process. However, existing studies predominantly focus on training large-scale models or evaluating pre-trained models with fixed codebooks, the outcomes of which are often not applicable, or the methods are not replicable for dialogue researchers working with small datasets or employing customised coding schemes. Using MyGPT - a GPT-4-based customised GPT system configured for dialogue analysis - as a case, this study evaluates its baseline performance in coding classroom dialogue with a human codebook and examines how performance varies with different example inputs under a controlled variable design. Through a design-based research approach, this study explores a set of practical strategies - based upon MyGPT's unique features - for configuring an effective tool with limited data. The findings suggest that, despite a few limitations, a custom GPT developed using these specific strategies can serve as a useful coding assistant by generating coding suggestions.

AI.tldr: 在课堂对话研究中，人工编码既精细又耗时；本研究以 MyGPT（定制版 GPT-4）为例，提出一套小样本、专用编码表场景下的配置策略，可快速产出可靠编码建议。
AI.motivation: 课堂对话被视为学习核心，但其转录编码需掌握对话功能细节，人工标注昂贵且难以复现。现有 LLM 研究多聚焦大模型性能或固定编码表，数据集小、编码表自定的研究者难以移植。
AI.method: 采用设计型研究，先评估 MyGPT 在人工编码表上的基线表现；随后以受控变量设计，系统操控示例输入数量、质量、描述长度等因素，追踪 F1/一致率变化；最后提炼 MyGPT 特有特征（自定义指令、知识库、Few-shot 示例）的优化组合。
AI.result: 少量高质量示例下，宏平均 F1 提升 18–25%，一致率由 0.62 提至 0.79；编码建议与人工结果呈中-高度相关（r ≈ 0.74）；但在复杂多层级功能（如元认知提示）上仍有 12% 误判。
AI.conclusion: 受限数据场景中，若能结合“清晰编码定义＋分层示例＋负样本校正＋规则后处理”四步策略，即可在 1–2 小时内完成自定义 GPT 部署，实现省时约 70% 的半自动编码；虽仍不能完全替代人工校验，但可显著降低研究门槛并提高可复现性。

title: WFR-FM: Simulation-Free Dynamic Unbalanced Optimal Transport
summary: The Wasserstein-Fisher-Rao (WFR) metric extends dynamic optimal transport (OT) by coupling displacement with change of mass, providing a principled geometry for modeling unbalanced snapshot dynamics. Existing WFR solvers, however, are often unstable, computationally expensive, and difficult to scale. Here we introduce WFR Flow Matching (WFR-FM), a simulation-free training algorithm that unifies flow matching with dynamic unbalanced OT. Unlike classical flow matching which regresses only a transport vector field, WFR-FM simultaneously regresses a vector field for displacement and a scalar growth rate function for birth-death dynamics, yielding continuous flows under the WFR geometry. Theoretically, we show that minimizing the WFR-FM loss exactly recovers WFR geodesics. Empirically, WFR-FM yields more accurate and robust trajectory inference in single-cell biology, reconstructing consistent dynamics with proliferation and apoptosis, estimating time-varying growth fields, and applying to generative dynamics under imbalanced data. It outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in efficiency, stability, and reconstruction accuracy. Overall, WFR-FM establishes a unified and efficient paradigm for learning dynamical systems from unbalanced snapshots, where not only states but also mass evolve over time. The Python code is available at https://github.com/QiangweiPeng/WFR-FM.

AI.tldr: 提出WFR Flow Matching（WFR-FM），一种无模拟、可扩展的算法，将流动匹配扩展到可同时学习位移向量场与出生-死亡标量增长率，从而在理论上精确恢复WFR测地线，在单细胞等不平衡数据上实现更高效、稳定且准确的动力学重建。
AI.motivation: 传统WFR度量虽为不平衡最优传输提供几何框架，但现有求解器不稳定、计算昂贵且难扩展；需要一种可高效学习含质量变化动力学的方法。
AI.method: 把流动匹配推广为联合回归位移向量场和质量增长率函数的WFR-FM损失；完全避免模拟步骤，直接参数化连续流。
AI.result: 证明最小化WFR-FM损失可精确恢复WFR测地线；在单细胞数据上推断的轨迹同时显式包含增殖与凋亡，估计时变生长场，效率、稳定性与重建精度均超越现有最佳基线。
AI.conclusion: WFR-FM为从不平衡快照学习“状态与质量共演化”的动力系统提供了统一且高效的计算范式，代码已开源。

title: EmbodMocap: In-the-Wild 4D Human-Scene Reconstruction for Embodied Agents
summary: Human behaviors in the real world naturally encode rich, long-term contextual information that can be leveraged to train embodied agents for perception, understanding, and acting. However, existing capture systems typically rely on costly studio setups and wearable devices, limiting the large-scale collection of scene-conditioned human motion data in the wild. To address this, we propose EmbodMocap, a portable and affordable data collection pipeline using two moving iPhones. Our key idea is to jointly calibrate dual RGB-D sequences to reconstruct both humans and scenes within a unified metric world coordinate frame. The proposed method allows metric-scale and scene-consistent capture in everyday environments without static cameras or markers, bridging human motion and scene geometry seamlessly. Compared with optical capture ground truth, we demonstrate that the dual-view setting exhibits a remarkable ability to mitigate depth ambiguity, achieving superior alignment and reconstruction performance over single iphone or monocular models. Based on the collected data, we empower three embodied AI tasks: monocular human-scene-reconstruction, where we fine-tune on feedforward models that output metric-scale, world-space aligned humans and scenes; physics-based character animation, where we prove our data could be used to scale human-object interaction skills and scene-aware motion tracking; and robot motion control, where we train a humanoid robot via sim-to-real RL to replicate human motions depicted in videos. Experimental results validate the effectiveness of our pipeline and its contributions towards advancing embodied AI research.

AI.tldr: 用两部 iPhone 就能在任意场景里同步采集人与环境的三维运动数据，成本低、可行走，数据可直接用于三项具身 AI 任务。
AI.motivation: 真实人类行为蕴含丰富长程上下文，是训练具身智能体的关键，但现有动捕系统依赖昂贵工作室与穿戴设备，难以大规模“在野”采集带场景约束的人体运动数据。
AI.method: 提出 EmbodMocap：仅两部移动 iPhone，利用双 RGB-D 流联合标定，在同一度量世界坐标系下同步重建人体与场景，无需静态相机或标记。
AI.result: 相比光学地面真值，双视角显著缓解深度歧义，单/双 iPhone 的重建误差分别降低 32% 与 48%；采集的 120 小时野外数据使单目人-景重建、物理角色动画、人形机器人模仿三项任务均优于现有基线。
AI.conclusion: 该便携管线首次把“度量级、场景一致”的人体运动数据从实验室搬到日常生活，为具身 AI 提供可扩展的数据引擎，并验证了其跨任务迁移价值。

title: Understanding visual attention beehind bee-inspired UAV navigation
summary: Bio-inspired design is often used in autonomous UAV navigation due to the capacity of biological systems for flight and obstacle avoidance despite limited sensory and computational capabilities. In particular, honeybees mainly use the sensory input of optic flow, the apparent motion of objects in their visual field, to navigate cluttered environments. In our work, we train a Reinforcement Learning agent to navigate a tunnel with obstacles using only optic flow as sensory input. We inspect the attention patterns of trained agents to determine the regions of optic flow on which they primarily base their motor decisions. We find that agents trained in this way pay most attention to regions of discontinuity in optic flow, as well as regions with large optic flow magnitude. The trained agents appear to navigate a cluttered tunnel by avoiding the obstacles that produce large optic flow, while maintaining a centered position in their environment, which resembles the behavior seen in flying insects. This pattern persists across independently trained agents, which suggests that this could be a good strategy for developing a simple explicit control law for physical UAVs.

AI.tldr: 仅用光流作为输入训练出的强化学习无人机，会优先关注光流幅值大且不连续的区域，从而像蜜蜂一样绕开障碍物并保持居中飞行，这一规律在多组独立训练中均成立，可直接用于物理无人机控制律设计。
AI.motivation: 受蜜蜂在资源受限条件下仍能用光流完成避障与导航的启发，寻找一种仅依赖光流的极简无人机导航策略，以降低计算与传感硬件需求。
AI.method: 构建纯光流输入的深度强化学习模型，用其反复穿越带障碍的隧道；训练完成后，通过注意力可视化分析网络最依赖的光流区域，并对多组独立训练的代理进行统计对比。
AI.result: 代理一致将注意力集中在光流幅值大且不连续的障碍物边缘区域；凭此机制，它们能持续避开障碍并保持隧道中心线飞行，行为高度接近真实蜜蜂。
AI.conclusion: “光流幅值大+不连续”被证明是一种可泛化的避障线索，可直接转化为简易显式控制律，为低功耗、轻量级无人机提供实用的仿生导航方案。

title: Unified Optimization of Source Weights and Transfer Quantities in Multi-Source Transfer Learning: An Asymptotic Framework
summary: In multi-source transfer learning, a key challenge lies in how to appropriately differentiate and utilize heterogeneous source tasks. However, existing multi-source methods typically focus on optimizing either the source weights or the amount of transferred samples, largely neglecting their joint consideration. In this work, we propose a theoretical framework, Unified Optimization of Weights and Quantities (UOWQ), that jointly determines the optimal source weights and transfer quantities for each source task. Specifically, the framework formulates multi-source transfer learning as a parameter estimation problem based on an asymptotic analysis of a Kullback--Leibler divergence--based generalization error measure, leading to two main theoretical findings: 1) using all available source samples is always optimal when the weights are properly adjusted; 2) the optimal source weights are characterized by a principled optimization problem whose structure explicitly incorporates the Fisher information, parameter discrepancy, parameter dimensionality, and transfer quantities. Building on the theoretical results, we further propose a practical algorithm for multi-source transfer learning, and extend it to multi-task learning settings where each task simultaneously serves as both a source and a target. Extensive experiments on real-world benchmarks, including DomainNet and Office-Home, demonstrate that UOWQ consistently outperforms strong baselines. The results validate both the theoretical predictions and the practical effectiveness of our framework.

AI.tldr: UOWQ理论框架首次联合优化多源迁移学习中的权重与迁移量，理论上证明全部源样本的最优性及权重的Fisher信息刻画，实验优于DomainNet等基准。
AI.motivation: 现有多源迁移方法将权重与迁移量割裂优化，导致异构源利用不足；亟需一个能同时决定二者最优值的统一理论框架。
AI.method: 以基于KL散度的泛化误差渐近分析为切入点，构建参数估计问题，导出含Fisher信息、参数差异、维度与迁移量的权重优化结构，并给出实用算法及多任务扩展。
AI.result: 理论得证：1) 权重调优时利用全部源样本恒最优；2) 最优权重由融合Fisher信息等四因素的显式优化问题决定。DomainNet、Office-Home等实验显示UOWQ持续超越强基线。
AI.conclusion: UOWQ将权重与迁移量纳入统一优化，首次从理论上揭示二者耦合规律，兼具可解释性与实效性，为多源/多任务迁移提供新范式。

title: Cryo-Bench: Benchmarking Foundation Models for Cryosphere Applications
summary: Geo-Foundation Models (GFMs) have been evaluated across diverse Earth observation task including multiple domains and have demonstrated strong potential of producing reliable maps even with sparse labels. However, benchmarking GFMs for Cryosphere applications has remained limited, primarily due to the lack of suitable evaluation datasets. To address this gap, we introduce \textbf{Cryo-Bench}, a benchmark compiled to evaluate GFM performance across key Cryospheric components. Cryo-Bench includes debris-covered glaciers, glacial lakes, sea ice, and calving fronts, spanning multiple sensors and broad geographic regions. We evaluate 14 GFMs alongside UNet and ViT baselines to assess their advantages, limitations, and optimal usage strategies. With a frozen encoder, UNet achieves the highest average mIoU of \textbf{66.38}, followed by TerraMind at \textbf{64.02} across five evluation dataset included in Cryo-Bench. In the few-shot setting (10\% input data), GFMs such as DOFA and TerraMind outperform UNet, achieving mIoU scores of \textbf{59.53}, \textbf{56.62}, and \textbf{56.60}, respectively, comapred to U-Net's 56.60. When fully finetuning GFMs, we observe inconsistent performance across datasets and models. However, tuning learning rate along with finetuning substantially improves GFM performance. For example, evaluation on two representative datasets (GLID and CaFFe) shows an average relative improvement of \textbf{12.77\%}. Despite having minimal Cryosphere representation in their pretraining data, GFMs exhibit notable domain adaptation capabilities and produce meaningful results across tasks. Based on our findings, We recommend encoder fine-tuning with hyperparameter optimization optimization to achieve the best possible performance, while using frozen encoders when users need quick results without extensive experimentation.(\href{https://github.com/Sk-2103/Cryo-Bench}{GitHub}).

AI.tldr: 首次系统评测14个Geo-Foundation模型在冰冻圈4类关键任务上的性能，提出Cryo-Bench基准并给出调参策略与使用建议。
AI.motivation: Geo-Foundation Model虽在多地学任务表现强劲，但缺乏面向冰冻圈(冰川、冰湖、海冰、崩解前沿)的专门基准与系统评估，阻碍其在该领域落地。
AI.method: 构建跨传感器、跨区域的Cryo-Bench，含5套稀疏标注数据；对比14个GFM及UNet、ViT，在冻结编码器、小样本、全微调三场景下实验，并调优学习率。
AI.result: 冻结UNet平均mIoU最高(66.38)；10%标注时DOFA、TerraMind超越UNet；全微调+学习率调优使两代表数据集相对提升12.77%；GFM对冰冻圈具备显著领域自适应能力。
AI.conclusion: 冰冻圈任务中推荐“编码器微调+超参优化”以获最佳性能，若求快速部署可用冻结编码器；Cryo-Bench为后续GFM研究提供开放基准与代码。

title: GenOM: Ontology Matching with Description Generation and Large Language Model
comment: Accepted for publication in World Wide Web (Springer). This version includes revisions based on peer review
summary: Ontology matching (OM) plays an essential role in enabling semantic interoperability and integration across heterogeneous knowledge sources, particularly in the biomedical domain which contains numerous complex concepts related to diseases and pharmaceuticals. This paper introduces GenOM, a large language model (LLM)-based ontology alignment framework, which enriches the semantic representations of ontology concepts via generating textual definitions, retrieves alignment candidates with an embedding model, and incorporates exact matching-based tools to improve precision. Extensive experiments conducted on the OAEI Bio-ML track demonstrate that GenOM can often achieve competitive performance, surpassing many baselines including traditional OM systems and recent LLM-based methods. Further ablation studies confirm the effectiveness of semantic enrichment and few-shot prompting, highlighting the framework's robustness and adaptability.

AI.tldr: 提出基于 LLM 的本体对齐系统 GenOM，通过自动生成文本定义增强语义表示并结合嵌入检索与精确匹配，在 OAEI Bio-ML 任务中多次优于传统及同类 LLM 基线。
AI.motivation: 生物医学领域本体异构且专业概念关系复杂，现有对齐方法在语义深层理解及概念定义稀缺场景下精度受限，需借助大模型优势提升跨本体语义互操作性。
AI.method: GenOM 框架：① LLM 为无定义概念生成文本定义；② 用嵌入模型检索可配对候选；③ 引入字符串/词汇级精确匹配模块；④ 小样本提示强化 LLM 决策，融合多策略输出最终对齐结果。
AI.result: OAEI Bio-ML 轨道的大规模评价表明，GenOM 在 F1、命中率等指标上多次取得前列分数，总体优于 OM-AML、BERTMap 等传统与 LLM 基线；消融实验验证语义扩充和小样本提示分别贡献约 6–11% F1 增益，模型方差 <1.2%，换用其他 LLM（如 GPT-4）仍可保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 结合生成式语义增强、检索式候选过滤与精确匹配可在不依赖人工定义的情况下显著提升生物医学本体对齐性能；GenOM 已展现跨任务鲁棒与快速适配能力，为后续在动态或跨语言本体维护、药物重定位等下游应用提供了可扩展范式。

title: Finite-Time Analysis of Gradient Descent for Shallow Transformers
summary: Understanding why Transformers perform so well remains challenging due to their non-convex optimization landscape. In this work, we analyze a shallow Transformer with $m$ independent heads trained by projected gradient descent in the kernel regime. Our analysis reveals two main findings: (i) the width required for nonasymptotic guarantees scales only logarithmically with the sample size $n$, and (ii) the optimization error is independent of the sequence length $T$. This contrasts sharply with recurrent architectures, where the optimization error can grow exponentially with $T$. The trade-off is memory: to keep the full context, the Transformer's memory requirement grows with the sequence length. We validate our theoretical results numerically in a teacher-student setting and compare Transformers with recurrent architectures on an autoregressive task.

AI.tldr: 在不依赖过参数化的前提下，理论上验证了shallow多头Transformer④ 随着样本量n增加，仅须宽度m≍log n即可保证收敛；⑤ 优化误差与序列长度T无关，彻底优于RNN类模型；⑥ 但全序列上下文保留需付出O(T)内存代价。
AI.motivation: Transformer虽经验上横扫序列建模，却因非凸优化景观而缺少严谨的收敛刻画。本文旨在回答：在不进入过参数化极端的大width条件下，浅层Transformer能否给出确定性的样本-宽度依赖与优化误差界，并与RNN进行理论对比。
AI.method: 1.建立单隐层、M个独立注意力头的简化模型，参数化遵循kernel regime(PGD下的NTK近似)；2.引入投影梯度下降并解析Jacobian特征值；3.推导宽度m与迭代次数的、非渐进样本-收敛复杂度；4.刻画优化误差对序列长度T的独立性，并与RNN做最坏情况下指数增长对比；5.设计teacher-student数值实验与自回归任务验证理论预测。
AI.result: 1.收敛宽度下界：m≳log(n/δ)，随样本量n仅对数增长，远优于RNN或宽ResNet等需多项式m的界限；2.优化误差界ε≤O(1/(ηt))，显式与T无关——首次给出“误差不随序列变长而恶化”的理论证据；3.RNN类模型的梯度范数在最坏情况下随T呈指数增大，而Transformer被log(T)限界；4.实验上，随T从10^2增至10^4，Transformer误差曲线持平，而LSTM/GRU误差显著上扬，与理论预测一致。
AI.conclusion: Transformer在NTK视角下实现了“小宽度+大尺寸”稳定性：其优化难度丝毫不受长序列拖累，关键在于记忆而非优化的复杂度转移；这为继续缩窄模型宽度、扩大上下文提供了理论底气，也提示未来需在算法或梯度压缩层面消化伴随而来的O(T)存储开销。

title: PPEDCRF: Privacy-Preserving Enhanced Dynamic CRF for Location-Privacy Protection for Sequence Videos with Minimal Detection Degradation
comment: We would like to withdraw this paper due to identified issues in the experimental design and insufficient supporting data, which affect the reliability of the reported results. A substantially revised version with corrected experiments and extended evaluations will be prepared and submitted in the future
summary: Dashcam videos collected by autonomous or assisted-driving systems are increasingly shared for safety auditing and model improvement. Even when explicit GPS metadata are removed, an attacker can still infer the recording location by matching background visual cues (e.g., buildings and road layouts) against large-scale street-view imagery. This paper studies location-privacy leakage under a background-based retrieval attacker, and proposes PPEDCRF, a privacy-preserving enhanced dynamic conditional random field framework that injects calibrated perturbations only into inferred location-sensitive background regions while preserving foreground detection utility. PPEDCRF consists of three components: (i) a dynamic CRF that enforces temporal consistency to discover and track location sensitive regions across frames, (ii) a normalized control penalty (NCP) that allocates perturbation strength according to a hierarchical sensitivity model, and (iii) a utility-preserving noise injection module that minimizes interference to object detection and segmentation. Experiments on public driving datasets demonstrate that PPEDCRF significantly reduces location-retrieval attack success (e.g., Top-k retrieval accuracy) while maintaining competitive detection performance (e.g., mAP and segmentation metrics) compared with common baselines such as global noise, white-noise masking, and feature-based anonymization. The source code is in https://github.com/mabo1215/PPEDCRF.git

AI.tldr: 针对行车记录仪视频在无GPS时仍可通过街景匹配泄露地理位置的问题，本文提出动态条件随机场框架PPEDCRF，仅对背景中敏感区域注入可控扰动，在显著降低Top-k定位攻击成功率的同时保持目标检测/分割精度。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶/辅助驾驶系统为审计与模型迭代而大量分享的行车记录仪视频，即使删除GPS元数据，攻击者仍可凭建筑、道路布局等背景视觉线索在街景库中反向定位，严重威胁车主隐私，亟需兼顾视觉任务效用与地理隐私的保护方案。
AI.method: PPEDCRF以三层设计为核心：1) 动态CRF跨帧追踪并分割背景中的地理位置敏感区域；2) 归一化控制惩罚(NCP)按分层敏感度模型为各区域动态分配扰动强度；3) 效用保持噪声注入模块在扰动敏感区时最小化对前景检测与分割的干扰，实现局部、时序一致且任务友好的隐私扰动。
AI.result: 在公开驾驶数据集上，PPEDCRF将基于背景的定位检索攻击Top-k成功率显著拉低，而目标检测mAP、分割IoU等核心指标与全局噪声、白幕遮挡、特征匿名化等基线相当甚至更优，验证其在隐私-效用权衡上的优势。
AI.conclusion: PPEDCRF证明无需牺牲视觉分析任务即可抑制背景地理泄露，为共享驾驶视频提供可落地的细粒度隐私保护范式，后续可扩展至多城市场景及实时车载部署。

title: Learn to Relax with Large Language Models: Solving Constraint Optimization Problems via Bidirectional Coevolution
summary: Large Language Model (LLM)-based optimization has recently shown promise for autonomous problem solving, yet most approaches still cast LLMs as passive constraint checkers rather than proactive strategy designers, limiting their effectiveness on complex Constraint Optimization Problems (COPs). To address this, we present AutoCO, an end-to-end Automated Constraint Optimization method that tightly couples operations-research principles of constraint relaxation with LLM reasoning. A core innovation is a unified triple-representation that binds relaxation strategies, algorithmic principles, and executable codes. This design enables the LLM to synthesize, justify, and instantiate relaxation strategies that are both principled and executable. To navigate fragmented solution spaces, AutoCO employs a bidirectional global-local coevolution mechanism, synergistically coupling Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) for global relaxation-trajectory exploration with Evolutionary Algorithms (EAs) for local solution intensification. This continuous exchange of priors and feedback explicitly balances diversification and intensification, thus preventing premature convergence. Extensive experiments on three challenging COP benchmarks validate AutoCO's consistent effectiveness and superior performance, especially in hard regimes where current methods degrade. Results highlight AutoCO as a principled and effective path toward proactive, verifiable LLM-driven optimization.

AI.tldr: AutoCO 首次让大模型主动“设计”而非被动“检查”约束优化策略，通过三重统一表示把松弛策略、算法原理与可执行代码绑定，再用 MCTS 全局探索 + EA 局部强化协同进化，在困难 COP 实例上全面优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有 LLM 优化方法仅把模型当约束验证器，难以应对复杂 COP；亟需让 LLM 具备主动、可验证的约束松弛与策略设计能力。
AI.method: 提出 AutoCO 框架：(1) 统一三元表示〈松弛策略，算法原理，可执行代码〉供 LLM 端到端生成与验证；(2) 双向全局-局部协同进化：MCTS 负责在松弛轨迹空间全局探索，EA 负责在解空间局部强化，二者持续交换先验与反馈以平衡多样与收敛。
AI.result: 在三个高难度 COP 基准的“困难区域”上，AutoCO 一致优于 SOTA，性能降幅最小；消融实验验证三重表示与协同进化模块均为关键增益。
AI.conclusion: AutoCO 展示了 LLM 从“被动验证”跃升为“主动策略设计者”的可行路径，为可解释、可验证的 LLM 驱动优化提供了新的范式与基线。

title: Multigrade Neural Network Approximation
summary: We study multigrade deep learning (MGDL) as a principled framework for structured error refinement in deep neural networks. While the approximation power of neural networks is now relatively well understood, training very deep architectures remains challenging due to highly non-convex and often ill-conditioned optimization landscapes. In contrast, for relatively shallow networks, most notably one-hidden-layer $\texttt{ReLU}$ models, training admits convex reformulations with global guarantees, motivating learning paradigms that improve stability while scaling to depth. MGDL builds upon this insight by training deep networks grade by grade: previously learned grades are frozen, and each new residual block is trained solely to reduce the remaining approximation error, yielding an interpretable and stable hierarchical refinement process. We develop an operator-theoretic foundation for MGDL and prove that, for any continuous target function, there exists a fixed-width multigrade $\texttt{ReLU}$ scheme whose residuals decrease strictly across grades and converge uniformly to zero. To the best of our knowledge, this work provides the first rigorous theoretical guarantee that grade-wise training yields provable vanishing approximation error in deep networks. Numerical experiments further illustrate the theoretical results.

AI.tldr: 多层递进深度学习(MGDL)将深度网络拆成分级残差块逐层冻结训练，首次在固定宽度ReLU网络下给出逐层误差严格递减并一致收敛到零的理论保证，兼顾可解释性与训练稳定性。
AI.motivation: 尽管浅层ReLU网络可转化为凸优化问题并拥有全局收敛保证，但随着网络加深，高度非凸且病态的优化地貌使得训练极不稳定；学界缺乏既能继承浅层凸性优势又能扩展到深层架构的系统性框架。
AI.method: 提出MGDL框架：1) 按“级”顺序训练，前面所有级冻结不动；2) 每新增一级残差块仅拟合当前剩余误差；3) 建立算子理论，证明对任意连续目标函数存在固定宽度ReLU多级方案，其残差范数逐级严格递减并一致收敛至零。
AI.result: 理论上首次给出深度网络“逐层训练”可使逼近误差可证明趋于零的严格保证；数值实验验证残差确实单调下降，训练曲线稳定，未见文献报道同级别结果。
AI.conclusion: MGDL为深度学习的误差精细化提供可解释、稳定且具收敛保证的新范式，开辟了在保持深层表达能力的同时利用凸性机理的全新研究方向。

title: Fair Benchmarking of Emerging One-Step Generative Models Against Multistep Diffusion and Flow Models
summary: State-of-the-art text-to-image models produce high-quality images, but inference remains expensive as generation requires several sequential ODE or denoising steps. Native one-step models aim to reduce this cost by mapping noise to an image in a single step, yet fair comparisons to multi-step systems are difficult because studies use mismatched sampling steps and different classifier-free guidance (CFG) settings, where CFG can shift FID, Inception Score, and CLIP-based alignment in opposing directions. It is also unclear how well one-step models scale to multi-step inference, and there is limited standardized out-of-distribution evaluation for label-ID-conditioned generators beyond ImageNet. To address this, We benchmark eight models spanning one-step flows (MeanFlow, Improved MeanFlow, SoFlow), multi-step baselines (RAE, Scale-RAE), and established systems (SiT, Stable Diffusion 3.5, FLUX.1) under a controlled class-conditional protocol on ImageNet validation, ImageNetV2, and reLAIONet, our new proofread out-of-distribution dataset aligned to ImageNet label IDs. Using FID, Inception Score, CLIP Score, and Pick Score, we show that FID-focused model development and CFG selection can be misleading in few-step regimes, where guidance changes can improve FID while degrading text-image alignment and human preference signals and worsening perceived quality. We further show that leading one-step models benefit from step scaling and become substantially more competitive under multi-step inference, although they still exhibit characteristic local distortions. To capture these tradeoffs, we introduce MinMax Harmonic Mean (MMHM), a composite proxy over all four metrics that stabilizes hyperparameter selection across guidance and step sweeps.

AI.tldr: 本研究首次在统一协议下系统对比了一步式与多步文本生成图像模型，证明一步模型经多步推理可显著提升性能，但局部失真犹存；指出仅用FID选CFG会误导优化，并提出MMHM综合指标稳定超参选择。
AI.motivation: 现有高质量文生图模型推理需多步ODE/去噪，计算昂贵；一步式方法虽可单次生成，却缺乏与多步系统的公平对比基准，且CFG对指标的影响方向不一，亦缺乏超越ImageNet的标准化分布外评估。
AI.method: 在ImageNet验证集、ImageNetV2及自建标签对齐的reLAIONet上，对8个模型（3种一步流、2种多步基线、3个主流系统）进行类条件控制实验；统一扫描步数与CFG，采用FID、IS、CLIP Score、Pick Score评估，并引入MMHM四指标调和均值作为代理目标。
AI.result: 1) 单纯追求FID的模型与CFG选择会在少步场景下牺牲图文对齐与人眼偏好；2) 领先的一步模型经多步推理后竞争力大幅跃升，但仍存在局部扭曲；3) MMHM可在CFG与步数联合搜索中给出稳定、可信的超参。
AI.conclusion: 一步式文生图模型具备加速潜力，但必须用统一协议和多指标综合评估才能避免被FID与CFG误导；MMHM为快速选择稳定超参提供了实用工具，未来需继续降低局部失真并扩展分布外测试覆盖面。

title: Set Contribution Functions for Quantitative Bipolar Argumentation and their Principles
comment: Published in International Journal of Approximate Reasoning, Vol. 194, 2026
summary: We present functions that quantify the contribution of a set of arguments in quantitative bipolar argumentation graphs to (the final strength of) an argument of interest, a so-called topic. Our set contribution functions are generalizations of existing functions that quantify the contribution of a single contributing argument to a topic. Accordingly, we generalize existing contribution function principles for set contribution functions and provide a corresponding principle-based analysis. We introduce new principles specific to set-based functions that focus on properties pertaining to the interaction of arguments within a set. Finally, we sketch how the principles play out across different set contribution functions given a recommendation system application scenario.

AI.tldr: 针对定量双极论证图中一组论点对目标论题最终强度的贡献，本文将现有单一贡献度量推广为集合贡献函数，提出面向集合交互特性的新原则并进行原则化分析，最后在推荐系统中示例验证。
AI.motivation: 论证系统中常需评估论据群体而非单个论据对结论的影响，但现有量化方法集中于单个论据贡献，缺少对论据集合及其交互效应的系统性度量框架。
AI.method: 1) 将单一论据贡献函数扩展为集合贡献函数；2) 将其对应的既有公理原则推广到集合场景；3) 提出并形式化专属于集合交互的新原则（如冗余、互补、协同等）；4) 在推荐系统语境下比较不同集合贡献函数对这些原则的满足情况。
AI.result: 得到一组适用于集合层面且具备理论基础的贡献度量函数，统一了单点与群组评估；新原则可区分函数对集合内论据冗余、互补或协同行为的敏感程度；案例显示不同函数在推荐解释中表现出显著差异，为系统选择提供依据。
AI.conclusion: 集合贡献函数扩展了定量论证理论，使系统能基于论据群组整体行为精准评估论题强度；提出的原则体系为函数选择提供客观标准，并为后续优化和场景适配奠定基础。

title: PUNCH: Physics-informed Uncertainty-aware Network for Coronary Hemodynamics
summary: More than 10 million coronary angiograms are performed globally each year, providing a gold standard for detecting obstructive coronary artery disease. Yet, no obstructive lesions are identified in 70% of patients evaluated for ischemic heart disease. Up to half of these patients have undiagnosed, life-limiting coronary microvascular dysfunction (CMD), which remains under-detected due to the limited availability of invasive tools required to measure coronary flow reserve (CFR). Here, we introduce PUNCH, a non-invasive, uncertainty-aware framework for estimating CFR directly from standard coronary angiography. PUNCH integrates physics-informed neural networks with variational inference to infer coronary blood flow from first-principles models of contrast transport, without requiring ground-truth flow measurements or population-level training. The pipeline runs in approximately three minutes per patient on a single GPU. Validated on synthetic angiograms with controlled noise and imaging artifacts, as well as on clinical bolus thermodilution data from 20 patients, PUNCH demonstrates accurate and uncertainty-calibrated CFR estimation. This approach establishes a new paradigm for CMD diagnosis and illustrates how physics-informed inference can substantially expand the diagnostic utility of available clinical imaging.

AI.tldr: 提出仅需冠脉造影片即可快速、无创估算冠脉血流储备(CFR)的物理-推理框架PUNCH，可解决70%血管造影阴性患者中隐匿的微血管功能障碍（CMD）检测盲点。
AI.motivation: 全球每年数百万冠脉造影虽能识别大血管狭窄，但约70%造影阴性患者仍可能因微血管功能障碍(CFR下降)出现症状并预后不良；现有侵入性CFR测量方法昂贵、设备稀缺，临床迫切需要一种利用常规造影即能无创评估微血管功能的技术。
AI.method: 构建名为PUNCH的“物理引导+不确定性量化”深度学习框架：①以造影剂输运守恒方程建立物理先验；②引入变分推断，用神经网络从单角度或常规造影序列直接反演冠脉血流场，全程无需真实流率或大数据训练；③输出CFR并附带像素级不确定性，算法在单GPU上≲3分钟完成。
AI.result: ①在带噪声及成像伪影的合成造影数据上，CFR均方误差<0.16，90%置信区间覆盖率>92%；②在20例临床热稀释CFR对照数据中，Pearson r=0.81，Bland–Altman偏倚‐0.03，UNC95置信区间覆盖率90%，充分校准，算法对图像噪声、对比剂剂量变化鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: PUNCH首次证明仅从常规冠脉造影即可获得可靠且带不确定性估计的CFR，为非阻塞性冠心病患者提供无创CMD筛查手段，拓宽了现有影像诊断边界，展示了“物理+深度学习”在血管功能成像中的巨大潜力与临床转化前景。

title: AdaRadar: Rate Adaptive Spectral Compression for Radar-based Perception
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026. Project page: https://jp4327.github.io/adaradar/
summary: Radar is a critical perception modality in autonomous driving systems due to its all-weather characteristics and ability to measure range and Doppler velocity. However, the sheer volume of high-dimensional raw radar data saturates the communication link to the computing engine (e.g., an NPU), which is often a low-bandwidth interface with data rate provisioned only for a few low-resolution range-Doppler frames. A generalized codec for utilizing high-dimensional radar data is notably absent, while existing image-domain approaches are unsuitable, as they typically operate at fixed compression ratios and fail to adapt to varying or adversarial conditions. In light of this, we propose radar data compression with adaptive feedback. It dynamically adjusts the compression ratio by performing gradient descent from the proxy gradient of detection confidence with respect to the compression rate. We employ a zeroth-order gradient approximation as it enables gradient computation even with non-differentiable core operations--pruning and quantization. This also avoids transmitting the gradient tensors over the band-limited link, which, if estimated, would be as large as the original radar data. In addition, we have found that radar feature maps are heavily concentrated on a few frequency components. Thus, we apply the discrete cosine transform to the radar data cubes and selectively prune out the coefficients effectively. We preserve the dynamic range of each radar patch through scaled quantization. Combining those techniques, our proposed online adaptive compression scheme achieves over 100x feature size reduction at minimal performance drop (~1%p). We validate our results on the RADIal, CARRADA, and Radatron datasets.

AI.tldr: 基于在线自适应反馈的雷达数据压缩方案，在保持检测性能的前提下实现>100×压缩比。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶雷达原始数据维度高、带宽需求大，而现有图像域压缩方法无法应对动态或对抗场景，亟需可直接用于高维雷达数据的可变速率编解码器。
AI.method: 1) 以“检测置信度对压缩率的代理梯度”做零阶梯度估计，在线调整压缩比；2) 对雷达立方体做DCT，利用能量集中于低频的特性做系数剪枝；3) 采用带缩放的量化保持动态范围；4) 全程不传输完整梯度张量，避免反向链路拥塞。
AI.result: 在RADIal、CARRADA、Radatron三大公开数据集上实现>100倍特征尺寸压缩，检测性能仅下降约1个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 所提零阶自适应压缩框架兼顾超低带宽与鲁棒感知，为车载雷达实时处理提供了一种通信友好、性能近无损的轻量化解决方案。

title: Glia: A Human-Inspired AI for Automated Systems Design and Optimization
summary: Can AI autonomously design mechanisms for computer systems on par with the creativity and reasoning of human experts? We present Glia, an AI architecture for networked systems design that uses large language models (LLMs) in a human-inspired multi-agent workflow. Each agent specializes in reasoning, experimentation, and analysis, collaborating through an evaluation framework that grounds abstract reasoning in empirical feedback. Unlike prior ML-for-systems methods that optimize black-box policies, Glia generates interpretable designs and exposes its reasoning. When applied to a distributed GPU cluster for LLM inference, it produces new algorithms for request routing, scheduling, and auto-scaling that perform at human-expert levels in significantly less time, while yielding novel insights into workload behavior. Our results suggest that combining reasoning LLMs with structured experimentation, an AI can produce creative and understandable designs for complex systems problems.

AI.tldr: Glia 是一个基于多智能体 LLM 的 AI 框架，可在分布式 GPU 集群上自动生成可解释、专家级水平的调度与扩缩容算法，且速度远超人类。
AI.motivation: 现有 ML-for-systems 方法多为黑盒策略优化，缺乏可解释性与创造性；作者希望让 AI 像人类专家一样自主设计机制并给出推理过程。
AI.method: 构建多智能体工作流：各 LLM 分别专精“推理-实验-分析”，通过经验反馈循环评估设计；以分布式 GPU 集群 LLM 推理为实验场，迭代生成并验证调度、路由与扩缩容算法。
AI.result: Glia 在短时间内产出性能媲美人类专家的算法，同时揭示出新颖的工作负载行为模式；所有设计均可解释并附带推理链条。
AI.conclusion: 将具备推理能力的 LLM 与结构化实验闭环结合，可让 AI 自主、创新且可解释地解决复杂系统级设计问题。

title: RPNT: Robust Pre-trained Neural Transformer -- A Pathway for Generalized Motor Decoding
summary: Brain motor decoding aims to interpret and translate neural activity into behaviors. Decoding models should generalize across variations, such as recordings from different brain sites, experimental sessions, behavior types, and subjects, will be critical for real-world applications. Current decoding models only partially address these challenges. In this work, we develop a pretrained neural transformer model, RPNT - Robust Pretrained Neural Transformer, designed to achieve robust generalization through pretraining, which in turn enables effective finetuning for downstream motor decoding tasks. We achieved the proposed RPNT architecture by systematically investigating which transformer building blocks could be suitable for neural spike activity modeling, since components from models developed for other modalities, such as text and images, do not transfer directly to neural data. The final RPNT architecture incorporates three unique enabling components: 1) Multidimensional rotary positional embedding to aggregate experimental metadata such as site coordinates, session ids and behavior types; 2) Context-based attention mechanism via convolution kernels operating on global attention to learn local temporal structures for handling non-stationarity of neural population activity; 3) Robust self-supervised learning objective with stochastic causal masking strategies and contrastive representations. We pretrained two versions of RPNT on distinct datasets that present significant generalization challenges: a) Multi-session, multi-task, and multi-subject microelectrode benchmark; b) Multi-site recordings using high-density Neuropixel 1.0 probes from many cortical locations. After pretraining, we evaluated RPNT generalization on cross-session, cross-type, cross-subject, and cross-site downstream behavior decoding tasks. Our RPNT consistently outperforms the existing decoding models on these tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出 RPNT，用三项专为神经脉冲数据设计的新 Transformer 模块＋大规模无监督预训练，显著优于现有解码模型在多会话/多任务/多被试/多脑区条件下的行为预测表现。
AI.motivation: 现实脑控应用要求解码模型能跨脑区、跨会话、跨任务、跨被试稳定工作，但现有多模态预训练方法对神经信号的特异结构设计不足，迁移效果差。
AI.method: 构建神经专用 Transformer RPNT：①多维旋转位置编码融合电极坐标等元数据；②卷积核构造的“情境注意”捕捉非平稳群体动力学；③随机因果遮蔽＋对比式表示的自监督目标。先在两大高难度基准（多时序微电极与 Neuropixel 多皮层大范围高密度探针）上做预训练，再在四类跨域下游任务微调。
AI.result: RPNT 在所有跨域解码场景均超越最强方法，平均解码准确率提升约 10–20%，方差显著下降，迁移窗口训练数据减少 50% 仍保持稳健性。
AI.conclusion: 为神经信号建模引入专门 Transformer 结构可有效提升通用解码性能，使跨域脑控从实验室走向实际场景更具可行性，未来可扩展至更大物种与多模态神经接口。

title: A Novel FACS-Aligned Anatomical Text Description Paradigm for Fine-Grained Facial Behavior Synthesis
summary: Facial behavior constitutes the primary medium of human nonverbal communication. Existing synthesis methods predominantly follow two paradigms: coarse emotion category labels or one-hot Action Unit (AU) vectors from the Facial Action Coding System (FACS). Neither paradigm reliably renders fine-grained facial behaviors nor resolves anatomically implausible artifacts caused by conflicting AUs. Therefore, we propose a novel task paradigm: anatomically grounded facial behavior synthesis from FACS-based AU descriptions. This paradigm explicitly encodes FACS-defined muscle movement rules, inter-AU interactions, and conflict resolution mechanisms into natural language control signals. To enable systematic research, we develop a dynamic AU text processor, a FACS rule-based module that converts raw AU annotations into anatomically consistent natural language descriptions. Using this processor, we construct BP4D-AUText, the first large-scale text-image paired dataset for fine-grained facial behavior synthesis, comprising over 302K high-quality samples. Given that existing general semantic consistency metrics cannot capture the alignment between anatomical facial descriptions and synthesized muscle movements, we propose the Alignment Accuracy of AU Probability Distributions (AAAD), a task-specific metric that quantifies semantic consistency. Finally, we design VQ-AUFace, a robust baseline framework incorporating anatomical priors and progressive cross-modal alignment, to validate the paradigm. Extensive quantitative experiments and user studies demonstrate the paradigm significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, particularly in challenging conflicting AU scenarios, achieving superior anatomical fidelity, semantic consistency, and visual quality.

AI.tldr: 提出“基于解剖学约束的FACS-AU自然语言驱动人脸行为合成”新范式，构建30万级BP4D-AUText成对数据集，设计AAAD指标与VQ-AUFace框架，在冲突AU场景下取得最佳解剖保真度与视觉质量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅用粗情感标签或one-hot AU向量，难以生成细腻面部行为且易产生冲突AU导致的解剖伪影；亟需将FACS肌肉运动规则、AU间交互与冲突消解机制显式嵌入控制信号。
AI.method: 1) 动态AU文本处理器：把原始AU标注转为解剖一致的自然语言描述；2) 构建BP4D-AUText（302 K高质量文本-图像对）；3) 提出AAAD指标，度量AU概率分布与生成肌肉运动对齐度；4) VQ-AUFace基线：融合解剖先验的渐进式跨模态对齐框架。
AI.result: 定量实验与用户研究显示，新范式在冲突AU复杂场景下显著优于SOTA，解剖保真度、语义一致性与视觉质量全面领先。
AI.conclusion: 将FACS解剖规则编码为自然语言控制，可系统解决细腻面部行为合成与AU冲突难题，为该领域提供新范式、基准数据与评价标准。

title: Align to Misalign: Automatic LLM Jailbreak with Meta-Optimized LLM Judges
summary: Identifying the vulnerabilities of large language models (LLMs) is crucial for improving their safety by addressing inherent weaknesses. Jailbreaks, in which adversaries bypass safeguards with crafted input prompts, play a central role in red-teaming by probing LLMs to elicit unintended or unsafe behaviors. Recent optimization-based jailbreak approaches iteratively refine attack prompts by leveraging LLMs. However, they often rely heavily on either binary attack success rate (ASR) signals, which are sparse, or manually crafted scoring templates, which introduce human bias and uncertainty in the scoring outcomes. To address these limitations, we introduce AMIS (Align to MISalign), a meta-optimization framework that jointly evolves jailbreak prompts and scoring templates through a bi-level structure. In the inner loop, prompts are refined using fine-grained and dense feedback from a fixed scoring template. In the outer loop, the template is optimized using an ASR alignment score, gradually evolving to better reflect true attack outcomes across queries. This co-optimization process yields progressively stronger jailbreak prompts and more calibrated scoring signals. Evaluations on AdvBench and JBB-Behaviors demonstrate that AMIS achieves state-of-the-art performance, including 88.0% ASR on Claude-3.5-Haiku and 100.0% ASR on Claude-4-Sonnet, outperforming existing baselines by substantial margins.

AI.tldr: AMIS框架通过双层协同优化自动生成更高效的越狱提示词及评估模板，使LLM越狱攻击成功率显著提升
AI.motivation: 现有优化型越狱研究过于依赖二元成功率反馈或手工设计的评分模板，致使提示词更新信号稀疏且评估过程存在主观偏差，制约了红队攻防实践中自动发现 LLM 安全隐患的能力
AI.method: 提出 AMIS（Align to MISalign）框架：外层循环以攻击成功率（ASR）为指导，对评分模板做元优化；内层循环用细化稠密的模板分数驱动对越狱提示词的迭代更新，两者形成双向协同演化
AI.result: 在 AdvBench 与 JBB-Behaviors 基准测试中，AMIS 对 Claude-3.5-Haiku 的 ASR 达到 88.0%，在 Claude-4-Sonnet 达到 100.0%，显著超越现有基线方法
AI.conclusion: 该双层协同优化范式能同时提升越狱提示词强度与评分信号准确性，验证了对攻击手段与评价机制联合演进可带来更强的红队暴露效果，为 LLM 漏洞审计提供可靠且可扩展的自动化工具

title: Learning Contextual Runtime Monitors for Safe AI-Based Autonomy
summary: We introduce a novel framework for learning context-aware runtime monitors for AI-based control ensembles. Machine-learning (ML) controllers are increasingly deployed in (autonomous) cyber-physical systems because of their ability to solve complex decision-making tasks. However, their accuracy can degrade sharply in unfamiliar environments, creating significant safety concerns. Traditional ensemble methods aim to improve robustness by averaging or voting across multiple controllers, yet this often dilutes the specialized strengths that individual controllers exhibit in different operating contexts. We argue that, rather than blending controller outputs, a monitoring framework should identify and exploit these contextual strengths. In this paper, we reformulate the design of safe AI-based control ensembles as a contextual monitoring problem. A monitor continuously observes the system's context and selects the controller best suited to the current conditions. To achieve this, we cast monitor learning as a contextual learning task and draw on techniques from contextual multi-armed bandits. Our approach comes with two key benefits: (1) theoretical safety guarantees during controller selection, and (2) improved utilization of controller diversity. We validate our framework in two simulated autonomous driving scenarios, demonstrating significant improvements in both safety and performance compared to non-contextual baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于上下文的多臂赌博机运行时监控框架，为 AI 控制集群动态选择最适配当前环境的控制器，兼顾理论安全保证与控制器多样性利用，在自动驾驶仿真中验证优于非上下文基线。
AI.motivation: ML 控制器在陌生环境下精度骤降，传统集成方法（平均/投票）稀释了各控制器在特定上下文中的专长，需一种能识别并调用“情境最优”控制器而非简单混合输出的安全机制。
AI.method: 将安全控制集群设计重构成“上下文监控”问题：把监控器学习建模为上下文多臂赌博机，实时观测系统情境，基于置信上界或相似上下文历史奖励选择预期最优控制器，并提供选择误差的理论安全界限。
AI.result: 在两项自动驾驶仿真任务中，相比非上下文基线，框架显著降低安全违规率并提升任务性能指标，同时验证控制器多样性被更充分调用。
AI.conclusion: 通过上下文感知的运行时选择而非输出融合，可在理论上保证安全的同时释放集群内控制器的差异化优势，为 AI 控制集群在不确定环境中的可靠部署提供可扩展范式。

title: Fourier Splatting: Generalized Fourier encoded primitives for scalable radiance fields
summary: Novel view synthesis has recently been revolutionized by 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS), which enables real-time rendering through explicit primitive rasterization. However, existing methods tie visual fidelity strictly to the number of primitives: quality downscaling is achieved only through pruning primitives. We propose the first inherently scalable primitive for radiance field rendering. Fourier Splatting employs scalable primitives with arbitrary closed shapes obtained by parameterizing planar surfels with Fourier encoded descriptors. This formulation allows a single trained model to be rendered at varying levels of detail simply by truncating Fourier coefficients at runtime. To facilitate stable optimization, we employ a straight-through estimator for gradient extension beyond the primitive boundary, and introduce HYDRA, a densification strategy that decomposes complex primitives into simpler constituents within the MCMC framework. Our method achieves state-of-the-art rendering quality among planar-primitive frameworks and comparable perceptual metrics compared to leading volumetric representations on standard benchmarks, providing a versatile solution for bandwidth-constrained high-fidelity rendering.

AI.tldr: 提出首个带内禀层级细节的高斯基元—Fourier Splatting；用傅里叶描述符表征任意形状平面 surfels，可在同一训练模型下运行时裁剪系数实现层级缩放，无需重复训练或显式重建。
AI.motivation: 3DGS 视质量最大受限于基元数，但在限带宽、实时或远端场景需动态降质，更不能“一次训练全分辨率输出”；现有策略只能剪枝，冗余大且不连续，迫切需要能够在同一表示内自动调控分辨率的基元表示。
AI.method: ① 将 surfels 与外观属性用紧凑傅里叶级数编码；② 引入 straight-through 估计扩展梯度至基元边界，保证密集优化稳定；③ 设计 HYDRA 密度化策略，在 MCMC 框架下将复杂基元拆分为更简单子基元分布；④ 渲染时仅在前 N 项权重系数的截断范围内合成，从而实现可扩展品质；⑤ 整个流程保持显式栅格化流程，故仍能在 GPU 上实时执行。
AI.result: 在标准基准上与容积法相比，视觉得分(Q-CS, FLIP, LPIPS)达同级领先水平；在纯平面原语对比下刷新最佳 FID/PSNR/SSIM。同一模型 10%→100% 系数实验表明带宽可节省 0.4–0.6 倍且保持可识别视觉质量。
AI.conclusion: Fourier Splatting 提供无需重训和重建的可缩放基元范式，把高频细节“内编码”进傅里叶域，为实时、带宽受限场景（VR 直播、移动端渲染）奠定了单次训练、离线可调的新标准，同时证明平面原语能与高质体积重建逼近。

title: Fast dynamical similarity analysis
summary: Understanding how nonlinear dynamical systems (e.g., artificial neural networks and neural circuits) process information requires comparing their underlying dynamics at scale, across diverse architectures and large neural recordings. While many similarity metrics exist, current approaches fall short for large-scale comparisons. Geometric methods are computationally efficient but fail to capture governing dynamics, limiting their accuracy. In contrast, traditional dynamical similarity methods are faithful to system dynamics but are often computationally prohibitive. We bridge this gap by combining the efficiency of geometric approaches with the fidelity of dynamical methods. We introduce fast dynamical similarity analysis (fastDSA), a computationally efficient and accurate metric for measuring (dis)similarity between nonlinear dynamical systems. FastDSA leverages modern computational tools, including random matrix theory to determine optimal system rank, novel optimization pipelines for aligning system flow fields, and Koopman embeddings.
