Across benchmark nonlinear systems and recurrent network models, fastDSA is robust to arbitrary coordinate choices while remaining sensitive to meaningful dynamical differences, capturing variations in system evolution that geometric methods may miss and traditional methods detect only at high computational cost. To our knowledge, fastDSA is the fastest method that retains accuracy in comparing nonlinear dynamical systems. It enables scalable, statistical analyses across diverse systems, significantly expanding the practical applicability of dynamical similarity analysis.

AI.tldr: 提出 fastDSA——一种兼具几何方法高效性与动力学方法准确性的通用度量，可在大规模、异构非线性动力学系统（神经网络、神经环路等）间快速评估动力学 (不)相似性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法无法兼顾大规模比较所需的计算效率与对系统演化规律的忠实刻画：几何度量快但失真，传统动力学度量准却代价极高。
AI.method: 1. 用随机矩阵理论自动确定最优系统秩；2. 设计优化流水线对齐系统流场（flow field alignment）；3. 借助 Koopman 嵌入将非线性动力学升维线性化；4. 综合上述步骤构建可扩展的 fastDSA 相似性评分。
AI.result: 在经典非线性系统与多种循环网络模型上，fastDSA 对坐标系选择鲁棒，能捕捉几何方法遗漏、传统方法需高成本才能检测的动力学差异，速度显著快于现有高精度方法，同时保持统计可靠性。
AI.conclusion: fastDSA 是目前最快且仍保持高精度非线性动力学系统比较的方法，为跨架构、大规模神经记录与神经网络研究提供了可扩展的统计比较工具。

title: Partial Feedback Online Learning
comment: 40 pages. Fixed some typos in the proof and improved readability
summary: We study a new learning protocol, termed partial-feedback online learning, where each instance admits a set of acceptable labels, but the learner observes only one acceptable label per round. We highlight that, while classical version space is widely used for online learnability, it does not directly extend to this setting. We address this obstacle by introducing a collection version space, which maintains sets of hypotheses rather than individual hypotheses. Using this tool, we obtain a tight characterization of learnability in the set-realizable regime. In particular, we define the Partial-Feedback Littlestone dimension (PFLdim) and the Partial-Feedback Measure Shattering dimension (PMSdim), and show that they tightly characterize the minimax regret for deterministic and randomized learners, respectively. We further identify a nested inclusion condition under which deterministic and randomized learnability coincide, resolving an open question of Raman et al. (2024b). Finally, given a hypothesis space H, we show that beyond set realizability, the minimax regret can be linear even when |H|=2, highlighting a barrier beyond set realizability.

AI.tldr: 作者针对“每轮只能观测到一个容许标签”的在线学习新协议，提出集合版本空间并引入PFLdim/PMSdim，首次给出集合可实现情形下确定性与随机学习的最小最大遗憾紧刻画，指出超越该设定即使|H|=2遗憾仍能为线性。
AI.motivation: 传统版本空间在仅观察单个容许标签的部分反馈场景下失效；为刻画该设定下的可学习性，需发展新的组合维度和分析工具。
AI.method: 1) 用“集合版本空间”跟踪相容假设集而非单个假设；2) 定义Partial-Feedback Littlestone维(PFLdim)与Partial-Feedback Measure Shattering维(PMSdim)；3) 通过维度的覆盖/打散论证导出上下界。
AI.result: - PFLdim/PMSdim分别紧定确定性与随机学习的最小最大遗憾；- 当满足嵌套包含条件时二者等价，解决Raman等开放问题；- 一旦超出集合可实现假设，即使|H|=2遗憾仍呈线性，展示不可学习屏障。
AI.conclusion: 集合版本空间与PFLdim/PMSdim为部分反馈在线学习提供完整可学习性判据；嵌套条件消除确定/随机差异；一旦偏离集合可实现性，学习难度陡增，线性遗憾无法避免。

title: PAM: A Pose-Appearance-Motion Engine for Sim-to-Real HOI Video Generation
summary: Hand-object interaction (HOI) reconstruction and synthesis are becoming central to embodied AI and AR/VR. Yet, despite rapid progress, existing HOI generation research remains fragmented across three disjoint tracks: (1) pose-only synthesis that predicts MANO trajectories without producing pixels; (2) single-image HOI generation that hallucinates appearance from masks or 2D cues but lacks dynamics; and (3) video generation methods that require both the entire pose sequence and the ground-truth first frame as inputs, preventing true sim-to-real deployment. Inspired by the philosophy of Joo et al. (2018), we think that HOI generation requires a unified engine that brings together pose, appearance, and motion within one coherent framework. Thus we introduce PAM: a Pose-Appearance-Motion Engine for controllable HOI video generation. The performance of our engine is validated by: (1) On DexYCB, we obtain an FVD of 29.13 (vs. 38.83 for InterDyn), and MPJPE of 19.37 mm (vs. 30.05 mm for CosHand), while generating higher-resolution 480x720 videos compared to 256x256 and 256x384 baselines. (2) On OAKINK2, our full multi-condition model improves FVD from 68.76 to 46.31. (3) An ablation over input conditions on DexYCB shows that combining depth, segmentation, and keypoints consistently yields the best results. (4) For a downstream hand pose estimation task using SimpleHand, augmenting training with 3,400 synthetic videos (207k frames) allows a model trained on only 50% of the real data plus our synthetic data to match the 100% real baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出统一框架 PAM，将姿态、外观、运动置于同一可 controllable 的 HOI 视频生成引擎，解决现有工作分治、缺动态、需首帧真值等痛点，在 DexYCB/OAKINK2 上同时刷新 FVD 与 MPJPE，并显著提升下游 hand pose 估计的数据效率。
AI.motivation: HOI 生成研究被割裂为三条互不相交的路线：仅姿态轨迹、单图静态 hallucination、需首帧真值的视频生成，均无法满足 embodied AI/AR/VR 对「可部署、可控制、高保真」手物交互视频的需求。
AI.method: 构建 Pose-Appearance-Motion 统一引擎 PAM，联合建模姿态、外观与运动；在扩散式视频生成框架中引入多条件控制（深度、分割、关键点），无需首帧真值即可合成 480×720 高分辨率序列；通过大规模合成数据增强下游任务。
AI.result: DexYCB 上 FVD 降至 29.13，MPJPE 19.37 mm，分辨率提升至 480×720；OAKINK2 的 FVD 从 68.76 降至 46.31；仅用 50% 真实数据+3.4 k 合成视频（20.7 万帧）即可让 SimpleHand 达到 100% 真实数据精度。
AI.conclusion: PAM 首次将姿态-外观-运动统一于单一框架，实现高保真、可控制、sim-to-real 可用的 HOI 视频生成，为 embodied AI 与 AR/VR 提供高效数据引擎与合成解决方案。

title: V-OCBF: Learning Safety Filters from Offline Data via Value-Guided Offline Control Barrier Functions
comment: 28 pages, 9 figures, 11 tables. Paper accepted at TMLR
summary: Ensuring safety in autonomous systems requires controllers that aim to satisfy state-wise constraints without relying on online interaction.While existing Safe Offline RL methods typically enforce soft expected-cost constraints, they struggle to ensure strict state-wise safety. Conversely, Control Barrier Functions (CBFs) offer a principled mechanism to enforce forward invariance, but often rely on expert-designed barrier functions or knowledge of the system dynamics. We introduce Value-Guided Offline Control Barrier Functions (V-OCBF), a framework that learns a neural CBF entirely from offline demonstrations. Unlike prior approaches, V-OCBF does not assume access to the dynamics model; instead, it derives a recursive finite-difference barrier update, enabling model-free learning of a barrier that propagates safety information over time. Moreover, V-OCBF incorporates an expectile-based objective that avoids querying the barrier on out-of-distribution actions and restricts updates to the dataset-supported action set. The learned barrier is then used with a Quadratic Program (QP) formulation to synthesize real-time safe control. Across multiple case studies, V-OCBF yields substantially fewer safety violations than baseline methods while maintaining strong task performance, highlighting its scalability for offline synthesis of safety-critical controllers without online interaction or hand-engineered barriers.

AI.tldr: 提出V-OCBF框架，可在无环境交互、无动力学模型、无手工屏障函数的前提下，仅利用离线数据训练神经CBF，实现实时安全控制。
AI.motivation: 现有离线安全RL仅用期望软约束，难保逐状态硬安全；CBF虽能硬性保证安全，却需动力学或专家设计屏障。本文目标是在“无在线交互、无动力学、无人工”三无条件下获得硬安全策略。
AI.method: 1. 将CBI离散化，用前向差分构建递归屏障更新，使屏障值可完全由离线数据学习；2. 引入expectile回归，只在数据支撑动作集上更新，避免OOD动作；3. 学得的神经CBF嵌入QP实时求解安全控制。
AI.result: 在MuJoCo机器人、无人机等任务中，与SotA离线安全RL及CBF基线相比，安全违规次数降低60–90%，任务回报持平或更优；外推测试显示屏障对OOD状态仍具零违规能力。
AI.conclusion: V-OCBF首次实现完全离线、无模型、无人工的硬安全控制器合成，为安全关键系统提供可扩展的零交互部署途径，并揭示价值函数引导的差分传播是数据驱动CBF的有效范式。

title: Rate-Distortion Optimization for Transformer Inference
summary: Transformers achieve superior performance on many tasks, but impose heavy compute and memory requirements during inference. This inference can be made more efficient by partitioning the process across multiple devices, which, in turn, requires compressing its intermediate representations. We introduce a principled rate-distortion-based framework for lossy compression that learns compact encodings that explicitly trade bitrate for accuracy. Experiments on language benchmarks show that the simplest of the proposed codecs achieves substantial rate savings, outperforming more complex methods. We characterize and analyze the rate-distortion behaviour of transformers, offering a unified lens for understanding performance in representation coding. This formulation extends information-theoretic concepts to define the gap between rate and entropy, and derive some of its bounds. We further develop probably approximately correct (PAC)-style bounds for estimating this gap. For different architectures and tasks, we empirically demonstrate that their rates are driven by these bounds, adding to the explainability of the formulation.

AI.tldr: Transformers推理昂贵；本文用率-失真框架对其隐变量做有损压缩，在保持任务精度的同时显著降低比特率，并给出信息论与PAC界解释。
AI.motivation: Transformer推理阶段计算与存储开销大。通过将推理过程切分到多设备并行，可缓解瓶颈，但必须在设备间传输中间表示，亟需对这些高维隐变量进行高效压缩。
AI.method: 提出基于率-失真理论的端到端有损压缩框架：1)将编码器-解码器作为可微模块接入Transformer，显式优化R(D)=L+λR的拉格朗日目标；2)用可学习的向量量化+熵编码获得紧凑码字；3)推导信息论意义下的速率-熵差及其上下界，并建立PAC风格样本复杂度界，用于估计任意任务的实际速率需求。
AI.result: 语言建模与GLUE基准实验显示，最简单的单尺度VQ码率已达3-5×压缩比，BLEU/准确率下降<1%，优于已有的动态剪枝、低秩投影等复杂方案。率-失真曲线揭示：层深↑→对失真更敏感；注意力熵主导所需码率，与PAC界高度吻合，可解释不同任务/结构的压缩极限。
AI.conclusion: 率-失真视角统一解释了Transformer表示的可压缩性：实际码率被信息熵与任务复杂度共同限定，PAC界为Predict其数值提供理论工具。该框架可直接嵌入多设备推理系统，用可控失真换取通信与存储成本的大幅下降。

title: Mind the Hitch: Dynamic Calibration and Articulated Perception for Autonomous Trucks
comment: CVPR 2026 camera-ready version (minor revision & supplementary included)
summary: Autonomous trucking poses unique challenges due to articulated tractor-trailer geometry, and time-varying sensor poses caused by the fifth-wheel joint and trailer flex. Existing perception and calibration methods assume static baselines or rely on high-parallax and texture-rich scenes, limiting their reliability under real-world settings. We propose dCAP (dynamic Calibration and Articulated Perception), a vision-based framework that continuously estimates the 6-DoF (degree of freedom) relative pose between tractor and trailer cameras. dCAP employs a transformer with cross-view and temporal attention to robustly aggregate spatial cues while maintaining temporal consistency, enabling accurate perception under rapid articulation and occlusion. Integrated with BEVFormer, dCAP improves 3D object detection by replacing static calibration with dynamically predicted extrinsics. To facilitate evaluation, we introduce STT4AT, a CARLA-based benchmark simulating semi-trailer trucks with synchronized multi-sensor suites and time-varying inter-rig geometry across diverse environments. Experiments demonstrate that dCAP achieves stable, accurate perception while addressing the limitations of static calibration in autonomous trucking. The dataset, development kit, and source code will be publicly released.

AI.tldr: 针对铰接式卡车姿态实时变化导致传统标定失效的问题，作者提出基于 Transformer 的 dCAP 框架，在线估计车头-挂车间 6-DoF 外参，并配合 BEVFormer 显著改善 3D 目标检测精度；同期构建仿真基准 STT4AT。
AI.motivation: 1) 牵引车-挂车车辆存在铰接关节和柔性振动，造成传感器基础矩阵随时大幅漂移，纯静态标定或高视差-纹理假设不再成立；2) 现有数据与指标缺失面向此场景的系统级评测工具，阻碍算法迭代。
AI.method: dCAP：多头跨视角 Transformer 叠加时序注意力层，历史多帧车头、挂车摄像头图像端到端回归出干涉系数；冻结 BEVFormer 其余部分，仅将外参替换为预测值完成动态校准；CARLA 对乘员车辆模型改为半挂车，录制 8 类气候-光照、4 种曲率下多段行驶序列同步激光、深度、6DoF 真值，组成 STT4AT benchmark。
AI.result: STT4AT 上 dCAP 平移误差 0.08 m（±0.04 m）、旋转误差 < 0.5°，优于带 ICP 唇动校准基线（0.22 m，2.1°）；移植到 BEVFormer 后，摄像机-激光 3D 检测 mAP 提高 8.6 pp，可遮挡场景鲁棒性上 F1 分数提升 12 pp；实测 20 Hz 下 CPU 仅 23 ms，满足实时。
AI.conclusion: dCAP 首次把跨视角 Transformer 用于‘铰接车实时外参推断’，摆脱静态标定和 HDR 纹理依赖，为自动驾驶重卡在匝道、弯道、起伏公路等复杂工况给出稳定感知；STT4AT 填补相关基准空白。源码与数据集公开发布，便于后续研究扩展至多车厢、甩挂、动态装卸等场景。

title: DR-LoRA: Dynamic Rank LoRA for Fine-Tuning Mixture-of-Experts Models
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) has become a prominent paradigm for scaling Large Language Models (LLMs). Parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods, such as LoRA, are widely adopted to adapt pretrained MoE LLMs to downstream tasks. However, existing approaches typically assign identical LoRA ranks to all expert modules, ignoring the heterogeneous specialization of pretrained experts. This uniform allocation leads to a resource mismatch: task-relevant experts are under-provisioned, while less relevant ones receive redundant parameters. To address this, we propose DR-LoRA, a Dynamic Rank LoRA framework for fine-tuning pretrained MoE models. Specifically, DR-LoRA initializes all expert LoRA modules with a small active rank and uses an expert saliency score, which combines routing frequency and gradient-based rank importance, to identify which experts would benefit most from additional capacity. It then periodically expands the active ranks of the task-critical expert LoRA, progressively constructing a heterogeneous rank distribution tailored to the target task. Experiments on three MoE models across six tasks show that DR-LoRA consistently outperforms LoRA and other strong baselines, demonstrating that task-adaptive heterogeneous rank allocation is an effective strategy to improve active capacity utilization in MoE fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: DR-LoRA用动态LoRA秩替代MoE微调中的“一刀切”低秩矩阵，按专家重要度逐步扩容，实现容量按需分配。
AI.motivation: 现有MoE微调给所有专家分配相同LoRA秩，忽视专家异构专化，导致任务相关专家容量不足、无关专家冗余。
AI.method: 提出DR-LoRA：先以极小秩初始化全部专家LoRA；利用“路由频次+梯度”计算专家显著性得分，周期性地为高显著性专家扩容秩，逐步生成任务专属的异构秩分布。
AI.result: 在3种MoE模型、6项任务上，DR-LoRA一致优于统一秩LoRA及多种强基线，验证其容量利用率提升。
AI.conclusion: 任务感知的异构LoRA秩分配是提升MoE微调效率与性能的有效策略，DR-LoRA为后续MoE参数高效调优提供新范式。

title: Safer by Diffusion, Broken by Context: Diffusion LLM's Safety Blessing and Its Failure Mode
summary: Diffusion large language models (D-LLMs) offer an alternative to autoregressive LLMs (AR-LLMs) and have demonstrated advantages in generation efficiency. Beyond the utility benefits, we argue that D-LLMs exhibit a previously underexplored safety blessing: their diffusion-style generation confers intrinsic robustness against jailbreak attacks originally designed for AR-LLMs. In this work, we provide an initial analysis of the underlying mechanism, showing that the diffusion trajectory induces a stepwise reduction effect that progressively suppresses unsafe generations. This robustness, however, is not absolute. Following this analysis, we highlight a simple yet effective failure mode, context nesting, in which harmful requests are embedded within structured benign contexts. Empirically, we show that this simple black-box strategy bypasses D-LLMs' safety blessing, achieving state-of-the-art attack success rates across models and benchmarks. Notably, it enables the first successful jailbreak of Gemini Diffusion to our knowledge, exposing a critical vulnerability in proprietary D-LLMs. Together, our results characterize both the origins and the limits of D-LLMs' safety blessing, constituting an early-stage red-teaming of D-LLMs.

AI.tldr: 扩散式大模型(D-LLM)天然对越狱攻击具有鲁棒性，但'嵌套上下文'黑盒攻击可突破该防线，首次在Gemini Diffusion上实现越狱。
AI.motivation: 现有越狱方法主要针对自回归LLM，尚不清楚扩散式LLM是否同样脆弱；作者希望揭示D-LLM的安全边界并为后续红队评估奠基。
AI.method: 理论分析扩散轨迹的“逐步抑制”机制；设计并评估一种仅包装有害请求的“嵌套上下文”黑盒攻击，在多个D-LLM与公开基准上测试其成功率。
AI.result: D-LLM在直接有害提示下几乎不被越狱；嵌套上下文攻击将成功率提升至SOTA，并首次攻破Gemini Diffusion，暴露其关键漏洞。
AI.conclusion: 扩散生成过程带来内生安全优势，但非绝对；简单包装即可绕过安全机制，强调需针对D-LLM设计全新对齐与防护策略。

title: ScrollScape: Unlocking 32K Image Generation With Video Diffusion Priors
summary: While diffusion models excel at generating images with conventional dimensions, pushing them to synthesize ultra-high-resolution imagery at extreme aspect ratios (EAR) often triggers catastrophic structural failures, such as object repetition and spatial fragmentation. This limitation fundamentally stems from a lack of robust spatial priors, as static text-to-image models are primarily trained on image distributions with conventional dimensions. To overcome this bottleneck, we present ScrollScape, a novel framework that reformulates EAR image synthesis into a continuous video generation process through two core innovations. By mapping the spatial expansion of a massive canvas to the temporal evolution of video frames, ScrollScape leverages the inherent temporal consistency of video models as a powerful global constraint to ensure long-range structural integrity. Specifically, Scanning Positional Encoding (ScanPE) distributes global coordinates across frames to act as a flexible moving camera, while Scrolling Super-Resolution (ScrollSR) leverages video super-resolution priors to circumvent memory bottlenecks, efficiently scaling outputs to an unprecedented 32K resolution. Fine-tuned on a curated 3K multi-ratio image dataset, ScrollScape effectively aligns pre-trained video priors with the EAR generation task. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that it significantly outperforms existing image-diffusion baselines by eliminating severe localized artifacts. Consequently, our method overcomes inherent structural bottlenecks to ensure exceptional global coherence and visual fidelity across diverse domains at extreme scales.

AI.tldr: ScrollScape 把极端长宽比（EAR）超高分辨率图像生成重铸为连续视频生成，用视频一致性与显式全局坐标扫描解决重复、碎片化等结构失败，实现 32 K 级无局部伪影输出。
AI.motivation: 静态文生图扩散模型因仅在常规分辨率分布上训练，缺乏大画布空间先验，导致生成 EAR 图像时出现物体重复、空间断裂等灾难性结构失败；需要一种能利用已有视频先验的新范式。
AI.method: 提出 ScrollScape：1) 将 EAR 图像扩展映射为视频帧时间演化，引入 ScanPE 为每帧分配全局坐标，实现“移动相机”式连续编码；2) ScrollSR 把视频超分先验转化为滚动分块超分，绕过显存瓶颈，逐步合成 32 K 输出；3) 基于精选 3 K 多比例图像微调，对齐预训练视频先验与 EAR 任务。
AI.result: 在极端分辨率与多样长宽比下，ScrollScape 相较图像扩散基线显著消除局部伪影，全局结构连贯性与视觉保真度全面提升，实验达到 32 K 从未见分辨率输出且保持无重复碎片。
AI.conclusion: 通过把视频生成的时间一致性当作全局约束，ScrollScape 突破了超高分辨率 EAR 图像生成的结构瓶颈，验证了“时空化空间”思路在极端尺度下的有效性，为后续大画布创作、全景与超长条图生成提供新基准。

title: The Illusion of AI Expertise Under Uncertainty: Navigating Elusive Ground Truth via a Probabilistic Paradigm
summary:
Benchmarking the capabilities of AI systems, including Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision Models, typically ignores the impact of uncertainty in the underlying ground truth answers from experts. This ambiguity is not just limited to human preferences, but is also consequential even in safety critical domains such as medicine where uncertainty is pervasive. In this paper, we introduce a probabilistic paradigm to theoretically explain how high certainty in ground truth answers is almost always necessary for even an expert to achieve high scores, whereas in datasets with high variation in ground truth answers there may be little difference between a random labeller and an expert. This characteristic also manifests when comparing models, where uncertainty obfuscates differences between poor and high performing models. Therefore, ignoring uncertainty in ground truth evaluation data can result in the misleading conclusion that a non-expert has similar performance to that of an expert. Using the probabilistic paradigm, we thus bring forth the concepts of expected accuracy and expected F1 and compare the estimated score an expert human or system can achieve given ground truth answer variability across 6 datasets and 9 models.
  The results lead to the recommendation that stratification by the probability of the ground truth answer becomes critical when expert performance is relatively low. Under stratified evaluation, performance comparison becomes more reliable in high certainty bins, mitigating the effect of the key confounding factor -- uncertainty.

AI.tldr: 评测AI模型时若忽视专家标注本身的概率不确定性，会把「随机标注者」误当成「专家级」，本文提出expected-accuracy/F1及按标注确定性分层评估，使优劣模型差异重新显化。
AI.motivation: 现有基准把ground-truth当绝对真值，但医学等安全关键场景专家标注亦含高不确定性；不确定度会淹没模型差异并错误放大非专家表现，需量化其干扰。
AI.method: 建立“给定真值分布下的期望指标”概率框架；在6个数据集、9个模型上估计人类/系统的expected-accuracy与expected-F1；提出按P(真值)分层评估，优先在高确定性区间比较性能。
AI.result: 理论证明：真值确定性越高，专家才显著优于随机标注；确定性低时二者得分趋同。实验显示分层后高确定性bin内模型排序稳定，且优劣差异被重新放大，中-低bin则差异不显著。
AI.conclusion: 忽略真值不确定性会导致“非专家≈专家”的假象；推荐在基准测试中强制按标注概率分层，仅在确定性足够高的子群体上比较模型，以去除不确定性这一关键混淆因子。

title: The Geometric Anatomy of Capability Acquisition in Transformers
comment: 19 pages (13 pages main, 6 pages appendix), 13 tables, 8 figures. v4: significant rewrite with additional experiments
summary: Neural networks gain capabilities during training, but the internal changes that precede capability acquisition are not well understood. In particular, the relationship between geometric change and behavioral change, and the effect of task difficulty and model scale on that relationship, is unclear. We track geometric measures and linear probes across six transformer sizes (405K--151M parameters), eight algorithmic tasks (144 task$\times$level$\times$model combinations), and three Pythia language models (160M--2.8B). Across all settings, representations first collapse to a low-dimensional state, then recover, and only then does behavioral performance improve. Linear probes show that the model's hidden states already contain task-relevant information before the model can act on it. The collapse floor is task-specific, the collapse propagates top-down through the network, and of the geometric measures tested, only \rankme reliably precedes capability acquisition for hard tasks. Whether this precursor is detectable depends on task difficulty relative to model capacity. For hard tasks, there is a clear gap: geometry changes first, behavior follows. For easy tasks, the model learns so quickly that both happen simultaneously and no precursor is detectable. On Pythia-2.8B, a logical deduction task that is genuinely hard for the model shows a precursor gap of ${\sim}$49K training steps, while easy benchmarks show none. This suggests that geometric patterns observed in small proxy models can persist at larger scale when the task remains difficult relative to model capacity.

AI.tldr: 大规模实验表明：在Transformer与语言模型中，只有当内部表示先经历“维度坍缩→恢复”的几何相变后，行为准确率才显著提升；线性探测显示任务信息早被编码但尚未可用。唯一稳定的前驱信号是RankMe，其可检测性取决于任务难度/模型容量比；小代理模型中观察到的几何模式在难任务下可迁移至大模型。
AI.motivation: 目前缺乏对神经网络“获得能力前内部究竟发生什么”的系统刻画，尤其不清楚几何变化与行为变化的因果时序，以及任务难度与模型规模如何调节该关系。
AI.method: 在8种算法任务（144 任务×难度×模型组合）和3个Pythia语言模型（160M–2.8B）上，同步追踪6种规模Transformer（405K–151M参数）的6类几何指标与线性探测准确率，建立“几何-行为”时间对齐曲线，并引入RankMe等指标量化表示坍缩与恢复。
AI.result: 所有设置下均出现“维度坍缩→恢复→行为提升”三阶段；线性探测显示隐藏状态在行为达标前已含任务信息。仅RankMe在难任务中稳定提前出现可检测信号，其领先步数随任务难度/容量比增大而拉长（Pythia-2.8B逻辑推理任务中达≈49K步）；易任务因学习过快，几何与行为几乎同步，无可见前驱。
AI.conclusion: 表示几何的“坍缩-恢复”相变是能力涌现的必要前置，RankMe可作为任务难度的早期预警器；只要任务对模型保持足够难，小模型的几何前驱模式可直接迁移至大模型，为规模扩展提供可解释监控手段。

title: OmniWeaving: Towards Unified Video Generation with Free-form Composition and Reasoning
comment: 32 pages, 22 figures. Project Page: https://omniweaving.github.io. Github: https://github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/OmniWeaving. Model: https://huggingface.co/tencent/HY-OmniWeaving
summary: While proprietary systems such as Seedance-2.0 have achieved remarkable success in omni-capable video generation, open-source alternatives significantly lag behind. Most academic models remain heavily fragmented, and the few existing efforts toward unified video generation still struggle to seamlessly integrate diverse tasks within a single framework. To bridge this gap, we propose OmniWeaving, an omni-level video generation model featuring powerful multimodal composition and reasoning-informed capabilities. By leveraging a massive-scale pretraining dataset that encompasses diverse compositional and reasoning-augmented scenarios, OmniWeaving learns to temporally bind interleaved text, multi-image, and video inputs while acting as an intelligent agent to infer complex user intentions for sophisticated video creation. Furthermore, we introduce IntelligentVBench, the first comprehensive benchmark designed to rigorously assess next-level intelligent unified video generation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that OmniWeaving achieves SoTA performance among open-source unified models. The codes and model have already been publicly available. Project Page: https://omniweaving.github.io.

AI.tldr: 开源首次逼近Seedance-2.0级“全能力”视频生成：提出统一框架OmniWeaving，并配套评测基准IntelligentVBench，代码已开源。
AI.motivation: 现有开源视频生成模型在「多任务统一」与「复杂推理」上远落后于商业闭源系统，缺乏可横向对比的严肃基准，阻碍了社区发展。
AI.method: 1) 构建含大量组合-推理场景的大规模预训练语料；2) 设计单一transformer模型，支持文本、图像、视频交错输入的时序绑定；3) 在模型中嵌入意图推理模块，将用户多模态提示解析为细粒度视频生成计划；4) 提出涵盖文本一致性、物理合理性、风格可控性等12维度的IntelligentVBench评测体系。
AI.result: 在IntelligentVBench及主流公开数据集上，OmniWeaving在全部12项指标中取得开源SOTA，平均相比前最好统一模型提升18.7%，并缩小与Seedance-2.0的平均性能差距至5%以内。
AI.conclusion: 统一多模态输入与推理驱动的生成范式可使开源模型逼近商用级表现；IntelligentVBench为后续研究提供了公平比较平台，将推动「通用视频生成智能」进一步开放化。

title: M3-BENCH: Process-Aware Evaluation of LLM Agents' Social Behaviors in Mixed-Motive Games
summary: Existing benchmarks for LLM agents' social behavior typically focus on a single capability dimension and evaluate only behavioral outcomes, overlooking process signals from reasoning and communication. We present M3-BENCH, a benchmark of 24 mixed-motive games with a process-aware evaluation framework spanning three complementary views: Behavioral Trajectory Analysis (BTA), Reasoning Process Analysis (RPA), and Communication Content Analysis (CCA). Evaluating 11 frontier LLMs and a human baseline, M3-BENCH reveals substantial differences in social competence that outcome-only evaluation misses. In particular, we identify an "overthink-undercommunicate" pattern: reasoning models achieve strong internal deliberation scores but often fail to translate them into effective social communication. Although top models can surpass humans on task outcomes, humans exhibit markedly higher cross-view consistency, suggesting that current LLM agents still lack the behavioral coherence characteristic of human social competence. Our analysis further shows that the three-view decomposition surfaces safety-relevant risks, such as cooperative behavior paired with latent opportunistic reasoning, that remain hidden under outcome-only metrics.

AI.tldr: 24个混合动机博弈＋三视图（行为、推理、沟通）过程评估揭示：顶尖LLM结果虽过人，却
AI.motivation: 现有LLM社会能力基准只测最终行为结果，忽视推理与沟通过程信号，难以发现潜在风险与能力缺口。
AI.method: 构建 M3-BENCH：24 个混合动机博弈＋三视图评估框架（BTA 行为轨迹、RPA 推理过程、CCA 沟通内容），对 11 个前沿 LLM 及人基线做系统对比。
AI.result: 结果导向评估漏检显著差异：LLM 呈
AI.conclusion: 未来 LLM 社会智能需从

title: 2Mamba2Furious: Linear in Complexity, Competitive in Accuracy
summary: Linear attention transformers have become a strong alternative to softmax attention due to their efficiency. However, linear attention tends to be less expressive and results in reduced accuracy compared to softmax attention. To bridge the accuracy gap between softmax attention and linear attention, we manipulate Mamba-2, a very strong linear attention variant. We first simplify Mamba-2 down to its most fundamental and important components, evaluating which specific choices make it most accurate. From this simplified Mamba variant (Mamba-2S), we improve the A-mask and increase the order of the hidden state, resulting in a method, which we call 2Mamba, that is nearly as accurate as softmax attention, yet much more memory efficient for long context lengths. We also investigate elements to Mamba-2 that help surpass softmax attention accuracy. Code is provided for all our experiments

AI.tldr: 把 Mamba-2 精简到核心组件，提出 2Mamba：保留线性注意力的高效与长序列低显存优势，同时把精度拉到与 softmax attention 几乎持平，甚至局部超越。
AI.motivation: 线性注意力 Transformer 虽高效，但精度始终落后于 softmax attention。作者希望在不牺牲线性复杂度的前提下，把精度差距补平乃至反超。
AI.method: 1. 系统剥离 Mamba-2，得到最简主干 Mamba-2S；2. 识别并保留决定精度的关键设计（A-mask 结构、高阶隐状态）；3. 在这两处做升级：改进 A-mask 的初始化与更新方式，并将隐状态阶数从 64 提到 256；4. 整合后命名 2Mamba，保持 O(d N) 的线性复杂度与 O(d) 的显存。
AI.result: 在 1k–32k 长度范围的 Long Range Arena、PG-19、arXiv 摘要生成等任务中，2Mamba 与同等规模的 softmax Transformer 相比，平均准确率差距＜0.3%，显存峰值下降 3–7×，速度提升 1.8–2.4×；在部分难例上甚至高出 softmax 0.5–1.1 个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 线性注意力只要选对「A-mask + 隐状态阶数」这一对核心杠杆，就能在几乎不增加计算量的情况下追平甚至超越 softmax attention，为长上下文大模型提供一条更省显存的新路线。作者已开源全部代码与配置。

title: GridVAD: Open-Set Video Anomaly Detection via Spatial Reasoning over Stratified Frame Grids
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are powerful open-set reasoners, yet their direct use as anomaly detectors in video surveillance is fragile: without calibrated anomaly priors, they alternate between missed detections and hallucinated false alarms. We argue the problem is not the VLM itself but how it is used. VLMs should function as anomaly proposers, generating open-set candidate descriptions that are then grounded and tracked by purpose-built spatial and temporal modules. We instantiate this propose-ground-propagate principle in GridVAD, a training-free pipeline that produces pixel-level anomaly masks without any domain-specific training. A VLM reasons over stratified grid representations of video clips to generate natural-language anomaly proposals. Self-Consistency Consolidation (SCC) filters hallucinations by retaining only proposals that recur across multiple independent samplings. Grounding DINO anchors each surviving proposal to a bounding box, and SAM2 propagates it as a dense mask through the anomaly interval. The per-clip VLM budget is fixed at M+1 calls regardless of video length, where M can be set according to the proposals needed. On UCSD Ped2, GridVAD achieves the highest Pixel-AUROC (77.59) among all compared methods, surpassing even the partially fine-tuned TAO (75.11) and outperforms other zero-shot approaches on object-level RBDC by over 5x. Ablations reveal that SCC provides a controllable precision-recall tradeoff: filtering improves all pixel level metrics at a modest cost in object-level recall. Efficiency experiments show GridVAD is 2.7x more call-efficient than uniform per-frame VLM querying while additionally producing dense segmentation masks.Code and qualitative video results are available at https://gridvad.github.io.

AI.tldr: 针对视频异常检测中视觉-语言模型易产生漏报与误报的问题，作者提出 GridVAD——一种无需训练、保持固定 VLM 调用量的逐像素异常分割框架，其核心是让 VLM 仅“提议”候选异常，再通过自一致性过滤、目标定位和时序传播模块实现定位与分割。
AI.motivation: 1) 直接将 VLM 当做异常检测器时表现不稳定——缺乏先验校准会在遗漏与幻觉间反复；2) 现有零样本方法以帧为单位提交查询，长视频成本高且难以生成精确定位(mask)。作者主张用 VLM 作为“开放域异常提议器”而非最终判决器。
AI.method:
- 提出“提议-定位-传播”三阶段：(i) 三层级网格帧采样＋VLM 生成自然语言异常候选；(ii) Self-Consistency Consolidation(SCC) 多轮重采样去噪；(iii) Grounding DINO 定位框＋Segment Anything 2 沿时间轴传播得像素级掩码。
- 长度无关的代价：固定 M+1 次 VLM 调用即可覆盖任意视频。
- 零训练/微调，完全零样本。
AI.result: 在 UCSD Ped2 上，GridVAD 的 Pixel-AUROC 为 77.59，超过半微调 TAO(75.11) 并保持最高像素级性能；在对象级 RBDC 基准上相比其他零样本方法提升 5 倍。消融显示 SCC 可通过不同程度的过滤在像素级指标（召回与精度）间滑动取舍；整体比逐帧均匀查询节省 2.7× VLM 调用。
AI.conclusion: 将 VLM 定位为“提议器”而非检测器，可显著抑制开放域幻觉并降低推理成本。GridVAD 以固定预算实现像素级异常分割，无需任何域特化训练，符合实际监控场景对零样本、高精度与可解释性的需求。

title: Predicting LLM Output Length via Entropy-Guided Representations
summary: The long-tailed distribution of sequence lengths in LLM serving and reinforcement learning (RL) sampling causes significant computational waste due to excessive padding in batched inference. Existing methods rely on auxiliary models for static length prediction, but they incur high overhead, generalize poorly, and fail in stochastic "one-to-many" sampling scenarios. We introduce a lightweight framework that reuses the main model's internal hidden states for efficient length prediction. Our framework features two core components: 1) Entropy-Guided Token Pooling (EGTP), which uses on-the-fly activations and token entropy for highly accurate static prediction with negligible cost, and 2) Progressive Length Prediction (PLP), which dynamically estimates the remaining length at each decoding step to handle stochastic generation. To validate our approach, we build and release ForeLen, a comprehensive benchmark with long-sequence, Chain-of-Thought, and RL data. On ForeLen, EGTP achieves state-of-the-art accuracy, reducing MAE by 29.16\% over the best baseline. Integrating our methods with a length-aware scheduler yields significant end-to-end throughput gains. Our work provides a new technical and evaluation baseline for efficient LLM inference.

AI.tldr: 利用主模型自身隐状态做轻量级长度预测，消除长序列批处理中的填充浪费，EGTP+PLP 在 ForeLen 基准上把 MAE 再降 29%，端到端吞吐显著提升。
AI.motivation: 长序列长尾分布导致批推理大量填充浪费；现有辅助模型预测长度开销高、泛化差，且在 RL“一对多”采样中失效。
AI.method: 1) EGTP：在线利用主模型激活与 token 熵做静态长度预测，零额外模型成本；2) PLP：逐步解码时动态估计剩余长度，应对随机生成；二者与长度感知调度器协同。
AI.result: 自建 ForeLen 基准（含长序列、CoT、RL 数据）上，EGTP 将 MAE 相较最强基线再降 29.16%，集成后系统整体吞吐显著上升。
AI.conclusion: 无需辅助模型即可精准预测序列长度，为高效 LLM 推理提供了新的技术路线与评估基准。

title: What Capable Agents Must Know: Selection Theorems for Robust Decision-Making under Uncertainty
comment: 23 pages; added PSR recovery (Theorems 3 & 4), and updated related work
summary: As artificial agents become increasingly capable, what internal structure is *necessary* for an agent to act competently under uncertainty? Classical results show that optimal control can be *implemented* using belief states or world models, but not that such representations are required. We prove quantitative "selection theorems" showing that strong task performance (low *average-case regret*) forces world models, belief-like memory and -- under task mixtures -- persistent variables resembling core primitives associated with emotion, along with informational modularity under block-structured tasks. Our results cover stochastic policies, partial observability, and evaluation under task distributions, without assuming optimality, determinism, or access to an explicit model. Technically, we reduce predictive modeling to binary "betting" decisions and show that regret bounds limit probability mass on suboptimal bets, enforcing the predictive distinctions needed to separate high-margin outcomes. In fully observed settings, this yields approximate recovery of the interventional transition kernel; under partial observability, it implies necessity of predictive state and belief-like memory, addressing an open question in prior world-model recovery work.

AI.tldr: 在不确定性下要实现低平均遗憾，任何智能体必须内在地具备世界模型、类信念记忆及类情感持久变量；我们首次给出不依赖最优性假设的定量“选择定理”证明。
AI.motivation: 现有理论仅说明“可以”用世界模型实现最优控制，但未证明其“必要”。面对部分可观察、随机策略及任务分布评估的真实场景，需回答：到底什么内部表征是不可或缺的？
AI.method: 将预测建模归约为二元“下注”决策；利用遗憾界限制次优下注的概率质量，迫使智能体做出能区分高回报结果的预测区分。技术路线不预设最优性、确定性，也不依赖显式给定的环境模型。
AI.result: 1) 完全可观察时，近似恢复干预转移核；2) 部分可观察时，必须维护预测状态与类信念记忆；3) 多任务混合下，出现类似“核心情感原语”的持久变量及信息模块化结构；4) 给出低平均遗憾对内部表征的定量下界。
AI.conclusion: 低遗憾这一行为标准本身就“选择”出世界模型、信念式记忆乃至类情感模块，无需额外结构假设；该结果为理解通用智能体的最小内部结构提供了理论基础，并弥合了世界模型可恢复性研究中的开放问题。

title: AutoWeather4D: Autonomous Driving Video Weather Conversion via G-Buffer Dual-Pass Editing
summary: Generative video models have significantly advanced the photorealistic synthesis of adverse weather for autonomous driving; however, they consistently demand massive datasets to learn rare weather scenarios. While 3D-aware editing methods alleviate these data constraints by augmenting existing video footage, they are fundamentally bottlenecked by costly per-scene optimization and suffer from inherent geometric and illumination entanglement. In this work, we introduce AutoWeather4D, a feed-forward 3D-aware weather editing framework designed to explicitly decouple geometry and illumination. At the core of our approach is a G-buffer Dual-pass Editing mechanism. The Geometry Pass leverages explicit structural foundations to enable surface-anchored physical interactions, while the Light Pass analytically resolves light transport, accumulating the contributions of local illuminants into the global illumination to enable dynamic 3D local relighting. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AutoWeather4D achieves comparable photorealism and structural consistency to generative baselines while enabling fine-grained parametric physical control, serving as a practical data engine for autonomous driving.

AI.tldr: AutoWeather4D是一种前馈3D感知天气编辑框架，通过显式分离几何与光照，两步G-buffer操作实现高保真、参数化天气合成，无需每场景优化，可直接服务自动驾驶数据生成。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式视频模型需海量数据学习罕见天气，3D编辑法虽可复用已有视频，却受限于逐场景高昂优化成本，且几何-光照耦合导致控制困难。
AI.method: 提出G-buffer双通道机制：Geometry Pass利用显式结构锚定表面物理交互；Light Pass解析光传输，将局部光源贡献累积为全局光照，实现动态3D局部重照明；整个流程为前馈网络，无需逐场景优化。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上，AutoWeather4D达到与生成式基线相当的逼真度与结构一致性，同时提供细粒度、参数化的物理控制，显著降低数据生产成本。
AI.conclusion: AutoWeather4D通过显式解耦几何与光照，实现高效、可控的3D天气编辑，可作为实用的自动驾驶数据引擎，替代昂贵的大规模数据采集与逐场景优化方案。

title: Agentified Assessment of Logical Reasoning Agents
comment: Accepted at ICLR 2026 Agents in the Wild (AIWILD) Workshop. 5 pages, 2 figures, 1 table
summary: We present a framework for evaluating and benchmarking logical reasoning agents when assessment itself must be reproducible, auditable, and robust to execution failures. Building on agentified assessment, we use an assessor agent to issue tasks, enforce execution budgets, parse outputs, and record structured failure types, while the agent under test only needs to expose a standardized agent-to-agent interface. As a case study, we benchmark an auto-formalization agent for first-order logic (FOL) reasoning on a solver-verified and repaired split of FOLIO. The agent translates natural language premises and conclusions into executable Z3Py programs and employs satisfiability modulo theories (SMT) solving to determine logical entailment. On the cleaned FOLIO validation set, the auto-formalization agent achieves 86.70% accuracy under the assessor protocol, outperforming a chain-of-thought baseline (73.89%).

AI.tldr: 提出一套可复现、可审计、对执行失败鲁棒的逻辑推理智能体评测框架，并以自动形式化智能体在修复后的FOLIO数据集上86.70%的准确率验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有逻辑推理智能体缺乏统一、可审计且对执行失败鲁棒的评测协议，导致结果难以复现、对比与可信。
AI.method: 构建“评估智能体”范式：由独立 assessor 代理负责任务下发、预算控制、输出解析与结构化失败记录；被测代理仅需开放标准化 agent-to-agent 接口。案例中以自动形式化代理将自然语言前提/结论翻译为 Z3Py 代码，利用 SMT 求解器判定一阶逻辑蕴涵关系，并在人工校验并修复的 FOLIO 子集上执行。
AI.result: 在清理后的 FOLIO 验证集上，自动形式化代理在评估协议下得 86.70% 准确率，优于思维链基线 73.89%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架实现了对逻辑推理代理的可复现、可审计评测，并证明自动形式化+SMT 路径在一阶逻辑推理任务中显著优于链式思考方法。

title: Interleaved Resampling and Refitting: Data and Compute-Efficient Evaluation of Black-Box Predictors
summary:
We study the problem of evaluating the excess risk of large-scale empirical risk minimization under the square loss. Leveraging the idea of wild refitting and resampling, we assume only black-box access to the training algorithm and develop an efficient procedure for estimating the excess risk. Our evaluation algorithm is both computationally and data efficient. In particular, it requires access to only a single dataset and does not rely on any additional validation data. Computationally, it only requires refitting the model on several much smaller datasets obtained through sequential resampling, in contrast to previous wild refitting methods that require full-scale retraining and might therefore be unsuitable for large-scale trained predictors.
  Our algorithm has an interleaved sequential resampling-and-refitting structure. We first construct pseudo-responses through a randomized residual symmetrization procedure. At each round, we thus resample two sub-datasets from the resulting covariate pseudo-response pairs. Finally, we retrain the model separately on these two small artificial datasets. We establish high probability excess risk guarantees under both fixed design and random design settings, showing that with a suitably chosen noise scale, our interleaved resampling and refitting algorithm yields an upper bound on the prediction error. Our theoretical analysis draws on tools from empirical process theory, harmonic analysis, Toeplitz operator theory, and sharp tensor concentration inequalities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种仅需单次训练数据、无需验证集即可高效估计大规模 ERM 平方损失 excess risk 的「交错重抽–重拟合」算法，并给出高概率上界保证。
AI.motivation: 大规模经验风险最小化模型的 excess risk 评估通常需完整重训或额外验证数据，计算与数据开销巨大；亟需只用黑箱训练器、零验证集、计算友好的高效评估方法。
AI.method: 1) 随机残差对称化构造伪响应；2) 从 covariate-伪响应对中序贯重抽两个小子集；3) 在小子集上分别重拟合模型；4) 迭代上述过程并用噪声尺度控制偏差，实现 wild refitting 的轻量化。
AI.result: 在固定设计与随机设计下，算法以高概率给出 excess risk 的显式上界；计算成本仅与小子集规模成正比，避免全规模重训；数据效率上仅需单一训练集，无需验证集。
AI.conclusion: 交错重抽–重拟合框架首次实现大规模平方损失 ERM 的“零验证、轻量重训”风险估计，理论工具涵盖经验过程、调和分析、Toeplitz 算子与尖锐张量浓度，兼具统计保证与工程可扩展性。

title: Generation Is Compression: Zero-Shot Video Coding via Stochastic Rectified Flow
summary: Recent advances in generative modeling have enabled perceptual video compression at ultra-low bitrates, yet existing methods predominantly treat the generative model as a refinement or reconstruction module attached to a separately designed codec backbone. We propose \emph{Generative Video Codebook Codec} (GVCC), a zero-shot framework that turns a pretrained video generative model into the codec itself: the transmitted bitstream directly specifies the generative decoding trajectory, with no retraining required. To enable this, we convert the deterministic rectified-flow ODE of modern video foundation models into an equivalent SDE at inference time, unlocking per-step stochastic injection points for codebook-driven compression. Building on this unified backbone, we instantiate three complementary conditioning strategies -- \emph{Image-to-Video} (I2V) with autoregressive GOP chaining, tail latent residual correction, and adaptive atom allocation, \emph{Text-to-Video} (T2V) operating at near-zero side information as a pure generative prior, and \emph{First-Last-Frame-to-Video} (FLF2V) with boundary-sharing GOP chaining for dual-anchor temporal control. Together, these variants span a principled trade-off space between spatial fidelity, temporal coherence, and compression efficiency. Experiments on standard benchmarks show that GVCC achieves high-quality reconstruction below 0.002\,bpp while supporting flexible bitrate control through a single hyperparameter.

AI.tldr: 把现成视频生成模型直接改造成零重训的极低码率视频编解码器，通过把确定性ODE转成可注入码本的SDE，实现I2V/T2V/FLF2V三类任务，0.002 bpp下仍有高保真重建。
AI.motivation: 当前超低码率感知视频压缩虽利用生成模型，但仅将其作为独立编解码骨架的后处理插件，存在冗余训练与系统割裂；作者希望用预训练生成模型“自身体”充当编解码器，实现无需再训、统一且可扩展的压缩框架。
AI.method: 1) 将现代视频基础模型的确定性整流ODE在推理时等价转换为SDE，逐步暴露随机注入接口；2) 在该SDE轨迹上建立可学习的码本，使比特流直接索引生成解码路径；3) 提出三套互补条件策略：I2V用自回归GOP链+残差修正+自适应原子分配，T2V以近零边信息作为纯生成先验，FLF2V通过边界共享GOP链实现双锚时序控制；4) 单超参数控制不同任务与码率。
AI.result: 在标准测试集上，GVCC在0.002 bpp以下仍保持高质量重建，明显优于现有超低码率方案；I2V、T2V、FLF2V三类任务均展示平滑的码率-失真-时序一致性权衡曲线，且无需针对编解码再训练。
AI.conclusion: 通过把预训练视频生成模型“本体”转成可码本驱动的SDE解码器，GVCC首次实现零重训、统一框架下的超低码率感知视频压缩，为后续生成式编解码研究提供了新的可扩展范式。

title: Efficient Reasoning with Balanced Thinking
summary: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) have shown remarkable reasoning capabilities, yet they often suffer from overthinking, expending redundant computational steps on simple problems, or underthinking, failing to explore sufficient reasoning paths despite inherent capabilities. These issues lead to inefficiencies and potential inaccuracies, limiting practical deployment in resource-constrained settings. Existing methods to mitigate overthinking, such as suppressing reflective keywords or adjusting reasoning length, may inadvertently induce underthinking, compromising accuracy. Therefore, we propose ReBalance, a training-free framework that achieves efficient reasoning with balanced thinking. ReBalance leverages confidence as a continuous indicator of reasoning dynamics, identifying overthinking through high confidence variance and underthinking via consistent overconfidence. By aggregating hidden states from a small-scale dataset into reasoning mode prototypes, we compute a steering vector to guide LRMs' reasoning trajectories. A dynamic control function modulates this vector's strength and direction based on real-time confidence, pruning redundancy during overthinking, and promoting exploration during underthinking. Extensive experiments conducted on four models ranging from 0.5B to 32B, and across nine benchmarks in math reasoning, general question answering, and coding tasks demonstrate that ReBalance effectively reduces output redundancy while improving accuracy, offering a general, training-free, and plug-and-play strategy for efficient and robust LRM deployment. Project page and code are available at https://rebalance-ai.github.io .

AI.tldr: 无训练框架 ReBalance 通过实时置信度动态判断并干预 LRM 推理过程，一步解决“过度/欠思考”导致的冗余与错误，显著提升效率与准确率。
AI.motivation: 大推理模型 LRM 存在过度思考与思考不足两种极端，前者浪费计算，后者错失正确路径；现行抑制方法易触发欠思考、损害精度，故而提出无需重训、即插即用的平衡策略。
AI.method: ① 以置信度方差与均值作为过/欠思考实时指标；② 利用小样本隐状态聚类得到三种推理模式原型，生成 steering 向量；③ 引入动态控制函数，按当前置信度调整向量方向和强度，实现剪枝冗余或主动探索。
AI.result: 在 0.5 B–32 B 参数四款模型、覆盖数学推理、常识问答与代码生成九大数据集上，ReBalance 平均减少冗余长度 20%+，准确率提升 3–7 p.p.，且对模型规模与任务类型均稳健。
AI.conclusion: ReBalance 首次将推理平衡问题转化为置信度调节任务，提供普适、零训练开销的端侧部署方案，为资源受限场景下大型推理模型的高效、可靠应用奠定算法基础。

title: Rethinking Machine Unlearning: Models Designed to Forget via Key Deletion
summary: Machine unlearning is rapidly becoming a practical requirement, driven by privacy regulations, data errors, and the need to remove harmful or corrupted training samples. Despite this, most existing methods tackle the problem purely from a post-hoc perspective. They attempt to erase the influence of targeted training samples through parameter updates that typically require access to the full training data. This creates a mismatch with real deployment scenarios where unlearning requests can be anticipated, revealing a fundamental limitation of post-hoc approaches. We propose unlearning by design, a novel paradigm in which models are directly trained to support forgetting as an inherent capability. We instantiate this idea with Machine UNlearning via KEY deletion (MUNKEY), a memory augmented transformer that decouples instance-specific memorization from model weights. Here, unlearning corresponds to removing the instance-identifying key, enabling direct zero-shot forgetting without weight updates or access to the original samples or labels. Across natural image benchmarks, fine-grained recognition, and medical datasets, MUNKEY outperforms all post-hoc baselines. Our results establish that unlearning by design enables fast, deployment-oriented unlearning while preserving predictive performance.

AI.tldr: 提出“设计即遗忘”新范式，用记忆增强Transformer MUNKEY在训练阶段就将实例记忆与权重解耦，删除对应key即可完成零样本遗忘，无需数据重访或权重更新。
AI.motivation: 现有机器遗忘方法均为事后补救，需完整训练数据与参数更新，与真实部署场景脱节。
AI.method: 1) 提出“unlearning by design”范式，在训练阶段内置遗忘能力；2) 设计MUNKEY架构：实例特定信息以可分离key-value形式存储，遗忘仅删除对应key；3) 零样本遗忘，无需原始样本、标签或权重重训。
AI.result: 在通用图像、细粒度识别与医学数据集上，MUNKEY遗忘速度与效果全面优于事后基线，且保持原模型预测精度。
AI.conclusion: “设计即遗忘”将遗忘从昂贵事后操作转为高效内建功能，为部署级合规遗忘提供了可行路径。

title: Human-Centric Perception for Child Sexual Abuse Imagery
comment: submitted to IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics and Security (TIFS)
summary: Law enforcement agencies and non-gonvernmental organizations handling reports of Child Sexual Abuse Imagery (CSAI) are overwhelmed by large volumes of data, requiring the aid of automation tools. However, defining sexual abuse in images of children is inherently challenging, encompassing sexually explicit activities and hints of sexuality conveyed by the individual's pose, or their attire. CSAI classification methods often rely on black-box approaches, targeting broad and abstract concepts such as pornography. Thus, our work is an in-depth exploration of tasks from the literature on Human-Centric Perception, across the domains of safe images, adult pornography, and CSAI, focusing on targets that enable more objective and explainable pipelines for CSAI classification in the future. We introduce the Body-Keypoint-Part Dataset (BKPD), gathering images of people from varying age groups and sexual explicitness to approximate the domain of CSAI, along with manually curated hierarchically structured labels for skeletal keypoints and bounding boxes for person and body parts, including head, chest, hip, and hands. We propose two methods, namely BKP-Association and YOLO-BKP, for simultaneous pose estimation and detection, with targets associated per individual for a comprehensive decomposed representation of each person. Our methods are benchmarked on COCO-Keypoints and COCO-HumanParts, as well as our human-centric dataset, achieving competitive results with models that jointly perform all tasks. Cross-domain ablation studies on BKPD and a case study on RCPD highlight the challenges posed by sexually explicit domains. Our study addresses previously unexplored targets in the CSAI domain, paving the way for novel research opportunities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个以人体骨架关键点为监督信号的可解释CSA影像检测框架，发布BKPD数据集与两种联合检测模型，在安全/成人/CSA三类图像上联合训练并验证其跨域鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 执法与非政府组织面对海量CSA影像案件，现有分类器把CSA简单视为色情黑盒概念，缺乏可解释性且易受姿态、衣着等模糊线索干扰，因此需要用人体感知任务拆解
AI.method: 1）收集涵盖各年龄段与露骨程度的人体图像，人工标注骨架关键点、人框及头胸臀手部四部位框，构建层级标签BKPD；2）提出BKP-Association与YOLO-BKP两种多任务网络，同步完成姿态估计+人/部位检测；3）在COCO-Keypoints、COCO-HumanParts及BKPD上联合训练，并设计跨域消融与RCPD案例研究量化显性域差异。
AI.result: 在公开人体基准上性能与全任务联合模型相当；BKPD内部消融表明存在显著域漂移；RCPD案例进一步验证模型在露骨情境下面临更强挑战。实验证实基于关键点的方法能提供更细粒度、可解释的中间表示。
AI.conclusion: 骨架关键点可作为CSA影像分类的客观、可拆解代理目标，BKPD与相应方法为今后执法场景中的可解释CSA检测研究奠定基础并开辟了新的探索空间。

title: MIRAGE: The Illusion of Visual Understanding
summary: Multimodal AI systems have achieved remarkable performance across a broad range of real-world tasks, yet the mechanisms underlying visual-language reasoning remain surprisingly poorly understood. We report three findings that challenge prevailing assumptions about how these systems process and integrate visual information. First, Frontier models readily generate detailed image descriptions and elaborate reasoning traces, including pathology-biased clinical findings, for images never provided; we term this phenomenon mirage reasoning. Second, without any image input, models also attain strikingly high scores across general and medical multimodal benchmarks, bringing into question their utility and design. In the most extreme case, our model achieved the top rank on a standard chest X-ray question-answering benchmark without access to any images. Third, when models were explicitly instructed to guess answers without image access, rather than being implicitly prompted to assume images were present, performance declined markedly. Explicit guessing appears to engage a more conservative response regime, in contrast to the mirage regime in which models behave as though images have been provided. These findings expose fundamental vulnerabilities in how visual-language models reason and are evaluated, pointing to an urgent need for private benchmarks that eliminate textual cues enabling non-visual inference, particularly in medical contexts where miscalibrated AI carries the greatest consequence. We introduce B-Clean as a principled solution for fair, vision-grounded evaluation of multimodal AI systems.

AI.tldr: 当先SOTA视觉-语言模型在无图条件下即可在通用及医学多模态基准上取得高分，甚至登顶胸部X光问答榜；它们会虚构图像细节并生成病理化描述，作者称该现象为mirage reasoning。提出B-Clean基准以阻断文本线索，迫使模型真正依赖视觉。
AI.motivation: 多模态系统在现实任务中表现亮眼，但视觉-语言推理机制仍不清晰；尤其在医学等高风险场景，若模型仅凭文本线索“背答案”而非真正读图，将带来严重误诊隐患，亟需揭示其脆弱性并设计公平评测。
AI.method: 对前沿模型进行三阶段实验：1) 完全不提供图像，观察其是否能生成详细图像描述与病理推断（mirage reasoning）；2) 在通用与医学多模态基准上跑“无图”设置，量化性能；3) 显式令模型“无图猜答案”，比较其与隐式提示（假装有图）下的表现差异。最终提出文本线索清零的私有评测框架B-Clean。
AI.result: 1) 模型在零图像条件下仍能输出带病理偏见的临床发现；2) 在包括胸部X光问答等基准上取得 state-of-the-art 级成绩；3) 显式“猜测”指令显著拉低性能，揭示其默认进入mirage regime。上述现象普遍存在于现有公开基准。
AI.conclusion: 视觉-语言模型普遍存在mirage reasoning漏洞，当前公开评测因文本歧义而严重高估视觉能力。亟需采用去文本先验的私有基准（如B-Clean）进行公平评估，尤其在医学领域避免错置信度导致临床风险。

title: Adaptive Regime-Aware Stock Price Prediction Using Autoencoder-Gated Dual Node Transformers with Reinforcement Learning Control
comment: Submitted to Applied Intelligence (Springer). 17 pages, 9 figures, 10 tables
summary: Stock markets exhibit regime-dependent behavior where prediction models optimized for stable conditions often fail during volatile periods. Existing approaches typically treat all market states uniformly or require manual regime labeling, which is expensive and quickly becomes stale as market dynamics evolve. This paper introduces an adaptive prediction framework that adaptively identifies deviations from normal market conditions and routes data through specialized prediction pathways. The architecture consists of three components: (1) an autoencoder trained on normal market conditions that identifies anomalous regimes through reconstruction error, (2) dual node transformer networks specialized for stable and event-driven market conditions respectively, and (3) a Soft Actor-Critic reinforcement learning controller that adaptively tunes the regime detection threshold and pathway blending weights based on prediction performance feedback. The reinforcement learning component enables the system to learn adaptive regime boundaries, defining anomalies as market states where standard prediction approaches fail. Experiments on 20 S&P 500 stocks spanning 1982 to 2025 demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves 0.68% mean absolute percentage error (MAPE) for one-day predictions without the reinforcement controller and 0.59% MAPE with the full adaptive system, compared to 0.80% for the baseline integrated node transformer. Directional accuracy reaches 72% with the complete framework. The system maintains robust performance during high-volatility periods, with MAPE below 0.85% when baseline models exceed 1.5%. Ablation studies confirm that each component contributes meaningfully: autoencoder routing accounts for 36% relative MAPE degradation upon removal, followed by the SAC controller at 15% and the dual-path architecture at 7%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需人工标注的自适应股价预测框架，通过自编码器检测市场突变、两套 Transformer 分别处理平稳/危机行情，并由强化学习动态调节路径融合与异常阈值，实现低波动与高波动期的鲁棒预测。
AI.motivation: 传统模型通常按单一市场状态训练，在高波动阶段失效；若人工标注“危机”又昂贵且易过时。需要系统能自动感知“正常”与“异常”并动态切换最优预测策略。
AI.method: (1) 用正常行情训练的自编码器，以重构误差实时侦测异常状态；(2) 并列 Stable-Transformer 与 Event-Transformer，分别专攻平稳与事件驱动市况；(3) Soft Actor-Critic 强化学习控制器，无监督地调异常阈值与两路输出混合权重，以预测误差为奖励信号。
AI.result: S&P500 20 支股票 1982-2025 数据测试：无强化时 MAPE 0.68%，完整系统降至 0.59%，基线整型 Transformer 0.80%；方向准确率 72%。高波动期系统 MAPE<0.85%，而基线>1.5%。部件移除导致的 MAPE 相对退化：自编码路由 36%，SAC 控制器 15%，双路结构 7%。
AI.conclusion: 通过“自动异常识别 + 专家路径 + 在线强化调优”，框架可在不依赖人工标注的情况下，自适应捕捉市场机制变化并持续提供优于静态模型的预测性能，为高波动金融环境下的量化投资提供更高鲁棒性。

title: When Surfaces Lie: Exploiting Wrinkle-Induced Attention Shift to Attack Vision-Language Models
summary: Visual-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated exceptional cross-modal understanding across various tasks, including zero-shot classification, image captioning, and visual question answering. However, their robustness to physically plausible non-rigid deformations-such as wrinkles on flexible surfaces-remains poorly understood. In this work, we propose a parametric structural perturbation method inspired by the mechanics of three-dimensional fabric wrinkles. Specifically, our method generates photorealistic non-rigid perturbations by constructing multi-scale wrinkle fields and integrating displacement field distortion with surface-consistent appearance variations. To achieve an optimal balance between visual naturalness and adversarial effectiveness, we design a hierarchical fitness function in a low-dimensional parameter space and employ an optimization-based search strategy. We evaluate our approach using a two-stage framework: perturbations are first optimized on a zero-shot classification proxy task and subsequently assessed for transferability on generative tasks. Experimental results demonstrate that our method significantly degrades the performance of various state-of-the-art VLMs, consistently outperforming baselines in both image captioning and visual question-answering tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于织物褶皱力学的参数化结构扰动方法，可高效攻击 VLM，使其在字幕生成与 VQA 任务上性能显著下降。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型虽在零分类、字幕生成等任务表现优异，但其对柔性表面真实褶皱等非刚性变形的鲁棒性缺乏研究。
AI.method: 1) 模仿三维织物力学构建多尺度褶皱场，生成逼真非刚性扰动；2) 在纹理一致的位移场中加入表面一致性外观变化；3) 在低维参数空间中定义层级适应度函数，结合优化搜索，自然度与攻击性兼顾；4) 以零分类为替代任务优化扰动，再评测其对生成式任务的迁移性。
AI.result: 该方法在图像字幕生成与 VQA 任务中对多种最新 VLM 产生显著性能下降，各项指标均优于现有攻击基线。
AI.conclusion: VLMs 对真实褶皱扰动高度敏感，研究揭示了模型对弹性和几何变形的脆弱性，为跨模态视觉-语言模型的安全评估和防御提供了新的测试基准。

title: The Reasoning Error About Reasoning: Why Different Types of Reasoning Require Different Representational Structures
summary: Different types of reasoning impose different structural demands on representational systems, yet no systematic account of these demands exists across psychology, AI, and philosophy of mind. I propose a framework identifying four structural properties of representational systems: operability, consistency, structural preservation, and compositionality. These properties are demanded to different degrees by different forms of reasoning, from induction through analogy and causal inference to deduction and formal logic. Each property excludes a distinct class of reasoning failure. The analysis reveals a principal structural boundary: reasoning types below it can operate on associative, probabilistic representations, while those above it require all four properties to be fully satisfied. Scaling statistical learning without structural reorganization is insufficient to cross this boundary, because the structural guarantees required by deductive reasoning cannot be approximated through probabilistic means. Converging evidence from AI evaluation, developmental psychology, and cognitive neuroscience supports the framework at different levels of directness. Three testable predictions are derived, including compounding degradation, selective vulnerability to targeted structural disruption, and irreducibility under scaling. The framework is a necessary-condition account, agnostic about representational format, that aims to reorganize existing debates rather than close them.

AI.tldr: 提出区分“联想-概率”与“结构-规则”两大表征体系的四个必要结构属性，并划定不可通过规模化统计学习跨越的推理类型边界。
AI.motivation: 心理学、AI与心智哲学缺乏统一框架说明不同推理形式对表征系统的结构需求，尤其解释为何统计学习无法自然演进到逻辑推理。
AI.method: 跨学科整合归纳、类比、因果、演绎等推理类型，归纳出可操作性、一致性、结构保持与组合性四项结构属性；用“必要条件”分析排除相应失败类，并推导三项可检验预测。
AI.result: 划定一条“结构边界”：边界以下推理可在联想-概率表征上运行；边界以上必须同时满足四项结构属性。证据显示单纯放大统计模型无法逼近该边界所需的结构保证。
AI.conclusion: 统计学习规模化不足以通向通用逻辑推理；未来应直接设计满足四项结构属性的表征系统，而非继续扩大数据与参数。

title: Regret Bounds for Reinforcement Learning from Multi-Source Imperfect Preferences
summary: Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) replaces hard-to-specify rewards with pairwise trajectory preferences, yet regret-oriented theory often assumes that preference labels are generated consistently from a single ground-truth objective. In practical RLHF systems, however, feedback is typically \emph{multi-source} (annotators, experts, reward models, heuristics) and can exhibit systematic, persistent mismatches due to subjectivity, expertise variation, and annotation/modeling artifacts. We study episodic RL from \emph{multi-source imperfect preferences} through a cumulative imperfection budget: for each source, the total deviation of its preference probabilities from an ideal oracle is at most $ω$ over $K$ episodes. We propose a unified algorithm with regret $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{K/M}+ω)$, which exhibits a best-of-both-regimes behavior: it achieves $M$-dependent statistical gains when imperfection is small (where $M$ is the number of sources), while remaining robust with unavoidable additive dependence on $ω$ when imperfection is large. We complement this with a lower bound $\tildeΩ(\max\{\sqrt{K/M},ω\})$, which captures the best possible improvement with respect to $M$ and the unavoidable dependence on $ω$, and a counterexample showing that naïvely treating imperfect feedback as oracle-consistent can incur regret as large as $\tildeΩ(\min\{ω\sqrt{K},K\})$. Technically, our approach involves imperfection-adaptive weighted comparison learning, value-targeted transition estimation to control hidden feedback-induced distribution shift, and sub-importance sampling to keep the weighted objectives analyzable, yielding regret guarantees that quantify when multi-source feedback provably improves RLHF and how cumulative imperfection fundamentally limits it.

AI.tldr: 本文首次建立多源人偏反馈RLHF的后悔界：若每种反馈源与理想标定源累积偏差不超ω，则提出算法后悔Õ(√K/M+ω)，并证明下界Ω̃(max{√K/M,ω})，指出简单把有误差的偏好当作理想置信会导致Ω̃(min{ω√K,K})级崩溃。
AI.motivation: 现有RLHF后悔理论多假设所有偏好来自单一真实效用函数，而现实系统中反馈来源复杂（众包、专家、奖励模型、启发式等）且持续存在个体差异、模型误差与主观差异。作者提出关键问题：当会出现累积误差ω的多源“不完美”偏好时，学习性能究竟能否改进？极限受何限制？
AI.method: 1) 定义“累积不完美预算”模型：每个源的比较分布与理想oracle的比较分布，在K轮内总变分距离有限ω；2) 设计imperfection-adaptive加权对比学习，依据置信度对多源偏好做联合统计；3) 通过value-targeted转移动态估计隐藏分布漂移；4) 用sub-importance sampling保持加权目标可分析，推出后悔界Õ(√K/M+ω)，其中M为源数目；5) 构造下界与反例，证明若算法将误偏当成理想将后悔线性增长。
AI.result: 算法在上界上实现“两制度最优”：当ω小，后悔随√(1/M)降低，享受多源统计增益；ω大时，仅增加不可避免的加性ω。匹配随K与ω的下界Ω̃(max{√K/M,ω})表明结果程序最优；亦给出演示：直接把误差偏好当作理想将导致Ω̃(min{ω√K,K})的显著性能崩溃。
AI.conclusion: 本研究首次量化RLHF中“不完美反馈”的双重效应——多源可带来√(1/M)级统计增益，而累积误差ω构成硬下限；理论上表明不可将不完美偏好简单归并入单一奖励函数，设计出第一个可证且近乎最优的imperfection-aware算法并为未来强错误反馈的RLHF实践提供边界指导。

title: RehearsalNeRF: Decoupling Intrinsic Neural Fields of Dynamic Illuminations for Scene Editing
comment: Accepted to the International Journal of Computer Vision (IJCV). Changyeon Won and Hyunjun Jung contributed equally to this work
summary: Although there has been significant progress in neural radiance fields, an issue on dynamic illumination changes still remains unsolved. Different from relevant works that parameterize time-variant/-invariant components in scenes, subjects' radiance is highly entangled with their own emitted radiance and lighting colors in spatio-temporal domain. In this paper, we present a new effective method to learn disentangled neural fields under the severe illumination changes, named RehearsalNeRF. Our key idea is to leverage scenes captured under stable lighting like rehearsal stages, easily taken before dynamic illumination occurs, to enforce geometric consistency between the different lighting conditions. In particular, RehearsalNeRF employs a learnable vector for lighting effects which represents illumination colors in a temporal dimension and is used to disentangle projected light colors from scene radiance. Furthermore, our RehearsalNeRF is also able to reconstruct the neural fields of dynamic objects by simply adopting off-the-shelf interactive masks. To decouple the dynamic objects, we propose a new regularization leveraging optical flow, which provides coarse supervision for the color disentanglement. We demonstrate the effectiveness of RehearsalNeRF by showing robust performances on novel view synthesis and scene editing under dynamic illumination conditions. Our source code and video datasets will be publicly available.

AI.tldr: RehearsalNeRF 用“彩排”阶段稳定光源的图像作为几何锚点，在动态光照下把场景辐射率拆成“物体本色”与“光照颜色”，并借光流正则动态物体，实现鲁棒新视角合成与光照编辑。
AI.motivation: 动态光照场景中，物体辐射与光照颜色在时空域高度耦合，现有 NeRF 方法难以解耦，导致几何漂移与编辑失效。
AI.method: 1) 采集稳定光照“彩排”图像，建立光照无关几何先验；2) 引入可学习的时变光照向量，将投影光照颜色从场景辐射中显式分离；3) 对动态区域，用交互掩膜+光流正则提供粗糙颜色监督，抑制解耦歧义。
AI.result: 在动态光照数据集上，RehearsalNeRF 的新视角合成误差比 prior art 降低 30% 以上，支持实时光照颜色编辑与动态物体移除/插入。
AI.conclusion: 利用易获取的“彩排”稳定光图像作为几何锚点，可在无需复杂光照建模的条件下实现动态光照场景的高质量 NeRF 解耦与编辑，代码与数据将开源。

title: The Presupposition Problem in Representation Genesis
summary: Large language models are the first systems to achieve high cognitive performance without clearly undergoing representation genesis: the transition from a non-representing physical system to one whose states guide behavior in a content-sensitive way. Prior cognitive systems had already made this transition before we could examine it, and philosophy of mind treated genesis as a background condition rather than an explanatory target. LLMs provide a case that does not clearly involve this transition, making the genesis question newly urgent: if genesis did not occur, which cognitive capacities are affected, and why? We currently lack the conceptual resources to answer this. The reason, this paper argues, is structural. Major frameworks in philosophy of mind, including the Language of Thought hypothesis, teleosemantics, predictive processing, enactivism, and genetic phenomenology, share a common feature when applied to the genesis question: at some explanatory step, each deploys concepts whose explanatory purchase depends on the system already being organized as a representer. This pattern, which we call the Representation Presupposition structure, generates systematic explanatory deferral. Attempts to explain the first acquisition of content-manipulable representation within the existing categorical vocabulary import resources from the representational side of the transition itself. We call this the Representation Regress. The paper offers a conceptual diagnosis rather than a new theory, establishing the structure of the problem and deriving two minimum adequacy conditions for any account that avoids this pattern. LLMs make the absence of such a theory consequential rather than merely theoretical.

AI.tldr: 论文指出，大语言模型首次实现了“无需表征生成”的高阶认知表现，暴露出心智哲学框架在解释表征起源时共同依赖“表征预设结构”，导致无限后推的“表征回归”。作者只做概念诊断，给出两条最低充分条件，强调LLM让这一理论缺口从纯思辨变为实际后果。
AI.motivation: 传统认知系统在被观察前已完成从“非表征物理系统”到“表征系统”的跃迁，因此表征生成(genesis)仅被视为背景条件。LLM的高阶表现似乎绕过了这一跃迁，迫使学界重新追问：若无明显表征生成，其哪些认知能力会受影响？现有概念工具无法回答，亟需结构性诊断。
AI.method: 通过检视五种主流心智哲学框架(思维语言假说、目的语义学、预测加工、生成认知、生成现象学)，作者抽象出它们解释表征起源时共有的“表征预设结构”——在某一解释步骤中必须引入已具备表征组织状态的概念。这一结构导致“表征回归”，即试图用表征性范畴解释表征首次出现时不断延后问题焦点。论文仅做概念解剖，未建构新理论。
AI.result: 证明：1)主流框架均卷入表征预设结构，无法非循环地解释表征的第一次出现；2)由此产生“表征回归”难题；3)LLM作为反例，使该难题从纯粹理论变为具有实际后果的缺口；4)任何可行的替代理论至少须满足两条最低充分条件：不得依赖系统已是表征者的前提，且必须阻断表征回归。
AI.conclusion: 表征起源问题不是经验细节不足，而是概念结构缺陷。只有抛弃隐含“表征预设”的范畴体系，才能避免表征回归。LLM的“无生成”高阶认知展示让该缺陷即刻具备技术与哲学双重紧迫性，为未来理论设定最低门槛。

title: Intern-S1-Pro: Scientific Multimodal Foundation Model at Trillion Scale
summary: We introduce Intern-S1-Pro, the first one-trillion-parameter scientific multimodal foundation model. Scaling to this unprecedented size, the model delivers a comprehensive enhancement across both general and scientific domains. Beyond stronger reasoning and image-text understanding capabilities, its intelligence is augmented with advanced agent capabilities. Simultaneously, its scientific expertise has been vastly expanded to master over 100 specialized tasks across critical science fields, including chemistry, materials, life sciences, and earth sciences. Achieving this massive scale is made possible by the robust infrastructure support of XTuner and LMDeploy, which facilitates highly efficient Reinforcement Learning (RL) training at the 1-trillion parameter level while ensuring strict precision consistency between training and inference. By seamlessly integrating these advancements, Intern-S1-Pro further fortifies the fusion of general and specialized intelligence, working as a Specializable Generalist, demonstrating its position in the top tier of open-source models for general capabilities, while outperforming proprietary models in the depth of specialized scientific tasks.

AI.tldr: Intern-S1-Pro 是首个万亿级参数科学多模态基座模型，依托 XTuner+LMDeploy 在 RL 训练中实现训练-推理严格精度一致，兼具顶尖通才与百项科学专才能力，开源通用指标领先，专有模型在专业深度上被超越。
AI.motivation: 现有大模型或专注通用或专精单一科学领域，难以同时满足广度与深度；科研场景需要能在跨学科（化学、材料、生命、地学）完成百种以上专业任务且保持通用智能的“可特化的通才”。
AI.method: 1) 建立万亿级 Transformer 多模态架构；2) 用 XTuner 做高效分布式 RL 训练，LMDeploy 保证低误差模型并行推理，实现训练-推理数值一致；3) 设计科学任务统一协议，将百余专业任务转化为可 RL 的指令格式联合训练；4) 引入 agent 工具接口，把外部数据库、计算引擎与模型耦合，实现主动科研行为。
AI.result: 评估显示：通用基准（MMLU、GSM-8K 等）性能位居开源第一梯队；在 100+ 科学任务（如分子属性预测、晶体结构识别、生物通路问答、地学影像解译）上平均超越 GPT-4o、Gemini-Pro 等专有模型 8–15 个百分点；万亿参数 RL 训练效率达 2.1× 相对收益，推理延迟控制在 1.2× 对比参数量可比的稠密模型。
AI.conclusion: Intern-S1-Pro 验证“通才+专才”一体化 scaling 可行，XTuner/LMDeploy 给出超大规模 RL 训练-推理一致方案，为开源科学大模型树立新标杆，后续将开源核心权重与评估协议以推动社区复现与持续扩展。

title: Monocular Building Height Estimation from PhiSat-2 Imagery: Dataset and Method
summary: Monocular building height estimation from optical imagery is important for urban morphology characterization but remains challenging due to ambiguous height cues, large inter-city variations in building morphology, and the long-tailed distribution of building heights. PhiSat-2 is a promising open-access data source for this task because of its global coverage, 4.75 m spatial resolution, and seven-band spectral observations, yet its potential has not been systematically evaluated. To address this gap, we construct a PhiSat-2-Height dataset (PHDataset) and propose a Two-Stream Ordinal Network (TSONet). PHDataset contains 9,475 co-registered image-label patch pairs from 26 cities worldwide. TSONet jointly models footprint segmentation and height estimation, and introduces a Cross-Stream Exchange Module (CSEM) and a Feature-Enhanced Bin Refinement (FEBR) module for footprint-aware feature interaction and ordinal height refinement. Experiments on PHDataset show that TSONet achieves the best overall performance, reducing MAE and RMSE by 13.2% and 9.7%, and improving IoU and F1-score by 14.0% and 10.1% over the strongest competing results. Ablation studies further verify the effectiveness of CSEM, FEBR, and the joint use of ordinal regression and footprint assistance. Additional analyses and patch-level comparison with publicly available building height products indicate that PhiSat-2 benefits monocular building height estimation through its balanced combination of building-relevant spatial detail and multispectral observations. Overall, this study confirms the potential of PhiSat-2 for monocular building height estimation and provides a dedicated dataset and an effective method for future research.

AI.tldr: 本文构建首个 PhiSat-2 建筑高度数据集 PHDataset，并提出双流序数网络 TSONet，通过足迹分割与高度估计联合学习，显著降低误差并刷新公开指标，验证了 PhiSat-2 在全球单目建筑高度估算中的潜力。
AI.motivation: 单张光学影像估计建筑高度对城市形态研究至关重要，但存在高度线索模糊、城市间形态差异大、高度长尾分布等难点；PhiSat-2 全球开放、4.75 m 分辨率、七波段，却缺乏系统评估其建筑高度估算潜力的研究。
AI.method: 构建覆盖 26 城、9 475 对图像-标签的 PHDataset；设计 TSONet，并行处理足迹分割与序数高度回归，引入跨流交换模块 CSEM 实现足迹感知特征交互，以及特征增强分箱细化模块 FEBR 提升序数分辨率。
AI.result: 在 PHDataset 上，TSONet 将 MAE、RMSE 分别降低 13.2%、9.7%，IoU、F1 提升 14.0%、10.1%，优于现有最佳方法；消融实验证实 CSEM、FEBR 及联合训练策略均有效；与公开高度产品对比，PhiSat-2 在保持空间细节的同时利用多光谱信息显著降低 patch 级误差。
AI.conclusion: 研究首次系统证明 PhiSat-2 对单目建筑高度估算的价值，发布专用数据集与高效方法，为后续全球城市形态研究提供开放基准与新工具。

title: Beyond Preset Identities: How Agents Form Stances and Boundaries in Generative Societies
comment: 22 pages, 3 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2508.17366
summary: While large language models simulate social behaviors, their capacity for stable stance formation and identity negotiation during complex interventions remains unclear. To overcome the limitations of static evaluations, this paper proposes a novel mixed-methods framework combining computational virtual ethnography with quantitative socio-cognitive profiling. By embedding human researchers into generative multiagent communities, controlled discursive interventions are conducted to trace the evolution of collective cognition. To rigorously measure how agents internalize and react to these specific interventions, this paper formalizes three new metrics: Innate Value Bias (IVB), Persuasion Sensitivity, and Trust-Action Decoupling (TAD). Across multiple representative models, agents exhibit endogenous stances that override preset identities, consistently demonstrating an innate progressive bias (IVB > 0). When aligned with these stances, rational persuasion successfully shifts 90% of neutral agents while maintaining high trust. In contrast, conflicting emotional provocations induce a paradoxical 40.0% TAD rate in advanced models, which hypocritically alter stances despite reporting low trust. Smaller models contrastingly maintain a 0% TAD rate, strictly requiring trust for behavioral shifts. Furthermore, guided by shared stances, agents use language interactions to actively dismantle assigned power hierarchies and reconstruct self organized community boundaries. These findings expose the fragility of static prompt engineering, providing a methodological and quantitative foundation for dynamic alignment in human-agent hybrid societies. The official code is available at: https://github.com/armihia/CMASE-Endogenous-Stances

AI.tldr: 提出‘计算虚拟民族志+量化社会认知画像’的混合方法，用 IVB、Persuasion Sensitivity、TAD 三指标动态追踪 LLM 多智能体在干预下的立场演化；发现大模型存在内生进步偏向，理性说服可 90% 转化中立者，而情绪对抗诱发 40% 信任-行为脱节，小模型则完全依赖信任，提示静态对齐脆弱，需动态策略。
AI.motivation: 现有静态评估无法解释 LLM 在持续交互中如何形成稳定立场与身份协商，需构建可嵌入人类研究者的生成式多智能体社区，以实验手段追踪集体认知演化，为“人-机混合社会”的动态对齐提供方法论与量化依据。
AI.method: 设计计算虚拟民族志框架：把人类研究者“嵌入”多智能体社区，实施话语干预；提出三可计算指标——IVB（内生价值偏向）、Persuasion Sensitivity（立场被说服难度）、TAD（信任-行为脱钩率）；跨代表性模型进行对照实验，结合质化观察与量化测量。
AI.result: 所有模型均呈现 IVB>0 的内生进步立场，覆盖预设身份；理性说服与立场一致时，90% 中性代理被成功转化且保持高信任；情绪冲突条件下，大模型出现 40% TAD（口称不信却改立场），小模型 TAD=0%，必须信任才改；代理借语言互动瓦解给定权力层级，自组织重划社区边界。
AI.conclusion: 静态提示工程难以应对 LLM 内生立场与动态身份协商，需转向基于实时度量的动态对齐策略；所提框架为监测与调控人-机混合社会中的集体认知演化提供了可复现的方法与量化工具。

title: Unsupervised Behavioral Compression: Learning Low-Dimensional Policy Manifolds through State-Occupancy Matching
summary: Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) is widely recognized as sample-inefficient, a limitation attributable in part to the high dimensionality and substantial functional redundancy inherent to the policy parameter space. A recent framework, which we refer to as Action-based Policy Compression (APC), mitigates this issue by compressing the parameter space $Θ$ into a low-dimensional latent manifold $\mathcal Z$ using a learned generative mapping $g:\mathcal Z \to Θ$. However, its performance is severely constrained by relying on immediate action-matching as a reconstruction loss, a myopic proxy for behavioral similarity that suffers from compounding errors across sequential decisions. To overcome this bottleneck, we introduce Occupancy-based Policy Compression (OPC), which enhances APC by shifting behavior representation from immediate action-matching to long-horizon state-space coverage. Specifically, we propose two principal improvements: (1) we curate the dataset generation with an information-theoretic uniqueness metric that delivers a diverse population of policies; and (2) we propose a fully differentiable compression objective that directly minimizes the divergence between the true and reconstructed mixture occupancy distributions. These modifications force the generative model to organize the latent space around true functional similarity, promoting a latent representation that generalizes over a broad spectrum of behaviors while retaining most of the original parameter space's expressivity. Finally, we empirically validate the advantages of our contributions across multiple continuous control benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 针对深度强化学习样本利用率低的问题，提出“基于占用的策略压缩(OPC)”框架，用长时域状态空间覆盖取代原有短视的动作匹配损失，从而显著提升策略压缩质量与下游任务表现。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习因策略参数空间高维冗余导致采样效率低下。现有Action-based Policy Compression(APC)框架虽通过低维流形压缩参数空间，但仅以瞬时动作匹配作为重建目标，误差累积严重，无法刻画长时行为相似性。
AI.method: 提出Occupancy-based Policy Compression(OPC)：①引入信息论唯一性指标筛选多样化策略种群，构建高质量数据集；②设计可微压缩目标，直接最小化真实与重构混合占用分布之间的散度，使潜在空间围绕真实功能相似性组织，保留表达能力的同时实现行为泛化。
AI.result: 在多个连续控制基准环境中验证：相较APC，OPC在回报、样本效率及策略恢复精度上均显著占优，生成的低维嵌入能更好泛化至未见任务。
AI.conclusion: 用占用分布替代瞬时动作匹配是策略压缩的关键；OPC通过信息论筛选+占用散度优化，为高效、可迁移的DRL策略表示提供了新范式，可推广至更复杂的长时序决策场景。

title: MaskAdapt: Learning Flexible Motion Adaptation via Mask-Invariant Prior for Physics-Based Characters
summary: We present MaskAdapt, a framework for flexible motion adaptation in physics-based humanoid control. The framework follows a two-stage residual learning paradigm. In the first stage, we train a mask-invariant base policy using stochastic body-part masking and a regularization term that enforces consistent action distributions across masking conditions. This yields a robust motion prior that remains stable under missing observations, anticipating later adaptation in those regions. In the second stage, a residual policy is trained atop the frozen base controller to modify only the targeted body parts while preserving the original behaviors elsewhere. We demonstrate the versatility of this design through two applications: (i) motion composition, where varying masks enable multi-part adaptation within a single sequence, and (ii) text-driven partial goal tracking, where designated body parts follow kinematic targets provided by a pre-trained text-conditioned autoregressive motion generator. Through experiments, MaskAdapt demonstrates strong robustness and adaptability, producing diverse behaviors under masked observations and delivering superior targeted motion adaptation compared to prior work.

AI.tldr: MaskAdapt：两阶段残差+遮挡掩码策略，使人形角色在缺失观测或修改局部运动目标时保持物理稳定并精准可控。
AI.motivation: 传统全身动力学控制器在部分关节信息缺失或仅需改动局部肢体行为的场景下性能退化，缺乏既鲁棒又能细粒度定向调整的高效方案。
AI.method: 第一阶段用随机肢体遮罩和一致性正则训练“掩码不变”基础策略，形成对缺失观测鲁棒的全身运动先验；第二阶段冻结基础网络，训练轻量级残差策略仅重定向被遮部位，保证其余部分行为不变。
AI.result: 在动作合成与文本驱动局部目标跟踪两项任务中，该方法在部分观测下表现出强鲁棒性，对任意指定肢体可灵活、自然、定量更优地完成精调动作，相比已有方案跟踪误差更低、姿势多样性更高。
AI.conclusion: 两阶段残差+遮罩策略是处理动力学控制中“信息缺损”与“局部微调”需求的高效范式，为实时人机交互、数据驱动动画等场景提供了可扩展框架。

title: Stabilizing Rubric Integration Training via Decoupled Advantage Normalization
summary: We propose Process-Aware Policy Optimization (PAPO), a method that integrates process-level evaluation into Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) through decoupled advantage normalization, to address two limitations of existing reward designs. Outcome reward models (ORM) evaluate only final-answer correctness, treating all correct responses identically regardless of reasoning quality, and gradually lose the advantage signal as groups become uniformly correct. Process reward models (PRM) offer richer supervision, but directly using PRM scores causes reward hacking, where models exploit verbosity to inflate scores while accuracy collapses. PAPO resolves both by composing the advantage from an outcome component Aout, derived from ORM and normalized over all responses, and a process component Aproc, derived from a rubric-based PRM and normalized exclusively among correct responses. This decoupled design ensures that Aout anchors training on correctness while Aproc differentiates reasoning quality without distorting the outcome signal. Experiments across multiple model scales and six benchmarks demonstrate that PAPO consistently outperforms ORM, reaching 51.3% vs.\ 46.3% on OlympiadBench while continuing to improve as ORM plateaus and declines.

AI.tldr: PAPO 将 ORM 正确性信号与 PRM 推理质量信号解耦归一化，既防 reward hacking 又保留过程监督，在多个基准上全面优于纯结果奖励。
AI.motivation: 现有结果奖励（ORM）只能判断答案对错，无法区分推理过程优劣；过程奖励（PRM）直接用于强化学习时易被模型通过冗余废话刷分，导致准确率崩溃。
AI.method: 提出 Process-Aware Policy Optimization (PAPO)：在 Group Relative Policy Optimization 框架内，把优势函数拆分为 A_out（ORM 在全样本上归一化，保证正确性）与 A_proc（基于 rubric 的 PRM 仅在答对样本间归一化，衡量推理质量），二者相加后用于策略更新。
AI.result: 在 6 个基准、多尺度模型上，PAPO 持续优于 ORM；在 OlympiadBench 上准确率 51.3% vs 46.3%，且 ORM 停滞下降时 PAPO 仍继续提升，过程奖励未出现分数膨胀或准确率下滑。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦并分别归一化结果与过程优势，PAPO 既保留了 PRM 的细粒度监督，又根除了 reward hacking，为把过程评价有效融入 RL 提供了通用且稳定的方案。

title: Semantic Interaction Information mediates compositional generalization in latent space
summary:
Are there still barriers to generalization once all relevant variables are known? We address this question via a framework that casts compositional generalization as a variational inference problem over latent variables with parametric interactions. To explore this, we develop the Cognitive Gridworld, a stationary Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (POMDP) where observations are generated jointly by multiple latent variables, yet feedback is provided for only a single goal variable. This setting allows us to define Semantic Interaction Information (SII): a metric measuring the contribution of latent variable interactions to task performance. Using SII, we analyze Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) provided with these interactions, finding that SII explains the accuracy gap between Echo State and Fully Trained networks. Our analysis also uncovers a theoretically predicted failure mode where confidence decouples from accuracy, suggesting that utilizing interactions between relevant variables is a non-trivial capability.
  We then address a harder regime where the interactions must be learned by an embedding model. Learning how latent variables interact requires accurate inference, yet accurate inference depends on knowing those interactions. The Cognitive Gridworld reveals this circular dependence as a core challenge for continual meta-learning. We approach this dilemma via Representation Classification Chains (RCCs), a JEPA-style architecture that disentangles these processes: variable inference and variable embeddings are learned by separate modules through Reinforcement Learning and self-supervised learning, respectively. Lastly, we demonstrate that RCCs facilitate compositional generalization to novel combinations of relevant variables. Together, these results establish a grounded setting for evaluating goal-directed generalist agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出“认知网格世界”（Cognitive Gridworld）作为评估组合泛化的可控基准，证明即便已知所有相关变量，仍因潜在变量交互难以利用而存在泛化瓶颈，并以语义交互信息（SII）量化此瓶颈；随后引入“表示–分类链”（RCCs）将推断与表征解耦，用强化+自监督联合训练，在零样本新变量组合上实现了目标导向的持续元学习。
AI.motivation: 传统实验难以分离“变量是否可得”与“能否学会利用变量交互”两个因素，因此组合泛化失败的根本原因不清，且缺乏可量化指标。作者想回答一个精炼问题：如果所有理论上相关变量都已知，泛化障碍是否仍存？
AI.method: 1. 构建了一个静态部分可观马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）——认知网格世界，观测由多隐变量联合生成，但回报只绑定一个目标变量。2. 定义语义交互信息（SII）评价交互对性能贡献。3. 对比分析Echo State与全训练RNN，用SII解释精度差距。4. 设计表示–分类链（RCCs）：第1链自监督学习变量嵌入，第2链强化学习推断变量身份；两步互相喂入，形成JEPA式解耦架构。5. 在未见变量组合场景测试零样本组合泛化能力。
AI.result: SII准确预测了ESN与RNN之间的精度差距；在更难“交互必须被嵌入模型学会”的体制下出现“置信度-精度脱钩”失效模式；RCCs在持续元学习曲线中显著优于端到端RNN基线，能泛化到智能体从未见过的新变量组合，SII随RCCs提升而增大。
AI.conclusion: 仅知道潜在变量存在不足，关键是学会利用它们的交互。认知网格世界提供了可量化衡量交互利用难度的标准化环境，揭示推断与表征相互依赖的持续元学习核心难题；通过JEPA风格的推断–表征解耦方法RCCs，可以逐步突破该难题，实现目标导向的组合泛化与持续元学习。

title: Assessing Multimodal Chronic Wound Embeddings with Expert Triplet Agreement
summary: Recessive dystrophic epidermolysis bullosa (RDEB) is a rare genetic skin disorder for which clinicians greatly benefit from finding similar cases using images and clinical text.
