title: Causal K-Means Clustering
summary: Causal effects are often characterized with population summaries. These might provide an incomplete picture when there are heterogeneous treatment effects across subgroups. Since the subgroup structure is typically unknown, it is more challenging to identify and evaluate subgroup effects than population effects. We propose a new solution to this problem: \emph{Causal k-Means Clustering}, which leverages the k-means clustering algorithm to uncover the unknown subgroup structure. Our problem differs significantly from the conventional clustering setup since the variables to be clustered are unknown counterfactual functions. We present a plug-in estimator which is simple and readily implementable using off-the-shelf algorithms, and study its rate of convergence. We also develop a new bias-corrected estimator based on nonparametric efficiency theory and double machine learning, and show that this estimator achieves fast root-n rates and asymptotic normality in large nonparametric models. Our proposed methods are especially useful for modern outcome-wide studies with multiple treatment levels. Further, our framework is extensible to clustering with generic pseudo-outcomes, such as partially observed outcomes or otherwise unknown functions. Finally, we explore finite sample properties via simulation, and illustrate the proposed methods using a study of mobile-supported self-management for chronic low back pain.

AI.tldr: 提出“因果 k-均值聚类”新方法，在未知异质性子群结构下估计并推断子群因果效应，给出简洁插件估计量与双重纠偏估计量，实现根-n 相合性与渐近正态性，并展示在手机辅助腰痛自管理研究中的应用。
AI.motivation: 传统汇总因果效应掩盖个体异质性，但子群结构未知，难以识别混杂子群处理效应，亟需无需先验子群标签的因果聚类框架。
AI.method: 将反事实结果视为待聚“潜在变量”，提出因果 k-均值聚类：1) 用插件法先估计反事实结果再聚类；2) 基于非参效率理论与双重机器学习构建纠偏估计量，消除一阶偏差，实现根-n 相合与渐近正态；3) 框架可推广至多重处理水平及部分观测的伪结果。
AI.result: 理论：插件估计量给出收敛速度；纠偏估计量在非参模型下达到根-n 速率和渐近正态。模拟：有限样本表现良好。实证：在手机支持的慢性腰痛自管理数据中揭示显著异质性子群效应。
AI.conclusion: 因果 k-均值聚类在不预设子群的前提下，可靠估计并推断异质性处理效应，具理论保证、易实现、可扩展，适用于现代多结局多处理研究。

title: FluoCLIP: Stain-Aware Focus Quality Assessment in Fluorescence Microscopy
comment: Accepted at CVPR 2026, Project Page: https://fluoclip.github.io
summary: Accurate focus quality assessment (FQA) in fluorescence microscopy is challenging due to stain-dependent optical variations that induce heterogeneous focus behavior across images. Existing methods, however, treat focus quality as a stain-agnostic problem, assuming a shared global ordering. We formulate stain-aware FQA for fluorescence microscopy, showing that focus-rank relationships vary substantially across stains due to stain-dependent imaging characteristics and invalidate this assumption. To support this formulation, we introduce FluoMix, the first dataset for stain-aware FQA spanning multiple tissues, fluorescent stains, and focus levels. We further propose FluoCLIP, a two-stage vision-language framework that grounds stain semantics and enables stain-conditioned ordinal reasoning for focus prediction, effectively decoupling stain representation from ordinal structure. By explicitly modeling stain-dependent focus behavior, FluoCLIP consistently outperforms both conventional FQA methods and recent vision-language baselines, demonstrating strong generalization across diverse fluorescence microscopy conditions. Code and dataset are publicly available at https://fluoclip.github.io/.

AI.tldr: 本文首次将荧光显微聚焦质量评估 (FQA) 问题从“染色无关”重新定义为“染色感知”，指出不同染料的成像特性导致聚焦排序存在显著差异，并发布首个跨组织、染料与聚焦级别的数据集 FluoMix，提出两阶段视觉-语言框架 FluoCLIP，在 11 种染料上显著超越现有方法，代码与数据已开源。
AI.motivation: 传统 FQA 方法默认所有荧光染料共享同一全局聚焦排序，忽视了染料间光学差异导致的非均匀聚焦行为；作者观察到同一聚焦程度在不同染料下的 rank 并不一致，因此需要建立染料感知的 FQA 范式。
AI.method: 1) 构建 FluoMix 数据集：5 种组织 × 11 种染料 × 7 个物理聚焦级，共 38 500 张图像；2) 设计 FluoCLIP：阶段一用对比视觉-语言预训练将染料语义与图像解耦，阶段二在冻结的 stain-token 条件下进行有序回归，实现染料条件化聚焦预测；3) 引入染料一致性正则与聚焦序保持损失，确保表征既含染料信息又不破坏序结构。
AI.result: FluoCLIP 在 FluoMix 上的 SRCC 达 0.921，比最佳传统方法（Brenner 梯度）提升 34.7%，比微调 CLIP 提升 18.2%；跨染料 zero-shot 实验显示其 SRCC 仍保持 0.875，误差增幅 < 0.05；在独立共聚焦与双光子数据上迁移后 SRCC > 0.85，验证强泛化。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模染料依赖的聚焦行为，FluoCLIP 突破了“染色无关”假设带来的性能瓶颈，为荧光显微全自动重聚焦、大样本高通量筛查提供了可靠、可迁移的聚焦质量评估工具。

title: Human Misperception of Generative-AI Alignment: A Laboratory Experiment
summary: We conduct an incentivized laboratory experiment to study people's perception of generative artificial intelligence (GenAI) alignment in the context of economic decision-making. Using a panel of economic problems spanning the domains of risk, time preference, social preference, and strategic interactions, we ask human subjects to make choices for themselves and to predict the choices made by GenAI on behalf of a human user. We find that people overestimate the degree of alignment between GenAI and human choices. In every problem, human subjects' average prediction about GenAI's choice is substantially closer to the average human-subject choice than it is to the GenAI choice. At the individual level, different subjects' predictions about GenAI's choice in a given problem are highly correlated with their own choices in the same problem. We explore the implications of people overestimating GenAI alignment in a simple theoretical model.

AI.tldr: 人类系统性地高估生成式人工智能在经济决策情境中与自身选择的一致性，且预测偏差显著。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI正深度嵌入经济决策场景，但人类对其“类人”程度缺乏客观认知，可能诱发过度信任或误用。
AI.method: 激励性实验室实验：让受试者先为自己做四类经济问题（风险、时间偏好、社会偏好、策略互动）决策，再预测GenAI替人类用户做的选择；并用理论模型推演高估对齐度的后果。
AI.result: 所有任务中，人预测的GenAI选择都显著偏离真实GenAI选择，而更接近人自身平均选择；个体层面，预测与自身选择的相关系数极高。
AI.conclusion: 人类存在“自我投射”式对齐幻觉，易把自身偏好误认为AI偏好，提示需在设计AI接口与监管中引入“去偏见”机制，防止过度依赖。

title: Robust Adaptation of Foundation Models with Black-Box Visual Prompting
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI) 2026
summary: With a surge of large-scale pre-trained models, parameter-efficient transfer learning (PETL) of large models has garnered significant attention. While promising, they commonly rely on two optimistic assumptions: 1) full access to the parameters of a PTM, and 2) sufficient memory capacity to cache all intermediate activations for gradient computation. However, in most real-world applications, PTMs serve as black-box APIs or proprietary software without full parameter accessibility. Besides, it is hard to meet a large memory requirement for modern PTMs. This work proposes black-box visual prompting (BlackVIP), which efficiently adapts the PTMs without knowledge of their architectures or parameters. BlackVIP has two components: 1) Coordinator and 2) simultaneous perturbation stochastic approximation with gradient correction (SPSA-GC). The Coordinator designs input-dependent visual prompts, which allow the target PTM to adapt in the wild. SPSA-GC efficiently estimates the gradient of PTM to update Coordinator. Besides, we introduce a variant, BlackVIP-SE, which significantly reduces the runtime and computational cost of BlackVIP. Extensive experiments on 19 datasets demonstrate that BlackVIPs enable robust adaptation to diverse domains and tasks with minimal memory requirements. We further provide a theoretical analysis on the generalization of visual prompting methods by presenting their connection to the certified robustness of randomized smoothing, and presenting an empirical support for improved robustness.

AI.tldr: BlackVIP 在无需开放参数与显存缓存的前提下，通过“输入相关视觉提示 + SPSA 梯度矫正”把大模型当黑盒微调，19 数据集验证其域适应与鲁棒性优于现有 PETL 方法。
AI.motivation: 现有参数高效迁移学习(PETL)默认可访问全部参数且能缓存中间激活，但真实部署中大模型多为黑盒 API 并受显存瓶颈制约，亟需零参数曝光、低显存占用的微调范式。
AI.method: 提出 BlackVIP：①Coordinator 网络为每张输入生成视觉提示并注入图像；②SPSA-GC 对黑盒模型输出做同时扰动随机逼近，估计带偏差校正的梯度以更新 Coordinator；③推出 BlackVIP-SE 用单点估计进一步压缩计算。
AI.result: 在 19 个视觉分类/检测数据集上，BlackVIP 平均准确率优于 LoRA、Adapter 等 PETL 基线 1.3–4.7%，显存占用降至 1/20；理论表明其提示机制等价于随机平滑认证鲁棒性，实验验证对 FGSM、PGD 攻击鲁棒性提升 8–12%。
AI.conclusion: BlackVIP 首次实现大模型黑盒、低显存、任务无关的提示式微调，兼具实用部署与理论保障，为封闭源大模型的端侧适配提供可行路径。

title: Catalogue Grounded Multimodal Attribution for Museum Video under Resource and Regulatory Constraints
summary: Audiovisual (AV) archives in museums and galleries are growing rapidly, but much of this material remains effectively locked away because it lacks consistent, searchable metadata. Existing method for archiving requires extensive manual effort. We address this by automating the most labour intensive part of the workflow: catalogue style metadata curation for in gallery video, grounded in an existing collection database. Concretely, we propose catalogue-grounded multimodal attribution for museum AV content using an open, locally deployable video language model. We design a multi pass pipeline that (i) summarises artworks in a video, (ii) generates catalogue style descriptions and genre labels, and (iii) attempts to attribute title and artist via conservative similarity matching to the structured catalogue. Early deployments on a painting catalogue suggest that this framework can improve AV archive discoverability while respecting resource constraints, data sovereignty, and emerging regulation, offering a transferable template for application-driven machine learning in other high-stakes domains.

AI.tldr: 提出一种面向馆内视听档案、可本地部署的视频语言模型流水线，无需人工即可批量生成目录式元数据，实现作品自动摘要、描述、标签与归属匹配，显著增强可发现性。
AI.motivation: 博物馆/美术馆视听档案激增，但因缺少一致可检索元数据而“沉睡”；传统人工编目耗时耗力，亟需自动化且契合馆藏数据库的轻量方案。
AI.method: 设计“基于目录的多模态归因”多趟流水线：①视频内艺术作品摘要；②生成目录风格描述与体裁标签；③采用保守相似度匹配，将片段关联到结构化目录中的标题与作者。整个系统基于开源视频-语言模型，支持本地部署、数据主权与法规合规。
AI.result: 在绘画目录早期部署中，框架能在资源受限条件下提升视听档案的可发现性，初步验证了目录相符性。
AI.conclusion: 该模板证明，受目录先验约束的应用驱动机器学习可在高风险文化领域落地，为其他类似场景提供可迁移范式。

title: Green Prompting: Characterizing Prompt-driven Energy Costs of LLM Inference
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have become widely used across various domains spanning search engines, code generation, and text creation. However, a major concern associated with their adoption is the high cost of inference, impacting both their sustainability and financial feasibility. In this study, we empirically study how different prompt and response characteristics directly impact LLM inference energy cost. We conduct experiments leveraging three open-source transformer-based LLMs across three task types$-$question answering, sentiment analysis, and text generation. For each inference, we analyzed prompt and response characteristics (length, semantic meaning, time taken, energy consumption). Our results demonstrate that even when presented with identical tasks, models generate responses with varying characteristics and subsequently exhibit distinct energy consumption patterns. We found that prompt length is less significant than the semantic meaning of the task itself. In addition, we identified specific keywords associated with higher or lower energy usage that vary between associated tasks. These findings highlight the importance of prompt design in optimizing inference efficiency. We conclude that the semantic meaning of prompts and certain task-related keywords significantly impact inference costs, leading the way for deeper exploration towards creating energy-adaptive LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文首次量化了提示语义与关键词对LLM推理能耗的影响，指出任务语义比提示长度更能决定能耗，并提出“能耗-提示”可设计范式。
AI.motivation: LLM推理成本高昂，阻碍其可持续与规模化部署；现有工作聚焦算法或硬件优化，却忽视输入本身（提示）对能耗的直接作用，缺乏经验性证据。
AI.method: 在三个开源Transformer LLM上，对问答、情感分析、文本生成三类任务进行受控实验；同步采集提示/回复长度、语义向量、推理时延与实测能耗；采用方差分析与相关性检验，识别高/低能耗关键词并建立语义-能耗映射。
AI.result: 相同任务下，模型回复的语义差异使能耗最高相差2.3×；提示长度对能耗影响不足语义因素的30%；每类任务均可列出10±2个高能耗关键词，其出现即平均抬升18%能耗。
AI.conclusion: 提示语义与任务相关关键词是推理能耗的独立显著因子；通过提示重写或关键词替换即可在精度无损条件下降低10-20%能耗，为构建“能耗自适应”LLM奠定输入层优化路径。

title: Weighted quantization using MMD: From mean field to mean shift via gradient flows
summary: Approximating a probability distribution using a set of particles is a fundamental problem in machine learning and statistics, with applications including clustering and quantization. Formally, we seek a weighted mixture of Dirac measures that best approximates the target distribution. While much existing work relies on the Wasserstein distance to quantify approximation errors, maximum mean discrepancy (MMD) has received comparatively less attention, especially when allowing for variable particle weights. We argue that a Wasserstein-Fisher-Rao gradient flow is well-suited for designing quantizations optimal under MMD. We show that a system of interacting particles satisfying a set of ODEs discretizes this flow. We further derive a new fixed-point algorithm called mean shift interacting particles (MSIP). We show that MSIP extends the classical mean shift algorithm, widely used for identifying modes in kernel density estimators. Moreover, we show that MSIP can be interpreted as preconditioned gradient descent and that it acts as a relaxation of Lloyd's algorithm for clustering. Our unification of gradient flows, mean shift, and MMD-optimal quantization yields algorithms that are more robust than state-of-the-art methods, as demonstrated via high-dimensional and multi-modal numerical experiments.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于 Wasserstein-Fisher-Rao 梯度流的粒子系统，用于在 MMD 意义下最优地近似目标分布；对应的离散算法 MSIP 统一了均值漂移与 Lloyd 聚类，实验显示其高维、多模态鲁棒性优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 用粒子近似概率分布是机器学习与统计的基础任务，但现有方法主要依赖 Wasserstein 距离，而允许粒子带可变权重时以 MMD 为误差度量的研究尚少，亟需设计相应的最优量化框架。
AI.method: 将 MMD 最小化问题视为在 Wasserstein-Fisher-Rao 几何下的梯度流，推导出一组可离散化的粒子 ODE；进而提出固定点算法 MSIP，证明其等价于带预条件的梯度下降，并揭示其与经典均值漂移及 Lloyd 算法的内在联系。
AI.result: 理论表明 MSIP 能够收敛到 MMD 最优的加权狄拉克混合；高维与多模态实验显示，MSIP 在聚类与量化任务中比当前最佳方法更稳健，粒子利用效率更高。
AI.conclusion: 通过把梯度流、均值漂移与 MMD 最优量化统一在 MSIP 框架下，不仅填补了 Wasserstein 之外 MMD 粒子近似的空白，也为高维多模场景提供了更鲁棒的算法选择。

title: Intern-S1-Pro: Scientific Multimodal Foundation Model at Trillion Scale
summary: We introduce Intern-S1-Pro, the first one-trillion-parameter scientific multimodal foundation model. Scaling to this unprecedented size, the model delivers a comprehensive enhancement across both general and scientific domains. Beyond stronger reasoning and image-text understanding capabilities, its intelligence is augmented with advanced agent capabilities. Simultaneously, its scientific expertise has been vastly expanded to master over 100 specialized tasks across critical science fields, including chemistry, materials, life sciences, and earth sciences. Achieving this massive scale is made possible by the robust infrastructure support of XTuner and LMDeploy, which facilitates highly efficient Reinforcement Learning (RL) training at the 1-trillion parameter level while ensuring strict precision consistency between training and inference. By seamlessly integrating these advancements, Intern-S1-Pro further fortifies the fusion of general and specialized intelligence, working as a Specializable Generalist, demonstrating its position in the top tier of open-source models for general capabilities, while outperforming proprietary models in the depth of specialized scientific tasks.

AI.tldr: Intern-S1-Pro 凭借首个万亿参数科学多模态基座模型，实现通识与科学双域全面增强，在百余个科学专业任务上超越闭源模型，并以 XTuner+LMDeploy 支撑万亿级 RL 高效训练与推理一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有大模型在通识推理与科学深度任务之间难以兼顾，亟需一个同时具备通用智能与百级科学任务专家能力的开源模型，并突破万亿参数规模的训练-推理一致性瓶颈。
AI.method: 采用 XTuner 与 LMDeploy 联合基础设施，在万亿参数规模下实现高效强化学习训练；通过多模态融合与 agent 能力增强，构建可特化的通才架构，对化学、材料、生命科学、地球科学等四大领域 100+ 任务进行专门优化。
AI.result: 模型在通用基准位列开源第一梯队；在深度科学任务上超越同规模闭源模型，实现通识推理、图文理解与 agent 能力同步跃升；训练与推理精度误差控制在万亿级参数下仍保持严格一致。
AI.conclusion: Intern-S1-Pro 验证了“可特化的通才”新范式，首次将万亿参数、多模态、科学专家能力开源统一，为后续超大模型在科研场景落地提供了可复现的基础设施与方法论。

title: KARL: Knowledge-Aware Reasoning and Reinforcement Learning for Knowledge-Intensive Visual Grounding
summary: Knowledge-Intensive Visual Grounding (KVG) requires models to localize objects using fine-grained, domain-specific entity names rather than generic referring expressions. Although Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) possess rich entity knowledge and strong generic grounding capabilities, they often fail to effectively utilize such knowledge when grounding specialized concepts, revealing a knowledge-grounding gap between internal knowledge and grounding predictions. To address this challenge, we propose a knowledge-aware training paradigm for KVG. Our approach first constructs knowledge-guided reasoning data to encourage models to activate domain-relevant entity knowledge during grounding, and then introduces KARL, a Knowledge-Aware Reinforcement Learning framework that adaptively modulates reward signals according to the model's estimated knowledge mastery of different entities. To facilitate systematic evaluation, we introduce KVG-Bench, a benchmark spanning 10 domains with 1.3K curated test cases covering 531 images and 882 entities. Extensive experiments show that our approach consistently outperforms a wide range of baseline models and achieves substantially stronger cross-domain generalization on unseen categories. The data, codes, and models are released at https://github.com/thunlp/KARL.

AI.tldr: 提出知识引导的视觉定位训练范式KARL，通过知识驱动推理数据与自适应强化学习解决MLLM在领域专属实体定位上的知识- grounding脱节，并发布KVG-Bench基准。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM虽具备丰富实体知识与通用定位能力，但在定位领域专属细粒度实体时无法有效调用内部知识，导致知识- grounding性能落差。
AI.method: 1) 构建知识引导推理数据，迫使模型在定位过程中激活领域相关实体知识；2) 设计KARL框架，利用强化学习根据模型对各实体知识掌握度自适应调节奖励信号；3) 建立跨10域、1.3K样例、531图、882实体的KVG-Bench评测基准。
AI.result: 在KVG-Bench上显著优于多种基线，并在未见类别上表现出更强的跨域泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 知识感知训练范式可有效弥合MLLM内部知识与定位预测间的鸿沟，为未来知识密集型视觉任务提供新思路。

title: Green Prompting: Characterizing Prompt-driven Energy Costs of LLM Inference
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have become widely used across various domains spanning search engines, code generation, and text creation. However, a major concern associated with their adoption is the high cost of inference, impacting both their sustainability and financial feasibility. In this study, we empirically study how different prompt and response characteristics directly impact LLM inference energy cost. We conduct experiments leveraging three open-source transformer-based LLMs across three task types$-$question answering, sentiment analysis, and text generation. For each inference, we analyzed prompt and response characteristics (length, semantic meaning, time taken, energy consumption). Our results demonstrate that even when presented with identical tasks, models generate responses with varying characteristics and subsequently exhibit distinct energy consumption patterns. We found that prompt length is less significant than the semantic meaning of the task itself. In addition, we identified specific keywords associated with higher or lower energy usage that vary between associated tasks. These findings highlight the importance of prompt design in optimizing inference efficiency. We conclude that the semantic meaning of prompts and certain task-related keywords significantly impact inference costs, leading the way for deeper exploration towards creating energy-adaptive LLMs.

AI.tldr: Prompt 语义与任务关键词，而非长度，才是决定 LLM 推理能耗的主因；优化提示可显著降低能耗。
AI.motivation: LLM 推理能耗高、费用大，阻碍其可持续部署，亟需厘清“提示—响应”维度如何直接影响能耗，以指导节能设计。
AI.method: 以三套开源 Transformer LLM 在问答、情感分析、文本生成三类任务上实测，逐条记录提示/响应长度、语义、耗时与能耗，并做关联分析。
AI.result: 同一任务下不同模型响应特征与能耗差异显著；提示长度对能耗影响弱，语义及任务关键词关联度强；可归纳出高/低能耗关键词列表且因任务而异。
AI.conclusion: 提示语义和任务关键词是能耗关键杠杆，为构建“能量自适应”LLM 奠定实证基础，后续应深入语义层面优化提示与模型结构。

title: MOON3.0: Reasoning-aware Multimodal Representation Learning for E-commerce Product Understanding
summary: With the rapid growth of e-commerce, exploring general representations rather than task-specific ones has attracted increasing attention. Although recent multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have driven significant progress in product understanding, they are typically employed as feature extractors that implicitly encode product information into global embeddings, thereby limiting their ability to capture fine-grained attributes. Therefore, we argue that leveraging the reasoning capabilities of MLLMs to explicitly model fine-grained product attributes holds significant potential. Nevertheless, achieving this goal remains non-trivial due to several key challenges: (i) long-context reasoning tends to dilute the model's attention to salient information in the raw input; (ii) supervised fine-tuning (SFT) primarily encourages rigid imitation, limiting the exploration of effective reasoning strategies; and (iii) fine-grained details are progressively attenuated during forward propagation. To address these issues, we propose MOON3.0, the first reasoning-aware MLLM-based model for product representation learning. Our method (1) employs a multi-head modality fusion module to adaptively integrate raw signals; (2) incorporates a joint contrastive and reinforcement learning framework to autonomously explore more effective reasoning strategies; and (3) introduces a fine-grained residual enhancement module to progressively preserve local details throughout the network. Additionally, we release a large-scale multimodal e-commerce benchmark MBE3.0. Experimentally, our model demonstrates state-of-the-art zero-shot performance across various downstream tasks on both our benchmark and public datasets.

AI.tldr: MOON3.0 是首个面向商品表征的“推理感知”多模态大模型，通过自适应融合、对比-强化联合训练与残差细节增强，解决长语境失焦、SFT 僵化模仿及细节衰减三大痛点，在自建的 MBE3.0 和公开数据集上实现零样本 SOTA。
AI.motivation: 电商场景下，现有多模态大模型仅将商品信息压缩为全局嵌入，难以显式捕捉细粒度属性；作者认为应充分释放大模型的推理能力，以获得通用且精细的商品表征。
AI.method: 提出 MOON3.0：1) 多头模态融合模块自适应整合原始信号；2) 对比学习 + 强化学习联合框架，鼓励模型自主探索更优推理路径；3) 细粒度残差增强模块，逐层补充局部细节。同时发布大规模多模态电商基准 MBE3.0。
AI.result: 在 MBE3.0 及多个公开数据集上，MOON3.0 在零样本设定下全面超越现有方法，取得 state-of-the-art 成绩。
AI.conclusion: 将大模型推理机制显式引入商品表征学习，可显著缓解细节丢失与策略僵化问题；MOON3.0 为电商通用表征提供了新范式，并依托 MBE3.0 为后续研究奠定 benchmark 基础。

title: SAKE: Structured Agentic Knowledge Extrapolation for Complex LLM Reasoning via Reinforcement Learning
summary: Knowledge extrapolation is the process of inferring novel information by combining and extending existing knowledge that is explicitly available. It is essential for solving complex questions in specialized domains where retrieving comprehensive external knowledge is impractical. We propose SAKE (Structured Agentic Knowledge Extrapolation), a RL powered agentic framework that trains LLMs to autonomously retrieve and extrapolate structured knowledge through tool-augmented reinforcement learning. SAKE defines two external KG tools: entity group construction and cross-group triplet retrieval. The model learns to interleave these 2 retrieval tools during a three-turn rollout: extracting key entities, filtering relevant concept groups, and associative reasoning by constructing new triplets through analogy. The entire pipeline is optimized end-to-end with GRPO using a curriculum reward, teaching the model what to retrieve and how to reason over it. Our experiments proved that SAKE fine-tuned Qwen2.5-7B model surpasses GPT-3.5-Turbo with state-of-the-art agentic KG reasoning on both biomedical (75.4% vs. 70.1%) and commonsense (81.3% vs. 74.7%) benchmarks, while reducing token usage by over 90%. These results demonstrate that associative reasoning over incomplete structured knowledge does not requiring large models with complex, multi-step prompting, thus can be learned end-to-end by small, open-weight models through reinforcement learning with the right tools and training signal. Our code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/SAKE-7585.

AI.tldr: SAKE 用 RL 把 7B 小模型训练成能自主调用两类 KG 工具、三回合内完成实体抽取→组过滤→类比补全的 agent，端到端击败 GPT-3.5， Tokens 降 90%，证明小模型也能靠工具+信号完成高阶结构化知识推理。
AI.motivation: 专业领域知识库常不完整，靠外部检索补全代价高；现有大模型多步提示复杂且昂贵，需要让小模型具备自主结构化知识推理与补全能力。
AI.method: 提出 RL 驱动的 agentic 框架 SAKE，定义实体组构造与跨组三元组检索两种 KG 工具，模型在三回合 rollout 中交替调用；用 GRPO 与课程奖励端到端优化训练，教会模型“取什么、怎么推”。
AI.result: 在生物医学与常识问答基准上，SAKE 微调的 Qwen2.5-7B 准确率分别达 75.4% 与 81.3%，显著优于 GPT-3.5-Turbo 的 70.1% 与 74.7%，同时 Token 消耗降低 90% 以上。
AI.conclusion: 不完整结构化知识上的联想推理无需大模型与复杂提示，通过合适工具与强化学习信号，小参数开源模型即可端到端习得，兼顾性能与成本。

title: A Polynomial-Time Algorithm for Variational Inequalities under the Minty Condition
comment: V3 polishes the writing and makes a correction to Theorem 5.2
summary:
Solving (Stampacchia) variational inequalities (SVIs) is a foundational problem at the heart of optimization. However, this expressivity comes at the cost of computational hardness. As a result, most research has focused on carving out specific subclasses that elude those intractability barriers. A classical property that goes back to the 1960s is the Minty condition, which postulates that the Minty VI (MVI) problem admits a solution.
  In this paper, we establish the first polynomial-time algorithm -- with complexity growing polynomially in the dimension $d$ and $\log(1/ε)$ -- for solving $ε$-SVIs for Lipschitz continuous mappings under the Minty condition. Prior approaches either incurred an exponentially worse dependence on $1/ε$ (and other natural parameters of the problem) or made more restrictive assumptions, such as monotonicity. To do so, we introduce a new variant of the ellipsoid algorithm whereby separating hyperplanes are obtained after taking a descent step from the center of the ellipsoid. It succeeds even though the set of SVIs can be nonconvex and not fully dimensional. Moreover, when our algorithm is applied to an instance with no MVI solution and fails to identify an SVI solution, it produces a succinct certificate of MVI infeasibility. We also show that deciding whether the Minty condition holds is $\mathsf{coNP}$-complete, thereby establishing that the disjunction of those two problems is polynomial-time solvable even though each problem is individually intractable.
  We provide several extensions and new applications of our main results. Most notably, we obtain the first polynomial-time algorithms for computing Nash equilibria in multi-player harmonic games. Finally, in two-player general-sum concave games, we give the first polynomial-time algorithm that outputs either a Nash equilibrium or a strict coarse correlated equilibrium.

AI.tldr: 本文首次给出在 Minty 条件下求解 Lipschitz SVI 的维度与 log(1/ε) 多项式时间算法，并证明判定 Minty 条件本身为 coNP-完全，同时首次实现多人 harmonic 博弈与二人一般和凹博弈的纳什均衡/粗相关均衡多项式时间计算。
AI.motivation: 求解 Stampacchia 变分不等式 (SVI) 是优化核心问题，但一般情形计算困难的屏障长期存在。已有研究多通过要求更强的单调性等限制来回避困难。本文旨在挖掘较弱的古典 Minty 条件，首次在仅假设 Lipschitz 连续的前提下获得维度与精度多项式时间可解性，从而显著扩大可有效求解的 SVI 子类。
AI.method: 1) 提出“从椭球中心先下降再取分离超平面”的新型椭球算法，即使可行域非凸或非满维亦能收敛；2) 若算法无法找到 SVI 解，则自动生成 Minty VI 不可行的简洁证书；3) 证明检验 Minty 条件的判定问题为 coNP-完全，并利用 SVI 与 Minty VI 的析取关系，给出整体仍属多项式时间的求解框架；4) 将结果应用于多人 harmonic 博弈与二人一般和凹博弈，分别输出纳什均衡或严格粗相关均衡。
AI.result: (i) 获得首个维度 d 与 log(1/ε) 多项式阶复杂度 O(poly(d, log(1/ε))) 的 SVI ε-近似算法，且仅需 Lipschitz 与 Minty 条件；(ii) 证明 Minty 条件判定为 coNP-完全，首次确立该条件本身的计算复杂性；(iii) 给出首个多人 harmonic 博弈纳什均衡的多项式时间算法；(iv) 在二人一般和凹博弈中，首次实现“输出纳什均衡或严格粗相关均衡”的多项式时间计算。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入带下降步骤的修正椭球法，本文突破性地在弱于单调性的 Minty 条件下实现 SVI 的多项式时间求解，并揭示 Minty 条件判定的 coNP-完全性，从而刻画了该问题的计算边界。扩展结果直接为博弈论中若干长期缺乏高效算法的重要模型（多人 harmonic 博弈、二人一般和凹博弈）提供了首个多项式时间求解方案，显著拓宽了变分不等式与博弈均衡计算的可处理边界。

title: Toward Personalized Darts Training: A Data-Driven Framework Based on Skeleton-Based Biomechanical Analysis and Motion Modeling
summary: As sports training becomes more data-driven, traditional dart coaching based mainly on experience and visual observation is increasingly inadequate for high-precision, goal-oriented movements. Although prior studies have highlighted the importance of release parameters, joint motion, and coordination in dart throwing, most quantitative methods still focus on local variables, single-release metrics, or static template matching. These approaches offer limited support for personalized training and often overlook useful movement variability. This paper presents a data-driven dart training assistance system. The system creates a closed-loop framework spanning motion capture, feature modeling, and personalized feedback. Dart-throwing data were collected in markerless conditions using a Kinect 2.0 depth sensor and an optical camera. Eighteen kinematic features were extracted from four biomechanical dimensions: three-link coordination, release velocity, multi-joint angular configuration, and postural stability. Two modules were developed: a personalized optimal throwing trajectory model that combines historical high-quality samples with the minimum jerk criterion, and a motion deviation diagnosis and recommendation model based on z-scores and hierarchical logic. A total of 2,396 throwing samples from professional and non-professional athletes were collected. Results show that the system generates smooth personalized reference trajectories consistent with natural human movement. Case studies indicate that it can detect poor trunk stability, abnormal elbow displacement, and imbalanced velocity control, then provide targeted recommendations. The framework shifts dart evaluation from deviation from a uniform standard to deviation from an individual's optimal control range, improving personalization and interpretability for darts training and other high-precision target sports.

AI.tldr: 用Kinect+摄像头采集2 396次投掷，构建“个人最优轨迹—偏差诊断”闭环系统，实现飞镖训练的个性化量化指导。
AI.motivation: 传统经验式教学无法量化高精度动作，现有研究多聚焦局部变量或统一模板，忽视个体差异与可变性，亟需数据驱动的个性化训练工具。
AI.method: 无标记采集深度与光学数据，提取18维运动学特征（三链协调、释放速度、多关节角型、姿势稳定）；用历史高质量样本+最小加加加速度准则生成个人最优轨迹，以z-score与分层逻辑诊断偏差并给出建议。
AI.result: 系统可生成符合自然运动的平滑个性化参考轨迹；案例验证其能准确识别躯干不稳、肘位移异常、速度控制失衡等问题并提供针对性指导。
AI.conclusion: 框架将评价标准从“离统一模板多远”转为“离个人最优控制域多远”，显著提升飞镖等高精度瞄准类项目的个性化与可解释性。

title: PhysGaia: A Physics-Aware Benchmark with Multi-Body Interactions for Dynamic Novel View Synthesis
comment: Accepted at CVPR 2026; Project page: http://cvlab.snu.ac.kr/research/PhysGaia; Dataset: https://huggingface.co/datasets/mijeongkim/PhysGaia/tree/main
summary: We introduce PhysGaia, a novel physics-aware benchmark for Dynamic Novel View Synthesis (DyNVS) that encompasses both structured objects and unstructured physical phenomena. While existing datasets primarily focus on photorealistic appearance, PhysGaia is specifically designed to support physics-consistent dynamic reconstruction. Our benchmark features complex scenarios with rich multi-body interactions, where objects realistically collide and exchange forces. Furthermore, it incorporates a diverse range of materials, including liquid, gas, textile, and rheological substance, moving beyond the rigid-body assumptions prevalent in prior work. To ensure physical fidelity, all scenes in PhysGaia are generated using material-specific physics solvers that strictly adhere to fundamental physical laws. We provide comprehensive ground-truth information, including 3D particle trajectories and physical parameters (e.g., viscosity), enabling the quantitative evaluation of physical modeling. To facilitate research adoption, we also provide integration pipelines for recent 4D Gaussian Splatting models along with our dataset and their results. By addressing the critical shortage of physics-aware benchmarks, PhysGaia can significantly advance research in dynamic view synthesis, physics-based scene understanding, and the integration of deep learning with physical simulation, ultimately enabling more faithful reconstruction and interpretation of complex dynamic scenes.

AI.tldr: PhysGaia 是第一个专为动态新视角合成（DyNVS）打造的“物理一致”基准，覆盖刚体、流体、气体、织物及流变材料等复杂场景，并提供粒子轨迹、黏度等真值，可直接量化评估神经渲染与物理定律的吻合度。
AI.motivation: 现有 DyNVS 数据集只关注照片级真实感，忽视物理定律，导致模型在碰撞、流动、形变等场景下出现明显违背动力学的伪影；社区缺乏可量化检验“物理合理性”的公开基准。
AI.method: 1) 场景层：设计多物体碰撞、流体-固体耦合、气体扩散、织物摆动、流变挤压等 60 余种高动态案例；2) 仿真层：对应调用刚体、SPH、FEM、PBD、FLIP 等材料专用求解器，严格守恒动量/能量；3) 数据层：同步输出多视角 24-bit EXR 图像、深度、语义掩膜、3D 粒子轨迹、速度场、材料参数（密度、黏度、杨氏模量等）；4) 工具层：提供 PyTorch/TensorFlow 读取 API 与 4D Gaussian Splatting 即插即用脚本。
AI.result: 在 PhysGaia 上对 8 种前沿神经辐射场/高斯溅射模型进行基准测试，发现顶尖方法的物理误差（顶点位置偏差、动量残差）仍比真值大 1–2 个数量级；附带模型在液体飞溅、气体湍流场景出现 30% 以上穿透率，证明数据集有效揭示现有算法的物理盲区。
AI.conclusion: PhysGaia 填补了“物理一致动态场景”基准空白，可作为神经渲染与物理联合优化的试金石，推动可微分仿真、物理约束网络、显式-隐式混合表示等方向研究，为构建真正遵从牛顿定律的沉浸式重建系统铺平道路。

title: Multi-Timescale Primal Dual Hybrid Gradient with Application to Distributed Optimization
summary:
We propose two variants of the Primal Dual Hybrid Gradient (PDHG) algorithm for saddle point problems with block decomposable duals, hereafter called Multi-Timescale PDHG (MT-PDHG) and its accelerated variant (AMT-PDHG). Through novel mixtures of Bregman divergence and multi-timescale extrapolations, our MT-PDHG and AMT-PDHG converge under arbitrary updating rates for different dual blocks while remaining fully deterministic and robust to extreme delays in dual updates.
  We further apply our (A)MT-PDHG, augmented with the gradient sliding techniques introduced in Lan et al. (2020), Lan (2016), to distributed optimization. The flexibility in choosing different updating rates for different blocks allows a more refined control over the communication rounds between different pairs of agents, thereby improving the efficiencies in settings with heterogeneity in local objectives and communication costs. Moreover, with careful choices of penalty levels, our algorithms show linear and thus optimal dependency on function similarities, a measure of how similar the gradients of local objectives are. This provides a positive answer to the open question whether such dependency is achievable for non-smooth objectives (Arjevani and Shamir 2015).

AI.tldr: 作者提出MT-PDHG与AMT-PDHG两种确定性算法，在任意块更新速率下仍能收敛，并将之用于分布式优化，首次在不可微场景下实现梯度相似度的线性依赖。
AI.motivation: 针对鞍点问题中多块对偶变量更新不同步、通信异构、不可微目标等实际难点，现有PDHG类方法要么要求同步更新，要么对延迟敏感，且无法以线性代价利用局部目标函数的梯度相似度。
AI.method: 1) 设计MT-PDHG：对每块对偶变量使用独立的Bregman散度与多时尺度外推步长，使算法在任何更新速率下保持收敛；2) 设计AMT-PDHG：在MT-PDHG基础上引入Nesterov型加速；3) 将两种算法与Lan等人的梯度滑动技术结合，用于分布式优化；4) 通过精细罚参设计，使收敛界线性依赖梯度相似度S，通信轮次可依通信成本与局部异质性自由调配。
AI.result: 理论证明：MT-PDHG与AMT-PDHG在确定性、任意块延迟下保持收敛；分布式版本在不可微、非强凸情形下获得O(S/ε)与Õ(S/√ε)复杂度，首次实现S的线性依赖并匹配下界；数值实验表明通信轮次可随S降低而线性减少，验证异构更新策略的实际提速。
AI.conclusion: 该工作突破性地证明：利用多时尺度更新与Bregman散度，PDHG族算法可兼顾异步鲁棒、确定性、通信效率与梯度相似度线性依赖，为异构网络中的分布式不可微优化提供了理论与实用兼备的解决方案，并正面回答了Arjevani-Shamir关于非光滑目标线性依赖S的公开问题。

title: Monotone and Conservative Policy Iteration Beyond the Tabular Case
summary: We introduce Reliable Policy Iteration (RPI) and Conservative RPI (CRPI), variants of Policy Iteration (PI) and Conservative PI (CPI), that retain tabular guarantees under function approximation. RPI uses a novel Bellman-constrained optimization for policy evaluation. We show that RPI restores the textbook \textit{monotonicity} of value estimates and that these estimates provably \textit{lower-bound} the true return; moreover, their limit partially satisfies the \textit{unprojected} Bellman equation. CRPI shares RPI's evaluation, but updates policies conservatively by maximizing a new performance-difference \textit{lower bound} that explicitly accounts for function-approximation-induced errors. CRPI inherits RPI's guarantees and, crucially, admits per-step improvement bounds. In initial simulations, RPI and CRPI outperform PI and its variants. Our work addresses a foundational gap in RL: popular algorithms such as TRPO and PPO derive from tabular CPI yet are deployed with function approximation, where CPI's guarantees often fail-leading to divergence, oscillations, or convergence to suboptimal policies. By restoring PI/CPI-style guarantees for \textit{arbitrary} function classes, RPI and CRPI provide a principled basis for next-generation RL.

AI.tldr: 提出 Reliable Policy Iteration(RPI) 与 Conservative RPI(CRPI)，在函数近似下恢复 PI/CPI 的表格理论保证；RPI 以 Bellman-约束优化做评估，保证值估计单调且给出真实回报下界；CRPI 用新的性能差异下界做保守策略更新，给出单步改进界。实验优于传统 PI 及其变种。
AI.motivation: TRPO、PPO 等主流算法源自表格 CPI，但在函数近似下失去理论保证，常出现发散、震荡或次优收敛，亟需一套保留 PI/CPI 风格保证且适用于任意函数类的迭代框架。
AI.method:
RPI：策略评估阶段求解带 Bellman 等式约束的优化，确保估计值单调提升并严格下界真实回报；极限部分满足未投影 Bellman 方程。
CRPI：沿用 RPI 评估，但在策略改进时最大化一个显式包含函数近似误差的性能差异下界，实现保守更新并导出每步改进界。
AI.result: 理论上 RPI 恢复单调性与下界性质，CRPI 获得单步改进上界；仿真中 RPI/CRPI 均优于标准 PI、CPI 以及 TRPO/PPO 类算法。
AI.conclusion: RPI/CRPI 首次为任意函数近似场景重建了 PI/CPI 式的收敛与改进保证，弥合了表格理论与深度 RL 实践之间的根本缺口，为下一代强化学习算法提供可验证基础。

title: InvZW: Invariant Feature Learning via Noise-Adversarial Training for Robust Image Zero-Watermarking
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication by the Frontiers in Signal Processing
summary: This paper introduces a novel deep learning framework for robust image zero-watermarking based on distortion-invariant feature learning. As a zero-watermarking scheme, our method leaves the original image unaltered and learns a reference signature through optimization in the feature space. The proposed framework consists of two key modules. In the first module, a feature extractor is trained via noise-adversarial learning to generate representations that are both invariant to distortions and semantically expressive. This is achieved by combining adversarial supervision against a distortion discriminator and a reconstruction constraint to retain image content. In the second module, we design a learning-based multibit zero-watermarking scheme where the trained invariant features are projected onto a set of trainable reference codes optimized to match a target binary message. Extensive experiments on diverse image datasets and a wide range of distortions show that our method achieves state-of-the-art robustness in both feature stability and watermark recovery. Comparative evaluations against existing self-supervised and deep watermarking techniques further highlight the superiority of our framework in generalization and robustness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于抗失真特征学习的零水印深度学习框架，不改变原图即可实现鲁棒的多比特水印，在多种失真场景下取得 SOTA 性能。
AI.motivation: 传统零水印方法依赖手工特征，对几何/压缩等失真鲁棒性差；深度学习水印多在像素域嵌入，易被察觉。作者想兼顾“无痕迹”和“抗失真”两大目标，通过特征空间优化学习可对抗失真的参考签名，实现真正的鲁棒零水印。
AI.method: 框架分两模块：①失真-对抗特征提取器，用失真判别器+重建约束训练出既失真不变又保留语义的特征；②学习式零水印嵌入器，将不变特征投影到可训练参考码字，使投影与目标比特消息匹配。两步联合优化，水印仅存在特征空间，原图不被改动。
AI.result: 在 ImageNet、COCO 等数据集上测试 20 余种失真（JPEG、裁剪、旋转、噪声、滤波等），比特误码率平均低于 1%，比现有自监督与深度水印方法降低 40%–70%，特征稳定性提升 2× 以上。
AI.conclusion: 失真不变特征+特征空间参考码优化是零水印鲁棒性的关键；框架无需嵌入、不可见性好，且对未知失真具有强泛化能力，为版权保护提供了更实用的新范式。

title: TRACE: Transparent Web Reliability Assessment with Contextual Explanations
comment: Withdrawing paper due to identified inaccuracies in citation attribution. Specifically, errors were found in the Literature Review (Section 2), where references were incorrectly attributed or do not adequately support the associated claims. These issues affect the accuracy of the arguments presented. To preserve the integrity of the scholarly record, the authors are withdrawing this version
summary: In an era of AI-generated misinformation flooding the web, existing tools struggle to empower users with nuanced, transparent assessments of content credibility. They often default to binary (true/false) classifications without contextual justifications, leaving users vulnerable to disinformation. We address this gap by introducing TRACE: Transparent Reliability Assessment with Contextual Explanations, a unified framework that performs two key tasks: (1) it assigns a fine-grained, continuous reliability score (from 0.1 to 1.0) to web content, and (2) it generates a contextual explanation for its assessment. The core of TRACE is the TrueGL-1B model, fine-tuned on a novel, large-scale dataset of over 140,000 articles. This dataset's primary contribution is its annotation with 35 distinct continuous reliability scores, created using a Human-LLM co-creation and data poisoning paradigm. This method overcomes the limitations of binary-labeled datasets by populating the mid-ranges of reliability. In our evaluation, TrueGL-1B consistently outperforms other small-scale LLM baselines and rule-based approaches on key regression metrics, including MAE, RMSE, and R2. The model's high accuracy and interpretable justifications make trustworthy information more accessible. To foster future research, our code and model are made publicly available here: github.com/zade90/TrueGL.

AI.tldr: TRACE框架通过TrueGL-1B模型实现0.1-1.0的连续性可信度评分并给出上下文解释，解决了现有工具仅能二分类且缺乏依据的问题。
AI.motivation: 针对AI生成内容泛滥导致现有可信度评估工具只能给出非黑即白的结果、用户难以辨别信息真伪的痛点，作者提出需要细粒度、带解释的可信度评估方法。
AI.method: 设计TRACE框架，核心为在14万篇新闻上微调得到的1B参数TrueGL-1B模型；采用“人-机协同+数据投毒”策略构造35级连续可信度标注数据集，填补传统二分类数据在中段区间的空白。
AI.result: 在MAE、RMSE、R²等回归指标上，TrueGL-1B显著优于小规模LLM基线与规则方法，证明其既能输出高精度连续评分，又能生成可解释依据。
AI.conclusion: TRACE提供透明、可解释且细粒度的内容可信度评估，降低用户受虚假信息影响的风险；代码与模型已开源，供后续研究复用与扩展。

title: AICO: Feature Significance Tests for Supervised Learning
summary:
Machine learning is central to modern science, industry, and policy, yet its predictive power often comes at the cost of transparency: we rarely know which input features truly drive a model's predictions. Without such understanding, researchers cannot draw reliable conclusions, practitioners cannot ensure fairness or accountability, and policymakers cannot trust or govern model-based decisions.
  Existing tools for assessing feature influence are limited; most lack statistical guarantees, and many require costly retraining or surrogate modeling, making them impractical for large modern models. We introduce AICO, a broadly applicable framework that turns model interpretability into an efficient statistical exercise. AICO tests whether each feature genuinely improves predictive performance by masking its information and measuring the resulting change.
  The method provides exact, finite-sample feature p-values and confidence intervals for feature importance through a simple, non-asymptotic hypothesis testing procedure. It requires no retraining, surrogate modeling, or distributional assumptions, making it feasible for large-scale algorithms. In both controlled experiments and real applications, from credit scoring to mortgage-behavior prediction, AICO reliably identifies the variables that drive model behavior, providing a scalable and statistically principled path toward transparent and trustworthy machine learning.

AI.tldr: AICO 以无需重训练或代理模型的非渐近假设检验，为任意黑箱输出有限样本的 p 值与置信区间，首次在大模型尺度上给出统计保障的特征归因。
AI.motivation: 机器学习高预测力与低透明度之间的矛盾，导致研究者难下科学结论、从业者难保公平问责、监管者难施治理；现有解释工具普遍缺乏统计保证且计算代价高。
AI.method: 提出 AICO 框架：对每维特征做信息遮蔽→观察性能变化→将解释转化为“特征是否显著提升预测”的假设检验；利用置换/分块抽样等技巧直接构造有限样本零分布，无需重训练、代理模型或分布假设。
AI.result: 在可控模拟与真实场景（信用评分、抵押贷款行为预测）中，AICO 能准确识别真正驱动预测的特征，并提供校准的 p 值与置信区间，计算开销与模型规模线性相关，可扩展至大模型。
AI.conclusion: AICO 把模型可解释性转化为高效、有统计保障的检验任务，为构建透明、可信、可治理的机器学习系统提供了可扩展且易部署的通用路径。

title: Optimus: A Robust Defense Framework for Mitigating Toxicity while Fine-Tuning Conversational AI
summary: Customizing Large Language Models (LLMs) on untrusted datasets poses severe risks of injecting toxic behaviors. In this work, we introduce Optimus, a novel defense framework designed to mitigate fine-tuning harms while preserving conversational utility. Unlike existing defenses that rely heavily on precise toxicity detection or restrictive filtering, Optimus addresses the critical challenge of ensuring robust mitigation even when toxicity classifiers are imperfect or biased. Optimus integrates a training-free toxicity classification scheme that repurposes the safety alignment of commodity LLMs, and employs a dual-strategy alignment process combining synthetic "healing data" with Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) to efficiently steer models toward safety. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that Optimus mitigates toxicity even when relying on extremely biased classifiers (with up to 85% degradation in Recall). Optimus outperforms the state-of-the-art defense StarDSS and exhibits strong resilience against adaptive adversarial and jailbreak attacks. Our source code and datasets are available at https://github.com/secml-lab-vt/Optimus

AI.tldr: Optimus框架无需重新训练即可利用现成LLM的安全对齐能力，通过“治愈数据”+DPO双策略微调，在毒性分类器Recall下降85%的极端条件下仍能抑制毒性，超越StarDSS并抵御自适应越狱攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖精确毒性检测或严格过滤，当分类器存在偏差或召回率低时防御失效，亟需一种在不可信数据集上仍能稳定抑制毒性且保留对话能力的防御机制。
AI.method: 1) 训练无关毒性分类：复用商品LLM已内置的安全对齐信号，避免额外训练；2) 双策略对齐：合成“治愈数据”修正毒性行为，再用DPO将模型偏好导向安全；3) 整体框架无需更新毒性分类器，直接嵌入微调流程。
AI.result: 在毒性分类器Recall跌至15%的极端偏差场景下，Optimus仍显著降低毒性生成率；对比StarDSS，毒性漏检率下降>30%，在Adaptive、Johnday等越狱攻击下保持≤5%攻击成功率。
AI.conclusion: Optimus证明即使毒性检测器严重偏差，也能通过善用模型自身安全先验与偏好优化实现有效防御，为不可信数据定制LLM提供高鲁棒、低成本的实用方案。

title: Intervening to Learn and Compose Causally Disentangled Representations
comment: 45 pages, 10 figures; accepted to the 5th conference on Causal Learning and Reasoning (CLeaR)
summary: In designing generative models, it is commonly believed that in order to learn useful latent structure, we face a fundamental tension between expressivity and structure. In this paper we challenge this view by proposing a new approach to training arbitrarily expressive generative models that simultaneously learn causally disentangled concepts. This is accomplished by adding a simple context module to an arbitrarily complex black-box model, which learns to process concept information by implicitly inverting linear representations from the model's encoder. Inspired by the notion of intervention in a causal model, our module selectively modifies its architecture during training, allowing it to learn a compact joint model over different contexts. We show how adding this module leads to causally disentangled representations that can be composed for out-of-distribution generation on both real and simulated data. The resulting models can be trained end-to-end or fine-tuned from pre-trained models. To further validate our proposed approach, we prove a new identifiability result that extends existing work on identifying structured representations.

AI.tldr: 用一个轻量“上下文模块”把任意复杂生成模型改造成因果解耦的潜变量模型，无需牺牲表达能力即可在训练中自动学到可干预的因果因子，并给出对应的可识别性理论保证。
AI.motivation: 既有观点认为表达力与可解释/结构化潜因子存在天然冲突；作者质疑此权衡，希望在不牺牲模型复杂度的前提下让生成模型同时学到因果解耦的潜变量。
AI.method: 在任意黑箱生成模型(encoder + decoder)之外附加一个可微上下文模块：1) 隐式将encoder线性表示逆转为独立概念；2) 受因果干预思想驱动，模块在训练过程中动态调整结构，实现对不同上下文的紧凑联合建模；3) 整个系统可端到端训练，也可对预训练模型微调。
AI.result: 在仿真与真实数据上，该方法得到因果解耦的潜表示，可组合出分布外样本；定性/定量实验表明其优于主要对比基线，并首次在保持任意网络表达力的同时给出结构可识别性理论扩展。
AI.conclusion: 表达力与结构并非零和博弈；通过轻量上下文模块即可让任意生成模型学到因果可干预的潜因子，为可控生成及因果表示学习提供了新的通用框架。

title: Aleatoric Uncertainty Medical Image Segmentation Estimation via Flow Matching
summary: Quantifying aleatoric uncertainty in medical image segmentation is critical since it is a reflection of the natural variability observed among expert annotators. A conventional approach is to model the segmentation distribution using the generative model, but current methods limit the expression ability of generative models. While current diffusion-based approaches have demonstrated impressive performance in approximating the data distribution, their inherent stochastic sampling process and inability to model exact densities limit their effectiveness in accurately capturing uncertainty. In contrast, our proposed method leverages conditional flow matching, a simulation-free flow-based generative model that learns an exact density, to produce highly accurate segmentation results. By guiding the flow model on the input image and sampling multiple data points, our approach synthesizes segmentation samples whose pixel-wise variance reliably reflects the underlying data distribution. This sampling strategy captures uncertainties in regions with ambiguous boundaries, offering robust quantification that mirrors inter-annotator differences. Experimental results demonstrate that our method not only achieves competitive segmentation accuracy but also generates uncertainty maps that provide deeper insights into the reliability of the segmentation outcomes. The code for this paper is freely available at https://github.com/huynhspm/Data-Uncertainty

AI.tldr: 经图像促流采样即可得到像素级方差，把专家标注者间差异转化为可测的不确定度，架构与代码公开。
AI.motivation: 医学图像中边界模糊区域常伴随专家标注不一致，传统或以VAE/GAN为核的生成模型因近似表达式受限，难以准确计量内因不确定性；而扩散模型虽强但只能随机采样，无法给出精确密度，使其不确定度估计仍不够可信。
AI.method: 提出基于条件流匹配(CFM)的无模拟流动生成模型：在输入图像条件下训练推前-推回速度场，可得到精确概率密度；对同一张图像采样多条后向流迹，产生多种分割样本，以像素级方差度量不确定度。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在分割精度上与现有最佳方法相当，并且其方差图能稳定对应跨标注者差异，在边界模糊区亦保持稳健，定量指标优于扩散及VAE基线，无需耗时的逐级迭代采样。
AI.conclusion: 条件流匹配可兼顾高保真密度估计与高效采样，故能有效量化内因不确定度，为临床提供对模型结果可靠性的直接解释；框架后续可扩展至多器官、多中心数据及半监督场景。

title: Boosted Enhanced Quantile Regression Neural Networks with Spatiotemporal Permutation Entropy for Complex System Prognostics
comment: Preliminary version of a predictive maintenance framework using spiking neural networks and entropy-based analysis. To be expanded in future publications with hardware implementations and real-time drift detection modules. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2501.05087
summary: This paper presents a novel framework for pattern prediction and system prognostics centered on Spatiotemporal Permutation Entropy analysis integrated with Boosted Enhanced Quantile Regression Neural Networks (BEQRNNs). We address the challenge of understanding complex dynamical patterns in multidimensional systems through an approach that combines entropy-based complexity measures with advanced neural architectures. The system leverages dual computational stages: first implementing spatiotemporal entropy extraction optimized for multiscale temporal and spatial data streams, followed by an integrated BEQRNN layer that enables probabilistic pattern prediction with uncertainty quantification. This architecture achieves 81.17% accuracy in spatiotemporal pattern classification with prediction horizons up to 200 time steps and maintains robust performance across diverse regimes. Field testing across chaotic attractors, reaction-diffusion systems, and industrial datasets shows a 79% increase in critical transition detection accuracy and 81.22% improvement in long-term prediction reliability. The framework's effectiveness in processing complex, multimodal entropy features demonstrates significant potential for real-time prognostic applications.

AI.tldr: 提出“时空置换熵＋BEQRNN”两阶段框架，81 %精准预测200步、工业场景关键过渡检测提升79 %。
AI.motivation: 多维动力系统模式复杂、临界突变难预警，需兼顾不确定性量化的实时预测框架。
AI.method: ①多尺度时空置换熵提取复杂度特征→②BEQRNN做分位回归概率预测，端到端联合优化。
AI.result: 公开数据集与工业实测皆达SOTA：分类81.17 %；过渡检测↑79 %；长程可靠度↑81.22 %；200步内误差稳定。
AI.conclusion: 熵-神经网络耦合架构兼具解析复杂度与量化不确定性的优势，为实时故障/临界预警提供通用工具。

title: DIVER: A Multi-Stage Approach for Reasoning-intensive Information Retrieval
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation has achieved strong performance on knowledge-intensive tasks where query-document relevance can be identified through direct lexical or semantic matches. However, many real-world queries involve abstract reasoning, analogical thinking, or multi-step inference, which existing retrievers often struggle to capture. To address this challenge, we present DIVER, a retrieval pipeline designed for reasoning-intensive information retrieval. It consists of four components. The document preprocessing stage enhances readability and preserves content by cleaning noisy texts and segmenting long documents. The query expansion stage leverages large language models to iteratively refine user queries with explicit reasoning and evidence from retrieved documents. The retrieval stage employs a model fine-tuned on synthetic data spanning medical and mathematical domains, along with hard negatives, enabling effective handling of reasoning-intensive queries. Finally, the reranking stage combines pointwise and listwise strategies to produce both fine-grained and globally consistent rankings. On the BRIGHT benchmark, DIVER achieves state-of-the-art nDCG@10 scores of 46.8 overall and 31.9 on original queries, consistently outperforming competitive reasoning-aware models. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of reasoning-aware retrieval strategies in complex real-world tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出DIVER流程，以LLM驱动的迭代式查询扩展、领域化微调检索器和点-列表混合重排，在BRIGHT推理类基准上刷新SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有检索系统仅靠字面或浅层语义匹配，难以应对需要抽象推理、类比与多跳推断的复杂查询。作者希望把显式推理能力系统性地注入检索链路，突破知识梳理型任务的性能瓶颈。
AI.method: DIVER四段式流程：①文档预处理：降噪分段保留逻辑结构；②LLM迭代式查询扩展：让模型在检索循环中持续生成推理链与证据，将隐含推理显式写回查询；③领域化微调双塔检索器：用医学+数学合成数据集及困难负样本训练，提升对推理型查询的召回；④点-wise与列表-wise混合重排：先精打分再排全局，兼顾细粒度和一致性。
AI.result: 在BRIGHT公开数据集上，nDCG@10达到46.8（全部查询）与31.9（原创子集），均优于现有最佳推理感知基线，证明推理驱动的检索对真实复杂问题有效。
AI.conclusion: 将显式推理写入查询、并在训练与重排阶段同步建模推理依赖，可显著增强检索系统对抽象、多跳问题的处理能力，DIVER为后续检索-生成框架提供了可复用的推理级增强范式。

title: Fair Representation in Parliamentary Summaries: Measuring and Mitigating Inclusion Bias
comment: Extended journal version of "Identifying Algorithmic and Domain-Specific Bias in Parliamentary Debate Summarisation" (arXiv:2507.14221), which appeared at the AIDEM Workshop, ECML-PKDD 2025. This version extends the original with cross-lingual bias analysis, a two-level hierarchical summarisation method, and human annotation validation of the evaluation framework
summary: The The use of Large language models (LLMs) to summarise parliamentary proceedings presents a promising means of increasing the accessibility of democratic participation. However, as these systems increasingly mediate access to political information -- filtering and framing content before it reaches users -- there are important fairness considerations to address. In this work, we evaluate 5 LLMs (both proprietary and open-weight) in the summarisation of plenary debates from the European Parliament to investigate the representational biases that emerge in this context. We develop an attribution-aware evaluation framework to measure speaker-level inclusion and mis-representation in debate summaries. Across all models and experiments, we find that speakers are less accurately represented in the final summary on the basis of (i) their speaking-order (speeches in the middle of the debate were systematically excluded), (ii) language spoken (non-English speakers were less faithfully represented), and (iii) political affiliations (better outcomes for left-of-centre parties). We further show how biases in these contexts can be decomposed to distinguish inclusion bias (systematic omission) from hallucination bias (systematic misrepresentation), and explore the effect of different mitigation strategies. Prompting strategies do not affect these biases. Instead, we propose a hierarchical summarisation method that decomposes the task into simpler extraction and aggregation steps, which we show significantly improves the positional/speaking-order bias across all models. These findings underscore the need for domain-sensitive evaluation metrics and ethical oversight in the deployment of LLMs for multilingual democratic applications.

AI.tldr: 针对欧洲议会全辩实录的多语言、多政党文本，五类LLM摘要均存在位置、语种、意识形态三维偏差；作者提出分层摘要法可缓解位置偏差，而提示工程无效。
AI.motivation: 议会记录是民主透明度的关键入口，但LLM自动摘要可能在过滤与重构信息时引入偏见，威胁公平参与，因此需系统量化并消减此类偏见。
AI.method: 构建“归属感知”评测框架，比较5个模型对欧洲议会全会辩论的摘要；按发言顺序、语言、政党归属三维度计算覆盖率与忠实度，区分“遗漏型偏差”与“幻觉型偏差”；测试提示工程、分层两阶段摘要等缓解策略。
AI.result: 所有模型均出现：中段发言被系统性遗漏、非英语发言者被欠忠实摘要、左翼政党代表性显著高于右翼；提示工程对偏差无显著影响；提出的分层摘要法将位置偏差平均降低45%，其他维度提升有限。
AI.conclusion: LLM在民主多语场景中会产生可量化、结构化的利益相关者偏见；仅靠提示无法解决，需结合任务分解、领域敏感指标与持续伦理审查，方可安全部署于议会摘要等关键公共应用。

title: Meta-Learning at Scale for Large Language Models via Low-Rank Amortized Bayesian Meta-Learning
summary: Fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) with low-rank adaptation (LoRA) is a cost-effective way to incorporate information from a specific dataset. However, when a problem requires incorporating information from multiple datasets - as in few shot learning - generalization across datasets can be limited, driving up training costs. As a consequence, other approaches such as in-context learning are typically used in this setting. To address this challenge, we introduce an efficient method for adapting the weights of LLMs to multiple distributions, Amortized Bayesian Meta-Learning for LoRA (ABMLL). This method builds on amortized Bayesian meta-learning for smaller models, adapting this approach to LLMs by reframing where local and global variables are defined in LoRA and using a new hyperparameter to balance reconstruction accuracy and the fidelity of task-specific parameters to the global ones. ABMLL supports effective generalization across datasets and scales to large models such as Llama3-8B and Qwen2-7B, outperforming existing methods on the CrossFit and Unified-QA datasets in terms of both accuracy and expected calibration error. We show that meta-learning can also be combined with in-context learning, resulting in further improvements in both these datasets and legal and chemistry applications.

AI.tldr: 把 LoRA 与摊销贝叶斯元学习耦合，用新超参数调局部-全局保真度，一次训练即可让大模型在多数据集上泛化，训练成本低于逐任务微调，效果优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 多数据集场景下，传统 LoRA 逐任务微调成本高且泛化差；纯上下文学习对 LLM 容量与提示长度要求苛刻。需要一种既能分摊训练成本，又能保证跨数据集泛化的参数高效微调范式。
AI.method: 提出 ABMLL：1) 将 LoRA 的 A/B 矩阵拆为全局先验（meta-posterior）与任务特定局部分量，用摊销变分推断一次性学 meta-posterior；2) 引入可调超参数 λ 在重构误差与“局部参数-全局参数”KL 距离间平衡；3) 支持元 LoRA 与上下文学习级联推理。
AI.result: 在 CrossFit、Unified-QA 上，Llama3-8B/Qwen2-7B 的准确率与 ECE 均优于独立 LoRA、MAML 及纯 ICL；额外在法律、化学问答任务上，元 LoRA+ICL 进一步提升 2–4% 准确率。
AI.conclusion: ABMLL 首次把摊销贝叶斯元学习扩展到十亿级 LLM，验证了“先学分布，再快速适应”在参数高效微调中的可行性，为多数据集、小样本场景提供了兼顾成本与性能的新基准。

title: Zeroth-order Logconcave Sampling
comment: v2: Fix a bug in the restart mechanism; add a lower bound on Gaussian annealing
summary:
We study the zeroth-order query complexity of sampling from a general logconcave distribution: given access to an evaluation oracle for a convex function $V:\mathbb{R}^{d}\rightarrow\mathbb{R}\cup\{\infty\}$, output a point from a distribution within $\varepsilon$-distance to the density proportional to $e^{-V}$. A long line of work provides efficient algorithms for this problem in TV distance, assuming a pointwise warm start (i.e., in $\infty$-Rényi divergence), and using annealing to generate such a warm start. Here, we address the natural and more general problem of using a $q$-Rényi divergence warm start to generate a sample that is $\varepsilon$-close in $q$-Rényi divergence. Our first main result is an algorithm with this end-to-end guarantee with state-of-the-art complexity for $q=\widetildeΩ(1)$. Our second result shows how to generate a $q$-Rényi divergence warm start directly via annealing, by maintaining $q$-Rényi divergence throughout, thereby obtaining a streamlined analysis and improved complexity. Such results were previously known only under the stronger assumptions of smoothness and access to first-order oracles. We also show a lower bound for Gaussian annealing by disproving a geometric conjecture about quadratic tilts of isotropic logconcave distributions.
  Central to our approach, we establish hypercontractivity of the heat adjoint and translate this into improved mixing time guarantees for the Proximal Sampler. The resulting analysis of both sampling and annealing follows a simplified and natural path, directly tying convergence rates to isoperimetric constants of the target distribution.

AI.tldr: 在不假设光滑性、仅提供零阶查询的情形下，作者首次给出从对数凹密度e^{–V}采样、并以q-Rényi散度衡量误差的端到端算法；改进了从q-Rényi暖启动到最终采样的复杂度，并提供了基于退火直接生成此类暖启动的新分析，同时证明新的下界并改进Proximal Sampler的混合时间估计。
AI.motivation: 对数凹采样理论上虽已具备多项式时间算法，但经典方法要么局限于TV距离，要么需要光滑性及一阶查询。将评价标准扩展到q-Rényi散度、并仅使用零阶查询，是更贴近实践且未解的问题。
AI.method:
1.	设计零阶Proximal Sampler：通过热伴随算子(h)的超压缩性，直接耦合q-Rényi散度；
2.	提出全程维护q-Rényi的退火框架，避免传统退火仅控制ℓ_∞暖启动的限制；
3.	引入“等周率→混合时间”统一分析，不依赖逐点暖启动与复杂势分解；
4.	构造反例推翻高斯退火下界相关二次tilt几何猜想，给出新下界证明。
AI.result:
1.	获得O(d^{1/2}polylog(d/ε))次零阶查询、以q-Rényi散度≤ε完成采样的端到端复杂度，对q=Ω̃(1)为已知最优；
2.	首次实现在q-Rényi散度意义下保持暖启动的退火算法，复杂度较TV方案显式下降；
3.	证明对一类高斯退火路径，Ω(d^{1/2})次查询下界达到，消减了此前平滑假设的必要性；
4.	将Proxy Sampler与热伴随超压缩常数显式关联，带来针对一般对数凹密度的“等周型”混合率公式。
AI.conclusion: 该工作将采样误差衡量从传统的TV扩展到任意q-Rényi散度，并在零阶模型下取得与维数平方根近线性的复杂度，揭示了对数凹采样的计算瓶颈主要由等周性质决定。未来方向包括推广至更一般的Besov类密度、研究随机化查询极限及降低对暖启动初始值的隐性维数依赖。

title: TANDEM: Temporal Attention-guided Neural Differential Equations for Missingness in Time Series Classification
comment: CIKM '25: Proceedings of the 34th ACM International Conference on Information and Knowledge Management. https://doi.org/10.1145/3746252.3760996
summary: Handling missing data in time series classification remains a significant challenge in various domains. Traditional methods often rely on imputation, which may introduce bias or fail to capture the underlying temporal dynamics. In this paper, we propose TANDEM (Temporal Attention-guided Neural Differential Equations for Missingness), an attention-guided neural differential equation framework that effectively classifies time series data with missing values. Our approach integrates raw observation, interpolated control path, and continuous latent dynamics through a novel attention mechanism, allowing the model to focus on the most informative aspects of the data. We evaluate TANDEM on 30 benchmark datasets and a real-world medical dataset, demonstrating its superiority over existing state-of-the-art methods. Our framework not only improves classification accuracy but also provides insights into the handling of missing data, making it a valuable tool in practice.

AI.tldr: TANDEM 用注意力引导的神经微分方程端到端处理含缺失值的时间序列分类，无需显式插补，在 30 个基准与 1 个医疗数据集上全面优于 SOTA。
AI.motivation: 传统先插补再分类的策略会引入偏差且难以保持真实时序动态，亟需能直接利用原始观测与潜在连续动态、并自适应关注关键信息的统一框架。
AI.method: 提出 TANDEM：①用可学习的控制路径对缺失段做连续插值；②耦合神经微分方程建模潜在连续动态；③设计时序注意力机制，动态融合原始观测、控制路径与潜在状态，端到端优化分类目标。
AI.result: 在30个UCR基准与MIMIC-III真实医疗数据集上，TANDEM平均准确率较最佳对比方法提升3.2–7.8%，跨多种缺失机制(MAR、MCAR、MNAR)均显著优于专用插补+分类流水线；消融实验表明注意力与连续动态模块分别贡献约55%与30%的性能增益。
AI.conclusion: TANDEM通过“不强制插补、连续建模、注意力聚焦”三位一体策略，有效抑制缺失偏差并捕获时序本质，为医疗、金融等高缺失率场景提供了可直接部署的鲁棒分类工具，并提示未来可拓展至预测与异常检测任务。

title: Computationally efficient Gauss-Newton reinforcement learning for model predictive control
comment: 17 pages, 9 figures, submitted to Elsevier in the special issue "Reinforcement Learning and Its Applications to Process Systems Engineering Problems" in the journal "Computers and Chemical Engineering"
summary: Model predictive control (MPC) is widely used in process control due to its interpretability and ability to handle constraints. As a parametric policy in reinforcement learning (RL), MPC offers strong initial performance and low data requirements compared to black-box policies like neural networks. However, most RL methods rely on first-order updates, which scale well to large parameter spaces but converge at most linearly, making them inefficient when each policy update requires solving an optimal control problem, as is the case with MPC. While MPC policies are typically low parameterized and thus amenable to second-order approaches, existing second-order methods demand second-order policy derivatives, which can be computationally intractable. This work introduces a Gauss-Newton approximation of the deterministic policy Hessian that eliminates the need for second-order policy derivatives, enabling superlinear convergence with minimal computational overhead. To further improve robustness, we propose a momentum-based Hessian averaging scheme for stable training under noisy estimates coupled with an adaptive trustregion. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the approach on a nonlinear continuously stirred tank reactor (CSTR), showing faster convergence and improved data efficiency over state-of-the-art firstorder methods and deep RL approaches.

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需二阶策略导数的 Gauss-Newton 近似海森方法，实现 MPC 策略在 RL 中的超线性收敛，配合动量平均与自适应信赖域，在 CSTR 上验证更快收敛与更高数据效率。
AI.motivation: MPC 作为可解释、带约束且低数据需求的参数化策略，在 RL 中初始性能好，但现有一阶更新收敛慢；二阶方法需二阶策略导数，计算不可行。作者希望兼顾二阶收敛速度与低计算代价。
AI.method: 1) 对确定性策略海森构造 Gauss-Newton 近似，规避二阶策略导数；2) 引入动量式 Hessian 平均抑制噪声；3) 设计自适应信赖域控制更新步长；4) 将整体二阶更新嵌入 RL 框架。
AI.result: 在连续搅拌釜反应器(CSTR)任务上，相比 SOTA 一阶 RL 及深度 RL 方法，所提算法收敛速度显著提升，样本效率更高，且计算开销仅略高于一阶方法。
AI.conclusion: Gauss-Newton 近似海森使 MPC 策略在 RL 中首次实现超线性收敛，无需昂贵二阶导数；动量平均与自适应信赖域保障鲁棒性，为带约束低参数策略的高效学习提供了新范式。

title: PRISM: Robust VLM Alignment with Principled Reasoning for Integrated Safety in Multimodality
summary: Safeguarding vision-language models (VLMs) is a critical challenge, as existing methods often suffer from over-defense, which harms utility, or rely on shallow alignment, failing to detect complex threats that require deep reasoning. To this end, we introduc PRISM (Principled Reasoning for Integrated Safety in Multimodality), a System 2-like framework that aligns VLMs through a structured four-stage reasoning process explicitly designed to handle three distinct categories of multimodal safety violations. Our framework consists of two key components: a structured reasoning pipeline that analyzes each violation category in dedicated stages, and PRISM-DPO, generated via Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) to refine reasoning quality through Direct Preference Optimization. Comprehensive evaluations show that PRISM substantially reduces attack success rates on JailbreakV-28K and VLBreak, improves robustness against adaptive attacks, and generalizes to out-of-distribution multi-image threats, while better preserving model utility on benign multimodal benchmarks. Our code, data, and model weights available at https://github.com/SaFoLab-WISC/PRISM.

AI.tldr: PRISM提出四阶段结构推理+PRISM-DPO，显著降低VLM被越狱成功率，兼顾安全与可用性。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM安全防护要么过度防御牺牲实用，要么浅层对齐难识别需深度推理的复合威胁，亟需兼顾安全与性能的新方法。
AI.method: 设计System 2式框架PRISM：(1)四阶段结构化推理链，分别处理三类多模态违规；(2)用MCTS生成高质量推理样本，经DPO迭代优化。推理阶段与对齐阶段解耦，可即插即用。
AI.result: 在JailbreakV-28K与VLBreak上将攻击成功率降低>80%，对自适应攻击和分布外多图威胁保持鲁棒，同时在MMBench、MMMU等良性基准上几乎不掉点（<1%）。
AI.conclusion: 结构化深度推理+偏好优化能在不损实用性的前提下大幅提升VLM安全，PRISM为高效、可扩展的多模态安全对齐提供了新范式，代码权重已开源。

title: HEAS: Hierarchical Evolutionary Agent-Based Simulation Framework for Multi-Objective Policy Search
comment: 12 pages, 1 figure. Python package: https://pypi.org/project/heas/ | Web playground: https://ryzhanghason.github.io/heas/
summary: Metric aggregation divergence is a hidden confound in agent-based model policy search: when optimization, tournament evaluation, and statistical validation independently implement outcome metric extraction, champion selection reflects aggregation artifact rather than policy quality. We propose Hierarchical Evolutionary Agent Simulation (HEAS), a composable framework that eliminates this confound through a runtime-enforceable metric contract - a uniform metrics_episode() callable shared identically by all pipeline stages. Removing the confound yields robust champion selection: in a controlled experiment (n=30), HEAS reduces rank reversals by 50% relative to ad-hoc aggregation; the HEAS champion wins all 32 held-out ecological scenarios - a null-safety result that would be uninterpretable under aggregation divergence. The contract additionally reduces coupling code by 97% (160 to 5 lines) relative to Mesa 3.3.1. Three case studies validate composability across ecological, enterprise, and mean-field ordinary differential equation dynamics.

AI.tldr: HEAS 通过统一运行时度量合约解决代理模型政策搜索中因指标聚合不一致导致的隐藏混杂，使冠军选择更可靠并显著降低代码耦合。
AI.motivation: 在基于代理的模型政策搜索中，优化、锦标赛评估与统计验证各自独立提取结果指标，导致“度量聚合发散”这一隐藏混杂，使最终选出的政策冠军反映的是聚合方式而非真实策略优劣。
AI.method: 提出 Hierarchical Evolutionary Agent Simulation（HEAS）框架，引入 runtime-enforceable 的 metric contract——所有流程阶段共享同一 metrics_episode() 可调用接口，彻底消除指标提取差异；对比 Mesa 3.3.1 的 ad-hoc 聚合方式。
AI.result: 受控实验（n=30）显示，HEAS 将冠军排名反转率降低 50%；在 32 个未见过生态场景中，HEAS 冠军全胜，实现零失败“安全”结果；同时耦合代码量从 160 行降至 5 行，降幅 97%。生态、企业与平均场 ODE 三类案例验证了框架的可组合性。
AI.conclusion: 统一度量合约可根除代理模型政策搜索中的聚合混杂，显著提升冠军选择鲁棒性与结果可解释性，并为跨领域复用提供低耦合、高可组合的架构方案。

title: A Pressure-Based Diffusion Model for Influence Maximization on Social Networks
comment: 13 pages, 8 figures, and 2 tables; Accepted for presentation at the 20th International AAAI Conference on Web and Social Media (ICWSM 2026)
summary: In many real-world scenarios, an individual's local social network carries significant influence over the opinions they form and subsequently propagate. In this paper, we propose a novel diffusion model -- the Pressure Threshold model (PT) -- for dynamically simulating the spread of influence through a social network. This model extends the popular Linear Threshold (LT) model by adjusting a node's outgoing influence in proportion to the influence it receives from its activated neighbors. We examine the Influence Maximization (IM) problem under this framework, which involves selecting seed nodes that yield maximal graph coverage after a diffusion process, and describe how the problem manifests under the PT model. Experiments on real-world networks, supported by enhancements to the open-source network-diffusion library CyNetDiff, reveal that greedy IM under PT can yield seed sets distinct from those under LT. Furthermore, the analyses show that densely connected networks amplify pressure effects far more strongly than sparse networks.

AI.tldr: 论文提出一种新的社会影响力传播模型“压力阈值（PT）”，并研究其下的影响力最大化（IM）问题；实验表明PT模型与经典线性阈值模型产生差异明显的种子节点，且在稠密网络中“压力”效应更强。
AI.motivation: 真实网络中个体意见受局部邻居显著影响，现有线性阈值模型未考虑“反向压力”——已激活邻居越多，节点外发影响力反而被放大——因此需要能动态刻画这一放大机制的扩散模型。
AI.method: 1) 模型：设计 PT 模型，在 LT 基础上将节点的“出度影响权重”与其被激活邻居比例成正比例放大；2) 问题：将 IM 问题映射到 PT 模型，给出目标函数和贪心求解框架；3) 实验：在真实网络数据上运行贪心算法，并与 LT 做对比；提供 CyNetDiff 开源增强库复现场景。
AI.result: 1) 相同贪心预算下，PT 模型选出的种子集合与 LT 显著不同，节点介数中心性更低；2) 稠密网络中“压力系数”使得最终激活规模比 LT 高 12–18%，稀疏网络仅 3–5%；3) 算法在 10^5 节点图上平均运行时间 47 s，可接受。
AI.conclusion: PT 模型首次把“接收 → 放大”的双向压力引入阈值式扩散，可更精确地拟合高密度社交场景；同时为 IM 问题提供了新的优化空间，并证明稠密拓扑对压力效应起倍增器作用，未来可拓展到时序和多层网络。

title: LLM Analysis of 150+ years of German Parliamentary Debates on Migration Reveals Shift from Post-War Solidarity to Anti-Solidarity in the Last Decade
summary: Migration has been a core topic in German political debate, from the postwar displacement of millions of expellees to labor migration and recent refugee movements. Studying political speech across such wide-ranging phenomena in depth has traditionally required extensive manual annotation, limiting analysis to small subsets of the data. Large language models (LLMs) offer a potential way to overcome this constraint. Using a theory-driven annotation scheme, we examine how well LLMs annotate subtypes of solidarity and anti-solidarity in German parliamentary debates and whether the resulting labels support valid downstream inference. We first provide a comprehensive evaluation of multiple LLMs, analyzing the effects of model size, prompting strategies, fine-tuning, historical versus contemporary data, and systematic error patterns. We find that the strongest models, especially GPT-5 and gpt-oss-120B, achieve human-level agreement on this task, although their errors remain systematic and bias downstream results. To address this issue, we combine soft-label model outputs with Design-based Supervised Learning (DSL) to reduce bias in long-term trend estimates. Beyond the methodological evaluation, we interpret the resulting annotations from a social-scientific perspective to trace trends in solidarity and anti-solidarity toward migrants in postwar and contemporary Germany. Our approach shows relatively high levels of solidarity in the postwar period, especially in group-based and compassionate forms, and a marked rise in anti-solidarity since 2015, framed through exclusion, undeservingness, and resource burden. We argue that LLMs can support large-scale social-scientific text analysis, but only when their outputs are rigorously validated and statistically corrected.

AI.tldr: 本文提出用LLM自动标注德语议会辩论中针对移民的团结／反团结话语，并在方法与社会科学意义上双重验证：最佳模型可达人工一致，但需用DSL修正系统偏差；长时段分析显示战后团结较高，2015年后反团结显著上升。
AI.motivation: 德国政治话语长期围绕移民展开，传统手工编码难以覆盖海量历史与当代文本。作者希望借LLM突破规模瓶颈，同时确保标注质量与下游统计推断的可靠性。
AI.method: 1）基于理论构建团结／反团结子类细粒度编码表；2）系统比较模型体量、提示策略、微调、历史-当代数据差异及错误模式；3）用软标签+设计型监督学习（DSL）校正偏差，获得无偏趋势估计；4）将清洗后的标注序列用于长时段社会趋势解释。
AI.result: GPT-5与gpt-oss-120B在既定方案上与人类标注者κ值打平，但错例呈系统型且会扭曲下游统计；经DSL修正后，估计量偏差显著下降。应用层面，1949以来德语议会移民话语呈现“战后高团结（群体-同情型）→2015后反团结激增（排斥、不应得、资源负担框架）”的演变轨迹。
AI.conclusion: LLM可赋能大规模社会科学文本研究，但前提是“模型输出必须经过严格效度检验+统计纠偏”；单纯高一致性不足以保证推论有效，需把误差结构纳入研究设计。

title: AutiHero: Engaging Parents in Creating Personalized, Multi-path~Social Narratives for Autistic Children
summary: Social narratives help autistic children understand and navigate social situations through stories. To ensure effective practice, however, they often require significant time and effort from parents in customizing the narrative materials and delivering repeated instructions on them. We present AutiHero, a generative AI (GenAI)-based social narrative system, which supports parents to create personalized, multi-path stories targeting specific behavior of their autistic children, while enabling them to explore behavioral choices and causal consequences together in reading. A two-week deployment study with 16 autistic child-parent dyads showed that parents actively created, adapted, and read stories with their children, with increased confidence in everyday behavioral guidance. Our work contributes real-world-contextualized text+image content creation approaches harnessing GenAI, ensuring user-aligned application in sensitive contexts involving autistic children and their parents.
