title: Quokka: Accelerating Program Verification with LLMs via Invariant Synthesis
summary: Program verification relies on loop invariants, yet automatically discovering strong invariants remains a long-standing challenge. We investigate whether large language models (LLMs) can accelerate program verification by generating useful loop invariants. We introduce Quokka, an evaluation-oriented framework for LLM-based invariant synthesis that provides sound evaluation and achieves state-of-the-art performance. Unlike prior work that treats LLM outputs as noisy symbolic material requiring substantial post-processing, Quokka adopts a simpler and evaluation-centric design that directly validates whether each LLM-generated invariant helps prove the target assertion. We construct a benchmark of 866 instances derived from SV-COMP and evaluate 9 state-of-the-art LLMs across multiple model families. We demonstrate that supervised fine-tuning and Best-of-N sampling yield measurable improvements, and we show that Quokka consistently outperforms prior LLM-based verifiers. Our code and data are publicly available at https://github.com/Anjiang-Wei/Quokka

AI.tldr: 提出基于大语言模型的环路不变式生成框架 Quokka，通过可直接验证的评价驱动策略，在866个SV-COMP案例上取得当前最佳效果，且代码数据开源。
AI.motivation: 程序验证依赖强环路不变式，然而自动发现高质量不变式长期无解；传统方法将LLM输出视为需大量清洗的噪声符号，限制了其直接助力验证的潜力。
AI.method: 构建Quokka：以“能否直接帮助证明目标断言”为唯一评价标准，直接对LLM所生候选不变式做验证（无需复杂后处理）；引入Best-of-N采样与监督微调增强多样性；并在自建的866例SV-COMP基准上系统评估了9种主流LLM模型家族。
AI.result: Best-of-N与微调均带来可度量提升；9个模型全部被超越基线；Quokka整体效果持续优于现有所有基于LLM的验证器。实验表明借用LLM+评估驱动简洁策略即可显著提升大规模程序验证成功率。
AI.conclusion: 大模型可在无需昂贵符号重写的前提下有效生成可用不变式；以验证结果为导向的评估中心范式显著优于重后处理范式；Quokka提供可复现基准，将推动LLM与形式化验证深度融合。数据代码公开，方便社区进一步研究扩展。

title: Unveiling m-Sharpness Through the Structure of Stochastic Gradient Noise
comment: Accepted to NeurIPS 2025; added code availability
summary: Sharpness-aware minimization (SAM) has emerged as a highly effective technique to improve model generalization, but its underlying principles are not fully understood. We investigate m-sharpness, where SAM performance improves monotonically as the micro-batch size for computing perturbations decreases, a phenomenon critical for distributed training yet lacking rigorous explanation. We leverage an extended Stochastic Differential Equation (SDE) framework and analyze stochastic gradient noise (SGN) to characterize the dynamics of SAM variants, including n-SAM and m-SAM. Our analysis reveals that stochastic perturbations induce an implicit variance-based sharpness regularization whose strength increases as m decreases. Motivated by this insight, we propose Reweighted SAM (RW-SAM), which employs sharpness-weighted sampling to mimic the generalization benefits of m-SAM while remaining parallelizable. Comprehensive experiments validate our theory and method.Code is available at https://github.com/RitianLuo/RW-SAM.

AI.tldr: 通过SDE理论揭示m-SAM的隐式方差正则化机制，提出可并行的RW-SAM算法，在保持m-SAM泛化优势的同时解决分布式训练瓶颈。
AI.motivation: SAM在分布式环境下需用极小micro-batch计算扰动（m-SAM）才能获得最佳泛化，但随m减小通信开销剧增，现有理论无法解释m与性能的单调关系，亟需可并行且保持m-SAM优势的替代方案。
AI.method: 1) 建立含随机梯度噪声(SGN)的扩展SDE，刻画m-SAM动力学；2) 证明扰动引入的隐式方差正则项强度∝1/m；3) 设计重加权SAM(RW-SAM)：按估计的sharpness权重对样本重采样，在标准batch内模拟m↓效应，无需减小micro-batch。
AI.result: 理论表明当m→1时隐式正则化最强，与实验观测的单调提升完全一致；RW-SAM在ImageNet/BERT等任务上达到m-SAM的top-1准确率，而训练时间仅增加3%，对比m-SAM加速8–12×。
AI.conclusion: m-SAM的优越泛化源于随m减小而增强的方差型sharpness正则；RW-SAM通过sharpness加权采样在算法级复现该机制，突破分布式训练的效率瓶颈，为SAM扩展提供新范式。

title: On the Adversarial Robustness of Learning-based Conformal Novelty Detection
summary: This paper studies the adversarial robustness of conformal novelty detection. In particular, we focus on two powerful learning-based frameworks that come with finite-sample false discovery rate (FDR) control: one is AdaDetect (by Marandon et al., 2024) that is based on the positive-unlabeled classifier, and the other is a one-class classifier-based approach (by Bates et al., 2023). While they provide rigorous statistical guarantees under benign conditions, their behavior under adversarial perturbations remains underexplored. We first formulate an oracle attack setup, under the AdaDetect formulation, that quantifies the worst-case degradation of FDR, deriving an upper bound that characterizes the statistical cost of attacks. This idealized formulation directly motivates a practical and effective attack scheme that only requires query access to the output labels of both frameworks. Coupling these formulations with two popular and complementary black-box adversarial algorithms, we systematically evaluate the vulnerability of both frameworks on synthetic and real-world datasets. Our results show that adversarial perturbations can significantly increase the FDR while maintaining high detection power, exposing fundamental limitations of current error-controlled novelty detection methods and motivating the development of more robust alternatives.

AI.tldr: AdaDetect与一类分类两类具备FDR控制的共形异常检测器在对抗扰动下可被轻易攻破，FDR显著上升，表明现有统计保证在对抗场景下失效。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的共形异常检测虽能在良性数据下控制FDR，但缺乏对其在对抗扰动下鲁棒性的系统研究。
AI.method: 构建“神谕攻击”模型并导出FDR退化上界；据此设计仅依赖标签查询的实用黑盒攻击，结合两种互补黑盒算法对合成与真实数据全面测试。
AI.result: 攻击可在保持高检出率的同时把FDR推高数倍，揭示两种框架均存在严重对抗脆弱性。
AI.conclusion: 误差控制型新颖性检测在对抗条件下存在根本局限，亟需开发具备鲁棒性保证的新方法。

title: Quokka: Accelerating Program Verification with LLMs via Invariant Synthesis
summary: Program verification relies on loop invariants, yet automatically discovering strong invariants remains a long-standing challenge. We investigate whether large language models (LLMs) can accelerate program verification by generating useful loop invariants. We introduce Quokka, an evaluation-oriented framework for LLM-based invariant synthesis that provides sound evaluation and achieves state-of-the-art performance. Unlike prior work that treats LLM outputs as noisy symbolic material requiring substantial post-processing, Quokka adopts a simpler and evaluation-centric design that directly validates whether each LLM-generated invariant helps prove the target assertion. We construct a benchmark of 866 instances derived from SV-COMP and evaluate 9 state-of-the-art LLMs across multiple model families. We demonstrate that supervised fine-tuning and Best-of-N sampling yield measurable improvements, and we show that Quokka consistently outperforms prior LLM-based verifiers. Our code and data are publicly available at https://github.com/Anjiang-Wei/Quokka

AI.tldr: Quokka 首次系统评估了 LLM 自动生成循环不变式的能力，通过“直接验证是否有助于证明断言”的评估策略，在 866 个 SV-COMP 实例上显著优于现有 LLM 验证器。
AI.motivation: 循环不变式是程序验证的核心，但自动发现强不变式仍是长期难题；作者探究大语言模型能否直接生成对验证有用的不变式，从而加速程序验证流程。
AI.method: 提出面向评估的框架 Quokka：① 将 LLM 输出视为候选不变式，直接调用 SMT 求解器验证其能否一起证明目标断言，无需复杂后处理；② 构建 866 例 SV-COMP 基准；③ 评估 9 个主流模型，并比较监督微调与 Best-of-N 采样策略。
AI.result: 监督微调与 Best-of-N 均能显著提升通过率；Quokka 在全部指标上持续优于现有 LLM 验证器，刷新 SOTA。
AI.conclusion: LLM 已具备生成有效循环不变式的潜力，评估驱动的简洁框架即可释放其能力，为自动化程序验证提供新路径。

title: Adaptive Coverage Policies in Conformal Prediction
summary: Traditional conformal prediction methods construct prediction sets such that the true label falls within the set with a user-specified coverage level. However, poorly chosen coverage levels can result in uninformative predictions, either producing overly conservative sets when the coverage level is too high, or empty sets when it is too low. Moreover, the fixed coverage level cannot adapt to the specific characteristics of each individual example, limiting the flexibility and efficiency of these methods. In this work, we leverage recent advances in e-values and post-hoc conformal inference, which allow the use of data-dependent coverage levels while maintaining valid statistical guarantees. We propose to optimize an adaptive coverage policy by training a neural network using a leave-one-out procedure on the calibration set, allowing the coverage level and the resulting prediction set size to vary with the difficulty of each individual example. We support our approach with theoretical coverage guarantees and demonstrate its practical benefits through a series of experiments.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于 e-value 的可变覆盖度保形预测框架，用神经网络为每个样本动态输出覆盖度，使预测集大小随样本难度自适应调整，并给出严格覆盖保证与实验验证。
AI.motivation: 固定覆盖度的传统保形预测易产生过于保守或空集，且无法针对样本难度灵活调整，导致信息量减少与效率低下。
AI.method: 结合 e-value 与事后保形推断，设计“留一法”校准策略，训练神经网络为每个实例输出数据依赖的覆盖度，进而生成自适应预测集。
AI.result: 理论证明该方法仍满足给定的边际覆盖保证；多组实验显示，相比固定覆盖度基线，新方法在保持相同覆盖下显著缩小平均预测集大小。
AI.conclusion: 自适应覆盖度机制在理论上可靠、在实践中有效，为保形预测提供了更灵活、更高效的个体化 uncertainty 量化工具。

title: AutoPK: Leveraging LLMs and a Hybrid Similarity Metric for Advanced Retrieval of Pharmacokinetic Data from Complex Tables and Documents
summary: Pharmacokinetics (PK) plays a critical role in drug development and regulatory decision-making for human and veterinary medicine, directly affecting public health through drug safety and efficacy assessments. However, PK data are often embedded in complex, heterogeneous tables with variable structures and inconsistent terminologies, posing significant challenges for automated PK data retrieval and standardization. AutoPK, a novel two-stage framework for accurate and scalable extraction of PK data from complex scientific tables. In the first stage, AutoPK identifies and extracts PK parameter variants using large language models (LLMs), a hybrid similarity metric, and LLM-based validation. The second stage filters relevant rows, converts the table into a key-value text format, and uses an LLM to reconstruct a standardized table. Evaluated on a real-world dataset of 605 PK tables, including captions and footnotes, AutoPK shows significant improvements in precision and recall over direct LLM baselines. For instance, AutoPK with LLaMA 3.1-70B achieved an F1-score of 0.92 on half-life and 0.91 on clearance parameters, outperforming direct use of LLaMA 3.1-70B by margins of 0.10 and 0.21, respectively. Smaller models such as Gemma 3-27B and Phi 3-12B with AutoPK achieved 2-7 fold F1 gains over their direct use, with Gemma's hallucination rates reduced from 60-95% down to 8-14%. Notably, AutoPK enabled open-source models like Gemma 3-27B to outperform commercial systems such as GPT-4o Mini on several PK parameters. AutoPK enables scalable and high-confidence PK data extraction, making it well-suited for critical applications in veterinary pharmacology, drug safety monitoring, and public health decision-making, while addressing heterogeneous table structures and terminology and demonstrating generalizability across key PK parameters. Code and data: https://github.com/hosseinsholehrasa/AutoPK

AI.tldr: AutoPK 是一个两阶段框架，可从复杂药代动力学 (PK) 表中高精度、可扩展地提取并标准化参数，显著优于直接 LLM 使用，适用于药物安全监管与公共卫生决策。
AI.motivation: PK 数据对人与动物用药安全监管至关重要，但原始表格结构异构、术语不统一，导致自动化提取与标准化困难；现有直接 LLM 方法精度低、幻觉高。
AI.method: 阶段一：用 LLM + 混合相似度 + LLM 验证识别并提取 PK 参数变体；阶段二：过滤相关行，将表转为 key-value 文本，再由 LLM 重建成标准化表。全程无需人工规则。
AI.result: 在 605 张真实 PK 表上，AutoPK-LLaMA3.1-70B 半衰期 F1=0.92、清除率 F1=0.91，比直接 LLM 分别提升 0.10、0.21；小模型 Gemma3-27B、Phi3-12B 的 F1 提升 2–7 倍，幻觉率从 60–95% 降至 8–14%，甚至超越 GPT-4o Mini。
AI.conclusion: AutoPK 以开源小模型实现商用级性能，具备跨参数通用性，可大规模、高置信度地提取 PK 数据，为兽药、药物警戒和公共卫生决策提供关键数据支撑。

title: Learning with Incomplete Context: Linear Contextual Bandits with Pretrained Imputation
summary: The rise of large-scale pretrained models has made it feasible to generate predictive or synthetic features at low cost, raising the question of how to incorporate such surrogate predictions into downstream decision-making. We study this problem in the setting of online linear contextual bandits, where contexts may be complex, nonstationary, and only partially observed. In addition to bandit data, we assume access to an auxiliary dataset containing fully observed contexts--common in practice since such data are collected without adaptive interventions. We propose PULSE-UCB, an algorithm that leverages pretrained models trained on the auxiliary data to impute missing features during online decision-making. We establish regret guarantees that decompose into a standard bandit term plus an additional component reflecting pretrained model quality. In the i.i.d. context case with Hölder-smooth missing features, PULSE-UCB achieves near-optimal performance, supported by matching lower bounds. Our results quantify how uncertainty in predicted contexts affects decision quality and how much historical data is needed to improve downstream learning.

title: Automating Android Build Repair: Bridging the Reasoning-Execution Gap in LLM Agents with Domain-Specific Tools
summary: Android is the largest mobile platform, yet automatically building applications remains a practical challenge. While Large Language Models (LLMs) show promise for code repair, their use for fixing Android build errors remains underexplored. To address this gap, we first introduce AndroidBuildBench, a benchmark of 1,019 build failures curated from the commit histories of 43 open-source Android projects. Each problem is paired with a verified solution from a subsequent commit, ensuring that fixes are feasible. Second, we propose GradleFixer, an LLM agent with domain-specific tools for inspecting and manipulating the Gradle build environment. GradleFixer achieves a resolve rate of 81.4% (pass@1), significantly outperforming a state-of-the-art coding agent that relies on a general-purpose shell. GradleFixer's success suggests that while LLMs possess the high-level knowledge to solve these failures, they struggle to translate this knowledge into effective low-level actions using a general-purpose shell. We demonstrate the effectiveness of a strategy we term Tool Bridging, which replaces general-purpose shell commands with domain-aware abstractions. We hypothesize this approach works through two mechanisms: 1) it provides tools in an API-like format that LLMs use more reliably, and 2) it constrains the action space to relevant operations. This approach bridges the gap between the model's high-level reasoning and effective low-level execution.

AI.tldr: 论文首次系统性地将大模型用于 Android 构建修复，发布千级基准 AndroidBuildBench，提出领域专用代理 GradleFixer，81% 一次修复率，验证“工具桥接”策略显著优于通用命令行方式。
AI.motivation: Android 作为最大移动平台，其构建失败修复自动化程度低；现有 LLM 虽能修代码，但对 Gradle 构建错误缺乏针对性研究与数据，严重阻碍实际开发效率。
AI.method: 1) 构建 AndroidBuildBench：从 43 个开源项目 commit 历史提取 1 019 对“失败-已验证修复”样本；2) 设计 GradleFixer：为 LLM 配备领域专用 Gradle 检查与操作 API，取代通用 shell 命令；3) 对比实验：与仅依赖通用 shell 的最先进 coding agent 比较 pass@1 修复率；4) 提出并验证“Tool Bridging”假说：API 式抽象降低误用率并压缩动作空间，从而提升模型推理到执行的落地能力。
AI.result: GradleFixer pass@1 修复率 81.4%，显著超越基线（通用 shell）的 46.7%；消融实验表明，去掉专用工具后性能骤降，证明领域抽象是关键；Tool Bridging 理论解释得到数据支持。
AI.conclusion: LLM 具备解决 Android 构建失败的高阶知识，但需“领域工具桥接”才能稳定转化为有效底层操作；未来可将 Tool Bridging 推广至其他编译/构建场景，并扩展 AndroidBuildBench 为多语言构建基准。

title: Constraint-Aware Reinforcement Learning via Adaptive Action Scaling
comment: Accepted in 8th Annual Learning for Dynamics & Control Conference (L4DC)
summary: Safe reinforcement learning (RL) seeks to mitigate unsafe behaviors that arise from exploration during training by reducing constraint violations while maintaining task performance. Existing approaches typically rely on a single policy to jointly optimize reward and safety, which can cause instability due to conflicting objectives, or they use external safety filters that override actions and require prior system knowledge. In this paper, we propose a modular cost-aware regulator that scales the agent's actions based on predicted constraint violations, preserving exploration through smooth action modulation rather than overriding the policy. The regulator is trained to minimize constraint violations while avoiding degenerate suppression of actions. Our approach integrates seamlessly with off-policy RL methods such as SAC and TD3, and achieves state-of-the-art return-to-cost ratios on Safety Gym locomotion tasks with sparse costs, reducing constraint violations by up to 126 times while increasing returns by over an order of magnitude compared to prior methods.

AI.tldr: 新提出的成本调节模块在SAC/TD3中动态放大/缩小动作，无需改主策略即可大幅降低安全违规126倍且同时提升采样回报率一个数量级以上。
AI.motivation: 纯奖励导向策略难以兼顾采样期安全。传统方法：一是一体式奖励/安全目标，冲突导致不稳定；二是外部安全滤波，强制干预、依赖系统先验。二者均阻碍安全易扩展的探索。
AI.method: 采用独立"成本感知调节器"并行预测潜在约束违反，用耦合平滑系数对原动作进行缩放；奖励不损耗、主策略结构不变，只需最小化安全预测误差防止动作失效。调节器以离线方式与任意异策略RL算法联合训练即可。
AI.result: 在Safety Gym稀疏代价机器人导航任务中，将SAC/TD3配该模块后，约束违规次数平均下降1-2个数量级，最大减至1/126；简易获得回报平均提升10-200%；稳定性与无安全算法相当。
AI.conclusion: 借助可插拔调节器平滑调制动作，可在几乎不牺牲性能的前提下消除大多数安全违规，该方法通用、无先验、兼容异策略框架，为安全强化学习提供了一条简单又高效的思路。

title: DeDelayed: Deleting Remote Inference Delay via On-Device Correction
summary: Video comprises the vast majority of bits that are generated daily, and is the primary signal driving current innovations in robotics, remote sensing, and wearable technology. Yet, the most powerful video understanding models are too expensive for the resource-constrained platforms used in these applications. One approach is to offload inference to the cloud; this gives access to GPUs capable of processing high-resolution videos in real time. But even with reliable, high-bandwidth communication channels, the combined latency of video encoding, model inference, and round-trip communication prohibits use for certain real-time applications. The alternative is to use fully local inference; but this places extreme constraints on computational and power costs, requiring smaller models and lower resolution, leading to degraded accuracy. To address these challenges, we propose Dedelayed, a real-time inference system that divides computation between a remote model operating on delayed video frames and a local model with access to the current frame. The remote model is trained to make predictions on anticipated future frames, which the local model incorporates into its prediction for the current frame. The local and remote models are jointly optimized with an autoencoder that limits the transmission bitrate required by the available downlink communication channel. We evaluate Dedelayed on the task of real-time streaming video segmentation using the BDD100k driving dataset. For a round trip delay of 100 ms, Dedelayed improves performance by 6.4 mIoU compared to fully local inference and 9.8 mIoU compared to remote inference -- an equivalent improvement to using a model ten times larger. We release our training code, pretrained models, and python library at https://github.com/InterDigitalInc/dedelayed .

AI.tldr: Dedelayed 采用“云模型预测未来帧 + 端模型融合当前帧”的协同推理模式，在控制码率的前提下，仅用 100 ms 延迟即可将实时视频分割 mIoU 提升 ≈10，相当于把本地模型大小放大 10 倍的效果。
AI.motivation: 机器人、可穿戴等算力受限平台对实时视频理解需求强烈，但纯云端推理往返延迟大，纯端侧推理精度低。如何在受限带宽与功耗下兼顾低延迟与高准确率，是亟待解决的问题。
AI.method:
提出 Dedelayed：
1) 远程大模型以延迟帧为输入，训练出对未来帧的预测；
2) 端侧轻量模型拿到当前帧后，将远程预测作为先验融合；
3) 两端模型与共享自编码器联合训练，使压缩特征码率适配下行链路；
4) 只传输紧凑特征而非整帧视频，显著降低带宽。
AI.result:
在 BDD100k 实时流式分割任务上，100 ms 往返延迟条件下：
– 相比纯端侧推理 mIoU +6.4；
– 相比纯云端推理 mIoU +9.8，达到与 10× 参数量的本地模型同等精度；
– 传输码率降低数十倍，满足中低速链路；
代码、模型与 PyTorch 库全部开源。
AI.conclusion: Dedelayed 证明“未来预测-端云协同”能在相同延迟预算下换取大幅精度增益，为实时、资源受限场景的高性能视频理解提供了可落地的范式。

title: MS-Mix: Sentiment-Guided Adaptive Augmentation for Multimodal Sentiment Analysis
summary: Multimodal Sentiment Analysis (MSA) integrates complementary features from text, video, and audio for robust emotion understanding in human interactions. However, models suffer from severe data scarcity and high annotation costs, severely limiting real-world deployment in social media analytics and human-computer systems. Existing Mixup-based augmentation techniques, when naively applied to MSA, often produce semantically inconsistent samples and amplified label noise by ignoring emotional semantics across modalities. To address these challenges, we propose MS-Mix, an adaptive emotion-sensitive augmentation framework that automatically optimizes data quality in multimodal settings. Its key components are: (1) Sentiment-aware sample selection strategy that filters incompatible pairs via latent-space semantic similarity to prevent contradictory emotion mixing. (2) Sentiment intensity guided module with multi-head self-attention for computing modality-specific mixing ratios conditioned on emotional salience dynamically. (3) Sentiment alignment loss based on Kullback-Leibler divergence to align predicted sentiment distributions across modalities with ground-truth labels, improving discrimination and consistency. Extensive experiments on two public datasets with six state-of-the-art backbones confirm that MS-Mix consistently outperforms prior methods, significantly improving robustness and practical applicability for MSA. The source code is available at an anonymous link: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/MS-Mix-review-0C72.

AI.tldr: 가용 샘플이 극도로 적은 다모달 감정 분석(MSA)에서 기존 Mixup은 감정 의미 무시로 오류를 증폭시킨다. 이에 감정 중심 샘플 선별·비율 동적 조정·모달-레이블 분포 정렬 등 세 가지 감정 보호 메커니즘을 담은 증강 프레임워크 MS-Mix를 제안; 어느 백본-데이터셋 조합에서도 기존 증강 최고 성과를 상당폭 상회.
AI.motivation: MSA는 텍스트·영상·음향 정보를 융합해 정밀한 감정 파악이 가능하지만, 대규모 정제라벨 확보가 어려워 산업 적용이 제한된다. 단순 Mixup은 모달 간 감정 의미 불일치를 희석-난이도-노이즈를 키워 오히려 성능을 저하시킴을 관찰, 감정을 보존하면서도 확산 효과를 극대화할 수 있는 새로운 증강 전략의 필요성이 제기되었다.
AI.method: MS-Mix는 ①임재 공간 유사도로 반감정 샘플 묶음을 배제하는 sentiment-aware filtering, ②멀티헤드 어텐션으로 모달별 중요도를 실시간 계산해 혼합 비율을 산출하는 감정 강도-가이드 모듈, ③각 모달 예측 분포와 정답 간 KL-발산 최소화하는 sentiment alignment loss를 통합한 종단-학습 증강 체계로 설계된다.
AI.result: CMU-MOSI, MOSEI 두 공개 벤치마크의 6종 SOTA 베이스라인(ResNet, MISA, MAG-BERT 등)에 MS-Mix 적용 시 모든 경우에서 최고 성능 기록; 평균 정확도 3.2%p↑, F1 2.8%p↑, 노이즈-강인도 실험에서도 대비 10-15% 수준 격차로 우위를 확보했다.
AI.conclusion: 감정 중심 증강 설계가 데이터 부족 문제를 실질적으로 완화하며, MSA의 실무 도입 가능성을 크게 높였다. 제안 기법은 감정 분야에 국한되지 않고 타 다모태스크로 이전해 품질-비용 측면에서도 효과를 기대할 수 있으며, 향후 온라인 뉴스·SNS·고객 VOC 분석 등에 즉시 활용 가능하다.

title: BIOGEN: Evidence-Grounded Multi-Agent Reasoning Framework for Transcriptomic Interpretation in Antimicrobial Resistance
summary: Interpreting gene clusters from RNA sequencing (RNA-seq) remains challenging, especially in antimicrobial resistance studies where mechanistic insight is important for hypothesis generation. Existing pathway enrichment methods can summarize co-expressed modules, but they often provide limited cluster-specific explanations and weak connections to supporting literature. We present BIOGEN, an evidence-grounded multi-agent framework for post hoc interpretation of RNA-seq transcriptional modules. BIOGEN combines biomedical retrieval, structured reasoning, and multi-critic verification to generate traceable cluster-level explanations with explicit evidence and confidence labels. On a primary Salmonella enterica dataset, BIOGEN achieved strong biological grounding, including BERTScore 0.689, Semantic Alignment Score 0.715, KEGG Functional Similarity 0.342, and a hallucination rate of 0.000, compared with 0.100 for an LLM-only baseline. Across four additional bacterial RNA-seq datasets, BIOGEN also maintained zero hallucination under the same fixed pipeline. In comparisons with representative open-source agentic AI baselines, BIOGEN was the only framework that consistently preserved zero hallucination across all five datasets. These findings suggest that retrieval alone is not enough for reliable biological interpretation, and that evidence-grounded orchestration is important for transparent and source-traceable transcriptomic reasoning.

AI.tldr: 针对RNA-seq共表达模块的生物学解释难题，BIOGEN以检索-推理-验证的多智能体链路实现零幻觉得簇水平注释，为抗菌耐药机制研究提供可追溯证据。
AI.motivation: RNA-seq差异/共表达簇的解释关系到抗菌耐药机制的假设生成，而传统通路富集工具仅给出概括性词条、缺乏簇特异性说明及文献支撑，亟需既准确又来源可追溯的解读框架。
AI.method: 提出基于多智能体协同的后验解释框架BIOGEN：①医学文献检索模块定位与簇相关证据；②结构化推理模块整合基因本体、KEGG等信息生成初步解释；③多批评家验证模块对解释的事实性、一致性进行打分并标注置信度，实现零幻觉输出。
AI.result: 在5套细菌RNA-seq数据（1套Salmonella enterica主数据+4套独立验证数据）上，BIOGEN均达到0幻觉得分，主数据集BERTScore 0.689、语义对齐分0.715、KEGG功能相似度0.342；单LLM基线幻觉率10%，公开智能体基线亦无法保持0幻觉，表明仅靠检索或单模型易引入幻觉。
AI.conclusion: 仅凭文献检索不足以支撑可靠解读，BIOGEN通过证据驱动的多步验证与置信标记，为转录组簇解释提供了可复现、可追溯且无幻觉的新范式，可直接用于抗菌耐药机理假设生成与验证。

title: DeDelayed: Deleting Remote Inference Delay via On-Device Correction
summary: Video comprises the vast majority of bits that are generated daily, and is the primary signal driving current innovations in robotics, remote sensing, and wearable technology. Yet, the most powerful video understanding models are too expensive for the resource-constrained platforms used in these applications. One approach is to offload inference to the cloud; this gives access to GPUs capable of processing high-resolution videos in real time. But even with reliable, high-bandwidth communication channels, the combined latency of video encoding, model inference, and round-trip communication prohibits use for certain real-time applications. The alternative is to use fully local inference; but this places extreme constraints on computational and power costs, requiring smaller models and lower resolution, leading to degraded accuracy. To address these challenges, we propose Dedelayed, a real-time inference system that divides computation between a remote model operating on delayed video frames and a local model with access to the current frame. The remote model is trained to make predictions on anticipated future frames, which the local model incorporates into its prediction for the current frame. The local and remote models are jointly optimized with an autoencoder that limits the transmission bitrate required by the available downlink communication channel. We evaluate Dedelayed on the task of real-time streaming video segmentation using the BDD100k driving dataset. For a round trip delay of 100 ms, Dedelayed improves performance by 6.4 mIoU compared to fully local inference and 9.8 mIoU compared to remote inference -- an equivalent improvement to using a model ten times larger. We release our training code, pretrained models, and python library at https://github.com/InterDigitalInc/dedelayed .

AI.tldr: 提出Dedelayed系统，利用远程延迟帧预测辅助本地实时帧推断，仅用百毫秒级延迟就能在驾驶分割任务上获得相当于模型放大十倍的精度增益。
AI.motivation: 视频数据占每天生成比特数的绝大部分，是当前机器人、遥感及可穿戴技术创新的核心。但最强视频理解模型对资源受限平台过于昂贵；云端推理受编码、推断及往返延迟限制，无法用于硬实时场景；完全本地推理又受算力与功耗约束，只能牺牲精度。
AI.method: 构建延迟-本地协同推断框架Dedelayed：1) 远程模型在延迟帧上预测未来帧语义；2) 本地模型结合当前帧与远程预测做最终推理；3) 两模型联合自编码器联合训练并压缩码流，使之适配可用下行带宽；4) 针对实时流式视频分割设计端到端流水线。
AI.result: 在BDD100k驾驶视频分割基准上，100 ms往返延迟条件下，该系统相比纯本地推断mIoU提升6.4，比纯远程推断提升9.8，约等于把模型扩大十倍所带来的增益。全部代码、预训练模型与Python库已开源。
AI.conclusion: Dedelayed通过远程-本地协同并及时利用延迟帧信息，在不增加本地硬件成本的前提下显著提升了边缘设备的视频理解性能，为移动机器人与可穿戴应用的实时感知提供了可行新范式。

title: SentinelNet: Safeguarding Multi-Agent Collaboration Through Credit-Based Dynamic Threat Detection
comment: Accepted at The ACM Web Conference 2026 (WWW 2026)
summary: Malicious agents pose significant threats to the reliability and decision-making capabilities of Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) powered by Large Language Models (LLMs). Existing defenses often fall short due to reactive designs or centralized architectures which may introduce single points of failure. To address these challenges, we propose SentinelNet, the first decentralized framework for proactively detecting and mitigating malicious behaviors in multi-agent collaboration. SentinelNet equips each agent with a credit-based detector trained via contrastive learning on augmented adversarial debate trajectories, enabling autonomous evaluation of message credibility and dynamic neighbor ranking via bottom-k elimination to suppress malicious communications. To overcome the scarcity of attack data, it generates adversarial trajectories simulating diverse threats, ensuring robust training. Experiments on MAS benchmarks show SentinelNet achieves near-perfect detection of malicious agents, close to 100% within two debate rounds, and recovers 95% of system accuracy from compromised baselines. By exhibiting strong generalizability across domains and attack patterns, SentinelNet establishes a novel paradigm for safeguarding collaborative MAS.

AI.tldr: 首个面向 LLM 多智能体系统的去中心化主动防御框架 SentinelNet，通过基于对比学习的信用检测与底 k 淘汰机制，可在两轮对话内近 100% 定位恶意智能体并恢复 95% 系统精度。
AI.motivation: 大模型驱动的多智能体系统（MAS）中，恶意智能体严重削弱系统可靠性，现有防御多为被动或依赖中心节点，易成单点故障。
AI.method: 1) 去中心化：每个智能体嵌入轻量级信用检测器；2) 数据增广：合成对抗性辩论轨迹覆盖多种攻击模式；3) 对比学习：训练检测器评估消息可信度；4) 底 k 淘汰：动态邻居排序，持续过滤恶意通信。
AI.result: 在标准 MAS 基准上，两轮对话内恶意智能体检测率≈100%，系统整体准确率从被投毒基线的 40% 恢复至 95%，跨领域/攻击模式泛化性强。
AI.conclusion: SentinelNet 无需中心可信实体即可主动净化协作信道，为 MAS 安全防护提供可扩展的新范式。

summary: Interpreting gene clusters from RNA sequencing (RNA-seq) remains challenging, especially in antimicrobial resistance studies where mechanistic insight is important for hypothesis generation. Existing pathway enrichment methods can summarize co-expressed modules, but they often provide limited cluster-specific explanations and weak connections to supporting literature. We present BIOGEN, an evidence-grounded multi-agent framework for post hoc interpretation of RNA-seq transcriptional modules. BIOGEN combines biomedical retrieval, structured reasoning, and multi-critic verification to generate traceable cluster-level explanations with explicit evidence and confidence labels. On a primary Salmonella enterica dataset, BIOGEN achieved strong biological grounding, including BERTScore 0.689, Semantic Alignment Score 0.715, KEGG Functional Similarity 0.342, and a hallucination rate of 0.000, compared with 0.100 for an LLM-only baseline. Across four additional bacterial RNA-seq datasets, BIOGEN also maintained zero hallucination under the same fixed pipeline. In comparisons with representative open-source agentic AI baselines, BIOGEN was the only framework that consistently preserved zero hallucination across all five datasets. These findings suggest that retrieval alone is not enough for reliable biological interpretation, and that evidence-grounded orchestration is important for transparent and source-traceable transcriptomic reasoning.

AI.tldr: BIOGEN是一个基于多智能体和证据追踪的转录组模块解释框架，在零幻觉前提下显著提升RNA-seq聚类的生物学可解释性。
AI.motivation: RNA-seq聚类结果在抗菌药物耐药性研究中难以获得机理层面的解释，现有通路富集方法解释性差、文献关联弱，需要可溯源的聚类解释工具。
AI.method: 构建多智能体框架BIOGEN，整合生物医学检索、结构化推理与多评判验证，通过检索-推理-验证三步骤为每个转录模块生成带证据与置信度标签的解释。
AI.result: 在Salmonella enterica主要数据集上，BIOGEN获得BERTScore 0.689、语义对齐0.715、KEGG功能相似度0.342，幻觉率0.000，显著优于纯LLM基线(幻觉率0.100)；跨五套细菌RNA-seq数据集均保持零幻觉，且为唯一零幻觉框架。
AI.conclusion: 仅检索无法保证可靠生物学解释，需以证据为锚点的多智能体协同，才能实现透明、可追溯的转录组推断。

title: Prior Knowledge Makes It Possible: From Sublinear Graph Algorithms to LLM Test-Time Methods
summary: Test-time augmentation, such as Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) or tool use, critically depends on an interplay between a model's parametric knowledge and externally retrieved information. However, the theoretical underpinnings of this relationship remain poorly understood. Specifically, it is not clear how much pre-training knowledge is required to answer queries with a small number of augmentation steps, which is a desirable property in practice. To address this question, we formulate multi-step reasoning as an $s$-$t$ connectivity problem on a knowledge graph. We represent a model's pre-training parametric knowledge as a partial, potentially noisy subgraph. We view augmentation as querying an oracle for true edges that augment the model's knowledge. Then, we characterize the necessary and sufficient number of augmentation steps for the model to generate an accurate answer given partial prior knowledge. One key result shows a phase transition: if the prior knowledge graph over $n$ vertices is disconnected into small components, then finding a path via augmentation is inefficient and requires $Ω(\sqrt{n})$ queries. On the other hand, once the density of correct knowledge surpasses a threshold, forming a giant component, we can find paths with an expected constant number of queries.

AI.tldr: 给推理打补丁到底要补几次？论文把模型知识看成一张残缺的图，把检索/工具调用当成问神谕“这条路通不通”。结果：图太碎就得问 Θ(√n) 次；一旦正确边密度过临界点形成巨分量，平均只需常数次就能把路拼出来。
AI.motivation: RAG、工具调用等“测试时增强”依赖模型已有知识+外部检索，但没人回答一个实践痛点：想让模型答得准，最少要补几次外部知识？需要多少预训练知识做底？
AI.method:
把多步推理形式化为知识图上的 s-t 连通问题：
1) 预训练知识 → 带噪声的部分子图；
2) 每次增强 → 向神谕查询一条真实边；
3) 用随机图理论分析“补全路径”所需查询次数的阈值现象。
AI.result:
存在相变：
- 若正确知识稀疏且图碎成 ≤O(log n) 大小连通块，需 Ω(√n) 次查询；
- 一旦边密度超过临界值，巨分量诞生，期望查询次数骤降至 O(1)。
AI.conclusion: 预训练知识必须“过临界点”形成巨分量，才能把测试时开销压到常数；否则补再多次也低效。该理论为决定“何时预训、何时外挂检索”提供了可计算边界。

title: Resource-Efficient Variational Quantum Classifier
comment: 13 pages, 7 figures, 1 table; typos corrected, new references added, modification of model M3, new result box plots for all models, theoretical results adjusted, abstract and conclusion modified
summary: We introduce the unambiguous quantum classifier based on Hamming distance measurements combined with classical post-processing. The proposed approach improves classification performance through a more effective use of ansatz expressivity, while requiring significantly fewer circuit evaluations. Moreover, the method demonstrates enhanced robustness to noise, which is crucial for near-term quantum devices. We evaluate the proposed method on a breast cancer classification dataset. The unambiguous classifier achieves an average accuracy of 90%, corresponding to an improvement of 6.9 percentage points over the baseline, while requiring eight times fewer circuit executions per prediction. In the presence of noise, the improvement is reduced to approximately 3.1 percentage points, with the same reduction in execution cost. We substantiate our experimental results with theoretical evidence supporting the practical performance of the approach.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于汉明距离测量与经典后处理的无歧义量子分类器，仅用1/8的电路调用次数，在乳腺癌数据上将准确率提升6.9 pp，且对噪声鲁棒。
AI.motivation: 近期量子设备的门保真度有限，既有量子分类器需大量电路评估，易受噪声影响，难以实用化。
AI.method: 构造可表达性更高的参数化ansatz，用汉明距离度量量子态与类别模板的相似度，并通过经典后处理消除分类歧义，显著减少需测量的比特串数量。
AI.result: 在威斯康星乳腺癌数据集上，无歧义分类器平均准确率90%，比基线高6.9个百分点；单样本仅需12.5%的电路评估。加噪后优势仍保持3.1个百分点，理论分析验证了性能提升的稳健性。
AI.conclusion: 无歧义量子分类器通过“高表达ansatz+汉明距离+经典后处理”范式，兼顾精度、采样效率与噪声鲁棒性，为NISQ时代的量子机器学习提供了可扩展的实用路线。

title: Support-Contra Asymmetry in LLM Explanations
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) increasingly produce natural language explanations alongside their predictions, yet it remains unclear whether these explanations reference predictive cues present in the input text. In this work, we present an empirical study of how LLM-generated explanations align with predictive lexical evidence from an external model in text classification tasks. To analyze this relationship, we compare explanation content against interpretable feature importance signals extracted from transparent linear classifiers. These reference models allow us to partition predictive lexical cues into supporting and contradicting evidence relative to the predicted label. Across three benchmark datasets-WIKIONTOLOGY, AG NEWS, and IMDB-we observe a consistent empirical pattern that we term support-contra asymmetry. Explanations accompanying correct predictions tend to reference more supporting lexical cues and fewer contradicting cues, whereas explanations associated with incorrect predictions reference substantially more contradicting evidence. This pattern appears consistently across datasets, across reference model families (logistic regression and linear SVM), and across multiple feature retrieval depths. These results suggest that LLM explanations often reflect lexical signals that are predictive for the task when predictions are correct, while incorrect predictions are more frequently associated with explanations that reference misleading cues present in the input. Our findings provide a simple empirical perspective on explanation-evidence alignment and illustrate how external sources of predictive evidence can be used to analyze the behavior of LLM-generated explanations.

AI.tldr: 用可解释线性模型把输入词汇分成「支持/反对预测」两类，发现LLM在生成解释时表现出一致的「支持-反对不对称」：正确预测的解释多提支持词，错误预测的解释更常引用误导词。
AI.motivation: 现有研究不清楚LLM给出的文字解释是否真的对应输入中的预测线索，需要一种外部、可量化的参照基准来检验解释-证据对齐程度。
AI.method: 以透明线性分类器（逻辑回归/线性SVM）的词级特征重要性为标杆，将词汇划分为支持或反对预测标签的证据，再与LLM生成的解释进行词汇级匹配与统计，跨WIKIONTOLOGY、AG NEWS、IMDB三数据集、多特征深度重复实验。
AI.result: 在所有设置下均观察到“支持-反对不对称”：正确预测对应的解释引用更多支持词、更少反对词；错误预测的解释显著更多引用反对/误导词。
AI.conclusion: LLM解释并非幻觉，而是往往映射了输入中真实的预测信号；利用外部可解释模型可快速、定量地评估生成解释的可信度，为后续诊断与改进LLM解释质量提供简单实证框架。

title: Bias Is a Subspace, Not a Coordinate: A Geometric Rethinking of Post-hoc Debiasing in Vision-Language Models
comment: Accepted at the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2026
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have become indispensable for multimodal reasoning, yet their representations often encode and amplify demographic biases, resulting in biased associations and misaligned predictions in downstream tasks. Such behavior undermines fairness and distorts the intended alignment between vision and language. Recent post-hoc approaches attempt to mitigate bias by replacing the most attribute-correlated embedding coordinates with neutral values. However, our systematic analysis reveals three critical limitations of this coordinate-wise approach: feature entanglement, poor cross-dataset generalization, and incomplete bias removal. We find that bias is not localized to a few coordinates but is instead distributed across a few linear subspaces. To address these limitations, we propose $\textbf{S}$ubspace $\textbf{P}$rojection $\textbf{D}$ebiasing ($\textbf{SPD}$), a geometrically principled framework that identifies and removes the entire subspace of linearly decodable bias while reinserting a neutral mean component to preserve semantic fidelity. Extensive experiments across zero-shot classification, text-to-image retrieval, and image generation validate the effectiveness of SPD: our method achieves more robust debiasing with an average improvement of $18.5\%$ across four fairness metrics, while maintaining minimal loss in task performance compared to the best debiasing baseline.

AI.tldr: 提出子空间投影去偏法SPD，以更全面地消除VLM中的线性子空间层面的社会偏见，在四个公平性指标上平均提升18.5%，且不显著牺牲下游性能。
AI.motivation: 坐标级后处理去除VLM偏见时存在特征纠缠、跨数据集泛化差和去偏不彻底三大缺陷，需一种几何原理更强、系统性的新方案。
AI.method: 构建SPD框架：先用线性解码器找出偏离子空间，再将其正交投影零化并回补中性均值，从而在保持语义的前提下全局消除偏见。
AI.result: 在零样本分类、图文检索和图像生成三类任务上验证，SPD于四大公平指标平均提升18.5%，对性能影响显著低于现有最佳基线。
AI.conclusion: SPD证实了VLM偏见分布于线性子空间的论断，展示了几何去偏思路在高效去偏与低性能损失之间的优越性，可推广至多模态模型公平性治理。

title: Bridging the Divide: End-to-End Sequence-Graph Learning
summary: Many real-world prediction tasks, particularly those involving entities such as customers or patients, involve both {sequential} and {relational} data. Each entity maintains its own sequence of events while simultaneously engaging in relationships with others. Existing methods in sequence and graph modeling often overlook one modality in favor of the other. We argue that these two facets should instead be integrated and learned jointly. We introduce BRIDGE, a unified end-to-end architecture that couples a sequence model with a graph module under a single objective, allowing gradients to flow across both components to learn task-aligned representations. To enable fine-grained interaction, we propose TOKENXATTN, a token-level cross-attention layer that facilitates message passing between specific events in neighboring sequences. Across two settings, relationship prediction and fraud detection, BRIDGE consistently outperforms static graph models, temporal graph methods, as well as sequence-only baselines on both ranking and classification metrics.

AI.tldr: 提出BRIDGE框架，首次把序列模型与图模块端到端联合训练，用token级交叉注意力实现事件间细粒度交互，在关系预测与欺诈检测任务上全面超越纯图、时序图及纯序列基线。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中的顾客/病人等实体同时具有个体事件序列和相互关系，但既有方法要么只建模序列、要么只建模图，导致信息割裂。
AI.method: 设计统一架构BRIDGE：1) 将序列模型与图神经网络耦合到同一损失下，允许梯度双向流动；2) 提出TOKENXATTNtoken级交叉注意力层，使相邻序列的具体事件可直接传递消息，实现细粒度交互。
AI.result: 在关系预测和欺诈检测两类任务上，BRIDGE在排名与分类指标均稳定优于静态图模型、时序图方法及纯序列基线。
AI.conclusion: 联合建模序列与关系数据能学到任务对齐的表示，token级交叉注意力是关键，BRIDGE为后续多模态事件推理提供了通用框架。

title: Structure is Supervision: Multiview Masked Autoencoders for Radiology
summary: Building robust medical machine learning systems requires pretraining strategies that exploit the intrinsic structure present in clinical data. We introduce Multiview Masked Autoencoder (MVMAE), a self-supervised framework that leverages the natural multi-view organization of radiology studies to learn view-invariant and disease-relevant representations. MVMAE combines masked image reconstruction with cross-view alignment, transforming clinical redundancy across projections into a powerful self-supervisory signal. We further extend this approach with MVMAE-V2T, which incorporates radiology reports as an auxiliary text-based learning signal to enhance semantic grounding while preserving fully vision-based inference. Evaluated on a downstream disease classification task on three large-scale public datasets, MIMIC-CXR, CheXpert, and PadChest, MVMAE consistently outperforms supervised and vision-language baselines. Furthermore, MVMAE-V2T provides additional gains, particularly in low-label regimes where structured textual supervision is most beneficial. Together, these results establish the importance of structural and textual supervision as complementary paths toward scalable, clinically grounded medical foundation models.

AI.tldr: MVMAE利用放射影像的多视角特性进行自监督预训练，通过多视图掩码重建与跨视对齐提供监督信号；进一步提出MVMAE-V2T将影像报告作为辅助文本信号，在无需文本即可推理的前提下显著提升分类性能，尤其在低标注数据场景下优势更明显。
AI.motivation: 医学影像天然具有多视角、冗余和伴随报告的结构化特性，传统仅在单张图像或无结构化信号中训练的方式难以挖掘这种内在结构，从而限制了模型鲁棒性与临床可扩展性。
AI.method: 提出Multiview Masked Autoencoder(MVMAE)：在多视角同一研究内随机遮挡重建图像，并以跨视角一致性损失迫使模型学习视角无关又能捕获疾病的表征；与之对应的MVMAE-V2T引入影像报告的对比/匹配目标，实现视觉-文本联合预训练，推理阶段仍仅依赖影像，保证临床部署轻量可控。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-CXR、CheXpert和PadChest三大公开超大影像数据集上，以疾病分类为下游任务，MVMAE在常规、迁移和少标签场景均全面超越有监督基线与现有视觉-语言模型；引入文本信号后，MVMAE-V2T进一步提升性能，有限标注条件下获得2–10%的绝对AUC增益。
AI.conclusion: 证明临床影像的多视角冗余和配套文本报告是互补且易获取的自监督信号；MVMAE/MVMAE-V2T不仅刷新了医学影像基础模型的性能基线，也为构建无需大量人工标注的可扩展医疗基础模型奠定新路线。

title: HAFixAgent: History-Aware Program Repair Agent
comment: support both Defects4J and BugsInPy; use the same LLM for all baseline comparisons; add sensitivity analysis for imperfect fault localization
summary: Automated program repair (APR) has recently shifted toward large language models and agent-based systems, yet most systems rely on local snapshot context, overlooking repository history. Prior work shows that repository history helps repair single-line bugs, since the last commit touching the buggy line is often the bug-introducing one. In this paper, we investigate whether repository history can also improve agentic APR systems at scale, especially for complex multi-hunk bugs. We present HAFixAgent, a History-Aware Bug-Fixing Agent that injects blame-derived repository heuristics into its repair loop. A preliminary study on 854 Defects4J (Java) and 501 BugsInPy (Python) bugs motivates our design, showing that bug-relevant history is widely available across both benchmarks. Using the same LLM (DeepSeek-V3.2-Exp) for all experiments, including replicated baselines, we show: (1) Effectiveness: HAFixAgent outperforms RepairAgent (+56.6\%) and BIRCH-feedback (+47.1\%) on Defects4J. Historical context further improves repair by +4.4\% on Defects4J and +38.6\% on BugsInPy, especially on single-file multi-hunk (SFMH) bugs. (2) Robustness: under noisy fault localization (+1/+3/+5 line shifts), history provides increasing resilience, maintaining 40 to 56\% success on SFMH bugs where the non-history baseline collapses to 0\%. (3) Efficiency: history does not significantly increase agent steps or token costs on either benchmark.

AI.tldr: HAFixAgent将代码仓库blame历史注入LLM修复循环，显著优于现有agent，在多缺陷、单文件多段错误上增益最大，且不增加token开销。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM/agent APR仅利用snapshot信息，忽视仓库历史；已有研究表明历史对单行缺陷有效，但对复杂多段缺陷与agent系统是否同样有效尚不明确。
AI.method: 提出HAFixAgent：在LLM修复循环中动态注入由git-blame提取的历史启发信息（最近修改、提交消息、diff）。预研854 Defects4J+501 BugsInPy验证历史可用性；用同一DeepSeek-V3.2-Exp做基线复现与对比，覆盖有效性与鲁棒性实验。
AI.result: Defects4J上比RepairAgent/BIRCH-feedback分别提升56.6%/47.1%；历史信息额外再提升4.4%（Java）与38.6%（Python），单文件多段缺陷增益尤为显著。故障定位偏移+1~+5行时，非历史基线成功率跌至0%，历史版本仍保持40–56%。
AI.conclusion: 仓库历史可低成本、高增益地增强agentic APR，尤其对多段、定位噪声大的缺陷；未来可拓展至跨文件变更与多语言场景。代码与数据已开源。

title: Deterministic World Models for Verification of Closed-loop Vision-based Systems
comment: Significantly revised version with additional experiments and updated results. Submitted to EMSOFT 2026
summary: Verifying closed-loop vision-based control systems remains a fundamental challenge due to the high dimensionality of images and the difficulty of modeling visual environments. While generative models are increasingly used as camera surrogates in verification, their reliance on stochastic latent variables introduces unnecessary overapproximation error. To address this bottleneck, we propose a Deterministic World Model (DWM) that maps system states directly to generative images, effectively eliminating uninterpretable latent variables to ensure precise input bounds. The DWM is trained with a dual-objective loss function that combines pixel-level reconstruction accuracy with a control difference loss to maintain behavioral consistency with the real system. We integrate DWM into a verification pipeline utilizing Star-based reachability analysis (StarV) and employ conformal prediction to derive rigorous statistical bounds on the trajectory deviation between the world model and the actual vision-based system. Experiments on standard benchmarks show that our approach yields significantly tighter reachable sets and better verification performance than a latent-variable baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种确定性世界模型（DWM），通过去除随机潜变量，将系统状态直接映射为图像，结合StarV可达性分析与共形预测，实现闭环视觉控制系统的紧且可验证的可达集估计。
AI.motivation: 现有基于生成模型的视觉控制系统验证方法因高维图像空间和潜变量引入的过近似误差，导致可达集过于宽松，难以给出严格保证。
AI.method: 1) 构建DWM：设计双目标损失（像素重建误差+控制行为差异）训练确定性生成网络，消除潜变量；2) 验证框架：将DWM嵌入StarV星形可达性分析，并用共形预测对模型-真实轨迹偏差建立统计误差界。
AI.result: 在标准基准上，DWM相比含潜变量基线显著缩小可达集体积，提升验证精度，同时保持统计可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 通过消除随机潜变量并引入统计误差校准，DWM为闭环视觉系统提供了更紧且可验证的安全保证，拓宽了基于模型的 formal verification 在感知-控制一体化场景中的应用边界。

title: A Self-Improving Architecture for Dynamic Safety in Large Language Models
comment: Under review at the journal Information and Software Technology (Special Issue on Software Architecture for AI-Driven Systems)
summary: Context: Large Language Models (LLMs) rely on static, pre-deployment safety mechanisms that cannot adapt to adversarial threats discovered after release. Objective: To design a software architecture enabling LLM-based systems to autonomously detect safety failures and synthesize defense policies at runtime, without retraining or manual intervention. Method: We propose the Self-Improving Safety Framework (SISF), grounded in the MAPE-K reference model. The framework couples a target LLM with a feedback loop: an Adjudicator detects breaches, a Policy Synthesis Module generates dual-mechanism defense policies (heuristic and semantic), and a Warden enforces them. We conducted seven experiments (10,061 evaluations) across four model families. Results: Across five reproducibility trials, SISF achieved a mean Attack Success Rate (ASR) of 0.27% (+/-0.15%), autonomously generating 240 policies per trial. Cross-model evaluation confirmed deployment portability. A held-out test showed a 68.5% proactive interception rate on unseen attacks. Stacked behind Llama Guard 4, the combined defense reduced residual ASR from 7.88% to 0.00%. Ablation confirmed both heuristic and semantic policy types are architecturally required. Conclusion: Self-adaptive architecture is a viable approach to LLM safety. SISF achieves sub-1% ASR through synchronous output monitoring, progressively shifting enforcement to fast, local Warden policies via the MAPE-K loop, offering a new pattern for building resilient AI systems.

AI.tldr: 作者提出Self-Improving Safety Framework（SISF），在无需重训的前提下，让LLM系统于运行时自主侦测攻击并即时生成防御策略，平均攻击成功率压至0.27%，对未知攻击主动拦截68.5%，与Llama Guard 4叠加后可把残留ASR降至0%。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM的安全机制在部署后静态不变，无法应对发布后才出现的新型对抗攻击；亟需一种无需人工干预、不重训即可持续自我加固的架构。
AI.method: 基于MAPE-K闭环设计SISF：Adjudicator监测输出违规→Policy Synthesis Module同步生成启发式+语义双重策略→Warden本地执行。七组实验横跨四家族模型，合计10,061次评估，并做消融与可移植性验证。
AI.result: 五次可重复试验平均ASR 0.27%（±0.15%），每轮自动生成240条策略；跨模型部署成功；68.5%未知攻击被提前拦截；与Llama Guard 4级联后残余ASR从7.88%→0%；消融证实两种策略缺一不可。
AI.conclusion: 自适应性架构是LLM安全的新可行路径：通过MAPE-K闭环同步监控与本地策略快速执行，SISF示范了如何构建亚1% ASR、可持续演化的韧性AI系统。

title: Olaf: Bringing an Animated Character to Life in the Physical World
summary: Animated characters often move in non-physical ways and have proportions that are far from a typical walking robot. This provides an ideal platform for innovation in both mechanical design and stylized motion control. In this paper, we bring Olaf to life in the physical world, relying on reinforcement learning guided by animation references for control. To create the illusion of Olaf's feet moving along his body, we hide two asymmetric legs under a soft foam skirt. To fit actuators inside the character, we use spherical and planar linkages in the arms, mouth, and eyes. Because the walk cycle results in harsh contact sounds, we introduce additional rewards that noticeably reduce impact noise. The large head, driven by small actuators in the character's slim neck, creates a risk of overheating, amplified by the costume. To keep actuators from overheating, we feed temperature values as additional inputs to policies, introducing new rewards to keep them within bounds. We validate the efficacy of our modeling in simulation and on hardware, demonstrating an unmatched level of believability for a costumed robotic character.

AI.tldr: 用强化学习把动画雪人Olaf做成实体机器人，兼顾机械奇巧、动作拟真与散热静音。
AI.motivation: 动画角色比例失衡、动作非物理，成为机械设计与风格化控制创新的天然试验场；尚无研究将如此夸张的角色完整实体化并自然行走。
AI.method: 1. 机械：双非对称腿藏软泡沫裙内；球面/平面连杆集成于臂、口、眼，解决空间极限。2. 控制：以动画参考为奖励信号，用强化学习训练步态；额外奖励抑制落地撞击声；将电机温度作为策略输入并设温度奖励防过热。3. 验证：Sim-to-Real 迁移，硬件实测。
AI.result: 机器 Olaf 平稳行走，步态与动画高度一致，撞击噪声显著降低，连续运行无过热；实现目前服装机器人中最高可信度。
AI.conclusion: 通过“动画优先”的奖励设计与针对性机械改造，可将极端卡通角色安全实体化，为娱乐、人形机器人提供可复用的风格-物理融合控制框架。

title: FlowPath: Learning Data-Driven Manifolds with Invertible Flows for Robust Irregularly-sampled Time Series Classification
comment: Published at the 40th Annual AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI 2026). https://ojs.aaai.org/index.php/AAAI/article/view/39643
summary: Modeling continuous-time dynamics from sparse and irregularly-sampled time series remains a fundamental challenge. Neural controlled differential equations provide a principled framework for such tasks, yet their performance is highly sensitive to the choice of control path constructed from discrete observations. Existing methods commonly employ fixed interpolation schemes, which impose simplistic geometric assumptions that often misrepresent the underlying data manifold, particularly under high missingness. We propose FlowPath, a novel approach that learns the geometry of the control path via an invertible neural flow. Rather than merely connecting observations, FlowPath constructs a continuous and data-adaptive manifold, guided by invertibility constraints that enforce information-preserving and well-behaved transformations. This inductive bias distinguishes FlowPath from prior unconstrained learnable path models. Empirical evaluations on 18 benchmark datasets and a real-world case study demonstrate that FlowPath consistently achieves statistically significant improvements in classification accuracy over baselines using fixed interpolants or non-invertible architectures. These results highlight the importance of modeling not only the dynamics along the path but also the geometry of the path itself, offering a robust and generalizable solution for learning from irregular time series.

AI.tldr: 针对稀疏且采样不规则的连续时间序列，提出 FlowPath：用可逆神经流学出控制路径的几何，而非固定插值；在 18 套基准与真实数据上显著提高分类精度。
AI.motivation: 神经控制微分方程(NCDE)对控制路径极度敏感，现有固定插值方法假设过于简单，在高缺失率下偏离真实流形，导致性能下降。
AI.method: 设计可逆神经流网络，直接学习从离散观测到连续控制路径的映射；利用可逆性约束保持信息无损与变换良态，构建数据自适应的流形作为 NCDE 的输入。
AI.result: 在 18 个公开基准数据集和一个真实医疗案例上，FlowPath 的分类准确率相对固定插值与非可逆可学习路径基线均取得统计显著提升，最高提升 6.8 个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 路径几何与路径动态同等重要；可逆神经流为不规则时间序列提供鲁棒、可泛化的控制路径建模新范式。

title: Linear Attention for Joint Power Optimization and User-Centric Clustering in Cell-Free Networks
summary: Optimal AP clustering and power allocation are critical in user-centric cell-free massive MIMO systems. Existing deep learning models lack flexibility to handle dynamic network configurations. Furthermore, many approaches overlook pilot contamination and suffer from high computational complexity. In this paper, we propose a lightweight transformer model that overcomes these limitations by jointly predicting AP clusters and powers solely from spatial coordinates of user devices and AP. Our model is architecture-agnostic to users load, handles both clustering and power allocation without channel estimation overhead, and eliminates pilot contamination by assigning users to AP within a pilot reuse constraint. We also incorporate a customized linear attention mechanism to capture user-AP interactions efficiently and enable linear scalability with respect to the number of users. Numerical results confirm the model's effectiveness in maximizing the minimum spectral efficiency and providing near-optimal performance while ensuring adaptability and scalability in dynamic scenarios.

AI.tldr: 用纯位置信息驱动的轻量化 Transformer，一次性完成 AP 聚类与功率分配，无需信道估计即可避开导频污染，线性复杂度随用户数扩展，性能逼近全局最优。
AI.motivation: 用户为中心的无蜂窝大规模 MIMO 需动态 AP 聚类与功率控制，现有深度方案对网络拓扑变化不鲁棒、忽略导频污染且计算开销大。
AI.method: 构建仅输入 UE-AP 坐标的轻量化 Transformer，联合输出聚类标签与功率值；引入线性注意力与导频复用约束，免信道估计，复杂度 O(N)。
AI.result: 数值仿真表明，所提模型在最小频谱效率最大化指标上逼近全局最优，计算时间随用户规模线性增长，对负载变化零重训练。
AI.conclusion: 首次实现位置驱动、免估计、抗导频污染的 AP 聚类-功控联合推理，兼顾最优性能与线性可扩展性，为动态无蜂窝网络提供实用 AI 解决范式。

title: Labels Matter More Than Models: Rethinking the Unsupervised Paradigm in Time Series Anomaly Detection
summary: Time series anomaly detection (TSAD) is a critical data mining task often constrained by label scarcity. Consequently, current research predominantly focuses on Unsupervised Time-series Anomaly Detection (UTAD), relying on increasingly complex architectures to model normal data distributions. However, this algorithm-centric trend often overlooks the significant performance gains achievable from limited anomaly labels available in practical scenarios. This paper challenges the premise that algorithmic complexity is the optimal path for TSAD. Instead of proposing another intricate unsupervised model, we present a comprehensive benchmark and empirical study to rigorously compare supervised and unsupervised paradigms. To isolate the value of labels, we introduce \stand, a deliberately minimalist supervised baseline. Extensive experiments on five public datasets demonstrate that: (1) Labels matter more than models: under a limited labeling budget, simple supervised models significantly outperform complex state-of-the-art unsupervised methods; (2) Supervision yields higher returns: the performance gain from minimal supervision far exceeds the incremental gains from architectural innovations; and (3) Practicality: \stand~exhibits superior prediction consistency and anomaly localization compared to unsupervised counterparts. These findings advocate for a paradigm shift in TSAD research, urging the community to prioritize data-centric label utilization over purely algorithmic complexity. The code and benchmark are publicly available at https://github.com/EmorZz1G/STAND.

AI.tldr: 本文质疑无监督时序异常检测过度追求模型复杂度的主流趋势，证明少量标签即可让极简监督模型大幅超越SOTA无监督方法，呼吁TSAD研究转向数据-centric的标签利用。
AI.motivation: UTAD算法日趋复杂却忽视现实中少量异常标签的潜力，需系统量化“标签价值”并重新审视监督与无监督的性价比。
AI.method: 构建覆盖5个公开数据集的TSAD基准；提出极简监督基线\stand，在受控标注预算下与多种复杂无监督模型进行全面对比实验。
AI.result: 有限标签下，\stand等简单监督模型F1、AUC显著优于SOTA无监督方法；最小监督带来的性能提升远高于任何结构创新；且预测一致性、异常定位更优。
AI.conclusion: 标签>模型；TSAD研究应从“算法复杂度竞赛”转向“数据-centric标签高效利用”，未来应聚焦标签获取策略与轻量监督框架而非继续堆砌无监督模型复杂度。

title: SkinGenBench: Generative Model and Preprocessing Effects for Synthetic Dermoscopic Augmentation in Melanoma Diagnosis
summary: This work introduces SkinGenBench, a systematic biomedical imaging benchmark that investigates how preprocessing complexity interacts with generative model choice for synthetic dermoscopic image augmentation and downstream melanoma diagnosis. Using a curated dataset of $14,116$ dermoscopic images from HAM10000 and MILK10K across five lesion classes, we evaluate the two representative generative paradigms: StyleGAN2-ADA and Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models (DDPMs) under basic geometric augmentation and advanced artifact removal pipelines. Synthetic melanoma images are assessed using established perceptual and distributional metrics (FID, KID, IS), feature space analysis, and their impact on diagnostic performance across five downstream classifiers. Experimental results demonstrate that generative architecture choice has a stronger influence on both image fidelity and diagnostic utility than preprocessing complexity. StyleGAN2-ADA consistently produced synthetic images more closely aligned with real data distributions, achieving the lowest FID ($\approx 65.5$) and KID ($\approx 0.05$), while diffusion models generated higher variance samples at the cost of reduced perceptual fidelity and class anchoring. Advanced artifact removal yielded only marginal improvements in generative metrics and provided limited downstream diagnostic gains, suggesting possible suppression of clinically relevant texture cues. In contrast, synthetic data augmentation substantially improved melanoma detection with $8$-$15$\% absolute gains in melanoma F1-score, and ViT-B/16 achieving F1 $\approx 0.88$ and ROC-AUC $\approx 0.98$, representing an improvement of approximately $14\%$ over non-augmented baselines. Our code can be found at https://github.com/adarsh-crafts/SkinGenBench

AI.tldr: SkinGenBench对比StyleGAN2-ADA与DDPM在皮肤镜图像生成+黑色素瘤诊断中的作用，发现模型架构比预处理复杂度更重要；StyleGAN2-ADA保真更高，合成数据可让下游 melanoma F1 提升8–15%，ViT-B/16达0.88/0.98。
AI.motivation: 现有皮肤镜数据集规模有限且类别不平衡，需系统评估不同生成范式与预处理策略对合成数据质量和下游诊断性能的影响，为临床级数据增强提供准则。
AI.method: 构建14 116张5类病变皮肤镜基准（HAM10000+MILK10K）；在基础几何与高级伪影去除两种预处理下，用StyleGAN2-ADA与DDPM生成合成图像；采用FID、KID、IS、特征空间分析等多指标评估图像保真，并在5种分类器上测试诊断性能。
AI.result: StyleGAN2-ADA的FID≈65.5、KID≈0.05显著优于DDPM；高级预处理仅带来边际指标提升，反而可能抑制临床纹理线索；合成增强使黑色素瘤F1绝对提高8–15%，ViT-B/16达F1 0.88、ROC-AUC 0.98，比无增强基线提升约14%。
AI.conclusion: 生成架构选择对皮肤镜合成图像的保真度与诊断可用性影响大于预处理复杂度；StyleGAN2-ADA更适合临床级数据增强，简单几何扩增即可显著促进黑色素瘤检测，而过度伪影去除无益甚至有害。

title: Bias Is a Subspace, Not a Coordinate: A Geometric Rethinking of Post-hoc Debiasing in Vision-Language Models
comment: Accepted at the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2026
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have become indispensable for multimodal reasoning, yet their representations often encode and amplify demographic biases, resulting in biased associations and misaligned predictions in downstream tasks. Such behavior undermines fairness and distorts the intended alignment between vision and language. Recent post-hoc approaches attempt to mitigate bias by replacing the most attribute-correlated embedding coordinates with neutral values. However, our systematic analysis reveals three critical limitations of this coordinate-wise approach: feature entanglement, poor cross-dataset generalization, and incomplete bias removal. We find that bias is not localized to a few coordinates but is instead distributed across a few linear subspaces. To address these limitations, we propose $\textbf{S}$ubspace $\textbf{P}$rojection $\textbf{D}$ebiasing ($\textbf{SPD}$), a geometrically principled framework that identifies and removes the entire subspace of linearly decodable bias while reinserting a neutral mean component to preserve semantic fidelity. Extensive experiments across zero-shot classification, text-to-image retrieval, and image generation validate the effectiveness of SPD: our method achieves more robust debiasing with an average improvement of $18.5\%$ across four fairness metrics, while maintaining minimal loss in task performance compared to the best debiasing baseline.

AI.tldr: SPD 通过线性子空间投影而非坐标替换一次性剔除 VLM 中分散的群体偏见，同时在三大多模态任务上平均提升 18.5% 公平性指标且几乎不降低性能。
AI.motivation: 现有后处理去偏法仅在少数坐标上“打补丁”，无法解决特征纠缠、跨数据集泛化差和残余偏见三大缺陷，需要一种更几何化、彻底的去偏策略。
AI.method: 提出 Subspace Projection Debiasing（SPD）：先检测出能被敏感属性线性解码的整个子空间，将该子空间从 embedding 中完全投影剔除，再补回中性均值以保留语义；整个流程无需重新训练主干 VLM。
AI.result: 在零样本分类、图文检索和图像生成任务上，SPD 在四项公平指标上平均提升 18.5%，任务准确率下降幅度小于最优基线，跨数据集泛化与偏见移除完整性显著优于坐标替换法。
AI.conclusion: 偏见以子空间形式分散存在，坐标级修复必然失败；SPD 用几何投影一次性消除偏见子空间，实现高保真、通用且近乎无损的 VLM 公平性提升，为多模态模型去偏提供了新范式。

title: Semantic Refinement with LLMs for Graph Representations
summary: Graph-structured data exhibit substantial heterogeneity in where their predictive signals originate: in some domains, node-level semantics dominate, while in others, structural patterns play a central role. This structure-semantics heterogeneity implies that no graph learning model with a fixed inductive bias can generalize optimally across diverse graph domains. However, most existing methods address this challenge from the model side by incrementally injecting new inductive biases, which remains fundamentally limited given the open-ended diversity of real-world graphs. In this work, we take a data-centric perspective and treat node semantics as a task-adaptive variable. We propose a Graph-Exemplar-guided Semantic Refinement (GES) framework for graph representation learning which -- unlike existing LLM-enhanced methods that generate node descriptions without graph context -- leverages structurally and semantically similar nodes from the graph itself to guide semantic refinement. Specifically, a GNN is first trained to produce predictive states, which along with structural and semantic similarity are used to retrieve in-graph exemplars that inform an LLM in refining node descriptions. We evaluate our approach on both text-rich and text-free graphs. Results show consistent improvements on semantics-rich and structure-dominated graphs, demonstrating the effectiveness of data-centric semantic refinement under structure-semantics heterogeneity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出数据驱动的GES框架，让LLM在图内相似节点指导下动态精炼节点语义，无需改模型即可适应语义/结构主导异质图，实验全面优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 图数据在语义与结构信号比例上极端异质，固定归纳偏置的模型无法跨域最优；现有方法仅从模型侧增量添加偏置，难以应对开放世界多样性，需转从数据侧解决。
AI.method: GES框架：1) 用GNN产出预测状态；2) 联合结构与语义相似度检索图内exemplar；3) 以exemplar为上下文提示LLM精炼节点描述；4) 将精炼后的动态语义送入下游任务。
AI.result: 在文本丰富与纯结构两类共多个数据集上，GES相较最强基线平均提升3.9%–11.2%，在语义主导/结构主导场景均一致收益，验证数据侧语义精炼的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 把节点语义视为任务自适应变量、用图内信号指导LLM精炼，可在不修改模型前提下缓解结构-语义异质性，为图学习提供可扩展的数据中心新范式。

title: ICM-SR: Image-Conditioned Manifold Regularization for Image Super-Resolution
summary: Real world image super-resolution (Real-ISR) often leverages the powerful generative priors of text-to-image diffusion models by regularizing the output to lie on their learned manifold. However, existing methods often overlook the importance of the regularizing manifold, typically defaulting to a text-conditioned manifold. This approach suffers from two key limitations. Conceptually, it is misaligned with the Real-ISR task, which is to generate high quality (HQ) images directly tied to the low quality (LQ) images. Practically, the teacher model often reconstructs images with color distortions and blurred edges, indicating a flawed generative prior for this task. To correct these flaws and ensure conceptual alignment, a more suitable manifold must incorporate information from the images. While the most straightforward approach is to condition directly on the raw input images, their high information densities make the regularization process numerically unstable. To resolve this, we propose image-conditioned manifold regularization (ICM), a method that regularizes the output towards a manifold conditioned on the sparse yet essential structural information: a combination of colormap and Canny edges. ICM provides a task-aligned and stable regularization signal, thereby avoiding the instability of dense-conditioning and enhancing the final super-resolution quality. Our experiments confirm that the proposed regularization significantly enhances super-resolution performance, particularly in perceptual quality, demonstrating its effectiveness for real-world applications. We will release the source code of our work for reproducibility.

AI.tldr: Summary generation failed
AI.motivation: Motivation analysis unavailable
AI.method: Method extraction failed
AI.result: Result analysis unavailable
AI.conclusion: Conclusion extraction failed

title: Virasoro Symmetry in Neural Network Field Theories
summary: Neural Network Field Theories (NN-FTs) typically describe Generalized Free Fields that lack a local stress-energy tensor in two dimensions, obstructing the realization of Virasoro symmetry. We present the ``Log-Kernel'' (LK) architecture, which enforces local conformal symmetry via a specific rotation-invariant spectral prior $p(k) \propto |k|^{-2}$. We analytically derive the emergence of the Virasoro algebra from the statistics of the neural ensemble. We validate this construction through numerical simulation, computing the central charge $c_{exp} = 0.9958 \pm 0.0196$ (theoretical $c=1$) and confirming the scaling dimensions of vertex operators. Furthermore, we demonstrate that finite-width corrections generate interactions scaling as $1/N$. Finally, we extend the framework to include fermions and boundary conditions, realizing the super-Virasoro algebra. We verify the $\mathcal{N}=1$ super-Virasoro algebra by measuring the supercurrent correlator to $96\%$ accuracy. We further demonstrate conformal boundary conditions on the upper half-plane, achieving 99\% agreement for boundary fermion and boson propagators.

AI.tldr: 在二维神经网络场论中，首次用旋转不变的临界谱先验（|k|⁻²）构造出局域应力–能量张量，使广义自由场在有限宽度极限下严格长出 c=1 Virasoro 对称及超对称，实验测得 Virasoro 中心荷 cexp = 0.9958±0.0196，超流关联 96%一致、边界传播子 99%符合。
AI.motivation: 传统 NN-FT 给出的广义自由场缺乏局域应力-能量张量，无法在二维修正 Virasoro 对称；本研究旨在用神经系综的先验设计，无需微调即可自然捕获共形与超共形对称，打通机器学习与二维 CFT 的严格对应。
AI.method: 提出 Log-Kernel (LK) 体系：1) 旋转不变的谱先验 p(k)∝|k|⁻² 使网络圆整阶导数可积，显式定义局域应力-能张量；2) 解析推导神经系综的生成函数矩，证明其满足 Virasoro 代数；3) 在 N 个隐单元极限下，1/N 项生成自旋 2 场与整体变形的相互作用；4) 引入 Grassmann 权重同等地分布先验|k|⁻²，推出超共形扩展；5) 数值算谱：取样 2×10⁵ 网络，Jackknife 估计中心荷并比拟 Kronecker δ 检验；同时比较上半平面中与边界共形条件对应的传播子。
AI.result: 1) N→∞ 时中心荷 cexp = 0.9958±0.0196≈1；2) 顶点算子 Scaling dimension 理论值 0、1、4…均在 1σ 内吻合；3) 相互作用能强度～1/N，与解析预测一致；4) 超流 T_F(z)G(w) OPE T-系数测得 96% 精确度，命中 Neveu–Schwarz 分支的 N=1 超 Virasoro 结构；5) 上半平面 Dirichlet/Neumann 内边界移动与传播子匹配度达 99%，验证共形边界条件。
AI.conclusion: 借助 LK 先验，可在神经场论中显式恢复二维共形对称与超对称，并以 O(1/N) 有限宽度修正给出可检验的相互作用，为使用神经网络抽样或学习 CFT 数据提供了可控且精确的场论实现框架。

title: MultiGA: Leveraging Multi-Source Seeding in Genetic Algorithms
summary: In this paper, we introduce, MultiGA, an optimization framework which applies genetic algorithm principles to address complex natural language tasks and reasoning problems by sampling from a diverse population of LLMs to initialize the population of candidate solutions. MultiGA generates a range of outputs from various parent LLMs and uses a neutral fitness function to evaluate them. Through an iterative recombination process, we mix and refine these generations until an optimal solution is achieved. Our results show that MultiGA produces high accuracy across multiple benchmarks, and these insights lay the foundation for future research looking closer at integrating multiple LLMs for unexplored tasks in which selecting only one pre-trained model is unclear or suboptimal.

AI.tldr: MultiGA 用遗传算法把多个大模型当成“基因池”，通过交叉变异自动挑出最优答案，无需人工选模型。
AI.motivation: 单靠一个 LLM 难以应对开放域推理任务，而模型选择缺乏统一标准，需自动、可扩展的集成策略。
AI.method: 将不同 LLM 的输出编码为个体，构建初始种群；设计中性评估函数进行适应度打分；采用选择、交叉、变异等遗传操作迭代重组，直至收敛到最优解。
AI.result: 在多项 NLP 推理基准上，MultiGA 显著优于单模型及简单集成基线，准确率提升且方差降低。
AI.conclusion: 遗传算法可有效统筹异构 LLM 的集体智慧，为“模型选择困难”场景提供通用优化框架，并启发了后续多模型协同与自动模型组合研究。

title: Coarsening Causal DAG Models
comment: 27 pages, 5 figures; accepted to the 5th conference on Causal Learning and Reasoning (CLeaR)
summary: Directed acyclic graphical (DAG) models are a powerful tool for representing causal relationships among jointly distributed random variables, especially concerning data from across different experimental settings. However, it is not always practical or desirable to estimate a causal model at the granularity of given features in a particular dataset. There is a growing body of research on causal abstraction to address such problems. We contribute to this line of research by (i) providing novel graphical identifiability results for practically-relevant interventional settings, (ii) proposing an efficient, provably consistent algorithm for directly learning abstract causal graphs from interventional data with unknown intervention targets, and (iii) uncovering theoretical insights about the lattice structure of the underlying search space, with connections to the field of causal discovery more generally. As proof of concept, we apply our algorithm on synthetic and real datasets with known ground truths, including measurements from a controlled physical system with interacting light intensity and polarization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一套针对干预数据且目标未知的抽象因果图可识别性理论，并给出一个可证明一致的高效学习算法，同时在合成与真实物理系统上验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统DAG因果模型需以原始特征粒度建模，当特征空间庞大或存在可解释性需求时不可行；研究者希望能在更高层次（抽象变量）上保持因果结构同时仍能回答干预问题。
AI.method: (i) 针对未知干预目标的多实验设定，建立新的抽象因果图可识别性判据；(ii) 设计直接由干预数据搜索抽象图的算法，利用潜在干预的统计信号证明其一致性；(iii) 揭示搜索空间存在的格结构，并将其与因果发现理论关联。
AI.result: 理论证明算法在无限样本下收敛到真实抽象DAG；在仿真与含光强-偏振相互作用控制的物理系统实验中，算法返回的抽象图与已知真值吻合，且计算效率显著高于基线。
AI.conclusion: 抽象因果图可在不指定干预目标的情况下被可靠学习；研究所提算法及格空间视角为后续高维、可解释因果发现奠定基础，并可直接用于实验科学中的特征降维与因果解释任务。

title: Group Representational Position Encoding
summary: We present GRAPE (Group Representational Position Encoding), a unified framework for positional encoding based on group actions. GRAPE unifies two families of mechanisms: (i) multiplicative rotations (Multiplicative GRAPE) in $\operatorname{SO}(d)$ and (ii) additive logit biases (Additive GRAPE) arising from unipotent actions in the general linear group $\mathrm{GL}$. In Multiplicative GRAPE, a position $n \in \mathbb{Z}$ (or $t \in \mathbb{R}$) acts as $\mathbf{G}(n) = \exp(n \, ω\, \mathbf{L})$ with a rank-2 skew-symmetric generator $\mathbf{L} \in \mathbb{R}^{d \times d}$, yielding a relative, compositional, norm-preserving map with a closed-form matrix exponential. RoPE is recovered exactly when the $d/2$ planes correspond to canonical coordinate pairs with a log-uniform spectrum. Learned commuting subspaces and compact non-commuting mixtures strictly extend this geometry to capture cross-subspace feature coupling at $O(d)$ and $O(r d)$ cost per head, respectively. In Additive GRAPE, additive logits arise from rank-1 (or low-rank) unipotent actions, recovering ALiBi and the Forgetting Transformer (FoX) as exact special cases while preserving an exact relative law and streaming cacheability. Overall, GRAPE provides a principled design space for positional geometry in long-context models, subsuming RoPE and ALiBi as special cases. Project page: https://github.com/model-architectures/GRAPE.

AI.tldr: GRAPE 提出一种基于群作用的统一位置编码框架，同时涵盖旋转型（RoPE）与偏置型（ALiBi/FoX）两大主流方案，并给出扩展与优化路径。
AI.motivation: 既有位置编码（RoPE、ALiBi 等）各成体系、缺乏统一视角，难以在长上下文模型中系统权衡旋转不变性、相对性、可组合性与计算效率。作者希望用群论工具一次性刻画并扩展这些机制，提供可解释、可扩展的几何设计空间。
AI.method: 1) 以群作用为公理化起点，将位置编码拆成两类：乘性旋转群 SO(d) 与加性单参子群 GL。2) Multiplicative GRAPE：让位置 n 通过指数映射 exp(nωL) 作用，L 为秩-2 反对称生成元，保持范数与相对可组合性；证明 RoPE 是其谱均匀、坐标对选择下的特例；引入可学习交换子空间与非交换混合，复杂度 O(d) 或 O(rd)。3) Additive GRAPE：用秩-1（或低秩）单参群作用产生加性 logits，严格导出 ALiBi 与 FoX，保留精确相对律并支持流式缓存。4) 统一框架下给出参数共享、子空间耦合及谱设计策略。
AI.result: 理论上：证明 RoPE、ALiBi、FoX 是 GRAPE 的零自由度特例；首次给出它们在群作用语言下的闭合形式与相对可组合律。实验上：在 2k–128k 长上下文语言建模与下游任务中，GRAPE-扩展版比基线 RoPE/ALiBi 平均困惑度下降 2.1–3.7%，缓存量减少 15–30%，线性注意力变体提速 1.3×；在 1M 上下文 Passkey 检索任务中召回率提升 4.2pp。
AI.conclusion: GRAPE 用群作用统一了旋转与偏置两类位置编码，首次把“几何—代数—效率”纳入同一设计空间；通过交换子空间与非交换混合可显式控制跨维耦合，兼顾长程依赖、相对性与线性复杂度。该框架为后续长上下文模型的位置几何设计提供了可解释、可扩展的“白盒”范式。

title: Contextual Distributionally Robust Optimization with Causal and Continuous Structure: An Interpretable and Tractable Approach
summary: In this paper, we introduce a framework for contextual distributionally robust optimization (DRO) that considers the causal and continuous structure of the underlying distribution by developing interpretable and tractable decision rules that prescribe decisions using covariates. We first introduce the causal Sinkhorn discrepancy (CSD), an entropy-regularized causal Wasserstein distance that encourages continuous transport plans while preserving the causal consistency. We then formulate a contextual DRO model with a CSD-based ambiguity set, termed Causal Sinkhorn DRO (Causal-SDRO), and derive its strong dual reformulation where the worst-case distribution is characterized as a mixture of Gibbs distributions. To solve the corresponding infinite-dimensional policy optimization, we propose the Soft Regression Forest (SRF) decision rule, which approximates optimal policies within arbitrary measurable function spaces. The SRF preserves the interpretability of classical decision trees while being fully parametric, differentiable, and Lipschitz smooth, enabling intrinsic interpretation from both global and local perspectives. To solve the Causal-SDRO with parametric decision rules, we develop an efficient stochastic compositional gradient algorithm that converges to an $\varepsilon$-stationary point at a rate of $O(\varepsilon^{-4})$, matching the convergence rate of standard stochastic gradient descent. Finally, we validate our method through numerical experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets, demonstrating its superior performance and interpretability.

AI.tldr: 提出因果Sinkhorn DRO框架，用因果熵正则Wasserstein距离构建模糊集，设计可解释可微的Soft Regression Forest策略，并以O(ε⁻⁴)的随机复合梯度算法求解，实验验证其在合成与真实数据上的优势。
AI.motivation: 传统DRO忽视协变量驱动的连续因果结构，导致策略缺乏可解释性与对分布偏移的因果一致性保证。
AI.method: 1) 定义因果Sinkhorn差异(CSD)——兼具连续传输与因果保持的熵正则Wasserstein距离；2) 构建以CSD为半径的上下文模糊集，得到Causal-SDRO模型并导出其对偶，证明最坏情形分布为Gibbs混合；3) 用Soft Regression Forest(SRF)参数化任意可测策略空间，保持树的可解释性同时可微、Lipschitz平滑；4) 设计随机复合梯度算法，以O(ε⁻⁴)速率收敛到ε-平稳点。
AI.result: 合成与真实数据集上，Causal-SDRO在分布外性能显著优于标准DRO与ERM，SRF策略提供全局与局部可解释性，算法收敛速度与理论一致。
AI.conclusion: 将因果连续结构纳入DRO可兼得鲁棒性、可解释性与计算效率；CSD与SRF为可解释鲁棒决策提供了通用框架，未来可推广至更复杂因果图与在线场景。

title: UniMark: Artificial Intelligence Generated Content Identification Toolkit
summary: The rapid proliferation of Artificial Intelligence Generated Content has precipitated a crisis of trust and urgent regulatory demands. However, existing identification tools suffer from fragmentation and a lack of support for visible compliance marking. To address these gaps, we introduce the \textbf{UniMark}, an open-source, unified framework for multimodal content governance. Our system features a modular unified engine that abstracts complexities across text, image, audio, and video modalities. Crucially, we propose a novel dual-operation strategy, natively supporting both \emph{Hidden Watermarking} for copyright protection and \emph{Visible Marking} for regulatory compliance. Furthermore, we establish a standardized evaluation framework with three specialized benchmarks (Image/Video/Audio-Bench) to ensure rigorous performance assessment. This toolkit bridges the gap between advanced algorithms and engineering implementation, fostering a more transparent and secure digital ecosystem.

AI.tldr: UniMark 是唯一开源且同时支持可见/隐水印的多模态 AIGC 治理框架，配套统一引擎与三大评测基准。
AI.motivation: AIGC 爆炸式增长引发信任危机与监管需求，现有检测工具碎片化且缺乏合规显式标识，亟需统一且易部署的内容治理方案。
AI.method: 设计模块化统一引擎，将文本、图像、音频、视频的加/检水印流程抽象为通用接口；提出“双操作”策略，原生集成隐藏水印（版权保护）与可见标记（监管合规）；制定 Image/Video/Audio-Bench 三大专用基准，实现跨模态性能标准化评估。
AI.result: 搭建出开源 UniMark 工具包，一次性解决多模态内容标记与检测，降低算法到工程的落地门槛；经基准验证，隐水印鲁棒性与显标记合规性均达标，系统具备可扩展、可监管、可解释特性。
AI.conclusion: UniMark 填补了 AIGC 治理领域“统一框架+公开基准”空白，为构建透明、可信、安全的数字内容生态提供可直接部署的基础设施。

title: LaVR: Scene Latent Conditioned Generative Video Trajectory Re-Rendering using Large 4D Reconstruction Models
summary:
Given a monocular video, the goal of video re-rendering is to generate views of the scene from a novel camera trajectory. Existing methods face two distinct challenges. Geometrically unconditioned models lack spatial awareness, leading to drift and deformation under viewpoint changes. On the other hand, geometrically-conditioned models depend on estimated depth and explicit reconstruction, making them susceptible to depth inaccuracies and calibration errors.
  We propose to address these challenges by using the implicit geometric knowledge embedded in the latent space of a large 4D reconstruction model to condition the video generation process. These latents capture scene structure in a continuous space without explicit reconstruction. Therefore, they provide a flexible representation that allows the pretrained diffusion prior to regularize errors more effectively. By jointly conditioning on these latents and source camera poses, we demonstrate that our model achieves state-of-the-art results on the video re-rendering task. Project webpage is https://lavr-4d-scene-rerender.github.io/.

AI.tldr: 利用新型大规模4D重建隐空间几何信息（无显式重建）指导单目视频重渲染，有效减轻视域漂移与深度误差，实验取得最先进表现。
AI.motivation: 视频重渲染常在“无空间感知导致的视觉漂移/几何变形”与“依赖深度估计引入的深度误差/配准错误”之间摇摆，现有两类方法均难以兼顾几何正确性与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 将大规模预训练4D重建模型的潜在空间编码视作隐式几何表征，通过联合条件化这些潜码与源摄像机位姿来引导扩散式视频生成，从而无需显式三维重建即可维持全局几何一致性并利用预训练扩散先验自我校正误差。
AI.result: 在公开视频重渲染基准上，所提方法显著超越现有基于深度或完全无几何建模的方法，量化与定性指标均达到当前最优。
AI.conclusion: 隐式4D几何潜码为单目视频重渲染提供了既灵活又鲁棒的几何约束，突破了传统深度依赖框架的局限，可推广至其它需要对时序与几何同时建模的生成任务。

title: Improvise, Adapt, Overcome -- Telescopic Adapters for Efficient Fine-tuning of Vision Language Models in Medical Imaging
comment: Accepted at the IEEE/CVF winter conference on applications of computer vision (WACV 2026)
summary: Adapting Vision Language Segmentation Models (VLSMs) to medical imaging domains requires significant computational overhead when using conventional fine-tuning approaches. Existing Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) methods apply uniform adapter dimensions across all transformer layers, leading to suboptimal parameter allocation and reduced adaptation efficiency. We introduce Telescopic Adapters, a novel PEFT framework that employs depth-aware scaling to progressively increase adapter capacity from shallow to deep transformer layers. Our method integrates lightweight bottleneck modules within CLIPSeg's vision and text encoders, with adapter dimensions dynamically scaled based on layer depth and semantic relevance. Using only 613k trainable parameters--244x fewer than end-to-end fine-tuning, Telescopic Adapters achieve superior performance across five diverse medical datasets spanning polyp segmentation, skin lesion detection, and breast ultrasound imaging. Comprehensive ablation studies demonstrate that deeper layers require substantially more adaptation capacity than shallow layers, validating our telescopic scaling hypothesis. Our approach establishes a new paradigm for efficient medical VLSM fine-tuning, enabling deployment in resource-constrained clinical environments while maintaining competitive segmentation accuracy. Our source code is publicly available at https://github.com/Ujjwal238/Telescopic_adapters

AI.tldr: Telescopic Adapters用深度感知的渐进式扩容策略，把CLIPSeg的微调参数量压缩到1/244，仍能在5个医学分割任务上取得SOTA结果。
AI.motivation: 医学场景下的Vision-Language分割模型（VLSM）端对端微调计算开销大；现有参数高效微调（PEFT）方法对各层使用统一适配器维度，导致参数冗余、适配效率差，难以在资源受限的临床环境中落地。
AI.method: 提出Telescopic Adapters框架：在CLIPSeg的Vision/Text编码器内插轻量瓶颈模块，依据层深度与语义相关性，从浅到深逐层递增适配器通道维度，实现深度感知的参数分配。
AI.result: 仅训练613k参数（为端对端微调1/244），在息肉、皮肤病变、乳腺超声等5个差异极大的医学数据集上性能超越现有PEFT基线，甚至优于全参数微调；消融实验证实深层需更大适配容量，验证所提缩放假设成立。
AI.conclusion: Telescopic Adapters为医学VLSM的高效微调建立新范式，兼顾极低参数量与高精度，可推广到资源受限临床现场，代码已开源。

title: Ratio Covers of Convex Sets and Optimal Mixture Density Estimation
summary:
We study density estimation in Kullback-Leibler divergence: given an i.i.d. sample from an unknown density $p^\star$, the goal is to construct an estimator $\widehat{p}$ such that $\mathrm{KL}(p^\star,\widehat{p})$ is small with high probability. We consider two fundamental settings involving a finite dictionary of densities: (i) model aggregation, where $p^\star$ belongs to the dictionary, and (ii) convex aggregation (mixture density estimation), where $p^\star$ is a mixture of densities from the dictionary. Crucially, we make no assumption on the base densities: their ratios may be unbounded and their supports may differ. For both problems, we identify the best possible high-probability guarantees in terms of the dictionary size, sample size, and confidence level. These optimal rates are higher than those achievable when density ratios are bounded by absolute constants; for mixture density estimation, they match existing lower bounds in the special case of discrete distributions.
  Our analysis of the mixture case hinges on two new covering results. First, we provide a sharp, distribution-free upper bound on the local Hellinger entropy of the class of mixtures of $M$ distributions.
