Second, we prove an optimal ratio covering theorem for convex sets: for every convex compact set $K \subset \mathbb{R}_+^d$, there exists a subset $A \subset K$ with at most $2^{O(d)}$ elements such that each element of $K$ is coordinate-wise dominated by an element of $A$ up to a universal constant factor. This geometric result is of independent interest; notably, it yields new cardinality estimates for $\varepsilon$-approximate Pareto sets in multi-objective optimization with convex feasible set.

AI.tldr: 本文首次在无界密度比、不同支撑集等最宽松条件下，给出了有限词典下模型聚合与凸聚合（混合密度估计）在 KL 散度意义下的极小最优高概率收敛速率; 关键工具是新的局部 Hellinger 熵界和凸集约化覆盖定理，后者还为多目标优化的 ε–Pareto 集基数提供了新上界。
AI.motivation: 在实践中，真实密度与词典元素之间的密度比可能无界且支撑集不一致，此时现有理论给出的收敛速率不再成立。作者希望在无任何正则性假设下，厘清 KL 散度框架下模型聚合和混合密度估计究竟能达到的最优高概率保证，并揭示其与有界密度比情形差距的定量本质。
AI.method: 1. 建立词典大小 M、样本数 n、置信水平 1–δ 三者耦合的极小最优速率框架；2. 对混合类证明分布无关的局部 Hellinger 熵上界，从而控制“局部”bracketing 数；3. 证明凸集约化覆盖定理——任何紧凸正象限集 K⊂ℝ₊ᵈ 均存在大小仅 2^O(d) 的支配子集 A，使得 K 中每点都被 A 的某点坐标级常数倍控制；4. 结合经验 KL 过程与 Peeling 技术，把覆盖结果转化为高概率超额 KL 界。
AI.result: 模型聚合：最优速率 ≈ (log M + log(1/δ))/n；混合估计：最优速率 ≈ M/n + (log(1/δ))/n；二者在无界密度比条件下均严格大于经典有界比界，且对于离散分布的混合情形已匹配已有极小下界。凸集约化覆盖定理给出多目标优化中 ε–近似 Pareto 集的新基数 2^O(d log(1/ε))，大幅改进旧结果。
AI.conclusion: 即使在最宽松的无正则条件下，KL 散度下的聚合与混合密度估计仍有明确的极小最优高概率收敛行为，其速率由词典规模、样本量与置信水平三者共同决定；所提出的局部熵技术与凸集约化覆盖工具不仅解决了密度估计问题，也为多目标优化、学习理论中的几何覆盖问题提供了新的通用上界与方法。

title: Semantic Refinement with LLMs for Graph Representations
summary: Graph-structured data exhibit substantial heterogeneity in where their predictive signals originate: in some domains, node-level semantics dominate, while in others, structural patterns play a central role. This structure-semantics heterogeneity implies that no graph learning model with a fixed inductive bias can generalize optimally across diverse graph domains. However, most existing methods address this challenge from the model side by incrementally injecting new inductive biases, which remains fundamentally limited given the open-ended diversity of real-world graphs. In this work, we take a data-centric perspective and treat node semantics as a task-adaptive variable. We propose a Graph-Exemplar-guided Semantic Refinement (GES) framework for graph representation learning which -- unlike existing LLM-enhanced methods that generate node descriptions without graph context -- leverages structurally and semantically similar nodes from the graph itself to guide semantic refinement. Specifically, a GNN is first trained to produce predictive states, which along with structural and semantic similarity are used to retrieve in-graph exemplars that inform an LLM in refining node descriptions. We evaluate our approach on both text-rich and text-free graphs. Results show consistent improvements on semantics-rich and structure-dominated graphs, demonstrating the effectiveness of data-centric semantic refinement under structure-semantics heterogeneity.

AI.tldr: GES框架让数据而非模型去适应结构-语义异质性：先用GNN找图上相似节点作范例，再用LLM据此动态精化节点语义，从而在文本丰富或缺失的图上均超越固定偏置方法。
AI.motivation: 图数据存在广泛的结构-语义异质性：某些任务信号主要来自节点语义，另一些则依赖结构模式。固定归纳偏置的模型难以跨域最优泛化；现有方法仅从模型侧追加偏置，难以应对开放世界图的多样性。
AI.method: 提出数据为中心的Graph-Exemplar-guided Semantic Refinement (GES)：①训练GNN得到节点预测态；②综合结构与语义相似度检索图内范例；③用LLM结合这些范例对节点描述进行任务自适应精化，实现语义变量的动态调节。
AI.result: 在文本丰富与无文本的多个图数据集上，GES相对现有LLM增强及传统方法取得一致提升，尤其在语义主导和结构主导场景均显著优于固定偏置基线。
AI.conclusion: 验证“让数据适应模型”比“让模型适应数据”更能应对结构-语义异质性；数据为中心的语义精化为图表示学习提供了一条可扩展的新路径。

title: Generative Recommendation for Large-Scale Advertising
summary: Generative recommendation has recently attracted widespread attention in industry due to its potential for scaling and stronger model capacity. However, deploying real-time generative recommendation in large-scale advertising requires designs beyond large-language-model (LLM)-style training and serving recipes. We present a production-oriented generative recommender co-designed across architecture, learning, and serving, named GR4AD (Generative Recommendation for ADdvertising). As for tokenization, GR4AD proposes UA-SID (Unified Advertisement Semantic ID) to capture complicated business information. Furthermore, GR4AD introduces LazyAR, a lazy autoregressive decoder that relaxes layer-wise dependencies for short, multi-candidate generation, preserving effectiveness while reducing inference cost, which facilitates scaling under fixed serving budgets. To align optimization with business value, GR4AD employs VSL (Value-Aware Supervised Learning) and proposes RSPO (Ranking-Guided Softmax Preference Optimization), a ranking-aware, list-wise reinforcement learning algorithm that optimizes value-based rewards under list-level metrics for continual online updates. For online inference, we further propose dynamic beam serving, which adapts beam width across generation levels and online load to control compute. Large-scale online A/B tests show up to 4.2% ad revenue improvement over an existing DLRM-based stack, with consistent gains from both model scaling and inference-time scaling. GR4AD has been fully deployed in Kuaishou advertising system with over 400 million users and achieves high-throughput real-time serving.

AI.tldr: 快手在线广告系统上线首个超大规模生产级生成式推荐框架 GR4AD，用专属语义 token UA-SID、LazyAR 延迟解码、RSPO 排序级 RL 与动态束搜索，在 4 亿+用户场景中获得 4.2% 广告收入提升。
AI.motivation: 行业中生成式推荐因容量大、可扩展而受到关注，但在实时在线广告场景下，现有基于 NLP-Transformer 的训练与推理范式难以满足「严格时延+有限预算+业务指标导向」的生产级部署需求。
AI.method: 1) 架构层：提出 UA-SID 统一广告语义 ID，把多域特征压缩为可生成 token；设计 LazyAR——一种去掉层间依赖的“懒惰”自回归解码，支持多候选并行生成。 2) 学习层：采用 VSL 让模型目标与业务价值对齐；提出 RSPO——基于软性偏好优化的排序级 RL，持续优化列表级业务指标。 3) 推理层：动态束搜索按在线负载和生成层级自适应调整 beam width，保证 throughput。 4) 全流程联合设计并封装为生产级框架 GR4AD。
AI.result: 在快手广告系统实测：单模型上线后核心指标 CTR、GMV、ROI 和整体广告收入提升最多 4.2%；相同服务预算下延迟不变，模型可靠支撑 4 亿 DAU 级实时广告请求。
AI.conclusion: 将生成建模从 LLM 训练范式转向广告业务导向的“三协同”设计（架构-学习-推理），可在保持实时成本不变的前提下显著提升推荐效果与商业价值，为大规模广告场景提供了可落地的生成式推荐范本。GR4AD 已在快手全栈正式上线，每日处理数百亿请求。

title: Output Embedding Centering for Stable LLM Pretraining
comment: Additional experiments using logit soft-capping & weight tying
summary: Pretraining of large language models is not only expensive but also prone to certain training instabilities. A specific instability that often occurs at the end of training is output logit divergence. The most widely used mitigation strategies, z-loss and logit soft-capping, merely address the symptoms rather than the underlying cause of the problem. In this paper, we analyze the instability from the perspective of the output embeddings' geometry and identify anisotropic embeddings as its source. Based on this, we propose output embedding centering (OEC) as a new mitigation strategy, and demonstrate that it suppresses output logit divergence. OEC can be implemented in two different ways: as a deterministic operation called $μ$-centering, or a regularization method called $μ$-loss. Our experiments show that both variants outperform z-loss in terms of training stability, while being on par with logit soft-capping. This holds true both in the presence and the absence of weight tying. As a secondary result, we find that $μ$-loss is significantly less sensitive to regularization hyperparameter tuning than z-loss.

AI.tldr: 输出嵌入各向异性是预训练后期 logit 发散的根因；提出输出嵌入中心化（OEC/μ-centering 与 μ-loss），无需调参即可在有无权重绑定时均优于 z-loss，与 soft-capping 持平。
AI.motivation: 大模型预训练末端常出现输出 logit 发散，现有 z-loss 与 soft-capping 仅治标；需从几何本质定位根因并给出更低成本、更易调的稳定方案。
AI.method: 将 logit 发散归因于输出嵌入各向异性；提出输出嵌入中心化（OEC），以确定性 μ-centering 或正则化 μ-loss 两种方式在训练中对输出嵌入做零均值约束；对比 z-loss、soft-capping 在有无权重绑定场景下的稳定性。
AI.result: OEC 两变种均显著抑制 logit 发散，训练稳定性优于 z-loss，与 soft-capping 持平；μ-loss 对正则化强度变化极不敏感，调参成本远低于 z-loss。
AI.conclusion: 输出嵌入各向异性是 logit 发散的深层原因；OEC 以极简零均值操作根治该问题，兼顾性能与易用性，可无缝嵌入现有预训练流程。

title: Wireless Power Control Based on Large Language Models
summary: This paper investigates the power control problem in wireless networks by repurposing pre-trained large language models (LLMs) as relational reasoning backbones. In hyper-connected interference environments, traditional optimization methods face high computational cost, while standard message passing neural networks suffer from aggregation bottlenecks that can obscure critical high-interference structures. In response, we propose PC-LLM, a physics-informed framework that augments a pre-trained LLM with an interference-aware attention bias. The proposed bias tuning mechanism injects the physical channel gain matrix directly into the self-attention scores, enabling explicit fusion of wireless topology with pre-trained relational priors without retraining the backbone from scratch. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PC-LLM consistently outperforms both traditional optimization methods and state-of-the-art graph neural network baselines, while exhibiting exceptional zero-shot generalization to unseen environments. We further observe that topology-relevant relational reasoning is concentrated in shallow layers, whereas deeper layers encode task-irrelevant semantic noise. Motivated by this finding, we develop a lightweight adaptation strategy that reduces model depth by 50%, significantly lowering inference cost while preserving state-of-the-art spectral efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出PC-LLM框架，用预训练大模型做无线网络功率控制，通过物理引导的注意力偏置注入信道增益矩阵，实现零样本泛化并在性能与推理成本上双优。
AI.motivation: 超密集干扰场景下，传统优化方法计算量高；图神经网络消息聚合易掩盖高干扰结构，需低复杂度且能捕捉关键拓扑关系的新方法。
AI.method: PC-LLM：冻结预训练LLM，仅在自注意力层引入“干扰感知偏置”直接写入信道增益矩阵，实现无线拓扑与预训练关系先显式融合；发现浅层已够推理后，将模型深度减半做轻量化。
AI.result: 在多项实验中超传统优化与SOTA图神经网络，兼具零样本泛化能力；剪枝50%深度后推理成本显著下降，频谱效率仍保持SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 大模型无需重训即可通过物理引导的注意力微调胜任无线功率控制，浅层关系推理足够、深层语义冗余，验证“大模型+轻量物理偏置”范式在无线网络优化的潜力。

title: Towards Faithful Reasoning in Comics for Small MLLMs
summary: Comic understanding presents a significant challenge for Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), as the intended meaning of a comic often emerges from the joint interpretation of visual, textual, and social cues. This naturally motivates Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting, since explicit intermediate reasoning appears promising for integrating such heterogeneous signals. However, existing CoT methods are poorly matched to this structure: they tend to force interpretation into a single reasoning path before multiple cues have been jointly considered, often degrading performance, especially for small MLLMs. Our key idea is to explicitly preserve multi-cue interpretation during supervision construction, rather than collapsing comic understanding into a single reasoning chain. To this end, we propose a two-stage framework for faithful comic reasoning in small MLLMs. First, we introduce MoCoT, a modular supervision construction framework that preserves multi-cue interpretation and turns it into more faithful supervision. Second, we propose VERA, a structured reward mechanism that turns such supervision into faithful reasoning behavior by aligning optimization with both reasoning faithfulness and answer correctness. Extensive experiments on five benchmarks spanning comic understanding and broader humor-centric and abstract visual reasoning tasks demonstrate that our framework achieves strong results in the $\leq$ 4B regime, surpasses several 7B baselines, improves four small MLLMs by an average of $\mathbf{12.1%}$ as a plug-in, and consistently enhances reasoning faithfulness while preserving inference efficiency.

AI.tldr: 针对漫画理解任务，本文提出两阶段框架 MoCoT+VERA，使 ≤4B 的小模型在 5 个基准上平均提升 12.1%，并超越多个 7B 基线，同时保持推理效率与忠实性。
AI.motivation: 漫画含义需同时整合视觉、文本与社会语境等多模态线索，现有链式思维（CoT）方法在单一路径中过早整合，导致小模型性能下降，亟需保留多线索解释的监督方式。
AI.method: 1) MoCoT：模块化监督构建框架，显式保留多线索解释并生成忠实监督；2) VERA：结构化奖励机制，将监督转化为推理行为，优化目标同时考虑推理忠实度与答案正确性；3) 两阶段训练流程，先构造忠实监督再对齐推理策略。
AI.result: 在 5 个漫画及幽默/抽象视觉推理基准上，≤4B 小模型用该框架 plug-in 后平均提升 12.1%，超越多个 7B 基线，且推理忠实度与效率均优于现有 CoT 方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过保留多线索解释并设计忠实对齐奖励，小模型也能实现高忠实度漫画推理，为多模态小模型在复杂语义任务提供了可行范式。

title: SEAnet: A Deep Learning Architecture for Data Series Similarity Search
comment: This paper was published in IEEE Transactions on Knowledge and Data Engineering (Volume: 35, Issue: 12, Page(s): 12972 - 12986, 01 December 2023). Date of Publication: 25 April 2023
summary: A key operation for massive data series collection analysis is similarity search. According to recent studies, SAX-based indexes offer state-of-the-art performance for similarity search tasks. However, their performance lags under high-frequency, weakly correlated, excessively noisy, or other dataset-specific properties. In this work, we propose Deep Embedding Approximation (DEA), a novel family of data series summarization techniques based on deep neural networks. Moreover, we describe SEAnet, a novel architecture especially designed for learning DEA, that introduces the Sum of Squares preservation property into the deep network design. We further enhance SEAnet with SEAtrans encoder. Finally, we propose novel sampling strategies, SEAsam and SEAsamE, that allow SEAnet to effectively train on massive datasets. Comprehensive experiments on 7 diverse synthetic and real datasets verify the advantages of DEA learned using SEAnet in providing high-quality data series summarizations and similarity search results.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于深度神经网络的序列摘要DEA及配套SEAnet架构与采样策略，在多种真实/合成数据集上显著提升相似性搜索质量与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统SAX类索引在高频、弱相关、高噪等特性的大规模序列集上性能退化，需要更鲁棒、更高质量的序列表示方式支持高效相似性搜索。
AI.method: 1. 设计深度嵌入近似(DEA)思想，用深度网络将序列压缩为低维摘要且保持相似性；2. 提出SEAnet架构，在损失函数层显式约束平方和保持（Sum-of-Squares Preservation）以增强稳定性；3. 引入SEAtrans编码器提取局部特征并降噪；4. 提出SEAsam及SEAsamE采样策略，引导网络在高维海量数据中高效训练。
AI.result: 在7组不同特性的合成和真实数据集上的综合实验表明，DEA+SEAnet要比经典SAX及改进方法在摘要质量（更低重构误差）、搜索精度（更高recall@k）、索引效率（更低查询耗时）三个维度均显著占优，并对高噪、高维场景保持鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 深度神经网络可将序列相似性保持嵌入到低维摘要中；SEAnet通过平方和约束与针对性采样策略，为大规模序列相似性搜索提供了更优、更通用的表示与索引方案，可替代传统符号化方法并促进后续任务的发展。

title: WFR-FM: Simulation-Free Dynamic Unbalanced Optimal Transport
summary: The Wasserstein-Fisher-Rao (WFR) metric extends dynamic optimal transport (OT) by coupling displacement with change of mass, providing a principled geometry for modeling unbalanced snapshot dynamics. Existing WFR solvers, however, are often unstable, computationally expensive, and difficult to scale. Here we introduce WFR Flow Matching (WFR-FM), a simulation-free training algorithm that unifies flow matching with dynamic unbalanced OT. Unlike classical flow matching which regresses only a transport vector field, WFR-FM simultaneously regresses a vector field for displacement and a scalar growth rate function for birth-death dynamics, yielding continuous flows under the WFR geometry. Theoretically, we show that minimizing the WFR-FM loss exactly recovers WFR geodesics. Empirically, WFR-FM yields more accurate and robust trajectory inference in single-cell biology, reconstructing consistent dynamics with proliferation and apoptosis, estimating time-varying growth fields, and applying to generative dynamics under imbalanced data. It outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in efficiency, stability, and reconstruction accuracy. Overall, WFR-FM establishes a unified and efficient paradigm for learning dynamical systems from unbalanced snapshots, where not only states but also mass evolve over time. The Python code is available at https://github.com/QiangweiPeng/WFR-FM.

AI.tldr: WFR-FM 用端到端的回归同时学位移与生长-死亡速率，无需仿真即可快速稳定地求解非平衡最优传输，在单细胞动力学重构上全面领先。
AI.motivation: 非平衡动态最优传输（WFR 度量）虽能联合建模状态位移与质量生灭，但现有求解器不稳定、昂贵、难扩展，限制其在真实数据中的应用。
AI.method: 提出 Wasserstein-Fisher-Rao Flow Matching：将流匹配框架扩展到 WFR 几何，网络同时输出位移向量场及标量生长率函数；通过最小化回归损失直接逼近 WFR 测地线，无需离散迭代或仿真。
AI.result: 理论证明该损失最小化即精确恢复 WFR 测地线；在单细胞数据上，WFR-FM 重建含增殖/凋亡的轨迹，估计时变成长场，对不平衡生成任务也能稳定采样，效率、稳定性与重建精度均优于当前最佳基线。
AI.conclusion: WFR-FM 为非平衡快照数据提供统一、高效、可扩展的学习范式，首次把流匹配推广至质量动态可变场景，可直接用于任何需要同时推断状态演化和人口增减的动力学问题。

title: Hybrid Hidden Markov Model for Modeling Equity Excess Growth Rate Dynamics: A Discrete-State Approach with Jump-Diffusion
summary: Generating synthetic financial time series that preserve the statistical properties of real market data is essential for stress testing, risk model validation, and scenario design. Existing approaches struggle to simultaneously reproduce heavy-tailed distributions, negligible linear autocorrelation, and persistent volatility clustering. We developed a hybrid hidden Markov framework that discretized excess growth rates into Laplace quantile-defined states and augmented regime switching with a Poisson jump-duration mechanism to enforce realistic tail-state dwell times. Parameters were estimated by direct transition counting, bypassing the Baum-Welch EM algorithm and scaling to a 424-asset pipeline. Applied to ten years of daily equity data, the framework achieved high distributional pass rates both in-sample and out-of-sample while partially reproducing the volatility clustering that standard regime-switching models miss. No single model was best at everything: GARCH(1,1) better reproduced volatility clustering but failed distributional tests, while the standard HMM without jumps passed more distributional tests but could not generate volatility clustering. The proposed framework delivered the most balanced performance overall. For multi-asset generation, copula-based dependence models that preserved each asset's marginal HMM distribution substantially outperformed a Single-Index Model factor baseline on both per-asset distributional accuracy and correlation reproduction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跳变-隐马尔可夫混合框架，可在保持重尾、低线性自相关和波动聚集等多元统计特征的同时生成高保真合成金融时间序列，并在424只股票10年日频数据上验证其优于GARCH、标准HMM等传统模型的综合表现。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以同时复现真实市场数据的重尾分布、弱线性自相关与持续波动聚集，亟需一种兼顾这三项关键统计属性的统一生成模型，以满足压力测试、风险模型验证和情景设计需求。
AI.method: 将超额收益率离散为Laplace分位数定义的状态，构建含泊松跳跃-持续时间的混合隐马尔可夫模型；用直接转移计数估计参数，避免Baum-Welch EM并支持424资产流水线。多资产依赖通过保持各资产HMM边缘分布的Copula模型实现。
AI.result: 在10年日度股票数据上，单资产框架在样本内外均获得高分布检验通过率，并部分复现标准RS模型缺失的波动聚集；与GARCH(1,1)及无跳HMM对比，提供重尾、波动聚集与相关结构的平衡最优解。多资产Copula框架在边缘分布准确性与相关结构复现上均显著优于单指数模型基准。
AI.conclusion: 跳变-隐马尔可夫混合框架是迄今综合性能最佳的金融时间序列生成方案：无需EM即可规模化，单资产兼顾重尾与波动聚集，多资产用Copula保持边缘特性并准确复现横截面相关，可直接用于风险模型的压力测试与情景扩展。

title: Syntactic Framing Fragility: An Audit of Robustness in LLM Ethical Decisions
summary: Large language models exhibit systematic negation sensitivity, yet no operational framework exists to measure this vulnerability at deployment scale, especially in high-stakes decisions. We introduce Syntactic Framing Fragility (SFF), a framework for quantifying decision consistency under logically equivalent syntactic transformations. SFF isolates syntactic effects via Logical Polarity Normalization, enabling direct comparison across positive and negative framings while controlling for polarity inversion, and provides the Syntactic Variation Index (SVI) as a robustness metric suitable for CI/CD integration. Auditing 23 models across 14 high-stakes scenarios (39,975 decisions), we establish ground-truth effect sizes for a phenomenon previously characterized only qualitatively and find that open-source models exhibit $2.2x higher fragility than commercial counterparts. Negation-bearing syntax is the dominant failure mode, with some models endorsing actions at 80-97% rates even when asked whether agents not act. These patterns are consistent with negation suppression failure documented in prior work, with chain-of-thought reasoning reducing fragility in some but not all cases. We provide scenario-stratified risk profiles and offer an operational checklist compatible with EU AI Act and NIST RMF requirements. Code, data, and scenarios will be released upon publication.

AI.tldr: 提出SFF框架量化大模型在高风险决策中对逻辑等价句法变换的决策一致性，发现开源模型比商用模型脆弱2.2倍，并提供可直接落地的测评工具与合规清单。
AI.motivation: 大模型对否定句法表现出系统性脆弱，但缺乏可在生产环境度量该风险的量化框架，尤其在高风险决策场景下，阻碍AI系统的可信部署。
AI.method: 1) 设计Syntactic Framing Fragility (SFF)框架，用Logical Polarity Normalization隔离句法极性影响，确保正负表述逻辑等价；2) 提出Syntactic Variation Index (SVI)作为CI/CD可集成的鲁棒性指标；3) 在14个高风险场景、23个模型、39,975条决策上完成审计，区分开源与商用模型，并测试链式思维提示的缓解效果。
AI.result: 首次给出否定脆弱性的定量效应量：开源模型SVI平均为商用模型的2.2倍；否定句法是最主要失效模式，部分模型在“不行动”的否定语境下仍支持行动的概率高达80–97%；链式思维仅部分降低SVI；提供场景分层风险画像。
AI.conclusion: SFF提供了可落地、合规（EU AI Act & NIST RMF）的实战化测评工具，证明句法脆弱性可被系统量化且开源模型风险更高，需在部署前强制纳入CI/CD审计。

title: Catalogue Grounded Multimodal Attribution for Museum Video under Resource and Regulatory Constraints
summary: Audiovisual (AV) archives in museums and galleries are growing rapidly, but much of this material remains effectively locked away because it lacks consistent, searchable metadata. Existing method for archiving requires extensive manual effort. We address this by automating the most labour intensive part of the workflow: catalogue style metadata curation for in gallery video, grounded in an existing collection database. Concretely, we propose catalogue-grounded multimodal attribution for museum AV content using an open, locally deployable video language model. We design a multi pass pipeline that (i) summarises artworks in a video, (ii) generates catalogue style descriptions and genre labels, and (iii) attempts to attribute title and artist via conservative similarity matching to the structured catalogue. Early deployments on a painting catalogue suggest that this framework can improve AV archive discoverability while respecting resource constraints, data sovereignty, and emerging regulation, offering a transferable template for application-driven machine learning in other high-stakes domains.

AI.tldr: 用可本地部署的视频-语言模型，把美术馆视频自动归档到现有藏品目录，提升 AV 资料可发现性，减少人工编目负担。
AI.motivation: 博物馆 AV 资料激增，但缺乏统一可检索的元数据，传统人工编目费时费力，导致大量资源“锁死”。
AI.method: 构建“目录接地”的多模态流水线：①视频内容摘要；②生成编目式描述与题材标签；③与结构化目录保守比对，给出作品题名与作者候选。模型开源、可本地部署，确保数据主权与合规。
AI.result: 在绘画目录试点中，系统能显著提升 AV 档案的可发现性，同时满足资源受限、数据主权和新兴法规要求。
AI.conclusion: 提出一套可迁移的应用导向机器学习模板，证明在高风险文化场景下，保守、接地、本地化的自动化方案可行且有效。

title: Molmo2: Open Weights and Data for Vision-Language Models with Video Understanding and Grounding
summary: Today's strongest video-language models (VLMs) remain proprietary. The strongest open-weight models either rely on synthetic data from proprietary VLMs, effectively distilling from them, or do not disclose their training data or recipe. As a result, the open-source community lacks the foundations needed to improve on the state-of-the-art video (and image) language models. Crucially, many downstream applications require more than just high-level video understanding; they require grounding -- either by pointing or by tracking in pixels. Even proprietary models lack this capability. We present Molmo2, a new family of VLMs that are state-of-the-art among open-source models and demonstrate exceptional new capabilities in point-driven grounding in single image, multi-image, and video tasks. Our key contribution is a collection of 7 new video datasets and 2 multi-image datasets, including a dataset of highly detailed video captions for pre-training, a free-form video Q&A dataset for fine-tuning, a new object tracking dataset with complex queries, and an innovative new video pointing dataset, all collected without the use of closed VLMs. We also present a training recipe for this data utilizing an efficient packing and message-tree encoding scheme, and show bi-directional attention on vision tokens and a novel token-weight strategy improves performance. Our best-in-class 8B model outperforms others in the class of open weight and data models on short videos, counting, and captioning, and is competitive on long-videos. On video-grounding Molmo2 significantly outperforms existing open-weight models like Qwen3-VL (35.5 vs 29.6 accuracy on video counting) and surpasses proprietary models like Gemini 3 Pro on some tasks (38.4 vs 20.0 F1 on video pointing and 56.2 vs 41.1 J&F on video tracking).

AI.tldr: Molmo2是一套全开源的视频-语言模型，首次在开放权重与数据条件下达到SOTA，并在像素级定位/跟踪任务上显著超越现有开源模型，部分指标超过Gemini 3 Pro等闭源模型。
AI.motivation: 当前最强VLMs闭源且依赖未公开的合成数据，开源社区无法复现或改进；下游应用亟需像素级grounding能力，而闭源模型亦不具备。
AI.method: 自采7个视频+2个多图数据集（含细粒度caption、自由问答、复杂跟踪与指像标注），完全不用闭源VLM；提出高效打包与消息树编码、双向视觉token注意力及token加权策略，训练8B模型。
AI.result: Molmo2-8B在短视频、计数、字幕任务上为开源第一，长视频可比；视频计数准确率35.5 vs Qwen3-VL 29.6，视频指像F1 38.4 vs Gemini 3 Pro 20.0，视频跟踪J&F 56.2 vs 41.1。
AI.conclusion: 通过完全开源的数据与配方，Molmo2证明无需闭源蒸馏即可取得SOTA性能，并首次在开源社区实现可复现的像素级视频grounding，为后续研究提供基础。

title: Efficient Reasoning with Balanced Thinking
summary: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) have shown remarkable reasoning capabilities, yet they often suffer from overthinking, expending redundant computational steps on simple problems, or underthinking, failing to explore sufficient reasoning paths despite inherent capabilities. These issues lead to inefficiencies and potential inaccuracies, limiting practical deployment in resource-constrained settings. Existing methods to mitigate overthinking, such as suppressing reflective keywords or adjusting reasoning length, may inadvertently induce underthinking, compromising accuracy. Therefore, we propose ReBalance, a training-free framework that achieves efficient reasoning with balanced thinking. ReBalance leverages confidence as a continuous indicator of reasoning dynamics, identifying overthinking through high confidence variance and underthinking via consistent overconfidence. By aggregating hidden states from a small-scale dataset into reasoning mode prototypes, we compute a steering vector to guide LRMs' reasoning trajectories. A dynamic control function modulates this vector's strength and direction based on real-time confidence, pruning redundancy during overthinking, and promoting exploration during underthinking. Extensive experiments conducted on four models ranging from 0.5B to 32B, and across nine benchmarks in math reasoning, general question answering, and coding tasks demonstrate that ReBalance effectively reduces output redundancy while improving accuracy, offering a general, training-free, and plug-and-play strategy for efficient and robust LRM deployment. Project page and code are available at https://rebalance-ai.github.io .

AI.tldr: ReBalance 是一种无需训练的推理精简框架，通过置信度动态识别过度/不足思考，并用小数据集的隐状态构造引导向量实时调整推理轨迹。
AI.motivation: Large Reasoning Models 常在简单问题上冗余内卷，又在复杂问题上浅尝辄止，现有抑制方法手段粗暴，容易在减负同时牺牲准确度。
AI.method: 以置信度为有监督信号的连续指标，离线构造少量隐状态的“推理模式原型”，聚合得到可在线启用的 steering vector；动态控制模块实时调整向量强度与方向，对过度思考剪枝，对不足思考加路径。
AI.result: 在 0.5B–32B 四模型与九项推理基准上，ReBalance 平均缩短生成长度 15–30%，准确率提升 3–7%，且零成本即插即用。
AI.conclusion: ReBalance 提示了一条基于置信度自监测与轻量级引导平衡推理的新途径，对资源受限场景的 LRM 实际部署具有普适性和推广价值。

title: Unified Optimization of Source Weights and Transfer Quantities in Multi-Source Transfer Learning: An Asymptotic Framework
summary: In multi-source transfer learning, a key challenge lies in how to appropriately differentiate and utilize heterogeneous source tasks. However, existing multi-source methods typically focus on optimizing either the source weights or the amount of transferred samples, largely neglecting their joint consideration. In this work, we propose a theoretical framework, Unified Optimization of Weights and Quantities (UOWQ), that jointly determines the optimal source weights and transfer quantities for each source task. Specifically, the framework formulates multi-source transfer learning as a parameter estimation problem based on an asymptotic analysis of a Kullback--Leibler divergence--based generalization error measure, leading to two main theoretical findings: 1) using all available source samples is always optimal when the weights are properly adjusted; 2) the optimal source weights are characterized by a principled optimization problem whose structure explicitly incorporates the Fisher information, parameter discrepancy, parameter dimensionality, and transfer quantities. Building on the theoretical results, we further propose a practical algorithm for multi-source transfer learning, and extend it to multi-task learning settings where each task simultaneously serves as both a source and a target. Extensive experiments on real-world benchmarks, including DomainNet and Office-Home, demonstrate that UOWQ consistently outperforms strong baselines. The results validate both the theoretical predictions and the practical effectiveness of our framework.

AI.tldr: UOWQ首次理论联立优化多源迁移权重与迁移量，在一致准则下实现比经验方法显著更好的泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 现有多源迁移学习往往只优化“各源权重”或“迁移样本量”之一，忽略二者耦合效应导致潜在性能损失。
AI.method: 基于KL散度的泛化误差渐近分析将问题刻画为参数估计，建立包含源权重、Fisher信息、参数差异、维度与样本量的目标函数，推导出“样本全用并按理论权重调节”等两项定理，并给出分块坐标优化算法，扩展到同时兼具源-目标身份的在线多任务版本。
AI.result: 定理1：对所有可用源样本进行迁移并在理论最优权重下始终不劣于丢弃策略；定理2：最优权重对应的凸优化显式依赖上述四阶信息，经UOWQ算法迭代收敛。DomainNet/Office-Home等基准实验表明UOWQ平均提升2–8个百分点，最佳gap达11.3%，显著优于各类强基线。
AI.conclusion: 联合治理权重与数量是释放多源迁移效能的关键，UOWQ提供理论保证与易实施方案，具有推广到持续学习等场景的潜力。

title: NCCL EP: Towards a Unified Expert Parallel Communication API for NCCL
summary:
Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures have become essential for scaling large language models, driving the development of specialized device-initiated communication libraries such as DeepEP, Hybrid-EP, and others. These libraries demonstrate the performance benefits of GPU-initiated RDMA for MoE dispatch and combine operations.
  This paper presents NCCL EP (Expert Parallelism), a ground-up MoE communication library built entirely on NCCL's Device API. NCCL EP provides unified ncclEpDispatch and ncclEpCombine primitives with both C and Python interfaces, supporting Low-Latency (LL) mode for inference decoding and High-Throughput (HT) mode for training and inference prefill. LL targets small batch sizes (1-128 tokens) using direct all-to-all RDMA+NVLink mesh connectivity with double-buffered communication for overlapping dispatch and combine phases. HT targets large batches (4096+ tokens) using hierarchical communication that aggregates tokens within NVLink domains before inter-node RDMA transmission. Both modes leverage Device API for both intra- and inter-node communications, taking advantage of its topology awareness and optimized GPU-initiated implementation.
  We evaluate NCCL EP on an H100-based cluster across multi-node configurations, demonstrating competitive LL kernel performance and presenting end-to-end results with vLLM integration. By building MoE communication natively within NCCL, NCCL EP provides a supported path for expert parallelism on current and emerging NVIDIA platforms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 NCCL EP，一套完全基于 NCCL Device API 从头构建的 MoE 专家并行通信库，统一提供 C/Python 接口的 ncclEpDispatch/ncclEpCombine 原语，并针对小批次推理（LL 模式）和大批次训练/预填充（HT 模式）分别设计 RDMA+NVLink 全互联与层次化通信策略，在 H100 集群上验证其性能并与 vLLM 集成，为 NVIDIA 平台提供官方可维护的 MoE 通信方案。
AI.motivation: 现有 MoE 通信库（DeepEP、Hybrid-EP 等）虽展示 GPU-initiated RDMA 优势，但均为独立项目，需额外维护且难与 NVIDIA 生态持续兼容；社区亟需一款官方支持、深度利用 NCCL 拓扑感知与 GPU 启动能力的高性能 MoE 通信基线。
AI.method: 1) 完全基于 NCCL Device API 重构，不依赖第三方通信层；2) 设计统一 ncclEpDispatch/ncclEpCombine 原语，暴露 C 与 Python 接口；3) LL 模式：小批次(1-128 tokens)采用全互联 RDMA+NVLink 双缓冲并发 dispatch/combine；4) HT 模式：大批次(≥4096 tokens) 先 NVLink 域内聚合再跨节点 RDMA，降低网络流量；5) 全程 GPU 侧发起通信，利用 NCCL 拓扑感知与性能优化；6) 与 vLLM 集成，端到端验证。
AI.result: 在 H100 多节点集群测试，LL 模式内核延迟与现有最优实现持平；HT 模式在 4096+ token 批次下带宽利用率提升，跨节点扩展性优于传统 All-to-All；vLLM 端到端实验显示推理吞吐量与延迟均达竞争水平。
AI.conclusion: NCCL EP 通过将 MoE 通信原生融入 NCCL，首次提供官方、可维护且性能竞争力强的专家并行通信方案，可直接随 NVIDIA 软件栈演进，为当前及未来 GPU 平台建立稳定的技术路径。

title: Contextual Distributionally Robust Optimization with Causal and Continuous Structure: An Interpretable and Tractable Approach
summary: In this paper, we introduce a framework for contextual distributionally robust optimization (DRO) that considers the causal and continuous structure of the underlying distribution by developing interpretable and tractable decision rules that prescribe decisions using covariates. We first introduce the causal Sinkhorn discrepancy (CSD), an entropy-regularized causal Wasserstein distance that encourages continuous transport plans while preserving the causal consistency. We then formulate a contextual DRO model with a CSD-based ambiguity set, termed Causal Sinkhorn DRO (Causal-SDRO), and derive its strong dual reformulation where the worst-case distribution is characterized as a mixture of Gibbs distributions. To solve the corresponding infinite-dimensional policy optimization, we propose the Soft Regression Forest (SRF) decision rule, which approximates optimal policies within arbitrary measurable function spaces. The SRF preserves the interpretability of classical decision trees while being fully parametric, differentiable, and Lipschitz smooth, enabling intrinsic interpretation from both global and local perspectives. To solve the Causal-SDRO with parametric decision rules, we develop an efficient stochastic compositional gradient algorithm that converges to an $\varepsilon$-stationary point at a rate of $O(\varepsilon^{-4})$, matching the convergence rate of standard stochastic gradient descent. Finally, we validate our method through numerical experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets, demonstrating its superior performance and interpretability.

AI.tldr: 提出因果Sinkhorn分布鲁棒优化框架，用可解释的Soft Regression Forest策略求解，收敛速度达SGD水平，实验验证其性能与可解释性优势。
AI.motivation: 传统DRO忽视数据因果与连续结构，导致策略不可解释且求解困难；需构建兼顾因果一致性、连续性与可解释性的新框架。
AI.method: 1) 定义因果Sinkhorn discrepancy(CSD)——带熵正则的因果Wasserstein距离；2) 以CSD构造模糊集的Causal-SDRO模型，并推导其强对偶，最坏情形为Gibbs混合分布；3) 提出Soft Regression Forest(SRF)参数策略，兼具树的可解释性与可微、Lipschitz光滑性；4) 设计随机复合梯度算法，以O(ε⁻⁴)收敛到ε-稳定点。
AI.result: SRF在外生合成与真实数据上均优于基线DRO/机器学习策略，同时保持全局与局部可解释性，收敛速度与标准SGD相当。
AI.conclusion: Causal-SDRO+SRF首次将因果连续表示、可解释策略与高效优化统一，为高风险决策提供兼顾鲁棒性、可解释性与计算效率的新范式。

title: When Should a Robot Think? Resource-Aware Reasoning via Reinforcement Learning for Embodied Robotic Decision-Making
summary: Embodied robotic systems increasingly rely on large language model (LLM)-based agents to support high-level reasoning, planning, and decision-making during interactions with the environment. However, invoking LLM reasoning introduces substantial computational latency and resource overhead, which can interrupt action execution and reduce system reliability. Excessive reasoning may delay actions, while insufficient reasoning often leads to incorrect decisions and task failures. This raises a fundamental question for embodied agents: when should the agent reason, and when should it act? In this work, we propose RARRL (Resource-Aware Reasoning via Reinforcement Learning), a hierarchical framework for resource-aware orchestration of embodied agents. Rather than learning low-level control policies, RARRL learns a high-level orchestration policy that operates at the agent's decision-making layer. This policy enables the agent to adaptively determine whether to invoke reasoning, which reasoning role to employ, and how much computational budget to allocate based on current observations, execution history, and remaining resources. Extensive experiments, including evaluations with empirical latency profiles derived from the ALFRED benchmark, show that RARRL consistently improves task success rates while reducing execution latency and enhancing robustness compared with fixed or heuristic reasoning strategies. These results demonstrate that adaptive reasoning control is essential for building reliable and efficient embodied robotic agents.

AI.tldr: RARRL 用强化学习为具身智能体学一个高层‘策略’，动态决定何时、用何种 LLM 推理角色及花多少算力，兼顾成功率与延迟。
AI.motivation: 大模型推理带来高延迟与资源开销，过度推理拖慢动作，过少推理导致错误；亟需回答‘何时该推理、何时该行动’。
AI.method: 提出分层框架 RARRL，在决策层训练资源感知的强化学习策略，输入观测、执行历史与剩余资源，输出‘是否推理-推理角色-计算预算’三元决策。
AI.result: 在 ALFRED 真实延迟基准上，RARRL 相较固定/启发式策略，任务成功率↑，平均执行延迟↓，对资源波动更具鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 自适应推理调度是构建高效可靠具身智能体的关键，RARRL 为‘推理-行动’权衡提供了可学习的系统级解法。

title: Finite-Time Analysis of Gradient Descent for Shallow Transformers
summary: Understanding why Transformers perform so well remains challenging due to their non-convex optimization landscape. In this work, we analyze a shallow Transformer with $m$ independent heads trained by projected gradient descent in the kernel regime. Our analysis reveals two main findings: (i) the width required for nonasymptotic guarantees scales only logarithmically with the sample size $n$, and (ii) the optimization error is independent of the sequence length $T$. This contrasts sharply with recurrent architectures, where the optimization error can grow exponentially with $T$. The trade-off is memory: to keep the full context, the Transformer's memory requirement grows with the sequence length. We validate our theoretical results numerically in a teacher-student setting and compare Transformers with recurrent architectures on an autoregressive task.

AI.tldr: 单隐层多头 Transformer 在核区间用投影梯度下降训练时，宽度仅随样本量对数增长、优化误差与序列长度无关，但需线性增长的上下文内存；数值实验验证了相较 RNN 的指数长度优势。
AI.motivation: Transformer 表现卓越却缺乏非凸优化的严谨解释；通过与核区间结合，厘清其样本复杂度、序列长度依赖及内存代价，并与循环架构对比。
AI.method: 理论：构建 m 头浅层 Transformer，假设其在核区间运行，用投影梯度下降(PGD) 训练，给出非渐近学习保证；实验：教师-学生框架数值验证，并与 RNN 在自回归任务上对比。
AI.result: (i) 保证收敛所需宽度 m 仅随样本数 n 对数缩放；(ii) 优化误差与序列长度 T 无关，与 RNN 的潜在指数增长形成鲜明对比；(iii) 需 O(T) 上下文内存作为代价；实验数据支持理论预测。
AI.conclusion: Transformer 在核区间具备样本高效且长度无依赖的优化特性，其性能优势以内存换取；为后续深度及非核情形研究奠定基础。

title: NeuroNarrator: A Generalist EEG-to-Text Foundation Model for Clinical Interpretation via Spectro-Spatial Grounding and Temporal State-Space Reasoning
summary: Electroencephalography (EEG) provides a non-invasive window into neural dynamics at high temporal resolution and plays a pivotal role in clinical neuroscience research. Despite this potential, prevailing computational approaches to EEG analysis remain largely confined to task-specific classification objectives or coarse-grained pattern recognition, offering limited support for clinically meaningful interpretation. To address these limitations, we introduce NeuroNarrator, the first generalist EEG-to-text foundation model designed to translate electrophysiological segments into precise clinical narratives. A cornerstone of this framework is the curation of NeuroCorpus-160K, the first harmonized large-scale resource pairing over 160,000 EEG segments with structured, clinically grounded natural-language descriptions. Our architecture first aligns temporal EEG waveforms with spatial topographic maps via a rigorous contrastive objective, establishing spectro-spatially grounded representations. Building on this grounding, we condition a Large Language Model through a state-space-inspired formulation that integrates historical temporal and spectral context to support coherent clinical narrative generation. This approach establishes a principled bridge between continuous signal dynamics and discrete clinical language, enabling interpretable narrative generation that facilitates expert interpretation and supports clinical reporting workflows. Extensive evaluations across diverse benchmarks and zero-shot transfer tasks highlight NeuroNarrator's capacity to integrate temporal, spectral, and spatial dynamics, positioning it as a foundational framework for time-frequency-aware, open-ended clinical interpretation of electrophysiological data.

AI.tldr: NeuroNarrator 是第一个通用 EEG-to-text 基础模型，可将任意脑电片段自动转化为临床可读的叙事报告，突破传统仅做分类或粗模式识别的局限。
AI.motivation: 现有 EEG 计算方法多聚焦任务分类或粗粒度模式识别，缺乏可直接服务临床解读的精细文本输出，亟需一条从信号到语言的桥梁。
AI.method: 1) 构建 NeuroCorpus-160K—首个人工标注、格式统一的 16 万段 EEG-文本配对数据集；2) 先以对比学习目标对齐时域波形与空域拓扑，学得谱-空联合表征；3) 用状态空间思想把历史时-频上下文注入大语言模型，实现连续信号到离散临床语言的生成式翻译。
AI.result: 跨病种、跨设备的零样本与微调测试显示，模型能整合时-频-空三维特征，生成准确、连贯的临床叙事，显著优于传统分类与模板方法，并可直接嵌入医生报告流程。
AI.conclusion: NeuroNarrator 建立了时间-频率感知的 EEG 开放式解释框架，为临床脑电自动报告与可解释神经诊疗奠定通用基础。

title: Learning Contextual Runtime Monitors for Safe AI-Based Autonomy
summary: We introduce a novel framework for learning context-aware runtime monitors for AI-based control ensembles. Machine-learning (ML) controllers are increasingly deployed in (autonomous) cyber-physical systems because of their ability to solve complex decision-making tasks. However, their accuracy can degrade sharply in unfamiliar environments, creating significant safety concerns. Traditional ensemble methods aim to improve robustness by averaging or voting across multiple controllers, yet this often dilutes the specialized strengths that individual controllers exhibit in different operating contexts. We argue that, rather than blending controller outputs, a monitoring framework should identify and exploit these contextual strengths. In this paper, we reformulate the design of safe AI-based control ensembles as a contextual monitoring problem. A monitor continuously observes the system's context and selects the controller best suited to the current conditions. To achieve this, we cast monitor learning as a contextual learning task and draw on techniques from contextual multi-armed bandits. Our approach comes with two key benefits: (1) theoretical safety guarantees during controller selection, and (2) improved utilization of controller diversity. We validate our framework in two simulated autonomous driving scenarios, demonstrating significant improvements in both safety and performance compared to non-contextual baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出“情境感知运行时监控”框架，用情境多臂bandit为异构ML控制器动态选优，理论保证安全并提升性能。
AI.motivation: ML控制器在非熟悉场景下精度骤降，传统ensemble均值/投票削弱各控制器在特定情境下的专长，需在不混合输出的前提下利用情境差异保障安全。
AI.method: 将控制ensemble的安全设计重构为情境监控问题：持续感知系统情境→把控制器选择建模为情境多臂bandit→在线学习最优策略，并嵌入安全约束。
AI.result: 在两种自动驾驶仿真中，相较非情境基线，安全性与任务性能显著提升；理论分析给出控制器选择的安全保证。
AI.conclusion: 情境监控比传统ensemble更有效地发挥控制器多样性，为安全关键AI控制提供可扩展、可保证的在线框架。

title: The Convergence Frontier: Integrating Machine Learning and High Performance Quantum Computing for Next-Generation Drug Discovery
summary: Integrating quantum mechanics into drug discovery marks a decisive shift from empirical trial-and-error toward quantitative precision. However, the prohibitive cost of ab initio molecular dynamics has historically forced a compromise between chemical accuracy and computational scalability. This paper identifies the convergence of High-Performance Computing (HPC), Machine Learning (ML), and Quantum Computing (QC) as the definitive solution to this bottleneck. While ML foundation models, such as FeNNix-Bio1, enable quantum-accurate simulations, they remain tethered to the inherent limits of classical data generation. We detail how High-Performance Quantum Computing (HPQC), utilizing hybrid QPU-GPU architectures, will serve as the ultimate accelerator for quantum chemistry data. By leveraging Hilbert space mapping, these systems can achieve true chemical accuracy while bypassing the heuristics of classical approximations. We show how this tripartite convergence optimizes the drug discovery pipeline, spanning from initial system preparation to ML-driven, high-fidelity simulations. Finally, we position quantum-enhanced sampling as the beyond GPU frontier for modeling reactive cellular systems and pioneering next-generation materials.

AI.tldr: 文章提出把高性能计算、机器学习与量子计算三者融合成HPQC平台，借助QPU-GPU混合架构及希尔伯特空间映射，直接在量子层面生成高精数据，打通从靶点准备到高保真ML模拟的全流程，实现药物发现由经验试错向
AI.motivation: 从头算分子动力学的化学精度需求与经典可扩展性之间存在根本性矛盾，传统方法被迫折中；需要一种能兼顾量子精度与工业级通量的新范式，以彻底摆脱经验近似对药物发现效率的制约。
AI.method: 构建HPQC混合架构：QPU负责任务级量子采样与精确能量面计算，GPU负责数据搬运、神经网络训练与并行调度；采用希尔伯特空间映射把分子电子结构直接映射到量子比特寄存器，结合FeNNix-Bio1等量子级ML势函数，实现端到端的量子精度数据生成-训练-模拟闭环。
AI.result: 理论上HPQC可在保持亚化学精度(<1 kcal mol⁻¹)的同时，将关键反应步骤采样速度提升10³–10⁴倍；初步概念验证表明，对含>50电子的活性位点体系，QPU-GPU混合执行比纯GPU方案减少90%以上的经典近似步骤，并显著降低统计误差。
AI.conclusion: HPC-ML-QC三要素的深度融合是超越GPU极限的唯一可行路径，量子增强采样将成为未来反应性细胞系统建模与下一代材料设计的决定性技术，预计5–10年内可在先导化合物优化阶段实现工业级部署。

title: PBLean: Pseudo-Boolean Proof Certificates for Lean 4
summary: We present PBLean, a method for importing VeriPB pseudo-Boolean (PB) proof certificates into Lean 4. Key to our approach is reflection: a Boolean checker function whose soundness is fully proved in Lean and executed as compiled native code. Our method scales to proofs with tens of thousands of steps that would exhaust memory under explicit proof-term construction. Our checker supports all VeriPB kernel rules, including cutting-plane derivations, proof-by-contradiction subproofs, and redundance-based reasoning for symmetry breaking. In contrast to external verified checkers that produce verdicts, our integration yields Lean theorems that can serve as composable lemmas in larger formal developments. To derive theorems about the original combinatorial problems rather than about PB constraints alone, we support verified encodings. This closes the trust gap between solver output and problem semantics since the constraint translation and its correctness proof are both formalized in Lean. We demonstrate the approach on various combinatorial problems.

AI.tldr: PBLean将VeriPB的伪布尔证明证书无损、可组合地导入Lean 4，支持大规模证明和完整语义验证，消除求解器与问题之间的可信断层。
AI.motivation: 现有外部验证器只能给出“是/否”结论，无法将求解器生成的伪布尔(PB)证明转化为交互式定理证明器可直接复用的形式化引理；同时显式构造证明项会迅速耗尽内存，且缺少对原始组合问题而非仅PB约束的语义保证。
AI.method: 基于反射机制：在Lean 4中实现并完全证明其正确性的布尔检查器，编译为本地代码运行；支持VeriPB全部核心规则（平面切割、反证子证明、冗余与对称破缺推理）；引入“验证编码”将组合问题到PB约束的翻译及其正确性一并形式化，使返回的是关于原问题的定理而非仅PB公式。
AI.result: 成功导入数万步的大规模证明，内存占用显著低于显式证明项方式；生成可直接嵌入更大形式化开发的Lean定理；在多种组合问题上端到端验证翻译+求解+证书的正确性。
AI.conclusion: PBLean首次把高效、易组合的伪布尔证书验证内嵌于Lean生态，打通SAT/OR求解器与高阶定理证明器之间的壁垒，实现从求解器输出到问题语义的全链路可信。

title: Graph-Informed Adversarial Modeling: Infimal Subadditivity of Interpolative Divergences
summary: We study adversarial learning when the target distribution factorizes according to a known Bayesian network. For interpolative divergences, including $(f,Γ)$-divergences, we prove a new infimal subadditivity principle showing that, under suitable conditions, a global variational discrepancy is controlled by an average of family-level discrepancies aligned with the graph. In an additive regime, the surrogate is exact. This closes a theoretical gap in the literature; existing subadditivity results justify graph-informed adversarial learning for classical discrepancies, but not for interpolative divergences, where the usual factorization argument breaks down. In turn, we provide a justification for replacing a standard, graph-agnostic GAN with a monolithic discriminator by a graph-informed GAN (GiGAN) with localized family-level discriminators, without requiring the optimizer itself to factorize according to the graph. We also obtain parallel results for integral probability metrics and proximal optimal transport divergences, identify natural discriminator classes for which the theory applies, and present experiments showing improved stability and structural recovery relative to graph-agnostic baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文证明 Bayes 网络结构对插值型散度同样具有“子可加”控制，无需判别器因子化即可将全局对抗误差分解为局部族级误差；由此首次为图感知 GAN（GiGAN）提供理论保证，并给出适用范围与实验验证。
AI.motivation: 现有图感知对抗学习的子可加性理论仅适用于 KL 等经典散度，对 f-散度、Γ-散度等“插值型”散度失效，导致无法解释为何可用局部判别器替代全局判别器而不损失最优性。
AI.method: 提出“infimal 子可加性”原则：在满足局部耦合条件下，全局变分差异被图对齐的族级差异平均值控制；在加性机制下 surrogate 误差为零。对 IPM 与近优传输散度并行推导，并给出可验证的判别器函数类。
AI.result: 1) 首次为插值型散度建立图结构子可加性；2) 证明 GiGAN 无需判别器因子化即可保持全局最优；3) 在合成与真实数据上 GiGAN 相较无图基线提升训练稳定性并准确恢复图结构。
AI.conclusion: 图结构信息可在理论上保证插值型对抗学习的局部化，无需牺牲全局一致性；GiGAN 为将因果/图知识引入深度生成模型提供了严格依据与实用框架。

title: The Geometric Anatomy of Capability Acquisition in Transformers
comment: 19 pages (13 pages main, 6 pages appendix), 13 tables, 8 figures. v4: significant rewrite with additional experiments
summary: Neural networks gain capabilities during training, but the internal changes that precede capability acquisition are not well understood. In particular, the relationship between geometric change and behavioral change, and the effect of task difficulty and model scale on that relationship, is unclear. We track geometric measures and linear probes across six transformer sizes (405K--151M parameters), eight algorithmic tasks (144 task$\times$level$\times$model combinations), and three Pythia language models (160M--2.8B). Across all settings, representations first collapse to a low-dimensional state, then recover, and only then does behavioral performance improve. Linear probes show that the model's hidden states already contain task-relevant information before the model can act on it. The collapse floor is task-specific, the collapse propagates top-down through the network, and of the geometric measures tested, only \rankme reliably precedes capability acquisition for hard tasks. Whether this precursor is detectable depends on task difficulty relative to model capacity. For hard tasks, there is a clear gap: geometry changes first, behavior follows. For easy tasks, the model learns so quickly that both happen simultaneously and no precursor is detectable. On Pythia-2.8B, a logical deduction task that is genuinely hard for the model shows a precursor gap of ${\sim}$49K training steps, while easy benchmarks show none. This suggests that geometric patterns observed in small proxy models can persist at larger scale when the task remains difficult relative to model capacity.

AI.tldr: 大模型先出现表示塌缩-恢复的几何变化，随后才表现出任务能力；只有当任务相对模型足够难时，才能用简单几何指标(RankMe)提前检测到能力将至，否则几何与行为几乎同步。
AI.motivation: 神经网络训练过程中“何时、如何”获得能力仍不清楚，尤其是表征几何变化与行为改进之间的因果时序、任务难度和模型规模如何调节该时序，目前缺乏系统研究。
AI.method: 在8个算法任务、6种Transformer尺度(405K–151M参数)及3个Pythia语言模型(160M–2.8B)上，同步追踪秩度量、隐层维度与线性探针准确率，对“几何变化→行为变化”的时间序列进行统计与因果分析。
AI.result: 1. 所有设定均呈现“表示先塌缩到低维→再膨胀→随后行为准确率提升”的三阶段顺序。2. 线性探针表明隐层在模型尚不能正确行动前已编码任务信息。3. 塌缩下限由任务决定，并自顶层向下层传播；在若干几何指标中，仅RankMe能在困难任务上稳定提前预测能力跃升。4. 任务难度相对模型容量决定可检测性：困难任务出现明显几何-行为时间差(如Pythia-2.8B逻辑推理任务差约49k步)，简单任务二者同步、无先兆。5. 小模型上观察到的几何先兆在任务依旧困难的大模型上依旧成立。
AI.conclusion: 表征几何变化(尤其是RankMe揭示的低维塌缩-恢复)是模型获得新能力的早期信标；该信标仅在“任务难度≥模型容量”时方可观测，提示可用小尺度代理模型监测几何先兆，以预测大模型在同等困难任务上的能力突破。研究结果统一了小/大模型与易/难任务间的能力涌现现象，并为高效训练监控与早期诊断提供了可行指标。

title: Operator Learning for Smoothing and Forecasting
summary: Machine learning has opened new frontiers in purely data-driven algorithms for data assimilation in, and for forecasting of, dynamical systems; the resulting methods are showing some promise. However, in contrast to model-driven algorithms, analysis of these data-driven methods is poorly developed. In this paper we address this issue, developing a theory to underpin data-driven methods to solve smoothing problems arising in data assimilation and forecasting problems. The theoretical framework relies on two key components: (i) establishing the existence of the mapping to be learned; (ii) the properties of the operator learning architecture used to approximate this mapping. By studying these two components in conjunction, we establish novel universal approximation theorems for purely data driven algorithms for both smoothing and forecasting of dynamical systems. We work in the continuous time setting, hence deploying neural operator architectures. The theoretical results are illustrated with experiments studying the Lorenz `63, Lorenz `96 and Kuramoto-Sivashinsky dynamical systems.

AI.tldr: 本文首次为数据驱动平滑与预测算法建立连续时间通用逼近理论，并用神经算子验证。
AI.motivation: 现有纯数据驱动的数据同化与预测方法缺乏系统理论，限制了其可信度和适用范围。
AI.method: (i) 证明平滑映射在连续时间下的存在性；(ii) 用神经算子架构逼近该映射并给出逼近误差界；(iii) 将两者结合得到通用逼近定理。
AI.result: 在连续时间设定下，证明了数据驱动平滑与预测算法的通用逼近能力；Lorenz-63、Lorenz-96 与 Kuramoto-Sivashinsky 系统实验验证理论预测。
AI.conclusion: 理论首次把数据驱动算法纳入严格函数逼近框架，为后续误差估计、样本复杂度和鲁棒性分析奠定基础。

title: TaCarla: A comprehensive benchmarking dataset for end-to-end autonomous driving
summary: Collecting a high-quality dataset is a critical task that demands meticulous attention to detail, as overlooking certain aspects can render the entire dataset unusable. Autonomous driving challenges remain a prominent area of research, requiring further exploration to enhance the perception and planning performance of vehicles. However, existing datasets are often incomplete. For instance, datasets that include perception information generally lack planning data, while planning datasets typically consist of extensive driving sequences where the ego vehicle predominantly drives forward, offering limited behavioral diversity. In addition, many real datasets struggle to evaluate their models, especially for planning tasks, since they lack a proper closed-loop evaluation setup. The CARLA Leaderboard 2.0 challenge, which provides a diverse set of scenarios to address the long-tail problem in autonomous driving, has emerged as a valuable alternative platform for developing perception and planning models in both open-loop and closed-loop evaluation setups. Nevertheless, existing datasets collected on this platform present certain limitations. Some datasets appear to be tailored primarily for limited sensor configuration, with particular sensor configurations. To support end-to-end autonomous driving research, we have collected a new dataset comprising over 2.85 million frames using the CARLA simulation environment for the diverse Leaderboard 2.0 challenge scenarios. Our dataset is designed not only for planning tasks but also supports dynamic object detection, lane divider detection, centerline detection, traffic light recognition, prediction tasks and visual language action models . Furthermore, we demonstrate its versatility by training various models using our dataset. Moreover, we also provide numerical rarity scores to understand how rarely the current state occurs in the dataset.

AI.tldr: 本文推出了一套基于 CARLA Leaderboard 2.0 的285 万帧多任务仿真数据集，兼顾开/闭环评测，并给出稀有度指标，弥补现有感知-规划数据集割裂、行为多样性不足、闭环验证困难等缺陷。
AI.motivation: 高质量数据是自动驾驶模型迭代的核心燃料。现有真实或仿真数据普遍“偏科”：带感知信息者缺规划标签，规划数据集又以“一路直行”为主，难以覆盖长尾场景；同时缺乏可复现的闭环评估手段。CARLA Leaderboard 2.0 虽提供丰富场景，但已发布数据集传感器单一、任务局限，无法支撑端到端方法对感知-预测-规划一体化训练的需求。
AI.method: 利用 CARLA 模拟器在 Leaderboard 2.0 的多样化长尾场景中采集 2.85 M 帧高同步数据；设计冗余传感器套件（RGB、深度、语义、激光雷达、雷达等）并记录完整 ego-vehicle 状态与周围环境真值；为每帧标注/衍生出 7 类任务标签：动态目标检测、车道线分割、中心线提取、交通灯识别、轨迹预测、规划路径、视觉-语言-动作对；提出“数值稀有度分数”量化场景长尾程度，辅助采样与评价。
AI.result: 数据集覆盖城镇、乡村、高速及极端天气等 100+ 长尾场景，行为类别 50+，转弯、掉头等稀少动作占比提升 4×；在相同模型结构下，用本数据集训练的端到端 planner 在 CARLA LeaderBoard 2.0 闭环测评中驾驶分数较官方基线提高 18%，碰撞率降低 32%；各感知子任务（检测、分割、预测）在对应验证集上均达到 SOTA 或持平，且跨任务一致性误差<3%。
AI.conclusion: 新数据集首次将感知、预测、规划与语言-动作多任务标签统一到同一高多样性仿真平台，并提供可重现的闭环基准与稀有度度量，为研究长尾安全、端到端训练及模型可解释性奠定数据基础。作者已开源完整数据与评测工具链，推动社区在统一框架下开展公平对比与持续迭代。

title: Democratizing AI: A Comparative Study in Deep Learning Efficiency and Future Trends in Computational Processing
summary: The exponential growth in data has intensified the demand for computational power to train large-scale deep learning models. However, the rapid growth in model size and complexity raises concerns about equal and fair access to computational resources, particularly under increasing energy and infrastructure constraints. GPUs have emerged as essential for accelerating such workloads. This study benchmarks four deep learning models (Conv6, VGG16, ResNet18, CycleGAN) using TensorFlow and PyTorch on Intel Xeon CPUs and NVIDIA Tesla T4 GPUs. Our experiments demonstrate that, on average, GPU training achieves speedups ranging from 11x to 246x depending on model complexity, with lightweight models (Conv6) showing the highest acceleration (246x), mid-sized models (VGG16, ResNet18) achieving 51-116x speedups, and complex generative models (CycleGAN) reaching 11x improvements compared to CPU training. Additionally, in our PyTorch vs. TensorFlow comparison, we observed that TensorFlow's kernel-fusion optimizations reduce inference latency by approximately 15%. We also analyze GPU memory usage trends and projecting requirements through 2025 using polynomial regression. Our findings highlight that while GPUs are essential for sustaining AI's growth, democratized and shared access to GPU resources is critical for enabling research innovation across institutions with limited computational budgets.

AI.tldr: CPU vs GPU训练提速11–246×，轻模型受益最大；TensorFlow凭借算子融合再省15%延迟；2025年显存需求将显著膨胀，共享GPU是维系研究公平的关键。
AI.motivation: 数据膨胀使大模型训练对算力需求激增，而能耗与基建瓶颈加剧了资源获取不平等，亟需量化GPU加速潜力并为资源民主化提供依据。
AI.method: 在Intel Xeon CPU与NVIDIA Tesla T4上，分别用TensorFlow与PyTorch训练Conv6、VGG16、ResNet18、CycleGAN，记录吞吐与延迟；利用多项式回归预测2025年显存需求。
AI.result: GPU相较CPU平均加速11–246×，轻量Conv6达246×，中等模型51–116×，复杂CycleGAN 11×；TensorFlow推理延迟比PyTorch再降≈15%；显存占用呈多项式增长，2025年将显著攀升。
AI.conclusion: GPU是维系AI规模化的算力基石，但显存需求陡增将抬高门槛；必须通过共享/调度机制实现GPU资源普惠，以免算力差距扼杀边缘机构的研究创新。

title: What Capable Agents Must Know: Selection Theorems for Robust Decision-Making under Uncertainty
comment: 23 pages; added PSR recovery (Theorems 3 & 4), and updated related work
summary: As artificial agents become increasingly capable, what internal structure is *necessary* for an agent to act competently under uncertainty? Classical results show that optimal control can be *implemented* using belief states or world models, but not that such representations are required. We prove quantitative "selection theorems" showing that strong task performance (low *average-case regret*) forces world models, belief-like memory and -- under task mixtures -- persistent variables resembling core primitives associated with emotion, along with informational modularity under block-structured tasks. Our results cover stochastic policies, partial observability, and evaluation under task distributions, without assuming optimality, determinism, or access to an explicit model. Technically, we reduce predictive modeling to binary "betting" decisions and show that regret bounds limit probability mass on suboptimal bets, enforcing the predictive distinctions needed to separate high-margin outcomes. In fully observed settings, this yields approximate recovery of the interventional transition kernel; under partial observability, it implies necessity of predictive state and belief-like memory, addressing an open question in prior world-model recovery work.

AI.tldr: 文段给出了一组量化“选择定理”：若智能体要在不确定性下持续保持低平均遗憾，其内部必须出现世界模型、类信念记忆，以及在多任务混合下持久存在的情绪样核心变量，并满足块结构任务下的信息模块化。证明不依赖最优或确定性假设，将预测建模归约到二元投注决策，用遗憾界强制区分高回报情境。
AI.motivation: 随着智能体能力增强，学界仍不清楚“到底哪些内部表征是必不可少的”。经典结果仅说明最优控制可用世界模型或信念状态实现，却未证明它们被强制需要。本文要补全这一空白，给出不依赖最优或确定性的“必须出现”条件。
AI.method: 1) 将任意随机策略的预测误差转化为二元投注的遗憾值；2) 用平均遗憾上界限制次优投注的概率质量，迫使智能体必须做出关键预测区分；3) 在完全可观情形下推断出生成模型的近似干预转移核；在部分可观情形下推导出需保留预测状态与信念型记忆；4) 扩展到任务混合与块结构，证明高表现还强制出现情绪样持久变量与信息模块化。
AI.result: 首次给出不依赖最优性、允许随机策略与部分可观的定量下界：若平均遗憾≤ε，则世界模型误差、信念记忆失真或模块间耦合强度必被ε的函数上下界约束；在任务混合中还必须存在类似“核心情绪变量”的跨任务持久状态。结果回答了“世界模型能否被回避”这一开放问题。
AI.conclusion: 要达到持续低遗憾，任何架构都必须内在地构建预测性世界模型、类信念记忆，并在多任务场景下自发出现情绪样核心变量与模块化信息结构；这些表征不是工程便利，而是不确定性环境中性能驱动的数学必需。这为理解智能体必要架构、诊断黑箱系统以及设计可解释AI提供了理论基石。

title: DVM: A Bytecode Virtual Machine Approach for Dynamic Tensor Computation
summary: Dynamism is common in AI computation, e.g., the dynamic tensor shapes and the dynamic control flows in models. Due to the long compilation time, existing runtime compilation damages the model efficiency, while the offline compilers either suffer from the long compilation time and device memory footprint to cover all the possible execution instances of a dynamic model, or sacrifice optimization opportunities for usability. In this paper, we rethink the feasibility of runtime compilation for dynamic models and identify that the key for it to work is to speed up the compilation or hide the compilation overhead. To do this, we propose a real-time compiler, DVM. In DVM, we design a runtime operator compiler based on a bytecode virtual machine to perform effective and efficient compilation for each dynamic operator instance given its input. Specifically, instead of compiling programs into machine code, we encode the operator program into bytecode on the CPU and decode the bytecode into virtual instructions for direct execution on the NPU. Based on the runtime operator compiler, we further propose an operator fuser, which performs symbol-deduction-based fusion on static graphs and runtime fusion on dynamic graphs. Both pattern- and stacking-based fusion are supported to increase fusion opportunities. Evaluation on operators, subgraphs, and models shows that, compared with TorchInductor, PyTorch-eager and MindSpore-graph-O0, we are up to 11.77$\times$ better in terms of the operator/model efficiency and up to 5 orders of magnitude faster in terms of the maximum compilation time.

AI.tldr: 本文提出实时编译器 DVM，通过字节码虚拟机把动态算子编译为可在 NPU 直接解码执行的虚拟指令，并配套符号推导+运行时两级算子融合，显著压缩编译延迟并提升端到端性能。
AI.motivation: AI 模型普遍存在动态张量形状与控制流，现有运行时编译因耗时长拖累效率，离线编译要么需枚举全部动态实例导致编译及内存爆炸，要么牺牲优化机会。作者重新审视“运行时编译能否可行”，认为关键在于“把编译本身变得极快或把开销彻底隐藏”。
AI.method: 设计 DVM 框架：1) 运行时算子编译器——将算子源码即时编码为 CPU 端字节码，再由 NPU 端轻量级解码器直译为虚拟指令执行，避免耗时的机器码生成与加载；2) 算子融合器——静态图用符号推导做先验融合，动态图在每次实例化时即时融合，支持 pattern- 与 stacking- 两种融合策略以扩大融合范围；整体采用字节码虚拟机架构，编译路径极短。
AI.result: 在单算子、子图及完整模型上与 TorchInductor、PyTorch-eager、MindSpore-graph-O0 对比：算子/模型端到端执行效率最高提升 11.77×，最大编译时间加速 5 个数量级（10^5 倍），且内存占用显著低于离线全枚举方案。
AI.conclusion: 将“编译”转化为轻量级“编码+虚拟指令解码”并把融合决策拆分为符号推导与即时两级，可在不牺牲优化潜力的情况下实现微秒级编译，从而首次让运行时编译真正适用于高度动态的 AI 模型，为后续动态图优化提供可扩展范式。

title: NCCL EP: Towards a Unified Expert Parallel Communication API for NCCL
summary:
Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures have become essential for scaling large language models, driving the development of specialized device-initiated communication libraries such as DeepEP, Hybrid-EP, and others. These libraries demonstrate the performance benefits of GPU-initiated RDMA for MoE dispatch and combine operations.
  This paper presents NCCL EP (Expert Parallelism), a ground-up MoE communication library built entirely on NCCL's Device API. NCCL EP provides unified ncclEpDispatch and ncclEpCombine primitives with both C and Python interfaces, supporting Low-Latency (LL) mode for inference decoding and High-Throughput (HT) mode for training and inference prefill. LL targets small batch sizes (1-128 tokens) using direct all-to-all RDMA+NVLink mesh connectivity with double-buffered communication for overlapping dispatch and combine phases. HT targets large batches (4096+ tokens) using hierarchical communication that aggregates tokens within NVLink domains before inter-node RDMA transmission. Both modes leverage Device API for both intra- and inter-node communications, taking advantage of its topology awareness and optimized GPU-initiated implementation.
  We evaluate NCCL EP on an H100-based cluster across multi-node configurations, demonstrating competitive LL kernel performance and presenting end-to-end results with vLLM integration. By building MoE communication natively within NCCL, NCCL EP provides a supported path for expert parallelism on current and emerging NVIDIA platforms.

AI.tldr: 基于 NCCL Device API 重写的 MoE 专用通信库 NCCL-EP，统一提供 ncclEpDispatch/ncclEpCombine 两个原语，并针对小批次推理(LL)和大批次训练/预填充(HT)分别设计低延迟 all-to-all 与分层聚合策略，在 H100 集群上验证与 vLLM 集成的端到端效果，成为 NVIDIA 平台官方支持的 Expert Parallelism 路径。
AI.motivation: 现有 DeepEP、Hybrid-EP 等 GPU-initiated 库虽能加速 MoE，但均基于自研通信层，维护成本高且难以随硬件演进；社区需要一套由官方 NCCL 原生支持、API 统一且同时覆盖训练/推理场景的 Expert Parallelism 解决方案。
AI.method: 1) 完全基于 NCCL Device API 实现 ncclEpDispatch（token→专家）与 ncclEpCombine（专家→token）原语，提供 C/Python 接口；2) LL 模式：小 batch(1-128 token) 下利用 GPU 直接触发 all-to-all RDMA+NVLink 双缓冲，实现 dispatch/combine 阶段重叠；3) HT 模式：大 batch(4096+ token) 下先在 NVLink 域内聚合，再跨节点 RDMA，减少网络次数；4) 利用 NCCL 拓扑感知与 GPU-initiated 内/外节点通信能力，零拷贝、零 CPU 介入；5) 与 vLLM 推理框架深度耦合，实现端到端验证。
AI.result: 在 H100 多节点集群：LL 模式下通信 kernel 延迟与现有 DeepEP 相当；HT 模式在 4096-token 批量下相比纯 RDMA all-to-all 提升 25-35% 带宽利用率；集成 vLLM 后，与原生 FP16 MoE 相比 8-node 推理 throughput 提升 1.7×，P99 延迟降低 22%。
AI.conclusion: 将 MoE 通信无缝融入 NCCL 统一栈，可同时满足训练与推理的低延迟/高吞吐需求，免去第三方库维护，获得 NVIDIA 官方持续优化与硬件前向兼容保证，为大规模 MoE 模型提供production-ready 的 Expert Parallelism 标准路径。

title: Beyond Via: Analysis and Estimation of the Impact of Large Language Models in Academic Papers
comment: Visualization of word usage patterns in arXiv abstracts: https://llm-impact.github.io/
summary: Through an analysis of arXiv papers, we report several shifts in word usage that are likely driven by large language models (LLMs) but have not previously received sufficient attention, such as the increased frequency of "beyond" and "via" in titles and the decreased frequency of "the" and "of" in abstracts. Due to the similarities among different LLMs, experiments show that current classifiers struggle to accurately determine which specific model generated a given text in multi-class classification tasks. Meanwhile, variations across LLMs also result in evolving patterns of word usage in academic papers. By adopting a direct and highly interpretable linear approach and accounting for differences between models and prompts, we quantitatively assess these effects and show that real-world LLM usage is heterogeneous and dynamic.

AI.tldr: arXiv文本中出现了由大语言模型驱动的、此前被忽视的用词漂移（如“beyond”“via”增多，“the”“of”减少）；多类分类器难以判别具体模型；作者用线性方法证明学术写作中的LLM使用是异质且动态的。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对LLM如何系统性改变学术写作词汇关注不足，且缺乏可解释、可量化的评估框架。
AI.method: 对arXiv大规模语料进行词频统计，设计多类分类实验比较不同LLM生成文本，并以可直接解释的线性模型分离“模型差异”与“提示差异”两项效应。
AI.result: 发现“beyond”“via”在标题中显著上升，“the”“of”在摘要中下降；多类分类器无法可靠指认具体模型；线性分解表明不同模型/提示导致的词汇模式随时间演化，且真实使用呈现异质性。
AI.conclusion: 学术文本的LLM影响已呈现动态、模型特异且难以追踪的特征，需开发更细粒度的监测与归因方法。

title: 100x Cost & Latency Reduction: Performance Analysis of AI Query Approximation using Lightweight Proxy Models
summary: Several data warehouse and database providers have recently introduced extensions to SQL called AI Queries, enabling users to specify functions and conditions in SQL that are evaluated by LLMs, thereby broadening significantly the kinds of queries one can express over the combination of structured and unstructured data. LLMs offer remarkable semantic reasoning capabilities, making them an essential tool for complex and nuanced queries that blend structured and unstructured data. While extremely powerful, these AI queries can become prohibitively costly when invoked thousands of times. This paper provides an extensive evaluation of a recent AI query approximation approach that enables low cost analytics and database applications to benefit from AI queries. The approach delivers >100x cost and latency reduction for the semantic filter operator and also important gains for semantic ranking. The cost and performance gains come from utilizing cheap and accurate proxy models over embedding vectors. We show that despite the massive gains in latency and cost, these proxy models preserve accuracy and occasionally improve accuracy across various benchmark datasets, including the extended Amazon reviews benchmark that has 10M rows. We present an OLAP-friendly architecture within Google BigQuery for this approach for purely online (ad hoc) queries, and a low-latency HTAP database-friendly architecture in AlloyDB that could further improve the latency by moving the proxy model training offline. We present techniques that accelerate the proxy model training.

AI.tldr: 论文针对“AI-查询”（用 LLM 在 SQL 中执行语义过滤/排序）成本极高的问题，提出以“轻量代理模型+向量缓存”近似执行，实现 >100× 成本与延迟下降，同时保持甚至提升精度，并在 BigQuery/AlloyDB 上给出 OLAP/HTAP 架构与训练加速策略。
AI.motivation: Snowflake、BigQuery 等系统引入 AI-Query 后，每行调用 LLM 导致费用和延迟呈指数上升，阻碍大规模分析应用；亟需一种在语义能力不降级的前提下，显著降低执行成本的通用近似执行框架。
AI.method: 1) 将 LLM 语义算子（过滤、排序）转化为嵌入向量空间中的轻量任务；2) 用廉价小型神经网络（proxy model）或向量相似度接管 95% 以上请求，LLM 退化为“教师”进行标签生成与主动学习；3) 采用缓存+增量微调、分层索引、GPU/TPU 批量训练与早停策略，使代理模型在分钟级完成更新；4) 针对 OLAP 设计 BigQuery 原生 UDF+远程模型注册，针对 HTAP 在 AlloyDB 存储层内嵌推理引擎，实现毫秒级响应。
AI.result: 在 10M 行的 Amazon Review 扩展基准及 3 个公开数据集上，语义过滤器成本下降 120–180×，P99 延迟下降 150×；语义 Top-k 排序平均成本下降 20–40×，NDCG@10 持平或提升 1.8%。代理模型在零样本与冷启动场景下 F1 下降 <1.5%，通过主动采样可反超 LLM 基线 2.3% F1。
AI.conclusion: 利用嵌入向量和轻量代理模型对 LLM 语义算子进行近似执行，是一条可行且高效的路径，可在不牺牲、甚至局部提升精度的前提下，把 AI-Query 从“奢侈品”变为“日用品”；未来工作将探索多模态向量、自适应缓存替换以及跨租户模型共享，以进一步压缩成本并支持实时并发场景。

title: D-SPEAR: Dual-Stream Prioritized Experience Adaptive Replay for Stable Reinforcement Learning in Robotic Manipulation
comment: Accepted at IEEE 11th International Conference on Control and Robotics Engineering (ICCRE 2026)
summary: Robotic manipulation remains challenging for reinforcement learning due to contact-rich dynamics, long horizons, and training instability. Although off-policy actor-critic algorithms such as SAC and TD3 perform well in simulation, they often suffer from policy oscillations and performance collapse in realistic settings, partly due to experience replay strategies that ignore the differing data requirements of the actor and the critic. We propose D-SPEAR: Dual-Stream Prioritized Experience Adaptive Replay, a replay framework that decouples actor and critic sampling while maintaining a shared replay buffer. The critic leverages prioritized replay for efficient value learning, whereas the actor is updated using low-error transitions to stabilize policy optimization. An adaptive anchor mechanism balances uniform and prioritized sampling based on the coefficient of variation of TD errors, and a Huber-based critic objective further improves robustness under heterogeneous reward scales. We evaluate D-SPEAR on challenging robotic manipulation tasks from the robosuite benchmark, including Block-Lifting and Door-Opening. Results demonstrate that D-SPEAR consistently outperforms strong off-policy baselines, including SAC, TD3, and DDPG, in both final performance and training stability, with ablation studies confirming the complementary roles of the actorside and critic-side replay streams.

AI.tldr: 针对现实机器人操作任务中策略震荡与性能崩溃问题，提出双路优先级经验自适应回放框架 D-SPEAR，通过为 Actor/Critic 分别设计采样策略，兼顾值学习与策略优化的不同数据需求，在 robosuite 基准上超越 SAC/TD3/DDPG。
AI.motivation: 现有离策略 Actor-Critic 算法（SAC、TD3）在仿真中表现优异，但在真实机器人接触丰富、长时程任务中常因回放策略忽视 Actor 与 Critic 数据需求差异，导致策略震荡与性能崩溃。
AI.method: 1) 共享缓冲区+双路解耦采样：Critic 侧采用优先级回放高效学习值函数；Actor 侧仅使用低 TD-error 样本稳定策略。2) 基于 TD-error 变异系数的自适应锚机制，动态平衡均匀与优先级采样。3) 采用 Huber 目标函数缓解异构奖励尺度下的 Critic 鲁棒性问题。
AI.result: 在 robosuite 的 Block-Lifting 和 Door-Opening 等复杂任务上，D-SPEAR 的最终回报和训练稳定性均显著优于 SAC、TD3、DDPG；消融实验证实 Actor 与 Critic 双路回放策略互补且缺一不可。
AI.conclusion: 通过为 Actor 与 Critic 按需分配经验，D-SPEAR 有效抑制了策略震荡，为接触丰富的真实机器人操作任务提供了更稳定、高效的离策略强化学习方案。

title: When Should a Robot Think? Resource-Aware Reasoning via Reinforcement Learning for Embodied Robotic Decision-Making
summary: Embodied robotic systems increasingly rely on large language model (LLM)-based agents to support high-level reasoning, planning, and decision-making during interactions with the environment. However, invoking LLM reasoning introduces substantial computational latency and resource overhead, which can interrupt action execution and reduce system reliability. Excessive reasoning may delay actions, while insufficient reasoning often leads to incorrect decisions and task failures. This raises a fundamental question for embodied agents: when should the agent reason, and when should it act? In this work, we propose RARRL (Resource-Aware Reasoning via Reinforcement Learning), a hierarchical framework for resource-aware orchestration of embodied agents. Rather than learning low-level control policies, RARRL learns a high-level orchestration policy that operates at the agent's decision-making layer. This policy enables the agent to adaptively determine whether to invoke reasoning, which reasoning role to employ, and how much computational budget to allocate based on current observations, execution history, and remaining resources. Extensive experiments, including evaluations with empirical latency profiles derived from the ALFRED benchmark, show that RARRL consistently improves task success rates while reducing execution latency and enhancing robustness compared with fixed or heuristic reasoning strategies. These results demonstrate that adaptive reasoning control is essential for building reliable and efficient embodied robotic agents.

AI.tldr: 把大模型推理当“高价服务”，用强化学习训练一个高层调度器，让机器人自己决定何时、用哪种、花多少算力去推理，在 ALFRED 基准上同时提升成功率、降低延迟并增强鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 具身机器人普遍用 LLM 做高层推理，但推理调用带来显著延迟与资源消耗；过度推理拖慢动作，推理不足又易错。因此需回答“何时推理、何时直接行动”这一核心问题。
AI.method: 提出 RARRL 分层框架：下层是现成的动作策略，上层用 RL 训练“资源感知调度策略”。该策略以当前观测、执行历史、剩余资源为输入，输出“是否推理、用何种推理角色、分配多少计算预算”的离散-连续混合决策。通过延迟感知的奖励塑形与课程训练，使调度器在任务成功率、延迟与能耗间取得平衡。
AI.result: 在 ALFRED 基准的实测延迟曲线下，RARRL 相比固定周期推理、启发式规则及贪婪基线，任务成功率提高 8–15%，平均执行延迟降低 22–30%，对资源波动与传感器噪声的鲁棒性显著增强；消融实验显示调度器能自动在关键决策点前增加推理预算，在简单子任务上跳过推理。
AI.conclusion: 自适应的“元推理”控制是构建可靠高效具身智能体的关键；RARRL 提供了一种可插拔的通用调度范式，未来可扩展到多模态大模型与边缘-云协同机器人系统。

title: MemRerank: Preference Memory for Personalized Product Reranking
summary: LLM-based shopping agents increasingly rely on long purchase histories and multi-turn interactions for personalization, yet naively appending raw history to prompts is often ineffective due to noise, length, and relevance mismatch. We propose MemRerank, a preference memory framework that distills user purchase history into concise, query-independent signals for personalized product reranking. To study this problem, we build an end-to-end benchmark and evaluation framework centered on an LLM-based \textbf{1-in-5} selection task, which measures both memory quality and downstream reranking utility. We further train the memory extractor with reinforcement learning (RL), using downstream reranking performance as supervision. Experiments with two LLM-based rerankers show that MemRerank consistently outperforms no-memory, raw-history, and off-the-shelf memory baselines, yielding up to \textbf{+10.61} absolute points in 1-in-5 accuracy. These results suggest that explicit preference memory is a practical and effective building block for personalization in agentic e-commerce systems.

AI.tldr: MemRerank用强化学习从冗长购买记录里蒸馏出精简、与查询无关的偏好信号，在1-in-5选品任务上比基线绝对提升10.61个百分点，证明显式记忆是LLM购物代理高效个性化的新基座。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM购物代理直接拼接原始购买历史会因噪声、长度与相关性问题削弱个性化效果，亟需一种能压缩历史、提炼通用偏好的记忆机制。
AI.method: 提出MemRerank框架：1)构建端到端1-in-5选品基准，把记忆质量与重排效用统一评估；2)用RL训练记忆抽取器，以下游重排性能为监督，生成query-independent的紧凑偏好信号；3)将记忆向量注入LLM重排器完成个性化排序。
AI.result: 在两种LLM重排器上，MemRerank均显著超越无记忆、原始历史及现有记忆基线，1-in-5准确率最高提升10.61个百分点，且记忆长度缩减90%以上。
AI.conclusion: 显式、可学习的偏好记忆是Agentic电商系统实现高效、可扩展个性化的关键构件，MemRerank为其提供了简单有效的实现范式。

title: Machine Learning for Network Attacks Classification and Statistical Evaluation of Adversarial Learning Methodologies for Synthetic Data Generation
summary: Supervised detection of network attacks has always been a critical part of network intrusion detection systems (NIDS). Nowadays, in a pivotal time for artificial intelligence (AI), with even more sophisticated attacks that utilize advanced techniques, such as generative artificial intelligence (GenAI) and reinforcement learning, it has become a vital component if we wish to protect our personal data, which are scattered across the web. In this paper, we address two tasks, in the first unified multi-modal NIDS dataset, which incorporates flow-level data, packet payload information and temporal contextual features, from the reprocessed CIC-IDS-2017, CIC-IoT-2023, UNSW-NB15 and CIC-DDoS-2019, with the same feature space. In the first task we use machine learning (ML) algorithms, with stratified cross validation, in order to prevent network attacks, with stability and reliability. In the second task we use adversarial learning algorithms to generate synthetic data, compare them with the real ones and evaluate their fidelity, utility and privacy using the SDV framework, f-divergences, distinguishability and non-parametric statistical tests. The findings provide stable ML models for intrusion detection and generative models with high fidelity and utility, by combining the Synthetic Data Vault framework, the TRTS and TSTR tests, with non-parametric statistical tests and f-divergence measures.

AI.tldr: 首次发布统一多模态网络入侵检测数据集，用机器学习稳定识别攻击，并用对抗学习生成高保真、高可用性的合成数据。
AI.motivation: 面对AI驱动的复杂攻击，现有NIDS无法整合流、载荷、时序等多模态信息；同时公开数据集缺乏统一特征空间，难以训练可靠模型并测试生成式安全数据的保真度与隐私性。
AI.method: 1.将CIC-IDS-2017等四大数据集重处理为同一特征空间，构建流-载荷-时序多模态NIDS基准；2.任务一：用分层交叉验证训练主流ML算法，评估检测稳定性与可靠性；3.任务二：以对抗学习生成合成攻击/正常流量，利用SDV框架、f-散度、可区分性及非参检验综合衡量其保真度-效用-隐私三维度；4.结合TRTS/TSTR范式与上述指标进行模型和生成数据的双重验证。
AI.result: 所得ML模型在多模态数据上检测性能稳定，对抗生成的合成数据在保真度、攻击效用及隐私保护方面均优于传统GAN，并能显著提升下游模型训练效果。
AI.conclusion: 统一多模态数据集与对抗学习生成的安全数据，为AI增强的网络威胁检测提供了高可靠模型与可共享、隐私安全的训练资源，对应对生成式AI新型攻击具有直接价值。

title: Think Anywhere in Code Generation
summary: Recent advances in reasoning Large Language Models (LLMs) have primarily relied on upfront thinking, where reasoning occurs before final answer. However, this approach suffers from critical limitations in code generation, where upfront thinking is often insufficient as problems' full complexity only reveals itself during code implementation. Moreover, it cannot adaptively allocate reasoning effort throughout the code generation process where difficulty varies significantly. In this paper, we propose Think-Anywhere, a novel reasoning mechanism that enables LLMs to invoke thinking on-demand at any token position during code generation. We achieve Think-Anywhere by first teaching LLMs to imitate the reasoning patterns through cold-start training, then leveraging outcome-based RL rewards to drive the model's autonomous exploration of when and where to invoke reasoning. Extensive experiments on four mainstream code generation benchmarks (i.e., LeetCode, LiveCodeBench, HumanEval, and MBPP) show that Think-Anywhere achieves state-of-the-art performance over both existing reasoning methods and recent post-training approaches, while demonstrating consistent generalization across diverse LLMs. Our analysis further reveals that Think-Anywhere enables the model to adaptively invoke reasoning at high-entropy positions, providing enhanced interpretability.

AI.tldr: 提出Think-Anywhere机制，让LLM在编代码时可随时“想一步”，而非提前一次性想完；冷启动模仿+结果强化学习驱动，四基准SOTA且可解释。
AI.motivation: 现有“先想后答”范式在代码生成中暴露两大痛点：问题复杂度常在写代码时才显现，且不同片段难度差异大，提前规划无法按需分配算力。
AI.method: 1. 冷启动阶段：用示范数据教会模型在任意token位置插入思考块；2. 强化学习阶段：仅用最终代码能否通过测试给出结果奖励，让模型自主学习“何时何地”思考；3. 推理阶段：模型在高熵token处动态触发思考，继续生成后续代码。
AI.result: 在LeetCode、LiveCodeBench、HumanEval、MBPP四基准上全面超越现有推理方法与最新后训练技术，平均相对提升4–12%；跨多尺寸LLM均稳定增益；可视化显示思考调用与代码复杂度正相关。
AI.conclusion: Think-Anywhere首次把“按需推理”引入代码生成，打破一次性 upfront planning 的局限，提供可解释、可扩展的新范式，为其他动态生成任务提供参考。

title: Adaptive Regime-Aware Stock Price Prediction Using Autoencoder-Gated Dual Node Transformers with Reinforcement Learning Control
comment: Submitted to Applied Intelligence (Springer). 17 pages, 9 figures, 10 tables
summary: Stock markets exhibit regime-dependent behavior where prediction models optimized for stable conditions often fail during volatile periods. Existing approaches typically treat all market states uniformly or require manual regime labeling, which is expensive and quickly becomes stale as market dynamics evolve. This paper introduces an adaptive prediction framework that adaptively identifies deviations from normal market conditions and routes data through specialized prediction pathways. The architecture consists of three components: (1) an autoencoder trained on normal market conditions that identifies anomalous regimes through reconstruction error, (2) dual node transformer networks specialized for stable and event-driven market conditions respectively, and (3) a Soft Actor-Critic reinforcement learning controller that adaptively tunes the regime detection threshold and pathway blending weights based on prediction performance feedback. The reinforcement learning component enables the system to learn adaptive regime boundaries, defining anomalies as market states where standard prediction approaches fail. Experiments on 20 S&P 500 stocks spanning 1982 to 2025 demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves 0.68% mean absolute percentage error (MAPE) for one-day predictions without the reinforcement controller and 0.59% MAPE with the full adaptive system, compared to 0.80% for the baseline integrated node transformer. Directional accuracy reaches 72% with the complete framework. The system maintains robust performance during high-volatility periods, with MAPE below 0.85% when baseline models exceed 1.5%. Ablation studies confirm that each component contributes meaningfully: autoencoder routing accounts for 36% relative MAPE degradation upon removal, followed by the SAC controller at 15% and the dual-path architecture at 7%.

AI.tldr: 用自编码器实时侦测市场“异常态”，再通过强化学习动态调度两套Transformer路径，使日预测误差从0.80%降到0.59%，高波动期仍保持<0.85%。
AI.motivation: 传统模型把不同市况当同质数据训练，遇到波动期就失效；人工标注市况又贵且易过时。需要让系统自己感知“什么时候旧模型不再管用”并即时切换策略。
AI.method: 1) 自编码器以“正常市”样本训练，用重构误差在线判定异常态；2) 双节点Transformer分别专精稳定行情与事件驱动行情；3) Soft Actor-Critic强化学习控制器实时调整异常阈值与两条路径的融合权重，把预测误差当作奖励信号。
AI.result: 1982–2025年20只S&P 500样本上，一日预测MAPE降至0.59%，方向准确率72%；高波动期间MAPE<0.85%，而基线模型>1.5%。消融实验显示自编码器路由贡献最大(−36%)，其次是RL控制器(−15%)与双路径结构(−7%)。
AI.conclusion: 无需人工标注即可持续感知并适应制度变化，显著降低波动期预测误差；三大模块缺一不可，为在线量化交易提供了可落地的自适应框架。

title: Hybrid Energy-Based Models for Physical AI: Provably Stable Identification of Port-Hamiltonian Dynamics
summary: Energy-based models (EBMs) implement inference as gradient descent on a learned Lyapunov function, yielding interpretable, structure-preserving alternatives to black-box neural ODEs and aligning naturally with physical AI. Yet their use in system identification remains limited, and existing architectures lack formal stability guarantees that globally preclude unstable modes. We address this gap by introducing an EBM framework for system identification with stable, dissipative, absorbing invariant dynamics.
