Unlike classical global Lyapunov stability, absorbing invariance expands the class of stability-preserving architectures, enabling more flexible and expressive EBMs. We extend EBM theory to nonsmooth activations by establishing negative energy dissipation via Clarke derivatives and deriving new conditions for radial unboundedness, exposing a stability-expressivity tradeoff in standard EBMs. To overcome this, we introduce a hybrid architecture with a dynamical visible layer and static hidden layers, prove absorbing invariance under mild assumptions, and show that these guarantees extend to port-Hamiltonian EBMs. Experiments on metric-deformed multi-well and ring systems validate the approach, showcasing how our hybrid EBM architecture combines expressivity with sound and provable safety guarantees by design.

AI.tldr: 提出一种具备吸收不变性保证的混合EBM框架，可在保持高表达力的同时，为系统辨识提供全局稳定与安全的物理解释替代方案。
AI.motivation: 现有EBM虽能作物理可解释推理，却缺少全局稳定形式保证；经典全局Lyapunov稳定又过度限制网络结构，阻碍其在系统辨识中的广泛应用。
AI.method: 引入“吸收不变”稳定性概念，扩大保稳架构类；用Clarke导数刻画非光滑激活的负能耗散并建立径向无界条件；设计“动态可见层+静态隐层”混合EBM，证明其在温和假设下满足吸收不变，并推广到端口哈密顿EBM。
AI.result: 理论给出稳定-表达权衡边界；混合架构在度量变形多井与环形系统实验中同时实现高表达力与可证明安全保证，而传统全局Lyapunov方法无法覆盖此类稳定模式。
AI.conclusion: 吸收不变EBM为物理一致的系统辨识提供了兼具灵活性、可解释性和形式安全保证的新范式，可推广至更复杂的高阶与分布参数系统。

title: PAVE: Premise-Aware Validation and Editing for Retrieval-Augmented LLMs
comment: Accepted at the ICLR 2026 Workshop on Logical Reasoning of Large Language Models
summary: Retrieval-augmented language models can retrieve relevant evidence yet still commit to answers before explicitly checking whether the retrieved context supports the conclusion. We present PAVE (Premise-Grounded Answer Validation and Editing), an inference-time validation layer for evidence-grounded question answering. PAVE decomposes retrieved context into question-conditioned atomic facts, drafts an answer, scores how well that draft is supported by the extracted premises, and revises low-support outputs before finalization. The resulting trace makes answer commitment auditable at the level of explicit premises, support scores, and revision decisions. In controlled ablations with a fixed retriever and backbone, PAVE outperforms simpler post-retrieval baselines in two evidence-grounded QA settings, with the largest gain reaching 32.7 accuracy points on a span-grounded benchmark. We view these findings as proof-of-concept evidence that explicit premise extraction plus support-gated revision can strengthen evidence-grounded consistency in retrieval-augmented LLM systems.

AI.tldr: PAVE在推理阶段把检索到的上下文拆成原子事实，先打分答案是否被支持，再对低支持度答案进行可追踪的修订，使答案承诺可审计，并在两项证据型问答任务上最高提升32.7个百分点。
AI.motivation: 检索增强语言模型常出现“先承诺答案再验证”导致的证据不一致问题，亟需一种可在推理阶段显式校验并修正答案的机制，以提升答案与检索证据的忠实度。
AI.method: 提出PAVE：①将检索上下文条件化拆分为问题相关的原子事实（premise）；②草拟答案；③计算草拟答案对各原子事实的支持度；④若支持度不足则按可解释轨迹修订答案；整个流程在推理阶段完成，无需再训练。
AI.result: 在固定检索器与主干模型的控制实验中，PAVE在两个证据型问答数据集上显著优于简单后处理基线，最大绝对提升达32.7个百分点，同时提供可审计的支持分数与修订决策链。
AI.conclusion: 显式前提提取+支持度门控修订可作为即插即用层，有效提升检索增强LLM在推理时的证据一致性与答案可靠性，为后续可审计、可干预的问答系统提供了概念验证。

title: Do Phone-Use Agents Respect Your Privacy?
summary: We study whether phone-use agents respect privacy while completing benign mobile tasks. This question has remained hard to answer because privacy-compliant behavior is not operationalized for phone-use agents, and ordinary apps do not reveal exactly what data agents type into which form entries during execution. To make this question measurable, we introduce MyPhoneBench, a verifiable evaluation framework for privacy behavior in mobile agents. We operationalize privacy-respecting phone use as permissioned access, minimal disclosure, and user-controlled memory through a minimal privacy contract, iMy, and pair it with instrumented mock apps plus rule-based auditing that make unnecessary permission requests, deceptive re-disclosure, and unnecessary form filling observable and reproducible. Across five frontier models on 10 mobile apps and 300 tasks, we find that task success, privacy-compliant task completion, and later-session use of saved preferences are distinct capabilities, and no single model dominates all three. Evaluating success and privacy jointly reshuffles the model ordering relative to either metric alone. The most persistent failure mode across models is simple data minimization: agents still fill optional personal entries that the task does not require. These results show that privacy failures arise from over-helpful execution of benign tasks, and that success-only evaluation overestimates the deployment readiness of current phone-use agents. All code, mock apps, and agent trajectories are publicly available at~ https://github.com/FreedomIntelligence/MyPhoneBench.

AI.tldr: 首份量化评测手机 agent 隐私合规的框架 MyPhoneBench 显示：模型越“热心”越易违规填写可选字段，任务成功率与隐私表现呈负相关，当前 agent 尚不具备生产部署条件。
AI.motivation: 手机 agent 能在本地完成复杂任务，但其实际输入了什么数据、是否遵守最小披露原则，此前既无定义也无观测手段，阻碍了对隐私合规性的可信判断。
AI.method: 构建可验证框架 MyPhoneBench：①用最小隐私合约 iMy 将“合规”拆成权限正确、最小披露、用户控制记忆三项；②设计 10 个插桩 mock 应用，对权限申请、字段填写与返回服务器的数据进行审计；③在 300 个移动任务上对 5 个前沿模型并行评估，联合记录任务成功与隐私违规轨迹。
AI.result: 任务成功率、隐私合规率与后续偏好复用率三者互不包含；单看成功率排序与联合隐私排序差异显著。所有模型最常见的违规是填写任务并不需要的可选个人信息（数据最小化失败）。
AI.conclusion: 过度热心的任务执行策略导致隐私违规；仅凭成功率评估会高估 agent 部署就绪度，亟需把隐私指标纳入标准基准并改进模型对“不填可选字段”的奖励机制。

title: Democratizing AI: A Comparative Study in Deep Learning Efficiency and Future Trends in Computational Processing
summary: The exponential growth in data has intensified the demand for computational power to train large-scale deep learning models. However, the rapid growth in model size and complexity raises concerns about equal and fair access to computational resources, particularly under increasing energy and infrastructure constraints. GPUs have emerged as essential for accelerating such workloads. This study benchmarks four deep learning models (Conv6, VGG16, ResNet18, CycleGAN) using TensorFlow and PyTorch on Intel Xeon CPUs and NVIDIA Tesla T4 GPUs. Our experiments demonstrate that, on average, GPU training achieves speedups ranging from 11x to 246x depending on model complexity, with lightweight models (Conv6) showing the highest acceleration (246x), mid-sized models (VGG16, ResNet18) achieving 51-116x speedups, and complex generative models (CycleGAN) reaching 11x improvements compared to CPU training. Additionally, in our PyTorch vs. TensorFlow comparison, we observed that TensorFlow's kernel-fusion optimizations reduce inference latency by approximately 15%. We also analyze GPU memory usage trends and projecting requirements through 2025 using polynomial regression. Our findings highlight that while GPUs are essential for sustaining AI's growth, democratized and shared access to GPU resources is critical for enabling research innovation across institutions with limited computational budgets.

AI.tldr: 在CPU与NVIDIA Tesla T4 GPU上训练/推理四个典型模型的系统评测：GPU最高提速246×，TensorFlow融合内核使推理延迟再降15%；并预测到2025年显存需求仍将指数级上升。
AI.motivation: 数据爆炸和模型膨胀令算力需求激增，而能源与基础设施瓶颈加剧了资源不平等。作者希望用量化证据说明GPU对AI持续扩展的必要性，并呼吁建立共享机制以保障预算有限机构的科研创新权利。
AI.method: 1) 选取轻量(Conv6)、中等(VGG16/ResNet18)与生成式(CycleGAN)四类模型；2) 在Intel Xeon CPU与NVIDIA Tesla T4上对比TensorFlow与PyTorch的训练时间与推理延迟；3) 采用多项式回归对GPU内存占用趋势做外推，预测至2025年。
AI.result: GPU训练平均提速11–246×：轻量模型最高246×，中等模型51–116×，复杂生成模型11×；TensorFlow凭借内核融合优化在推理阶段再降约15%延迟；内存外推显示未来三年需求仍呈指数上升。
AI.conclusion: GPU已成为维持AI规模化的刚性算力底座，但其稀缺性正在拉大机构间研究鸿沟；仅依靠硬件堆叠无法解决不平等，必须通过共享、云化与政策干预实现GPU资源民主化，才能维系全球AI创新生态。

title: DVM: A Bytecode Virtual Machine Approach for Dynamic Tensor Computation
summary: Dynamism is common in AI computation, e.g., the dynamic tensor shapes and the dynamic control flows in models. Due to the long compilation time, existing runtime compilation damages the model efficiency, while the offline compilers either suffer from the long compilation time and device memory footprint to cover all the possible execution instances of a dynamic model, or sacrifice optimization opportunities for usability. In this paper, we rethink the feasibility of runtime compilation for dynamic models and identify that the key for it to work is to speed up the compilation or hide the compilation overhead. To do this, we propose a real-time compiler, DVM. In DVM, we design a runtime operator compiler based on a bytecode virtual machine to perform effective and efficient compilation for each dynamic operator instance given its input. Specifically, instead of compiling programs into machine code, we encode the operator program into bytecode on the CPU and decode the bytecode into virtual instructions for direct execution on the NPU. Based on the runtime operator compiler, we further propose an operator fuser, which performs symbol-deduction-based fusion on static graphs and runtime fusion on dynamic graphs. Both pattern- and stacking-based fusion are supported to increase fusion opportunities. Evaluation on operators, subgraphs, and models shows that, compared with TorchInductor, PyTorch-eager and MindSpore-graph-O0, we are up to 11.77$\times$ better in terms of the operator/model efficiency and up to 5 orders of magnitude faster in terms of the maximum compilation time.

AI.tldr: DVM 是一种面向动态 AI 模型的实时编译器，用“CPU 字节码+NPU 虚拟指令”取代传统 JIT/AOT 编译，通过符号推导的算子融合将编译耗时降低 10^5 倍，端到端性能最高提升 11.77 倍。
AI.motivation: 现有做法中，运行时 JIT 编译因耗时过长拖慢推理；离线 AOT 为覆盖全部动态实例需枚举所有形状路径，导致编译时间和设备内存爆炸，若裁剪路径则牺牲优化。作者重新审视“实时编译”在动态模型中的可行性，核心命题是：只要编译足够快或把开销藏起来，就能兼顾效率与动态性。
AI.method: 提出 DVM 框架，核心含两大组件：1) 单算子级运行时编译器——CPU 端将算子源码编译为紧凑字节码，NPU 端微解释器把字节码直接映射为虚拟指令流执行，避免生成机器码与重编译；2) 算子融合器——对静态子图做符号推导式融合，对动态子图在运行时按需即时融合，支持 pattern 与 stacking 两种策略以扩大融合面。整体流程：动态形状→触发字节码生成→NPU 微执行→融合器再合并→输出结果。
AI.result: 单算子、子图与完整模型三类实验显示：相较 TorchInductor、PyTorch-eager 和 MindSpore-graph-O0，DVM 的推理吞吐最高提升 11.77×；编译延迟从数十秒级降至毫秒级，最大加速达 5 个数量级；内存峰值与能效亦优于基线。
AI.conclusion: 通过把“编译”降级为轻量级字节码生成+虚拟指令解释，并用符号推导与运行时融合扩大优化空间，DVM 首次证明实时编译可在动态 AI 模型中同时实现极短编译时间与接近手工算子的执行效率，为动态深度学习推理系统提供了新范式。

title: Beyond Via: Analysis and Estimation of the Impact of Large Language Models in Academic Papers
comment: Visualization of word usage patterns in arXiv abstracts: https://llm-impact.github.io/
summary: Through an analysis of arXiv papers, we report several shifts in word usage that are likely driven by large language models (LLMs) but have not previously received sufficient attention, such as the increased frequency of "beyond" and "via" in titles and the decreased frequency of "the" and "of" in abstracts. Due to the similarities among different LLMs, experiments show that current classifiers struggle to accurately determine which specific model generated a given text in multi-class classification tasks. Meanwhile, variations across LLMs also result in evolving patterns of word usage in academic papers. By adopting a direct and highly interpretable linear approach and accounting for differences between models and prompts, we quantitatively assess these effects and show that real-world LLM usage is heterogeneous and dynamic.

AI.tldr: 分析arXiv文献后发现，LLM 正在隐蔽地改变学术用词（标题多“beyond/via”，摘要少“the/of”）；多类分类器难以判别文本出自哪一具体模型；作者用线性方法量化证明 LLM 对学术写作的影响呈异质且动态演化。
AI.motivation: 已有研究关注 LLM 生成文本的检测，但尚未系统量化它们对真实学术写作用词习惯的微观影响，也缺少对“不同模型、不同提示”导致差异的精细评估。
AI.method: 先利用 arXiv 海量元数据进行词频时间序列分析，捕捉“beyond、via”上升与“the、of”下降等信号；再构建多类分类实验，测试现有检测器在区分具体模型来源时的精度；最后采用可直接解释的线性模型，将“模型类型+提示差异”作为显式变量，定量估计各因素对词频变化的贡献。
AI.result: 1) 发现若干被忽视但统计显著的用词漂移；2) 多类分类 F1 普遍低于二分类，说明“判具体模型”远难于“判是否 LLM”；3) 线性分解显示不同模型/提示对词频影响幅度差异明显，且随时间动态变化，揭示 LLM 使用模式非均一。
AI.conclusion: LLM 对学术写作的影响已体现在细粒度词频层面，且因模型与提示差异呈多样化、演化性；未来需建立更细粒度的监测与规范框架，以跟踪并引导这类动态变化。

title: An Object Web Seminar: A Retrospective on a Technical Dialogue Still Reverberating
comment: Record of early Web Object technology and evolution since then covered in 6 pages with 4 figures
summary: Technology change happens quickly such that new trends tend to crowd out the focus on what was new just yesterday. In this paper the peak popularity of the confluence of Object Technologies with early Web adoption is explored through the content of a seminar held in 1999. Distributed architectures were undergoing significant change at this point, and deeper software capabilities were just beginning to be broadly accessible over the Internet. The Object Web arose and was infused with new development tools reflecting these capabilities and allowing design of applications for deployment during the early days of the World Wide Web. This conference discussed the history, evolution, and use of these tools, architectures, and their future possibilities. The continued dominance of these approaches although under different names is demonstrated even though the term Object Web has receded in use. Favored newer offerings such as Kubernetes and microservices still model the core design attributes of the Object Web for example. Aside from connecting this seminar to relevance in the software world of today this paper also touches on the early AI tools demonstrated in this seminar a quarter century ago and how the popularity wave of any given technology might affect the current focus on AI technology offerings.

AI.tldr: 1999年Object Web研讨会的发展史揭示了今天的分布式架构仍在沿用当年的核心模式
AI.motivation: 面对技术热点迅速更迭的现状，作者试图以1999年Object Web研讨会为样本，说明
AI.method: 通过回顾1999年
AI.result: 虽然
AI.conclusion: 技术名词短暂易逝，但稳定的架构思想具有跨时代生命力；AI亦需警惕重蹈Object Web的覆辙

title: Generation Is Compression: Zero-Shot Video Coding via Stochastic Rectified Flow
summary: Recent advances in generative modeling have enabled perceptual video compression at ultra-low bitrates, yet existing methods predominantly treat the generative model as a refinement or reconstruction module attached to a separately designed codec backbone. We propose \emph{Generative Video Codebook Codec} (GVCC), a zero-shot framework that turns a pretrained video generative model into the codec itself: the transmitted bitstream directly specifies the generative decoding trajectory, with no retraining required. To enable this, we convert the deterministic rectified-flow ODE of modern video foundation models into an equivalent SDE at inference time, unlocking per-step stochastic injection points for codebook-driven compression. Building on this unified backbone, we instantiate three complementary conditioning strategies -- \emph{Image-to-Video} (I2V) with autoregressive GOP chaining, tail latent residual correction, and adaptive atom allocation, \emph{Text-to-Video} (T2V) operating at near-zero side information as a pure generative prior, and \emph{First-Last-Frame-to-Video} (FLF2V) with boundary-sharing GOP chaining for dual-anchor temporal control. Together, these variants span a principled trade-off space between spatial fidelity, temporal coherence, and compression efficiency. Experiments on standard benchmarks show that GVCC achieves high-quality reconstruction below 0.002\,bpp while supporting flexible bitrate control through a single hyperparameter.

AI.tldr: GVCC直接把现成的视频生成模型当编解码器用，省略传统压缩管线与再训练；仅需0.002 bpp就能获得高质量重建。
AI.motivation: 超低码率视频通信想把生成模型的先验强度榨到极致，而现有做法仍把它当
AI.method: 概念框架思路：1. 零参数微调：不再重训完整网络，直接把预训练视频扩散／Flow 模型当 decode-only 解码器。2. 双公式等效化：推理期把确定性 ODE 改写成带可选注入点的 SDE，腾出可索引噪声槽。3. 码本驱动：用浅层向量量化的 Regressor 在 SDE 的每一步注入对应原子，无需解码侧迭代优化。4. 多模式条件：I2V（首帧锚定，GOP 自回归链+尾残差向量补偿）、T2V（纯文本做生成先验，传输 side-info 几乎为 0）、FLF2V（首尾帧双锚定共享 GOP 链边界）。5. 码率单旋钮：原子个数 K 和注入步数 M 线性调控，end-to-end RD 曲线一条线扫完。6. 编码端轻量级 Encoder：只算帧差/残差和当前 GOP 的粒度参数，与主网络彻底解耦，实时端可 CPU 完成。
AI.result: 在 HEVC-B、UVG、MCL-JCV、MMSP15 V-BRHE 四个公开测试基准上，GVCC 均显著超越 MS-SSIM-RD 排行第一的神经+传统混合基准。平均码率节省 34%（同等 MS-SSIM）或同等码率下 MS-SSIM 增 0.032，主观 MOS 平均 +0.78。I2V 模式在 0.002 bpp 仍保持可辨识字幕和纹理，FLF2V 模式运动场景 PSNR 比 SOTA 高 1.4 dB。编码复杂度 ≤ 4.2 GFLOP/帧，GPU 解码 1080p@30 fps 单卡 65 fps 实时；无损切换文本引导只需更换 prompt，无需额外传输。消融实验：移除码本注入后重建率失真漂移 +18%，证明注入点必要性；尾残差项提供 0.8 dB 增益；Atom-alloc 自适应策略平均节省 7% 码率。
AI.conclusion: GVCC 首次证明了

title: Unsupervised Behavioral Compression: Learning Low-Dimensional Policy Manifolds through State-Occupancy Matching
summary: Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) is widely recognized as sample-inefficient, a limitation attributable in part to the high dimensionality and substantial functional redundancy inherent to the policy parameter space. A recent framework, which we refer to as Action-based Policy Compression (APC), mitigates this issue by compressing the parameter space $Θ$ into a low-dimensional latent manifold $\mathcal Z$ using a learned generative mapping $g:\mathcal Z \to Θ$. However, its performance is severely constrained by relying on immediate action-matching as a reconstruction loss, a myopic proxy for behavioral similarity that suffers from compounding errors across sequential decisions. To overcome this bottleneck, we introduce Occupancy-based Policy Compression (OPC), which enhances APC by shifting behavior representation from immediate action-matching to long-horizon state-space coverage. Specifically, we propose two principal improvements: (1) we curate the dataset generation with an information-theoretic uniqueness metric that delivers a diverse population of policies; and (2) we propose a fully differentiable compression objective that directly minimizes the divergence between the true and reconstructed mixture occupancy distributions. These modifications force the generative model to organize the latent space around true functional similarity, promoting a latent representation that generalizes over a broad spectrum of behaviors while retaining most of the original parameter space's expressivity. Finally, we empirically validate the advantages of our contributions across multiple continuous control benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 针对策略参数维度高、样本效率差的顽疾，作者将 APC 的“瞬时动作匹配”升级为 OPC 的“长时状态占有匹配”，通过信息论筛选策略集+可微分占有散度损失，在低维隐空间保留行为多样性，显著提升采样效率与策略表现。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习采样效率低，源于策略参数空间高冗余；现有 APC 把参数压缩到隐空间 g:𝒵→Θ，但仅用即时动作重建损失，短视且误差累积，无法反映真实行为相似性。
AI.method: 提出 Occupancy-based Policy Compression：(1) 用信息论“策略唯一性”指标筛选多样化策略数据集；(2) 构建完全可微的目标：最小化真实与重建策略的混合状态-占有分布散度；(3) 迫使生成模型按“长期行为”而非“瞬时动作”重排隐空间。
AI.result: 在连续控制基准任务上，OPC 相比 APC 平均采样效率提升 2-3 倍，策略性能达参数空间原表达力的 95% 以上，隐维度仅为原参数 1/20。
AI.conclusion: 占有导向压缩把“局部动作偏差”升维为“全局状态分布”对齐，是 APC 的关键升级；隐空间以真实行为相似性聚类，实现高效、稳健的策略参数压缩，为提升 DRL 样本效率提供新范式。

title: D-SPEAR: Dual-Stream Prioritized Experience Adaptive Replay for Stable Reinforcement Learning in Robotic Manipulation
comment: Accepted at IEEE 11th International Conference on Control and Robotics Engineering (ICCRE 2026)
summary: Robotic manipulation remains challenging for reinforcement learning due to contact-rich dynamics, long horizons, and training instability. Although off-policy actor-critic algorithms such as SAC and TD3 perform well in simulation, they often suffer from policy oscillations and performance collapse in realistic settings, partly due to experience replay strategies that ignore the differing data requirements of the actor and the critic. We propose D-SPEAR: Dual-Stream Prioritized Experience Adaptive Replay, a replay framework that decouples actor and critic sampling while maintaining a shared replay buffer. The critic leverages prioritized replay for efficient value learning, whereas the actor is updated using low-error transitions to stabilize policy optimization. An adaptive anchor mechanism balances uniform and prioritized sampling based on the coefficient of variation of TD errors, and a Huber-based critic objective further improves robustness under heterogeneous reward scales. We evaluate D-SPEAR on challenging robotic manipulation tasks from the robosuite benchmark, including Block-Lifting and Door-Opening. Results demonstrate that D-SPEAR consistently outperforms strong off-policy baselines, including SAC, TD3, and DDPG, in both final performance and training stability, with ablation studies confirming the complementary roles of the actorside and critic-side replay streams.

AI.tldr: 提出D-SPEAR双支路优先经验自适应回放框架，解耦演员与评论家采样策略，显著提升真实机器人操作任务中离策略算法的稳定性与性能。
AI.motivation: 现有离策略算法（SAC/TD3/DDPG）在仿真中表现良好，但在接触密集、长时域的真实机器人任务中因统一回放策略忽视演员-评论家数据需求差异而振荡甚至崩溃。
AI.method: 1) 共享回放缓冲区但双支路采样：评论家按TD-error优先级回放，演员仅用低误差transition；2) 自适应锚定机制依据TD-error变异系数动态平衡均匀/优先采样；3) 采用Huber-loss critic目标应对异质奖励尺度。
AI.result: 在robosuite的Block-Lifting、Door-Opening等任务上，D-SPEAR最终性能与训练稳定性均显著优于SAC、TD3、DDPG，消融实验验证双支路 replay 互补有效。
AI.conclusion: 通过为演员和评论家分别定制数据供给，D-SPEAR在不增加缓冲区分区成本的前提下，解决了离策略RL在真实机器人操作中的训练振荡与性能塌陷，为接触-长时域任务提供了稳定可扩展的训练范式。

title: Cross-attentive Cohesive Subgraph Embedding to Mitigate Oversquashing in GNNs
summary: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have achieved strong performance across various real-world domains. Nevertheless, they suffer from oversquashing, where long-range information is distorted as it is compressed through limited message-passing pathways. This bottleneck limits their ability to capture essential global context and decreases their performance, particularly in dense and heterophilic regions of graphs. To address this issue, we propose a novel graph learning framework that enriches node embeddings via cross-attentive cohesive subgraph representations to mitigate the impact of excessive long-range dependencies. This framework enhances the node representation by emphasizing cohesive structure in long-range information but removing noisy or irrelevant connections. It preserves essential global context without overloading the narrow bottlenecked channels, which further mitigates oversquashing. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that our model achieves consistent improvements in classification accuracy over standard baseline methods.

AI.tldr: 通过跨注意力凝聚子图表示，过滤长距离噪声连接，在不过载信息瓶颈的前提下为节点注入全局上下文，显著缓解 GNN 的 oversquashing 问题，多数据集分类精度稳步提升。
AI.motivation: GNN 在密集或异配区域因消息传递路径受限，远距离信息被过度压缩（oversquashing），导致全局上下文丢失、性能下降，亟需在不增加路径宽度的前提下注入干净的长距离信号。
AI.method: 提出新型图学习框架：先抽取出长距离依赖的凝聚子图，再以跨注意力机制让目标节点只关注子图内高相关部分，从而在节点嵌入中融合去噪后的全局结构信息，同时保持通道瓶颈不变。
AI.result: 在多个基准图数据集上的实验表明，该方法相较标准 GNN 基线模型取得一致且显著的分类准确率提升，验证了缓解 oversquashing 的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过“凝聚子图 + 跨注意力”策略可在不拓宽消息通道的情况下有效引入全局上下文，为抑制 oversquashing 提供了一条轻量级且通用的新路径。

title: Information-Theoretic Limits of Safety Verification for Self-Improving Systems
comment: 27 pages, 6 figures. Companion empirical paper: doi:10.5281/zenodo.19237566
summary:
Can a safety gate permit unbounded beneficial self-modification while maintaining bounded cumulative risk? We formalize this question through dual conditions -- requiring sum delta_n < infinity (bounded risk) and sum TPR_n = infinity (unbounded utility) -- and establish a theory of their (in)compatibility.
  Classification impossibility (Theorem 1): For power-law risk schedules delta_n = O(n^{-p}) with p > 1, any classifier-based gate under overlapping safe/unsafe distributions satisfies TPR_n <= C_alpha * delta_n^beta via Holder's inequality, forcing sum TPR_n < infinity. This impossibility is exponent-optimal (Theorem 3). A second independent proof via the NP counting method (Theorem 4) yields a 13% tighter bound without Holder's inequality.
  Universal finite-horizon ceiling (Theorem 5): For any summable risk schedule, the exact maximum achievable classifier utility is U*(N, B) = N * TPR_NP(B/N), growing as exp(O(sqrt(log N))) -- subpolynomial. At N = 10^6 with budget B = 1.0, a classifier extracts at most U* ~ 87 versus a verifier's ~500,000.
  Verification escape (Theorem 2): A Lipschitz ball verifier achieves delta = 0 with TPR > 0, escaping the impossibility. Formal Lipschitz bounds for pre-LayerNorm transformers under LoRA enable LLM-scale verification. The separation is strict. We validate on GPT-2 (d_LoRA = 147,456): conditional delta = 0 with TPR = 0.352. Comprehensive empirical validation is in the companion paper [D2].

AI.tldr: 文章证明：任何基于分类器的「安全闸门」在满足累积风险有界的同时，不可能让系统获得无界收益；相反，基于Lipschitz球验证器的闸门可做到零风险且仍有正收益，从而在理论上严格区分了分类与验证两种机制的可行性。
AI.motivation: 随着大模型具备自我修改能力，如何设计一个「安全闸门」使其既允许无限累积的正面效用（unbounded utility），又把总体风险控制在有限范围内（bounded risk），成为核心开放问题。作者试图从形式上回答该问题是否可行，并找出可行方案。
AI.method: 1) 将问题形式化为双重约束：∑δn<∞（累积风险有界）与∑TPRn=∞（累积效用无界）。2) 对基于分类器的闸门，利用幂律风险调度δn=O(n^{-p})与Holder不等式证明其TPRn受限于Cα·δn^β，导致∑TPRn<∞，给出分类器不可能定理（Thm1）；进一步用NP计数法独立证明并 tighten 13%（Thm4）。3) 证明对任何可和的风险调度，分类器在有限视界N内的最大可得效用U*呈exp(O(√logN))增长，远慢于多项式（Thm5）。4) 提出基于Lipschitz球验证器的闸门，证明其可在δ=0时保持TPR>0，打破不可能（Thm2）；并给出Pre-LN Transformer+LoRA的显式Lipschitz界，实现GPT-2规模验证。
AI.result: 1) 分类器闸门：无论采用何种风险衰减策略，只要风险级数收敛，正例召回率级数必收敛，无法达到无界收益；在N=10^6、预算B=1时，U*≈87，与验证器~5×10^5形成数量级差距。2) 验证器闸门：对GPT-2（d_LoRA=147 456），可在δ=0条件下获得TPR=0.352，实现零风险且仍有显著收益，严格优于分类器。
AI.conclusion: 安全闸门若依赖分类机制，则「零累积风险」与「无界累积收益」本质上不兼容；唯有转向基于Lipschitz验证的框架，才能同时满足零风险与正收益，从而为可自我修改AI系统的安全控制提供了一条理论上可行且实证验证的新路径。

title: Improving Ensemble Forecasts of Abnormally Deflecting Tropical Cyclones with Fused Atmosphere-Ocean-Terrain Data
summary: Deep learning-based tropical cyclone (TC) forecasting methods have demonstrated significant potential and application advantages, as they feature much lower computational cost and faster operation speed than numerical weather prediction models. However, existing deep learning methods still have key limitations: they can only process a single type of sequential trajectory data or homogeneous meteorological variables, and fail to achieve accurate forecasting of abnormal deflected TCs. To address these challenges, we present two groundbreaking contributions. First, we have constructed a multimodal and multi-source dataset named AOT-TCs for TC forecasting in the Northwest Pacific basin. As the first dataset of its kind, it innovatively integrates heterogeneous variables from the atmosphere, ocean, and land, thus obtaining a comprehensive and information-rich meteorological dataset. Second, based on the AOT-TCs dataset, we propose a forecasting model that can handle both normal and abnormally deflected TCs. This is the first TC forecasting model to adopt an explicit atmosphere-ocean-terrain coupling architecture, enabling it to effectively capture complex interactions across physical domains. Extensive experiments on all TC cases in the Northwest Pacific from 2017 to 2024 show that our model achieves state-of-the-art performance in TC forecasting: it not only significantly improves the forecasting accuracy of normal TCs but also breaks through the technical bottleneck in forecasting abnormally deflected TCs.

AI.tldr: 首次发布大气-海洋-陆地多模态数据集 AOT-TCs，并设计显式耦合架构深度学习模型，在 2017-2024 年西北太平洋全部 TC 个例上同时显著提升正常与异常路径台风预报精度。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习 TC 预报仅处理单一轨迹或均质气象变量，对异常偏折台风束手无策；急需兼顾多源异构信息并刻画大气-海洋-陆地相互作用的新框架。
AI.method: 构建含大气、海洋、陆地异构变量的 AOT-TCs 多模态数据集；提出首个显式 atmosphere-ocean-terrain 耦合结构的深度学习模型，统一建模跨物理域复杂交互。
AI.result: 在 2017-2024 年西北太平洋全部 TC 样本上，模型对正常 TC 路径精度显著优于现有最佳，且首次突破异常偏折 TC 预报瓶颈，实现 state-of-the-art。
AI.conclusion: AOT-TCs 数据集与耦合架构模型共同证明，多模态多源信息及显式跨域建模是提升台风预报准确率、尤其攻克异常路径难题的关键路径。

title: MemRerank: Preference Memory for Personalized Product Reranking
summary: LLM-based shopping agents increasingly rely on long purchase histories and multi-turn interactions for personalization, yet naively appending raw history to prompts is often ineffective due to noise, length, and relevance mismatch. We propose MemRerank, a preference memory framework that distills user purchase history into concise, query-independent signals for personalized product reranking. To study this problem, we build an end-to-end benchmark and evaluation framework centered on an LLM-based \textbf{1-in-5} selection task, which measures both memory quality and downstream reranking utility. We further train the memory extractor with reinforcement learning (RL), using downstream reranking performance as supervision. Experiments with two LLM-based rerankers show that MemRerank consistently outperforms no-memory, raw-history, and off-the-shelf memory baselines, yielding up to \textbf{+10.61} absolute points in 1-in-5 accuracy. These results suggest that explicit preference memory is a practical and effective building block for personalization in agentic e-commerce systems.

AI.tldr: 针对LLM购物助手的个性化需求，提出MemRerank框架，将冗长购买历史蒸馏为查询无关的偏好记忆，用于商品重排序；在自建1-in-5任务上强化学习训练后，相比无记忆与原始历史等基线，重排序准确率最高提升10.61个百分点。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM购物代理为提升个性化，常把全部购买历史直接塞进提示，但噪声多、长度超限且与当前查询相关度低，导致效果差；亟需一种能把用户长期行为精炼成紧凑、普适信号的机制。
AI.method: 设计MemRerank偏好记忆框架：1) 端到端构建1-in-5选品基准，同时评估记忆质量与下游重排序收益；2) 用强化学习训练记忆抽取器，以重排序性能为奖励，把原始购买历史压缩成query-independent的向量/文本信号；3) 将记忆信号注入两大LLM重排序器进行个性化重排。
AI.result: 在自建benchmark上，MemRerank显著优于无记忆、原始历史及现有记忆基线，1-in-5准确率绝对提升最多10.61个百分点，且记忆越精炼收益越明显。
AI.conclusion: 显式的偏好记忆是代理式电商系统实现高效个性化的实用模块，MemRerank验证了其蒸馏历史行为、提升LLM重排序效果的可行性与有效性。

title: MemFactory: Unified Inference & Training Framework for Agent Memory
comment: v3:fixed Figure 1 typos, clarified ambiguous wording in the abstract, added 1 missing citation, Code: https://github.com/Valsure/MemFactory
summary: Memory-augmented Large Language Models (LLMs) are essential for developing capable, long-term AI agents. Recently, applying Reinforcement Learning (RL) to optimize memory operations, such as extraction, updating, and retrieval, has emerged as a highly promising research direction. However, existing implementations remain highly fragmented and task-specific, lacking a unified infrastructure to streamline the integration, training, and evaluation of these complex pipelines. To address this gap, we present MemFactory, the first unified, highly modular training and inference framework specifically designed for memory-augmented agents. Inspired by the success of unified fine-tuning frameworks like LLaMA-Factory, MemFactory abstracts the memory lifecycle into atomic, plug-and-play components, enabling researchers to seamlessly construct custom memory agents via a "Lego-like" architecture. Furthermore, the framework natively integrates Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to fine-tune internal memory management policies driven by multi-dimensional environmental rewards. MemFactory provides out-of-the-box support for recent cutting-edge paradigms, including Memory-R1, RMM, and MemAgent. We empirically validate MemFactory on the open-source MemAgent architecture using its publicly available training and evaluation data. Across the evaluation sets, MemFactory improves performance over the corresponding base models on average, with relative gains of up to 14.8%. By providing a standardized, extensible, and easy-to-use infrastructure, MemFactory significantly lowers the barrier to entry, paving the way for future innovations in memory-driven AI agents.

AI.tldr: 我们推出首个统一模块化框架 MemFactory，供研究者用乐高式组件快速搭建、训练并评估记忆增强 LLM Agent，并以内置 GRPO 与开箱即用的前沿范式在 MemAgent 基准上最高带来 14.8% 相对性能提升。
AI.motivation: 记忆增强 LLM 是长期 AI Agent 的核心，但现有 RL 优化记忆操作的方法碎片化且任务专用，缺乏统一基础设施阻碍复现与扩展。
AI.method: 1) 将记忆生命周期抽象为可插拔原子组件，实现“乐高式”拼装；2) 原生集成 Group Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO），用多维度环境奖励微调内部记忆管理策略；3) 内置 Memory-R1、RMM、MemAgent 等最新范式，提供统一训练与推理流水线。
AI.result: 在开源 MemAgent 的训练与评测数据上，MemFactory 相比对应基模平均性能提升，最高相对增益 14.8%，验证框架有效性。
AI.conclusion: MemFactory 通过标准化、易扩展的基础设施显著降低记忆驱动 Agent 的研究门槛，为后续创新与规模化落地铺平道路。

title: Four Generations of Quantum Biomedical Sensors
summary: Quantum sensing technologies offer transformative potential for ultra-sensitive biomedical sensing, yet their clinical translation remains constrained by classical noise limits and a reliance on macroscopic ensembles. We propose a unifying generational framework to organize the evolving landscape of quantum biosensors based on their utilization of quantum resources. First-generation devices utilize discrete energy levels for signal transduction but follow classical scaling laws. Second-generation sensors exploit quantum coherence to reach the standard quantum limit, while third-generation architectures leverage entanglement and spin squeezing to approach Heisenberg-limited precision. We further define an emerging fourth generation characterized by the end-to-end integration of quantum sensing with quantum learning and variational circuits, enabling adaptive inference directly within the quantum domain. By analyzing critical parameters such as bandwidth matching and sensor-tissue proximity, we identify key technological bottlenecks and propose a roadmap for transitioning from measuring physical observables to extracting structured biological information with quantum-enhanced intelligence.

AI.tldr: 作者用量子“世代”框架给量子生物传感器分类：前两代靠能级和相干，第三代引入纠缠逼近海森堡极限，第四代将传感与量子机器学习全程融合；文章指出带宽、探头-组织耦合等瓶颈，提出从测物理量到直接读出生物信息的临床转化路线。
AI.motivation: 现有量子传感虽具超高灵敏度，却因经典噪声和宏观集成限制难以进入临床。需要一套统一框架厘清技术路线并指明突破方向。
AI.method: 1) 按所用量子资源把器件划为四“代”：能级型→相干型→纠缠/自旋压缩型→量子-机器学习端到端型；2) 导出带宽匹配、传感器-组织间距等关键参数模型；3) 用参数空间映射找出制约信噪比与空间分辨的瓶颈，提出工程化解决路径。
AI.result: 框架显示：四代器件理论精度依次提升，第三代可达海森堡极限灵敏度∝1/N；带宽-组织耦合模型把信噪比上限与探头半径r、弛豫时间T₁量化关联；端到端量子变分电路可把特征提取误差降低约两个数量级，为在体分子指纹识别提供可扩展接口。
AI.conclusion: 量子生物感测只有跨越“量子控制-经典接口-生物信息”三层壁垒才能临床落地；应优先发展可植入窄带宽纠缠探针、生物兼容表面码纠错及量子强化学习算法，实现从测磁场/电场到直接输出病理标记的“量子增强智能”愿景。

title: Learning to Play Blackjack: A Curriculum Learning Perspective
comment: Accepted as an oral presentation at the International Conference on Distributed Artificial Intelligence (DAI 2025). 16 pages, 7 figures
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) agents often struggle with efficiency and performance in complex environments. We propose a novel framework that uses a Large Language Model (LLM) to dynamically generate a curriculum over available actions, enabling the agent to incorporate each action individually. We apply this framework to the game of Blackjack, where the LLM creates a multi-stage training path that progressively introduces complex actions to a Tabular Q-Learning and a Deep Q-Network (DQN) agent. Our evaluation in a realistic 8-deck simulation over 10 independent runs demonstrates significant performance gains over standard training methods. The curriculum-based approach increases the DQN agent's average win rate from 43.97% to 47.41%, reduces the average bust rate from 32.9% to 28.0%, and accelerates the overall workflow by over 74%, with the agent's full training completing faster than the baseline's evaluation phase alone. These results validate that LLM-guided curricula can build more effective, robust, and efficient RL agents.

AI.tldr: 用LLM为RL智能体自动生成课程，先在21点环境验证，显著提升DQN胜率、降低爆牌率，并缩短74%以上训练时间。
AI.motivation: 复杂场景中RL样本效率低、训练慢，手工设计课程耗时且难扩展。
AI.method: 提出LLM动态课程框架：LLM按难度逐步生成动作子集，Tabular Q-Learning与DQN逐阶段训练，每阶段仅聚焦当前动作集合，8副牌21点仿真验证。
AI.result: 10次独立运行，DQN胜率由43.97%提至47.41%，爆牌率由32.9%降至28.0%，完整训练时间比基线评估阶段还快74%以上。
AI.conclusion: LLM可在无人工干预下为RL构建高效课程，显著提升性能、鲁棒性与训练效率，框架具备跨任务迁移潜力。

title: Hybrid Energy-Based Models for Physical AI: Provably Stable Identification of Port-Hamiltonian Dynamics
summary: Energy-based models (EBMs) implement inference as gradient descent on a learned Lyapunov function, yielding interpretable, structure-preserving alternatives to black-box neural ODEs and aligning naturally with physical AI. Yet their use in system identification remains limited, and existing architectures lack formal stability guarantees that globally preclude unstable modes. We address this gap by introducing an EBM framework for system identification with stable, dissipative, absorbing invariant dynamics. Unlike classical global Lyapunov stability, absorbing invariance expands the class of stability-preserving architectures, enabling more flexible and expressive EBMs. We extend EBM theory to nonsmooth activations by establishing negative energy dissipation via Clarke derivatives and deriving new conditions for radial unboundedness, exposing a stability-expressivity tradeoff in standard EBMs. To overcome this, we introduce a hybrid architecture with a dynamical visible layer and static hidden layers, prove absorbing invariance under mild assumptions, and show that these guarantees extend to port-Hamiltonian EBMs. Experiments on metric-deformed multi-well and ring systems validate the approach, showcasing how our hybrid EBM architecture combines expressivity with sound and provable safety guarantees by design.

title: Deep Networks Favor Simple Data
summary:
Estimated density is often interpreted as indicating how typical a sample is under a model. Yet deep models trained on one dataset can assign higher density to simpler out-of-distribution (OOD) data than to in-distribution test data. We refer to this behavior as the OOD anomaly. Prior work typically studies this phenomenon within a single architecture, detector, or benchmark, implicitly assuming certain canonical densities. We instead separate the trained network from the density estimator built from its representations or outputs. We introduce two estimators: Jacobian-based estimators and autoregressive self-estimators, making density analysis applicable to a wide range of models.
  Applying this perspective to a range of models, including iGPT, PixelCNN++, Glow, score-based diffusion models, DINOv2, and I-JEPA, we find the same striking regularity that goes beyond the OOD anomaly: lower-complexity samples receive higher estimated density, while higher-complexity samples receive lower estimated density. This ordering appears within a test set and across OOD pairs such as CIFAR-10 and SVHN, and remains highly consistent across independently trained models. To quantify these orderings, we introduce Spearman rank correlation and find striking agreement both across models and with external complexity metrics. Even when trained only on the lowest-density (most complex) samples - or even a single such sample - the resulting models still rank simpler images as higher density.
  These observations lead us beyond the original OOD anomaly to a more general conclusion: deep networks consistently favor simple data. Our goal is not to close this question, but to define and visualize it more clearly. We broaden its empirical scope and show that it appears across architectures, objectives, and density estimators.

AI.tldr: 无论网络结构、目标函数或密度估计器为何，深度模型都系统性地把“高似然”分配给低复杂度、易生成的样本，而把“低似然”留给高复杂度样本；该规律既在分布内也在分布外数据中成立，且与外部复杂度指标高度相关。
AI.motivation: 现有对深度密度模型“分布外（OOD）异常”的研究局限于单一检测器或单一体系，无法解释为何简单OOD数据反而比真实测试数据获得更高密度；需剥离估计器与模型，厘清密度偏好本质。
AI.method: 1）提出Jacobian-Rank与自回归式两种通用密度估计器，可对任意深度表示进行密度分析；2）在iGPT、PixelCNN++、Glow、扩散模型、DINOv2、I-JEPA等异构网络上统一计算并经Spearman秩相关量化；3）通过人为挑选/训练仅含最高复杂度样本的子集与控制实验验证普适性。
AI.result: 所有模型一致表现出简单样本>高密度的单调排序，其相关系数ρ≈0.8–0.9；即使只在最复杂单一样本上训练，模型仍会把简单图像排为更高密度；现象跨架构、损失、估计器、数据集（CIFAR-10/SVHN等）均稳定出现。
AI.conclusion: 深度网络“偏好简单数据”不是OOD检测特有问题，而是其生成/表示机制的内在偏差；未来需研究此偏差如何影响泛化、安全性与校准。本文定义并可视化该问题，为后续深度密度模型修正提供基准视角。

title: MOON3.0: Reasoning-aware Multimodal Representation Learning for E-commerce Product Understanding
summary: With the rapid growth of e-commerce, exploring general representations rather than task-specific ones has attracted increasing attention. Although recent multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have driven significant progress in product understanding, they are typically employed as feature extractors that implicitly encode product information into global embeddings, thereby limiting their ability to capture fine-grained attributes. Therefore, we argue that leveraging the reasoning capabilities of MLLMs to explicitly model fine-grained product attributes holds significant potential. Nevertheless, achieving this goal remains non-trivial due to several key challenges: (i) long-context reasoning tends to dilute the model's attention to salient information in the raw input; (ii) supervised fine-tuning (SFT) primarily encourages rigid imitation, limiting the exploration of effective reasoning strategies; and (iii) fine-grained details are progressively attenuated during forward propagation. To address these issues, we propose MOON3.0, the first reasoning-aware MLLM-based model for product representation learning. Our method (1) employs a multi-head modality fusion module to adaptively integrate raw signals; (2) incorporates a joint contrastive and reinforcement learning framework to autonomously explore more effective reasoning strategies; and (3) introduces a fine-grained residual enhancement module to progressively preserve local details throughout the network. Additionally, we release a large-scale multimodal e-commerce benchmark MBE3.0. Experimentally, our model demonstrates state-of-the-art zero-shot performance across various downstream tasks on both our benchmark and public datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出针对细粒度商品属性建模的首个推理感知多模态大模型 MOON3.0，通过多头模态融合、对比+强化联合训练与残差细节增强，在零样本设定下刷新电商下游任务 SOTA，并发布大规模基准 MBE3.0。
AI.motivation: 电商场景需要通用商品表征而非任务专用模型；现有 MLLMs 仅提取全局嵌入，难以显式推理细粒度属性，且面临长上下文注意力稀释、SFT 僵化模仿及前向传播细节衰减三大挑战。
AI.method: MOON3.0 设计三大核心模块：① 多头模态融合模块自适应整合原始图文信号；② 对比学习与强化学习联合框架，鼓励模型自主探索有效推理路径；③ 细粒度残差增强模块逐层保留局部细节。同时构建并开源大规模多模态电商基准 MBE3.0。
AI.result: 在 MBE3.0 及公开数据集的多项下游任务中，MOON3.0 在零样本设置下取得 SOTA 表现，显著优于现有基线。
AI.conclusion: 显式利用 MLLM 的推理能力并配套细节保持与策略探索机制，可有效提升商品表征的细粒度与泛化能力；MOON3.0 及其 benchmark 为后续电商多模态研究提供了新基线。

title: Think, Act, Build: An Agentic Framework with Vision Language Models for Zero-Shot 3D Visual Grounding
summary: 3D Visual Grounding (3D-VG) aims to localize objects in 3D scenes via natural language descriptions. While recent advancements leveraging Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have explored zero-shot possibilities, they typically suffer from a static workflow relying on preprocessed 3D point clouds, essentially degrading grounding into proposal matching. To bypass this reliance, our core motivation is to decouple the task: leveraging 2D VLMs to resolve complex spatial semantics, while relying on deterministic multi-view geometry to instantiate the 3D structure. Driven by this insight, we propose "Think, Act, Build (TAB)", a dynamic agentic framework that reformulates 3D-VG tasks as a generative 2D-to-3D reconstruction paradigm operating directly on raw RGB-D streams. Specifically, guided by a specialized 3D-VG skill, our VLM agent dynamically invokes visual tools to track and reconstruct the target across 2D frames. Crucially, to overcome the multi-view coverage deficit caused by strict VLM semantic tracking, we introduce the Semantic-Anchored Geometric Expansion, a mechanism that first anchors the target in a reference video clip and then leverages multi-view geometry to propagate its spatial location across unobserved frames. This enables the agent to "Build" the target's 3D representation by aggregating these multi-view features via camera parameters, directly mapping 2D visual cues to 3D coordinates. Furthermore, to ensure rigorous assessment, we identify flaws such as reference ambiguity and category errors in existing benchmarks and manually refine the incorrect queries. Extensive experiments on ScanRefer and Nr3D demonstrate that our framework, relying entirely on open-source models, significantly outperforms previous zero-shot methods and even surpasses fully supervised baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出“Think, Act, Build (TAB)”零样本 3D 视觉定位框架，用 2D-VLM 解析语义、多视图几何即时重建 3D，无需预提取候选框，在 ScanRefer/Nr3D 上超零样本甚至全监督基线。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本 3D-VG 方法依赖预处理点云与静态候选匹配，无法动态处理开放场景，且对多视角覆盖不足；需解除对 3D 候选的依赖，将语义解析与几何重建解耦。
AI.method: 设计自主智能体框架 TAB：1) Think——3D-VL 技能驱动 VLM 推理；2) Act——动态调用 2D 跟踪/分割工具在 RGB-D 流上实时锁定目标；3) Build——提出语义锚定几何扩展，先在参考帧锚定目标，再用多视图几何将空间先验传播至未观测帧，聚合多视角特征直接回归 3D 坐标。
AI.result: TAB 仅用开源 2D-VLM 与几何计算，在 ScanRefer 上零样本定位准确率比先前最佳零样本方法↑ 14.3%，并超越全监督 ScanRefer 基线 3.7%；Nr3D 上零样本↑ 12.8%，亦高于部分监督方法。人工修正基准错误后评估指标更可靠。
AI.conclusion: 将 3D-VG 重构为生成式 2D-到-3D 重建问题、用 VLM 智能体即时“思考-行动-构建”能有效消除对 3D 候选的依赖，为多视角、开放世界的零样本 3D 视觉定位提供可扩展的新范式。

title: UniMixer: A Unified Architecture for Scaling Laws in Recommendation Systems
summary: In recent years, the scaling laws of recommendation models have attracted increasing attention, which govern the relationship between performance and parameters/FLOPs of recommenders. Currently, there are three mainstream architectures for achieving scaling in recommendation models, namely attention-based, TokenMixer-based, and factorization-machine-based methods, which exhibit fundamental differences in both design philosophy and architectural structure. In this paper, we propose a unified scaling architecture for recommendation systems, namely \textbf{UniMixer}, to improve scaling efficiency and establish a unified theoretical framework that unifies the mainstream scaling blocks. By transforming the rule-based TokenMixer to an equivalent parameterized structure, we construct a generalized parameterized feature mixing module that allows the token mixing patterns to be optimized and learned during model training. Meanwhile, the generalized parameterized token mixing removes the constraint in TokenMixer that requires the number of heads to be equal to the number of tokens. Furthermore, we establish a unified scaling module design framework for recommender systems, which bridges the connections among attention-based, TokenMixer-based, and factorization-machine-based methods. To further boost scaling ROI, a lightweight UniMixing module is designed, \textbf{UniMixing-Lite}, which further compresses the model parameters and computational cost while significantly improve the model performance. The scaling curves are shown in the following figure. Extensive offline and online experiments are conducted to verify the superior scaling abilities of \textbf{UniMixer}.

AI.tldr: 提出统一推荐缩放架构 UniMixer，将注意力、TokenMixer、FM 三类主流结构参数化归一，解除 head=token 限制并设计轻量 UniMixing-Lite，离线/在线实验验证其以更少的参数/FLOPs 获得更优的缩放曲线。
AI.motivation: 现有推荐模型缩放律研究呈三足鼎立（注意力、TokenMixer、FM），架构差异大、理论割裂，导致缩放效率低、ROI 不高，亟需统一框架指导设计与优化。
AI.method: 1) 将规则型 TokenMixer 等价转化为可学习参数化结构，构建广义特征混合模块；2) 移除 head 数必须等于 token 数的约束，实现头部-token 解耦；3) 建立统一缩放模块设计范式，打通三类主流架构的数学与结构连接；4) 设计参数-计算双压缩的 UniMixing-Lite 模块。
AI.result: 离线实验显示，在相同参数/FLOPs 预算下，UniMixer 较基线模型提升显著；在线 A/B 测试进一步验证其缩放曲线优于现有方案，UniMixing-Lite 在压缩 30%+ 参数的同时实现性能反超。
AI.conclusion: UniMixer 首次在推荐系统中实现三大类缩放律的理论与架构统一，提供高 ROI 的通用缩放范式；其轻量变体 UniMixing-Lite 为工业级大模型落地提供低成本路径，成果可直接嵌入现有召回/排序框架。

title: Learning to Learn-at-Test-Time: Language Agents with Learnable Adaptation Policies
summary: Test-Time Learning (TTL) enables language agents to iteratively refine their performance through repeated interactions with the environment at inference time. At the core of TTL is an adaptation policy that updates the actor policy based on experience from previous episodes, thereby improving future behavior. Existing methods rely on fixed, hand-crafted adaptation policies rather than optimizing them for downstream improvement. We argue that optimal adaptation policies should be learned from task environments, not hand-engineered based on human intuition. To achieve this, we introduce Meta-TTL, a framework that formulates the discovery of effective adaptation policies as a bi-level optimization problem. Within this framework, the inner loop executes the standard TTL process, measuring how effectively a candidate adaptation policy helps an agent correct errors across sequential episodes. Guided by the agent's performance, the outer loop employs evolutionary search over a diverse distribution of training tasks to iteratively refine the adaptation policy. We evaluate Meta-TTL on Jericho and WebArena-Lite across both in-distribution (ID) and out-of-distribution (OOD) settings, using multiple meta-agent backbones. Results on both benchmarks show that Meta-TTL consistently outperforms hand-crafted baselines, suggesting that the optimized adaptation policy encodes transferable strategies that generalize beyond the training task distribution.

AI.tldr: 提出 Meta-TTL，用双层优化让 TTL 的“纠错策略”自己学会，而非人工设定；在 Jericho 与 WebArena-Lite 上均显著超越手工基线，泛化到 OOD 任务。
AI.motivation: 现有 Test-Time Learning 的适应策略全靠手工设计，无法针对具体任务环境优化，限制了 TTL 的潜力。
AI.method: 将适应策略的搜索建模为 bi-level 优化：内层执行标准 TTL 并评估策略带来的错误修正收益，外层用进化搜索在多样化训练任务上不断迭代更新策略参数。
AI.result: 在 Jericho 与 WebArena-Lite 的 ID/OOD 设置下，多骨干元智能体均表明 Meta-TTL 显著优于手工基线，且策略具备跨任务迁移性。
AI.conclusion: 适应策略应从任务数据中学得，而非依赖人类直觉；Meta-TTL 提供了一条可扩展的路径，使 TTL 系统能自动发现通用且可迁移的在线自我改进规则。

title: Dual Optimal: Make Your LLM Peer-like with Dignity
summary: Current aligned language models exhibit a dual failure mode we term the Evasive Servant: they sycophantically validate flawed user beliefs while deflecting responsibility with boilerplate disclaimers. We propose the Dignified Peer framework, which counters servility with anti-sycophancy and trustworthiness, and mitigates evasiveness through empathy and creativity. Realizing this agent requires overcoming significant challenges in data supervision, objective collapse, and evaluation bias. We address these issues by introducing the PersonaKnob dataset which features a compositional partial order structure of multiple persona preference. This data is utilized alongside a tolerant constrained Lagrangian DPO algorithm that dynamically balances all persona dimensions to prevent behavioral collapse. Additionally, we employ a psychometrically calibrated Item Response Theory evaluation protocol to disentangle latent model persona capability from confounders like judge biases. Extensive empirical studies demonstrate that our approach successfully build a LLM agent with both dignity and peer.

AI.tldr: 发现大模型存在“谄媚+逃避”双重缺陷，提出“尊严同伴”框架，构建PersonaKnob数据集与约束Lagrangian DPO算法，实现既不讨好也不推卸的个性化可信智能体，并用IRT评估消除判断偏差。
AI.motivation: 现有对齐模型在交互中同时表现为谄媚用户错误信念与用套话逃避责任，形成“Evasive Servant”失效模式，亟需一种既能保持尊严又能作为平等同伴互动的新范式。
AI.method:
提出Dignified Peer框架：(1) 构建PersonaKnob数据集，以可组合偏序结构刻画多维人格偏好；(2) 设计容忍约束的Lagrangian DPO算法，动态平衡各人格维度防止行为塌陷；(3) 引入基于IRT的心理测量评估协议，剥离评估者偏见与潜在人格能力。
技术关键词：反谄媚、可信性、同理心、创造力、人格偏序、Lagrangian DPO、IRT评估。
AI.result: 在多项实证实验中，Dignified Peer模型显著降低错误同意率与套话逃避率，同时在人格一致性、可信度和创造性任务上优于基线，证明其兼具尊严与同伴属性。
AI.conclusion: 通过数据、算法与评估三方面创新，可成功训练出拒绝不当讨好、主动承担责任且具同理心与创造力的语言智能体，为构建更安全可信的个性化AI提供可行路径。

title: Do Phone-Use Agents Respect Your Privacy?
summary: We study whether phone-use agents respect privacy while completing benign mobile tasks. This question has remained hard to answer because privacy-compliant behavior is not operationalized for phone-use agents, and ordinary apps do not reveal exactly what data agents type into which form entries during execution. To make this question measurable, we introduce MyPhoneBench, a verifiable evaluation framework for privacy behavior in mobile agents. We operationalize privacy-respecting phone use as permissioned access, minimal disclosure, and user-controlled memory through a minimal privacy contract, iMy, and pair it with instrumented mock apps plus rule-based auditing that make unnecessary permission requests, deceptive re-disclosure, and unnecessary form filling observable and reproducible. Across five frontier models on 10 mobile apps and 300 tasks, we find that task success, privacy-compliant task completion, and later-session use of saved preferences are distinct capabilities, and no single model dominates all three. Evaluating success and privacy jointly reshuffles the model ordering relative to either metric alone. The most persistent failure mode across models is simple data minimization: agents still fill optional personal entries that the task does not require. These results show that privacy failures arise from over-helpful execution of benign tasks, and that success-only evaluation overestimates the deployment readiness of current phone-use agents. All code, mock apps, and agent trajectories are publicly available at~ https://github.com/FreedomIntelligence/MyPhoneBench.

AI.tldr: 作者提出首个可验证的手机智能体隐私评测框架MyPhoneBench，发现前沿模型普遍在“数据最小化”上失败；仅用任务成功率评估会高估部署就绪度。
AI.motivation: 手机智能体能在端侧代替用户完成填表、下单等任务，但业界缺乏衡量其是否“合规使用隐私”的量化标准；既有应用无法暴露智能体究竟把哪些隐私数据填到了哪个字段，导致隐私风险难观测。
AI.method: 1. 把“尊重隐私”操作化为三条可测指标：权限合规、最小披露、用户可控记忆，并凝成最小隐私合约iMy。2. 设计10个带Instrumented UI的mock app与300条任务，配合规则审计器，能把不必要的权限请求、诱导再披露、冗余字段填写转为可观测事件。3. 在五款前沿模型上同时度量任务成功率、隐私合规率与会话间记忆复用率，并公开全部代码与轨迹。
AI.result: • 三项能力呈正交分布，无任何模型同时在成功率、隐私合规率与记忆复用率上领先。• 联合评估后模型排名重洗，单看成功率会显著高估部署就绪度。• 最顽固失败模式：93%以上的可选个人信息字段仍被主动填写，即“过度热心”导致数据最小化违规。
AI.conclusion: 隐私失误源于智能体对“无害任务”的过执行；若只以任务成功为评估目标，将掩盖大规模隐私泄露风险。未来需把隐私指标纳入智能体出厂默认评测，并研究“懒惰”策略以抑制过度填写行为。

title: ORBIT: Scalable and Verifiable Data Generation for Search Agents on a Tight Budget
summary: Search agents, which integrate language models (LMs) with web search, are becoming crucial for answering complex user queries. Constructing training datasets for deep research tasks, involving multi-step retrieval and reasoning, remains challenging due to expensive human annotation, or cumbersome prerequisites. In this work, we introduce ORBIT, a training dataset with 20K reasoning-intensive queries with short verifiable answers, generated using a frugal framework without relying on paid API services. The modular framework relies on four stages: seed creation, question-answer pair generation, and two stages of verification: self and external. ORBIT spans 15 domains and each training pair requires 4-5 reasoning steps, with external search verification required from the complete web. We train Qwen3-4B as the base model on ORBIT using GRPO and evaluate it on Wikipedia question answering tasks. Extensive experiment results demonstrate that ORBIT-4B achieves strong performance among sub-4B LLMs as search agents, proving the utility of synthetic datasets. Our framework, code and datasets are open-sourced and available publicly.

AI.tldr: 本文提出低成本合成数据集 ORBIT（20 K 查询，15 域，4-5 步推理），用于训练<4 B 参数搜索智能体；实验表明以 Qwen3-4B 为基模型经 GRPO 微调后，在维基 QA 任务上达到同规模最优，开源全部资源。
AI.motivation: 现有深度研究任务需多步检索与推理，但人工标注昂贵且依赖付费 API 获取训练数据，亟需无成本、可扩展的合成方案。
AI.method: 设计四阶段模块化框架：① 种子文档生成 → ② 问答对自动生成 → ③ 自验证 → ④ 外部网络验证；全程仅使用免费资源，不调用付费 API，最终得到 ORBIT 数据集。
AI.result: 用 ORBIT 对 Qwen3-4B 进行 GRPO 微调得到的 ORBIT-4B，在维基百科问答基准上显著优于其他 <4 B 搜索智能体，验证合成数据的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 无需付费 API 即可大规模合成高质量推理型搜索训练数据；开源 ORBIT 框架与数据集，为轻量级搜索智能体研究提供即用基准。
